chapters.title: Chapter 601: : Opening The Company To The Moon
chapters.body:
Chapter 601: : Opening The Company To The Moon

March ant headquarters in the Ant Theatre,

It is packed.

Zhao Min took the lead, Li Lingfeng, Zhu Li, Zhang Yi, Lao Luo, Yang Mingqi, Li Danni, Wei Zhe, Wang Sijia, etc., all arrived, Xiao Yu was also present, sitting next to Zhao Min.

Lin Zhiyuan, Lin Shu, Li Ruoxuan and other outstanding young management and R&D personnel are also sitting behind them.

Other employees and senior staff at the headquarters are all seated in the area where their respective departments are located.

The core management team, none of them absent.

Not only in the Ant Theatre at the Army Ant headquarters, but also in the headquarters of other branches and subsidiaries around the world, there are high-level presences to organize employees to watch.

This is such a grand scene that the marching ant group is very rare.

Today is the time when Chen Mo published his internal speech in the army ant group in space.

In the impression of many employees, even in the company's annual meeting, Chen Mo ended in a few words, and ordinary employees are less likely to hear what special speech Chen Mo will make.

It is very rare now.

In addition to the employees of the marching ant group, there are no other outsiders.

The marching ant group induced the domino effect because of yesterday’s announcement, and many large countries have announced their intention to return to the moon or land on the moon.

Many reporters hoped to enter the market and get first-hand information on Chen Mo’s internal speech, and they were all turned away.

As time approaches, the voice of the whispering discussion in the Ant Theatre gradually decreases and becomes quiet.

Inside the theater, a huge screen lights up.

After the successful connection, Chen Mo's familiar figure appeared on the screen, wearing a space tight suit, confident, calm, calm, mysterious and fascinating.

When Chen Mo appeared, some female employees did not consciously scream and scream, and even the small fishermen heard in the front row squinted and looked helpless.

She is glad that Chen Mo did not go out and swear, or she has troubles.

Even the serious Zhao Min, his eyes are smiling.

Soon, the applause overshadowed some low voices.

"Hello everyone."

Chen Moyi opened his mouth and the applause on the field did not consciously listen and became quiet.

Although they rarely see Chen Mo, the entire company, the whole of China, the whole world has a legendary story about Chen Mo. Under various circumstances, the employees of the marching ant group have unconsciously treated this mysterious and powerful boss. Full of worship and awe.

"My current location is 400 kilometers high."

At the foot of Chen Mo, wearing a magnetic fixture, ‘station’ in the cabin, try to keep the body stable.

"My location is within the goddess created by our company. I am very happy that I can stand here and meet with you. It is also a rare speech for employees around the world.

From the founding to the present, the marching ant group has experienced soreness and bitterness over the years and has experienced many hardships.

I can assure you that in the current international companies, our company's competitive environment, research and development environment and technological innovation environment are the best.

Here, you don't have to worry about your talent being buried. You don't have to worry about your efforts being stolen by others, and you don't have to worry about your efforts not getting the rewards. You just need to worry that you are eliminated without a skill. .

The company has the best R&D environment and R&D hardware facilities. I hope that the company's R&D personnel should not be bound by the rules and regulations, and must be innovative. Innovation is the company's fresh blood and the only way to keep the company alive.

We are a future company, the future is the next second, and the future is tomorrow. What you need tomorrow is a space shuttle for Star Trek, not a steam train that burns coal whistle.

In research and development, we must have an advanced thinking, have a ‘morning’ thinking, and don’t use the “today’s” brain and knowledge to develop the old technology of 'yesterday’ and waste limited resources. ”

Chen Mo is hard to tell seriously.

The main skills of the marching ant group are from the hands of Chen Mo.

However, it does not mean that the people in the R&D department are not important. Many products of the company need the R&D department to make changes, upgrades and R&D according to the existing market, and constantly refine some products.

Although the technology developed by Chen Mo is the cutting-edge technology, the company's R&D department, closely behind Chen Mo, abandoned the cover of Chen Moguang and is also the world's top R&D team.

The development of marching ants to today, the number of employees has more than 200,000, involving multiple fields, full bloom, relying on Chen Mo alone, certainly not.

He is the leader, so many people behind him, and certainly need support personnel in various fields.

"About the company's talent development. In the future, the company will continue to improve the talent training work. I have discussed with the president and prepared to build a top-level institution for talent training, so that the company has a base for talent training.

If the school is established, in addition to the external enrollment, each year, the company will also draw from the company the outstanding ability of each department to enter the study. I hope that you can work hard to improve your business ability. When opportunities come, you can have enough strength to seize. This opportunity is equal to all of you. ”

This is a question that Zhao Min told him.

Company talent has always been a problem, and their company has been working with international headhunting companies to dig talents everywhere. But the company continues to expand, and there has always been a shortage of talent.

The establishment of colleges and universities will prepare for the unparalleled education in the future and prepare the company for training talents.

With him taking the lead, the company's top research team as a teaching instructor, the technical training content, certainly not bad. With management knowledge, companies can send excellent management to teach and hire the world's top talents.

With the popularity of the marching ant group and the reputation of Chen Mo, as long as the school is established, it will be able to bring talents from around the world.

Increase the company's heritage and competitiveness, have a quality talent training system and supply, the company's development can be longer.

“In addition, the company’s management and all employees are also warned here. We are a company. The employees represent the company’s image and quality, and it is also an intuitive feeling for the company. Good companies must have good staff. We must not forget Our initial heart is to serve our users.

When we are facing users, we must maintain the ambition and image of our company. We can reject the unreasonable demands of our customers, but we cannot do things that are big in the store.

The company is large in scale and strong in strength. We can be more confident in dealing with customers and consumers. However, no matter how large or large the company is, it is not a tool for individual personnel to show superiority to other people and oppress consumers.

The company's assessment of employees will not be relaxed before, and will not be in the future. I don't want one or two black sheep in the company, and the reputation and image of our painstaking efforts are destroyed.

If found, the treatment will not be sympathetic. This is a piece of advice. Now it is necessary to deal with it immediately. There is no need to prevent it. It is related to the company and cannot have any luck. ”

After finishing the basics, Chen Mocai stopped a little.

As the helm of the company, he is mainly to control the general direction of the company, let Zhao Min perform, the problem of subdivision, the people below the company to preside over the refinement, and then improve.

“Many people think that the company is big now. Is the marching ant group big? In terms of the size of the current global company, it is a big company. But in terms of space and time, it is not big, and it’s small and pitiful.

Looking at the Earth from my current position, I can't see our company headquarters, and I can't see anything about our company. Don't settle for the company's current situation, go against the water, the company's future, can't stop because of the current results.

Now that space exploration technology is developing at a high speed, nuclear fusion technology has matured and will be put into use soon. With the advent of the nuclear fusion energy era, the world energy revolution will officially kick off, and the pace of the space age will also accelerate. This is the general trend.

Our company, the key technology that controls the times, is also the key, with the most superior conditions, the most powerful potential and advantages, and can go further.

The next short-term goal is to drive the company to the moon. And the company's long-term goal for the next decade is the starry sky above us. I hope that one hundred years later, the marching ant group is not only an earth company, but the star company of the forefront of human technology. ”

chapters.title: Chapter 602: : Yueshen 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 602: : Yueshen 1

Chen Mo’s internal speech was just completed, and the media got the content of his speech.

On the official website of the Army Ant Group and Weibo, the video and content of Chen Mo’s speech in space were released.

From Chen Mo’s speech, the outside world has interpreted many shocking messages.

Now that interstellar exploration is just hot, the marching ant group is no longer satisfied with the development of the earth and is beginning to look forward to becoming a star company.

Drive the company to the moon.

This sentence has become the headline of the major newspapers.

It is speculated that the next goal of the marching ant group is to build a space station and a lunar base, which will also be the starting point for Chen Moxing.

If this kind of remark comes from the mouth of other companies, it may be regarded as a joke by the outside world.

But now from the mouth of Chen Mo, the meaning is completely different.

And there is another big news from Chen Mo’s speech.

The nuclear power plant is about to open, and the energy revolution is coming soon.

The marching ants master the mature nuclear fusion technology and master the aerospace technology. The moon is the next target of the marching ant group, which is perfectly reasonable.

"The moon is rich in helium-3, which is one of the most ideal fuels for nuclear fusion. For the army ants group that masters nuclear fusion technology, the moon is an inexhaustible treasure house. Successfully established a lunar base on the moon and developed resources. He will master the energy technology of the future of all mankind. Chen Mo’s ambition is not small.”

“Does Chen Mo can privately occupy the moon? Is the lunar resource developed by him?”

"According to the International Law Moon Agreement, Article 11, paragraph 3, any natural resources of the Moon shall not be the property of any State, intergovernmental or non-governmental international organization, state organization or non-governmental entity or any natural person. However, there are no provisions restricting private persons. In the development of the lunar resources of the company, in theory, Chen Mo can develop the lunar resources, whoever mines, but does not take any form of possession of unexploited resources."

The idea of Chen Mo’s opening the company to the moon attracted a global sensation.

The comments were endless. The content of Chen Mo’s internal speech finally made the outside world understand why Chen Mo’s entry into space was within a day, which led to the global power to accelerate the exploration of the moon.

Most countries have not yet reached the moon, and Chen Mo has begun to lick the resources of the moon.

If Chen Mo once again has a favorable resource, it will be very passive for other countries.

In addition to the idea of Chen Mo's moon development, the media also noticed another plan of Chen Mo.

Chen Mo is preparing to create a world-class institution.

To build a top-level university with the current prestige and technical ability of the marching ant group is not a problem at all, and Chen Mo’s personal name is more different.

With Chen Mo’s legendary experience, if the university is completed, it will attract top talents from all over the world. The city of Binhai is not unexpected, and there will be one of the world’s top universities.

The scientific and educational circles have begun to look forward to the emergence of this school established by Chen Mo.

......

On the ground, there is a madness about Chen Mo and the marching ant group.

In the sky, Chen Moying, at the request of Xiaoyu, explained the several moon experiments to the children of the seaside kindergarten and began to pay attention to the launch of the moon satellite.

After dozens of hours of flight, the launching lunar orbit satellites successfully entered the scheduled orbit around the moon, and the Jianmu 1 relay satellite also reached the orbit of Lagrange L2.

The most important two instruments in the lunar satellite launch mission, one is the Jianmu 1 satellite, one is the Luna 1 moon landing device, one is responsible for relay communication, and one is responsible for landing the moon back.

There is an ion engine installed on the satellite. You don't have to worry about the exhaustion of the fuel. You can constantly correct the track. As long as the technology is not a problem, the satellite will never fall. Therefore, there is no accident in the construction of the No. 1 construction project.

Now only the most important Luna 1 is left, and it is still in constant change.

The scheduled landing point is the Zhihai of the south pole of the moon.

In the Aitken Basin, the No. 4 has already landed there. The data shared by Zhang Jianfeng, the environmental data of that area is relatively complete, Chen Mo does not want to grab the place with the official, so choose a new area to explore, and finally determine Zhihai next to the Aitken Basin.

“How is Luna 1?”

Chen Mo looked at the orbital data from the satellite on the screen.

Because the data they received was delayed by about 1 minute, the entire moon landing process of Luna 1 was not controlled by Chen Mo and the ground, but by the artificial intelligence in Luna 1.

The required algorithm and orbit data parameters, Chen Mo has been written into the core of the lander, the computer and artificial intelligence inside the lander will be more laser ranging and feedback data, calculate parameters, adjust attitude and height, and land on their own.

"Jianmu No. 1 and Yanqiao have received the signal of Yueshen No. 1, and Luna 1 is being adjusted to enter the near-month orbit."

Now Chen Mo can do, only wait.

The command of the earth is sent to the moon, and the delay is too great. If the satellite waits for his instructions, the daylily is cold, so it can only be adjusted by artificial intelligence.

"The calculation of the lunar orbit parameters of Luna 1"..."

"Orbital data correction, decelerating..."

"Decelerating, 20 kilometers in height, ready to enter the scheduled landing track..."

"Speed adjustment...speed adjustment..."

"The orbital parameters are being calculated..."

"Luna 1 has successfully entered the scheduled landing track..."

In the orbit above the moon, Luna 1 is constantly in the air, constantly adjusting its posture, and the faint blue light of the ion engine is hidden, and a piece of data is sent out, passing through Jianmu No. 1 and the bridge relay star, and returning to the **** girl. And the ground command center.

"Mergo, Luna 1 has successfully entered the scheduled landing track."

Knowing the data sent back from Luna 1 , the stone of Chen Mo’s heart fell.

Successfully entered the near-month orbit, followed by the process of autonomous landing of Lunao 1. As long as the landing is successful, the lunar launch mission will be successful.

There are two main tasks for Luna 1.

One is to put two small detection robots into the moon's back surface and continue to obtain the environmental and soil data on the back of the moon; the second task is to obtain the return of the moon for research.

The second task is a top priority, related to his plan to build a base on the moon.

The Luna 1 lander is not very large. The installed ion engine has enough power to push the lander into space, so Luna 1 has the ability to return.

When he got back from the moon, he needed to study the lunar soil and find a way to print the building materials with the weathered layer of the lunar soil, which would be convenient for the future construction of the lunar base.

The other three satellites are the environment for continuous exploration of the moon, collecting the necessary data for his next moon landing.

“How long does it take to get to the scheduled landing point from Luna 1?”

"According to the data just sent back, it takes about 3 hours." said the ink girl.

"There is still time."

Chen Mo looked through the glass window to the depths of the distant universe.

chapters.title: Chapter 603: : It’S A Metamorphosis
chapters.body:
Chapter 603: : It’S A Metamorphosis

On the back of the goddess, a figure wearing a spacesuit and connected by a rope stood on it.

It is Chen Mo.

The shoes under the feet are attached to the fuselage of the goddess, and he can stand firmly on the goddess.

"It's beautiful." Chen Mo sighed.

Standing here, you can see this kind of beauty, the blue earth in front of you, the endless star is the end.

It’s just this kind of beauty, it’s beautiful to make people feel flustered. There is no sound around, only mystery and vastness.

The sky is high, and the universe is infinite.

The ancients knew that they were only small in the universe, and truly stood in the universe to realize the feeling of being as small as dust.

He once experienced it in the technology library, but at that time the memory recorded by the science and technology library is now his personal experience, and the two are still very different.

What is human beings for a universe with a diameter of tens of billions of light years? It’s so small that people are flustered. Perhaps humans are in the eyes of some alien creatures, and they are no different from humans looking at bacterial ants.

This kind of really small feeling makes people panic. If a person with a weak mind is standing here, he will really doubt life.

The depths of the endless universe are full of unknowns and awe.

No matter how deep the universe is, he has the mission of exploration. The science and technology library is in his head and can't hide.

The answer to the universe is to find it for himself.

"This bastard, still addicted?"

At the ground command center, Zhao Min saw the video of Chen Mo’s departure from the goddess, which was a headache.

This guy, this time is still chaos, actually out of the cabin, space walk, look at this look, it is estimated that the universe is endless.

If the person who is not the command center informs her, she does not know.

It’s already enough risk to go into space personally, and it’s still an adventure.

It’s been five minutes, and you’re not a professional astronaut, looking out for a life experience.

"Chen Da boss, you should wake up, you will not go back, I will tell Xiaoyu, wait for you to come back, go home and keyboard."

Zhao Min was unable to sit still and went to the microphone in the command center to interrupt Chen Mo.

"..."

For a time, the command center, including Ou Cheng and others who helped Chen Mo to walk out of the cabin, wanted to laugh and laughed, and looked at the two meaningfully.

Those who dare to speak to Chen Mo in this tone come over with a slap in the palm of their hand.

"..."

Chen Mo in space, Zhao Min’s voice came from his ear, and he couldn’t smile, but he could also hear the fear in Zhao Min’s voice.

"Yes, I will go back now."

Uh? ?

The command center was shocked and looked at Zhao Min more deeply.

Chen Mo actually listened.

"You are going up three days, when are you coming back?"

"tomorrow."

"okay, got it."

Zhao Min hangs up the communication with Chen Mo and sees the eyes of the people in the command center. Some of them are not suitable and rush.

"Look at the situation of Luna 1."

Zhao Min’s reminder is that the staff of the command center have returned to God and focused on Luna 1.

This month, Luna 1 carries two important tasks.

It is related to the position of the Flying Ant Center in global space exploration. If successful, the Flying Ant Center will rank among the world's top space explorations, and the benefits can be imagined.

"Luna 1 has 20 minutes to reach the scheduled landing point."

In exchange for the space suit, the ink girl and Chen Mo returned to the control cabin of the goddess.

According to Luna 1 transmission data, soon, Luna 1 arrived at the scheduled landing site. Luna 1 on the moon, arrived at the scheduled point, and the moonfall process was officially launched.

"Luna 1 is preparing to land on the lunar surface, with a height of 15 kilometers!"

"Decelerating... 12 km from the lunar height... 8 km high..."

"Initiation of posture adjustment..."

"The attitude adjustment is complete...close to the moon...the height is 4 kilometers..."

Soon, a piece of data was sent back to the goddess and the flying ant space command center via the relay star.

The people who are concerned about the data, starting with the data reported by the command center, began to get nervous.

They all know that the data is a minute ago, on the moon, the command that Luna 1 is executing, is the data received after one minute.

"It is approaching the moon...1 kilometer high..."

"Luna 1 is hovering...the height is 110 meters...the moon's obstacles are being analyzed..."

"The obstacle analysis is complete..."

"The obstacles are circumvented... ready to land..."

"The height of 20 meters... is precisely avoiding obstacles... ready to land..."

Hey! !

In the command center, only the voice of artificial intelligence reporting, other people are afraid to breathe, for fear of missing the most important moment.

"Height 10 meters... ready to land... ready to land..."

“Lushen No. 1 landed successfully. Location: 28.3 degrees south latitude, 159.6 degrees east longitude.”

Yes! !

Successful! Successful.

When the artificial intelligence prompted the last few words, everyone in the command center jumped up and several people shouted excitedly.

They have successfully landed on the moon. As a team of private companies, they have successfully landed on the moon.

This is the first spacecraft for a private company. On the back of the moon, the countries that can land on the moon in the world, there are still few, they have successfully sent the lander to the back.

After the huge surprise, the staff began to accept the data from Luna 1.

After today, they will become a company that can independently land on the moon.

The announcement of this news will definitely attract a great shock.

And Luna 1 has the task of acquiring lunar soil. Once Luna 1 completes this mission and returns successfully, it will make the world look.

Inside the hall of the Capital Aerospace Flight Control Center.

The staff at this time were all shocked by the results.

The marching ant group borrows the bridge relay to transmit data, they can also receive it here, and they also have a variety of data.

It is now being transmitted in real time, which is the video and photos of the entire process of the moon.

Luna 1 of the marching ant group successfully landed on the back.

A private company has really landed on the moon, and the whole process is exceptionally smooth.

"I feel that we have lived for decades, so smooth, just like jokes." Zhang Jianfeng looked at the data transmission, and finally laughed and sighed.

The members of other lunar exploration engineering teams are somewhat helpless.

"Maybe he used the data we provided, it will be so smooth." A team member said comfortably.

It’s just this comfort, even they can’t convince themselves.

It’s so easy, there are not only a few countries in the world that are successful.

It can only be said that the technology of the marching ant group is too strong.

"Chen Mo is really a metamorphosis." A younger team member couldn't help but vomit.

"..."

Others face each other.

“Moon surface temperature: minus 176 degrees Celsius, lander temperature: 25 degrees Celsius; constant temperature system works normally.”

"The Luna 1 control system is normal."

Chen Mo, who is still in space, also received news of the success of landing.

After the joy, naturally it is the next series of instructions.

Lunao No. 1 uses Amethyst (No. 1024 elemental crystallization) as an energy source. With the energy consumption speed of the lander, it is no problem to maintain the operation for two years. Therefore, it can maintain energy during the night and night without entering the dormant period.

Soon, through the Jianmu 1 satellite, Lunar 1 photographed the lunar color photos.

Still a barren land.

Desolate, dead.

In the first photo I saw, there was no crater, but the magnified can find some moon rocks not far away.

"How is the state of the small robot?"

“Runs normally and can be placed at any time,” said the ink girl.

"Put it."

Chen Mo’s order was issued. Two minutes later, only after seeing the returned picture, Yueshen No. 1 began to launch small robots.

The two small robots are slightly larger than the average shoebox, with eight driving forces. In addition to various sensors, there are six stackable spider arms that can adapt to various terrains.

The material of the small robot is the same as that of the goddess, and it is resistant to extreme cold and extreme temperature changes.

“The launch was successful and the small robot worked fine.”

Not long after, the video of the detection robot that Luna 1 shot in the moon was transmitted back.

“Start collecting specimens of lunar soil and moonstone,” Chen Mo said.

"it is good."

On the ground, I also received various data from Luna 1 and included robot videos and photos.

After successful landing on the moon, enough data has been obtained.

"After processing a set of photos and videos, hand it over to me." Zhao Min told the technical staff at the command center.

“Do you want raw data?” asked the person responsible for processing the data.

"No, this is for public use, and the original data will be processed." Zhao Min said.

Chen Mo was only announced yesterday that he would open the company to the moon. The news of the success of the moon landing today is just right. This is also an opportunity to showcase their company's strength.

chapters.title: Chapter 604: :Princess Hug
chapters.body:
Chapter 604: :Princess Hug

“The director, the marching ant group and the flying ant space company released news that the four lunar orbiting satellites they launched successfully entered the orbit, and the lunar back lander Lunai 1 successfully landed on the back of the moon.”

Jim just entered the door of the office and saw the assistant walked over. The rushing voice gave him a slight glimpse.

"What did you say?"

"The marching ant group successfully launched four lunar satellites, and Luna 1 successfully landed on the back of the moon."

"impossible."

Jim's first reaction was impossible.

As Chen Mo entered space, they had already guessed that the marching ant group might have a moon landing plan in the future.

Because the controlled nuclear fusion technology and the moon's 氦-3, it is a perfect match.

In the internal speech of the marching ant group of the day before yesterday, Chen Mo also confirmed that they had plans to land on the moon. But apart from this speech, I have never revealed any other news about the moon, let alone the moon satellite.

In the recent space activities announced by the Army Ant Group, only Chen Mo has entered space, how to launch lunar satellites and landers?

"It's true, they have already posted photos and landing videos from the back of the month." Jim's assistant handed the photos he had just printed to Jim.

Jim was stunned when he saw the photo.

The photo can't be faked.

He can be sure that the photo is true.

"Is this determined not by the Chinese lunar exploration team?"

“This is a photo published on the official account of the marching ant group. Their official social platform official account and international platform account have been updated. Now the global media are reporting this incident.”

"Impossible, the recent space activities of the marching ant group, only Chen Mo entered space. The last time it was launched is the Earth orbiting satellite. When did they launch the moon satellite?"

"The only explanation is that when Chen Mo enters space, he carries the satellite to launch. Four stars plus a lander are launched at the same time, according to the time, just coincide," the assistant said.

Jim took the files and pictures in the assistant's hands and looked at it. He also turned on the computer and read it on the Internet.

Finally Jim was quiet.

Four stars a lander.

This news will live in Jim.

It takes a lot of horrible technical strength and self-confidence to dare to be so crazy, and at the same time launch so many satellites and landers to the moon. Even with their current strength, it is impossible to complete the launch of so many moon satellites at the same time.

“Do we want to accelerate the progress of returning to the moon project?” Jim’s assistant asked.

"This kind of thing is not going to come, the more urgent it is, the more likely it is to go wrong." Jim shook his head.

It is almost certain that the next step for the marching ant group is to land on the moon, mine the 氦-3 resources of the moon, or use the moon as a springboard to conduct other space exploration activities.

No matter which, this is great news for China Aerospace.

According to news reports, the construction of the controlled fusion power station in Binhai City and the nuclear power plant in Anxiong District of Fujian Province is nearing completion.

Chen Mo’s last speech also predicted that the energy revolution is about to open, and the treasure house of the moon is the first opportunity.

The news of the blast is too late.

The circle of space exploration has been shocked by the news that the marching ant group suddenly announced.

Four stars and one device, all successful.

Jianmu No. 1 entered the Lagrangian L2 point orbit, and Luna 1 successfully landed on the back of the moon.

These messages, which are published separately, are big news in the field of space exploration. Nowadays, they are concentrated together and succeeded. The difficulty can be imagined.

The day before yesterday, Chen Mocai published an internal speech on the marching ant group in space, revealing his ambition to enter the moon. Now his people are still not in space, and the lunar probe of the marching ant group has successfully landed on the moon.

The world once again has a new understanding of the space technology of the marching ant group.

This success has already established the position of the world's most powerful and powerful ants in the world of space exploration, and its strength is second only to the United States that successfully carried people to the moon.

A private company shoulders a top power.

As long as the marching ants group successfully carried people on the moon, they may overtake in the future and become the leader in space exploration.

This news is beyond the expectations of the whole world.

Some time ago, Chen Mo entered space, and the world's major powers released news of preparation for the moon landing. Today, the marching ant group took the lead in landing as a private company and succeeded in front of the global power.

The sensation caused by public opinion is not small.

......

Flying Ant Center.

Ground staff have been waiting.

Today is the fourth day of Chen Mo’s entry into space, and it is also the time for him to return to the ground.

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min were present. This weekend, the unparalleled knowledge of Dad coming back from space and coming together.

In addition, there is Chen’s father, Chen’s mother, and her worries are written in her face. Chen Mo did not tell his family when he entered space. He still saw the news and asked Xiao Yu to know the news. He learned that Chen Mo came back today and rushed to Binhai.

"The plane is the plane, and Dad is back."

The sound of the sky broke through, and the unparalleled excitement pointed to the black spots on the horizon, and jumped and jumped, very happy.

Everyone followed the sound and looked at the goddess. The town came from the horizon and slowly enlarged in the field of vision.

Not long after, the goddess hovered over the airport at the Space Center and landed slowly.

Just after the stop, a lot of staff and robots quickly took wheelchairs and other equipment around, waiting for Chen Mo to come out. Today is the last moment of Chen Mo’s landing, and it’s sloppy.

I saw the door of the tail of the goddess slowly falling. In the eyes of everyone, the ink girl was holding Chen Mo and came out from the cabin.

Princess hug.

"You see that Dad was held by the ink girl, and the ink girl also held me like this. Dad said it was a princess."

Fighting...

Originally, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min were still very serious. Just hearing the unparalleled words, and then thinking about this picture, the two couldn’t stand it, and they couldn’t do it.

I did not expect Chen Mo to have such a day, actually was hugged by the princess.

"What is so happy?"

Sitting in a wheelchair, Chen Mo, seeing Xiao Yu and Zhao Min who are laughing, looked curious.

"There is no match, you are hugged by the ink lady."

"Hey?" Chen Mo stunned, and couldn't smile: "In fact, I don't have much problem with my body, I can adapt. It's just that the ink girl said that just in case, for the first time, let her hold it."

"Can Dad go home today?"

"Daddy's body has to observe for a few days before he can go home." Chen Mo said.

"How do you still have to observe? Is there anything in the body?" Chen and Chen also came over.

"Dad, Mom, Chen Mo just just came back from space. The environment above is not the same as the ground. It needs to be re-adapted. Physical examination is also needed to ensure that the body is no problem." Xiao Yu said.

When I heard that Xiao Yu said nothing, Chen Mu was only relieved: "The big things don't tell us."

"Mom, Chen Mo, he is afraid that you are worried, not much." Xiao Yu comforted: "He just returned to the ground, let the medical staff check him and wait for him to go home and say."

The small fishing transfer topic was successful, the staff had already finished processing, and Chen Mo was on the train and went to the rehabilitation center.

chapters.title: Chapter 605: :Gift
chapters.body:
Chapter 605: :Gift

Chen Mo smoothly returned to the ground without publicity. After the official announcement of the marching ant group, most of the mainstream media platforms and some self-media people reported spontaneously.

This time Chen Mo entered space and gave the outside world too much information.

The popularity of the news continues unabated, and the concept of space tourism is also high.

The space business project officially opened, and the Fei Ant Aerospace Company lacked a commercial person in charge.

Zhao Min directly transferred Li Ruoxi, who was the deputy of Li Danni at Ant Paradise, to be responsible for the commercial project of Fei Ant Aerospace.

Shortly after the establishment of the army ant company, Li Ruojun entered the company with Xiao Yu, and it was the first batch of old employees of the company. He was also the girlfriend of Xiao Yu, and he was familiar with Chen Mo.

When I entered the company, I followed Li Lingfeng as an administrative assistant, and also entered the finance department as the bottom cadre. I went to the marketing department to run the business. When I was planning, then the ant park project was opened. She was transferred to Li Danni’s deputy. Stepping over, the way the company operates is familiar.

Under the training of Zhao Min, there is already a unique ability.

Zhao Min is also relieved that Li Ruoxi is responsible for the commercial promotion project of Fei Ant Aerospace.

However, Li Ruoxuan did not let Zhao Min down. He took over the commercial project of Feixiang Space Center. The team formed the detailed cost of various packages such as space tourism project, satellite launch and space transportation.

At the same time, after asking Chen Mo, he announced the construction of a space station as a space hotel to provide a more diverse space for future space tourism projects.

Chen Mo, the big boss of this company, dared to go up in person, and safety is definitely no problem. Some of the adventurous rich have begun to consult the flying ant space, space travel.

The enthusiasm of the space travel of the flying ant space company was a hit.

In the past few days, Chen Mo has spent the rest of the rehabilitation center.

After each astronaut returns to the ground, he must re-adapt to the Earth's gravity environment, while improving the cardiovascular system and motor organ function, eliminating post-flight fatigue.

Chen Mo's own physical quality is excellent, and the time spent in space is not long, so the problem is not big, but due to rigorous consideration, it is still a rehabilitation check in the rehabilitation center.

"Boss, the results of the inspection show that your current physical indicators are good. But it is recommended that you take a rest in the next half of the month and gradually resume moderate exercise. Don't exercise too much for the time being."

According to the strict process, Chen Mo needs to be in the rehabilitation center for half a month, and three months of treatment.

But this is not an official aerospace center. Chen Mo is not a professional astronaut, and Chen Mo's physical fitness is good. They can't find a different place. And Chen Mo is their boss. If they want to leave, they can't stop it.

The doctor in charge of the examination took the inspection report and handed it to Chen Mo, turning to look at Xiao Yu.

"Mrs., the boss should also pay attention to eating and living. Don't eat too much stimulating food. It is mainly based on food supplement. Here are a few sets of food supplement menus, which can be used as a reference."

The doctor handed the documents in his hand to Xiao Yu.

“The place to live, keep the air in good condition, and always keep your mood happy. After a week, do another physical examination.”

"Okay, thank you." Xiao Yu borrowed the documents from the doctor's doctor.

After listening to the doctor's advice, Chen Mocai took the hand of Xiao Yu and left the rehabilitation center.

"Is this enough?"

"Play enough." Chen Mo nodded.

"Play enough, take a break during this time. Then chaos, you look good." Xiao Yu gave Chen Mo a small threat.

"Well, take a rest, but before that, there is another important thing."

"what's up?"

"Lushen No. 1 collected a sample of Moonland and returned to Earth. According to the speed, it should be able to come back tomorrow. I need to go to the Space Center to welcome Luna 1 to return."

Luna 1 returns, this is a big news.

If it comes back successfully, it will be the first time after the United States, the first time humans have collected the soil and rocks on the back of the moon and returned to the ground.

"I will accompany you." Xiao Yu said without a doubt.

When the guy didn't like it, he ran into the lab.

"Yes." Chen Mozhen's hair, knowing what she was thinking: "After tomorrow, accompany you to vacation and have a good rest."

......

"What do you say? Luna 1 will return with the moon?"

Zhang Jianfeng almost jumped from the position, his face was red, and his eyes were shining. Even Chen Mo, on the other side of the video, was afraid that he would be dizzy.

"You haven't said that Luna 1 will return with the moon."

Chen Mo and he said that they borrowed the bridge satellite, and said that they launched a four-star device and landed on the moon, but never said that Luna 1 could return.

"You didn't ask," Chen Mo said.

"..."

"But now it is not too late. It is expected that tomorrow afternoon, Lunao 1 will return to the Fei Ant Space Center and would like to invite your team to come over and send you a gift."

"Go, I am definitely there." Zhang Jianfeng did not hesitate to agree.

The gift that Chen Mo said, do not want to know, is the moon and moonstone.

For researchers, every gram of moon rock is very precious.

The only one gram moon rock in China was delivered in the 1970s when American leaders visited. After so many years of research consumption, except for the only sample preservation, the others were used for research.

Their next lunar exploration plan is also preparing to acquire Moon Rock. Unexpectedly, Chen Mo first succeeded.

Hanging up the call with Chen Mo, Zhang Jianfeng did not hesitate to inform the members of the lunar exploration team.

"Everyone, there is good news."

Zhang Jianfeng suppressed his excitement and glanced around the field. Others looked at each other and waited for Zhang Jianfeng's good news. The latest good news is especially good, but they are not at all sceptical, the more the better.

"The academician Chen just talked to me. He said that Luna 1 will carry a sample of Moon Rock and Moon Soil back to Earth."

"What do you say? Luna 1 carries Moon Rock back to Earth?" After a brief silence, the meeting room broke out instantly, and members of the entire team were excited to watch Zhang Jianfeng, waiting for him to confirm the news.

There have been a lot of good news lately, but this news is even more exciting.

"Are you sure?" said an old expert.

"He just said that he contacted me. He said that he is expected to return tomorrow afternoon."

"We have seen the design of Yueshen No. 1, so small, not as good as the energy of the moon." The old expert doubted.

"We can't use our technology to measure the technology of the marching ant group."

Zhang Jianfeng somewhat lamented that the marching ant group has the most advanced technology and the ion engine technology has come out. Their current technical capabilities cannot be understood at all.

"Accountant Chen said that this month Lunao 1 successfully returned and sent us a gift."

"It must be moon rock and moon soil."

When I heard that Chen Mo was going to give them a gift, the people in the team were excited.

The only thing they can think of is the moon rock and the moon soil.

The preciousness of the moonstone and lunar soil is self-evident. The moonstones sent out by the United States are still well preserved, mostly in the hands of museums or private collectors.

The one moon that was sent by the Americans in the past, there are only a few samples, and the rest is for research.

It is rumored that the black market has a price of up to six digits, and there is no market price.

In the past, only the United States had the ability to obtain moonstones from the moon. They only had envy, and now they have succeeded in China.

In the afternoon, Zhang Jianfeng caught up with the plane flying to Binhai.

chapters.title: Chapter 606: : Chen Mo’S Power
chapters.body:
Chapter 606: : Chen Mo’S Power

"Academician Chen, are you sure you are true?"

"determine."

"Is it true that God of the Moon is returning today?"

"OK." Chen Mo nodded, and some helplessly smiled: "Zhang Academician, you have been here since, and asked five times an hour, I feel you are more anxious than me."

"Hey..."

Zhang Jianfeng grinned and turned to look at the horizon outside the window, looking forward to the return of Lunao No. 1.

“How much is the moon rock and moon soil brought back this time?”

"Not much, only 26 kilograms." Chen Mo said: "Give you 10 kilograms."

"Enough is enough."

Zhang Jianfeng's face is as bright as a chrysanthemum.

Moon Rock is in the black market, the price of one gram is 6 digits, and there is no market price. It is conceivable that the value of 10 kilograms of moon rock is large.

He feels lucky to cooperate with Chen Mo to explore the moon project. Given a piece of data as an investment, the rewards now are far beyond their input.

Time is waiting for a minute and a second. Within the command center, the position of Luna 1 is reported every two minutes.

Half an hour later, the ink girl around Chen Mo opened.

"Mergo, Luna 1 has returned, about two kilometers above the base, is falling."

"came back."

Chen Mo also had some expectations, leading Zhang Jianfeng to leave the command room.

Xiao Yu and Mo Nu also followed behind them.

Walking out of the command center and reaching the edge of the airport, everyone looked up at the sky. In the eyes of everyone, you can't see the shadow of Luna 1.

"over there."

The ink girl pointed to a black spot under the sky.

The size of sesame seeds, if you don't look carefully, you won't find Luna 1 at all.

Zhang Jianfeng is a little nervous, his eyesight is not very good, still staring at the sky, hoping to find it.

A minute later, the Luna 1 lander was slowly enlarged in the eyes of everyone. Luna 1 is slightly larger than the water tank, and the bottom is sprayed with blue fireworks, which is falling vertically.

"came back."

Finally saw Luna 1 and Zhang Jianfeng was excited. He has already recognized it and is sure.

This is the first time humans have brought the moonstone and lunar soil of the moon back to Earth.

Due to the particularity of the lunar back, the research value of these lunar soils and moonstones is slightly higher than that of the moonstones brought back by the United States.

Luna 1 hovers at two meters from the airport, the landing gear is propped open, and the ion engine is turned off.

Hey! !

Yueshen No. 1, which steadily stopped on the ground, marked the official return of the moonstone and lunar soil of the moon back to Earth.

The next moment, the intelligent machines and staff on the ground quickly rushed toward Luna 1 and took Luna 1 to the transport vehicle and returned to the research institute of the Space Center.

"Let's see it in the past."

Chen Mo led the way and walked into the institute.

Through the glass window, you can see the inside of the laboratory. The robot has taken out the sealed cans collecting the moon and moonstones, and is working on disinfection and cleaning.

Ordinary people can't get close for the time being, because they have just returned from the moon, not sure about bacteria that have no variation in space.

After ten minutes, after thorough cleaning, the sealed cans were also sent to a sterile, dust-free laboratory.

"I can finally see the moon rock."

Zhang Jianfeng was very excited and wearing protective clothing. After disinfection, he could not wait to enter the laboratory. In the vacuum glass jar, it is the moonstone and lunar soil that their team dreams of, or the back of the moon.

In the past, only the United States had the ability to acquire moonstones. Today, one more is a private company in China.

Although it is not their team, it is also a happy thing to prove that China's current technology is strong.

"Academician Chen, what is your next space exploration plan? Is it convenient to talk about it?" Zhang Jianfeng asked.

“The Ants Space Center is now being expanded, and a space station will be built next. It will provide a place for our company’s space tourism project and my research project.”

Chen Mo said without hesitation.

“The next big plan is to find a suitable place on the moon to build a lunar base. At the same time, I will build a larger aerospace plane to prepare for future lunar travel and exploitation of the moon’s resources. Before that, I needed to find a way to use Moonstone Moonstone as a building material."

Chen Mo pointed to the moonstone in the vacuum tank.

In order to build a base in the moon, we must find a way to use the lunar soil of the moon as a building material for 3D printing. If we simply transport materials from the earth, the superpowers will not be able to withstand such consumption.

He has the technical support of the science and technology library, and using moon soil as a 3D printing material is not technically difficult.

hiss! !

Zhang Jianfeng was scared by Chen Mo’s courage.

This kind of big plan, even if it is a big country, is also a concept at this stage. When Chen Mo is just a private company, he dares to have such courage and claims to build a lunar base.

If there is a problem, even a big company like the marching ant group can be dragged down.

But thinking about the 氦-3 contained on the moon, and other rare minerals, and its significance, Chen Mo has that kind of scientific and technological strength, it seems that there is nothing wrong with it.

If Chen Mozhen successfully builds a lunar base and develops resources on the moon, his personal wealth will reach a terrible degree.

“In the meantime, I will continue to invest more exploration robots into the moon, find suitable locations for the construction base, and what instruments your team needs to put in, I can help.”

"Our lunar exploration team is also preparing to launch the squatter in the near future. This mission is also a sample of moonstone and lunar soil. You may need to provide some technical consultants at that time." Zhang Jianfeng said.

Chen Mo’s successful acquisition of a sample of Moon Rock does not mean that they are also successful.

This is the original plan of the lunar exploration engineering team. It will not give up the implementation of this plan because Chen Mo successfully retrieved the sample.

"No problem," Chen Mo said.

After handing 10 kilograms of moon rock and moon soil to Zhang Jianfeng, Chen Mo sent him to leave the Fei Ant Space Center, and Chen Mo and Xiao Yu followed closely.

"Where are you going to vacation? Are you still decided?" Chen Mo asked.

Now just coming back from space, the doctor told him to recuperate and eliminate the physical fatigue of the space. Although he is the master of the big things, but this little thing about his body and life, Xiao Yu will never compromise, Chen Mo can only follow her.

"You decide, go anywhere, you can rest well," said Xiao Yu.

"First take you and go home for a few days, then go out and have fun."

......

"Is Moon Rock coming over?"

"Just sent it." Li Ruoxi nodded: "Does the boss not announce it in person?"

"He just came back from space, the doctor said to rest, the small fisherman stared too tightly, you should understand the small fishing, this time I dare not rob her, or I will be finished." Zhao Min smiled.

Chen Mo’s body had gone through several incidents, and they were all frightened at the time. Now every time it concerns Chen’s physical problems, Xiao Yu will never compromise.

Li Ruoxi smiled and immediately understood.

She and Xiaoyu are the girlfriends who have nothing to say. The small fishing character is gentle and uncontested. It is usually very gentle, but what is really recognized is very embarrassing, and it is still about Chen Mo.

"let's start."

Zhao Min looked at the time and stepped out of the background. Li Ruoxi and Lanxi followed.

At the launch of the marching ant group, the crowd was inciting.

Every reporter has an expectation on his face. The marching ant group informed yesterday that a press conference was held today.

Even when Chen Mo returned from space security, the marching ant group did not have such a grand press conference, and even did not invite reporters to the scene. Today, a sudden press conference is sure to have more important news than Chen Mo’s return from the sky.

From the past conferences, I knew the style of the marching ant group. The major news will not be announced until the last moment, so they don’t know what the important news that the marching ant group wants to announce.

The next moment, when Zhao Min took the lead and came out from the background, the reporter on the field was excited.

Zhao Min personally arrived.

Judging from the previous press conference, Zhao Min personally appeared on the scene, there is no ordinary news.

"Inviting everyone to come today, there is an important news announcement."

Zhao Min boarded the podium of the conference and went straight to the theme.

She looked at the opening and the staff carefully carried a box into the middle of the press conference stage.

Uncovering the red cloth is a stone covered with a glass ball. The size of the fist is like a decaying fossil. There is nothing special about it.

"what is this?"

"A fast weathered stone?"

“Nothing special? Is it special material?”

The gaze on the field was instantly attracted by this stone, which did not show anything special.

When everyone was full of doubts, Zhao Min spoke again.

“On an hour ago, our group’s Luna 1 lander, which was placed on the back of the moon, successfully returned to the Fei Ant Space Center after obtaining the moon rock sample on the moon’s back surface. The rock in front of your eyes is from the moon. The sample of the moonstone obtained from the back. This is the first time humans have obtained rock and soil samples from the back of the moon."

Wow! ! !

Originally doubtful scene, instant frying pan.

chapters.title: Chapter 607: : The Wind Is About To Blow Up, He Is Still At The Vent
chapters.body:
Chapter 607: : The Wind Is About To Blow Up, He Is Still At The Vent

`The capital.

In a quaint office, two of the old people are the two old people who are nicknamed the Chinese head and the big butler. The first is the head of a country, and the management of the housekeeper is naturally the state.

At this time, it is very difficult for two people to sit together and watch the news.

"Old buddy, Comrade Chen Mo is incredible." The head of the big smile smiled and seemed to be as happy as seeing his children: "So shortly, beyond the achievements of the lunar exploration project team for decades."

“It’s really good,” the big butler agreed.

Under their rule, Chen Mo’s genius of this era appeared, which is the joy of China.

When the two of them talked about the news of the marching ants group's press conference, a secretary knocked on the door and entered the office.

The secretary saw the joy of the two joys, looked at the news they saw, and immediately understood what was going on. The news he wants to report is also about this matter.

"The head, just after the academician Zhang Jianfeng passed back some news."

"Well, say."

"Accountant Chen Mo sent 10 kilograms of moon rock to the lunar exploration team, and also revealed his plan for space exploration. The next step of Academician Chen Mo is to build a space station and a lunar base, and plan to develop resources on the moon. He also told Academician Zhang that if the lunar exploration team needs help, he can find him."

The secretary said the message returned without saying a word.

It is rare to see the two so happy, and he is next to the big housekeeper. He also knows that the two people appreciate Chen Mo. It is just like this. The marching ant group has land and people, and many projects are unimpeded.

"It seems that he is more powerful than we think." The big housekeeper sighed.

"The earth can't hold him anymore." The head of the big man also said with some admiration: "I really want to see him, which step can be developed. Soon, the controlled nuclear power plant will be turned on, and the wind is about to blow up. He Still in the air."

The big housekeeper pushed the glasses and smiled: "He is not in the air, and the wind is halfway to us. Don't forget, half of the shares of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group belong to the state. The little thief is very early. The significance and influence of nuclear power plants, knowing that they can't eat alone, we want to rely on mountains, and we are the best choice.

The academicians and researchers of the past two schools in the past were all students studying in the study of [Star Ring]. That is the technology that Chen Mo created. The Academy of Sciences didn't help much about his research. Even so, he promised to give us half, and let us feel big. But his purpose is to wait for the wind, we have to shield him from the wind. ”

"That kid has done things, has been so slick." The big head smiled.

When Chen Mo and the official exchanges, they showed the merchant's style to the fullest, knowing what to lose, knowing how to get back and forth, and getting benefits for themselves. This is why they have always supported the marching ant group.

A company is strong and a company. Chen Mo has money and is a businessman. The country needs more talents like Chen Mo.

"The times are changing, the wind is coming, the change will come, this is a chance for us to take off in China." The big housekeeper said.

"It is true that the foundation has been laid." The head of the head agreed to nod and continue to read the news: "I happened to be attending the meeting this time, and I took the opportunity to visit. I don’t know what to bring as a gift, just a few grams of moonstone. In the past, send it back to them."

Then, the two old people tacitly smiled and understood the truth.

......

The marching ant group retrieved the moonstone and lunar soil of the moon back.

This news is like an atomic bomb, exploding in the world, causing stormy waves.

The news has no warning.

Originally thought that the marching ant group launched a 4 star 1 device to the moon, it is already a miracle of space exploration, but did not expect that Luna 1 lander, there is a return function.

For the first time, humans obtained soil samples on the back of the moon.

The scientific and technological strength of the marching ant group has refreshed the perception of the outside world time and time again.

The soil samples from the back of the moon returned to Earth, and teams from many countries hope to get some rock samples.

However, in the end, there were only a few countries with good relations with China, and other countries were rejected by various reasons.

In some special hobby collections, there is also news that 1 gram of Moon Rock, the price of up to 500,000 Huaxia coins, and in the priceless market speculation, the last 1 gram of moon rock prices rose to 800,000.

There are even collectors who contacted the marching ant group and asked if they would not sell Moon Rock. They were willing to pay 1 million for 1 gram and were eventually rejected.

The news was exposed, and some media were ridiculing. Afterwards, the marching ants group went to the moon to move the stones and transport the soil, and they could not make money.

When the parties hoped to ask for the moon, but no time, no news came out. The Chinese leader visited the United States and carried the national ceremony, which is the moonstone of the moon back, weighing 5 grams.

Once, the United States successfully landed on the moon, and Moon Rock was also given to China. At that time, only 1 gram was given. I did not expect that this Chinese gift would be 5 grams.

The outside world is suddenly lost.

When the United States landed on the moon several times, a total of more than 300 kilograms of moonstone and moon soil samples were taken, but only 1 gram of Huaxia was given. Now, China took 26 kilograms of rock samples from the moon back and returned them to 5 grams.

The strength and tolerance of both sides are not at all a grade.

Now Huaxia has obtained the moon rock sample of the moon back, which proves to the world their strong scientific and technological strength. For China, it is completely fame and fortune.

"I don't feel well in my heart. This group of children."

Jim slammed the newspaper in his hand and the fire broke out.

Now the media has made a fuss about the 5 grams of moonstone that Huaxia gave them.

At the time of the report, they all hinted at the secret of the NASA.

What was originally not in contact with Tuen Mun, now a contrast, plus the media's word games and ridicule, let outsiders feel that they are really too careful.

When I sent Yueyan to China, they might have the idea of showing off the strength of science and technology. Now they are sent back. Isn’t Huaxia a proof?

It’s also very uncomfortable in Washington. They have plans to return to the moon, but now that the plan has not started, they are the first to be taken back by the Chinese to the Moon Rock and sent as a gift.

Although Huaxia's official return, no matter where it is explained, there is no problem, but when the space competition is the most intense, let them feel that this is not just a simple return.

There is another reason to make him so angry.

The election is just around the corner, and political achievements are the key to competition in the party elections.

Huaxia has achieved such good achievements, they did not.

The opposition parties used this to attack the White House, and now there is a phone call from Washington, saying that an expert will be sent to help them implement the plan to return to the moon.

Jim feels very uncomfortable because he feels that Washington is doubting their ability, but he is too upset to be bored.

Now I saw these **** reports and broke out completely.

"Secretary, the experts dispatched above have arrived."

A sudden voice, interrupting Jim's unhappiness, looking up, saw an assistant, came in with a man.

Wearing gray tooling, thick glasses, and chopsticks, the hair is a bit long, looks awkward, and the body is thin, giving people a feeling of weakness.

Just somehow, when Jim saw the man in front of him, what appeared in his mind was the shadow of the mad doctor or the mad scientist in the movie.

"Hello, I am the director of the space agency, Jim Briden." Jim converges on his emotions and squeezes a smile.

"Kane Hebrewham."

Kane pushed thick glasses and looked around with no expression, ignoring Jim's extended hand.

Jim's face is black.

Originally, I was in a bad mood. Now, I have sent a piece of paper to the top? Isn't this going to go with him?

"Hercules super heavy rocket, designed and developed by Mr. Kane." The assistant next to see the atmosphere is a bit awkward, hurriedly open to resolve.

Jim glanced at him and pulled him back from the edge of the complete eruption, and Kane’s eyes changed.

No longer dare to look down on Kane, he is rude to him, and he is unhappy.

The new Hercules launch vehicle that appeared some time ago easily sent the Falcon spacecraft into space, and he also heard that it was only the first one, and the more powerful Hercules 2.

Their landing plan, the launch vehicle used, is the transformation of Hercules No. 1, not the Hercules 2.

The ability of the designer is so strong that people who have seen the launch vehicle have a number in mind. This kind of person, the character is very strange, he has not seen the strange research and development personnel.

This time, I really didn't send a person to come over. Jim was bored in the heart and was a lot smoother.

"Go to the launch center and see your launch plan for me." Kane said with a blank expression.

"Ok."

Jim didn't neglect, called the assistant, led Kane and others, and left the office.

chapters.title: Chapter 608: : National Landing Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 608: : National Landing Plan

Island State, Kagoshima Space Launch Center.

It is part of the island's space science research institute and is the launching ground for deep-sea rockets of island countries. It has been used for decades and is still carrying out launch plans every year.

Edo Castle calmly looked at the launch tower of the launch site, with a sense of pride and ambition.

In a small country, there are two space launch sites. It can be seen from this small point that the ambitions of their country have never been small.

They are located in island countries where disasters are frequent and resources are scarce. Every year, disasters tell them that they must be crisis-conscious, so they are always looking for new territories.

So they have an ambition that is completely incompatible with their own size.

For them, the arrival of a new era is another opportunity for them.

Huaxia has successfully landed on the moon and retrieved the Moon Rock, taking the lead in the upcoming changes.

The oil resources on earth do not have their share, but the moon is different. As long as they have technology development, the 氦-3 there is inexhaustible, it is endless wealth, and they are the place to complete the empire ambition.

There are plans for China, the United States has Hercules plans, Europe has a dawn plan, Russia has a Yuri plan, and their island countries also have a 'monthly reading plan'.

In the era of great navigation, let the British island nation become the empire that ruled the world. If they succeed, even if the next day does not fall into the empire, they will definitely become one of the world powers.

Over the years, they have been too hard to be crushed by the United States. Once the changes come, it means that they have to be chaotic. It is also their opportunity, an opportunity to be on an equal footing with the world powers.

"The Edo director, the base said that the rocket's manufacturing is nearing completion, and it will be completed in about a month." A female assistant came over and interrupted the thoughts of Edo Castle.

"Oh, I see."

When the female assistant left, Edo continued to look at the tower.

One month, not long, not short.

No one can say that, perhaps, this is where their empire sailed.

......

South America, North Atlantic Coast, Guyana, home to the European Space Launch Center.

The second launch site of Ariane was busy at this time.

As the director of the European Space Agency, Yang Verner is also on the scene, paying attention to the progress of preparing for the field work.

Soon after, the rockets will be shipped and assembled. This time their goal is clear, that is, to start the long-awaited ‘tawn plan.’

The Twilight Project is Europe's moon landing program. It has many similarities with the US New Space Program ‘Hercules Project. The main contents of the plan include:

Conduct a series of unmanned lunar explorations, including lunar orbit detection, lunar soft landings and lunar rover surveys.

Realize the manned landing on the moon and establish a lunar base.

The lunar base is used as a springboard for manned Mars exploration.

The plan is to use the lunar exploration as a technical exercise, establish a lunar base, and then use the moon as a springboard to develop a manned landing on Mars based on the development of lunar resources.

The plan was proposed in early 2004, but it has been delayed by various excuses.

After their mission to launch Lunar Satellite Wisdom No. 1, there was no new lunar probe and no lunar lander.

During this period, Huaxia successfully surpassed them and successfully launched the lander, becoming the third country to land on the moon.

In recent years, China's development has become even more horrible.

First, landing on the back of the moon, and then recently, the marching ant group successfully entered space, the space boom appeared, countries around the world have to pay attention to this matter.

Countries in Europe that are still in dispute have to combine different opinions and unite at this moment. They have put aside their long-awaited dawn plan and finally made new progress.

No progress will be made, and the Huaxia nuclear power plant is now successfully launched. The resources on the moon are particularly important.

It used to be the oil age, and later it was the new energy era of nuclear fusion. The 氦-3 is the next ‘oil’, and no one wants to lag behind.

"How long does it take for the rocket to be built?" Verna asked.

"Claude just replied, it will take another ten days. It takes half a month to send it here," said the assistant.

"Half month? Just right," Verner said.

As long as the launch of the probe successfully landed on the moon, it will be of great help to their future plans, and the participating countries will also give them more research and development costs.

......

The Baikonur Space Center, built in 1955, is a spacecraft launch site and missile test base for the former Soviet Union, located in a desert area of Kazakhstan.

It was once the largest space launch site in the Soviet Union and the place where the dream of human space began.

After the disintegration of the Soviet Union, in 1994, Russia signed a lease agreement with Kazakhstan to re-enable the space center. Over the past few decades, it has remained an important place for world space.

Mendrov looked up and stood on the launch tower, pointing to the super heavy rocket of the sky, with a wrinkled face, looking like a story.

The rocket in front of us is the latest super heavy rocket in Russia - the polar bear series.

This rocket has another story.

Its predecessor was the N-1 rocket that the former Soviet Union was preparing to use for manned landing on the moon. After the N-1 rocket failed four times in a row, the former Soviet Union had to suspend the manned mission to the moon.

The Soviet Union was disintegrated without waiting for the moon landing plan to be reactivated.

Russia inherits most of the legacy of the former Soviet Union, including the technical materials of the rockets, as well as most scientists and technical teams.

In recent years, Russia has been secretly developing and improving the N-1 rocket, and decades of technological improvements have finally succeeded. The hot spots of space exploration, once again, the Polar Bear series rockets will be the core of their new space journey ‘Yuri Plan’.

For the Polar Bear series rockets, the Rockets have suffered a lot in these years, only they know.

The designer of this rocket is his teacher, his teacher, his life is on the rocket. After the teacher leaves, he takes over the work of the teacher and continues to improve the design of the rocket.

After years of continuous improvement in design and testing, the rocket technology has matured.

When Chen Mo was in the last time, after the Kremlin issued an order, the Space Agency announced the launch of the ‘Yuri Plan’ and re-launched the moon.

The marching ant group announced the news of the recapture of the moon rock, and their team also heard about it.

Huaxia has mastered nuclear fusion technology, and now it has mastered the moon landing technology. If they do not lay out in advance, even if their land is bigger, they will not have a place in the future.

Their country relies on selling energy resources to maintain the economy. Once nuclear fusion technology emerges, they are not far from the crash, so they have to make up their minds to move closer to the high-tech direction.

Mastering the lunar exploration technology is absolutely helpful to them. Because of the advent of nuclear fusion technology, the moon is another 'oil field', a 'oil field' as big as a planet.

"Teacher, the assembly of the rocket is complete, and fuel can be added at any time."

A middle-aged man in a study gown came over and reported the progress.

"The next step is to see God." Mendrov looked up at the polar bear rocket on the launch tower and lamented.

The story of the predecessor of the Polar Bear Rocket is not good. This is the last test. Once it fails, it means that their efforts over the years will be frustrated. As long as the test is successful, it means that it can carry out the task of manned to the moon.

The marching ant group announced the news of the successful return of Moon Rock, which touched the hair of the global lunar exploration program.

Not only the United States, Russia, Europe, including India, island countries, and Israel, but all countries with ambition and ability are preparing for the moon landing plan, and no one is left behind.

The two nuclear fusion power stations started construction by the marching ant group are nearing completion, and the nuclear fusion technology is about to be put into practical use. This means that the era of nuclear fusion is about to open its doors, and the resources on the moon have become the targets of global competition.

It has been brewing for a long time, and now the wings of the butterfly have been shaken.

chapters.title: Chapter 609: : Return To The Moon
chapters.body:
Chapter 609: : Return To The Moon

Russian Space Agency news, Moscow time on July 11 at 9 am. The Russian Space Agency successfully tested the polar bear super heavy-duty launch vehicle at the Baikonur Space Center. In the next two months, it will take the opportunity to carry out a manned mission to the moon.

After the marching ant group announced the news of retrieving the moon back rock samples, global space exploration is like a pot of hot oil. The news of the Russian Space Agency is like a scoop of water and poured into the pot.

Once, the former Soviet Union was one of the two superpowers. Due to rocket technology problems and its own economic problems, the moon landing plan was forced to suspend, and the plan did not start again, and the former Soviet Union disintegrated.

Unexpectedly, decades later, Russia, which inherited most of the legacy of the former Soviet Union, announced the successful test launch of the launch vehicle.

The atmosphere that has already been tumbling has exploded in various public opinion.

After Russia announced the moon landing time, it led to a chain effect, followed by other countries, and announced the time of landing.

Reuters news: European Space Agency Director Yang Verner told this reporter that the European Space Agency's "Dawning Plan" will officially open the second step after half a month, launching a landing detector to the moon.

Asahi Shimbun: Informed sources of the island's space research and development agency revealed to the reporter that the island's space research and development agency will launch a lunar probe on the surface of the moon in the next month to officially open the 'monthly reading plan'.

The New York Times: SpaceX and the National Aerospace Industries Corporation jointly announced that the country’s second lunar probe, Genesis 2, will be launched at the beginning of next month with the Falcon 10 launch vehicle. Moon landing plan.

Indian Times News: ...

......

Many countries have expressed their willingness to announce to the media that in the next year, the lunar lander will be launched and the lunar exploration program in India will be officially launched.

This is the second time that the global powers have concentrated their positions and determined the time of the lunar exploration.

Many powerful countries do not want to lag behind in this step of landing on the moon. There is no Huaxia and the United States left.

This is currently the two most powerful countries in the world. The development of China over the years has been far from others in high technology.

Huaxia’s moon landing plan has been carried out step by step. As early as two months ago, the launch time of the next month was determined. After the marching ant group successfully obtained the return of Moon Rock, the plan remained unchanged.

The only uncertainty is that there is only the United States.

The eyes of the world are all gathered in the United States.

This once superpower, in this lively competition, is certainly not willing to succumb to the people.

At the time when the outside world was looking forward to it, it was true that NASA finally heard the news shortly after countries announced their plans to land on the moon.

NASA Director Jim Bridden publicly announced to the media that NASA will launch a manned spacecraft on July 26 and return to the moon. The launch vehicle is the Hercules 2 rocket.

In this mission, the astronauts will stay on the moon for a week, and will also launch a small research cabin and a small ecological cabin on the moon to prepare for the future construction of the lunar base.

After nearly 60 years, the United States returned to the moon.

The news was exposed, and the headlines of all the news were taken away in an instant.

It is revealed by a person familiar with the matter that the construction of the lunar base is to develop the 氦-3 resources on the moon in the future. The nuclear fusion technology of China has matured. In the near future, the nuclear power plant will be put into use, and the abundant 氦-3 resources on the moon will be The replacement of oil will become the main resource for future big powers, which is why many powerful countries are competing to land on the moon.

Affected by the news that the United States plans to build a lunar base and develop 氦-3 resources, and the nuclear power plant in China is about to be put into use, the impact of the news is the first to explode in the global stock market.

Global oil prices and coal prices have seen different declines, gold prices have risen sharply, and senior investors say that oil prices are fluctuating wildly, and gold will be the best safe-haven investment in the next few years, new energy and high-tech fields. It will be a good investment direction.

The various influences driven by public opinion have attracted global attention, and the United States has used this news to consolidate its status as a hegemon.

The US economic market has also become active after various news spread.

In this space race, other countries will start next month, and the United States will begin at the end of the month, as if to reveal the United States wants to lead the world.

In various reports and hot discussions, the 26th came.

Kennedy Space Launch Center.

In the final waiting room, the three astronauts completed the final physical examination and were chatting at ease.

Already close to the start of the mission, they are the first astronauts after returning to the moon.

In their hands, there are also descriptions of the experience of the astronauts who landed on the moon that year. These materials, even if they are already familiar, can't help but be familiar with them before they leave.

They have no experience, and the moon is completely strange to them. It has the experience of predecessors and it is of great help to them.

The importance and significance of this mission is extraordinary.

When the two countries were in the era of hegemony, landing on the moon was a sigh of relief. They proved that they are very powerful. Today is a turning point in history. The significance is extraordinary and successful. In the future competition for energy resources, they will gain a place and take the lead. It can be proved that they have remained strong for decades.

"Going up to the moon, you said that we will be better off first?" Van Yatvis opened.

He is the oldest and most experienced astronaut among the three astronauts. He has also traveled to the International Space Station many times and has also performed spacewalking tasks. Although he is under pressure this month, he must maintain a normal heart. The state of mind is very important.

Two of his colleagues on both sides are also experienced astronauts.

"this is a problem."

The youngest astronaut on the left looks like a hoe.
