"People only remember the first person. People in the world know that Armstrong is the first person to set foot on the moon, but Mr. Aldrin, who is on the moon 19 minutes later than Mr. Armstrong, is not known."

"In this case, we use the most technical way in the universe to decide who will step on it first," the astronaut on the right said.

“What is the most technical content?” Van Yatvis and the young astronauts on the left looked at him.

"Scissors, stones, cloth."

"..."

The three people laughed in an instant.

During the talk, the staff at the launch center came in and led them away. Now that the rocket is launched, they have to wait in the rocket's lunar module.

Jim looked at the tower on the far side, erecting the Hercules 2 rocket pointing to the sky.

It was a three-stage super-heavy launch vehicle, a larger lap than Saturn No. 5, which implemented the Apollo program. The diameter of the first-stage rocket reached an astonishing 15 meters and reached a height of more than 130 meters.

This rocket is the key to this moon landing plan.

The world is paying attention to this launch. If it is successful, they will show a muscle in front of the world.

"The Secretary, the astronauts have successfully entered the lunar module, and the launch is 3 hours and 10 minutes." Jim's secretary stopped by him and said.

"Mr. Kane, do you still want to do the final check?" Jim looked at Kane.

This weird guy didn't give him a good impression.

Since coming to the launch center, there has been nothing to say, behavior is very irritating, emotional intelligence is negative, and if it is not a horrible research and development ability, Jim does not want to see him.

He was a director of the NASA. When they were together, they seemed to be Kane to follow the class. This made him very upset and very faceless.

However, this guy is really very powerful. When the rocket was assembled, it was surprisingly smooth, and the various inspections were meticulous. I also found several small problems that other staff ignored.

"No." Kane shook his head, and when he finished, he went back to the command and control room.

I can see that Jim is depressed.

Everything is ready.

The global eye is paying attention to this launch, and the domestic media in the United States are preparing to broadcast live.

This is another great opportunity for their country.

Three hours later, with the global attention, the Hercules 2 rocket, in the launch tower of the Kennedy Space Center, skyrocketed.

chapters.title: Chapter 610: : Moonwood Brick
chapters.body:
Chapter 610: : Moonwood Brick

On July 30th, after 98 hours of flight, the 'Explorer Lunar Module' powered by Hercules 2 successfully fell into the moon's positive Arctic Hongwan District, where Van Yatvis became the 'Hercules Project' and returned to the moon. After the face, the first astronaut to set foot on the moon.

On the fourth day after the launch of Hercules 2, a message announced by NASA shocked the global craze.

After nearly sixty years, I returned to the moon successfully.

The impact of the news is no less shocking than the news that the marching ant group took back the moon from the moon. The United States once again proved to the world the strength they have.

The message was not cooled.

On August 3, SpaceX also successfully launched the 'Genesis 2' lunar probe of the country at the Kennedy Space Center.

With the power of small countries, they show their ambition to become the fourth country to successfully explore the moon after China, the United States, and Russia.

This news is inconspicuous with the news that the United States successfully carried people to the moon.

However, in this space exploration boom, the move by the country has also attracted a lot of attention.

On August 6, when the detector launched by the country had not yet reached the moon, NASA announced another news.

The three astronauts who stayed for a week on the moon completed the task of placing a research cabin and a small eco-cabin and acquiring 50 kilograms of rock. The lunar module successfully ignited and left the moon, returning to the earth.

When this news comes out, it will cover the news that the country's lunar probe is preparing for the moon.

The news did not stop there.

On August 7, the country announced that Genesis 2 successfully landed on the storm ocean.

In the early morning of August 11, NASA announced once again that after 109 hours of flight, the lunar module returned successfully and landed in a wheat field in the central United States.

The success of the US landing on the moon, smashing the outside world's doubts about their true and false landings, also let the world see their strength.

This August of the year became a special time.

The heat of space exploration continues.

On August 13, the European Space Agency announced that it successfully launched a rocket and sent the Wisdom No. 2 lunar probe into space. The detector is on the way to the moon, and Europe officially opened the second phase of the ‘Twilight Plan’.

On August 18, when the European Space Agency just announced that the moon landing device successfully landed the Copernican crater, the island space research institute also announced that at the Kagoshima launch center, the launch vehicle successfully launched the monthly reading No. 1 The moon landing detector, the island country officially opened the 'monthly reading plan'.

The good show continued to appear, and August became the most frequent time point for landing on the moon.

The various news of all parties have made the outside world dizzying.

On August 28th, the Russian Space Agency, which has remained quiet, finally opened its voice. It will launch a manned moon landing space in late September and start the lunar exploration program.

When everyone thought that the craze had come to an end, on August 30th, the Huaxia lunar exploration team also reported that in September, according to the original plan, the unmanned detectors were launched. The 嫦娥 detector will land on the moon back and obtain the moon rock sample and return to Earth.

On the last day of August, the marching ant group also came out to express its position and use the goddess to take off and launch two reconnaissance satellites and two landers to the moon again, responsible for the detection of the moon.

This news also attracted a lot of shock.

Throughout August, the world was flooded with news of various moon landings.

The competition for lunar exploration has reached an unprecedented peak.

Later generations recorded that August of this year was the month when human beings fully opened the journey of the stars and the sea.

......

It was night, Chen Mo’s study.

When the outside world is struggling for the moon landing technology, Chen Mo has begun to plan the lunar base.

On the holographic platform in front of him, a gray brick of mobile phone size is suspended, which has a smooth surface and looks like ceramic.

"It has a density of 2.9 grams per cubic centimeter, a compressive strength of 1700-3500 kilograms per square centimeter, and a water absorption of 0.11%.

Shore hardness: >HS75. Just tested, in an extremely hot and cold environment between minus 190 degrees Celsius and 400 degrees Celsius, it exhibits strong toughness and strength to meet the needs of the lunar building environment. ”

Ink girl introduced at the side.

This is a freshly baked brick.

Just finished testing.

The building materials of the construction base are the first problems he has to solve.

This is the building material of the future lunar base.

This inconspicuous brick is made of lunar soil and is made of metal elements such as iron and titanium. It is mixed in a specific ratio, and the mixed material is melted by a laser, and then the moon-green brick is manufactured by 3D printing technology.

The materials needed for lunar green bricks are all the material elements on the moon, so that they can take materials on the moon instead of transporting materials on the earth.

After the holiday came back, Xiaoyu was not very reassured, so Chen Moduo rested for a few days.

It was rare for Xiao Yu to give him a request, and Chen Mo agreed.

In fact, Chen Mo has begun to take a half-seat and half-work status. With the help of the ink girl, even if he does not go to the company's laboratory, he can experiment and get all kinds of experimental data he wants.

His next goal is to build a lunar base. To build a base on it, he must use the lunar moonstone and lunar soil as materials.

So Chen Mo asked the robot to experiment in the laboratory according to his ideas.

Xiao Yu entered the study and saw Chen Mo’s projection in front of the holographic platform.

Chen Mo never settled. When she was on vacation, she also sorted out the materials to the ink girl every day, but when Chen Mo rested enough, she could only close one eye with one eye.

"What is this? Looks like bricks." Xiao Yu curious to go.

She occasionally comes to the study room to see Chen Mo research, Chen Mo, who focuses on research, is very attractive, and can also get close to his work.

"It's bricks, 3D printing technology printed moon-green bricks, I am looking for materials to build the moon base." Chen Mo said.

"Did you make it?"

"Just tested, and granite is better, it is successful." Chen Mo will take a small fisherman into his arms: "Talk to you."

Waiting for Chen Mo to say, Xiao Yu first understands what he means: "Tomorrow you can go to the company, and then let you stay at home, it is estimated that you have to put me on the spot."

"It is my wife."

Chen Mo ordered a few points on the platform and transferred some information.

"In the past few days, I have sorted out some information about the unparalleled education. These are enough for the primary school to the secondary school. I will make some supplements and adjustments according to the actual situation."

Xiaoyu is planning to give a primary school to Wushu, and later to middle school and university.

Chen Mo also wants to be an unparalleled education.

The unparalleled education is destined to be different from the ordinary elite education. In addition to the current knowledge of the school, many of the knowledge she has to learn is the scientific knowledge that Chen Mo has compiled from the science and technology library. It cannot be taught in the ordinary way of education.

"It’s hard for you." Xiao Yu said with some distress.

Chen Mo has a lot of money, and the company is a family. She can't help Chen Mo too much. She can only make herself as sensible as possible and not add trouble to Chen Mo.

"You should be distressed. When you grow up, don't tell her that what she learned is what I got, or I am afraid she will sever the relationship between her and her." Chen Mozhen said.

"Ha ha ha..."

The little fish was amused.

"But you feel that I am working hard, is there any work?" Chen Mo smirked.

"I came here today, the body is inconvenient." Xiao Yu rushed to stop Chen Mo's hand, his face suddenly rosy, hesitated to open his mouth: "If you want, go to the ink girl's room tonight?"

Chen Mo: "..."

Ink girl: "..."

Seeing Chen Mo’s resentment and a bit of a look, Xiao Yu’s smile was so beautiful that it was hard to see Chen Mo’s expression.

chapters.title: Chapter 611: : Dawuwan Nuclear Power Plant
chapters.body:
Chapter 611: : Dawuwan Nuclear Power Plant

"Dad, kiss."

"True." Chen Mo kissed him on the unparalleled face: "You must study hard, play with the children, listen to the teacher."

"Well, Dad, you have to work hard at night, go home early at night."

The little girl nodded seriously.

"Ink and daughter are also kissed."

The little girl kissed her on the face of the ink girl and was happy to return to Xiaoyu.

"Give flowers to you at night, what flowers do you want?"

"Yeah." Xiao Yu showed a happy smile, handed the prepared lunch to the ink girl, and helped Chen Mo sort the collar: "I want a red rose this time."

Today, after the school started, Xiaoyu sent unparalleled school, Chen Mo and Mo women went to the company headquarters.

After returning from space, I have to rest for so long, and now I have to officially return to work in the laboratory. At home, there are still some restrictions.

"Contact Zhao Min."

When he came to the company's laboratory, Chen Mo put on the experimental gown. After a while, Zhao Min's holographic projection appeared.

"I was finally willing to come back. I thought you were holding your left and right, and the beauty was in the arms, forgetting me and the company."

"Small fish requires me to rest for a few more days, just follow her, it is rare for her to spoil me, give me a request." Chen Mo said.

"What do you want to do, Xiaoyu can't control it, you can only follow you, or you can make conflicts. Xiaoyu is better than anyone else. But spoiled, it is a means that you can't refuse, the best woman will be spoiled. Next time I go back to space, I can still see Xiao Yujiao, hahaha..."

Hearing the little fish and spoiling, in order to let him rest for a few more days, Zhao Min was happy.

Her brain fills up and the picture comes out.

"..."

Chen Mo thought about it, it was really.

For a long time, Xiao Yu and he really rarely made a red face. He is petting a small fisherman, and Xiao Yu is also petting him. Both of them have a tacit understanding of each other.

"Say business, I have been resting for so long, what do I need to deal with?"

"There are several documents that you need to sign. Feifei Aerospace is preparing to expand according to your plan. The project is a bit big. Even if it is CSC, it will take a lot of time. According to your expectations, it will definitely not be completed."

Zhao Min began to enter the theme. During this time, Chen Mo rested. Although there were many things, Chen Mo asked her to deal with it, but now I have to talk about it.

The expansion of the 30,000-mu flying ant space base is not a general project. Chen Mo asked for completion within four months, which is not difficult.

It is easy to go wrong during the chaos, so China Construction Group cannot guarantee that the expansion project can be completed within Chen Mo’s expectations.

“I asked the technical team to think of another solution.”

Chen Mo asked them that the people under him would follow Chen Mo’s standards. Can't be unable to complete the existing means, but reply to a no-answer, then Chen Moke will be worried.

“The answer of the technical team is that the complex building at the base is built by the construction company. The intelligent robot is responsible for the uncomplicated, large-scale excavation, laying, handling and greening work. The engineering machine is automated, working 24 hours, more efficient. According to our company's current technology, these are not difficult. According to this method, it can be completed within the time you set."

In Chen Mo's lab, there are robots that can assemble complex mechanical instruments, and they are fully qualified for some low-tech work on the construction site.

"And we also need to make some intelligent large-scale construction engineering robots. You are growing faster and faster, and the overall efficiency of the company should keep up with your speed.

So I decided to let the group acquire a construction machinery manufacturing company, let the intelligent machinery factory complete the industrial upgrading of construction machinery, and produce intelligent construction engineering machines to improve the construction speed of the infrastructure. Our heavy industry can also be improved, and land for the future. Or prepare to build other industrial parks. ”

"can."

"I am in the East China Sea and participate in the World Economic Forum. I will tell the robot to send the documents to you in the past. If you have finished reading, you can sign it." Zhao Min said.

The No. 1 building area is completely intelligent, but the company's large-scale construction projects are outsourced, so no large-scale construction machinery has been manufactured before.

But in the future, the speed of Chen Mo’s development is terrible, and the infrastructure can’t keep up.

Zhao Min wants to find ways to improve the overall efficiency of the company's basic areas, while helping downstream companies and suppliers to improve efficiency and complete industrial upgrades, which will also help their companies.

In the future, the place where Chen Mo wants to start work is the moon, where is their challenge.

Chen Mo wants to expand the space center, build a larger space plane, and even build a lunar base.

From a rational point of view, Zhao Min is afraid that he will play off. If he is not careful, this huge project may make them hurt.

But the huge scarce resources on the moon are absolutely tempting for them, and Chen Wei’s terrible technical ability is worth the risk.

Once successful, the rate of return is terrible.

Zhao Min briefly described the current situation of the company.

In August, Chen Mo’s request for the launch of the reconnaissance satellite and the lunar probe has been successful, and the space station of the Fei Ant Space is also under construction, and the training of space tourism is already underway. The university construction that Chen Mo mentioned last time is now under planning.

“With so much, what else do you need to know?”

"When you come back, let's talk."

"I will return to the company the day after tomorrow, please remember to invite me to dinner."

"it is good."

Hanging up the call, Chen Mo took the ink girl into the lab.

In the glass cover of the laboratory, the gray moon-green brick lies quietly. This seemingly inconspicuous masonry, hardness and density, comparable to granite, will be the main material for his future lunar base construction.

“Is the detection robot finding the right moon base construction point?” Chen Mo asked.

On the last day of August, Chen Mo asked the goddess to launch a second lunar mission to the moon, and now it has safely fallen into the moon. Now the cost of launching the detectors is not high. In the future, Chen Mo will also put in more robots in order to find a suitable construction base for the lunar base.

"Not yet, the robots that the lander is launching are still looking for. The Wu Gang 3 reconnaissance satellite that has just entered the lunar orbit has discovered a new cave, and can send new robots to detect."

"Yes, let's launch a new robot in the past."

The large molten tunnel tunnel left by the extinct volcano on the moon is an ideal base for construction.

The lunar environment is too extreme, and the underground is undoubtedly the ideal base for construction. Therefore, the robot that Chen Mo put on the moon has been looking for a suitable underground cave.

Once you find the right hole, you can plan the moon base.

After testing the moon bricks and determining the requirements, Chen Mocai left the 3D printing laboratory and went to the design laboratory.

A larger aerospace plane is being designed.

He wants to build a lunar base, which is a huge project. The moon will also be the first stop into space, and there are still many things to prepare for this step.

......

Binhai City, Dawuwan.

It is the bay area of the peninsula, adjacent to the mouth of the river and overlooking the sea.

Four years ago, it was still a wilderness, sparsely populated, and now there is a mooring road, the road is completed by the road, and the infrastructure is perfect.

This sparsely populated area was closedly controlled more than three years ago. At this time, a small town-like residential area has already been completed. The style is simple and simple, but it has unique characteristics. I don’t know, it is considered to be a tourist area. .

The roads outside the ‘small town’ were closed, and there were special security guards and robot guards. The outsiders could not enter the town like a paradise without permission.

At the end of the road, one kilometer from the town, a new and huge power station is located in a corner of the Dawuwan land. It is quietly located.

Neat and clean buildings, all kinds of large-scale power station equipment, can be clearly seen through a bird's-eye view. The seashore is a dam against tsunami and wind and waves. It faces the blue sea and depends on the green forest.

Here is the Dawuwan nuclear fusion power station, which is built by Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group in Binhai City, the world's first nuclear fusion power station.

At this time, the control room of the nuclear power station was busy.

It has been more than three years since the construction of nuclear power plants began.

In the past three years, I have been working day and night, spending billions of dollars. Finally, two weeks ago, when the outside world was hot for the moon landing project, the nuclear power plant was completed.

"Wan Academician, all the data has been debugged, when will the star ring start?"

Baili Jing sums up the data in his hand and hand it over to Wan Yuan.

The researchers in the nuclear fusion power station were the first researchers to enter the coastal nuclear fusion science island, and also the technicians of the Academy of Sciences that were later sent to study.

As researchers in nuclear fusion technology, they participated in the construction of nuclear fusion power stations and provided technical guidance and support for the construction engineering team.

Wan Yuanyan glanced at the information and was excited in his look. He can see the completion of the nuclear power station in his lifetime, and he has no regrets in his life.

"I informed Academician Chen that the data should be confirmed to the Academician Chen, and we can start the Star Ring."

During this time, they paid too much effort, only to gain experience in the future construction of nuclear power plant, and also help them understand Chen Mo's theory of nuclear fusion.

Fortunately, the harvest in recent years is not small. They have mastered nuclear fusion technology and won at the beginning of this energy revolution.

Soon they can see, the beginning of a global energy revolution is about to begin.

chapters.title: Chapter 612: :Ignition
chapters.body:
Chapter 612: :Ignition

The star ring in front of Chen Mo is bigger than the star ring of Science Island.

The star ring of Binhai Science Island is used for experiments, and this is the star ring that is actually put into use. Its total installed capacity has reached 21 million kilowatts.

According to theoretical calculations, as long as the star ring is stable, the power generation of this nuclear power plant can exceed 100 billion kWh per year.

This power generation, developed in the eastern coastal areas, five nuclear power plants can provide electricity consumption in a province, while inland or western regions, only one or two, can supply electricity to the province.

Most importantly, the operation of nuclear power plants is harmless and safe.

Today is the star ring ready to start the nuclear power plant. When Wan Yuanyu informed him, he immediately put down his work.

This time, the start-up is very important.

"The data is confirmed, no problem." said the ink girl.

"Ready to start."

Chen Mo left the star ring and passed to the control room.

The Star Ring is about to start, and the entire Dawuwan staff is looking forward to it. Their three years of hard work, and so on, today, once successful, they will open another history of mankind.

"There is a hunch that we are starting today and will be included in the history of mankind."

Lu Long swallowed, an unprecedented excitement.

He was a postdoctoral fellow at the Academy of Sciences. He had just joined the high-temperature plasma research and soon came across the opportunity to be the first nuclear fusion researcher to be sent to the Science Island of Binhai.

The techniques and theories learned here are enough to become an expert in the field of high temperature plasma research at the international level.

But the work here is confidential, he can't publish any papers, and he can't even publicly appear in front of the media.

But it doesn't matter. Now that the star ring is completed, this sense of accomplishment is not something that ordinary papers can bring. From the beginning of the research on adding high-temperature plasma, he knows that fame and fortune is not something he wants to fight for.

"I also have this intuition, very strong." Bai Lijing said.

There has never been a moment, as heavy as today’s intuition, and the result of success, the mood began to be unstoppable.

"All staff noticed, Mr. notice, ready to start, 30 minutes later, the star ring ignited." When the two chat, the nuclear power plant artificial intelligence sounds, reminding everyone in the post.

The artificial intelligence mentioned in the nuclear fusion power station is Chen Mo.

All of a sudden, all of them got up and didn't chat again, but finally confirmed their work problems.

The next half hour was a bit difficult. They have been working here for more than three years, and now they feel 30 minutes longer than they have been three years.

......

"Power is on."

“The star-ring system is normal; the vacuum chamber is normal; the water-cooled system is activated; the divertor is normal.”

"Increase the current of the B-coil, 50,000 amps...100,000 amps...200,000 amps...400,000 amps...1 megaamperes..."

Changes in various data appear on the screen of the Star Control Room.

Now is the preparation before the ignition, the control room staff has begun to be nervous. Success or failure is here. If this success, today will be a day when humanity is in history.

The ignition principle of the star ring and the tokamak device is the same, and the ignition current is used to induce ignition.

The current in the toroidal field is large enough to turn off the power for a moment and let the current be. In the vacuum chamber, a large enough induced current is generated instantaneously, so that the free electrons collide with the ion at that moment to form a high temperature plasma.

"Injecting fuel; ohm (e-coil) heating coil current has been added to the maximum;"

"..."

As time goes by, preparations have been completed, and now is the crucial moment – disconnecting the loop-to-field circuit, allowing the current to reach a minimum and officially igniting.

The only thing that remains calm is Chen Mo.

According to the theoretical value, this ignition is completely no problem.

Chen Mo also deliberately let the ink girl simulate it again with a super computer, confirming that the data is feasible.

When the preparation is completed, the people in the control room look at Chen Mo. Only Chen Mo said that the staff responsible for the power supply will press the button.

"Ignite."

Chen Mo lightly said that the staff responsible for the power button, confirm the command, press the button.

This time, as if in the control room everyone's heart, let everyone's breathing stop at this moment, the atmosphere can not breathe.

"Ignition is successful. The plasma beam temperature is 102 million degrees Celsius... heating the plasma... increasing the plasma pressure..."

The familiar reporting language of artificial intelligence falls into the ears of everyone, like a scorpio, cheers and applause.

They waited for more than three years, just to ‘Ignition success’.

The oldest Wanyuan screamed and sneaked away.

He has been engaged in nuclear fusion research for decades. He once thought that the cause of nuclear fusion should be handed over to future generations. He did not expect that he would see the completion of the nuclear power plant in his lifetime.

Even if the leader of this technology is not him, his participation is enough. Seeing the strength of the motherland, his career has succeeded, and he can retired with peace of mind and support his life.

Yang Mingxi was also excited and excited. As the general manager of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group, Zhao Min came to him to join, form and manage the nuclear energy group after he retired from the nuclear power plant.

In the past few years, all his efforts have been on nuclear power plants. Today, I saw the success of the star ring ignition. This kind of mood is like watching the health of my child.

This time it is not the star of the experiment, but the star ring of the power station, the meaning is completely different.

In the control room, several researchers, laughter and weeping mixed together.

Cry because, since entering the construction of nuclear power plants, they have not returned home in the past few years. They even dare not tell their families what they are doing now. They cannot go back to visit if they are sick.

Laughing is because, after a few years of hard work, they finally see the results. This sense of accomplishment makes them feel worthy for several years.

"The notice goes on, and the feast is celebrated."

Chen Mo’s words just fell, the control room, and even the entire nuclear power plant staff, instantly boiled.

This sound is undoubtedly a drop hammer, and the star ring has been successfully ignited.

The success of nuclear power plants is of great significance. From this moment on, the era of energy change has officially opened. They are witnesses at this moment.

"Preparing a nuclear power plant into the network launch ceremony, the first official nuclear power plant was completed, this is a good opportunity to announce the world, the sense of ritual still has to be." Chen Mo went to Yang Minghao and said.

"Wait for four years, just wait for this moment, the planning book for the launching ceremony is almost accumulating, and finally come in handy." Yang Mingxi secretly erased the tears of his eyes and laughed.

This is the happiest day he has lived for most of his life.

The Dawuwan nuclear fusion power station has successfully ignited the star ring.

The news was exposed from the official website of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group, marching ant group and Huaxia Academy. In less than 20 minutes, it was like a huge tsunami. The news platforms and social platforms that swept the world occupied the most conspicuous headlines.

Anyone who saw the news was shocked.

This is almost a sign of the beginning of human energy change, and perhaps a sign of the turning point of human civilization.

The wings of change are instigated at this moment, and the influence behind it is enough to cause a magnitude 10 earthquake in the global economy, politics, and science and technology.

chapters.title: Chapter 613: : This Time It’S A Bit Big
chapters.body:
Chapter 613: : This Time It’S A Bit Big

"Affected by the news of nuclear fusion technology, global crude oil prices and coal prices have plummeted, international gold prices have skyrocketed, and safe-haven investments have become hot. Global stock markets, new energy and high-tech sectors are all red..."

"Affected by the plunge in coal prices, Chilean officials announced that they temporarily shut down two coal mines, and coal miners marched and refused nuclear fusion technology."

“The price of oil has fallen sharply and inflation in Venezuela has increased...”

The star ring ignition of the nuclear power station was successful.

The news has the same impact as a landslide and tsunami, and its horrific influence is most intuitive in the world economy and finance.

The news announced that in just three days, international crude oil prices and coal prices have started a car-like plunge. The index fell below the low point of the financial crisis, creating new lows, international gold prices skyrocketing, and the stock market's new energy and high-tech sectors skyrocketed. .

The global stock market volatility caused by it has triggered a new round of financial turmoil.

The crude oil and coal markets are in ruins, and the plunge in crude oil and coal prices has caused several small countries that depend on coal and oil resources to nearly collapse.

Some major oil countries and large coal exporting countries have also been affected, even considering the reduction of oil production to balance its supply and prices.

The most profitable China has become the center of global attention, and the economy and finance sector have shown unprecedented vitality.

Huaxia has mastered nuclear fusion technology and has taken an absolute advantage in this energy revolution.

For a time, the international community was surging.

......

"Everyone, everyone, my current location is in the Dawuwan Nuclear Fusion Power Station in Binhai City. Not far behind me is the power station unit.

The first nuclear fusion power station power transmission network ceremony will start in 20 minutes. We can see that the guests invited by the ceremony have arrived. The media and newspaper reporters who were invited were also waiting at the scene. It is reported that Chen Mo will personally attend the ceremony.

At the scene, the staff of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group has sent the simple information of the nuclear power plant to the personnel present. According to the data, the total installed capacity of the power station is currently 21 million kilowatts, and the annual power generation is expected to exceed 100 billion kilowatt hours.

It is understood that the power station will gradually expand the scale of total installed capacity in the future, so that the annual power generation will reach more than 170 billion hours. This means that the developed provinces in the eastern coastal areas of South China and Suzhou and Hangzhou need only four nuclear power plants of the same size to meet the province's electricity consumption..."

The live broadcast reporter talked in front of the camera and was very excited.

After the camera, even other reporters are being reported to be excited. Global netizens are paying attention to the live broadcast of the power transmission ceremony of the Dawuwan Nuclear Power Station, which is almost a sign of human energy transformation.

At the scene of the ceremony, only the invited media can enter. No matter the person or the camera, it must pass a very strict security check to enter, and it is not allowed to move around in the power station.

The reporters present can only report on photography within the scope of the demarcation.

The security of the power station reached a level of terror. Without a permission, a mouse could not run.

Nowadays, the eyes of the whole world are at this ceremony. No one can predict the new round of the storm.

......

"This time I played a bit big."

Zhao Min saw the global events caused by nuclear fusion technology directly or indirectly, secretly screaming.

As the president of a world-class giant, the economic man, from Chen Mo's successful nuclear fusion, she understands what nuclear fusion means and how it affects it.

But this day is really coming, she still can't help but sigh.

It’s just the news that the power station’s star ring has been successful, pushing the global economy to the edge of the financial crisis.

Fortunately, there is a balance of big fluctuations, the balance is only tilted and not overturned, and in the previous period of the moon rush, many reports have mentioned nuclear fusion technology, some people have been psychologically prepared.

"This kind of thing will come sooner or later, time is fast." Chen Mo said.

Nuclear fusion energy is one of the cleanest, safest, and large-scale energy sources available to humans. Its influence involves economic, political, social, military, energy and technology fields.

This is an energy revolution. The various reports and consequences seen in the news are just the tip of the iceberg of its influence. Under the invisible, there are more profound and far-reaching effects.

Those influences will directly change the course of human history in later generations.

This is the horror of nuclear fusion technology, and it is also the reason why the world's major powers want to master it at any cost.

Nuclear fusion technology is the jewel in the history of human industry. It completely masters nuclear fusion. Humans don't have to worry about the energy crisis. They also open the door to interstellar space.

"This is a double-edged sword. I don't know if it is better for us than for the disadvantages, or whether it does more harm than good." Zhao Min said with some concerns.

Everything has two sides, even nuclear fusion technology is no exception.

Its benefits are inexhaustible, clean and pollution-free energy, but it brings benefits, but also has drawbacks. The social changes caused by it are not small. If not handled well, it is easy to cause social unrest and intensified contradictions, and the consequences are unimaginable.

They are now in the center of the world storm, they are a little careless, they will have endless troubles.

"Don't forget, the 51% stake in Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group belongs to the above. Originally cooperated with the official, it was not sent."

Chen Mo said.

"We are Mu Xiu Yulin, the wind is coming, they are the giants in front of us. They will deal with the troubles that arise later, we can do business."

As early as the development of nuclear fusion technology, Chen Mo already knows that there will be today, so I found a strong enough official as a partner.

From the current state of view, they do not feel too much storm now, because in the international arena, there are official standing in front of the mediation, blocking most of the storm, they do not have to come out.

So the original cooperation has now had a preliminary effect.

At the beginning, Chen Mo knew that the cake of nuclear fusion technology was too big. He couldn't eat it alone, so he only found official cooperation.

The official blocked the malpractice and the storm for him, and he handed over some of the benefits, in exchange for calm, exempting them from the crisis in the storm.

Cooperation and win-win.

At this point, the two sides have a tacit understanding, so the cooperation is very smooth.

"I hope so," said Zhao Min.

Although there is an official part of the front, but the storm is coming, there will always be some rain blowing on them. As the protagonist, the trouble is inevitable, just the size of the trouble.

"Almost started, boss, president, we should be on the scene." Yang Minglei came over, the joy of his face lingering, in just a few days, the whole portrait is a young teenager.

"Let's go, let's go back and talk."

Chen Mo patted Zhao Min's back and motioned that she didn't have to worry.

Under the guidance of the staff, the group went to the scene of the launching ceremony.

Ink and Zhao Min were on the side, followed by Wang Nian, Wan Yuanqi and Yang Mingqi. The people just sat down on the stage and the scene surged.

“A large number of guests have already arrived. The following ceremony has officially started. Mr. Chen Mo, the founder of the marching ant group and the designer of the nuclear fusion device, Mr. Chen Min, the president of the marching ant group, and the director of the Institute of Plasma Research, the star of the Academy of Sciences, Star Ring The research team leader Wan Yuanqi, the general manager of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group, Mr. Yang Mingqi, and the secretary of Binhai City, Mr. Yao Yi, jointly launched the power transmission button of the Dawuwan Nuclear Fusion Power Station."

The moment a few people pressed the big button was frozen.

Everyone knows that history will remember this moment, the first nuclear power plant to be put into use, the moment of formal transmission for humans.

chapters.title: Chapter 614: : The General Trend Of History
chapters.body:
Chapter 614: : The General Trend Of History

After the start button is turned on, the Dawuwan Nuclear Fusion Power Station officially supplies power to the grid.

Then, the holographic congratulatory video of the great head of the party that Li Chengzhi brought over was also released for the first time.

This is a very meaningful moment.

The short congratulations video ended. When the holographic figure of the great head disappeared on the stage, the serious moment ended, and Chen Mo was on the stage under the introduction of the host.

Today, the most mainstream media in the world are in the stage.

At this important moment today, his words will be spread all over the world in the first place through the shots of the reporters below.

"Now, the world is facing a serious energy crisis and is facing the problem of global warming. It is urgent to find a safe and pollution-free clean energy. Fortunately, we can break through the technical bottleneck of nuclear fusion."

Chen Mo came to power and was in good order.

At this moment, I can't say too much chicken soup, and I can't tell too many stories. At first, I can only talk about some scenes.

The outside world is not trying to know what Chen Mo said, but about the development of nuclear fusion power stations.

"I just let the staff collect some questions that the media friends want to know or want to know. I have chosen some to give you the answer here.

A reporter asked: After the news of the success of the nuclear fusion power generation site fire, only a few days have caused global stock market turmoil, the crude oil and coal market plummeted, so that countless investors suffered losses, and many people are unemployed, and further, very It may trigger a global financial crisis. What impact will nuclear fusion have on our lives? Are there many benefits or more disadvantages?

This question is very interesting.

If we want to enjoy delicious fish, we must be prepared to be caught in the throat by the fishbone. Would you give up enjoying the food in front of you because you got stuck in your throat for a few seconds? ”

Chen Mo swept the lower one and continued to speak.

"A change in the field, at the beginning of the emergence, the society will have an adjustment process for the arrival of new things, which causes some unsuitable fluctuations to be normal.

Now, the news of nuclear fusion is only a small fluctuation at the beginning, and its benefits are infinite.

According to the statistics of the Bureau of Statistics last year, our country's total electricity consumption exceeds 12 trillion kWh, and this figure is still growing at a rate of 6% per year.

Among them, thermal power generation is 9.1 trillion kWh, accounting for 75% of the total power generation. Now, with the standard of 300 gram coal consumed by 1 kWh of thermal power generation, how much coal is needed?

In the case of limited hydropower generation and nuclear safety risks, with the growth of the domestic economy and the growth of energy consumption, the proportion of thermal power generation will increase year by year.

The acid gas emitted by thermal power generation is the main cause of acid rain in many areas, as well as dust pollution. The power industry has become one of the largest polluting industries in China, which is why the country has always encouraged the development of new energy sources..."

The problem of air pollution such as smog has always been the heartache of society. The direct economic losses and indirect losses caused by air pollution are even more shocking.

Now that the nuclear fusion power station is coming out, all these problems will be solved.

Don't worry that the nuclear fusion fuel will burn out, and don't worry about pollution. This is its most direct benefit and impact.

Today, nuclear fusion technology has become a global concern after the lunar landing.

The traditional energy that competes with nuclear fusion energy will undoubtedly face the fate of being gradually eliminated. However, natural selection and backwardness are eliminated. This is the law of natural selection. From the perspective of civilization progress, it is also unchanged. law.

"Huaxia will enter the moment of soaring."

“When, our country can also develop nuclear fusion technology.”

"I was leading the Chinese for so many years, and now I am overtaken. The speed of China is really terrifying."

"..."

The reporter who saw Chen Mo’s speech below was full of emotion. Unconsciously, China has led the world in all aspects.

Chen Mo briefly introduced the advantages and possible impacts of nuclear fusion energy.

After five minutes, he ended his speech.

He said that the outside world knows that it is just a retelling.

"I found that you are more and more interesting, talking a set, serious, so serious and confident, usually not serious, it feels like a change." Just down, Zhao Min said to tease.

"Formal occasions, be serious, keep my perfect image." Chen Mo is doing well around Zhao Min.

"The image is perfect."

Zhao Min took a look at him and nodded.

"I don't know what will happen after this ceremony, the company has to prepare. After all, the cake is too big, there are too many interest groups involved, and the impact is not small. Even if there is an official to help us block the big trouble, but the little trouble is absolutely not Will be less."

"There are definitely a few kittens and puppies, just like a normal heart. This is a big trend in history. No one can stop it." Chen Mo said.

Chen Mo down, Wang Nian also went up in the introduction of the host. After an hour, the main characters finished the congratulatory message, and the launching ceremony of the delivery point was officially ended.

The ceremony is simple, but it is not simple.

The importance and significance of this ceremony is to announce to the world that China's nuclear fusion technology is fully mature and has been put into use.

It seems to be simple, even boring, but in later generations, this ritual has a representative meaning that cannot be ignored. This is the beginning of human use of nuclear fusion energy, a symbol of history.

"Huaxia is really living in the 21st century, then look at our country, a Notre Dame, it has not been repaired for ten years! We are finished."

“I want to travel to Binhai City, where the world’s most advanced city, the holographic world is really amazing, there is also autonomous public transport, holographic playground, holographic arena, and now there is no pollution energy, really great. It is."

"A terrible China, will they rule the world again?"

"Einstein publishes the theory of relativity and mass energy to all mankind; Tesla tears up the patents of AC and uses AC power for free for all human beings; Chen Mo is also a great man, and he should also publish controlled nuclear fusion technology for all mankind, Addressing the climate problems facing humanity."

Chen Mo’s video at the nuclear fusion power station site has already attracted a discussion on the Internet.

On the international network, there are many voices, and they are calling on the marching ants group and China to open up nuclear fusion technology to deal with the energy crisis facing the earth.

After the ceremony of power transmission to the network, global stock markets fluctuated again, coal and oil prices fell again, and the new energy sector skyrocketed again.

A capital game that cannot see bloodshed has already started in the global economic market and is undercurrent.

On the second day after Chen Mo announced that the nuclear fusion power station was officially sent to the grid, the power bureau of Binhai City announced that the city's electricity price dropped by 0.3 yuan. This news made the city of Binhai up and down.

For so many years, it is rare to have a power saving fee, and the decline is still so large. The factories that ate large electric powers did not celebrate Chen Mo’s portrait.

On the third day, the official document of South China Province announced that in the next 8 years, more than five nuclear fusion power stations will be planned in the province to replace thermal power plants, comprehensively reduce electricity prices, popularize new energy sources, and control environmental pollution.

The news came out and attracted the province's cheers.

On the 7th day, the officialities of several provinces with the highest thermal power generation and the most serious air pollution, and Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group announced a strategic cooperation and began planning the construction of nuclear fusion power stations.

Soon, the capital also sent a message, and the committee announced that in the future, it will fully develop and implement the nuclear fusion power station construction, and strive to phase out the serious pollution power generation within 10-15 years.

At the same time, the official also issued a document in a low-key manner, suspended some of the coal mines to be mined, and began to plan to control the production of coal.

The news is constantly being screened, and it is almost a good news every day.

Judging from various actions, the Huaxia official is determined to make nuclear fusion energy fully popular and gradually replace the original thermal power generation. The action of a new energy update has begun.

chapters.title: Chapter 615: : Technology Without Borders?
chapters.body:
Chapter 615: : Technology Without Borders?

CNN's latest news: American environmental enthusiasts gather and march, marchers gather at the door of the Chinese Embassy, hoping that China will open nuclear fusion technology to alleviate the global warming problem facing humanity.

World Economic Times: The official application of nuclear fusion technology led to a sharp drop in global coal prices. Some coal exporting countries closed coal mines. A large number of coal miners were laid off. Coal mine miners marched in Chile and gathered in the parade near the Chinese Embassy, demanding that China temporarily suspend the application of nuclear fusion technology.

Wall Street Journal: OPEC announced that collectively reducing oil production, influenced by news, global oil prices have stopped the downward trend in recent days.

Asahi Shimbun: The Fukushima people gathered for the government to introduce nuclear fusion power stations and completely eliminate nuclear fission power stations.

Reuters news: European multi-national environmental enthusiasts gathered at the branch of the marching ant group in Europe and the door of the store, requiring the marching ant group to share nuclear fusion technology to all human beings to alleviate the atmospheric problems facing the world. At present, the European headquarters of the Army Ant Group has announced that it will temporarily close the store where the assembly takes place, so as to avoid uncontrollable accidents and the police maintain order at the scene.

......

"Einstein's research results and Tesla's exchanges can be used freely for China. Why can't their nuclear fusion technology be shared? Is it too selfish?"

“Technology has no borders, and the way China’s technology monopolizes is too much.”

"Nuclear fusion technology belongs to all mankind. The marching ant group cannot monopolize, let the UN ask them to hand over the technology, otherwise the world will sanction them."

"If they don't steal our research, it's impossible to study so fast. They are all thieves. They should be asked to return the technology immediately, or they will be sanctioned."

......

"This is a typical double-label and moral abduction. When our country was backward, they collectively imposed technical blockades and patent blockades on us. Now we have some skills to share with the world, and a group of shameless."

"It’s so cool to see them collectively climax."

“Those who say technology sharing feel so ridiculous. It’s as if the technology of papermaking and gunpowder in our country is not free. When Americans took the lead in mastering atomic bomb technology, why didn’t they share it with the world?”

"Science without borders? This sentence has always been a joke. They have good technology, that is, Wassenaar's mechanism. We have good technology, that is, technology has no borders; today is the highest state of seeing shame."

......

After a series of official promotion of nuclear fusion technology, the domestic and foreign reactions are completely different.

The country is full of joy and screaming for two days.

Each country has different levels of development and different demands. Some countries that rely on fossil energy to maintain their economies are affected by price fluctuations in the international fossil energy market, and the market is almost on the verge of collapse.

Some unemployed miners hope that China will not popularize nuclear fusion technology so quickly.

In the Western network, there have been some ‘technologies without borders’ arguments, and this argument has even become mainstream.

At the same time, there are also the arguments that ‘Einstein and other great people share technology with all mankind, and Chen Mo shares technology with all mankind to solve the global environmental crisis.’

The first argument was used by many foreign netizens to kidnap and attack the marching ant group; the second argument was to ethically abduct Chen Mo’s individual.

The impact of nuclear fusion technology on the marching ant group was initially presented.

......

"Mr. Chen Mo, we hope to use the star ring to do a nuclear fusion experiment. I hope that you can provide some theoretical information about the star ring to us."

In the reception room of the marching ant group, an old man with a gray hair and a Mediterranean hairstyle sits opposite Chen Mo.

This is an expert on the iTeR project, the French physicist Victor Caro.

At this point, Carlo face looks very sincere and is waiting for Chen Mo's answer.

International research on nuclear fusion technology has never stopped.

More than three years ago, Huaxia achieved controlled nuclear fusion. The iTeR project was based on Huaxia as a member of the project. It required Huaxia to share the technical information of the satellite ring. As a result, the two sides fell out and broke up, and then iTeR survived.

Afterwards, the leaders of the United States and Russia spoke on the phone, led by the leaders of the two countries, and invited the European Union, the island, the British, the Indian, the Korean, the Canadian, and the Australian Seven-Party Group to reach the "Cooperation Agreement on Joint Development of High-Temperature Plasma Research". All high-energy physicists have researched and accelerated the research on controlled nuclear fusion technology.

The new nuclear fusion technology development plan excludes China.

However, in the past few years, the research on nuclear fusion technology of the Jiufang Group has made little progress.

Now China's first nuclear power plant has been connected to the grid, and China is also popularizing nuclear fusion power stations.

They once again put their ideas on the Chinese people.

The star ring is the only solution that is currently put into use in nuclear fusion technology. They also want to understand the technical principle of the star ring, and combine the tokamak device to imitate a nuclear fusion device.

"Sorry, Professor Carlo, the star ring is not open to the outside world."

Chen Mo did not hesitate to refuse.

“Science Island is the laboratory of Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group. It must join the group's nuclear fusion research group to reach the star ring.”

In the face of a sudden visit by an international high-temperature plasma physicist, Chen Mo was surprised.

Now I heard that they came to borrow the stars and they will know.

Let me not say that he will not open the star ring, even if he is willing, the official can not let them touch the star ring.

When they were behind, the Western world guarded them and blocked them. Now it is impossible to let them use the most advanced technology.

"Why not?" Carlo heard Chen Mo refused, and he was anxious: "This is contributing to the progress of human technological civilization, and technology has no borders."

"Professor Carlo, it is better for you to immigrate to China and join the nuclear fusion development team of my nuclear energy group. I promise that you and other members will not have any unfair treatment, after all, all contribute to the progress of human civilization. Technology has no borders."

Chen Mo shrugged and his face calmed.

"..." Carlo is stagnation, and some sighs: "Chen, how can you use the star ring to give us an experiment? We can lend money, you say a price, how much can you rent it?"

"Sorry, the star ring is not rented out." Chen Mo still refused.

“Is there any other way?” Cara frowned, some unhappy. For the first time, he was so low and sighed with others, but Chen Mo still didn't let go.

"Yes, if you join our nuclear energy group's nuclear fusion development team, you can naturally use the star ring. After all, for researchers, where the experiment is not important, to complete your own research topics and ideals is the most important. We With the most advanced experimental equipment and technology, you can completely complete your research, technology without borders." Chen Mo said.

"..."

Carlo frowned. Just now he used Chen’s ‘Technology Without Borders’. The result is now back, some embarrassing.

"What conditions do you need? You can rent a star ring to experiment with us, as long as we can meet."

"Really not." Chen Mo spread his hand.

"It is a pity that the scientific field should not be so closed." Carlo heard the resoluteness in Chen Mo’s voice and knew that he would return empty-handed today.

"Yes, I agree with this sentence." Chen Mozhen is interested in nodding: "We have an open attitude towards science, so we welcome Professor Caro to join our company and do research together."

"There is a chance." Carlo squeezed a smile.

I hit the wall.

After leaving the marching ant group, Carlo looked at the headquarters of the marching ant group and looked complicated.

Today, China is no longer the original China.

This time, the marching ant group has returned without success. As Chen Mo said, joining the company can use the star ring, but can they join? The G9 will never agree to the top physicists being dug, especially when the nuclear fusion technology is hot.

"These people are really interesting, thinking that they want to borrow, we will give the same." In the headquarters building, Zhao Min saw Carlo's car leaving, said.

"They are too long for the uncle, they always feel better than us. Now they are not suitable for normal people, and they will get used to it later."

Chen Mo regained his gaze.

“What troubles does the company have recently?”

"The big trouble is not. As you said, the official has taken on the international pressure brought about by nuclear fusion technology. But we have a lot of troubles, the so-called 'environmental enthusiasts' from abroad, to the door of our company or the door of the store. Give us a hat, and we want to use this to 'salvate' us to save the world and share nuclear fusion technology. Those gatherings and parades affect the normal operation of some of our stores, and there is no problem in other aspects."

Zhao Min said.

"There are some minor troubles in China. The emergence of nuclear fusion technology, coupled with official promotion, has caused some fluctuations in the country. Now the official is also dealing with these things, seeking gradual over-expansion and slowly eliminating the fluctuations caused by nuclear fusion technology."

chapters.title: Chapter 616: :Little Trouble
chapters.body:
Chapter 616: :Little Trouble

Nuclear fusion technology has been rapidly promoted by the government. The direct impact on the international market is the fluctuation of fossil energy prices and the impact of financial stock market fluctuations. In addition, it is the eye of some foreigners.

As the place of occurrence, the domestic influence of the application of nuclear fusion technology is the most direct and the most important.

As early as more than three years ago, the Star Island experiment of Science Island was successful, and it had some impact at that time.

Officials announced a gradual reduction in production and some coal mines with backward production capacity.

After that, some miners were unemployed and some coal mining companies lost revenue. After so long buffering, the laid-off workers have already turned into other jobs and they have all stabilized.

This time, nuclear fusion technology was popularized and the impact was much larger than the previous one.

Several provinces that mainly use thermal power generation have announced cooperation with Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group to plan nuclear fusion power stations. This has shown that in the next five years, thermal power generation will face a large-scale phase-out.

Thermal power generation is the mainstay of coal consumption. Once eliminated, the coal market will be greatly reduced.

At the same time, the official also issued a low-key document to speed up the closure of some old coal mines and restore the vegetation in the mining area. Some coal mining companies are seeking to gradually transform and exit the market.

There were a lot of laid-off miners, and a small-scale unemployment wave appeared, and the problem began to stand out.

The nuclear fusion technology is mature. In the next 5-10 years, the coal market will become smaller and smaller, and even withdraw from the mainstream.

This means that more and more miners will be laid off in 5-10 years, and there are more than 5 million miners in China. This is a big pressure for employment, as well as workers in thermal power plants.

The government has introduced a new infrastructure plan and an environmental protection plan for retreating land and returning forests, seeking to increase employment, alleviating employment problems, and avoiding the impact of too many unemployed people on society.

Even if the official is prepared, the official plan is general and cannot take care of every laid-off worker.

While cheering for nuclear fusion power stations in China, a video spread across the network.

The content of the video is that several laid-off miners have made trouble in the offline store of the marching ant company, forcing the store to temporarily close and suspend business.

Things are exposed in the network, attracting no small waves.

“Without work, the trouble of finding a marching ant group is a bit too much.”

“The nuclear fusion technology developed by the marching ant group indirectly leads to their unemployment. They are looking for a marching ant group to work, and the marching ant group is not bad, and giving them a job.”

"Funny, you have been eaten by the dog. Three million miners in the country, the popularity of nuclear fusion power stations in a few years, the closure of coal mines, the closure of thermal power plants, they have to be raised by the army ants group?"

"If the troubles can get the work of the marching ant group, I dare say that in two days, the marching ant group will be able to apply for production."

"A company, while earning profits, must also take up some social responsibilities. The marching ant group should continue to increase employment, at least to ease some employment problems."

“The marching ant group is a high-tech company, and its position is not suitable for ordinary workers. Now Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group is expanding its enrollment and has many jobs, but those jobs are not something ordinary workers can do.”

"They are also a group of poor people. At their age, there are old and small, and a family supports them. If they don't work for a month or two, the home is over."

“There are some infrastructure projects and a highly intensive environmental protection program, which will increase the number of jobs. These people do not go to work for themselves, but choose to spend time to make trouble, it is not worthy of sympathy.”

"..."

In response to the miners' troubles, there has been a lot of debate in the domestic network.

Later, some news was also released. After some miners were laid off, they did not find a job for a while, the family economy was in difficulty, some pressure was too high, and there was even an urge to commit suicide.

Because of the nuclear unemployment problem caused by the nuclear fusion technology, the problem of unemployment in the industry is presented to the Chinese people at this moment.

However, from the beginning to the end, the executives of the marching ant group and the senior members of the Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group did not respond to these matters on any occasion, chose to deal with cold treatment, try to avoid excessive attention and create conflict escalation.

On the occasion of hot public opinion, Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group and the provincial government held an official launching ceremony, jointly announced that the nuclear fusion power generation site in the province of Fujian Province was successfully fired and officially put into use.

The nuclear fusion power station where the province is located will supply power to the Anxiong New District, the capital and the Bohai Rim region, and will continue to build nuclear fusion power stations in the future.

At the same time, the provincial government announced that it will gradually close some coal mines and thermal power plants with lower capacity and increase investment in environmental management.

This news has made the country and abroad feel awkward.

The wave of public opinion has already been pushed to a new height.

Workers in coal miners and coal-fired power plants face the threat of lay-offs.

Some electricians in thermal power plants can go to some positions in nuclear fusion power stations, but laid-off coal miners are not so lucky. If they don't find new jobs, they can only be unemployed at home.

Some voices are already being discussed. The official development of nuclear fusion technology, the speed of phasing out thermal power plants and coal, is somewhat rushing.

Slowly transitioning to replace, there is enough buffer time in the middle, and now concentrate the problem at once, even if the official plan, but the speed is not too wise.

......

"Get off the plane." Chen Mo said to the ink girl around him.

He said that the lift-off is the launch of the goddess.

The company's business, Zhao Min handled, the exploration of the moon has been ongoing, the moon-green brick has been successful, and the construction of the lunar base material.

The goddess is loaded with lunar landers and detection robots. They need to place robots on the moon to explore places that are suitable for the construction base.

After the goddess carried the lunar lander and lifted off, Zhao Min’s holographic video call also came.

"Is there any big trouble recently?" Chen Mo first said.

He has been following the news.

The impact of nuclear fusion technology is not small, the speed of official promotion is a bit fast, and the general direction is within the scope of the official plan. After more than three years of nuclear power plant construction, the official has prepared for today’s situation and cannot make too much. The problem.

However, individual examples are not likely to be fully taken into account. Companies are more or less affected by small influences.

From the beginning of the miners to their offline stores, to the news that some laid-off workers are suffering from life pressure and want to jump to the bridge to commit suicide, no one is sure, there will be more extreme people.

"There is no big trouble, no small troubles. Some people want to provoke contradictions and increase the complexity of the problem." Zhao Min said.

In this world, people who have never fallen short of the stone, as long as they do not touch their bottom line, Zhao Min is too lazy to pay attention to it, and it is also very complicated.

The laid-off miners have a grievance in their hearts, and with difficulties in life, as long as someone is slightly instigated, it is easy to break out.

During this time, there were a few troubles.

Many of the people who are looking for trouble in their company are listening to others.

Here, I want to track down, and there are some troubles. Those who are inside and outside the country will not let go of this opportunity. However, the other party only made some remarks in the network, guiding the direction of speech, the strict meaning does not touch the law, and finding the other side is helpless.

The public opinion will be dealt with by public opinion.

"Next to your debut," said Zhao Min.

Chen Mo heard the words of Zhao Min, a bit inexplicable: "I am debut? What can I do when I am on the scene? When the mascot still give them chicken soup?"

Zhao Min smiled when he heard the mascot and the chicken soup.

"It's not a mascot, it doesn't need to be filled with chicken soup, but it solves the small troubles of our company in China from the roots, and it is also a giant of the times."

"That's still a mascot, let's talk, what do you want me to do?"

"People announce the news in person."

chapters.title: Chapter 617: : Earth Oxygen Grass
chapters.body:
Chapter 617: : Earth Oxygen Grass

"After the success of the Star Ring experiment, I thought about today's problems, so there are some preparations in advance, try to minimize the impact on our company." Zhao Min said.

The issue of nuclear fusion technology is not trivial. It is early to guess that the impact will not be too small, so Zhao Min made some preparations for some troubles that may be faced.

"The earth grass you gave me, that's a good thing. I found the plant research team of ten colleges and the company's biological laboratory to do a three-year study on the grass, let them put the grass The biological signs are all studied again.

The research team has determined that the soil grass does not cause biological invasion of the natural world, does not secrete substances with toxic hazards, and can improve the soil condition and survive in extreme environments. Your research is correct. ”

At the beginning, Chen Mo spent a lot of thoughts on the grass. When she got the grass, she gave the grass to the professional team to study.

In the past few years, the research on earthy grass has been very comprehensive, but Zhao Min has always chosen not to announce it.

A long time ago, Lin Shu proposed an environmental plan similar to Ali 'ant forest'. At that time, holographic mobile phones and holographic applications just came out and wanted to be combined with holographic pets to let people experience the game without forgetting environmental protection.

Later, Zhao Min separated the plan and kept it on hold.

After Chen Mo gave Zhao Min the seeds of the grass, she found the time to start the plan.

The plan has already been prepared, and Zhao Min has not announced that it will solve some of the company's troubles after the emergence of nuclear fusion technology.

"You announced the existence of the grass, and after that, the team responsible for the grass, will take over the matter." Zhao Min said.

The soil grass can improve the condition of the land. This is a very special kind of plant. Once it is announced, it will definitely shift the external vision and adapt to the current official environmental protection policy.

Chen Mo is the creator of this new species, and Chen Mo's international influence is huge, with his own super topic and attention, more than anyone is suitable to announce the news of the grass.

"Yes." Chen Mo said.

He planted the grass for Zhao Min, and he never asked. He believes that Zhao Min knows how to use grass seeds to create benefits for the company.

I didn't expect Zhao Min to have such a long plan to take it out at this time.

"I plan to let Blue Creek send you your mailbox."

During the call, Chen Mo asked the ink girl to open the mail sent and transfer the plan of the project.

An environmental public welfare plan.

There are several parts to the plan.

First of all, the first ring is to launch a small program similar to the ant forest on the platform of the ants, and transform the small game of 'holographic pet adventure' into a holographic game combining Pokemongo and Pokemon. . Learning the practice of ant forests, using the user's outdoor sports data, low-carbon activities and the energy generated during the game, planting plants in the game, planting plants in reality, and creating a realistic pet adventure forest - ' marching ant forest'. The marching ant forest can also be planned to become a tourist area.

The second part is to cooperate with Ali to add 'Oxygen Grass' to the planting tree species of the ant forest, and cooperate with other environmental protection funds and public welfare projects in China.

The last plan is to work with the government to use soil grass to control domestic polluted land, poor soil and to transform the desert.

The core purpose of the plan is to use earthy grass to control environmental pollution and transform the desert on a large scale.

Nowadays, nuclear fusion technology has become popular. Officials have gradually stopped production of coal mines and thermal power plants. They have to restore vegetation and control pollution in mining areas. At the same time, they have to promote a large number of environmental protection projects to control deserts and create more jobs.

The emergence of soil oxygen grass can make the scale of this environmental protection project larger.

These labor-intensive projects have made it larger in scale, the demand for ordinary labor, and the change of miners to fully solve the problem of miners who are unemployed because of the closure of coal mines.

At the same time that their company gains revenue, it can also gain a positive recognition from the society and increase the reputation of the company.

Moreover, the advent of earthy grasses solves not only domestic problems, but also land pollution, air pollution and desert expansion. This is an international issue. This program is not only applicable to domestic problems, but also to international cooperation.

What Chen Mo needs to do is to announce the new plant species of 'Oxygen Grass' to the world. In the next plan, there will be a responsible team of the company to plan.

“The launch of the ‘holographic pet adventure’ game and the ‘running army ant forest’ is also the use of these close-to-life entertainment methods to achieve the goal of participation in environmental protection by the whole people. This was originally proposed by Lin Shu.”

“There is a lot of thought.” Chen Mo agreed to nod: “When do you need to announce the existence of the grass?”

"The best of these two days."

"Row."

The outside world is particularly concerned about the emergence of unemployment in nuclear fusion.

From the reaction of the international community to the domestic response in China. Through a series of events, it is enough to see the impact of nuclear fusion technology.

The number of unemployment surges in China is not as serious as it was supposed to be. Although it has risen, it is within the scope of official statistics.

However, under the circumstance of the drive and the rhythm of the people, coupled with the turmoil of the international community, some media that are not aware of the truth are biased, thus creating a feeling of serious unemployment.

The government has repeatedly stated that it even publishes statistical data, but some people still believe that the data is fraudulent and choose not to believe.

Things for the marching ant group have sprung around the world, and some savage troublemakers have appeared in the country.

Things are not big, they are all small troubles, but the focus on this stage of public opinion is erupting, which makes people annoyed, so the overall news is not small.

Just as the outside world saw how the marching ant group responded to the incident caused by the nuclear fusion technology, the official of the marching ant group, which had remained silent, suddenly announced a video.

The cover of the video is Chen Mo, the founder of the marching ant group.

After the video was opened, the onlookers were once again scared by the content announced by Chen Mo.

The earthy grass is available.

Chen Mo uses genetic technology to concentrate the dominant genes of various plants on one plant.

A species that concentrates on drought resistance, cold resistance, salt and alkali resistance, air purification, soil improvement and other traits. Once the news was announced, the global botany research circle was stunned, and it also attracted earthquakes in genetic disciplines.

Behind this genetic technology, it is exciting and hides the fearsome side.

The media community, which was still concerned about nuclear fusion technology, was immediately attracted by this news.

Before the outside world questioned the grass, the marching ant group published the results of the research on the grassland in the past four years on the official website and platform.

Research reports from plant research teams and biological laboratories of ten famous universities in China, and more than 50 research papers on soil oxygen grass written by professors and research teams of botany.

The research reports and papers are the most famous part of Botanical professors and team members in China, and they have a good reputation and status in the world.

In addition, it is rare to publish Chen Mo's personal research paper on soil oxygen grass, as well as some experimental data.

The results of the study did not differ much.

This brand new plant species does not have the ability to invade nature, nor does it secrete proteins and substances that are toxic to animals. It is a perfect plant species for controlling deserts, controlling pollution, and purifying the air.

Chen Mo has created a brand new plant species.

chapters.title: Chapter 618: : Gold 蝉 Shelling?
chapters.body:
Chapter 618: : Gold 蝉 Shelling?

"New plant species? Oxygen grass, a strange name."

“The research report and the paper I have seen, this new plant is isolated from other plants. And its own genes are mostly taken from other plants in nature. The only new protein is the purified protein, which can Absorbs toxic substances from the soil and toxic gases in the air."

“Purification of protein is the most terrible thing in the soil, a new protein that has not appeared in nature. Chen Mo edited the sequence of this gene and succeeded in creating this protein that did not appear in nature and applied it to organisms. Within the gene, this is a means of creating life."

“Does this cause genetic pollution in nature? Once contaminated, how terrible the consequences are? Is this a contraindication to genetics?”

"If this is a contraindication, what is the fruit and vegetable in space? The vegetable seeds in space use space radiation to induce mutation, but it is still unpredictable, and Chen Mo only controls the direction of plant variation from the genetic level to benefit the society. What are the taboos? It’s not too much to give Chen Mo a Nobel Prize in biology.

“In the published papers and reports, there are more than 20 papers that have done a comprehensive and detailed study on purified proteins. Purification of proteins is not biologically toxic and can be hydrolyzed into common peptides in organisms without accumulation. Current experiments It has been proved that the soil grass has reproductive isolation from other herbaceous plants and does not have the conditions for genetic transmission."

“Successfully editing new proteins means that human beings can make life possible. We can create a bacterium, can higher civilizations create humans?”

A brand new species?

The terrible genetic technology has made some people shudder and the sensation is a big earthquake.
