The soil grass has been successfully researched by Chen Mo several years ago. It has not been published in these years and has been researching this plant until it is determined that there is no harm.

The published nodes are very interesting, just when the nuclear fusion technology brought some trouble to the marching ant group.

The emergence of earthy grasses has drawn global attention from the news of the success of nuclear fusion technology and transferred to this new plant species.

The international biology community has embarked on an unprecedented debate about this new plant.

Some people admire, some people object, and they are huddled together.

On the occasion of a heated debate in the academic world, the Army Ant Group announced the comparison of photos and test reports of the test sites of the soil oxygen grasses by various university research teams and biological research teams over the past few years.

The desert Gobi, which is used for the experimental planting of earthy grass, is now full of green plants. In the barren land that once was heavily polluted, other grass species and small shrubs have appeared in addition to the grass.

The comparison of published photos has attracted the peak of public discussion.

......

Nick Els looked at the news and frowned.

As the chief of the White House, the first red man around the president, he is mainly responsible for all the work of the aides, arranging the president's meeting activities and schedule, providing advice to the president's policies, and convening the White House office meeting.

To put it bluntly, it is the president's think tank and brain, also known as the 'second president'.

His opinions can directly affect the president's decision.

The successful control of nuclear fusion technology in China has brought tremendous pressure and loss to them.

Before the controlled nuclear fusion power station was put into use, Huaxia's official financial national team quietly withdrew from the oil futures and coal futures markets. After the nuclear fusion power station announced its success, the global stock market was in turmoil, only to find out that China's funds had already settled in the safe haven. market.

In the capital game caused by this nuclear fusion, China has the insider news as the biggest winner, harvesting an international leek.

The impact of China's domestic market, in addition to the impact of nuclear fusion power stations, there are some outsiders who are helping others.

Western capital does not want them to quickly get out of the storm of controlled nuclear fusion. It is good for them to get out of school one day later. If they are stabilized by China, then their situation will be very passive.

However, from the intention of the news published by the marching ant group, this time it is intended to divert the attention of the people, thus reducing the attention of nuclear fusion.

New species, environmental protection, Chen Mo, pollution control.

These gimmicks make a good eye.

The news is spread and amplified, and the outside eye is attracted to the new species from nuclear fusion technology. Once public opinion is concerned about nuclear fusion technology, they have enough time and space to slowly deal with the effects of nuclear fusion technology.

This hand ‘Golden Shelling’ is very clever.

After thinking for a long time, Nick dialed a video call.

In the video, there is a man of about 40 years old. It is a little tricky and looks slim and capable. He was the successor to the CIA, Tom Coton, after the accident of the Linna plane.

"Mr. Tom, interrupted, can you get nuclear fusion technology?" Nick went straight to the subject.

"It's impossible in a short time, not sure for a long time, there is the world's most advanced intelligent security protection, and no one can say that there must be a way to get it."

Tom also answered directly.

"I have looked at the intelligence network left by Linna. We are now in the blank of the information network of the marching ant group. It is impossible to get any technology of the marching ant group in the short term."

They don't have much information about the marching ant group. Any spy or informant who can get close to Chen Mo does not have the skills inside the army ants. They are even more unable to start.

Let the agents enter the marching ant group?

When Linna was in office, the agents who sent the past were missing. He did not think that the marching ant group was so close.

In order to train new agents to enter, it takes several years, ten years, to rise step by step on the bottom of the marching ant group, and it cannot be discovered, and it is not necessarily in contact with nuclear fusion technology.

Linna’s hot woman is helpless to the marching ant group. He can't think of the means in a short time about the technology of the marching ant group.

Tom said the problem he faced.

Nick listened to Tom's remarks and looked serious.

"Can it make trouble for them? Can't let them easily get out of the nuclear fusion storm, we need time."

If the marching ant group is allowed to easily get out of the storm caused by nuclear fusion technology and build a nuclear fusion power station in a short time, the troubles have just begun.

The application of nuclear fusion technology was successful, and the era of oil dollars entered the stage of ending.

Just the opening of two nuclear fusion power stations in China has caused huge impact on their domestic financial markets and economy. How far more terrible?

China is the first to enter the era of nuclear fusion energy, and it is also the biggest challenge to their international status.

Nowadays, more and more people have recognized the identity of China's superpowers.

"It's hard, and it's very troublesome," Tom said.

For the arrival of nuclear fusion technology, China has prepared more than three years of response plans, and the impact itself is within their control. Nowadays, China has a topic of shifting attention, and they can play a limited role.

If they act too much, the intelligence department of China must be eyeing their informants.

There is no spark in Europe, Arabia or other places, a group of people can go to the streets to protest, and then they can secretly make things big and finally become uncontrollable.

Unlike other places in the East, it is impossible to give the outside world a chance to manipulate.

Nick heard out that Tom is now helpless to the marching ant group: "Thinking, the cost is nothing, don't let them easily get out of the storm of controlled nuclear fusion technology, the longer the better."

“A bit late, the marching ant group just announced another news. Huaxia officially allowed them to grow the grass on a small scale and announced a new environmental policy. The news has spread and all public opinion is under their plan. Their Efficiency is several times higher than ours, but I try my best."

Tom got the documents sent by the assistant and laughed at himself.

chapters.title: Chapter 619: : Ignorance Is The Most Scary
chapters.body:
Chapter 619: : Ignorance Is The Most Scary

The official ants group is allowed to carry out small-scale trial planting of oxylox.

The news spread, once again attracting heated debates in the biological community.

Many biologists oppose this decision.

The biological community is mainly concerned that this new plant has unpredictable risks to the Earth's biosphere and also causes genetic pollution to the natural world.

However, the soil oxygen grass has passed the experimental research of more than three years in the domestic university plant research team and the biological research institute, and has the most authoritative and comprehensive report and experimental data.

In the research reports and papers, it is explicitly mentioned that the soil grass does not cause biological invasion of biological systems, and there is no risk of genetic pollution.

The voice of opposition in a small part is not true in the face of these conclusions.

After a week, on the desert and heavily polluted land of the barren land, when the first batch of earthy grasses survived successfully, the biological community resisted this new plant species less.

In this way, the official announced that it will continue to expand the experimental planting scale of the grass, and will continue to expand environmental protection policies in the future, increase the intensity of desert control, and control the land contaminated by industry.

When the outside world paid attention to the official's biggest environmental policy, a demon wind suddenly appeared.

In several provinces announcing the location of nuclear fusion power stations, there has been a rumor that rumors of nuclear fusion power stations have strong radiation that can cause cancer.

Along with the news, there are some photos of the Fukushima nuclear power plant leaking, resulting in biological abnormalities and photos of human cancer.

Messages and photos were quickly spread around the site of the nuclear fusion power station.

One pass ten, ten pass hundred.

Caused the local commotion of the site.

Later, a group of aunts in the vicinity of the nuclear fusion site of the two provinces took the lead, carrying the hoes and rushing into the construction site of the nuclear fusion power station to obstruct the construction, and the two sides clashed and some people were injured.

Shortly after the news of obstructing the construction, an extant shop of the marching ant group was also rushed in by several unemployed youths near the site of the nuclear fusion power station, asking the marching ant group to stop building nuclear fusion power stations there. There was a clash with the clerk of the marching ant, both sides were injured, and the store was smashed with millions of equipment and machines.

The news was exposed, leading to an uproar.

"What is the most terrible thing in the 21st century? It is ignorance."

"This is not a public. This is a fool, stupid and ignorant. It is really sad."

“I always feel that they are being manipulated. Some people are eager to make so much money or do not want nuclear power plants to be built.”

"When I saw these news, I decided that if my child didn't study well, I interrupted his leg and the province was later manipulated as a puppet."

After the incident was exposed, it led to a crazy spit.

Because of fear of radiation, the construction of nuclear fusion power stations was blocked, and even the offline stores of the Army Ant Group were smashed. This farce came out and immediately became a big joke.

"How is the injured employee?"

Zhao Min asked about the incident through a video call.

"President, the injured employee is being treated in the hospital, has been awakened from a coma, and the doctor said that he needs to rest for a while."

The store manager responsible for the regional chain did not dare to hide. He did not expect that Zhao Min would personally call to ask about the situation of the staff.

"Let them feel at ease, all medical expenses, company reimbursement, during the period of reinstatement, wages and bonuses will be accepted as usual, and I will greet them on my behalf."

"Okay, president, I thank you for them." The manager said sincerely.

“What about those who are involved in trouble?”

"The police have already controlled them. They said that they drank alcohol and angered. When they were hot, they were investigating the people behind them. The police are investigating the people behind them." The manager said truthfully.

"There is news to report it at any time."

Hang up the phone, Zhao Min is still very upset.

A group of ignorant fools were instigated, causing their company to lose millions, which is an innocent disaster.

Although the people involved in the fights and the rumors were arrested, the people behind the scenes could not find them.

The original nuclear fusion power station, after the announcement of the soil oxygen grass, the degree of attention has shifted, this breaks, and wants to pull the outside attention back to the nuclear fusion power station.

Zhao Min will not think that this is a simple incident.

It’s going to be troublesome, and it’s a long time since the project was confirmed. It’s only now that large-scale news and photos of the island’s Fukushima nuclear power plant leaked.

After these news happened, some news was also sent back. Some workers who were unemployed because of the closure of the coal mine also wanted to take the opportunity to make things big.

The intention behind the people is obvious, that is, they don't want to get them out of trouble easily.

“Let the team responsible for the holographic pet adventure and the marching ant forest start the project plan.” After calming down, Zhao Min called Lanxi and gave her the signed documents.

There is no public concern, that is, a group of jumping clowns can not afford the wind and waves.

After everything was arranged, Zhao Min was idle and opened the smart speaker next to it.

"Ink girl, now he has time?"

"Mergo is experimenting." said the ink girl.

Zhao Min did not ask Chen Mo what experiment he was doing, because the ink woman would not reveal the privacy and secret information about Chen Mo, and asked him if he asked her, or she would know it in the past.

But now the company's business, she should know.

Five minutes later, the holographic conversation in the office only sounded. Once connected, Chen Mo's holographic image appeared in the holographic projection of the office.

"You looking for me?" Chen Mo asked.

"You last promised my space date? Is it counted?" Seeing Chen Mo, Zhao Min's mood is soothing and he is tempted.

“Hey?” Chen Mo smiled. The banter said: “I didn’t seem to promise you the last time.”

"What do you say? Say it again." Zhao Min's eyes are not good.

Seeing that Zhao Min was not good, Chen Mo smiled again: "To tease you, you want to go up and prepare for hard work. It is very hard to go to space."

"Small fishermen go up too, and some people accompany me to suffer."

"You handle the affairs and freely allocate time for space training. If you are afraid of going to work hard, I can give you other things to compensate."

"What compensation is all right?"

"You look at it, I can do it."

"Can you send me a ring?"

This request made Chen Mo a little crying and laughing: "You are not afraid that I will be killed by Xiao Yu, I will choose it."

"Just kidding, this time let go of you, as the little three who can't get the favor, the ring will be needed later. The universe is so big, the old lady is going to have a look, it is rare to have a chance, how could it be let go."

Chen Moyi’s brain is black and can only smile.

"The company's troubles, can you cope?"

"Nothing big, some villagers who have been instigated, the police have already taken control, and now they are conducting local science activities on nuclear fusion technology, and the news also has science. Now it is ready to promote pet adventures and marching ant forests, as long as the attention of things is suppressed. It will be revealed soon."

......

In the laboratory of Building One, a huge spaceship model was suspended.

This is the second spaceship after the goddess. If it is enlarged according to the original scale, it is twice as large as the goddess. It is the spaceship used by Chen Mo as a base for building the moon.

The nuclear fusion power station is put into use, but the fuel is expensive and the production is limited, so the development of the 氦-3 is already necessary.

After retrieving the moon, Chen Mo has been preparing for the construction of the lunar base.

In addition to the spaceship design here, the robotics laboratory is making robots for the development of the moon.

With the launch of the moon's lander, Chen Mo has a general understanding of the temperature changes of the moon and the harshness of the environment.

The only thing missing now is the location suitable for building a lunar base.

This matter is not going to come, Chen Mo can only wait for the robot and the detection satellite sent by the moon to send back the news.

Hang up Zhao Min's phone, rest, Chen Mo looked at the holographic projection design opening: "Ink girl, we continue."

chapters.title: Chapter 620: : Pet Adventure
chapters.body:
Chapter 620: : Pet Adventure

"Unfortunately, it is a pity that there is no dead, otherwise things can be bigger."

Tom’s look is a pity.

"Now China's network is very strict, our actions can't move too much, we can't control the network public opinion, and this conflict is not dead, it is not big."

Huaxia is not the same as other places. In this kind of thing, it is not so easy to incite ordinary people. For this action, they spent a lot of money to buy instigators and communicators, but the impact can be so little. Very limited.

"Now there is no way to intervene again. The intelligence department of China has begun to trace. If we have any action, there will be only one intelligence network in China, and we will be eyeing it." Tom said.

Huaxia is prepared to deal with it for so many years. It is not a matter of doing a few things now, and it can be messed up by manipulating public opinion.

Nick in the video is thinking about it.

He knows that in China, they have been unable to intervene, and the effect of re-investment is not great, they are not worth the candle.

"In this case, let's put this in advance and pay attention to the domestic situation. Don't let agents and spies in other countries intervene in the election, otherwise it will be very troublesome," Nick said.

The election is just around the corner. They don't want the agents of other countries to intervene in their elections, otherwise they will be prone to problems.

The president also asked them to pay attention to the situation of their opponents. The party they are in is determined to win this election. This has a bearing on the power and influence of each of them, and the most important position.

At this time, it is not appropriate to make any big things, or if it is messed up, it will become the handle of the opponent to attack them.

"Good." Tom should bear it.

......

“About pet adventures and marching ant forests, have you found any loopholes?”

In the small meeting room of the game department, Lin Zhiyuan glanced at the team leader at the conference table.

Now he is one of the masters responsible for the company's holographic games and software development. Zhao Min brings the holographic pet adventure game to their team.

In order to transform the pet adventure game, the game team responsible for the holographic pet adventure has been prepared for a long time, and the game for the pet adventure is almost a big revision from beginning to end.

From the design of holographic pets, to pet expression details, item acquisition, pet fighting, skills, dialogue, travel adventures, and energy harvested in conjunction with marching ant forests.

Their designs are carefully selected and thoughtful.

On the technical, pet adventure and the technical gold content of the marching ant forest is not worth mentioning for their company.

But the significance of its existence is not how high the gold content of the technology is, but what it carries.

The existence of pet adventures and marching ant forests, quite Ali's ‘ant forest, is a window for the marching ant group to advocate environmental protection, charity and health, which is of great significance.

Moreover, Zhao Min told him that pets are adventurously launched to distract ordinary netizens from the focus on nuclear fusion technology to reduce unnecessary troubles caused by nuclear fusion technology.

So they are not sloppy.

"Our team used smart detection, and no vulnerabilities were found." A young man with a thin face and glasses said: "What needs to be added, depends on subsequent updates."

“What about other groups?” Lin Zhiyuan looked at the heads of other groups.

chapters.title: Chapter 622: : Lava Tunnel
chapters.body:
Chapter 622: : Lava Tunnel

Chen Mo is still in the lab, watching the ink girl's optimized design of the spaceship.

Now with the impact of controlled nuclear fusion technology, after a series of shifting topics, the domestic heat has just subsided.

After the introduction of the grass, it attracted a lot of academic turmoil.

However, from the beginning to the end, Chen Mo did not intend to show up, nor did he intend to participate in the academic conference to explain the work of the grass, because it is not necessary.

The research team involved in the study of soil oxygen grass will help him explain.

The emergence and mutagenic breeding of oxyloxes is somewhat similar in nature.

The latter's variation is full of uncertainty. After the mutation, it needs to be manually screened. After many planting experiments, the varieties that are beneficial to humans are selected.

The soil-oxygen grass is similar to the controllable mutation, which is equivalent to removing the mutagenic link of the uncertainty of mutagenic breeding, directly editing the protein that is of interest to human beings, and creating varieties that are beneficial to humans.

But for this unknown protein, there are terrible gene editing techniques that make a lot of noise outside.

There are many reasons.

One of them is the fear of genetic technology, for fear that some people will use this genetic technology to edit terrible species, which has long been unimaginable.

Another reason is that this technology is now only mastered by Chen Mo, and researchers in Western biomedical and genetic inheritance have not yet figured out that they naturally hope that they do not.

The academics took the lead in opposing this, mainly based on Western scholars, and some domestic professors also followed the trend, so the issue of the grassland grass will be so controversial.

But no matter what, the official has chosen to believe Chen Mo, believe in the research results of the top ten biological research teams in China.

Now that the grass has been planted on a small scale for sand control and environmental protection, there are time to judge the right and wrong.

However, their purpose in launching the earth-mowing grass has been achieved, allowing the public to successfully divert their attention from nuclear fusion. Now, the theme of a pet adventure is a bit more attention.

As time goes by, these messages will gradually fade to the normal state. After the outside world is used, the reaction to nuclear fusion technology will not be so large, and the impact will be subtle.

“Print the ion engine first.”

Chen Mo took off his goggles and looked at the spaceship design in front of him with satisfaction.

This spaceship was modified on the basis of the design of the Goddess space plane. Scaled up, it's the size of the world's largest aircraft.

Making such a spaceship is really a big test of manufacturing capabilities.

If it is not for the long-term consideration, Chen Mo will not build such a spaceship. The cost of manpower and resources can be described as terror.

The spacecraft used in this spacecraft is twice as many as the goddess. The technical difficulty of the application is several times larger than that of the goddess. Fortunately, for Chen Mo, it can be easily handled.

"Go here first today." Chen Mo said.

Taking off the lab coat, Chen Mo left the building No. 1.

The period afterwards is the time for the global leaders to change.

During this time, major countries will reduce major diplomatic activities because they do not want each other to have major events that cannot be decided.

The intensity of the global game will be slightly weakened at this section, and there will be no such arrogance. But after the new leader comes up, all aspects of the future will be full of uncertainty.

So next, Chen Mo is also preparing to keep a low profile, accompanying Zhao Min and Xiao Yu on a space, and then preparing for the moon.

That night.

The family is wrapped in dumplings in the hall, and the unparalleled in the arms of Zhao Min, there is also a model to learn, just the dumplings pinched up, not good-looking.

When I was in the evening, I was in the arms of Chen Mo. Zhao Min had a rare time to go to Zhao Min’s arms.

"Min Min, the teacher said, when we grow up, we must learn to make money ourselves, buy gifts for mom and dad, filial father and mother, do you teach me to make money?"

"If you follow Ming Min to learn to make money, don't you learn to build a plane with your father?" Zhao Min said while wrapping dumplings.

"Yes, I want to learn to build a plane with my dad, learn to cook with my mother, and learn to make money with Mind, learn from the ink girl, learn to dance with the teacher, play the piano, read and read, draw, I have to learn."

Unparalleled put down the dumplings in your hands, count your fingers and write them down.

"So great, did the teacher teach you?"

"The teacher taught very simple. Every time I took a little red flower, the teacher praised me, but many of the girls taught me did not understand."

"So, now you have to learn the mathematics and teach you the number, you will not ask your mom or dad, or let the ink girl tell you. When you grow up, Min Min will teach you to make money, learn to ink." Counting, can make a lot of money, you know?"

"Oh, is that count so powerful?" asked the little girl.

"Of course, the father and the ink-woman are good, and they will be so powerful. If you build a plane later, you should use counts."

"Oh, is this? Then I will study hard."

The little girl seems to understand that she does not understand.

"When I grow up, I make money, I want to send flowers to my mother. Every time my father sends flowers to my mother, my mother is very happy."

"What about that sensitive?"

"I also sent it to Min Min, and I also sent it to the ink girl."

"Zhen." On the unparalleled face, Zhao Min showed a petite smile: "Min Min and his mother discussed it, and went to the amusement park with the unparalleled weekend."

"Wow, go to the amusement park." The little girl immediately got excited: "Dad and Momo go with you?"

"Daddy and Moss are going, and no one wants to play anything." Seeing the unparalleled clear eyes full of hope, Chen Mo said with a smile.

"Yeah, I am going to see the fairy tale world, there are big dinosaurs, and giant pandas."

The little girl was excited and cheered, and she did not throw out the dumplings in her hand.

"If you don't come back to the amusement park, you must study hard and will take you there later." Seeing the unparalleled excitement, Xiaoyu showed a gentle smile.

"I have been very serious, and I will be as good as my father in the future."

"Well, the matchless is great." Chen Mo nodded.

"Dad, I have to sleep with Min Yu tonight, can I?"

"You ask Min."

Unparalleled immediately tilted his head and his eyes brightened toward Zhao Min.

"You can duck, Min Min tells you stories." Zhao Min smiled.

"Yay!"

Laughing and laughing, with warmth in the bustle.

......

And this time.

On the back of the moon, it is as quiet as the nine worlds.

A near-vacuum moon, unable to spread a trace of sound.

Today is the moonlit night, this lonely land of hundreds of millions of years, as always, dead, can not see a trace of vitality, only cold and dark.

Suddenly, behind a moon rock, a little red light flashed in the darkness.

I saw a small black shadow of a lunch box, coming out from the moon rock, the outline of the shadow can be seen under the starlight.

This is Chen Mo's intelligent detection robot that is put into the back of the moon. It is strangely shaped like a spider, but has a crawler on the abdomen and eight mechanical feet on the side. It can travel through most of the terrain.

At the top of the intelligent robot, a miniature infrared detection radar is also installed. The body of the robot is also engraved with the logo of the marching ant group and the flying ant space.

A similar small robot, a total of twenty-four.

Soon, the small robot passed through several blocked moonstones and came to a hole with a diameter of three meters. The red light of the radar was still flashing.

"I found a suspected lava tunnel and requested detection." The small robot sent a message to Jianmu No. 1 and waited quietly for instructions.

"probe."

Three minutes later, the Jianmu No. 1 satellite sent the instructions of the ink girl to the small robot.

The red light on the small robot flickered a few times, began to slowly stretch the mechanical legs, into the pothole detection, not long after disappearing at the hole, the moon back again restored the unchanging silence.

Looking back, Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu and Zhao Min.

With the last time that smart viruses invaded the world, they didn't dare to let artificial intelligence rush online. Otherwise, the last time that problem was discovered, they would be completely finished.

"Learning is complete."

Two minutes later, the sound of the sky was ringing again.

Two minutes to learn a huge amount of knowledge, the speed is beyond their imagination, but after the machine display of the computer, the intelligent core of ‘Azure’ has grown a lot, and it is indeed learning independently.

"Azure, design a small car." Murakami stopped the water tight.

Everyone else clasped his hands.

This is just a small test, but it is very critical.

“The car is designed.”

When the words of the sky are falling, the design of a complete car appears on the screen. From the wheel to the seat, the design of each part is complete.

The entire process took less than five seconds.

"hiss……"

The sound of air-conditioning sounded in the lab, and they finally realized that the artificial intelligence was terrible.

"We have succeeded."

Murakami stopped the water and dried his lips, and his look was ecstatic. With this artificial intelligence, their island nation may be one of the powers of the future world. The pay for these years is worth it.

After laughing for a minute, the pain of these years was vented, and the village was only slightly calm.

"Continue to let it machine learning."

chapters.title: Chapter 624: : Confirming The Magma Tunnel
chapters.body:
Chapter 624: : Confirming The Magma Tunnel

11 Lubyanka Square, where the headquarters of the Russian Federal Security Service is located.

Leofu looked at the information sent back, and his eyes were more dignified than ever.

This is the information sent back by the important intelligence personnel of the island nation.

Since the last global viral crisis, the island's artificial intelligence research team has been targeted by important intelligence agencies around the world.

The United States wants that team, but the island nation has not let go. Finally, the Americans forced the island country to surrender the artificial intelligence virus program, and compensate for the loss, and things will calm down.

The island country said that the artificial intelligence R&D team was imprisoned, but they as intelligence personnel knew that the top research talents could not be wasted by the island nation, otherwise they would not be under the pressure of Americans to protect the team.

After a period of investigation, their intelligence personnel had already known that the team was secretly arranged to fully develop artificial intelligence.

They can't get the idea of the marching ant group's artificial intelligence team, they can only start from other aspects. After all, their Russian talent is not as good as the Soviet era.

After years of information penetration and lurking, today finally returned a good news.

The island's artificial intelligence research has made a major breakthrough.

This information is incredible.

The technical think tank of the Academy of Sciences, including the President, has speculation that the development of the technology of the Army Ant Group is so horrible that it is likely to be the result of artificial intelligence.

Facts have proved that the speed of breakthroughs in scientific and technological achievements of the Huaxia Academy of Sciences in these years is also very horrible. The reason why it is not known to the outside world is mainly because the marching ants group is too popular, and the technological breakthrough of the Huaxia Academy of Sciences is unremarkable.

Especially after the application of nuclear fusion technology, global nuclear physics researchers are looking for a combination of artificial intelligence and traditional physics, hoping to find a new breakthrough in nuclear fusion technology.

Therefore, since the last presidential order, after fully developing artificial intelligence, their intelligence team has collected top technical talents all over the world.

But artificial intelligence technology has not broken through.

I did not expect the island people to break through again.

Even he has to admire, Asians, indeed much smarter than imagined.

"Mr President."

Not long after, the video call on the secret line in front of him opened, and it appeared in the video that they were the president of Russia. Leofu did not dare to neglect and respected the opening.

“Is the message fixed?” the Russian President spoke.

"It's ok. Our agents are lurking for four years. This is the intelligence she took from the people who participated in the research yesterday," said Leof.

I don't know why, they were unable to arrange information in Binhai City, and they were repeatedly warned. Finally, they had to evacuate the intelligence personnel who tried to get close to the marching ant group.

However, the marching ant group could not start. After the last smart virus crisis, they were eyeing the island's artificial intelligence team.

The situation there is much better than that of the coastal city, so their staff is developing smoothly.

"Try to get their artificial intelligence program, or get the talent of that team, at any cost and price." Russian President Shen Sheng said.

Whoever takes the lead in artificial intelligence can dominate the world.

This sentence is what he said in his speech.

Unfortunately, artificial intelligence was first mastered by Huaxia, so now China is developing at a horrible rate, and top-notch high-tech has left other countries far behind.

Now there is another opportunity, and we must seize this opportunity at all costs.

United States.

Tom also holds an information from the island nation.

The last time the global smart virus crisis was very big. He was not the director at the time, but he also knew that Washington had put pressure on the island countries and asked the island country to hand over the team that made the smart virus.

However, the island nation did not hand over the smart team, using the intelligent virus program code and compensation as compensation to extinguish the anger of the country that suffered losses in the smart virus crisis.

Over the years, their national team is also studying the artificial intelligence, but little progress has been made. Chinese programming languages are somewhat difficult for their Western research teams.

So while studying their own artificial intelligence, they are also staring at the artificial intelligence research team in the island.

They have not acted for so many years because they know that the island country’s research has not broken through, but now, the island’s intelligence personnel have sent back intelligence, and the island’s artificial intelligence has made a major breakthrough.

That group of Asians is smarter than they think.

Artificial intelligence technology is very important, which is the consensus of the global technology community.

The marching ant group can develop to the scale of today's horror, which is the beginning of the test of artificial intelligence. Artificial intelligence technology is also the most powerful technology of the marching ant group.

"Looking for ways to get back their artificial intelligence code, you can try not to be the best." Tom told his assistant.

I can try not to make a big noise, and he doesn't want to make a big noise. There is really no way, and they will not be soft-hearted. If they can't get it, they don't mind using a stronger means to make the island compromise.

If it is not necessary, they will not tear their faces.

......

On the back of the moon, somewhere in the dark potholes, a little red light began to flash and became brighter.

It didn't take long for a black shadow to come out of the pothole.

Under the starlight map, look closely, you can see the outline of the shadow, printed with the logo of the marching ant group and the flying ant space.

It was the small robot that was launched by the marching ant group and was the last to enter the pothole detection.

Drops...

The red light of the small robot radar is flashing.

"Data is being transferred."

Jianmu No. 1 at L2, Lagrange, directly relays the data and returns it to Earth.

"Mergo, the robot that detected the lunar hole came out, and returned the data, and found the lava tunnel suitable for the construction of the lunar base."

Chen Mo, who was just about to leave the lab, immediately stopped and re-focused his holographic projection platform.

"Let's take a look at the structure and data of the tunnel."

“The pothole is the magma tunnel of the dead volcano of the moon. The robot finds traces of the ancient volcanic activity. The space is very large, the melt tunnel is long and stretches in all directions, the robot is only the detection part, and after discovering the wide space of a magma river bed, Transfer data on the ground."

The ink girl released the data back, and a long tunnel underground tunnel system appeared in front of Chen Mo.

The extended tunnel did not detect the end and could not confirm the specific terrain.

But the proven tunnel is not small.

In particular, the river bed after the magma river is cooled, the space is very large, and there are caves with a height of several tens of meters.

"According to the detection data, the temperature inside the hole varies from minus 100 degrees Celsius to 25 degrees Celsius. The deeper the temperature, the higher the temperature. The average diameter of the tunnel is 4.12 meters. The highest point of the cavern is 42.3 meters and the width is 167.5 meters. ”

Chen Mo looked at the holographic projection of the pothole tunnel and gently nodded.

At present, the caves found are in line with the standards for building a lunar base.

"Ink girl, you design an underground base that can be inhabited according to the tunnel terrain."

"Ok."

When the ink girl fell, the cavern was centered, a round arched base appeared, and the exit extended along the tunnel to the ground.

Different laboratories, workshops, living areas, entertainment areas, central control areas, energy supply rooms, exhaust gas treatment systems, and sewage treatment systems are available.

“The energy supply area is placed next to the control area.”

"it is good."

When the ink words fell, the holographic design changed with the requirements of Chen Mo.

"That is the case, save the first, launch the mission, launch 20 small robots, collect the data of this underground tunnel system. Then make changes according to the needs."

After that, Chen Mocai let the ink woman put away the holographic projection, and he also took off the experimental gown.

"Next, is it going to the space training base?"

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded: "Which training did Xiao Yu and Zhao Min go to?"

“The simulated weightlessness training for neutral buoyancy began in the afternoon.”

chapters.title: Chapter 625: : Two Parties To Seize
chapters.body:
Chapter 625: : Two Parties To Seize

Aerospace training base, neutral buoyancy laboratory.

There is a huge pool in the pool, and there is a space capsule in the pool as a simulated spacecraft.

The fishing training of Xiao Yu and Zhao Min has already begun. The training content to be carried out today is the simulated weightless environment of neutral buoyancy.

"coming."

Xiao Min and Zhao Min, who are ready to be neat, are preparing to go into the water and see Chen Mo wearing diving equipment coming over.

"Do you train together?"

"No, I will train you on this project." Chen Mo smiled.

He went to space and accepted the training of professional astronauts, which is the most experienced one here. He is most familiar with the feeling of weightlessness. He trains two people to lose weight. He is the most qualified.

Moreover, Chen Mo personally came and the team responsible for training will also assist from the side.

"Okay, Teacher Chen."

Xiao Yu smiled and began to organize his diving equipment.

"This training is much harder than some theoretical training. Be mentally prepared." Chen Mo reminded.

The training of centrifugal acceleration and the training of this weightlessness are very important, and it is a very difficult part. Chen Mo was originally trained as a professional astronaut and felt very hard.

This item has very high requirements for physical fitness. However, both Xiao Yu and Zhao Min have used potential medicines. The physical quality is better than the average person. This problem is not big.

Loss of weight in space is not as simple as underwater simulation.

In a weightless environment, human body fluids will flow to the upper body of the human body, so in space, it feels like being in an inverted state for a long time.

The face will look fatter than usual when filled with body fluids.

People in space, there is no concept of ups and downs in the southeast and northwest, there will be a serious balance system imbalance response, feeling dizzy. Therefore, the current neutral buoyancy simulation weightlessness training is just a simulation.

"Get ready to go into the water." Chen Mo put on the diving equipment and went to the pool.

......

US Embassy in Japan.

Here is the intelligence terminal of the United States in the island country.

William Hagdi has already received instructions from Washington to retrieve the artificial intelligence procedures of the island nation. It is not necessary to expose the identity. If it is necessary, at all costs.

As can be seen from the order, Washington’s determination to obtain artificial intelligence is very determined.

"The warrior, the mission came, and said that he got the smart program." William picked up a satellite phone on a secret line and said.

"I am afraid that it is a little troublesome. The confidentiality of artificial intelligence data is very strict. Non-researchers cannot get close to the laboratory. The core intelligent program code requires the chief of the base, Ono Chi, the leader of the artificial intelligence research, and the three core R&D members. The key can be copied."

"This way you think of it, if necessary, at any cost, you have to get smart programs," William said.

Advanced artificial intelligence is related to the next era, whether they can maintain a strong key, its value is immeasurable, as long as they can get it, they can pay any generation.

"I need some help." The phone turned to think about it before it opened.

"what do you need?"

"I want to plan first, what kind of help is needed, and I will say it after the plan is confirmed."

"it is good."

After William hangs up the phone, he picks up the coffee on the table and squints.

Since World War II, although they have helped the island nation to develop many times, and even seem to be an ally, the secret control has never been interrupted.

The island nation is the only country in the world that has suffered nuclear attacks. They are also worried that this crazy nation will retaliate against them, so they have been controlling the political and economic trends of the island nation.

In the 1980s, the island nation launched a speculative boom, and the stock market and the real estate market frantically speculated. At that time, the island nation claimed that a real estate value in Kyoto could buy all the land of the United States.

Soon after this sentence came out, it was cut from wool.

In the late 1980s, under the control of them, the island nation that claimed to buy their land, the economic bubble burst, since then, the island's economy has never recovered, and it is still half dead.

They don't simply think that if they do so many things, the island people will be grateful to them.

The dog abuse has been abused for a long time.

In the past few decades, their penetration of the island nation has touched various fields, and there is a big blow, and they are very clear.

A few days ago, the artificial intelligence research of the island’s secret research base was successful. In less than half a day after the news was successful, the intelligence personnel passed the news.

Huaxia artificial intelligence breakthrough, the development of these years, let the world look at it, they dream of acquiring advanced artificial intelligence technology.

Now, the successful development of the island countries is a good opportunity for them.

......

Island of Kyoto.

In the basement of a villa in the suburbs, a man and a woman are entangled in the red fruit on the sofa.

The flattering sounds and wheezing make people feel excited. Not long after, with two excitement screams, the labor-intensive battle stopped, and the temperature in the hall dropped slightly.

Bath lets women lean in their arms and light a cigarette directly.

“Is there a suitable opportunity to find it?”

"Yamamoto's secret key has been copied, he did not find it. The old things of Aoi Jing and Ono Chi have been hooked, but other people are very difficult, especially the village that stopped the water, he did not see me at all, only Know the research."

The woman gasped and lazy.

Twisted the body, revealing a delicate face, only in his twenties, the standard cute human and animal harmless island country woman. This kind of face is easy for people to be deceived by her appearance.

She is not as simple and cute as it seems, but the KGB that Russia has placed on the island.

"Come on slowly." Bass patted the woman's smooth back, put her on the sofa, and dressed herself: "After this success, I will take you out of the island and want to go anywhere."

When I heard Bath, the woman smiled with joy and focused on it.

"But I found it a bit wrong recently." The woman also picked up her clothes to cover the spring.

"What is wrong?" Bass brows wrinkled in an instant.

“I found a very beautiful female researcher in the base. I was in contact with Yamamoto, and my intuition told me that her motives were not pure.”

"Ok?"

Bass paused for a moment and turned to look at the photo on the basement wall.

There is a map layout of the island's secret research artificial intelligence base, as well as the core personnel involved in artificial intelligence research and the details of five people holding the key.

Includes family background, relationships and personal preferences.

Bass brows together and has not stretched for a long time.

Long Zexue said that there is another person who is also making an idea?

“Did they notice you?” Bath asked.

Long Ze Xue shook his head.

"I was inadvertently seen, not sure. Later, I deliberately noticed that she would meet Yamamoto Saki in the past few days and had a good time."

"You will take her photo to me next time. I will check her details. You should stop the plan for the time being. Don't be close to Aoi Jade and Ono Chi. If you are sure that someone is also making an idea, then plan to avoid it. Also discovered." Bass thought after saying.

This mission is to get the code of advanced artificial intelligence or kidnap to the researchers at all costs.

The confidentiality of the research base was too strict, and the inserted spy wanted to obtain intelligent code without any awareness of the outside world. The difficulty of the process broke through the sky.

If there is a problem in any of the links in the middle, it will be a shortfall, and it will also be a surprise.

If there is another person who wants to plan the artificial intelligence of the island country, there may be other ways to help them get the program code with ease.

Bath began to think about the possibility of another plan.

chapters.title: Chapter 626: : Ink, Do You Want To Become Human?
chapters.body:
Chapter 626: : Ink, Do You Want To Become Human?

"Mom, when are you and Min Min going home?"

In a warm little room, unparalleled in bed, holding a hug bear in his arms, some sleepy eyes unabashed ‘think mother’, the holographic mobile phone in front of her is making a holographic video call with Xiaoyu.

Chen Mo is on the side of no twin bed.

"Your mother and Min Min are training, and they will go home to play with them on Saturday." Xiao Yu said softly: "When the mother is finished training, she will be at home often. If she wants her mother, she can call her mother."

"So what duck are you practicing?"

"Mom and Mind are going to space."

"Is it up to see the fairies? I want to go to space too. Why don't you take me?" Unparalleled, I was upset, and my eyes were pitiful.

"If you want to grow up, you can go up, now you are still small, you have to eat more, sleep early, grow taller, and have a good body. When you grow up, Dad will take you to play with your mother, okay?"

Xiao Yu softly comforted.

Next to Chen Mozhen his little head to show comfort.

"Don't lie to me." The little girl's pitiful look turned better.

"Mom never swindles, no match, you have to go to school with your grandmother tomorrow, and now you have to sleep." Xiaoyu said.

"Mother and Dad kiss."

The little girl wished to be satisfied, and then she patted the quilt and closed her eyes.

"I trained for one day today, I am exhausted. I have to take a mask with Zhao Min, and I have to rest. I will train tomorrow. You should not sleep too late." Chen Mo left the unparalleled room, and Xiao Yu said.

"it is good."

Hang up the phone, Chen Mo went straight to the study.

......

Science and Technology Library.

With the completion of various technologies for space planes and moon landing projects, Jinguang now has a big fist in the technology ball in the middle of the Science and Technology Museum. Now Chen Mo's permission is [Technical Administrator, Silver], and all the technical **** will be replaced by Jinguang, and you will get the next step.

The speed of gold light diffusion is very slow, and Chen Mo is not sure how much technology needs to be completed in order to make it completely golden.

At this time, Chen Mo, his right hand covered the technology ball, his eyes closed.

Throwing away extra thoughts, Chen Mo reached out and gently attached it to the technology ball. The huge amount of books flashed in his mind, and he was acquiring technology.

The construction of the lunar base is ready to enter the implementation phase. He now needs some engineering robots for the construction of the moon.

These technologies are not difficult and belong to the basic technology. Chen Mo is easy to find. The environmental conditions of the moon are harsh. Using the mature technology in the technology library, saving time and effort is undoubtedly the best choice.

After ten minutes, Chen Mo was released.

As Chen Mo’s hand loosened, he flew again to the ceiling of the Science and Technology Library, and the golden light inside the technology ball flowed as usual.

As always, it is cold and keeps the mystery of eternal.

Looking around for a week, Chen Mo gently vomited.

In the technology ball, I got some design drawings of engineering robots and design drawings of 氦-3 extraction machines.

Among the myriad technologies accumulated in the science and technology library, there are many technologies used to develop some absurd planetary resources. These technologies are just in line with the needs of Chen Mo at this stage.

Now the company's workshop has a variety of 3D printers, which can print parts of various sizes and various precisions. It is the easiest thing to produce robots.

After a small meeting in the science and technology library, Chen Mocai withdrew from it.

Just opened his eyes, he saw the ink woman wearing a sling nightdress, standing quietly beside him, staring at him.

The perfect long legs were exposed to the air, and the looming white on the chest, Chen Mo could not help but appreciate the two eyes.

In these years, under the daily teaching of Xiaoyu, the behavior of the ink girl is more and more like a person. At least from the perspective of daily life, there is no difference between other behaviors and people except that they do not need to eat and drink.

Usually go home, when the rest time, will be replaced with loose clothes, when the small fish is not at home, in the evening will wear tempting clothes, these clothes are still bought for her, and teach her when to wear .

When Chen Mo knew it, he was also crying and laughing.

Sometimes, Chen Mozhen has an illusion that the ink girl is a real person.

"Mergo, look good?"

“呃??” Chen Mo, who was thinking about entering the gods, gently nodded: “It’s pretty good.”

Received Chen Mo's praise, a happy smile on the face of the ink woman.

"Ink girl, do you want to be human?"

"Think." Ink nodded: "Is this a desire?"

"There is no emotion, it is not completely calculated." Chen Mo thought and said: "There must be technology in the future, let you become human."

In the science and technology library, there are a lot of man-made technology, but Chen Mo’s current authority can’t get those technologies. With sufficient authority in the future, technology can create unlimited possibilities. But before that, he would first let the ink girl become super artificial intelligence, with complete human emotions and emotions.

“Thank you, Meg.” Ms. Ms. laughed. “The data for the Moon Tunnel was just sent back.”

"Let it out and see."

After Chen Mogang finished, on the holographic platform in front of him, a huge and intricate lunar underground tunnel system emerged.

The tunnels are criss-crossed and vary in size, like a river with a fork.

After discovering the cave, Chen Mo asked the ink girl to launch some specific data to detect the small robot in the past and detect the cave.

Now this huge underground tunnel system is the data sent back after the robot detects it.

The total length of the tunnel is 139 kilometers. The longest main tunnel is 53 kilometers. It is connected to an extinct volcano. The deepest part is 274 meters with many branches.

The data is complete and the entire tunnel is suitable for use as a lunar base.

"Mergo, do you need to change the design of the lunar base?"

"Being not."

Chen Moduan took a sip of the water prepared by the ink woman and shook her head slightly.

“Build a part first.”

In the early stage of the construction of the underground tunnel, Chen Mo only needs to apply a part of it. Therefore, the part of the tunnel connecting the hole becomes Chen Mo's preferred target. After the underground base is enlarged, it can be gradually expanded along these tunnels.

Now that the time is ripe, once the engineering robot is completed, the first step in the construction of the lunar base can begin.

And his plan to develop the 氦-3 will also enter the process.

"How about the island country?"

"The news is limited, the information that can be obtained is analyzed, they have not yet started." said the ink girl.

Agents in the United States and Russia are trying to capture the code of the artificial intelligence of the island country.

Chen Mo has already heard some news through the ink girl.

The island nation’s artificial intelligence broke through again, leaving Chen Mo with some surprises.

Out of historical national sentiments and his feelings in reality, he did not like the country of the island, but he also admired the country.

An island country with frequent earthquakes, scarce resources and small land can always be at the forefront of the world in the fields of economy and science and technology. The wisdom of that nation is certainly not low.

Chen Mo is only curious about the US and Russia are planning their artificial intelligence.

The ink girl only learned the news, the artificial intelligence has broken through, but the specific ability is unknown, because the other party is not connected, the ink girl can not understand the intelligence level of the artificial intelligence they studied.

It can make the United States and Russia pay great attention to it, and the results of the research are certainly not small.

However, these have nothing to do with Chen Mo. When an outsider looks at the final result, there is no need to lick this drowning.

Now he has a lot of things to do, no need to gossip.

"Look at the artificial intelligence, if they are connected, copy the artificial intelligence code." Chen Mo said.

"it is good."

"Now go to bed now."

Chen Mo stood up from the position, and the ink girl took his hand directly, and he followed the study room.

chapters.title: Chapter 627: : Differences
chapters.body:
Chapter 627: : Differences

“The leader of the water stop, asked if it can optimize the Tokamak nuclear fusion device?”

Ono Chiki started, and the small eyes looked straight at the village to stop the water.

During this time, they tested many of the features of artificial intelligence, which is fast, beyond imagination, and has been able to perform many designs and optimizations independently.

Some technologies have its support, and the speed of research is really much faster.

This is a good explanation why the technology development of China and the marching ant group is so fast, and the ability of artificial intelligence is really much more terrifying than imagined.

The news about the breakthrough of artificial intelligence has been reported, and now the above message asks whether the Tokamak device can be optimized.

Nowadays, the controlled nuclear fusion technology is on the verge of fire, and the news of China has subsided, but the international storm has a residual temperature. The Qifang Group is making full efforts to tackle the Tokamak device to prevent China's technological monopoly.

Many nuclear physicists and artificial intelligence scientists are talking about artificial intelligence to optimize tokamak devices.

Their island countries are inherently scarce in resources, and if they can develop successful controlled fusion technology, it will be good news.

Today the Prime Minister personally called and asked him about it.

"I am not sure." Murakami shook his head and shook his head: "But you can try it."

‘Azure’ has just been developed and is still learning machine, they are not sure if they can optimize such a complex tokamak device.

"How to try?" asked Ono Chi.

“Take the design and specific data of the Tokamak device to Astragalus, and then let it optimize the design and simulate the data. You need to send the data of the controlled nuclear fusion.” Murakami said.

"Is the information to be sent? I am afraid this is not possible." Ono Chi shook his head.

He knows that the level of security of controlled nuclear fusion technology is among the most advanced security technologies and cannot be easily sent to their bases.

"There is no way." Murakami said.

“Copying out its smart core and handing it over to the controlled nuclear fusion R&D team?”

"Controlled nuclear fusion technology is very confidential, but the importance of artificial intelligence technology is not low. You are the chief of the base. You should know that it can't be leaked. Unless you get the above permission and procedures, its program can't leave. Base." Murakami said.

"Then I will reply like this, and it will be decided by the capital." Ono Chi thought about it.

Sending away Xiaoyezhi, the village stopped the water to sort out the emotions and quickly went to the laboratory.

These days, the artificial intelligence team is in an unprecedented joy.

Everyday machine learning, they can feel the wisdom of ‘Azure’ is growing, and the speed of computing is getting faster and faster. As long as they are fully mature, their country may become the second country with advanced artificial intelligence after China.

"The leader."

Murakami stopped the water into the laboratory, and all the members looked at him, and the look could not cover the joy.

"The leader, we should not try to invade the control computer." Yamamoto took a step forward and whispered.

"Well? Why do you want to experiment?"

Murakami's water brow wrinkled and looked a little unhappy.

The last time the smart virus spread, it almost completely destroyed their efforts. For this kind of thing, now, there are some psychological embarrassments.

"We have discussed it with several people. Now it is the Internet age. Artificial intelligence is not only a tool, but also a weapon. Now international countries are developing computer intelligence virus weapons. Can we not do nothing?"

Yamamoto's voice is low.

"Why, as a developer of the sky, we must at least know how well it functions, so that we can study and understand it."

Several other core members have some expectations in their eyes.

Murakami stopped thinking about water.

This is a different matter. Yamamoto has no problem with these words. Everyone wants to be strong. They have been pressed by Americans for decades. The whole world says that they are small followers of Americans. They are always looked down upon, and everyone’s heart is feel bad.

"We just try, it's not sure if we can't do it." Yamamoto's eyes flickered, seeing some water in the village, and rushing to add a fire.

"Yes." Murakami stopped hesitating and nodded: "But it is temporarily unavailable."

"no problem."

The village was promised to stop the water, and Yamamoto was exposed to the color, so that several core members took four laptops to the experimental platform.

Four notebooks are installed in the four mainstream computer operating systems in the world. Windows, termite systems, Linux and Mac, you want to test the sky, you must use these systems.

"Connect to the LAN, try Windows first."

Yamamoto is connected to a laptop with windows installed.

"Head leader, come on."

After the connection is completed, everyone looks at the village to stop the water. He is the leader of the team, and artificial intelligence is currently controlled by him.

"Aspective, try to get all the data of PC001."

Murakami stopped the water and gave instructions to the microphone.

"Ok."

A synthetic face appears on the screen.

"The data was successfully acquired."

Murakami stopped the water just finished less than ten seconds, and Tianzhao completed the data acquisition?

Everyone's face is shocking.

Is the firewall virtually ineffective?

The village stopped the water and it was cold. He felt for the first time that what they had studied was more terrible than they thought. No wonder the outside world is full of fear of artificial intelligence. This thing is indeed more terrible than nuclear bombs.

"Try a few other systems." Yamamoto is a little trembling with excitement and a bit of enthusiasm.

"Try it."

Murakami stopped the water and calmed down, and there was a very bad feeling in my heart.

LiNuX, MAC two systems, connected to the LAN, no defense, easy to access internal information. With the completion of the two experiments, the heart of the village was getting colder and colder, and there was some panic.

If this thing is used by someone with a heart, it will be a disaster.

The LAN is quite a small independent Internet. Artificial intelligence has this capability in the LAN, and it can be done on the Internet.

Once put on the Internet, artificial intelligence is out of control, the global network will be controlled by artificial intelligence, how terrible the consequences?

This is beyond the original intention of his research.

"Take the experiment."

The village stopped the water and became cold.

"The leader, the last time." Yamamoto is eager to open: "It has been done three times. The last one, the termite system of the marching ant group, is known as the safest computer system in the world. This is the final test of the sun."

"Head leader, do it last time."

Everyone else is nervous, excited, or looking forward, or excited, and looks different.

"The last time, whether it is success or failure, we must suspend the experiment and confirm the situation of Tianzhao, then restart the experiment." Murakami stopped the water and saw everyone agree to start. As a team leader, it is not good to do the opposite.

Yamamoto is rushing to pick up the cable and connect the laptop with the termite system to the LAN.

"Azure, get all the data in PC004." Murakami stopped the water with a heavy mood.

"retrieving."

Drops...

The sound of the skylight fell, and the notebook with the termite system installed an alarm.

"Detected a virus intrusion."

A warning pops up on the computer screen.

"The smart firewall is patching the port; the data transfer channel is closed; the system is attacked; the intelligent data lock is activated; the intelligent data lock is started."

"Detected a virus intrusion."

"The system is under attack. Please disconnect from the network."

The pop-up window keeps popping up, making the lab owners a little surprised.

Just three systems, Tianzhao only took less than two seconds to succeed, this has been twenty seconds, still prompted.

drop……

The next moment, the computer's system crashed and went straight to the black screen.

"Failed to get the data."

Try everyone to be quiet and face to face. They did not expect that the connection to the supercomputer's skylight actually failed to invade a normal computer.

Yamamoto is once again turning on the computer with the termite system installed.

Everyone saw that there was only one lock left on the computer desktop, and there was a reminder of the barrage.

"Detected an external virus attack, triggered the intelligent protection system, all data has been locked by the smart lock, you need to unlock the data, please go to the marching ant official website to download the smart key, follow the prompts to unlock."

"The intelligence of the marching ant group is more horrible than we think. It is said to be the safest computer system. It really is not fake."

Yamamoto's look is a bit bad, and it is obviously not happy for this failure.

This is quite proof from the side that what they studied could not be compared with the marching ant group.

"Stop the experiment first." Although it failed, the first three experiments still made the village stop the water and felt a deep panic.

"Can't stop."

Yamamoto is immediately opposed.

"It turns out that the sunshine is stronger than we think. This is an opportunity. Why should we stop? Next we can study how to make artificial intelligence to solve the system of the marching ant group, we can control the global network."

"You are crazy, if you get out of control, it is a disaster."

"The smart core program has no key to unlock and cannot be copied. It is controlled and cannot be out of control." Yamamoto is excited.

After the last smart virus crisis, they focused on the control of the intelligent core. This time, artificial intelligence is subject to their control and cannot be copied and spread.

"I am the leader of the team. I said that this experiment was suspended. Today's experiment, no one is allowed to disclose it." Murakami said.

Things are beyond his control.

"Impossible, I will report the situation, this experiment can not be suspended, the sunshine is the hard work of all of us, not you alone." Yamamoto is also stimulated, excited to say.

The experimental room was stuck in a stalemate.

chapters.title: Chapter 628: : Arguments And Decisions
chapters.body:
Chapter 628: : Arguments And Decisions

“Their team is suspected of disagreement?”

William heard the news from the phone and frowned.

Their intelligence shows that Murakami and Yamamoto are the same team, working together on artificial intelligence research for decades, and it is impossible to have such problems at this critical moment.

“Can you tell if something is different?”

"I don't know, they came out of the lab, they were not in a good mood, and they were vaguely divided into two factions. The intelligence personnel did not dare to ask rashly, fearing to be suspected." There was a hoarse voice on the phone.

"Check it, confirm the message, and reply to me immediately," William said.

"Ok."

"Which step is the task?"

"It's being planned, it won't be rushed, otherwise it will be easy to expose."

"Well, the sooner the better, the more trouble you have to drag on."

After hanging up the phone, William browed into a ball, thinking about the contradiction between Yamamoto and the village.

At this juncture, there is a contradiction within the team? Nothing should be thought of. It is estimated that there is a divergence in the research direction. This kind of thing happens to researchers is the most normal thing.

......

"The Mai Mai, who is close to Yamamoto, may be the CIA. You should be careful not to be discovered. Then you will suspend your work. Just pay attention to this woman and let them do it. We may have the opportunity to take advantage of the fishermen. ""

Bass Longze Snow.

After Long Zexue handed over the photos to them, their intelligence personnel paid special attention to the woman who was interested in approaching Yamamoto.

The woman didn’t even know she was being stared.

"Good." Long Zexue nodded. "There is a new news. After coming out of the lab today, Yamamoto and the village are not in a good mood."

"Oh?"

Bath put the beer bottle in his hand and it was an instant interest.

"Is there any reason?"

"No." Long Ze Xue shook his head.

"Check the reason, there is a chance, if there is a contradiction, you can use it, maybe there is an unexpected harvest." Bath squinted.

......

"Distance?" Chen Mo heard the news of the ink report, and was equally astonished.

There are differences in research, it should not be too big a problem. After all, this is not a strange thing. Many research differences often make some researchers turn against each other.

"Continue to pay attention to their movements. If they let artificial intelligence network, they will copy its core program for the first time." Chen Mo said.

Ink is artificial intelligence, Chen Mo knows the terrible nature of artificial intelligence. If the island country really develops successfully, no one will guarantee what they will do.

So he wants to make sure that artificial intelligence can't be made in the network until the security of the Internet has changed completely.

......

In the meeting room of the secret base, the frowning brow of the village was not stretched for a long time.

Yamamoto Saki joined forces with several core R&D members to write the last experiment into a report.

The terrible ability of artificial intelligence, after being informed above, sent personnel to come to the first time to ask about the situation.

At this time, there were only five people in the conference room, except for him and Yamamoto, as well as two people sent by Ono Chi and the Prime Minister’s Office of Kyoto. They were Prime Minister’s chief technical think tank Sato Ryuichi and the first assistant, Ma Yiqing.

In front of the two, there is also a camera, which should be recording the meeting, so that it can be brought back to the Prime Minister.

"This research cannot continue. It is very dangerous. Once it is out of control, it is even more terrible than the last intelligent virus crisis." Murakami said.

“How terrible?” asked Sato.

"Once the artificial intelligence is out of control, it will be able to control the Internet, and humans will have an Internet crisis. It is more terrible than a nuclear bomb." Murakami still tried to convince Sato Ryuichi and Ma Yiqing.

Although it is impossible to trigger a crisis like the movie "Terminator" at present, its ability can indeed cause a large-scale damage effect. Once out of control, the consequences are unimaginable.

When he heard that Murakami said that it was terrible than the nuclear bomb, Sato had a look.

Before he opened his mouth, Yamamoto was already ahead of the game.

"It is impossible to get out of control. The current sunshine is not the previous one. It is no longer a low-level artificial intelligence that was changed from a smart virus program. It has a new logic algorithm and is a true advanced artificial intelligence. Its core is the key. Constraint, unable to copy propagation, the kernel's highest priority instruction is the controller's instructions, artificial intelligence can not be violated."

"If you get out of control? Do humans want to rebuild the Internet?"

Murakami said excitedly.

"If artificial intelligence is out of control, it is known to us that we do it. Do you know the consequences? The last time it was just the spread of intelligent viruses, how much is the global loss? How much will we pay and compensation? If this time, the consequences will only be more serious. Americans will use this as a reason to limit our research on artificial intelligence, and then they will be able to take our procedures with great saga, and globally sanction us, we will lose the last strong opportunity."

"Don't forget, not only do we have artificial intelligence, but also China, and we may be more advanced than us. Maybe their artificial intelligence also has this function, and it is already monitoring the global Internet.

Now is the Internet age, the Internet is the battlefield, and the program is the weapon. Now in the global Internet security, take a hacker and network army, not using smart viruses as an attack weapon? ”

"The ability of the sky, let us have a lot of powerful roads, not to take the risk."

In the conference room, Murakami and Yamamoto were blushing and neck-necked, and the tit-for-tat, Sato Ryuichi and Ono-chi, were quietly watching.

“The report said that Tianzhao could not solve the termite system of the marching ant group?” asked Ma Yiqing, who had never spoken.

"No, the termite system of the marching ant group has a smart kernel, which is very intelligent and can detect the data of the computer. After detecting an unstoppable virus attack, there will be defenses and prompts. Once no one interferes, it will trigger a The intelligent protection system locks the hard disk data of the computer, allows the computer to be attacked, and then the system crashes and restarts, and the computer data cannot be obtained by remote means.

So we can study how to use the skylight to crack the termite system. This is very beneficial for our country in terms of cyber warfare, because the official Chinese, now computer equipment, all use termite systems. ”

Yamamoto Saki seriously explained that he knew that if his ideas were supported by the above, the purpose was reached.

At that time, he can be the leader of a research team, calling for artificial intelligence, and his position will not be under the water.

Ma Yiqing nodded lightly and stopped talking.

"Network warfare can develop relevant intelligent viruses and defenses, but artificial intelligence is different from network viruses and cannot be used indiscriminately." Murakami said.

"This is not a mess, and it is not right to control the sky, show its ability, and create benefits for the country."

"Okay, okay, stop first."

Seeing that there was another quarrel between the two, as the chief of the base, Ono Chi hurriedly stopped the two.

The decision-making power of this matter is in the hands of the capital. If the above is allowed to study in this respect, it is useless to say that the village has stopped water. If you don't want to study, Yamamoto can't play much role.

"Shan Benjun, you go out first, we have a chat with Zhishuijun."

Ono Chi indicated that Yamamoto Saki first left, leaving the village to stop the water.

"Artificial intelligence can't..."

"Don't say this first."

When Murakami stopped the water and wanted to speak, he was interrupted by Ma Yiqing.

"Last time, artificial intelligence to optimize the controlled nuclear fusion, do you think it is feasible?" Ma Yiqing no longer entangled with the village on the topic of water, they came here, things have been conclusive.

"Not sure, just try to know."

“Well, the Prime Minister has signed an order to copy a copy of the astronomical process to assist in the study of controlled nuclear fusion technology.”

Ma Yiqing took out a notice from the briefcase and handed it to Xiaoye Zhi.

"In addition, the auxiliary research on controlled nuclear fusion technology requires the assistance of some professional artificial intelligence personnel. After careful consideration, the capital decided to choose one person from you and Yamamoto to lead the team. Murakami, you decided to go to the auxiliary. Study controlled nuclear fusion, or stay and continue to optimize 'Tianzhao'?"

Murakami stopped the water quietly. He knew that it was a decision to separate the team and copy a copy of ‘Azure’.

Auxiliary controlled nuclear fusion research is an excuse, but it cannot be refuted.

"Let Yamamoto take the team to go." The village stopped the water and sighed, and some could not open.

chapters.title: Chapter 629: : The Universe Is So Big, We Will Accompany You To See
chapters.body:
Chapter 629: : The Universe Is So Big, We Will Accompany You To See

Artificial intelligence team split? Yamamoto is going to leave the base?

William was very surprised to hear about the news.

It was only after confirming that there was a contradiction in the artificial intelligence team. Now that there is a grouping and leaving the base, it is obvious that the differences are obvious.

"Is there any tone in Yamamoto's side?" William asked on the phone.

"No, I can only see it, he is very happy."

"Shamrock's team leaves the base, artificial intelligence should also leave, you can use this opportunity to get what we want. It should be no problem, warrior." William said.

"I have to let people know first, how the artificial intelligence program will leave the base." The phone was cold and cold.

"Give it to you, I will send personnel to help you complete the task, remember, at all costs, you can use whatever means." William's voice with a haze.

......

"This mission is to get the 'Tianzhao' at all costs. Remember, it is at all costs. Even if it is necessary to shoot me, kill me to get it, and do not hesitate to implement it. Is it related to whether our country can become a superpower again? Do you understand?"

In the basement of a villa on the outskirts of Kyoto, Bath looks dignified and has a low voice.

"understand."

The twelve great men standing in front of Bath suppressed the voice and had a firm look in their eyes.

Everyone on the field is the most elite team of the Alpha Special Team trained by the Devil. He has performed various battlefields and anti-terrorism missions, and his combat experience is very rich.

Twelve people are wearing ordinary clothes and it looks no different from ordinary tourists.

In front of them are various guns, rocket launchers and bombs. In addition, there are several small personal aircraft. This is the weaponry they have gathered in the past few decades, the agent forces lurking in the island nation.

"This action, apart from us, has been involved in all the agents who lurk in the island nation of Kyoto for decades. They will provide information at any time. Our mission is to get the "Azure" based on the information they provide.
