The course of action must be followed by my command. This is not a movie. You are not a male lead. Don't mess around in action. After the mission is completed, according to the plan, send things away from the island country, understand? ”

"Understand." The twelve men opened their mouths again.

"Familiarize your weapons and equipment." Bass pointed to the weapons on the ground.

The CIA and the KGB are both planning this action.

A plan to secretly capture artificial intelligence is simultaneously carried out, and the seemingly calm island nation of Kyoto is undercurrent.

......

"vomit……"

"vomit……"

Chen Mo patted the back of Xiao Yu and Zhao Min, watching the two retching in the trash can, some distressed.

After two minutes of retching, the discomfort of the two men fell slightly, leaning against the back of the chair, gasping for a big breath, and the forehead was cold sweat. Looking closely, the faces of the two men are already pale and seemingly weak.

The swivel chair of the vestibular function training made the two suffer.

"If you don't train, I will compensate you and I will do whatever I want." Chen Mo handed a towel to the two.

The situation in space is more horrible than sitting in a swivel chair. It feels like hanging upside down. There is no sense of direction at all, and it is long-lasting and very uncomfortable.

Chen Mo is really afraid that the two can't afford it.

"No."

"I don't want it either."

The two improved slightly and refused Chen Mo directly.

"So strong." Chen Mo poured a glass of water for them to ease their relief.

"The universe is so big, let's go see it with you."

"Uh?"

The answer between the two made Chen Mo suddenly speechless.

The trainers next to them, when they heard the answer, laughed and said nothing, but they all looked at Chen Mo with envy.

After five minutes of rest, the two men completely eased and recovered a lot. They have all used potential medicines, and their physical fitness is better than the average person. They are quickly adjusted.

The resilience of a woman cannot be underestimated.

The two did not give up, Chen Mo can only let them.

"Mergo." The ink girl opened.

"You are going to do your business." Xiao Yu saw the ink girl opening, and knew that Chen Mo had his own business.

"What's the matter, contact me directly."

After Chen Mozhen trained the staff, he left the training room with the ink girl.

Zhang Jianfeng came over.

Just leaving the training room, the ink girl told Chen Mo the news.

Zhang Jianfeng is waiting at the Fei Ant Space Center, and there is a safe in front of him. Seeing Chen Mo and Mo Nuo coming over, they immediately showed a bright smile.

"Academician Chen, I haven't seen you for a long time." Zhang Jianfeng first spoke.

"I haven't seen you for a long time." Chen Mo glanced at the box in front of Zhang Jianfeng's eyes: "Is Zhang Yuanshi giving me something to send this time?"

"Chen Chen said, this is the lunar soil and moonstone in the Aitken Basin. We have also succeeded in sending you some research. Although you already have the moon in the sea of wisdom, the geology is different, maybe it is different. ”

Zhang Jianfeng opened the safe, which is the moon and moonstones in vacuum bottles, about five kilograms.

Their moon landing plan was successful some time ago, but at that time, the nuclear fusion technology was in full swing, but the moon landing project did not have so much attention, but they also completed it independently. This is very happy.

This means that the third part of the project was a complete success.

"Then I will be welcome." Chen Mo asked the ink woman to accept the box: "The academician Zhang came over this time, is there anything else?"

"This has been discovered by you."

Zhang Jianfeng laughed.

"I came to ask, when is your next moon landing?"

"The moon landing plan has been going on." Chen Mo said.

Some time ago, in order to find the cave, he had been launching detectors and robots. Before and after, more than forty detectors landed on the moon.

There is a goddess, and now he costs about one million to launch a detector.

"The big move is whether the goddess has a plan to land on the surface of the moon in person." Zhang Jianfeng asked.

"Yes, but it will take a while."

Chen Mo did not conceal, the cave tunnel has been detected clearly. Next, he is ready to launch the engineering machine to the moon, first digging the tunnel and laying the foundation for the construction base.

“Is there a specific time?”

"Probably after I came back to space fishing with Xiao Yu and Zhao Min."

“Is there any experimentation ready?”

“On the edge of the Zhihai Sea, an ancient magma cave was discovered. The environment has been proven. I am going to build a lunar base there, send the engineering machine over, and send the 氦-3 extraction machine to the site to try to extract the 氦-3.”

Chen Mo did not hide.

The lunar engineering machine that needs to be manufactured has been completed.

The technology of the lunar engineering machine is not worth mentioning for Chen Mo, who masters the design of complex machines. Manufacturing materials is not a problem, so after getting the design drawings from the technology library to the ink girl, in just a few days, the engineering machine and the 氦-3 extractor were printed.

"hiss."

Zhang Jianfeng blinked and was shocked.

He did not expect Chen Mo to be silent, and the moon landing plan has reached this point. The speed is fast, it is terrible. In less than half a year, beyond the efforts of its predecessors for decades, it has now begun to implement the lunar base and the plan to develop the 氦-3.

But think about Chen Mo's trajectory of making a home, but also relieved.

“What needs to be helped?” Chen Mo asked.

"We would like to ask you for help. If the goddess landed on the moon, help send a biological experiment cabin and an astronaut in the past." Zhang Jianfeng said.

The third part of the project is completed, the fourth step is ready to begin, and there is a natural advantage of Chen Mo, they can not be left unused.

"I am willing to help me, but if I have problems, I can’t take responsibility."

Chen Mo spread his hands.

If the country’s astronauts have problems because of the goddess’ landing on the moon, the responsibility will be great.

"We have considered this problem. With our own spacecraft, the risk is much greater than that of yours. This is exploration. No one can guarantee 100% safety. When the astronauts decide to participate in the training, they will consider it. This question. We ask you to help, the risk responsibility is borne by ourselves." Zhang Jianfeng said.

The Goddess has carried out many missions in space travel and space launch. After practical tests, its safety is unquestionable.

On the way back to see the space plane returning, the technical experts in the same industry said that Chen Mo’s technology in the space plane was at least 50 years ahead of the world.

He also listened to an old friend who said that the air planes that Chen Mo sold to the military were sent to the research base, and the military researchers saw the aerospace technology, collectively excited to go crazy, among them the ion engine, purple It is self-evident that spar and a variety of new materials are advanced.

Space exploration is risky. The more advanced the technology, the higher the success rate. So after discussion, they decided to seek help from Chen Mo, at least a higher success rate.

"That said, then there is no problem." Chen Mo nodded.

He also needs an astronaut to go up and see the survival of the human being on the moon, to facilitate future lunar development and lunar travel plans.

When Chen Mo agreed to come down, Zhang Jianfeng smiled.

"Then we are waiting for your good news."

After sending away Zhang Jianfeng, Chen Mo returned to the training base. In the following time, Chen Mo will accompany the two men to train. At the same time, a storm is about to kick off in the island countries across the sea.

chapters.title: Chapter 630: : Good To Go Without Sending
chapters.body:
Chapter 630: : Good To Go Without Sending

The secret base not far from Kyoto in the island country has been martial law at this time, and no non-important personnel are allowed to enter. Some ordinary workers and researchers are taking a break today and are not allowed to approach the Institute of Artificial Intelligence.

The supercomputer building loaded with artificial intelligence programs has been surrounded by soldiers with live ammunition.

Supercomputer center control room, headed by Ma Yiqing, a group of special soldiers stand, next to two special safes.

He was sent by the Prime Minister to oversee the delivery of this artificial intelligence program.

The things inside are related to the national transport of the island nation, and must send the most trusted people to supervise.

"Your key is ready?"

Ma Yiqing looked at the presence of Ono Chi and Murakami and others.

"let's start."

Several of the main researchers in the artificial intelligence team looked at each other and carefully took out the secret key from the briefcase and inserted it into the interface of the server.

"The permission is being confirmed; the permission confirmation is successful."

In the eyes of everyone, the village stopped the water and clicked a few times on the screen to activate the copy of ‘天照’.

"Copying..."

The crowd began to wait, and the middle of the village stopped the water several times with the authorization of the password, the copy went smoothly. Everyone else is waiting quietly, no one is talking.

"Copying is successful."

About a minute, the prompt appears on the screen.

Under the eyes of everyone's attention, Ma Yiqing unplugged the hard drive and locked it in the safe.

"Secret key."

Ma Yiqing took the u disk from another safe and inserted it into the computer.

Finally, under the attention of everyone, Murakami will control the key of ‘Tianzhao’ and copy it into the u disk. Confirm that the key is locked in the safe, and the atmosphere on the field is slightly relaxed.

The ‘Azure’ program and control keys are shipped separately to ensure safety.

"Go."

Ma Yiqing waved and let the four soldiers carry two safes and leave the base of the supercomputer center.

......

"The 1 team goal has entered the Kyoto Expressway and is approaching."

"The tortoise found the rabbit behind."

A secret base went to a must-have highway in Kyoto. A somewhat lean man looked at the past **** convoy and opened a sly smile.

He is a warrior, the appearance of ordinary Chinese people, not tall or short, not too handsome and too ugly, without any outstanding, lost in the crowd, will disappear. It is because of inconspicuousness, unattended, and his intelligence work is like a duck.

The spy personnel at the base confirmed the news that the key and procedure of ‘Azure’ were separated from the two teams, one was escorted by a helicopter, one was escorted by a military vehicle, four were escorted, and one helicopter followed the army in the sky.

Two helicopters, four military vehicles, divided into two teams, and as he thought, the group was very cautious. If the two teams succeed, they will succeed in getting ‘Azure’.

"Samurai, 2 teams of drones locked the target and arrived near the designated area in about two minutes."

"A team prepares, and after the 2 teams enter the planned area, the 1 team immediately moves."

The warrior issued an order.

For this action, the above even secretly mobilized the weapons of other countries stationed in the island country, this time can not be defeated.

......

In the Kyoto Expressway, the leading military vehicle, the co-pilot Matsuda Takeshi smiled and was in a very good mood.

Yesterday, the family came to the phone and told him that his wife, Meizi, was born, a daughter. Hearing this news, from last night to the present, the smile on his face has not stopped. As long as the mission is completed, he can take a vacation and go back.

He knows that the things inside are artificial intelligence, so it is very important, so they will send such a large force to escort.

However, in his opinion, it is completely worrying.

Their island country, considered one of the safest countries in the world, is completely impossible to rob them of their things in Kyoto.

"Sumita, what are you laughing at?"

"My wife has a baby." The thought was interrupted. Matsuda Takeshi smiled and said: "After the mission is completed, I will take a vacation back two days to see my daughter."

"Congratulations, when you come back, we celebrate and celebrate," said the soldier opposite.

"Hehe, thanks!"

Just turned around, Matsuda Takeshi's smile filled with joy, and under his gaze, a van sunroof opened, a masked man was holding a rocket launcher and facing them.

"Not good, enemy!"

The smile turned into panic, and in an instant, Matsuda Takeshi’s heart was occupied by fear.

The shouting did not fall, and in his field of vision, the rockets quickly zoomed in and approached them.

Finished! This is the last thought of Matsuda Takeshi.

boom! !

boom! !

Two loud noises in the sky and underground, shook the clouds, and then, the explosion, gunshots, collisions and screams joined together, filling the entire highway.

......

"Bear, the No. 1 eagle hunt."

"Bear, the 2nd Eagle has hunted the bird and the bird fell."

"White bears, you are waiting for the birds to grab the eggs, a group of preparations, waiting for orders to act, let them play a dozen, and then kill the eagle."

In the Kyoto Expressway, in front of the explosion section, Bass, wearing a uniform of the island’s special squad, is sitting in a car, watching the satellite shots uploaded from the tablet, as well as the voices reported in the headset, face With a dangerous smile.

The next moment, Bath's car made a sharp turn and went straight back through the emergency lane.

At the rear of the explosion, on a truck three kilometers away from the explosion, the upper baffle of the container was opened, and four small drones flying with bombs flew up, and along the slowly blocked highway, flew toward the front battlefield. .

Two minutes later, the truck approached, and the front was already surrounded by water, and there were people in traffic accidents and panic escapes.

As the four explosions sounded, four people wearing the uniforms of the special attack units of the island country, stepping on a single drone, rising from the top of the container, carrying a live ammunition, flying over the highway, quickly reaching the smoke-filled place near. A sniper climbed the roof and aimed at the battlefield ahead.

Everything is ready.

In this action, Bath is going out, even if they are exposed.

They must get the artificial intelligence of the island nation, which is their best chance.

Artificial intelligence programs are not trivial, and they are related to whether they can restore the glory of the superpowers of the past.

If this action fails, the island countries will certainly be more strict in protecting artificial intelligence, and the opportunities they will get will be even more embarrassing.

......

The white bear sat in the car, looking at the helicopter that was smoking in the fields not far away, and the helicopter suspended in the field, licking his lips, revealing a sinister smile.

Knowing that the CIA is also seeking artificial intelligence, they turned their targets and stared at the CIA.

After monitoring and tracking, they followed the CIA to come nearby. After the plane crashed, they first chased the crash point here.

螳螂 螳螂 蝉 蝉 在 。.

The island helicopters that were shot down by the CIA are now one kilometer away from them, and the CIA’s helicopters are also above the plane’s crash.

The CIA is awkward, they are the oriole.

With no heart, he couldn’t think of the CIA’s escape.

Now the plane is shot down and lost, according to the island country base to here, up to 15 minutes, the island people will come. However, the CIA people, ambushing not far from the base, delaying the rescue aircraft, may be a little longer, making wedding dresses for them.

When the safe was lifted by the rope, the white bear smiled and immediately stopped the car, grabbed the rocket launcher around him and slammed it on his shoulder, aiming at the helicopter one kilometer away.

The players next to him saw the rocket launcher.

The warheads above are their newly developed smart rockets. They are said to be specially developed to deal with war robots like China. They have tracking functions and high hit rates, especially for their well-trained special players.

It took a lot of effort to bring in five warheads. In order to ensure a higher success rate, the white bear chooses two pieces together.

"It’s good to leave, the United States."

The white bear squinted and pulled the trigger.

chapters.title: Chapter 631: : The Same Water And Fire
chapters.body:
Chapter 631: : The Same Water And Fire

"what?"

The Prime Minister’s office in the island, Anbei heard the report of the intelligence officials, the voice changed, and almost angered.

The **** ‘Tianzhao’ team was ambushed and robbed. All the escorted soldiers were killed. The procedures and keys of ‘Azure’ were all taken away, and the accompanying Prime Minister’s assistant, Ma Yiqing, was also killed.

Hearing the intelligence officer to confirm the news again, Anbei looked black like a pot that had been burned for ten years, and his eyes were on fire.

He did not expect that someone actually stared at the sky.

And use such a big movement to seek.

"What about those who snatched?" Every word that Anbei said was almost squeezed out of his teeth, and the whole person exploded like an atomic bomb.

Kishida Hiroshi, who reported the news, did not dare to breathe, and his forehead was cold sweat.

"Two groups of people, a group of people were killed, and the second group of people took away the procedures and keys of 'Tianzhao' from the first group."

"Two groups of people?"

Anbei was angry and laughed.

In their capital, this happened. Two groups of people, using weapons of mass destruction, brazenly stealing their skills and smashing their soldiers, are simply slippery.

This is to throw their country's face on the ground, step on a few feet, but also spit.

"Do you have any safety intelligence work people? Are you so comfortable for so many years?"

Anbei has taken care of the image and screamed. This is the first time he has made such a big fire. He has never felt so shameful today.

Two batches of such large security threats lurked in their capital, and intelligence personnel were not aware of it.

Kishida Bento lowered his head and did not dare to respond. His face was so ugly that he cried out. They were derelict and could only let the slobber's face attack.

It took two minutes for the fire to be calm.

“Have you found out who did it?”

"There are a bit of eyebrows, the people who died, the CIA. The people who robbed the 'Tianzhao' were not completely sure yet, and there is evidence that it is the bear in the north." Kishida Hiroshi said truthfully.

"Eight! Oh! Yeah! Meat!"

When I heard the report of Kishida Hiroshi, the anger of Anbei broke out completely, and the decorations on the desk completely became a punching bag.

If you don't vent it, I am afraid he will explode in place.

"Block the customs and the port, dig three feet and give me out."

"How can this be explained to the outside world? Directly tell the truth?" Kishida Beno asked cautiously.

"The truth is your whole family. It is said that in the face of terrorist attacks and terrorist attacks, do you understand? Do you want to kill Americans?" Anbei also landed on the field to be crazy.

"The bear in the north?"

"I have my own plans, let me roll." Anbei said with a grin.

......

Azure was robbed.

Xiaoyezhi heard the news and sat down on the chair directly.

They have been keeping the technology of artificial intelligence secret, but they did not expect that they would be robbed when they left the company.

Inside the base, or within the artificial intelligence team, there are ghosts inside.

This is the only reason he can think of, otherwise it will not be so easy for the other party to know where to go and the specific time.

But now it’s too late to say that their most proud work has been robbed.

......

In the separate isolation room, the face of the village is not good.

All the researchers involved in artificial intelligence are isolated and questioned, and he is no exception as the person in charge.

Clever as he has, he has guessed some clues from the investigators' questions.

There was a problem with the artificial intelligence leaving the base, and within their team, they were suspected of having ghosts.

I just left today, and now I ask, the only possibility he can think of is to **** the team of ‘Azure’.

The thought of the terrible power of Tianzhao and his decades of hard work, the heart of the village to stop the water is shaking.

But it is too late.

......

"Is it robbed?"

In the US Embassy in Japan, William’s face is like a black cloud, and he is trying to maintain a calm breath.

Just heard the next news, let him completely lose peace.

The people involved in the operation suffered heavy casualties, and several others were captured by the island nation. The procedures and keys they almost succeeded were all taken away by a group of unknown people.

The ducks to the mouth flew away, and some people blacked them black.

The people who killed them also let their people be arrested and the samurai died.

William was so angry that he was shaking.

For the first time, someone dared to black out them. For him, it was a shame and shame.

"Is it possible to find out who?" William clutched the cup tightly. He was afraid that he would lose control and would break out completely.

"It seems to be the polar bear." The assistant who reported the intelligence swallowed and looked at William a little worried. In this way, he is really afraid that William will be mad and dying.

"Hehehe... the **** of the bitch. Son."

William’s throat made a weird laughter that made the office’s atmosphere horrible, and the assistants around him couldn’t help but shudder.

Their biggest enemy, this time they stepped on the ground, red, naked, naked and humiliated again.

"Where are they now?"

"I didn't find out, they ran away." The assistant shook his head.

"Okay, very good." William has been promoted to the second Buddha.

Bell bell...

The phone of the emergency landline rang, making William's face darker, about twenty seconds. After he calmed down, William picked up the phone, only to hear the snoring of the squeaky face on the phone. He almost smashed the phone.

......

"I was taken away by the Russians?"

Chen Mo heard the news of the ink report, and it felt a bit interesting.

The CIA hunted the eagle, but it was eaten by a polar bear who was secretly watching. It is estimated that both of them are now disgusting, and the polar bear must be laughing.

But the movement caused by this incident was bigger than he thought.

Russia and the United States are almost indiscriminately mad, and they are brazenly making such movements.

"Staring at the Internet, realizing the networking of artificial intelligence, copying it immediately, and then notifying me." He is now curious about the artificial intelligence developed by the island nation. What kind of technology makes the two countries so crazy.

......

The island nation was attacked by unidentified people.

The news came out of the media and instantly became a world-class headline.

The explosions and gun battles on the highway led to a large-scale serial car accident. More than 40 people were killed and more than 100 were injured. The losses were heavy.

The island country is known as one of the safest countries in the world, and this kind of incident is happening today, leaving the world awe. Almost at the same time, some countries have published condemnations of terrorists.

However, just as the outside world was at a loss, the island’s country announced another shocking news the next day.

The island nation announced the results of the investigation. The attack was planned by Russian agents and ordered the expulsion of the Russian ambassador to Japan.

When the news came out, it caused the global situation to shake.

All the people in the island country were indignant. They held large-scale demonstrations in front of the Russian Embassy. Even groups went to the gates of the capital to declare war on Russia.

Only one hour after the news was released, Russia held an emergency press conference and said that it did not participate in the attack on the island nation and was completely unaware of it. The island country was in the fall and announced the expulsion of the ambassador to Russia.

The two sides separated each other and let the meaning of confrontation escalate instantly.

The speed of fermentation of things is beyond imagination and has not stopped.

Two days later, on the occasion of the indignation of the island nation, the island official submitted evidence to the United Nations and called on members of the UN General Assembly to draft an agreement to sanction Russia and hand over the agents who planned the attack.

Because there were too many abstaining countries and a lot of negative votes, there was no absolute advantage in favoring the votes. The sanctions agreement was not passed, but the United States also publicly announced that it would impose sanctions on Russia and at the same time require all European allies to impose sanctions on Russia.

The atmosphere in Northeast Asia has become more and more tense than ever, as if the gunpowder barrels are exploding at any time.

Almost everyone feels that the atmosphere is not right.

The reaction of the island nation was too fierce, as if this incident touched their roots, and there was some hysteria. However, apart from insiders, the outside world did not know how much the island country lost in the attack.

But things are just beginning. The United States on the other side of the ocean is determined to have artificial intelligence, and another storm is brewing.

chapters.title: Chapter 632: : Artificial Intelligence: Ekaterina
chapters.body:
Chapter 632: : Artificial Intelligence: Ekaterina

In Russia, a top-notch underground experimental base, more than a dozen people are in the supercomputer center.

Including the Russian president, the Secretary of Defense, the Director of the Security Bureau, and more than a dozen core leaders of artificial intelligence research.

In front of them, it is a stand-alone server, connected to it, it is the hard disk and u disk key obtained from the island country.

For these two things, they paid a lot of money, but fortunately they succeeded.

The island nation is now breaking off with them.

It doesn't matter to them.

Anyway, the two countries, because of the four islands and the United States, have never been normal. The island people simply don't dare to fight. If they dare to deal with them, they don't mind letting the islanders know why the flowers are so red.

As for the sanctions imposed by Americans, they are even less afraid.

Every time they are sanctioned, although they are hurting, but they can't hurt the roots. They are already in a state of high-pressure sanctions. Now they are coming, and they are not afraid of it.

Some losses, in exchange for an artificial intelligence technology, is very cost-effective, so they choose to take risks.

"Copying is successful."

The screen prompts to make the people present there shocked.

The headed Lochsky immediately opened the copy of the successful files, one by one folder, and a piece of artificial intelligence code.

The combination of Chinese character programming language and multi-language, the person who does not understand, is simply a face-to-face. But for a few people in Lodsky, the code of millions of lines is the most beautiful art.

After the Chinese character programming language came out, they all learned this language. Unexpectedly, the island people have learned to integrate the Chinese programming language with the traditional computer language to form the current program.

Loksky had to admire.

"Try to run it."

After removing the hard drive, the AI team began trying to run inside the computer.

The copied computers are independent and are not worried that these programs are viruses and will invade their computers.

“Artificial Smart Skylight, I am very happy to serve you.”

In the Japanese language of the computer, several people on the field smiled and immediately modified into Russian and run again.

"This is real."

More than a dozen AI members have a pleasant smile. The Russian President, the Minister of Defence, and the Director of the Security Bureau, Leof, saw a glimmer of hope.

It’s so big, it’s not in vain.

“What do you need to do next?” asked Leof of the Security Bureau.

"We need to make some necessary program modifications to this artificial intelligence, such as the name, default language and control key, turn it into our artificial intelligence, and then test its intelligence and security. Experiment, and then research and perfect it according to the progress of our artificial intelligence research," said Lochsky.

After all, it is the thing of the island nation. They have not dared to use it even if they have already fallen into their hands before they have confirmed success.

However, the intuition tells them that the intelligence of this ‘Azure’ is definitely not low, otherwise the islanders will not hysterically and tear their faces.

"The hard disk and the secret key must be kept in the lab for a period of time. Only the key can copy the program. We need to use it to modify the program, and the key program needs to be reprogrammed."

"Good." Leo nodded.

They are not as stupid as the island country, and let the artificial intelligence program leave the base.

The security forces here will definitely be upgraded again. It is a high-tech secret research and development base. Without the authorization of the president and the defense minister, no one can take anything from here.

“Does the president need to give the artificial intelligence a name?” Lodsky looked at the Russian president around him, and the others on the field also looked at him and waited for him to speak.

"Ekaterina."

The Russian president, who has been quiet forever, has finally opened his mouth, and the voice is surrounded by majesty from the inside out, no doubt.

......

"What is the attitude of the president now?"

Tom looked at Nick in the video and looked a little serious.

He knows that because of their failure to act and their identity, the president is still furious. Although the island countries have not announced their existence, they can also deny it, but both sides are well aware.

And they were overcast this time, or they are dead to Russia.

For them, this is a very shameful thing.

"The president is still very angry now, or the same request, get the artificial intelligence program, and now you can use any means," Nick said.

They are very urgent about advanced artificial intelligence technology. Now the artificial intelligence of the island country is likely to be obtained by Russia. They must also get it, otherwise they will be led by Russia. Then how do they become the world leader?

“Any means?” Tom blinked: “Including pressure on the bright side?”

"Yes, but it's best to have enough reasons." Nick said: "Do you have a plan?"

"It's better for us to self-direct a network virus crisis, and then it is said that the island countries have put pressure on them to surrender the village's water stop team. Because of the last virus crisis, Murakami water stop theory should be imprisoned, prohibiting research Artificial intelligence, and we have evidence that they are free to participate in research, we have enough reasons to find trouble," Tom said.

Originally, this plan was within the scope of their planning, but it was necessary to use the power of the state. At the beginning, it was said that it did not want to be too big, try to keep a low profile and act in a hidden way, so this plan became an alternative.

Now that the previous plan failed, artificial intelligence was taken away by Russian agents. The protection of artificial intelligence by the island nation will definitely reach an unprecedented high level. It is impossible to obtain it through special means.

Only use conspiracy now.

"This is the easiest way to get artificial intelligence, but in this case, we may have to tear the face with the island nation." Tom reminded.

"Tear your face?"

Nick thought about it.

He is the president's chief think tank, and his opinions are very important. As long as he suggests, the possibility of the president's adoption is more than 70%.

He is now considering the price of Tom's plan.

The first plan failed, and the island countries have already discovered their actions, but they have no choice but to announce them.

Both sides have always had their own minds.

In these years, they controlled the economy and politics of the island countries. The island countries were very uncomfortable with their control in private. They wanted to get rid of the control. The two sides were at most because of some interest cooperation, and they always looked like God.

This incident has already allowed the two sides to have a complete gap. It is only superficially maintained that the two sides are not broken and have maintained a tacit understanding.

"I will discuss it with the president."

After careful consideration, Nick hangs up the video call.

Tom sat in the office and began to wait quietly. After the last planned exposure, the two sides have already smashed their faces. He knows that this plan, the president will agree with a high probability.

Because the news of the next election has been confirmed, the president's daughter is one of the most popular candidates, and the prestige and popularity are sufficient, and the experience is sufficient. The survey shows that the possibility of successful election is very high, probably the first female president of their country.

This is the best opportunity for the president to pave the way for their strength and to pave the way for his daughter's election.

Now China is leading, and the world technology is changing. This is a crucial moment, and the most important artificial intelligence technology must be mastered at an early date.

really.

Half an hour later, Nick called again.

"The president agrees with your plan. Washington will cooperate with you, but you have to send a detailed plan one week before the start."

"Okay." Tom immediately agreed.

The people of the island did not know that when they were in a hysterical battle with Russia, a pressure on them was already put on the plan.

chapters.title: Chapter 633: : It Is Like A Mentally Handicapped
chapters.body:
Chapter 633: : It Is Like A Mentally Handicapped

Island State, Institute of Strategic Technology.

The Strategic Research Institute is the most advanced technology research and development base in the island country. Nuclear fission and other nuclear physics applications are responsible for research here.

Since the Second World War, island countries have not been allowed to use nuclear weapons, but their nuclear physics is still at the forefront of the world, and they can develop atomic bombs whenever they wish.

However, this research base is not limited to nuclear physics applications, and other strategic technical teams have also entered here, almost the island's '51 district', which is the island's largest research base.

Yamamoto is one of the leaders of the new technical team joining the base.

Officials demanded that humans only need ‘azooming’ to assist in the research of controlled nuclear fusion, so they were separated from the original artificial intelligence team.

One of the reasons for assisting in the study of controlled nuclear fusion technology is that there is an official need for Yamamoto to study the technology of artificial intelligence to control the Internet.

After the accident at the base, two people were investigated and contacted with foreign intelligence personnel. The original artificial intelligence team had been disbanded. Now the official dispatched network attack and defense units joined the team of Yamamoto to help them study.

Their only purpose is to create a strategic level of cyberattack weapons that are convenient for them to control the enemy's network in the first place.

"Now, I'm going to do a networking test." Yamamoto is licking his lips and is a little excited.

In the original base, ‘Tianzhao’ was controlled by the village’s water stop. The study was too cautious and did not dare to network. I was afraid that the last accident would occur again, which led to a slower progress in machine learning.

However, in his opinion, it is a worry.

That kind of problem only arises when you are not familiar with newly developed artificial intelligence programs.

After years of continuous development and improvement, today's 'Tianzhao' has long since reborn, and they have 100% control over artificial intelligence.

It is precisely because of his disagreement with Murakami’s research philosophy that he will choose to report that function, in exchange for taking the lead in developing the right to 'Tianzhao'. Once 'Tianzhao' has the ability to invade the Internet at will, they will Since then, he has dominated the world.

Other personnel are ready to prepare for power outages and network cables at any time, and researchers are constantly monitoring the data transmission changes of computers and artificial intelligence.

Although the control of artificial intelligence is very high, they are still careful.

"The network connection was successful."

"Start the sun."

......

The artificial intelligence network of the island country was launched!

At the space training base, the ink girl told him the news and immediately put down training and rushed back to the institute.

Entering the laboratory, on the screen in front of Chen Mo, various line programs are flying at a rapid speed. Those are the code of the island's artificial intelligence ‘Azure’.

Chen Mo gave the ink girl instructions, and once they found their artificial intelligence network, they immediately copied its program code. These codes are copied from the other party's host through data masquerading.

"The people of this archipelago are really smart."

Chen Mo looked at the flow of the program, and some lamented. Using a combination of traditional computer language and Chinese programming language, a new artificial intelligence algorithm is created to complete this artificial intelligence.

There is no reason why island nations can develop into a world-class technologically advanced country with a resource-poor island nation.

"The copy is complete."

The program on the screen stops and becomes a folder on the desktop of the computer.

“What special place does it have?” Chen Mo asked.

"It's like a mentally handicapped."

"..." Hearing the answer from the ink girl, the mouth twitched.

How to listen like it is horrible.

But he does not think that the ink girl is awkward. The mental retardation that the ink woman said is artificial intelligence. It is considered artificial intelligence in the true sense, but the level of the intelligent algorithm is not high. Compared with the intelligence of the ink girl, the other party is mentally retarded.

“Island people are using it to test the function of invading computers,” said the ink girl.

"They really found this feature."

Chen Mo began to think about what to do. Control now, if one day, the other party uses the artificial intelligence to chaos, it is a little troublesome.

"How is the test result?"

"It is a mentally retarded, it can invade a computer without a smart firewall. But a computer with a smart firewall and smart anti-virus software can discover its intrusion. It can only rely on the powerful computing power of the host to violently attack, destroy the intelligent firewall, and achieve the intrusion. The purpose of the game is easy to find." said the ink girl.

"That's okay, the threat is not big."

Chen Mo thought a little and only spoke again.

"Destroy the program they are testing."

Although the threat is not big, but also try to delay the other side's research in this area.

......

"The result is still the same."

In the island country, within the research base, Yamamoto and a group of researchers looked at the test results, not very satisfied.

They invaded through remote networks, letting Tianzhao attack the computer with the specified iP address they prepared, but the result was the same as the LAN test.

The termite system is still incapable of intrusion cracking. This time, another discovery found that the computer with the anti-virus software of the marching ant group installed can detect the intrusion of the sky whether or not the termite system is installed.

Intrusion control can be discovered, which means little value.

However, it is still possible to destroy the other's protection system through violent attacks. This can cause certain damage, but it cannot achieve their purpose of obtaining information.

“The monitoring of the sky-light data is abnormal.”

When tidying up the results, the researchers who monitor the data of the astronomical program open their mouths, causing the face of the lab to change slightly.

The next moment, Yamamoto did not hesitate to order the unplugged network cable, but it was still a slow step. The program of Azure has been suspended, and when it is opened, the program prompts damage.

“Why is the data suddenly abnormal?” Yamamoto looked at the technicians responsible for data monitoring, and raised a heart for fear of problems.

"I don't know."

"It is not excluded that an error occurred during the running of the program, causing the program to 'suicide'."

Everyone is confused.

The program code of Azure is too large, and it is artificial intelligence. No one can guarantee that there is a mistake in the middle of a program fragment that they do not understand.

"Is there any abnormal data output?"

“No.” The data monitor did not hesitate to shake his head.

Yamamoto Saki can't figure it out. In the end, he can only re-copy a ‘Tianzhao’ program from the database and re-examine it. This time, before he can figure out the cause of the program damage, he dare not connect easily.

......

The plan is ready.

Tom is in the computer network center at Langley's headquarters.

In front of him, sitting on top of ten computer technicians, this is their CIA hacker, who controls the cyber weapons they developed, and if necessary, can serve as a national network force to attack the opponent's national network.

Their plan has been handed in, and the White House allowed them to execute the plan.

Now is the time to start the plan.

In order to achieve the goal, let outsiders believe that there are enough reasons to put pressure on the island countries, they are prepared to do a fake play.

The plan chose several cities with less developed economies to attack the cities with the least damage after being attacked by the network.

A little bit of loss, so that they can get domestic support, justified to put pressure on the island, get the artificial intelligence you want, everything is worth it.

As for the tearing of the face with the island country?

This is not within Tom's consideration. Anyway, the White House has allowed it, and it will handle these things.

"let's start."

Tom looked at the time and issued an attack command.

chapters.title: Chapter 634: : This Is A Fall
chapters.body:
Chapter 634: : This Is A Fall

Unexplained computer viruses spread in 13 cities in four US states, resulting in massive power outages. Many companies, schools, and supermarkets were attacked by viruses and suffered heavy losses.

Within a day, many cities in the United States suffered successive virus attacks.

News about the spread of computer intelligence viruses, broadcast from US radio and television stations, spread into global news.

Another incident of computer viruses.

This is not the first time.

At this point in time, the climax of the air defense war between the island countries and Russia has just passed. The United States agrees with the island’s proposal to declare sanctions against Russia and has already taken action.

The smart virus suddenly broke out in many cities in the United States, leaving the global atmosphere inexplicably tense.

At this point in time, the US urban network was attacked by an unknown virus. The only thought of the outside attack was that the virus attack may be Russian retaliation.

"It’s absolutely Russians. They even intervene in the election. It’s not unusual.”

"The whole world should sanction that hateful country."

"I don't know how to live and die. They think that we are as bullying as the cowards of the island countries, killing them, increasing the sanctions and letting their economy collapse completely."

"That is a terrorist country and we must sanction them."

"..."

On the first day of the news exposure, various media speculations appeared, which attracted the indignation of the American people. Numerous shackles against Russia were filled with the Internet.

At this special point in time, Russia was pushed to the cusp of public opinion.

Subsequently, the US White House spokesperson said at the press conference that if the murderer of the virus attack is found, he must pay the price. The official voice just fell, the CIA announced the investigation of the incident.

A large group of spectators began to take a pose of eating melons.

On the second day after the United States was exposed to a virus attack, Russian officials clarified at the press conference under the continuous fermentation of public opinion. The computer virus incident that broke out in the United States has nothing to do with them, and they are completely unaware of it.

It’s just a Russian explanation. It’s not too convincing. The preconceived notion makes too many people feel that it is definitely what Russia does.

The two sides have a different word, and the global atmosphere has become more subtle.

At Langley's headquarters, Tom was drinking coffee while browsing the latest news.

He has been paying attention to the news of intelligent viruses. He did not have the first time to clarify and announce the results of the investigation. The news is fermenting, and the bigger the trouble, the more attention he receives.

The greater the anger of the people, the less resistance they will have in their subsequent plans and arrangements.

Nowadays, the media has pushed the incident to the height of the dispute between Russia and the United States. It has attracted the attention of the world and has enough attention.

If you come to a big reversal, it will be very interesting.

"Is the reporter all here?" Tom looked up at the assistant around him.

"It’s all coming." The assistant nodded gently.

"Let's go." Tom took the coffee and took a sip, grabbed the ‘investigation’ file, and left the office with his assistant.

He couldn't help but smile when he thought that the islanders were more uncomfortable than swallowing Xiaoqiang.

The Island People’s Committee did not have a grievance and had nothing to do with him. His task was to get artificial intelligence technology. Because the technology for artificial intelligence in island countries has been determined, the high probability is advanced artificial intelligence.

At the press conference held by the CIA, journalists from all over the world were crowded and crowded.

This time, the CIA announced the results of the investigation of the virus incident. This result may be directly related to the direction of global politics. It has been paid attention to by the whole world. Many equipments on the field are broadcast live.

Villisova was sitting in the front row and looked nervous.

She is a Russian journalist in the United States. She is very angry about the remarks that Russia is the culprit of the attack. However, their country's public opinion is limited, and it is impossible to influence the direction of global public opinion before it comes out.

Too many preconceived speculations and hateful thoughts about Russia have made the public think that the media has no basis for guessing.

If this press conference, the CIA announces the results of the investigation, it will be the target of them, and the confrontation between the two sides will definitely escalate. The already tense relationship between the two sides is definitely worse.

Suddenly I saw Tom coming out of the background, and Villisava’s spirit was shocked and her body leaned forward slightly.

This is the first time that Tom has appeared in front of the media since the loss of the former director Linna’s plane. It is still about the investigation of the virus incident.

Tom's face looked a little gloomy, and his mood was not good.

His appearance, let some live reporters on the field deliberately added a few close-ups, the atmosphere was quiet, some subtle.

"The results of the investigation into the intelligent virus attack in the four states of our country have come out. This result makes us very sorry and angry." Tom calmed his face and grabbed the documents in his hand and shook it.

A group of reporters below held their breath, especially Villisova, and stared at Tom.

"According to our survey results, 13 cities were attacked by intelligent virus attacks, which was done by island people."

what?

Hey!

When Tom said the last few words, the scene was like a brain-destroyed fan who saw an idol and was completely out of control. The reporters in the front row all stood up, and the camera lens shot crazy against Tom.

The gap in the event reversal is too big for everyone to smash.

Unbelievable results.

The outside world has been rumored that the Russians retaliated against them, but they did not expect that they were helping the 'allies'.

"impossible."

The reporter from the island nation almost shouted and stared at Tom.

Unlike him, the front row of Villiswa almost excited to jump up, the CIA said that they are not them, then it has nothing to do with them.

"Mr. Tom, what evidence does it prove that the island country did?" The island journalist refused to raise his hand and immediately asked questions, and he looked very angry.

I was prepared to attack a lot of Russian attacks. Now I can't use one, and I still hear this incredible news.

"We tracked down hackers attacking 13 cities, iP is an island country, and computer viruses spreading in 13 cities are ‘Satan’ virus variants that have led to the global smart virus crisis.

The last time the island country 'Satan' virus spread, causing huge global losses, the island country's research and development team of 'Satan' virus, according to regulations, should now be in prison. However, our investigation found that the team's R&D staff was not imprisoned and still led the development of intelligent viruses. ”

Tom let people release the information they have investigated.

It is the researcher of the Murakami Water Stop Team.

The last time the 'Satan' virus spread, causing global economic losses is immeasurable.

Now, the team members who develop the Satan virus are still at large, helping the island countries to develop smart viruses.

"According to the address we tracked, the virus attack came from the base where they were. We have enough reason and evidence to prove that this team did. We asked the island official to hand over the 'Satan' R&D team. Go back to our country for investigation and trial."

call! !

The scene of the press conference has been broadcasted worldwide through live footage.

They guessed the beginning, but the result was such a big reversal.

The shadow of the last Satanic virus was vividly witnessed, the global network almost fell, and the island people were still framed by the marching ant group, and finally they were discovered.

Now Tom says that the ‘Satan’ virus team is attacking them, and most people choose to believe.

Only the terrible intelligent virus research and development team can cause such damage. When the "Satan" virus spread, it was a huge loss in the country.

Crazy and even attacking yourself, what else can you do?

"Impossible, absolutely impossible, this is a fall."

At the reception, the reporters of the island country could not believe this, and finally left the reception scene.

chapters.title: Chapter 635: : Pretty Unreasonable Means
chapters.body:
Chapter 635: : Pretty Unreasonable Means

"Damn barbarian."

"robber."

"idiot!!"

"Can you be shameless?"

“Can you be shameless?”

At the entrance of the island’s prime minister’s office, at the entrance of the office, Sato Ryuichi and Kishida Hiroshi stood up, and could clearly hear the sounds of various buzzing and smashing things in the office where the door was locked.

The Prime Minister is angry and they are no exception.

The impact of the CIA’s press conference was terrible, only they knew it.

Originally, ‘Tianzhao’ was taken away. They were already very annoyed. The CIA also participated. They did not announce it, but chose to swallow.

Because of that incident, they formed a confrontation with Russia. The two sides were in the same situation. Unexpectedly, at the crucial moment, the Americans personally came up and smashed their deadly knife from behind.

They are also required to hand over the ‘Azure’ team and the program code.

The American Sima Zhao’s heart is already very obvious. The last time he snatched the defeat, he was overthrown by the Russians, and he did not get the artificial intelligence procedure. This time he chose this shameless means to put pressure on them.

Smart viruses are not distributed by them, who spread them?

It is not important.

It may be spread by the Russians. Americans use this opportunity to put pressure on them, take the opportunity to get artificial intelligence procedures and the ‘Azure’ team, and maybe even just a play by Americans.

But they can't refute that the Murakami water stop team is indeed studying, and the Americans have taken control of the relevant evidence and cannot explain it at all.

Not long after, the roar and crash in the office disappeared and the surroundings were quiet.

"Come in."

A low, **** voice came out of the office, and the spirits of Sato Ryuichi and Kishida Hiroshi at the door were shocked and carefully opened.

When I opened the door, I saw the mess of the house, the messy books, the torn paper, the broken tea set, the decorations, and the North of the chair, black and scary.

"What do Americans say?" Anbei said, his voice was cold, and he could choose someone at any time.

"The ambassador said that the White House wants us to hand over the ‘virus program’ and the virus's R&D team. Otherwise, it will sanction us.” Sato Ryu whispered openly, fearing a louder sound, and smashing the bomb in front of him.

They all understand that the so-called virus program of the Americans is the program code of ‘Azure’, and the virus research and development team is the R&D team of artificial intelligence.

"Sanctions?"

Hearing the sanctions, Anbei’s face turned from black to red and angered.

Their economic lifeline is in the hands of the Americans. After Tom exposed the news, their domestic economic market has begun to fluctuate, the yen has a sharp depreciation trend, and their national financial team is striving to maintain stability.

If they are not handled well and sanctioned by the Americans, they will experience multiple disasters. The economic market, which has just begun to pick up, will completely collapse and fall back for 30 years.

By then, their only global status will be greatly regressed and become a third-rate or even a fourth-rate.

For those who are proud, that is unacceptable.

If artificial intelligence is not robbed, they use artificial intelligence to develop technology. After a few years or ten years, after China becomes the world leader, the influence of the United States declines, and they do not need to be jealous of Americans.

But now that Americans seize their lives, they are sure to take them.

"Do they not promise us compensation?"

"Don't agree, they must develop a virus team and a 'virus program.'" Sato's look is not very good.

Not what they did, they promised compensation, they were already whispering. As a result, the other party must have artificial intelligence to recognize death. From the beginning, the other party came to artificial intelligence.

"A group of shameless robbers."

Anbei’s face turned from red to black again.

"Tell them, we can never hand over the team, we can promise to pay them compensation."

After seeing the functions of some artificial intelligence, they now firmly believe that artificial intelligence is the key to future development. The artificial intelligence talents that stop the water in the village are fundamental.

With those talents, artificial intelligence technology can advance rapidly and perfect. If they are handed over, their losses are definitely not as simple as some money compensation.

The CIA announced the results of the investigation.

The reversal of things is too fast and too fast, and it has received much attention at this critical moment. In the early stage, it was the trend of confrontation between the United States and Russia.

It is now said that the island nation is the chief culprit in attacking the US network.

Everything is a little off guard.

At the beginning, some people believed that there was a conspiracy in it, but the research team involved in the ‘Satan’ virus was among them. Many people who had encountered the Satan virus incident chose to believe the CIA’s findings.

Only the experience only knows how much the loss caused by the Satan virus, which almost shakes the foundation of the Internet, and the memory is still very new.

"Is the island people wanting to use those people to continue to develop smart viruses and attack the whole world? To support the Americans' decision, the people of this team must not let go, ask them to hand in immediately, and permanently prohibit them from accessing the computer."

"The terrible team, the last time almost shaken the foundation of network security, but fortunately, the termite system as the last line of defense, and then let them crack the line of defense of the termite system, I am afraid they want to use computer intelligence virus to control the global Internet."

“Put pressure on the islands and sanction them if they don’t hand over the ‘Satan’ team.”

On the international network, there are many people who agree with Americans’ sanctions against island nations.

The report of the damage caused by the Satan virus has also been re-opened. No one can figure out the direct losses and indirect losses caused by the smart crisis.

Soon after the island country just experienced a ‘terrorism. The attack.’ Many people outside are still sympathizing with them. Now the R&D team of the ‘Satan’ virus continues to develop smart virus weapons, so that the sympathy of the outside world disappears completely.

Many of the victims who had been in the 'Satan' smart virus crisis turned their sympathy into anger and began to attack the island official on the Internet.

Enthusiastic discussion and condemnation spread on the web.

The island nation that was already fighting against Russia’s airspace has no hesitation.

Things continue to ferment.

After receiving the news that the island country refused to hand over 'Satan', the White House officially announced that it would require the island country to hand over the 'Satan' team and the 'virus program' within one week, otherwise it would launch a sanctions plan against the island nation on the grounds of threat to US security. .

The plan will require countries around the world that are supplying oil and other mineral resources to island countries to interrupt the export of resources to island countries.

Once the news of the sanctions came out, the world was once again shocked.

The Americans came to the truth, this time the sanctions plan was almost a punch on the doorstep of the island nation.

As an island country with scarce resources, there is no controlled nuclear fusion power generation. New energy is not completely popularized. Oil has not been officially eliminated. Other resources are scarce. It also offends the bear in the north and has hatred with neighboring countries. It is almost in all directions. situation.

For the United States, which currently controls the lifeblood of the world's oil, it is not too difficult to sanction the island country.

Sure enough, the White House sanctions came out directly, causing panic in the island market.

The next day, the island stock market crashed directly, and the yen depreciated to the maximum extent since the burst of the economic bubble in the late 1980s.

The island economy, almost one day, fell to the brink of collapse, has not completely collapsed, is the plan has not officially launched, it is not clear whether the island official will promise to pay, in exchange for the US cancellation plan.

Once there is uncontrollable inflation in the island country and the currency depreciates sharply, the country has spent more than half of it.

The world was scared by the madness of the president of the United States. In order to lose a network invasion, it used the greatest influence and prepared to block a country.

Among the many countries, the easiest to be blocked is the island nation, which is also the country that has been controlled by the United States for economics and politics.

Because of this blockade, the people of the island nation are angry and fearful, angering the innocent sanctions of the United States and fearing the economics of the countries they may collapse.

Except for the demonstrations, they can't do anything.

The outside world also felt a bit wrong with this sanctions. The US response was a bit too radical, blocking a country for a virus-proliferation incident that was not thoroughly identified.

It’s just that in addition to the insider, there is no evidence that the Americans are playing other ideas.

Soon, the island official announced the news urgently. Prime Minister Anbei will bring the delegation to Washington to go to Washington to discuss the incident.

After the news was released, the collapse situation was alleviated, and the island’s economic market panic slowed down, but many people were still worried.

In the afternoon of the next day, Anbei took a think tank and important figures and took a special plane to negotiate in Washington.

The negotiations lasted for five days, and it was only on the morning of the sixth day that the ‘consensus’ was reached.

The island nation is willing to surrender the 'virus program' and promises to permanently monitor the 'Satan' team members, not to study the 'smart virus', and finally compensate the 13 cities for losses of nearly $5 billion due to virus attacks.

The White House also promised not to extradite the members of the ‘Satan virus’ team. The members of the ‘Satan’ team continued to be monitored by the island nation and were not allowed to develop intelligent viruses. The previous sanctions were all revoked.

The news came out and the storm eased.

Only a few countries that knew it knew that the artificial intelligence successfully developed by the island nation was officially captured by the United States with unreasonable means.

A crazy and sensational game came to an end and ended in victory in the United States.

chapters.title: Chapter 636: : Fermi Paradox And Deep Sea Bacteria Theory
chapters.body:
Chapter 636: : Fermi Paradox And Deep Sea Bacteria Theory

The United States got the artificial intelligence it wanted, and the dispute with the island nation has subsided and returned to normal.

The storm in the world is fading.

The island nation still fights against Russia in the air, but it has not been as intense as it started. The United States has a lot of action and seems to be fully prepared for the next election.

All three countries have artificial intelligence, and they all feel the terrible nature of artificial intelligence. They have no publicity and want to keep a low profile.

The island country and the United States still maintain their original relationship. In order to fight against Russia, a military exercise was also held. It seems that the contradiction of the previous period has never happened.

Only the parties knew that the two sides had already met each other and had no peace of mind.

Now the incident has slowly subsided and the world has returned to calm again.

Flying Ant Center.

The goddess is ready.

In the past two months of training, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min’s aerospace training has been completed and suffered a lot.

Today is the day of space travel.

At this time, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min were already wearing space suits. Both of them were covered and only one head was exposed.

"Drink this up."

Chen Mo took two test tubes of blue liquid from the ink girl and handed it to Zhao Min and Xiao Yu.

"what is this?"

The two looked strangely at the liquid in the hands of Chen Mo, like some kind of oral liquid, and there was nothing special about it.

"A radiation-preventing agent that prevents genetic mutations in the body that may arise from space radiation," Chen said.

After all, there is radiation in space. If you are active in space for a long time, there will be genetic mutations that are not good for the human body. In order to reduce this problem, Chen Mo looked for this radiation-preventing agent from the Science and Technology Library.

The efficacy of the pharmacy is one week and will be handed over to Starfish for later use by astronauts and staff in high-radiation positions.

Zhao Min and Xiao Yu did not think much, took the medicine and drank it.

This is the first time that Xiao Yu and Zhao Min went into space. They were somewhat nervous. Fortunately, Chen Mo was around, and he had some sense of security.

"Go."

Chen Mo took two people and went to the goddess. Under the attention of the ground personnel, the wind was blowing up at the airport, and the goddess slowly floated and disappeared into the distant sky.

Deep in the unknown universe, a bright spot is far and near, shuttles and flies quickly.

The spacecraft slowly approached, revealing its original appearance.

A mountainous spaceship with angular edges and various weapons.

In the cabin of the spaceship, sleeping on a pink creature, about three meters high, like a lizard-like head, eyes closed, synthetic fingers long slits, protruding bulging, no ears, long fingertips on the top of the head .

In the transparent dorm room, you can see the body of the unknown creature pink, the skin is soft like an octopus, covered with strange lines, the legs are squat scales, and behind it is a blood-red tail, about two meters long. It is full of various spikes.

Inside the cabin, a strange and sharp sound suddenly sounded, and it was translated.

"Red-tailed ephemeris, 42:42:89 on November 74, 204,756, the fugitive 20981 spacecraft has entered the galaxy range, the 5142th destination, the Milky Way Orion, is expected to arrive 5 years later, no suitable living star is found... ”

Just after the report was completed, the sharp and harsh alarm sounded. For a moment, the dormant warehouse of the spacecraft control room was all open, and the pink creature suddenly opened his eyes during sleep, and the red scorpion appeared panic.

"The most advanced alarm, the highest level alarm, coordinates A5247, S1547, X24567 appear meteorite flow, impact after 5 seconds, the weapon system starts."

"Hey..."

The tentacles on the head of the red tail are shaking, and the mouth emits weird sound waves.

The entire control room was flustered.

The spacecraft weapon system has been turned on, all in the direction of the meteorite.

boom! ! !

A stream of particles flew over the meteorites, and the meteorite that was hit, instantly exploded, turned into smaller fragments and flew into the square.

"Alarms, alarms, damage to the hull."

"Alarm, the hull is damaged, please leave the spacecraft immediately, please leave the spacecraft immediately."

The red-tailed creature heard the alarm and looked desperate in his eyes.

boom!

The impact of the big meteorite allowed the spacecraft that did not know how to wander for many years in the universe to explode in an instant. Numerous fragments and wreckage of the spacecraft lasing in all directions.

The largest piece, along with the slate, is heading towards the lasing of Orion.

On the Orion's spiral arm in the direction of the debris, the sun still radiates the unchanging light, and the azure earth is still moving forward.

"it's beautiful."

On the goddess, Xiao Yufu was at the window, looking at the blue planet outside the window, his face was excited. Beside her, it is Zhao Min, and her look is a bit complicated.

The two, like two children who have never seen the world, are intent on the earth.

The blue glowing planet is the planet they live in. I can't see any creatures, and their huge corporate headquarters is so small that they can't be seen at all.

How big is the vision and how broad the mind is.

At this moment, they really felt that human beings are still smaller than the dust in the universe. For the unchanging universe, they are just fleeting passengers.

People with unstable minds will personally experience this feeling of insignificance, and I am afraid that they will lose their fighting spirit directly.

Seeing only the excited little fisherman, Zhao Min is somewhat envious. There are people who care, don't think too much, sometimes it's still good.

Next to Chen Mo, a calm face.

She now understands that Chen Mo faces the fighting spirit of the universe.

I am afraid this man will not be willing to disappear into the long river of the universe as a bacteria.

Chen Mo seems to see Zhao Min's mind, smiled and reached out and patted her back, and touched Xiao Yu's head: "Good-looking? Is the Galaxy over there good-looking, or is the earth beautiful?"

"Then you think that the ink girl looks good, or is Zhao Min sister good-looking?" asked Xiao Yu.

When I heard this question, Zhao Min almost smiled and this question was really interesting.

"Well, each has its own merits, it looks good." Chen Mogan said with a smile.

"You said, in this universe, there are really other creatures, alien civilizations." After Xiaoyu returned to God, some feelings looked at the earth outside the window.

"Let the big scientists answer you."

Both Zhao Min and Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo and waited for his answer.

"This problem is similar to that of deep-sea bacteria. The bacteria that live in the pits deep in the trench ask if there are other bacteria outside." Chen Mo said with emotion: "There must be, but they are confined to the deep sea."

"But is there a Fermi paradox? Suppose there are aliens, millions of years before our development, the universe travel must have found us. But we did not find aliens, and did not find aliens really cut. There is no evidence that there is no alien."

"Oh, even these theories are known." Chen Mo laughed.

"I just heard about it," said Xiao Yu.

"This paradox is a blasphemy. In fact, Liu Cixin's "Three-body" uses the law of dark forests to make a possible explanation for Fermi's paradox. The general idea is that alien civilizations deliberately hide themselves from others. Alien civilization found that it would avoid recruiting more advanced civilizations.

But it is only a possibility that not all civilizations will hide from each other, and humans will launch Traveler No. 1.

There are many other possibilities that can explain Fermi's paradox.

Like the deep-sea bacteria I just said, Fermi's paradox is equivalent to deep-sea bacteria, is there any other creature outside? If so, why haven't they found them yet? Or they are found evidence of our existence.

They didn't find us, didn't we exist?

In fact, there is a problem in finding a time span. Millions of years, very long for humans, very short for the universe.

Millions of years ago, at that time we were just a pool of liquid. Suppose the bacteria on the sea floor can only live for two days. How long does it take for generations to wait until the day we are discovered?

Maybe after a few decades, a deep-sea science exploration, humans will find the deep-sea colony, and then after a few decades, find another second colony, the third colony? The time to find those colonies was early and late.

The same problem applies to us. Suppose we are a colony in the deep sea of the universe. The journey of exploration by aliens is not the turn to discover us? After all, space travel is much more dangerous than deep sea exploration and much wider than the sea.

Of course, you can also assume that the creatures of the universe appear at the same time. We are the fastest generation of civilization. After millions of years, our universe explores other civilizations. No matter what the results, scientific inference, extraterrestrial life exists. .

But in the universe, how likely are we to be the first generation of cosmic civilization? This probability is equivalent to all the creatures on Earth thinking they are the first generation of civilization. Probability exists, but this probability is estimated to be lower than the probability of a penguin game. ”

After hearing the last sentence, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min couldn't help but laugh.

"I think it should be a little bigger than the probability of a penguin game draw." Zhao Min smiled.

"It's so complicated, but fortunately I am stupid, don't think so much." Xiaoyu said.

She generally understands the meaning of Chen Mo's explanation. As for the thoughts, it is not within her consideration.

"You are not afraid that one day aliens will find us as a 'colony'. Just like humans catching specimens, do you want to study them as specimens?" Zhao Min asked.

"Then I have to be determined to be the super bacteria that will kill them."

"If it is discovered by aliens, will it not be directly extinct like the three-body description?" Xiaoyu curiously asked.

“Maybe, but it may or may not, the same level of civilization, or the level of civilization of the two species, may apply to the rules of the Dark Forest. For example, in the era of great navigation, American Indians were slaughtered and killed.

But at the same level of civilization, or a civilization similar to our level, the probability that the universe explores us is too small, and the time span and distance span are too long. Civilizations of the same rank as ours, unless we find habitats like the three bodies, it is impossible to extrugate us.

Civilizations far above our level of civilization have discovered us, such as going to African expedition research, discovering a new nest of ants in the rain forest, will we burn the nests in a fire? Obviously not. Grab a few to study or study.

If our human intelligence and civilization evolve to the extent that they do not reach their level and do not threaten their interests, and our living environment is of no value to them, the Dark Forest Law may fail. If we have an interest in them, then you can refer to the zoo's small animals. ”

Chen Mo looked at the depths of the universe and said quietly.

Weak meat and strong food, no matter which kind of civilization, apply, that is the essence of the universe,

chapters.title: Chapter 637: : Space Center Expansion Completed
chapters.body:
Chapter 637: : Space Center Expansion Completed

Endless scenery is at the peak.

This is the real feeling of Xiao Yu and Zhao Min at this time.

Looking at the earth from a space perspective, everything is so small, fascinating, looking deep into the vast Xinghe River, and feeling different from others.

And Chen Mo said some speculation about aliens, the two will not discuss this issue.

Asking aliens is just pure curiosity.

However, they do not know that in the near future, the Earth will truly observe the evidence of the existence of aliens.

"You two come from a 'space kiss' from 400 kilometers."

Zhao Min took the camera, and the magnetic shoes under his feet were fixed in the space capsule, and they looked at the two people in front of them.

Space tourism is purely for tourism and personal experience of space, so the tools that tourism should have, the goddess has it, it is essential to take pictures.

Upon hearing the request of Zhao Min's 'photographer', Xiao Yumei smashed into the first month and looked at Chen Mo.

"Come."

Chen Mo did not feel guilty. He hugged Xiao Yu and kissed him.

"The angle is just right, yes, that's how to keep the angle of floating. Perfect, the speed of 7.9 kilometers per second of space kiss. I feel that these photos I took can be won in the photo contest."

Zhao Min directed the two men, pressed the shutter of the camera, and did not forget to ridicule.

After the two released, the small fisherman powdered the head, feeling the silence of Chen Mo, very joyful, this is the most romantic thing she did after she married Chen Mo.

Although the process of going to space is a bit hard, now in space, the body is not very comfortable, but everything is worth it.

"Today gives you a small welfare." Xiao Yu smiled and looked at Chen Mo: "Ink girl, come over, let's take a photo with me."

"Oh." The ink girl did not hesitate and drifted over to the two.

After the shooting of the three people, Xiao Yu let the robot on the goddess take the camera, take four photos of the group, and then it is the turn of the Chen Mocheng professional photographer to give the three women a sister photo.

They are all happy, and Chen Mo is happy.

This is a space travel, mainly based on ease, not doing research experiments, just let Xiao Yu and Zhao Sen are affected by the magic of space.

After taking the photo, the two women went to the telescope to observe the starry sky in the depths of the universe and intuitively feel the mysterious charm in the depths of the universe.

The space trip is not monotonous. In addition to some star-watching equipment, there are also some small space experiments. The two women start to feel the magic of physical characteristics when losing weight.

The space journey lasted for three days, until the fourth day, the goddess slowly slowed down and returned to Earth.

One month, hurried past.

Phoenix Mountains.

Luo Nan looked at the huge hangar in front of him, and he was amazed.

This is the strength of the China Construction Third Bureau to move the whole group. It is assisted by the most advanced engineering technology of the marching ant group. It took more than four months to build a successful hangar.

This is the second hangar of the Flying Ant Space Center and the largest hangar in the world.

The hangar combines aircraft assembly and maintenance into one, with a length of 1257 meters, a width of 274 meters and a height of 45 meters. It creates many of the world's best, and steel consumption cannot be counted.

The hangar is a single-layer steel structure. The steel is made of special steel produced by the special steel formula provided by the marching ant group. After testing, the yield and strength of the steel is three times that of the existing special steel.
