The whole hangar is supported on 32 large load-bearing columns. All the load-bearing steel structures in the hangar are made of seamless welding technology. The welding joints reach 100%, so that the steel forms a whole, and the roof is slightly arched and can be curved. Withstands the weight of more than 2,800 tons of equipment.

When the Army Ant Group first called the design of the hangar to them, the designers and construction workers of the three bureaus in the middle of it were shocked by this bold design.

In order to study the design drawings and construction plans, they printed more than 4,000 design drawings.

I can't think of it completely. Which team in the world can design such a huge hangar structure, and the steel structure of each part, and even the details of the details that are not usually of interest, are detailed to two decimal places. Complete.

This is the most shocking project since they built many world-class projects. They also feel the horrific vision and strategic ambition of the marching ant group.

This hangar is definitely not an ordinary aircraft.

In addition, what shocked him even more was that the construction of the 30,000-mu base was completed on time in just four months.

When the Army Ant Group first gave them the design drawings of the base, it was required to be completed within four months, and the construction cost could be four times that of the normal construction. But when they saw the 40,000-mu base, and the huge complex buildings and the hangar, they all thought that the marching ant group was playing them.

Later, the marching ant group revised the construction plan so that they were only responsible for the construction of the building, and other facilities at the base were dispatched by a small number of engineers to assist them.

I thought it was a joke, but the robot drove the excavator and the bulldozer to refresh their three views. After a while, some completely intelligent automatic construction machinery was added to the construction, which doubled the construction speed.

24 hours of indefatigable intelligent machines, perfect construction plan, tacit robots like well-trained marching ants, clear division of labor, let the base construction speed, beyond all their cognition.

He still remembers that the colleagues in the three innings were ridiculing, and the marching ant group was more like a construction company than them.

For four months, the construction of such a complex space base was completed, and before that, it was impossible to think about it. This is the speed of the horrible marching ants.

A car came over and saw Chen Mo and the ink girl appearing from the car. Luo Nan’s spirit shocked and hurriedly greeted him.

"Mr. Chen, long-awaited name."

"Luo Gong, not so polite."

Chen Mo looked up at the hangar.

This hangar is designed by the ink girl. All the structures, including the specific data of the steel, are from the hands of the ink girl. Let the world's top designers team design this hangar, no one or two years, absolutely can not get a solution, and the ink girl only used less than 20 seconds.

"The project has passed the acceptance and is not responsible." Luo Nan said.

"Working hard." Chen Mo nodded.

In order to catch up with the work, the expansion of the 30,000-mu base, regardless of cost, has cost more than 12 billion yuan before and after, and the cost is far beyond the normal range.

But money is not important to Chen Mo, time is the most important.

Completed one year ahead of schedule, this year is more important to him than more than 10 billion.

"Go in."

Chen Momai stepped into the hangar.

The hangar now has only a few hoisting equipment that is fixed to the building itself, and there are no other equipment that looks very empty.

After glanced around, Chen Mo asked the Black Hawk to open his box.

Eight fist-sized drones flew up and the internal laser turned on and began to spin.

"let's start."

Chen Mo picked up the holographic notebook.

The drones are scattered, two left and two right, two up and down, two flying to the outside, the holographic space of the hangar, as the drone laser drawing slowly advances, the holographic notebook is quickly presented.

Less than ten minutes before and after, the entire hangar's spatial information, steel beam structure, and complete data model were collected.

"The equipment will be shipped, and now we are ready to make a spaceship." Chen Mo said.

This base is to create a larger spaceship expansion.

Here, it will be the watchtower that he looks at in the universe.

With Chen Mo's instructions, in the No. 1 hangar and the No. 1 building area of the marching ant headquarters, the spacecraft parts, spacecraft manufacturing equipment, and intelligent robots that have already been prepared have begun to gather in the No. 2 hangar.

chapters.title: Chapter 638: : The Moon Landing Plan Starts
chapters.body:
Chapter 638: : The Moon Landing Plan Starts

The equipment arrived, and under the arrangement of the ink girl, they began to enter the hangar in an orderly manner. Parts and components, in addition to being difficult to transport, the rest of the parts are produced at the base.

The largest aircraft casing, mainly manufactured with 3D printing technology, saves material and allows the body to be integrated.

The equipment of the No. 2 hangar was just installed, and there was good news from the No. 1 building of the headquarters.

The equipment needed to land on the moon is ready.

In front of Chen Mo is the equipment needed to land on the moon.

Including moon soil 3D printer, lunar excavator, lunar tunnel shield robot, handling robot, construction robot, intelligent transportation robot, ground drilling robot, geological exploration robot, data acquisition robot, lunar seismograph, lighting robot and small 氦-3 extraction robot.

Lunar 3D printer is manufactured by 3D printing technology. The function is to use moon soil to print the moon bricks needed for base construction. There are only two refrigerators, the machine is special, and it is made of heat-resistant and cold-resistant materials. The moon's moon bricks are then built by the construction robot.

The structure of the Moon Shield Robot is different from that of the Earth's tunnel shield machine. It has two drill bits, one round and one pointed, not large, only 1.5 meters in diameter, mainly to expand the tunnel, the machine legs are stretched out, can be 3.5 meters high, the drill bit can also move freely, enough to expand the tunnel.

The small 氦-3 extraction robot is the first machine to extract 氦-3. Now a large number of controlled nuclear fusion power stations are under construction. The fuel production is limited, and it is expensive and expensive. It is the best alternative fuel.

These machines have one thing in common, that is, they are resistant to heat and cold.

The equipment has been tested and can work normally between minus 180 degrees Celsius and 400 degrees Celsius.

The purpose of Chen Mo’s construction of the lunar base is to use the resources on the moon and to accumulate experience for space exploration. This step is successful and he is ready to explore other planets in the solar system.

All the robots add up, the number is quite large, and the space of the goddess is limited, so Chen Mo is going to send the goddess and the ant to transport the equipment and land the moon.

"Ink girl, contact Academician Zhang Jianfeng." Chen Mo said.

Now I am going to board the moon, and the lunar exploration team needs him to carry an ecological experiment cabin and two astronauts to land on the moon.

"Chen Chen, don't come innocent." Zhang Jianfeng appeared in the video, with a little expectation in his expression.

"Zhang Academician, I am going to land on the moon, I will inform you to prepare."

"Well, is the time fixed?" Zhang Jianfeng smiled.

I finally waited until this day.

He contacted Chen Mo some time ago, Chen Mo told him that after the space travel came back, he would prepare to go to the moon. He also heard that Chen Mo’s space tourism has been recuperating for a month, and now he is finally going to land on the moon.

"Is it OK, after ten days, is enough for you to prepare?"

"Enough is enough." Zhang Jianfeng nodded quickly.

Five days later, a transport plane landed at the Fei Ant Space Center, Zhang Jianfeng took the lead, and more than a dozen team members came down from the plane.

On the transport plane, the small ecological experiment cabins and astronauts' equipment that needed to land on the moon, under the command of the staff, began to be unloaded and transported into the research institute of the Space Center.

Seeing the appearance of the Fei Ant Space Center again, Zhang Jianfeng felt a little emotion.

Less than half a year later, the base has expanded by 30,000 mu. Now the scale of the flying ant space center has already surpassed the national space center, and the technology possessed is more advanced than them.

As a private company has reached this point, it is unprecedented.

"Academician Chen."

Zhang Jianfeng took the lead and made a greeting with Chen Mo and began to introduce the team members around him.

"These two are Yang Yunsheng and Cai Kang, who are the astronauts who landed on the moon."

"How are you."

Chen Mo and the two made a greeting.

The two are not tall, the visual inspection is about 168-170, which is selected according to the astronauts' standards, and the size cannot be too high. However, the two looked very spirited, smiling, and shivering with Chen Mo, the manner was very neat.

This is the best astronaut in the world. I want to get this opportunity. How much bitter it eats, only they know it.

In addition to Yang Yunsheng and Cai Kang, there are also research teams of agents.

During the lunar exploration period, they will be at the Fei Ant Space Center to keep the ground to the moon and pay attention to the astronauts' health status on the moon.

"Chen Chen, where is the location you are going to land this time?" Zhang Jianfeng asked on the way back to the space center.

“Moon back, 139.62 degrees east longitude, 24.37 degrees south latitude.”

Chen Mo uses a holographic projection platform to adjust the terrain of the location of the tunnel.

"Our robot, here found a lure tunnel of the lunar volcano, good location, enough space, so I am going to build the first lunar base here."

Said, Chen Mo will transfer the map of the molten concrete tunnel, the underground tunnel extending in all directions, the location and topography of the location, environmental data, temperature difference, all appear in front of the lunar exploration team.

“So fast to explore?”

Members of the lunar exploration team, incredibly looking at the long tunnel.

Chen Mo’s speed is terrible.

They all know that the lunar underground tunnel is one of the ideal locations for the construction of the lunar base. They are also looking for exploration. I didn't expect Chen Mo to be so fast.

"I have a chance to get one. I fired more than 20 robots in the past, including data acquisition robots and exploration robots. This is the data that the robots sent back. This launch mission is the transport robot in the past, the initial transformation of the tunnel, Prepare to build a lunar base."

Chen Mo will transfer all the robots that are ready to land on the moon.

Seeing the tools and design of the robot, the researchers on the field can probably guess the role of the robot, and also lament the power of the robot technology of the marching ant group.

"What is this?" Zhang Jianfeng pointed to the 氦-3 extraction machine, curiously asked.

“氦-3 extraction machine for extracting 氦-3 in lunar soil.”

hiss! !

The researchers on the field only knew Chen Mo’s plans and ambitions.

So fast to develop the 氦-3 resources on the moon.

Now that the controlled nuclear fusion power station has been put into operation, more controlled nuclear fusion power stations are under construction, and fuel is a huge expense. If the 氦-3 can be developed, the marching ant group will control the controlled nuclear fusion. The most core technology and materials, that is unlimited wealth.

However, they also know that Chen Mo has invested hundreds of billions in the moon landing plan and definitely needs to make money, not just as a scientific exploration.

"Now is just the beginning. I am building a larger spaceship. I will develop a moon trip and even land on the Mars construction base," Chen said.

The lunar exploration engineering team was hailed by Chen Mo.

They don't doubt Chen Mo's words, even if Chen Mo's current strength, he already has the ability to explore Mars. Chen Mo knows that now exploring Mars, the income is not big, the investment is very big, he does not do the loss-making business, but has not yet reached that stage.

"If there is no problem, we can now announce our manned mission to the moon."

"no problem."

Zhang Jianfeng immediately agreed.

The next morning, the Fei Ant Space Center held a press conference.

Li Ruojun, general manager of the Ant Ant Space Center, and Zhang Jianfeng, the team of the lunar exploration team, attended the meeting and announced plans to join the man on the back of the moon. At the press conference, Li Ruoxuan also announced the construction of the lunar base for the development of the lunar base and the lunar resources. s plan.

chapters.title: Chapter 639: : Pressure From China
chapters.body:
Chapter 639: : Pressure From China

After the Ants Space Center announced the moon landing plan and the lunar development plan, the global media and netizens have already fry.

This time landing is the moon back. If successful, humanity will be the first time to embark on the mysterious zone of the billion-dollar back to the earth.

The research value on the back of the moon is much larger than the front.

"Huaxia is now on the moon. Our politicians are now investing countless election funds in the elections, smearing each other's attacks, saying that some policies that cannot be realized can be achieved. After the election is successful, those who donate more will be able to gain power and interests. Even if you don't understand the management of the country, you can nominate the official. This is why we are caught up by China."

As soon as the news came out, some people began to complain.

On the second day of the press release, Fortune released a research report for the marching ant group. If the lunar base plan and resource development plan are successful, the marching ant group will have unlimited resources and become the world's fourth largest economy. Chen Mo’s personal wealth is immeasurable.

The real rich enemy.

A company, a person, goes beyond most economies.

This is an unprecedented achievement.

Even the world's top value appraisal company can't count Chen Mo's personal life now. He has exceeded the scope of statistics and it doesn't make sense to put it on the rankings.

The storm of controlled nuclear fusion technology has just fallen, but the last small problem with controlled nuclear fusion technology is the fuel problem.

Although bombardment of lithium atoms can produce thorium fuel, the cost is too high, production is limited, and the price is very expensive.

The news, the most concerned about the outside world, is the resource development.

The most valuable thing in the development of lunar resources is the abundant 氦-3 resources. It is an endless wealth for the marching ant group that controls the controlled nuclear fusion technology and successfully develops the star ring.

The marching ant group is preparing to develop the 氦-3 resources of the moon, which is undoubtedly telling the world that the marching ant group will solve the last problem of controlled nuclear fusion technology.

The future controlled nuclear fusion energy will become the most perfect energy source for mankind.

Huaxia has successfully developed a complete set of technologies for controlled nuclear fusion technology. In other countries, there is no news of successful net energy output for controlled nuclear fusion technology, let alone controlled nuclear fusion technology.

Fight hard?

The war robots owned by China can kill the living forces on the ground from beginning to end, and discuss strategic forces without losing to any country.

She has a really strong strength, just as always to maintain the middle of the mean.

No one dares to really provoke the dragon now, and the outside world can only watch the development of China.

Sandia National Laboratory, USA, 氘-氚 Controlled Fusion Experimental Center.

Mike Cuneo thought about the data in front of him and frowned.

This is the data obtained by the zmachine device to open the nucleus fusion experiment. The experimental data found that when the 氘氚 ratio reaches 1:1, the energy produced by the new hybrid material is 500 times the maximum energy available, they seem to find The best fuel relationship.

However, there are many problems with controlled nuclear fusion technology.

They did a five-year experiment and continued to add 氚 to the device to get the ratio to 1:1 and get the current experimental data.

The z-machine's magnetic field constrains the alpha particles that appear in the reaction and captures them along the field lines, bringing together more energy to maintain fusion.

However, the volume of the ruthenium molecule is too small to easily penetrate into any part of the equipment, and the ability to control nuclear radiation facilities and radiation protection is very high, and it takes a long time to continue fueling.

Most importantly, in the existing devices, the reaction conditions are insufficient, and the fusion reaction of the ruthenium molecules is insufficient to sustain the long-term fusion reaction.

The materials of superconducting and fusion devices are the key to the breakthrough of controlled nuclear fusion technology. If the superconducting materials and divertor materials have breakthroughs, they have better experimental conditions, and the fusion reaction collision and plasma morphology problems can be Slowly improve in the experiment.

However, how easy is material breakthrough?

A few years ago, Huaxia controlled nuclear fusion technology announced the successful net energy output, shocked the world.

The world's high temperature plasma physicists have been shocked by the success of China.

However, during this period, Hua Xia's controlled nuclear fusion technology team, including the chief engineer and chief designer of the leading star ring research, Chen Mo, did not publish any papers and theories on controlled nuclear fusion technology.

The global controlled nuclear fusion technology is now only available to China and is actually put into use.

Their country has organized top nuclear physicists and high-temperature plasma physicists, investing a lot of money to study. In the past few years, progress has been small, both in terms of materials and plasma shapes.

Nowadays, China has built a large-scale controlled nuclear fusion power station, and the marching ant group announced that it has landed on the moon to develop the 氦-3 resources. They still have not made progress.

Now the controlled nuclear fusion team in their country, as well as the team that joined the G7 to jointly develop nuclear fusion technology, are somewhat anxious.

If it does not break through, the marching ant group will successfully develop the 氦-3 resources of the moon. After that, the world's most critical energy technology will be monopolized by China. For them, it is useless news.

Hey! !

The knocking of the door sounded and the director of the laboratory entered the office.

"Cuneo, there is something to tell you." The director spoke.

"What? It won't be quarreling with your wife, come to me to comfort?" Cuneo looked at him strangely.

"She is honest. It is here to inform that the 51 district is preparing to set up a new research team for controlled fusion projects, belonging to the most senior team, convening the top physicists, even the solar plan physicists will recall. New technology to assist in the research, do you want to participate?" The director said some mystery.

"What technology?"

"Can't say." The director shrugged.

"Participation, of course, participation." Mike did not hesitate to agree.

......

Moscow, Kurchatov Institute.

In the 1950s, the world's first tokamak device was born at the Kurchatov Institute. For decades, it is still the most advanced nuclear fusion research institute in Russia.

Evgeni Wilhelm was excited to look at Lodsky, with a face full of age spots, with a little nervousness.

He is the director of the Kurtov Institute and the scientific advisor to the President, one of the most famous nuclear fusion scientists in Russia, and one of the founders of the iTeR program.

Nowadays, I am over 80 years old and still have no retirement.

Because Russia's current national strength is not the Soviet era, talent is scarce, and its national strength is weak. He has to send only the candlelight for the country's nuclear fusion field, hoping to train more nuclear fusion talents for Russia.

After the successful controlled nuclear fusion of China, the iTeR project was put to the surface of the controlled nuclear fusion project in Russia.

In their country, talent is scarce.

Therefore, these years, the top technology and technology breakthroughs are not big, are eating the old days of the Soviet era.

Now, the Department of Energy came with Lokiski and told him that there is a breakthrough in artificial intelligence, allowing them to communicate and use the powerful computing power of artificial intelligence to assist in controlled nuclear fusion research.

Lodsky told him that it might be useful, which is why Wilhelhof is excited.

"Are you sure? Professor Rochsky."

"We tested Jelena, it's very powerful, and there are some breakthroughs in the material field to help some research speed up. I can't guarantee that it will be successful in controlled nuclear fusion, but there is definitely some help."

"Try it," said Willihof.

At the same time, Yamamoto Saki, the National Institute of Atomic Energy, Higashimura, Aomori Prefecture, was also involved in the research conference of the island's controlled nuclear fusion reactor.

Discussion ‘Azure’ may help with the provision of controlled nuclear fusion research.

Europe, India, all countries with ambitions for controlled nuclear fusion research, are beginning to be nervous.

The marching ant group announced the development of lunar resources, giving them a sense of urgency. Huaxia has already taken the lead. If they successfully develop the nuclear fusion fuel resources of the moon, they have not made a breakthrough. They will only be able to eat ash afterwards in China.

Flying Ant Center.

The goddess and the ant are already parked at the airport.

The equipment that needs to be used for the moon landing is also fully loaded into the transport cabin. Everything is ready.

Under the attention of ready-made personnel and reporters' media, Yang Yunsheng and Cai Kang wearing spacesuits waved their farewells and entered the goddess under the guidance of robots.

For the sake of safety, the two will go to the safe cabin of the goddess when they land on the moon. The safety cabin can give the two people one more layer of protection. After all, now everyone can't predict what the situation will be.

"Ready."

Yang Yunsheng and Cai Kangchao waved their cameras in the safety cabin.

"take off."

With a command, the goddess took the lead, and ten minutes later, the ant was followed, and disappeared into the sky under the lens of the media.

chapters.title: Chapter 640: : Successful Landing On The Moon
chapters.body:
Chapter 640: : Successful Landing On The Moon

Three days, not too long.

The world is paying attention to the news that the joint ant aerospace company and the lunar exploration engineering team jointly explore the moon, attracting huge amounts of traffic every day.

If the moon landing is successful, it will be the first time humans land on the back of the moon.

The clean electromagnetic environment there is the best place to observe the universe, and it retains the oldest lunar landform, and its scientific research value is much larger than that of the moon facing the earth.

"Theft has successfully entered the lunar orbit, the astronauts are in good condition, requesting to land on the moon back, the target position, east longitude 139.62 degrees, south latitude 24.37 degrees."

In the lunar orbit, the goddess has entered the intended orbit.

Below, is the back of the moon.

This ancient time has never been revealed to the real face of the world. The female land, the restricted area of life, is about to usher in the first batch of extraterrestrial visitors.

"it has started."

Far away from the command center of the Flying Ant Center, the team of the lunar exploration project, all nervously stared at the screen.

The goddess has already sent back photos of the moon.

After the command center replied to the landing order, it began to wait nervously.

Waiting for the process, every minute and every second is a torment.

"It's going to land." In the safe cabin of the goddess, Yang Yunsheng looked at the picture on the screen and sighed with a sigh of relief.

"You should say that we are going to go down in history." Cai Kang looked relaxed and said: "But before I went to the annals, I wanted to urinate, it was estimated to be in the urine. In fact, I wanted to scatter on the surface of the moon. Unfortunately, I can't do it."

"..."

Yang Yunsheng was teased by Cai Kang, and the tension disappeared a lot.

Both of them are watching the time, one minute and one second, and the waiting time is always long.

They are about to become the world's first humans to land on the back of the moon. This is a matter of history. It will also become a meritorious astronaut in China. Both are looking forward to it.

The long-term effort is for today.

"The goddess is ready to land."

The sign of the goddess rang, the engine began to slow down, and the altitude of the aircraft displayed on the screen was declining.

"200 meters……"

"100 metres……"

"30 meters..."

"10 m……"

After some moon dust was raised, the goddess steadily landed on a relatively flat ground. The landing gear of the goddess was slightly caught in the moon dust, and the ion engine slowly turned off.

"The landing was successful. It was the moonlit night, the external temperature was minus 167 degrees Celsius, and the cabin temperature was 25 degrees Celsius..."

These four words, for Yang Yunsheng and Cai Kang in the goddess, are simply Scorpio.

“When can I leave the cabin?” Yang Yunsheng asked.

"The Ants will land in 15 minutes, and the Ants will land in order to get out of the cabin. The pressure in the cabin of the Goddess is normal. You can move freely." The artificial intelligence of the Goddess replies: "The lunar gravity acceleration is 1.603 meters per second. be careful."

"This artificial intelligence is really smart." Cai Kang said with a deep sigh.

"Thank you."

"..."

Hearing this thank you, Yang Yunsheng and Cai Kang smiled instantly, this is not generally clever, and a little human.

In 20 minutes, the ant colony followed the goddess and landed on the open space more than two hundred meters away from the goddess. The moon dust raised in the air floated for a while before it settled.

"The Ant Ant has landed successfully."

The sound of the artificial intelligence of the goddess made the two people have a great earthquake.

Even the optimistic Cai Kang, a little bit nervous.

If the next mission is successful, they will become legendary and will be included in the history of human space.

The control room of the Fei Ant Space Center, Zhang Jianfeng and others are also very nervous. Now it is already more than 6:00 pm. The members of the lunar exploration engineering team have not finished their meals. They have been here and hope to get good news in the first time.

Now is the most crucial moment. Without news, they are not in the mood to eat.

"Ready to leave the cabin."

When the news was sent back to Earth, the palms of the people were not consciously clenched.

At this time, in the goddess, Yang Yunsheng and Cai Kang have left the safety cabin, arrived in the cabin of the goddess, and watched the outside environment. The lights of the goddess and the ant illuminate the surrounding land, still dead. Desolate, not grass.

The equipment and machinery carried by the Ants, with the assistance of the robot, have left the Ants, and there are several devices that are heading for a hole that is 200 meters away.

There, the tunnel that Chen Mo found.

"Ready to leave the cabin."

After checking the space suit on their body, they reached the exit area.

“The external temperature is minus 167 degrees Celsius. Please check if the space service thermostat system is normal. Please check if the oxygen supply system is normal...”

"Ready to open the hatch, prepare for five seconds, 5...4...3...2...1, the door is open, please be safe."

After the cabin air pressure stabilized, Yang Yunsheng and Cai Kang looked at each other, clenched the flagpole with the red flag in their hands, and slowly walked down the landing door. The two men's footsteps are very powerful, this is better than the space walk, at least there is a little gravity here.

Upon reaching the final step, the two looked at each other and saw the excitement in each other through the helmet.

This step is crucial for China.

The experience in modern times tells them that they will be beaten behind. For decades, Western countries have tried to block and limit China's development. Now, they can still kill a **** road.

Taking this step means the end of the fourth phase of the lunar exploration project, which is also the beginning of another journey.

"1...2...3."

Probably paused for 10 seconds, the two took the same step at the same time, set foot on this quiet place for hundreds of millions of years.

The footsteps are not heavy, just like the usual way of walking, but even if the two are restrained, the body betrays their mood, and they are shaking with excitement.

Successful!

Successful!

I finally took this step.

On the ground, the Fei Ant Space Center, Zhang Jianfeng looked at the footprints from the moon and the couples with the flagpoles, and they burst into tears.

The other members of the agent's project were grouped together, crying and laughing, joy and tears intertwined, but the scene was very harmonious.

Their lunar exploration project has its own moon landing device, but it can't fail for the first time, so it is safe to choose the highest speed and the highest success rate.

It has finally succeeded.

Chen Mo applauded and raised them happy.

This is something to be proud of.

In the past few decades, Huaxia has gone all the way from the blockade to today, where it bears the sweat of too many ancestors and the silent efforts of countless workers.

This step is a sign of strong self-confidence.

This will greatly stimulate national pride, belonging and cohesiveness, and the intangible benefits brought by it are unparalleled.

After a long time, Zhang Jianfeng was calm and excited. Zhang Jianfeng, who was nearly 50 years old, was slightly old-fashioned in his previous work. He had a little white hair on his head. Now the joy and spirit of his body seem to make him suddenly young. .

"Thank you very much this time, Academician Chen." Zhang Jianfeng said with gratitude, Chen Mo slightly bowed.

"you are very welcome."

Chen Mo hurriedly avoided and raised Zhang Jianfeng, and he could not afford it.

"It is time to tell the people in the country good news."

Zhang Jianfeng looked up at the two pictures on the big screen. These two photos are the result of the hard work of their two generations. The hardships are only their own experience.

The Chinese people have been waiting for their perfect answer.

chapters.title: Chapter 641: : Explosive News
chapters.body:
Chapter 641: : Explosive News

What happened on the earth, Yang Yunshan and Cai Kang did not know.

At this time, the two, watching the robot of the goddess, carried the ecological experiment cabin and came out of the transport cabin.

The five-ton ecological experiment cabin was easily carried by four robots.

This ecological experiment cabin is an important part of their experiments on the lunar exploration project.

In the ecological experiment cabin, there are Arabidopsis seeds, potatoes, silkworms, rice, soybeans and some decomposing bacteria, as well as the seeds of the army ants group, forming a small biosphere, mainly studying the living conditions of the living things on the lunar surface.

Prepare for the long-term presence of the human surface on the moon.

Soon, the four robots carried the ecological experiment cabin and placed them on the designated open space.

Yang Yunsheng checked the ecological experiment cabin once and found that there was no problem, and he was completely relieved.

"It's really powerful." Cai Kang sighed at the robots who were looking back, and turned to look at the two machines that were working not far from the open space: "What about the two machines?"

The robots sent by the marching ant group are large and small, as many as forty, and other construction robots used in the detection robots and construction bases have left the plane, entered the tunnel or went out to explore, leaving only these two machines. Collecting lunar soil.

"You can ask the goddess." Yang Yunsheng said.

Goddess is their name for the artificial intelligence of the goddess.

"It is the 氦-3 extraction machine used to collect the 氦-3 in the lunar soil." The voice of artificial intelligence on the goddess was quickly transmitted to their headsets.

Yang Yunsheng and Cai Kang were shocked. They did not expect the marching ant group to have such a multi-tasking mission. In addition to building the base, they also need to mine the resources of the 氦-3.

"We should work."

Cai Kang regained his gaze.

"Goddess, can you let the robot send some tunnel soil and rocks out?"

This month's landing, in addition to doing some experiments, is to collect as much lunar rock and soil as possible, especially rare rocks and soil.

Like the rock and soil inside the tunnel, this is a blank for human research.

No one knows the geological structure inside the moon, and the information about the lunar volcanic activity. The rocks and soil inside the magma tunnel help them to study the lunar volcanic activity of the moon, which is very rare.

"Yes." The artificial intelligence of the goddess: "How much?"

"Three hundred kilograms." Yang Yunsheng said.

The transport cabins of the two space planes have a large transport space and can be transported back as long as they can be loaded. They stayed on the moon table for five days, and it looks a lot, but in addition to the rest time and other scheduled time, the task time is definitely not much.

On the earth, the news of the success of Huaxia's landing on the back of the moon, after being announced by the lunar exploration engineering team and the marching ant group, almost swept the world like a tornado.

In China, Yang Yunsheng and Cai Kang two astronauts inserted the flag and the photos of the two footsteps, smashing the circle of friends, the country is boiling.

The domestic mainstream media reported on this news almost at the same time.

The success of the lunar exploration has almost tied the footsteps of global space exploration, and the marching ant group is about to build a base on the moon, and they are one step ahead of the world.

This is a milestone achievement.

For the first time, human beings set foot on the back of the moon, the land facing the universe for hundreds of millions of years, is a big step in the exploration of human space.

Almost the same day, a national pride that can be seen is filled with every corner of the network. All types of forums, post bars, circle of friends, microblogging, group chat, have the shadow of this news.

In history, China has maintained its leading position in civilization for thousands of years.

In the past two hundred years, because of the closure of the country, it has fallen behind the world and has been plundered and oppressed. Now, once again, it has risen to the stage of historical peaks, and countless people are excited.

The five days are not long. The marching ant group official and the lunar exploration engineering team update the latest news on the back every day. The news of the success of the moon has always been the highest.

Five days later, the mission to the moon was completed, and the news that the two astronauts began to return, once again attracted the attention of the world.

The airport of the Ant Ant Space Center.

The roaring sound appeared, and the figure of the goddess appeared in the far air and gradually grew larger in the field of vision.

It didn't take long to hover over the airport and land slowly.

At about the same time, the robots on the ground and the staff wearing protective clothing quickly went to the goddess and simply separated the goddess.

The reporters of the CCTV main station that were invited to the scene also ran with the camera and recorded the moment of history.

"finally come back."

Zhang Jianfeng saw the astronauts safely coming out of the cabin, and a heart was completely put down, and his face was laughing into a sunflower. This is an exciting time. The first astronauts who landed on the moon landed safely, meaning their moon landing plan and announced their success.

“Congratulations.” Chen Mo said.

"Tongyi is happy." Zhang Jianfeng laughed, not hiding his joy.

"Mergo."

When the two talked and laughed, the ink girl took over the sterilized small refrigerator safe that the robot took out from the goddess and handed it to Chen Mo.

Once opened, a sealed high-pressure refrigerated container with the thickness of one arm appears in their field of view, and through the transparent glass structure, it can be seen that some body fluid is stored therein.

"What is this?" Zhang Jianfeng asked curiously.

"氦-3."

Zhang Jianfeng was stunned.

Marching Ant Group, Building No. 7.

Countless reporters sat quietly at the venue and were anxiously waiting to begin.

Today is the day when the goddess landed.

The Ant Ant Space Center does not allow foreign media reporters to enter the space base for filming, involving some confidentiality and intelligence, so the press conference will be confirmed here at the No. 7 Building of the Army Ant Group.

Everyone is looking forward to it.

"How haven't you started yet? Is there a problem with the return of the goddess?"

"It should be fast."

Some irritated journalists began to whisper.

When everyone waited for it, the venue was suddenly quiet and the lights were slightly dim.

Everyone on the field was in a moment of spirit, and those who whispered discussions were quiet and looked at the stage.

Under the attention of everyone, the holographic projector on the stage of the conference was lit up, and Chen Mo’s holographic projection image appeared on it, still a familiar smile and confidence.

"I am sorry, I have been waiting for you. I am now at the Fei Ant Space Center. The Goddess and the Ants have landed safely, and the mission of the lunar exploration has been successfully completed."

"But there is still good news."

The reporter who just had some excitement was attracted by Chen Mo’s last sentence, and some looked forward to it.

"In the machine we sent to the moon, we have the 氦-3 extraction robot we developed. Our robot, which has been working normally on the lunar surface, has successfully collected 氦-3 from the lunar soil, which is brought back by the goddess. 100 grams of 氦-3 collected from the lunar soil. Our company's 氦-3 acquisition technology has matured, and in the near future, we will launch more machines, large-scale acquisition of 氦-3, 氦-3 will become controlled The main fuel for nuclear fusion power stations."

Chen Mo showed the reporter the container of 氦-3.

Explosive news.

For a time, the reporters on the field exclaimed their voices.

"This is not true, it is definitely not true."

"It can't be so fast."

"This is crazy."

A few Western journalists on the field were unbelievable.

But the facts are in front of them, and Chen Mo does not have to lie at all.

The marching ant group already has the skills and capabilities to develop lunar 氦-3 resources. Finally, the problem of fuel is solved, and the controlled nuclear fusion technology of China has been fully matured.

chapters.title: Chapter 642: : The Impact Of Controlled Nuclear Fusion Technology
chapters.body:
Chapter 642: : The Impact Of Controlled Nuclear Fusion Technology

Chen Mo’s announcement of the successful collection of the Moon 氦-3 is tantamount to the tsunami caused by the magnitude 10 earthquake, flooding the global scientific, energy and economic sectors.

According to the results of the lunar exploration, the amount of 氦-3 stored on the moon exceeds 1 million tons, the actual storage. 100 tons of 氦-3 controlled fusion can provide the total amount of energy in the world for one year, and the 氦-3 storage of the moon is enough for humans to use 10,000 years.

Nowadays, the technology controlled by Chen Mo has successfully collected 氦-3, and the last short-board of large-scale application of controlled nuclear fusion technology has been completed, and mass popularization has become overwhelming.

This news, in the global economic world, led to the tsunami.

As soon as the news came out, it immediately triggered a panic in the coal market. It also maintained coal futures in the trough, opening a new round of straight-line plunge, leaving the coal market a mess.

Coal prices have created new lows in the past half century. Several small countries that rely mainly on coal exports to maintain the domestic economy have been affected by the collapse of coal prices. The economy has instantly fallen to the bottom, and the domestic unemployment rate has reached a record high.

Unemployment in coal mines in some small countries began a large-scale demonstration to protest the development of controlled nuclear fusion technology by the marching ant group.

With the success of the development of 氦-3, Chen Mo took the photo of 氦-3 and boarded the cover of Time magazine, becoming the character of the times. This is the cover of Chen Mo’s seventh time on Time magazine.

The new Forbes global power list has been updated. Chen Mo ranks fourth in the world after the leaders of the three major powers and is elected as the most influential and powerful entrepreneur and scientist in the world.

This is the first time that the most power-ranking list of non-governing and ruling entrepreneurs has achieved such a high ranking.

A person, the influence is comparable to a world power.

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min, respectively, occupy the first and second positions of the world's most influential women's rankings as the president of Chen Mo's wife and marching ant group. The ink girl is ranked 10th as the first assistant of Chen Mo.

All walks of life in the West are full of awe and fear of the marching ant group.

They all know what it means to successfully develop lunar resources.

At this stage, when the world is unable to develop lunar resources, the marching ant group will have the resources and wealth of a planet, and this situation will be maintained until a second country or enterprise has mastered this skill.

In any market, once a monopoly occurs, its gains will make the capitalists crazy, let alone the strategic resources of the 氦-3.

Chen Mo announced the successful collection of the 氦-3 news, flooding the world's major news platforms.

Shortly after the news spread, several countries led by the United States launched the UN emergency conference. The meeting hoped that China can open up a cooperation platform and allow other countries to use the Chinese lunar exploration platform to open international cooperation and explore and research the moon.

In the end, at the meeting, Huaxia was owned by the private company and could not be the master. The proposal was rejected. However, they are willing to give some samples of rocky soil in the back of the country to help the lunar research in various countries.

Shortly after the proposal was rejected, the United States of America and South Korea, on the grounds of Article 12 of the Outer Space Treaty, requested investigations into the construction of the goddess and the lunar base of the marching ant group, and requested the marching ant group to open the moon cooperation. platform.

These requirements were directly rejected by the marching ant group, and it was stated that the marching ant group is willing to open up the cooperation platform, but it will never open up at the request of some people, and will not cooperate with those who are unconcerned.

Things didn't stop.

The army ants group has just publicly refused, and rumors have been made, especially in countries where controlled nuclear fusion technology has spread and the economy has collapsed. Some media have begun to report on the threat of marching ant groups and have raised their dissatisfaction with the marching ant group. .

At the same time, the United States and South Korea once again submitted so-called evidence to the UN General Assembly. It is suspected that the ants defense company under the Army Ant Group may deploy a weapon system at the lunar base in an attempt to privately occupy the moon as privately owned by Chen Mo, violating the Outer Space Treaty and requesting a suspension. The lure development plan of the marching ant group and dispatched investigators to investigate.

The report proposal was not passed.

At this juncture, people who have a little brain are not willing to commit crimes. The strength and influence of the marching ant group is no longer blocked by them.

Instead, they have to worry that the marching ant group will provide them with holographic projectors, seismographs and patent licenses, and I am afraid that their domestic companies will suffer.

It’s different in the past.

Without support, a sanction against the marching ant group ended in vain, and the United States also made several international jokes.

Only this blockade against the marching ant group allowed the outside world to see the real influence of the marching ant group. Chen Mo entered the fourth place in the world's most powerful power list.

This game, you come and go, lasted for five months.

During these five months, the marching ant group landed on the back of the moon four times and continued to collect equipment for the 氦-3 on the back of the moon. At the same time, send some construction robots and materials to accelerate the formation of the base.

During the period, the space shuttle hotel of Feixiang Aerospace was also formed, and the space travel commercial project of the Feixiang Space Center entered the acceleration phase.

Russia, which has been in an out-of-office situation, suddenly announced that it had withdrawn from the Western Group-led "Cooperation Agreement on Joint Development of High-Temperature Plasma Research" and chose to fly.

This 'creation of the sun plan' was created after China's successful controlled nuclear fusion experiment, and other iTeR countries started the stove. The United States and Russia dominated, and the European, British, Japanese, Korean, Indian, Australian, and Canadian seven-party groups eliminated China. outer.

Now Russia has announced a solo flight, which has caused a lot of shock.

It is speculated that Russia is because of its bad relationship with the islands, the United States and Europe, and it is only necessary to stand alone in the organization.

Soon after, the island country also studied Russia, withdrew from the agreement, and the island country’s withdrawal made people even more convinced that there was a contradiction between the United States and Russia and other seven parties.

High-energy news continues, and the island’s exit is not the end.

Not long after, the new president of the US election announced his inauguration.

The new president, Eva, is the eldest daughter of the former president and the first female president in the history of the United States.

On the third day after the new president announced his inauguration, he signed a document and announced his withdrawal from the ‘Sun Plan’, becoming the third country to jointly develop a high-temperature plasma research cooperation agreement.

The two leading countries, together with the withdrawal of important technological powers, have made this organization that jointly develops controlled nuclear fusion technology unhappy.

The other parties did not even understand the reasons for the withdrawal of the three parties. They could only attribute the reason to the dispute over the islands after the last island nation’s terrorist incident, and the tripartite disagreement caused by the US-Israel dispute after the virus incident.

Just outside the speculation about the reasons for the withdrawal of the three countries, the Russian Academy of Sciences and the Kurchatov Institute announced that they have made major breakthroughs in controlled nuclear fusion technology, and that controlled nuclear fusion technology has entered the final stage of research.

The news caused Russia to be inspiring and the world is in vain.

The first Tokamak was born at the Kurchatov Institute. Today, Russia's controlled nuclear fusion technology has once again made a major breakthrough here.

The news attracted the dissatisfaction of the seven-party group headed by the European Union. He believed that Russia was a breakthrough in the content of the controlled nuclear fusion technology research of the 'Sun Plan' and was unwilling to share with them before choosing to withdraw from the agreement.

When the European Union-led countries and the Russian war of words were in full swing, the United States suddenly appeared, announcing a major breakthrough in controlled nuclear fusion technology. The island nation is also unwilling to lag behind and announces breakthroughs in controlled nuclear fusion technology.

At this moment, the EU and other parties realized that they were betrayed by their own people.

The three countries are the key to discovering breakthroughs in controlled nuclear fusion technology. They don’t want to share it with them, they will choose to opt out of the agreement.

When the EU hoped that the technology sharing between the two countries would be unrelentingly rejected.

The war of words between the parties has made the global pattern chaotic, and the world pattern is at a time of change.

Some countries that rely mainly on coal exports and oil exports to maintain their economies, because the news has appeared one after another, the economic market has fallen into a chaotic chaos, and some small countries have already had chaotic precursors.

The real impact of controlled nuclear fusion technology has really emerged when several parties announced breakthroughs in controlled nuclear fusion technology.

Many people seem to see some of the clues to the world's pattern in the next era of controlled nuclear fusion.

chapters.title: Chapter 643: ： Tenjo
chapters.body:
Chapter 643: ： Tenjo

The ant space center No. 2 hangar.

In the hangar, a behemoth is displayed.

This is the newly created Pluto version of the goddess. Chen Mo gave it the name ‘Tianfu’, which is a sister version of the goddess, but this sister is a bit ‘fat’.

Chen Mo stood in front of it, shorter than the wheels of the landing gear.

Plus the landing gear, the fuselage is 21.8 meters high, the wingspan is 153.7 meters, and the length is 70.4 meters. The goddess is like a little cute.

This big fat girl, even with mature technology, plus equipment and machines specially developed to make it, is expensive. Not counting the cost of expanding the base and building the hangar, the cost of the creation of the Virgin has exceeded 80 billion.

In five months, the world is changing. Chen Mo is in the laboratory and concentrates on making the Virgo.

With the support of the machines in the No. 1 area of the Army Ant Group and the workshop factory of the Army Ant Group, the assembly was not completed until yesterday.

“The systems were checked and no problems were found,” said the ink girl.

"Open the door and prepare for the test flight."

Chen Mo issued instructions.

The assembly of the Tianmai is completed, and the technology library has not completed the technical tips. It is necessary to determine whether the research and development is successful after the successful flight test.

The tall roller shutter door of the No. 2 hangar slowly rises. This is the first time that the goddess sees the blue sky outside.

In the No. 2 hangar, the staff who participated in the assembly of the Tianmai number looked at the Tiannv. This is not the first time they saw the Tiannu, and every time they saw it, they couldn’t help but admire.

This is probably the most powerful aircraft in the world.

Everyone left the hangar, and the Virgo was launched. The tail ion engine was sprayed with a faint blue flame, slowly coming out of the hangar, like a phoenix that was out of the cage.

A minute later, the new huge body was exposed to the sun for the first time.

"Oh my God."

"What monster is this?"

Countries around the world are using spy satellites to monitor the Intelligence Agency of the Flying Ants Space Center and see the satellite images of the Virgo, exclaiming their voices.

After the self-propelled ants group announced the development of lunar resource technology, the Fei Ant Space Center became the target of the Global Power Intelligence Agency, and several major world intelligence agencies were monitoring satellites for 24 hours.

The 36,000-acre private aerospace center, which houses the world's most advanced aerospace technology, is the least understood by global intelligence agencies because ground intelligence personnel simply cannot get there.

The expansion of the Ant Ant Space Center was completed. The vehicles seen from the spy satellites can be confirmed, and there is a big movement in the newly built workshop.

I didn't expect to come out with such a terrible big guy now.

From the satellite imagery, the aircraft has a wingspan of more than 150 meters, twice as large as the goddess.

“Is the marching ant group crazy?”

"What are they doing?"

Numerous questions have emerged from the intelligence of various countries. The figure of the plane was sent to the table of leaders of various countries in the first time. The major intelligence agencies in the world are paying attention to the movement of the Virgo in real time through satellite.

Flying ant space base.

The Maid has entered the airport and the driving robot is ready to go in the cockpit.

The test work was carried out by Chen Mo personally. On the screen inside the control room, it was the meter data of the Tianmai. The other staff members were slightly nervous. They were the first time to test such a large aircraft.

"Start the engine."

Under the order of Chen Mo, the ion engine of the abdomen of the Virgo was activated.

The blue fireworks are ejected, and a wind appears in the airport. As the power of the ion engine increases, the wind also increases.

"No. 1 engine is normal."

"No. 2 engine is normal."

"..."

"No. 10 engine is normal."

......

"The flight control system is normal."

The ink girl reported to Chen Mo about the work of the various systems of the Tianmai, and now it is only the final test before the lift.

take off!

As the order fell, the power of the ion engine of the Tianmai was increased at the airport, and it suddenly became a raging wind. The huge body of the Maid is slowly floating under the attention of everyone.

The plane did not fly high, but hovered in the sky 20 meters high.

"God, can such a big plane hover vertically?"

"What engine is this?"

Through the satellite imagery, I saw that the Tianmao hovered in the air, and the intelligence departments of various countries fry the pot.

It is already scary that the goddess is big enough to take off and hover vertically. In the moon landing project and the space project, the goddess can fly and rise in the vacuum, once again refreshing the outside world's understanding of the goddess engine.

Today, this aircraft, which is twice as large as the goddess, can also take off and hover vertically. At this moment, the cognition of the marching ant group technology has once again risen to a new level.

That is a monster company.

Some conspiracy theories, even suspected that Chen Mo is a future person who passed back hundreds of years later.

"take off."

Hovering for about five minutes, to determine that the flight control system is stable, the ion engine is stable, and Chen Mocai issued the flight command.

The glory of the ion engine instantly surges and accelerates, reaching the sky.

As the height rises, all the data on the screen is beating, no one dares to slack off, staring at the screen, ready to adapt. If the plane falls, it can drop a large listed company.

“The external airflow is stable.”

This is a spaceship that requires space testing. As the Tianmao continued to rise in height, the control room was inexplicably nervous.

"80km in height, external temperature minus 93 degrees Celsius, cabin temperature 25 degrees Celsius; cabin air pressure 101.3KPa, normal air pressure, normal environmental control and life support system; flight control and communication system normal; power supply and distribution system normal, advance The system is normal... the instrument and lighting system are normal; data management is normal."

"Height 100 km..."

"Height 200 km..."

“Height 400 km, speed 7.9 km/s, cabin temperature 25 ° C, air pressure 101.3 KPa; environmental control and life support system are normal; flight control and communication system are normal; propulsion system is normal; instrument and lighting system is normal; data management normal."

"Returning."

The content of the test and all completed, Chen Mo issued the return order.

Three hours later, the Tianmao returned to the Feifang Space Center and landed steadily. The people in the control room showed a relaxed smile. The logistics staff did not dare to neglect and quickly went to the plane to maintain the Tiannv.

Sitting in the main console, Chen Mo felt a sense of ease in his mind.

He knows what it means.

The completion of the Maid of the Virgin means a new technology is completed.

The technical difficulty of this maiden is bigger than that of the goddess. Moreover, the supporting technology of this project is too much, the project is very large, and the difficulty of research and development is also greater than that of the goddess.

The science library provides only the formula of spacecraft materials, and other work must be solved by himself, including design and manufacturing.

This time, the golden light of the technology ball should be a lot bigger.

Chen Mo is not sure about how much technology he needs from the next privilege of the Science and Technology Library.

I can't ask for it, let it go.

The Tianmai was returned to the hangar for maintenance. Chen Mo took the ink girl away from the control room and went to the laboratory.

"I take a break, wake up me when there is something particularly urgent."

"it is good."

After squatting on the ink, Chen Mo was lying on the sofa and entering the technology library.

chapters.title: Chapter 644: : Quantum Computer
chapters.body:
Chapter 644: : Quantum Computer

In the Science and Technology Library, Chen Mo put the technology ball in his hands.

The golden light inside the technology ball, as he thinks, has skyrocketed. He can clearly see that at this time, inside the technology ball, the golden light is already as big as the ostrich egg, leaving only the outer layer, which is a transparent silver light.

The size of the football-sized technology ball, which is occupied by the Golden Light, seems to be only one step away.

The construction of the lunar base and the manufacture of the Tiannv are not small, which is the reason for the surge in Jinguang.

If the female number is completed today, he needs to conduct the next research project.

With a little thought, Chen Mo will be sure.

In the past few months, the three countries of the United States and Russia have announced that they have made major breakthroughs in the field of controlled nuclear fusion technology.

He also has the artificial intelligence of the island country, which has been determined, and there are some remarkable points, and the level of intelligence is not low. After continuous improvement and research in the three countries, they can already use it as an auxiliary technology, so they will make such rapid progress.

Chen Mo guessed that now that the three countries' controlled nuclear fusion technology has completely broken through the difficulties, I am afraid that there will be only the last, or the material, or the problem of superconductors.

Artificial intelligence is the biggest advantage of the marching ant group.

Now that other countries are catching up, he must maintain an absolute lead.

Over the past few months, three countries have been testing and letting artificial intelligence invade the network remotely.

Unfortunately, the termite system of the marching ant group has always been the last line of defense, and Chen Mo has repeatedly moved his hands and feet, making them slower in the direction of artificial intelligence remote invasion.

But that is not a long-term solution, and an information security network must be established.

Moreover, although the ink women have been constantly improving over the years, there has been no staged breakthrough in upgrading. Now is the time.

The core performance of artificial intelligence is computing power.

As long as computing power goes up, artificial intelligence has unlimited possibilities.

The chip technology of the marching ant group has undergone the transformation of Chen Mo, and the process has reached the process of 3 nanometers.

This is the limit of Moore's Law.

If the transistor is smaller, electrons will have quantum tunneling in the transistor circuit, and Moore's Law will fail.

In the post-Moore era, the development of computer chips was mainly in two directions.

The first is to use the brain's 3-dimensional spatial structure design, or the second, and is another feasible direction that is currently determined: quantum chips.

Quantum chips and quantum computers are Chen Mo's first choice.

Chen Mo looked at the various technical books that appeared in his mind in the technology ball. After several classifications, he quickly found the technology he needed.

Quantum Computer Principles and Design

"Principles and Design of Quantum Chips"

Superconducting Quantum Interference Theory

Principles of Quantum Dot Control

Quantum Polymorphism Theory

Quantum Non-Logical Operations and Principles

Principles and Properties of Quantum Superposition and Quantum Coherence

......

They are all technical theories related to quantum computer and quantum chip design. There is still no corresponding technology and products for reference. Quantum chips and quantum computers require him to understand the theory and then design and manufacture it himself.

This is a new topic.

Chen Mo did not pick, and all the books on the technical principles related to the quantum computer were taken down, and all the brains were closed until the head was faintly painful.

There are too many technologies to finish.

Even Chen Mo can only sigh.

Acquiring information on the theory and design principles of many quantum computers, Chen Mo’s mind has a clear concept and direction for the design and manufacture of quantum computers.

Traditional computers can only operate on binary systems of 0 or 1, called "bits," but quantum computers are much more powerful than such binary operations.

Based on the principles of quantum mechanics, quantum can be in multiple states at the same time, such as the life-and-death superposition of the famous Schrödinger cat.

The basic unit of a quantum computer is a qubit that can be operated on a qubit and can compute a value between 0 and 1. This value is infinite compared to two fixed binary zeros and ones.

Due to the nature of quantum, the computational power of quantum computers increases exponentially with each additional quantum bit, and never fails like Moore's Law. In theory, quantum computers have unlimited possibilities.

For example, solving the equations of billions of billions of variables, even if the current superconducting computer of the marching ant group is 100 times faster than the fastest supercomputer in other countries, it is necessary to calculate this equation for several years. If you let supercomputer operations in other countries, it takes hundreds of years to solve, and using quantum algorithms to solve, the solution process takes only 10 seconds.

The computing power of quantum computer horror is a technology that makes the world covet. The world's top laboratories are studying quantum computing technology, but the progress is slow.

In addition to the advantages of unlimited computing power, quantum networks have the most powerful confidentiality.

In quantum communication experiments, scientists have shown that only two parties with electron paramagnetic resonance (ePR) pairs can complete quantum information transmission, and no third party can obtain complete quantum information.

This feature, the information edited by the quantitative sub-inspection will not be eavesdropped during transmission.

Based on the “Beijing-Shanghai trunk line”, “Wuhe trunk line” and “Mozi number”, Huaxia built a 2,109-kilometer quantum communication experiment network, which is an information network that ink women dare not touch. Otherwise, it will Someone was found to have moved the information.

Quantum communication network has absolute security and is the best solution for network information security.

Once the quantum network is completed, the information has absolute confidentiality, and there is no need to worry about artificial intelligence monitoring and information security.

In addition to the above benefits, quantum computers have many advantages.

Quantum is also multi-state, giving it a very good non-logical operation.

Chen Mo has always believed that quantum theory is the most feasible way to let the ink girl evolve and possess human thinking and emotion. In addition to powerful computing power, quantum mechanics is the most mysterious physics theory, suitable for creation without any reason.

The uncertain polymorphic properties of quantum mechanics are similar to human thinking, and are the most mysterious and fascinating aspects of quantum mechanics.

Einstein believes that God does not cast a scorpion, and everything in the universe is certain and regular. But quantum mechanics proves that God not only casts a scorpion, but also places that humans cannot see.

In Chen Mo's current cognition, quantum mechanics is almost the most mysterious theory of the universe.

Chen Mo sometimes thinks about Shu Lao. The highest task of the science and technology library is related to quantum theory, but that is not the question he should think now.

At this stage, it is necessary to take the basic theory step by step, and other more advanced technologies in the technology library can be completed better and faster.

With the theory and design principles of quantum computers and quantum chips, Chen Mo began to digest the technical theory. He did not know how long it took to open his eyes from the sofa.

The ink girl is sitting next to him and watching him seriously.

"How long have I slept?" Chen Mozhen's temple.

"Three hours." said the ink girl.

"It’s been a long time."

Chen Mo sat up and looked at the time. I didn't expect the theory that was digested in the science and technology library to be unconscious for three hours.

"Go home first, it's time to get off work, study tomorrow."

chapters.title: Chapter 645: : Party Plans
chapters.body:
Chapter 645: : Party Plans

Eva sat in the White House of the President's White House, with a calm face and frowning.

She is the new president, the daughter of the former president, the model, and after her father was elected, she entered the political circle and became the first princess. Since the stepmother did not like communication and did not understand politics, she almost did the first lady. 'work.

Travel with your father or travel on behalf of your father to maintain their international relations.

Model-born, also a socialite, she is good at communication, she is in the political circle, and she has gained prestige and exposure in various international affairs. In ordinary country affairs, she also often contacts, as her father's think tank and even an assistant to help.

In a few years, she has long been familiar with the routines of the political circle.

In this election, she accumulated enough prestige, and she also had the resources accumulated by her father. With absolute advantage, she successfully took over her father's stick and entered the White House.

But now the world situation is very troublesome.

The emergence of controlled nuclear fusion technology has brought a new reshuffle process to the world economy and pattern.

Since China’s successful manned landing on the moon and the marching ant group announced the successful development of the 氦-3 resources, Huaxia is now the leader of global technology. Although they are not willing to admit it, they are half a step behind.

Maybe not just a half step.

On the desk in front of her is the satellite image of the Flying Ant Center, which was sent by the Intelligence Bureau. This behemoth, advanced to deploy space-based weapon platform ‘Falcon’ in space.

This marching ant group is much more troublesome than they think.

"Nick, how is progress in controlled nuclear fusion technology?" Eva looked at Nick.

Nick and others, her father's legacy of government governance, "legacy", enough capacity, in the early days of her adaptation to the president, can give her a lot of help.

“The research report is only one step away from success. But there is still a problem, that is, superconductors and some material problems. Controlled nuclear fusion must be superconductors, the institute is transforming the fusion device, and now it is ready to experiment with low temperature superconductors. verification……"

Nick said seriously.

"I want funds?" Eva asked.

"Yes."

Nick shrugged and didn't expect Eva to know so quickly. But Eva is smart, and his think tank doesn't have to be as hard as his father used to be.

"Give them, no matter what method, in the shortest possible time, let the controlled nuclear fusion technology reach commercial standards." Eva said coldly.

China is in control of controlled nuclear fusion technology, and they do not, this is a hurdle.

After she took office, she chose a different style from her father. She did not choose to confront China, but chose to be strong.

She studied the situation in China, and now they can't hold on to China. The confrontation has no use, but it brings losses to themselves.

The world is shuffling, and only they are strong. In this shuffle, they can take more benefits.

“Is artificial intelligence now able to crack the termite system?” Eva asked.

They have spared no effort in monitoring the global network. With artificial intelligence, they will have the hope to control the global Internet. But since the previous viral crisis, termite systems have become very popular.

In particular, some important enterprises and individuals, as well as most of China's markets, have already popularized termite systems.

If artificial intelligence can't control the termite system, they can't achieve it.

"Or not."

"Is it still not okay?" Eva sighed and knocked on the information on the table: "What do you think of the marching ant group?"

"Even if we are not prepared to confront them positively, we must maintain our sense of existence. Otherwise, the global vision will be attracted to China, and our status and influence will disappear faster. We need to let the outside world know that we are still very Strong," Nick said.

"Yeah." Eva nodded lightly: "Explore artificial intelligence technology breakthroughs."

......

The image captured by the satellite is transmitted to the network.

For a time, it stirred up an uproar.

The marching ant group has been able to develop the 氦-3, and now it is building a large aircraft again, probably as a means of transporting lunar funds for building a lunar base.

The development of lunar resources has entered the acceleration phase?

China's marching ant group is now a standout, and there is no other way than the envy of the outside world.

With the rise of China and the troubles of controlled nuclear fusion technology, the relationship between the United States and the European Union has long been worse than before. Under the strength of a single country, it is impossible to make a marching ant group.

The news of the mysterious big planes of the marching ant group did not take long, and the United States also showed no small movements.

The American Artificial Intelligence Lab announced that it has made breakthroughs in artificial intelligence technology and successfully developed advanced artificial intelligence that can assist humans in scientific research.

As soon as the news came out, it immediately grabbed the limelight of the mysterious big plane of the marching ant group.

Artificial intelligence technology has the achievements of the artificial intelligence of the marching ant group. In recent years, many countries and large enterprises have used artificial intelligence as the most important technology to study.

However, although there are breakthroughs, there are breakthroughs in life assistants, autonomous driving, intelligent language, and human-machine communication.

Now the United States has announced that advanced artificial intelligence can assist humans in scientific research.

This news shocked the world.

In the past, they only guessed that the marching ant group had achieved such terrible success, which was assisted by artificial intelligence. Now the United States has announced this truth and determined this fact.

The outside world has already been optimistic. Next, the United States will enter the stage of the big explosion of science and technology.

"This **** American is really shameless."

The Prime Minister's Office of the island country, Anbei face black.

He knows that the artificial intelligence announced by the United States was taken from his hands through shameless pressure on sanctions.

When I think about it, I feel like I’m in a hurry. During this time, he wants to kill those shameless people all the time.

Self-directed and self-produced a play, framed them, robbed them of their technology, and they also compensated. Now it is still announced that artificial intelligence is the result of their own.

If he can, he can't wait for them to disappear from the earth.

But no one doubts their words. Because the United States' scientific and technological strength has been leading the global development, it has only recently been surpassed by China, but they are still very strong.

"Long Yi, how is the technology cracked by Tianzhao on the marching ant group?"

I am too lazy to read the news again. The more I look at the liver, the more I have lost the newspaper in my hand, drink tea and force myself to calm down.

After the breakthrough of the Azure, with the ability to assist in research and development, they will focus on the reverse cracking of the technology of the marching ant group.

At present, the marching ant group, the main technology, represents the highest level of global technology. If they can crack those technologies and be mastered by them, they will not be able to keep up with the pace of China's technological development.

“Hardware technology is easy to crack, but the software technology of the marching ant group is very difficult,” said Sato Ryuichi.

"How to say?"

"We reversed their robot design and holographic projection design. But the soul of the machine is software, artificial intelligence, and we can't crack it."

Sato Ryuichi said truthfully.

"And, they have long known that there will be a cracked day, the technical architecture and materials that can be cracked, and the marching ant group has applied for a patent. But there is some good news, we can master and use this technology, but it is impossible to use them to make a profit. And already."

"War robot?"

"We don't have a war robot, so we can't know its technology, design and materials. But we designed our own war robot through the sky. We let the artificial intelligence team, for the war robot, modify the artificial intelligence program, preliminary test, The combat effectiveness is good, much stronger than the average soldier. When mature, the combat power will be better."

"Once mature, let the Mt. Fuji base, a large-scale secret production of war robots."

There is a dangerous light in An Bei’s eyes.

"The world pattern is changing, there are signs of chaos, and perhaps a fire point will trigger the next global reshuffle war. When it is ready, we will not have to be subject to the **** Americans after the shuffle. And they are on an equal footing."

......

"We are not involved in this technical competition. We will first break the technology of the marching ant group and the technology we originally developed, and thoroughly understand those technologies to prepare for the future."

The Russian president has a majestic look with a wise look.

Sitting in front of his eyes, there are Russian presidential science and technology consultants, the president of the Academy of Sciences, the minister of the technical department, and the scientists of the weapons research and development department, all of which are important tasks in the field of science and technology.

After the disintegration of the Soviet Union, Russia was pulled back from the brink of collapse to maintain the president of today's powerful position. He has the wisdom and power to be stronger than any other world leader.

They have been blocked by the United States and Europe for a long time, and their national strength is getting weaker.

Now that fossil energy prices have plummeted, their losses are not small.

This is why he wants agents to use whatever means and rob the island country of artificial intelligence.

That one, he bet on it.

Artificial intelligence assisted scientific research, optimized controlled nuclear fusion devices, and successfully helped the weapons research and development department to develop several long-stayed weapon technologies.

The technological breakthroughs are much faster, and now they have signs of restoring their glory. The Americans stared at the marching ant group and stared at China. They wanted to be technically not lost to them. As everyone knows, they have already lost.

They don't participate, they develop quietly, and as long as they are forbearing enough, there will always be them erupting, and when it is a blockbuster.

At this time, it is not suitable, and there is no need to participate in this technology competition.

"Tell me when the war robot is designed," said the Russian president.
