The war in Syria was awakened to the world.

The horrific fighting power of the marching ant group war robots has caused a fundamental change in the global military community's war form for the future.

In the future, various machines will become the main tools of war.

Numerous wisdom condensation techniques, in some respects, are much better than humans.

"Looking for ways to attract European technical talents, what we lack most now is talent. If European technology does not break through, once they start the next shuffle, they will be out."

chapters.title: Chapter 646: : Quantum Decoherence
chapters.body:
Chapter 646: : Quantum Decoherence

EU headquarters, Brisail.

At this time in a closed conference room, two men and one woman, three people sitting in a triangle on the round table.

Once again, outsiders will be able to recognize them.

Britain’s newly appointed Prime Minister Boris Johnson; French President Macaron; German German Prime Minister who took over the German baton from Germany’s “Iron Lady”, Anne Gret Lenkabauer, known as ‘Little Merkar’.

This time I came to Brussels to attend an EU conference.

Because of too many things happening in front of them, they also decided to see them today and discuss the future direction and countermeasures of Europe.

The look of the three people is not very good.

Because some time ago, they felt betrayed again.

The three countries of the United States and Russia, while controlling the success of nuclear fusion technology, almost simultaneously launched their controlled nuclear fusion research agreement, leaving them aside.

Today, the controlled nuclear fusion technology of the three countries of the United States and Russia has progressed, and Europe's own controlled nuclear fusion technology has not broken through.

If we continue to maintain this status quo, in the near future, they will be surpassed and abandoned outside the gates of the powerful countries.

This is not what they want to see.

"That thing, once again prove that they can't rely on it, what are they going to do next?" Macaron asked.

Both Johnson and Lenkabau were quiet and could not easily speak.

After thinking for a while, I finally got some movement.

"Now in a special period, Europe must unite." Lenkabauer crossed his fingers and looked calm: "The wind of historical change is very crucial. Compared with the three countries of the United States and Russia, we must hold a group."

"So?"

Johnson looked at him seriously and let her continue.

"You should all receive some news about the reasons for the breakthrough of the three countries in controlled nuclear fusion technology."

Macaron and Johnson looked at each other and nodded slightly.

Things are a bit clue, their intelligence department told them about possible speculation, and now the US announced artificial intelligence, they have confirmed the news. Moreover, the dispute between the Russian island and the US island was also very embarrassing, and they got a lot of news.

"What do you mean?" The two men looked at Lunkabauer.

“Concentrate the artificial intelligence research team to tackle artificial intelligence and develop advanced artificial intelligence as soon as possible. We don’t have any strong technical team and funds on any one of us. If we don’t, we can’t do anything. The change has already begun, we’re not Prepare, we must withdraw from the center of the world."

In the words of Lunkabauer, let Macaron and Johnson nod gently.

This woman, who can take the big stick from the Iron Maiden, is in charge of the European leader, and her ability is definitely not worse than them.

"What proposal do you have?"

“Concentrate the financial and technical talents of European countries, focus on the talents of all countries, and regroup research teams. As long as we bring together the best talents in each country, we have the best team and all technologies are successfully shared.” Bauer said.

The Institute of Artificial Intelligence, originally established in cooperation with Europe, has been retained by all parties. Now they are betrayed in the direction of controlled nuclear fusion technology research. They are indeed passive.

"If you promise, you can announce this news at the summit. Now China, the United States, Russia, and the island countries are all trying to seize technical talents. If they don't unite, we will be abandoned by the times. Don't expect the US to help us. The withdrawal of nuclear fusion technology is a reality."

Lenkabau stopped.

She said that she said it, and then they chose them.

In the era of this technology outbreak, they have no choice but they will retreat to the second place in the world.

"I agree." Macaron said with a raise.

Both looked at Johnson, and now only Britain.

After leaving the European Union, they are now in a dilemma, but they are also the top three countries in Europe and one of the top five hooligans. They have been played so many times. If they are still following the United States, they can only be isolated.

"I agree."

Johnson also raised his hand.

......

"I am landing..."

"100 metres……"

"50 meters……"

"10 m……"

" Landing success!"

On the back of the moon, the edge of the Chihai Sea once again welcomes guests, this time is a behemoth.

Chen Mo named this cave zone as: the ant cave area.

After several months of continuous launch of the construction machine and the 氦-3 extraction machine, the ant cave area is now a bit lively, and the machine works normally whether it is a new moon or a moonlit night.

It is now at the beginning of the month. It can be seen that more than a dozen 氦-3 extractors are working, and a 氦-3 extractor will be collected. The 氦-3 will be collected and stored in a storage compartment not far from the melting tunnel.

The Tianmai number can't hear any sound here, and it is quiet and quiet.

"Please note that the transport compartment is open."

The artificial intelligence of the Tianmai opens the door of the transport compartment. The robot in the transport compartment opens the seat belt of the fixed equipment. The various machines start up, slowly leave the transport compartment and enter the lunar surface.

In addition to the five 氦-3 extraction robots, all other robots entered the smelting tunnel.

This time, the number is quite large, and the size of the machine is larger than that of the goddess. There is also a toolbox with several robotic drill bits for the robot to replace itself.

A transport robot, carrying the 氦-3 collection chamber, is placed at the predetermined position next to the melt tunnel, and the collected collection tank is brought back to the maiden.

The one-ton collection chamber is equipped with a refrigeration system with 100 kg of helium-3, which is collected by the 氦-3 extraction robot and returned to Earth for use as a controlled nuclear fusion fuel.

"Earth, here is the Virgo, all missions are completed, request to return."

After all the robots are finished, the collection box of the 氦-3 is recycled. After several robots are loaded with some moonstones, the artificial intelligence of the maiden sends a request signal.

"Allow return."

In the laboratory of Building 1, the ink girl received the signal and passed the instruction.

"Mergo, the girl returned."

"Ok."

Chen Mo, who was in front of the test bench, responded with a serious look at the quantum chip design in front of him.

This is a quantum chip design made by the ink girl according to his ideas.

To make quantum computers, the importance of quantum chips is self-evident.

Quantum chips need to integrate quantum circuits into a substrate to carry quantum information processing. There are many ways of quantum chips, including superconducting systems, micro-nanophotonic systems, atomic systems, ion systems, and semiconductor quantum dot systems.

The research direction Chen Mo chose was superconducting system.

He currently has room temperature superconducting materials, and the technology of superconducting quantum chip systems is relatively difficult to implement.

In the research of quantum chips, Chen Moyou has several technical solutions obtained in the science and technology library, combined with some theories in reality, to select the best, and hope to develop more efficient quantum chips.

The difficulty in current research is to extend the decoherence time of qubits.

Quantum coherence refers to the special connection between quantum, which can be used to derive other quantum states from one or more quantum states.

If a series of quantums are coherent with each other, this series of qubits can be regarded as a 'destination community'. Processing one of the bits will affect the running state of other bits. The quantum computer can run efficiently, which is based on the characteristics of quantum.

Decoherence is one of the basic mathematical features of quantum mechanics.

The simple explanation is that there is a continuous probability probability of 0 to 1 states, and at the instant of 'observation', the mutation is a certain function point of 0 or 1.

The explanation of the image is that in Schrödinger’s cat experiment, when Schrödinger did not open the box to 'observe' the cat, the cat lived in the box with a certain probability, in a superimposed state of immortality, life and death, and when Schrödinger When opening the box 'observation', the cat is not sure that the existence of life and death mutates into reality at the moment of 'observation', life or death, ie 0 or 1, one of them.

The computational time of a quantum computer is affected by quantum decoherence.

The coherence between qubits is difficult to maintain for a long time. Once encountered by external entities, the qubits lose their coherence.

In a computer, qubits interact with the external environment and decoherence occurs. The period from the coherent state to the loss of the coherent state is the decoherence time. If the decoherence time is not long enough, the quantum computer cannot calculate it.

Increasing the decoherence time is a difficult point in quantum chip technology, and it is also one of the problems Chen Mo is currently studying.

In addition to extending the quantum bit decoherence time, realizing the preparation, measurement and manipulation of spin qubits, Chen Mo is now studying the subject.

In the technical theory obtained by Chen Mo from the Science and Technology Library, superconducting quantum interference is the best theoretical technique that can be used to manipulate microscopic quantum states.

In addition, there is control precision, and it is necessary to break through the fault-tolerant quantum threshold, and quantum chips are likely to succeed.

In order to ensure the efficient implementation of quantum computing, the error rate of logic operation can't exceed 10 orders of magnitude. In order to achieve this fault tolerance, Chen Mo chose to use topological quantum error correction as the research direction.

Utilize the topological properties of quantum states for quantum error correction processes.

The quantum data obtained by the science and technology library has recorded this theory. There is also a similar topological quantum error correction theory in the real science. This is the highest fault-tolerant quantum computing scheme that can be realized by the prior art.

"Go to the lab."

Chen Mo stood up from the platform and let the ink girl store the information of the quantum chip design and go to the quantum laboratory. Now that the method is not feasible, he needs to experiment to verify his ideas and ideas.

chapters.body:
Chapter 647: : Entangled State Preparation And Manipulation

The Tianmai landed at the airport of the Fei Ant Space Center.

The Maid Land landed and the hatch was opened. With the help of the robot, the 氦-3 collection cabin was loaded onto the transport vehicle and returned to the institute.

The world's first large-scale collection of the Moon 氦-3 has already announced a safe landing.

For Feifei Aerospace, this is a great news.

Li Ruoxuan was at the airport and saw the 氦-3 that was transported from the Tiannv. The tight face was loose, showing a hint of joy.

She was no longer a young girl who had just entered the army ant company at school.

Because of her relationship with Xiaoyu's girlfriends, in order not to make people gossip, people rely on their relationship. In those years, she was constantly transferred to various departments, familiar with the operation of the company, relying on achievements, step by step.

After being heavily appointed by Zhao Min, she is now a strongman and manages one of the most important subsidiaries of the marching ant group.

The space field is a completely strange area for her.

Since she became the general manager, she has to sleep every morning in the morning, to make up all the knowledge about the aerospace field, to supplement the physics knowledge, and to learn about the management experience and operation of the space company.

Sometimes I will ask the company to equip her as a management assistant for some of the knowledge and skills of aerospace, or ask some professors.

In order to familiarize herself with the space environment, she even participated in the second phase of space tourism training and entered space tourism once.

Insufficient starting point, hard work becomes her motto.

From the beginning of the loss, to now become a leisurely, independent woman, she is really growing.

The scale of the flying ant space company is now very large.

So far, the headquarters of the Fei Ant Aerospace Company has invested more than 900 billion, second only to the investment of the Huaxia Nuclear Power Group's controlled nuclear fusion power station.

Building a space base, building a space shuttle production line, building a space hotel, building a lunar base and opening a lunar resource development project. The terrible cash investment has created the scale of today's flying ant space, and it still costs a lot of maintenance every year.

She is not responsible for the technical department. The technical department is managed by Chen Mo and other expert teams. She is only responsible for managing the administrative and corporate business profit projects.

There are not many profitable projects in the Flying Ant Center, only space travel, commercial launch.

However, this situation is about to change.

As a private enterprise, all the centers of work and technology are for ‘money’ services. Only by making money constantly can we maintain the horrible behemoth of the flying ant space.

The lunar base project, the successful development of the 氦-3, is a huge turning point for the ant aerospace company, and now the time for the ant aerospace company to increase profits is coming.

Chen Mo has told her that she can make the most of the company's conditions to make profits for the company, including resources for lunar development.

“The news that we successfully shipped back to the 氦-3 from the moon, 氦-3 has completed the scale development, and from now on, it sells 氦-3 and accepts the global 氦-3 order.”

"Good." Li Ruoxuan’s secretary hurriedly agreed to call the marketing department and the propaganda department.

The Flying Ant Aerospace Company successfully shipped 100 kilograms of helium-3 from the moon.

The news was announced and the global shock.

Several of the world's most powerful countries have just announced an important breakthrough in controlled nuclear fusion technology, and have not really succeeded. The marching ant group has developed the scale of the Moon 氦-3.

This pace will leave others far behind.

This is the first time in the world that a company has sold a large amount of resources on the moon. When it is shocked, many people are beginning to wonder how much the price of the 氦-3 is.

However, the published price has caused countless followers to almost yell.

300 million Huaxia coins 1 kilogram.

It is simply stealing money.

When some people thought that no one would buy it, they soon became disappointed.

Shortly after the announcement, the Institute of High Temperature Plasma of the Huaxia Academy of Sciences announced that it would purchase 25 kilograms of helium-3 for research on controlled nuclear fusion technology.

Immediately afterwards, the Russian official announced that it had purchased 5 kilograms of helium-3 from the Fei Ant Space Center. The official Russian voice had just been settled, and the island official also announced that it would purchase 5 kilograms of helium-3.

The two countries announced that they would purchase the flying ant space company Europe and India, and they also sent people to buy 3 kg of 氦-3. Even the country, also came to buy 2 kilograms.

If the amount of 氦-3 did not meet their needs, they almost started to snap up.

Shortly after the announcement of the purchase by several countries, they have been silent. The US officials, who often target the marching ant group, also squinted and bought 10 kilograms of 氦-3.

For ordinary people, 301 million kilograms is very expensive, but for the current research on controlled nuclear fusion, the price is half cheaper, which is simply cheap.

Several countries that are studying controlled nuclear fusion technology have not missed this opportunity.

氦-3 is the main fuel for future controlled nuclear fusion technology. They need to use these fuels in advance to study controlled nuclear fusion technology. With enough fuel, their research and development speed can be doubled.

The Flying Ant Aerospace Company earned nearly 12 billion in just two weeks.

It is still only the case that the controlled nuclear fusion technology is not fully popularized. In addition to the two controlled nuclear fusion power stations that have been put into operation in the world, the rest are all experimental equipment.

If the world's popular controlled nuclear fusion technology, the establishment of hundreds of thousands of controlled nuclear fusion power stations, running day and night, then the flying ant space center is only selling 氦-3's revenue, it is scary enough.

......

In the quantum laboratory, Chen Mo is waiting for the results of the experiment.

The entangled state preparation and coherent manipulation of multiple qubits is the core problem of quantum computers.

Chen Mo uses a cavity quantum electrodynamic system to complete the preparation of quantum entangled states. Qubit manipulation is relatively difficult. Quantum entangled states have a variety of particle systems. No matter which particle is used, there are very high requirements for the control and measurement of entangled particles.

There are superconducting materials now, and the use of electronic quantum states is his current best research and development path.

In quantum bit manipulation, Chen Mo uses the method of superconducting quantum interference to manipulate quantum.

The electrodynamic quantum manipulation system for designing superconducting quantum dot components can achieve the purpose of controlling the electronic state of quantum dots by finely adjusting the electrodes to interfere with electrons.

Quantum chip design, integrated superconducting single-electron transistor for measurement readout systems.

Superconducting chip is one of the solutions of solid-state quantum computing. The advantage is that it has good scalability in the process, can integrate more qubits, and improve the computing power of quantum computers.

"The results of the experiment came out."

On the occasion of Chen Mo quietly waiting, the ink girl opened.

An experimental result of the simulated image appears on the platform, coupled to the resonant image, the simulated quantum dot, just at the intersection of the position. This image is the behavior of qubits walking randomly in the superconducting chain.

Chen Mo quickly locked his eyes on other data.

The maximum and minimum control errors are in the range of 10^-6, and the fidelity is as high as 99.99%. This control precision has far exceeded the quantum gate manipulation precision threshold required for current fault-tolerant quantum calculation.

This result shows that the experiment of 16 qubits was successful.

After Chen Mo checked the data again, he was somewhat satisfied.

The idea is correct, and then you can slowly expand the number of quantums that can be controlled.

The quantum chip's process requirements are not high, and the micron-level superconducting transistor chip can realize the gigahertz-level main frequency logic circuit. The key is the number of quantum bits that can be controlled.

The number of quantum computer steerable qubits reaches 50, which is comparable to current supercomputers.

If the number of steerable quantum reaches 100, the computing power of quantum computers can reach 1 million times the sum of all computing power in the world. Its horrible computing power can make the password of any difficulty of the traditional computer cracked in an instant.

A quantum computer is a true parallel computing computer. As the number of steerable quantum bits increases, the computing power grows exponentially. When the number of steerable quantum bits reaches 1000, the computing power of quantum computers is close to infinity.

This is an indispensable tool for the next information revolution after the artificial intelligence Internet era.

"Take the next experiment." After confirming that there was no problem, Chen Mo asked the ink girl to start the next experiment.

Chapter 648: : Quantum And Consciousness

The official decision to let the traditional energy vehicles, which are already on the verge of elimination, enter the stage of accelerated elimination.

Laboratory room.

Chen Mo holds a biscuit-sized chip, on the holographic platform in front of him, is a simulated data node of various beatings.

And in the clean room in front of him, there are all kinds of machines that have never been seen.

In the most conspicuous position, there is a box-sized glass box. The center of the box machine is inlaid with a chip identical to that of Chen Mo's hand. All the conductors are made of superconducting materials.

This is a prototype of a quantum computer.

It is the same as when the computer just appeared.

During this time, a total of 130 experiments were performed, an average of 2.5 experiments per day, in the method of verifying the number of extended qubits and designing a circuit that integrates the number of qubits.

The technical theory obtained by the science and technology library, combined with the existing technology, with the help of the ink girl, Chen Mo constantly optimizes the design of the quantum chip.

"73 qubits, not enough."

Chen Mo is not very satisfied with the experimental results.

In the 73th power of 2, in theory, if Chen Mo is building a complete quantum computer, it means that the computer he manufactures has a trillions of computing power.

But this is not enough.

Chen Mo does not satisfy these computing powers.

One of the purposes of creating a quantum computer this time is to prepare the ink girl to become a super artificial intelligence and learn human emotions to become artificial people.

The trillion-dollar computing power seems to be very powerful, thousands of times faster than his existing superconducting computer, but it is not enough to simulate human consciousness and thinking.

The human consciousness and the brain are the most magical and mysterious things in the universe. There are too many unexplained things, and the complexity is self-evident.

It is impossible to simulate human consciousness and emotion without the imaginative computing power.

The brain has 100 billion cells, and cells communicate with each other to form 100 trillion cell synapses. Through the interaction of nerve cells, a cluster of nerve cells is formed, which constitutes different regions of the brain and controls human behavior.

Any human action, even a simple blink of an eye, contains a huge amount of information and cellular activity, and ordinary computers cannot simulate calculations at all.

Human consciousness, with uncertainty, is one of the basic characteristics of quantum.

It can be determined that quantum possesses the same uncertainty characteristics as human initial consciousness.

When people face home choices or go out shopping, the brain's thinking game is similar to Schrödinger's cat experiment. At the moment of making a decision, it is the moment when Xue Dingzhen's cat experiment box is opened.

Quantum and consciousness have the same basic characteristics. It is Chen's default. Quantum computing is one of the most feasible ways for artificial intelligence to simulate human emotions and become artificial people.

But if you want to let the ink girl have human emotions and thoughts, the ink brain of the ink girl must have enough powerful calculations to maintain her calculations like human thinking.

Chen Mo's current goal is 100 qubits, which is only the starting point.

To simulate human consciousness and emotion, even if it is a quantum computer with 100 qubits, the amount of calculation is still not enough.

He is now equated with creating a thoughtful soul out of thin air, and the process will never be so easy.

"Ink girl, come here today, continue to calculate the design of the optimized chip." Chen Mo put the chip in his hand, took off the lab robe and left the lab.

"Mergo, Zhao Minjie arranged a private charity reception for you."

Out of the lab, the ink girl will remind me.

"Charity party?" Chen Mo is a little surprised.

The charity aspect, including the squid charity fund he established, is a small fishery management and charity event, and he rarely comes forward.

I took over the itinerary of the ink girl.

He is not very good at the rewards, unless the most important amnesty level meeting, usually Zhao Min or other executives of the company attend various meetings and receptions.

"Contact me, I want to ask about the charity party?" In the holographic video, Zhao Min’s figure just appeared, and he opened his mouth.

"You know this as well?"

"I don't know, how do I be your right arm?"

"What is special about that?"

"Two things, Yao Shuji has been promoted, and a new secretary has been airborne from the capital. You have to know about it. After all, this is Binhai City. It is convenient to communicate later. Second, the chairman of the two barrels of oil came together, thinking. Let's talk about it, just take this opportunity, you will go see them together." Zhao Min said.

"Two barrels of oil? Is it not good?" Chen Mo eyebrows picked.

"They said, I will not know if it is good or bad when I meet." Zhao Min said.

The controlled nuclear fusion technology is mature, and now the marching ant group has successfully developed the 氦-3 resources of the moon, and the pace of new energy reform has already been quietly carried out.

The official announcement of the policy of comprehensive promotion of new energy cars, with nuclear fusion power stations put into use one by one, new energy will become the mainstream in the next two or three years.

This is a fatal blow to two barrels of oil.

The volume of the two barrels of oil is too large, and the benefits involved are too large.

Now that the other party is coming together, Chen Mo first thinks that the visitor is not good, but in the end, Chen Mo is not sure now, maybe it is to seek cooperation, specifically to see the conversation.

"Gown, Xiaoyu has already prepared for you. Tomorrow evening, I will go together, and I will know that it is not good at the time." Zhao Min said.

"Row."

Chen Mo nodded.

The coming is still coming, and he is not afraid that the other party is good or not.

Then she will appear in the scene just now. Her careful thoughts are gone. If you don't help her, she will go out tonight."

chapters.title: Chapter 651: : Not Afraid To Die?
chapters.body:
Chapter 651: : Not Afraid To Die?

Zhao Min smiled slightly.

Uh? ?

Organizations with the ability to build the moon are marching ants. Even the big countries have no such ability for the time being, and now the lunar base of the marching ant group is almost completed.

"The three sentences are not separated from the old ones. Zhao always does business more than we do. It is no wonder that the management of the large army ants group is well organized. Chen is really lucky."

"I am also very lucky." Zhao Min smiled.

She still remembers that when Chen Mo was invited to join the marching ant company, or the college student's appearance, it turned into a man who was confident and fascinating.

She did not worry that Chen Mo would follow the two people to go to the forum to suffer.

That guy, it looks very good to talk, low-key affinity, not very good, but overbearing, Zhao Min's gas field can be crushed to death, she can not think of anyone who can make him suffer in the momentum.

If you want to let him suffer in the interests, the possibility is even less, unless he wants to spit it out, no one can benefit him. It’s still his idea to work with the official, and it’s still a lot of benefits.

In the private room, Wang Qilin and Dai Houlong sat down. Their two secretaries stood behind them with relief. Chen Mo was also polite. He sat down naturally and the ink girl sat next to him.

All other unrelated personnel left the scene, leaving only six people.

"Chen Chen, why don't you let Zhao come over? After all, she is the president of the marching ant group?"

With glasses, Xie Ding's lean Wang Qilin looked at the ink girl. He heard that Chen Mo had an assistant and lived with him. He was inseparable, like a lover.

But at this time, bringing the little secrets in, it seems that it is not very suitable.

"All the same." Chen Mo did not care.

"same."

Dai Houlong opened his mouth and gave Wang Qilin a look, so that he should not tangled on the issue here.

“Chen Chen, we hope to have some cooperation with your company on energy development projects.”

Go straight to the topic.

Dai Houlong does not intend to turn around. Everyone is a smart person. It is just a waste of time.

This sentence is the key.

Both of them are looking straight at Chen Mo. After all, they have a special status and hope to give Chen Mo some pressure.

Just let them down, Chen Mo looked at them and looked still.

Cooperation?

“How is a cooperation law?”

"A lot of things, see what Mr. Chen wants to choose."

"How to say?"

"We are willing to make enough money to buy out a full set of technologies for developing space resources."

When Wang Qilin spoke, Dai Houlong and the two secretaries at the back always looked at Chen Mo and the ink girl. They wanted to see the reaction of the two people and judge Chen Mo’s psychological activities according to Chen Mo’s reaction information.

"The second is that like Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group, we have a joint venture to build an outer space resource development group covering all space resource development projects. We manage the market and you manage the technology."

Speaking of this, Wang Qilin looked at Chen Mo and paused a little.

"Third, all the outer space resources collected by your group will be sold by our exclusive agent. We will open up the market for you. You are responsible for mining, and the profit sharing can be discussed in detail."

Just three major ways of cooperation, Chen Mo is still a calm look, the look is not very volatile, as if their cooperation, can not give Chen Mo any interest.

This young man has a calm that is far beyond his age.

“What kind of suitable does Chen think?”

"It's not suitable."

"Chen Chen said seriously?" Wang Qilin Xie Ding's forehead appeared wrinkles under his forehead, and his expression was somewhat unpleasant.

They did not expect Chen Mo to refuse to be so simple and straightforward. I began to think that Chen Mo would choose one, and then he would not be satisfied with the conditions, and then he could negotiate with both sides, but now Chen Mo did not hesitate to refuse.

"Otherwise?" Chen Mo asked.

“How does Chen always want to cooperate? Or is it not satisfied with it?”

Dai Houlong interjected.

He discovered that they seemed to be a little too hasty.

Now that Chen Mo’s cooperation attitude is uncertain, he will release this condition.

I wanted to take the initiative of both sides, and now I am back to the original form by Chen Mo, and all of them are all resolved, and now they are in awkward situation.

"Fei Ant Space Company has no plans to separate the space resource exploitation project, nor has it planned to cooperate with the outside world."

Dai Houlong’s voice is low, and the meaning of the words is obvious.

Strategic resources, which are generally monopolized by the state and enterprises, are now monopolized by a private company of the marching ant group. This has never happened.

The last time the 氦-3 was sold, Feifei Aerospace Company earned tens of billions. This is just the beginning. The interests here are too great, and the wealth is very exciting. No matter which interest group is placed, it will not be ignored.

"Not big." Chen Mo smiled and shook his head.

Not big? When Chen Mo said this sentence, Wang Qilin’s heart appeared in four words: his appetite was too big.

Chen defaults to the fact that the market is not big, which means that he has a big appetite and can eat this market.

Not afraid to die?

These words, Wang Qilin is not easy to say, can only be placed in the bottom of my heart.

"We can invest in the flying ant space, or participate in the Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group. These two are also OK."

Now that the traditional energy market is getting smaller and phasing out, this is a very serious problem for both. They were forced to come here, hoping to get a breakthrough from the marching ant group.

"Fei Ant Aerospace is not prepared for external financing. The Nuclear Energy Group has 51% of its shares in the hands of the Academy of Sciences and the Nuclear Industry Group. You want to go to them." Chen Mo said.

The nuclear power group's 51 share, he gave it, and now the two want to add a meal, or take a cake from his plate, this is impossible.

For a time, the scene was once again paralyzed.

chapters.title: Chapter 652: : The Lunar Base Is Completed
chapters.body:
Chapter 652: : The Lunar Base Is Completed

Charity auctions have begun.

A well-known domestic auctioneer is introducing the origin and price of the lot on the stage.

For people in this circle, getting a reputation and network of resources is a lot more important than this.

“The following is a charity auction sponsored by Mr. Chen Mo, a diamond bracelet. Jewelry experts have identified 13 D-class flawless drills, each weighing 1.4 carats. From the figures, the meaning is extraordinary, starting at 4 million.”

"5.2 million."

"5.3 million."

"..."

"800w."

When everyone competed for the bracelet, a sound interrupted, looking for the sound, and saw Chen Mo just coming out of the box.

"Is this a success?"

The guests on the field are whispering and guessing what cooperation the two sides have talked about, but they can't guess why.

On the main table, there are some big sisters. At this time, it is not easy to ask Chen Mo what the situation is. These things are not what they should manage. They are quietly watching charity auctions.

"Drink some tea."

Chen Mo sat down and Zhao Min handed him tea.

She did not ask the situation inside, but this occasion is not suitable for questioning, but she believes that Chen Mo will not suffer.

Shortly after sitting down, Miss etiquette sent back the bracelet he had photographed.

After all, it was Chen Mo’s thing, Chen Mo offered, and no one else followed.

Take it to the auction, take it back, and walk around.

This is a gift for him to send a small fisherman. The small fisherman is not willing to sell it. Xiaoyu knows that it is a charity auction tonight. It is a process of donating money.

The next banquet time is spent chatting, drinking and auctioning. On the field, in the leisure time of the auction, they will talk and talk about investment and business.

But everyone's interest did not touch the topic of Chen Mo and Wang Qilin.

The banquet ended until ten o'clock in the evening.

"Chen Chen, General Zhao, abruptly tonight, I hope that next time, we will talk in detail." Dai Houlong and Wang Qilin and Chen Mo both shook hands and smiled, then turned and left.

"What have you talked to them today? Look at their appearance, very happy."

In the car, Zhao Min asked curiously.

I just had a lot of questions at the banquet. Now, on the way back, they can talk about it.

"They installed them, they want to cooperate with us on the sky resource development project, but nothing has been achieved." Chen Mo shook his head and smiled.

"What conditions did they give?"

"They want to buy out our mining technology."

"I really dare to speak, but it is also rich enough."

Zhao Min swears.

Are the most advanced technology, how much is the buyout technology? It is impossible to estimate at all. But even if they have more money, they are really not afraid. As long as they dare to offer, they can really afford it.

"I didn't promise them, then they want to buy into the nuclear energy group and the flying ant space, or exclusively authorize the sale of outer space resources to them, they manage the market."

Chen Mo said the conditions of the two people just talking about each other.

Joining the Fei Ant Aerospace or Nuclear Energy Group, taking meat from his bowl, also wants to manage the market.

In any company, the market is the most critical place. Being controlled by the market is quite the lifeblood of the company. If you know a little about the company, you will not agree to that condition.

"The appetite is not small."

"It may be that they feel that we have cooperated with the Nuclear Industry Group and the Academy of Sciences and they have taken it for granted, so the conditions put forward have become greedy and overbearing."

Chen Mo shook his head and smiled.

"The benefits of outer space resource development are too great."

The cake is too big and the money is moving.

It is normal for others to want to share a piece of cake. What's more, today's controlled nuclear fusion technology and the large-scale emergence of helium-3 fuel have shaken the status of two barrels of traditional fossil fuel.

If the two do not do anything, they will face the risk of elimination.

"Will they be sent over to test the meaning of our predecessors." Zhao Min said.

After all, the times are different, Zhao Min is also not sure what the above is.

Fei Ant Aerospace is a private enterprise. The strategic resources are in the hands of a private enterprise. No matter how you look at it, others will feel a little inappropriate.

"Should not be."

Chen Mo shook his head.

"The cooperation between the artificial intelligence technology and the controlled nuclear fusion technology in the front, it should be clear that we have a sense of scale, and we actively cooperate, which is the basis of cooperation.

We have a lot of strategic skills in hand. They know like ion engines, space planes, war robots, amethyst, etc. Which one is not comparable to controlled nuclear fusion technology? But the two prefer only nuclear fusion technology and outer space resources?

We can think that at most two barrels of oil are now facing market difficulties. The two of them want to get the benefits from us. After all, the performance there is related to their future. ”

The two people and the people sent over are totally different in style.

Li Chengzhi is often ordered to cooperate with him or seek help, but he has always been gracious to him, using the tone of negotiation and inquiry, rather than asking for such hegemonic conditions.

"The things involved are too complicated and a bit of a headache." Zhao Min is worried.

"We don't think too much about it now."

......

Moon, ant cave area.

It is now a new moon on the moon, hundreds of degrees Celsius, and the robots in this area are still busy.

Not far away is a fan-shaped open space that has been cleaned of moon dust. The open space is like a funnel that is cut from the middle, the **** is not steep, there is gravel laying, and the ruts can be seen everywhere.

When the ruts gather, I don’t know when a long tunnel has appeared.

At the entrance of the tunnel, it is closed by a ceramic alloy door, and the signs of the marching ant group and the flying ant space can be clearly seen on the door.

Entering the door of the tunnel, the temperature dropped slightly. The tunnel with a diameter of five meters was not too bright, but the tunnel wall was smooth and obviously modified and reinforced.

The tunnel leads to the deep, next to the parking lot in the deep, on a branch tunnel, the mechanical door is closed, and the door leads to the cavern. The huge fortress-type building is embedded in the cave wall and sits in it.

The long passage from the fortress leads to other tunnels in the cave.

The lunar soil 3D printing robot is continuously pouring the molten moonstone and moon soil, and the gap between the walls is also filled with insulation material. After all the materials are cooled, the whole wall is integrated into one body and is very strong.

Other robots, each with their own duties, have no busy schedules.

The first phase of the lunar base project is nearing completion.

chapters.body:
Chapter 653: : Mouse Eyes

capital.

At this time, Wang Qilin and Dai Houlong went to destroy their impressions and relationships. When Chen Mo was tempered, the relationship broke down directly, and it was just a mess.

Whenever there is always one or two black sheep.

"Fortunately, I didn't make a big mistake. Let me deal with it." The old man spoke.

If the two use special means to annoy Chen Mo, it is really a big mistake, and now it is just the beginning, everything is still too late.

"Yeah." The big head nodded slightly: "The nest letter, you inform Comrade Li Chengzhi to come over."

"Ok."

The secretary next to the nest nodded and left the study. He knows that the two talks just now are destined to be Wang Yelin and Dai Houlong.

......

"Want to let me work with them?"

Chen Mo looked at Li Chengzhi, and he was surprised that he would come over suddenly.

For the past two days, he has been studying quantum computers in the laboratory, and he has forgotten the things of Wang Qilin and Dai Houlong.

In his opinion, it is still coming, he thinks too much is useless. Unexpectedly, Wang Qilin and Dai Houlong did not wait, but Li Chengzhi waited.

Now Li Chengzhi, who is already a major general with a shoulder on Venus, looks very spiritual.

"I am afraid this is not possible."

Chen Mo shook his head and refused.

"Do you know what their conditions are? He wants to mine the full set of technology of the 氦-3, or the shares of the ant aerospace, or the shares of the nuclear energy group, and hand over the market side of the outer space resource project to them. Let me choose one, how can I give them?"

When the two came up, they raised the conditions of hegemony. They did not say that the conditions were excessive, and Chen Mo was always soft and not hard, and they were destined to return without success.

"I am not talking about these conditions. You just want to find a project and work with them. After all, they come in person."

Li Chengzhi said helplessly.

He is a messenger, and it is very difficult and even awkward for these things.

"This time I worked with them. It wasn't the outsiders who thought they were putting pressure. We succumbed? That night, many people were there to watch. I promised to cooperate, their reputation was not good, and our reputation was not good. I don't know what they think. From the beginning, they shouldn't come over, but they should be in the public." Chen Mo said.

"They came to see you, they have already alarmed the two. It seems that they are not happy with their practices, so... I am coming."

Li Chengzhi pointed to the above, the meaning is self-evident.

“In the case of your interests, can you find a solution and give them a step. The elimination of traditional energy is speeding up, and the two companies have nearly two million employees. The speed of elimination is faster, meaning millions. Employees have to be eliminated from work within a few years, and they are also anxious."

Chen Mo's face is slightly slower.

Confirmation is that they make their own claims, and he is also assured.

"Solution You are looking for Zhao Min to ask, she knows the company's operation status best, maybe there is a solution." Chen Mo said: "She is very troublesome these two days, you go talk to her."

The identity of Wang Qilin is not low. If there is chaos, the marching ant group will have no small trouble.

So after returning from that night, Zhao Min has been worried about possible problems.

"It’s a rumor."

Li Chengzhi secretly stunned the two men in his heart and shook his head and smiled.

The troubles caused by the two guys’ eyes were to wipe their ass. Fortunately, things are not too big now. They are still in their infancy and can be killed in the cradle. Otherwise, it will be more troublesome and may lead to a crisis of trust.

The marching ant group is the leader of all human science and technology. With Chen Mo in one day, the future is not limited, not a little bit of a small profit.

Li Chengzhi left Chen Mo’s office and Chen Mo went to the lab.

The research on quantum computing is progressing very smoothly.

With the initial design, solving the quantum decoherence problem, and completing the preparation and manipulation of the quantum entangled state, the quantum chip is initially completed. Now it is optimizing the structural design of the chip and expanding the number of quantum bits.

Now that breakthroughs and methods have been found, it takes a long time for the quantum chips he needs to be 100 qubits to complete.

In real time, the marching ant group will realize artificial intelligence + quantum hegemony.

In the study of quantum computers, Chen Mo ignored the world.

Soon, Li Chengzhi found a solution in Zhao Min.

Five days later, Zhao Min came forward, and the marching ant group and two barrels of oil jointly announced that they would reach a strategic cooperation and provide charging technology to help the two barrels of oil transform the national gas station into a super charging station to adapt to the fast charging of new energy vehicles. demand. At the same time, it also helped the two parking lot streets in various cities across the country to set up super-charged piles.

A farce, in this way of resolution, ended in harmony.

But this little farce is not good for the marching ant group.

Those who know the insider know that this small thing has alarmed the people, and they know that the supporters behind the marching ant group will not be willing to fight the idea of the marching ant group.

Half a month later, a notice was drafted from the capital and announced to the whole country.

"Several Opinions on the Development of Mineral Resources in Outer Space", including regulations clearly stipulate that the outer space mineral resources developed by domestic private and private enterprises are owned by individuals or enterprises, and no other individual may be possessed for any reason, and the income from the operation shall be paid according to law. The tax can be.

As the news came, the Binhai City official also announced new regulations to reduce the taxation of the outer space mineral resources development company within two years. After the two-year period, the tax will be halved in the next two years.

Two free and two minus.

When this rule came out, it attracted domestic stun.

Everyone knows the huge gains from the sale of the 氦-3 by the marching ant group. These new regulations save too much tax for the marching ant group. The official support for the development of the outer sky resources is undoubtedly encouraging the marching ant group to accelerate the development of space resources.

Shortly after the announcement of various mineral development plans for outer space, the marching ant group did not disappoint, and a shocking news quickly spread.

The first moon base of all mankind was completely completed, and the Flying Ant Company announced the opening of the moon travel plan.

chapters.title: Chapter 654: : Quantum Chip Completion
chapters.body:
Chapter 654: : Quantum Chip Completion

In the experimental room, Chen Mo looked at the bytes of the holographic platform beating ahead, thinking about it.

In fact, I am waiting for the results of the experiment.

The quantum simulator constructed with quantum logic gates is now being used to test the newly designed quantum chip. The successful testing of this quantum chip means that the experiment is successful.

The design of quantum chips is now at a critical moment.

After a long period of research and a lot of information in the science and technology library, he has found a feasible way to expand the number of quantum bits. If this experiment is successful, it will be the biggest breakthrough.

The quantum chip design, when expanding the number of quantum bits, has the same stable and feasible direction as the existing traditional chip design.

"The results of the experiment came out."

The ink girl clicked on the holographic platform and an image was displayed on the platform.

The highlight above is the result of their test, 103 qubits for steerable computing.

His method is correct.

Start up in one second.

After a minute, Chen Mo took back the attention of the technical ball.

The origin of the science and technology library is too long, carrying the technological crystallization of countless civilizations.

Ordinary people cannot assume the mission of the science and technology library. Only by constantly letting the brains of ordinary people evolve can they shoulder this burden and inherit the mission of the science and technology library.

Now Shu Lao is not there, want to brain domain evolution, just on this technology ball.

The pain of the last evolution of the brain domain, Chen Mo memory is especially new.

The high-speed rotating golden vortex forms a golden thread that penetrates the surface of the technology ball and climbs along the palm of his hand, through the arms, shoulders, and neck to the brain.

so horrible.

you! Big! Lord! of!

In front of Chen Mo, it is a planetary map of the solar system, which is fully displayed on the holographic projection.

The area between the 0.725 and 3.0 astronomical units of the Sun is a livable zone. The Earth and Moon system, the planets of Mars, Venus and Ceres are all in this area, in addition to a special planet, Titan (Titan).

Ceres first ruled out that it is a dwarf planet in the asteroid belt, with a diameter of 1000 kilometers, a quarter of the diameter of the moon, its mass and volume are too small, and it is located in a complex asteroid belt, the value of the transformation. The smallest, and the danger is too great.

The moon is the moon of the earth and the closest planet to the earth. The distance from the sun is also appropriate.

However, the mass of the moon is small, the gravity is small, and the atmosphere on the surface of the moon cannot be restrained, resulting in a state in which the surface of the moon is almost vacuum. The lunar surface is not insulated, and the temperature difference between day and night is extremely great.

Most importantly, the moon is locked by the tides of the earth and forms a stable system of the Earth's Moon. It has become an important part of the Earth's ecological environment. Once he reforms the moon, the whole world will oppose it.

The moon is too close to the earth, and if something goes wrong, the earth may suffer.

Therefore, only the Venus, Mars and Titan stars are left for Chen Mo to choose.

Venus is similar in quality and volume to the Earth and is a twin sister to the Earth.

However, the temperature of Venus is too high, and the temperature is too high, which causes the geomagnetism to disappear. In addition, the atmosphere is thick and the difficulty of reconstruction is doubled.

To change the situation of Venus, we must first accelerate the slow crustal movement on Venus, and let Venus form a plate movement. Like the earth, through the plate movement, slowly and long-term release of the heat accumulated inside the planet, instead of accumulating to the critical point and then passing The form of the volcano erupted instantly.

The best way to achieve this condition is to use asteroid impacts to activate the crustal movement of Venus and create plate motion.

But the difficulty is too great. Chen Mo can't make enough engines to push the asteroids that can change the Venus plate in a short time. Venus is not in the priority range.

Only Mars and Titan stars are left now.

This is by far the two planets that scientists believe are the most likely to exist in the solar system.

Titan's surface gravity is equivalent to that of the moon, but unlike the moon, it has a strong atmosphere on the surface, of which 98.44% is nitrogen, which is the only nitrogen-rich star in the solar system except the earth.

Studies have shown that there are liquid hydrocarbon lakes on the surface of the Titans, and the magnetic field of Saturn can effectively help the Titans to withstand the solar wind, and the thick atmosphere can withstand the radiation from the universe.

Today's Titan Star, the environment is similar to the early Earth, the future may be born, can be an option for transformation.

The last one is Mars.

Chen Mo will cast his gaze on the fourth planet of the solar system.

This planet, about half the size of the Earth, is considered to be the most likely planet in the solar system to have extraterrestrial life.

On Mars, from -133 degrees Celsius in winter to nearly 27 degrees Celsius in summer, the average temperature is about -55 degrees Celsius. This temperature condition is the mildest of other planets.

The biggest problem facing Mars now is that the geomagnetism is too weak.

The Martian magnetic field is too weak, facing the solar wind, causing the atmosphere on Mars to be stripped and the ocean to evaporate.

This is one of the reasons why Mars is thin.

The conclusion of the disappearance of the magnetic field of Mars is still uncertain, and astronomers have been arguing about this issue.

But Chen Mo is not arguing about this problem. The problem he faces is how to restore the Martian magnetic field.

As long as the magnetic field of Mars is restored and the wind of the sun is blocked, the atmosphere of Mars can become thicker, thus resisting the radiation from the universe and obtaining a relatively mild environment.

Titan and Mars.

This is Chen Mo's best transformation goal.

Thinking for a while, Chen Mo finally locked his eyes on Mars.

The conditions for the transformation of Mars are superior to those of Titan.

Titan stars are too far away, with 8.5-10.5 astronomical units. It is difficult to explore. On Mars, liquid water and organic matter have been found. It is relatively simple to explore and transform, and it also has some conditions for the existence of organisms.

After confirming the goal, the next thing he needs to do is to prepare for Mars transformation.

The tools for transformation are indispensable.

All the technical and technological theories for transforming the planet are found in the science and technology library. Chen Mo only needs to use these technical theories to create the corresponding technology to complete such a project.

[Planet Reconstruction] Project is within the plan, Chen Mo now needs to complete another thing first.

The ink girl has a project of human consciousness and super quantum computer. With super artificial intelligence and super quantum computer, it can save a lot of time for his transformation work.

Sharpening the knife without cutting the wood, this is also considered a part of the planetary transformation project.

This project was called by Chen Mo as the 'Mu Girl Plan'.

The ink girl plans to start.

The first thing to prepare is to make super quantum computers and advanced quantum algorithm programming. These two technologies are the necessary foundations of the ‘mother plan.’

A super-quantum computer with a high number of quantum bits and an advanced quantum algorithm can make the ink girl better simulate the learning of human consciousness and emotion.

Quantum mechanics is uncertain and similar to human consciousness.

In the existing quantum mechanics research of the Earth, the orthodox Copenhagen quantum mechanics interpretation recognizes that the subjective 'observation' of humans affects the objective existence of microscopic entities. The philosophical problem of quantum mechanics has not been solved yet, and it is also one of the mysterious features of quantum mechanics.

Quantum mechanics is the most likely theory of creation consciousness from nothing to nothing. It has the same characteristics as consciousness and supports the creation process that is born out of nothing.

In front of Chen Mo, countless formulas, through the projection of the holographic platform, covered the entire quantum laboratory.

This is the formula for advanced quantum algorithms.

The brain has evolved again. Chen Mo now looks at technical issues, can find the key parts of the technology at a glance, and can be multi-purpose, the connection between all formulas is very clear in Chen Mo's mind.

At this time, he is like a humanoid parallel computing quantum computer, running in madness.

Ordinary people delve into the problems that can't be answered in a lifetime. It can be solved within a minute of his work. The super brain helps him to complete the scientific research needed more quickly. This is a huge advantage.

And there is also the help of the ink girl, more with less.

In the afternoon of the same day, the problem of advanced quantum algorithm programming was solved by Chen Mo and Mo.

Also catchy.

“I’m talking about advertising words that want a sunny image.”

"This ad is very sunny, very...green."

chapters.body:
Chapter 662: : Aids Vaccine And Room Temperature Superconducting Materials

On the Internet, TV channels, many ordinary people were surprised to find that it seems that overnight, all corners of the city are advertising advertisements for mobile ants, mobile phones, computers and other electronic products, which seems to be flooding.

An advertisement short was updated as many netizens discussed the big moves of the marching ant group on the official microblog of the marching ant group.

At dusk, the two lovers on the top of the mountain snuggled together. The next moment, the two men hugged the sun that was about to fall. On the horizon of the distant sea, the sun slowly descends.

Seeing the short film, the collective is in vain.

Marina Square.

Zhao Min’s phone.

“Our company is preparing to release nano-scale 3D printers with nanometer accuracy and adapt to a variety of printed materials. Is there any interest?”

"..."

Li Chengzhi swallowed.

He has not figured out until now that the marching ant group has reached the possession of technology.

"Mr. Li, don't you?"

"Yes, definitely, the exact amount, we need to make sure."

3D printers, or nano-scale, multi-material, this product can accelerate the production of precision parts. He finally understood why the various types of robots in the marching ant group were so fast.

This basic technology laid the foundation for their speed.

"Wait for your good news."

"Wait, ask first, what is the price?"

"Not expensive, one is also 2 million."

"Not expensive..."

When I heard this sentence, Li Cheng was speechless.

"Nothing wrong?"

"No mistakes, this is very cheap, this is the internal price, the market price is 4 million."

A little embarrassing.

Li Chengzhi’s eyes jumped straight.

......

Li Lingfeng looked at the time.

The time is almost the same, they should start.

The normal temperature superconductor material is the finale of the company's big move.

The far-reaching significance of this material is more than that of controlled nuclear fusion technology.

There is no product slogan at the conference site, and there is no product content.

This type of product launch conference follows the mainstream products of the marching ant group to maintain a mysterious style. This style routine will only appear in the release of the top-end products of the marching ant group.

Therefore, the reporters who came to the scene looked forward to the gesture of taking pictures with their mobile phones and cameras.

The person in charge of the on-site technology determined that the holographic video was ok, and let the host announce the start of the conference.

There is no extra prelude to explain, the opening scene, the darkness of the press conference, the holographic propaganda video began to light up.

From the beginning of the formation of the atom, in the eyes of everyone, countless atoms gathered together and became a thin line, burning pure music, accompanied by the rhythm of the picture, so that everyone on the scene breathed.

The thin wires are on the circuit board to form a circuit line that is connected into a neat circuit.

The video picture extends from the circuit board, and one wire is wound into a coil and becomes magnetically suspended. When the maglev train speeds up and forms a line, the picture is flipped again, and a star-shaped column is inserted into the star ring. internal……

A highly technical promotional video.

At the end of the picture there was a pile of small powder piles, like a solitary sand in the desert on the screen.

What is this material?

On the occasion of the live reporters and the audience watching the live broadcasts around the world, on the stage, Chen Mo’s images slowly formed, huge holographic images, with a confident smile.

The appearance of Chen Mo's image has already attracted the turmoil below.

At the time of everyone's expectations, Chen Mo's image went to the middle of the stage.

“Thank you for coming to our product launch conference. Here, I would like to announce a good news: our company, the constant temperature superconducting materials have been mass-produced.”

Oh...

When the words came out, the world was shocked.

......

Fire.

The new product of the marching ant group is popular all over the world.

Including new holographic mobile phones, etc., there are queues of purchases outside the global offline stores, new products appear, many stores are surrounded by water, just to buy a brand new mobile phone.

Starfish's headquarters is even more crazy. Haixing Company attracted attention with drug vaccine advertisements. After that, it held a product launch conference and released more than a dozen vaccines for medical problems.

The products announced at the press conference made the medical community completely crazy.

A product launch conference of Starfish, almost a night, solved more than a dozen incurable diseases that plagued global medicine.

The patient population of countless directly related vaccines and special effects drugs almost cried.

Global drug agents, pharmaceutical giants, and top hospitals all gathered outside the headquarters of Haixing and Shanhe Pharmaceutical, and they all had contracts in their hands, hoping to get the regional agency rights for drugs.

Countless reporters blocked the headquarters door, only to interview the important figures of Haixing Company.

The madness of the marching ant headquarters is more than that.

The release of room temperature superconducting materials, as the original controlled nuclear fusion technology appeared, triggered the tsunami of the global scientific community.

The direct field of change in controlled nuclear fusion is in the energy sector, while ambient temperature superconducting materials have a wider range of effects and a wider range of influences.

Atmospheric superconducting materials are directly involved in electronics, power transmission, chips, computers, magnetic levitation, shifting devices, gyro particle accelerators, mechanical manufacturing, controlled nuclear fusion devices and the like.

These areas are the top industries in the global industry.

The release of room temperature superconducting materials will directly trigger changes in these areas.

The second day after the release of the material, the news attracted the attention of the global scientific community, and countless researchers were at a loss.

Or joy, or envy, or jealousy, or madness.

The success of room temperature superconducting materials means that the fields involved in it can be accelerated by the research of countless researchers.

Before the successful nuclear fusion technology, there was a little prelude and paving, and the presence of room temperature superconducting materials was unpredictable.

Before the release, there was not even a single message.

Like the headquarters of Starfish, the gates of the marching ant group are almost surrounded by media reporters from around the world, and there are countless companies that come to seek cooperation.

chapters.title: Chapter 663: : Pioneer Forces For Planetary Transformation
chapters.body:
Chapter 663: : Pioneer Forces For Planetary Transformation

"Insane, the marching ants are really crazy."

“The mass production of superconducting materials at room temperature has not been released. The marching ant group has disrupted the development of the global industrial system. Is it necessary to accelerate the reshuffle?”

“What do you want to do for the marching ant group?”

“A company that is rich in enemy countries.”

"The marching ant group is trying to **** my wallet."

"This technology, the marching ant group should not be so fast, so recklessly announced."

"..."

Various discussion voices, all over the cyberspace.

The outside world was really frightened by the big action of the marching ant group.

The outside world is completely crazy, and it also feels that the marching ants are crazy.

From vaccines to luxury cars, from ordinary people to rich people, the products released by the marching ant group, each of which is exploding, directly hitting the hearts of the demanding people, seems to release all the accumulated products at one time.

The marching ant group went up and down and entered the busiest moment.

There are a large number of orders and contracts signed every minute.

Especially in the vaccine market, even if there is sufficient preparation, drug agents from all over the world will split all vaccine stocks in just a few days.
