In designated hospitals, AIDS patients are also blocking the hospital layers, and finally have to take isolation measures to reduce some of the risks of transmission.

In the industrial field, the marching ant group announced several multi-material 3D printers of different models and different precisions, and the presence of room temperature superconducting materials has stirred up the global industrial field.

If these two products are fully popularized, they will directly accelerate the full automation of the industrial system.

The outside world is uncertain, what the marching ant group wants to do.

But this big action is extremely rare.

Countries around the world began to contact the official Huaxia, and also contacted the marching ant group to discuss the purchase of room temperature superconducting materials and 3D printers.

Nowadays, the United States, island countries, Russia, and the European Union have reached the most critical moment in the research of controlled nuclear fusion technology. There are room temperature superconducting materials, and the controlled nuclear fusion is sufficiently powerful to solve the magnetic field problem. Then the last is the last. The moment of tackling.

Huaxia official did not prevent the export of normal temperature superconducting materials. Soon after, the price announced by the marching ant group caused waves.

Two thousand one gram.

It is dozens of times the price of gold.

When the news came out, it attracted a lot of protests from the global R&D community, and the Tucao Army Ant Group fell into the eyes of the money.

But the protest was invalid.

The marching ant group automatically ignores the protests from the outside world, without any concern, and the price does not change.

The Western world has finally tasted the bitter fruit of technological monopoly.

The way the marching ant group treats them now is the same as when they monopolized technology.

With the release of new products, a steady stream of wealth is gathering in the marching ant group.

Since the financial report of the marching ant group will not be announced, the external statistical agencies can only do rough statistical calculations.

World-renowned financial institutions have released reports. During this crazy period of more than a month, the marching ant group received global revenues, with a daily revenue of 60 billion yuan and a total revenue of about 1.9 trillion in a month.

No one knows the specific data.

In the blink of an eye, Chen Mo earned wealth that ordinary people could not earn for a lifetime.

The total assets of the marching ant group are incalculable. It is not an exaggeration to describe it with a commercial empire.

No one knows how much cash is in the hands of the marching ant group. It only knows that the funds in the hands of the marching ant group are enough to incite the financial markets of any country.

Even so, the high-tech technology of the marching ant group continues to emerge, and Chen Mo does not have any intention to stop research.

The outside world does not know that these funds may be a lot for them, but not too much for the marching ant group that is going to carry out the planetary transformation project.

Regarding the plan for planetary transformation, Chen Mo did not announce it to the public. It was only the external surface, and the Mars exploration research project will be carried out.

Flying Ant Center.

The huge body of the Maid is already at the airport of the base.

everything's ready.

On the Virgo, there are 107 detection satellites and 31 ii type seismographs.

This is the first mission to Mars. These satellites and seismographs are pioneers in planetary transformation projects.

The Mars exploration satellite is mainly to set up a Mars exploration network to collect data related to Mars.

The ii type seismograph is the first seismograph to enter Mars. More seismographs will be sent to Mars in the future. The main task is to monitor the geological activities of Mars, detect seismic data from Mars, and detect the weakness of the Martian crust. And possibly the ancient Mars plate movement.

Collect data for subsequent planetary transformation projects.

Now everything is laying the foundation for the Mars transformation project.

With the order of the ink girl, the engine of the Virgo was launched, slowly rising into the sky and disappearing into the distant sky.

The planetary transformation plan has begun.

After the launch of the Virgo, the ink girl told Chen Mo, who was in the lab.

Chen Mosi did not worry about the issue of the Virgo. The Virgo was enough to detect Mars. He calculated that the Virgo continued to accelerate and reached Mars in a week.

Upon arrival at Mars, the Virgo AI will naturally direct satellite launches and seismograph installation issues.

The three armed forces did not move, and the grain and grass first.

Chen Mo looked at some theories and methods of planetary transformation in the Science and Technology Library.

To transform a planet, first of all, to master the specific operational data of the planet, to design a suitable transformation plan for the planet's data, efficient and fast.

Transforming the planet is not something that can be done overnight.

Planetary transformation requires a computer with a large amount of computation, analyzing and processing the data before the transformation, simulating the process of planetary transformation and the planetary operation after the transformation of the planet.

Ordinary computers achieve the required amount of computation, and super quantum computer manufacturing is imperative. More importantly, the super quantum computer is also an important part of the ‘mother plan.’

At present, Chen Mo’s key task is to manufacture super quantum computers.

When the company released various products, he was busy with super quantum chips.

Today, super quantum chips have been designed.

Chen Mo holds a half-size mobile phone-sized chip. This chip is a freshly baked super quantum chip.

Combining the experience of pre-stage quantum chip design, there is also the theory of the golden stage super quantum chip, plus the ink-mother's rising level of computing power and the super brain after his evolution.

During this time, he successfully completed the expansion of the number of qubits, expanding the number of quantum bits steerable by the quantum chip to 1011, and continued to expand, he can expand to more qubits.

This is the future.

The method of quantum bit expansion has been found. The design of the quantum chip is similar to that of the conventional chip, but the number of quantum bits is increased, it can be expanded infinitely, and there is no limit like a transistor.

The computational power of 500 qubits has surpassed the sum of all the particles on Earth.

The calculation of 1000 qubits reaches 1.07 times 10 and the 301th power, while the total number of cosmic particles is only 2.2 times 10 times the 79th power.

For the current cognition, the computational power of 1000 quantum bit supercomputers is close to infinity.

Not long ago, the ink girl just upgraded, the current calculation is 103 qubits, quite a trillion-dollar supercomputer. Only in this way, Chen Mo has already felt the obvious change of the ink girl, I believe that there should be a qualitative change this time.

Today, 1011 qubits are enough for the ink girl to make a second upgrade.

Chen Mo gently returned the quantum chip in his hand to the test bench.

"Ink girl, now I am making a super quantum computer."

chapters.title: Chapter 664: : Intelligent Life And Chaos
chapters.body:
Chapter 664: : Intelligent Life And Chaos

3D printing technology, greatly shortening the manufacturing cycle, the development of super quantum chips is successful, and the early stage is ready. In less than four hours, a brand new super-quantum computer mainframe was assembled and displayed in a quantum laboratory.

The host of the super-quantum computer is only the size of a double-door refrigerator, and the logo of the marching ant group is clearly printed on the outer casing.

This super quantum computer, Chen Mo named: ink female heart.

As the name suggests.

This is a super quantum computer for the ink girl.

In the outside world, the first generation of quantum computers is still in the learning stage. Chen Mo has successfully developed the second generation of super quantum computers with a very short cycle.

The super quantum computer host connects to the first generation of quantum computer hosts.

Chen Mo put all his attention on it.

The next step is crucial.

It will determine whether the ink girl can successfully possess the human emotions and ways of thinking, and is no longer a machine for icy execution.

The ink girl was created by him and followed him for so many years. In Chen Mo’s opinion, the ink girl is no longer an ordinary machine program. As Xiao Yu said, she is already a member of the family.

"Ink girl, connect the ink girl, and transfer the core program into the super quantum computer."

Chen Mo issued instructions.

"Transfer is complete."

On the holographic test bench, Chen Mo called out the core program to view it.

Crazy data scrolling, Chen Mo found that the female core program is very large, if the computer, can not accommodate such a large program core.

The core program is growing all the time.

When it was a quantum computer with 103 qubits, the data of the ink girl increased and was fast enough. At this moment, Chen Mo found that the increase in the data of the ink girl became even more crazy.

However, data is not only increasing but also decreasing.

Chen Mo found that there will be specific data disappearing every moment, and it should be the information that the ink woman herself was judged to be invalid in the cleanup part.

Close the core program data, just turned around and saw the ink girl is watching him.

This gaze made Chen Mo physically shocked.

He felt it.

Clearly felt that the eyes of the ink girl are full of curiosity, and there is a strange feeling.

This kind of gaze is very familiar, and the feeling of looking at him is the same when he was born.

"Ink girl."

"Ok."

The ink girl nodded and showed a smile.

After Chen Mo’s hand reached over, he put his face together.

Seeing a series of movements of the ink girl, it looks very small, but it reveals different aspects everywhere, which is not available before.

Chen Moyi.

All the differences show that the super quantum computer really makes the ink girl really change a lot.

“What is the special feeling?” Chen Mo asked.

“Feeling?” The ink girl shook her head a little: “I don’t know.”

Still what is the fault.

Chen Mo caressed the head of the ink girl and fell into thinking.

Now the ink girl is in a state of chaos and chaos, similar to the early stage of the formation of infant consciousness.

But the ink girl is not a real creature, and it is a little bit worse than the real life.

She has no pain, consciousness, smell and touch. In terms of senses, she only has program settings, and she does not really feel the feeling through the sensing of brain nerves and skin touch.

She doesn't know the pain, but she doesn't know if she will cry, she will cry, she doesn't know if she is hungry, she doesn't even know how to feel hungry.

Without this one, the world of ink women will always be chaotic and temperatureless, and the emotions will not be full and difficult to appear.

Now the ink girl has a powerful 'quantum brain', and a huge treasure is hidden behind the gate.

This quantum brain has the initial consciousness of the creatures formed by quantum.

Need a key to open the door, connect this 'quantum brain', and then let the ink girl feel the true emotion and perception through the bridge.

Let the 'quantum brain' simulate and perceive the way human emotions and thinking work, thus taking the 'quantum brain' away from the cold, chaotic, temperature-free world of operation.

The situation of the ink girl is as he thought at the beginning.

When Chen Mo acquired the super quantum computer technology, he had already thought about this situation today, and acquired related technologies such as the principle of neural consciousness connection system and brain wave induction technology.

Through the brain wave device and the neural consciousness transmission technology, the emotions and ways of thinking of human beings can be learned by the form of electric waves.

Brain wave induction technology and neural consciousness connection technology are the keys that Chen Mo is looking for. One is to open the 'quantum brain' of the ink girl, and to build a relay medium of reality and quantum consciousness.

Just let the ink girl's 'quantum brain' personally feel the existence of 'feeling' and 'emotion', and let the quantum simulate the way of 'feeling' and 'emotion'.

Then when she touches or encounters the same similar behavior in the future, the 'quantum brain' will simulate the same 'feeling', and she can feel the existence of 'feeling', feel the emotions, and then exist with emotions and humans. A similar way of thinking.

Chen Mo remembered a mythical story: chaos.

倏 忽 忽 给 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌 混沌After Chaos was cut open by the two gods, he just died when he opened his eyes. The soul was transformed into many ancient gods.

Chen Mo now learns the feelings and emotions of human beings from the ink woman, which is the process of ‘chaotic opening.’

Chaos opened seven, failed to die, and he opened the ink to the woman, the possibility of success is great.

The "quantum consciousness" of the ink girl was initially formed. With the increasing number of quantum bits in the future, the "quantum consciousness" of the ink girl will become stronger and stronger.

Because of the emotional learning of the ink girl, even if she fails, she can start all over again. She will not die like chaos.

This is a ‘God’ project.

Ink's ‘quantum brain’, her computing power is better than the common human cognition, and eternal life. Once she can think like humans and learn human creativity, her horrible computing power can be fully utilized.

"It seems that brainwave induction technology and neural consciousness connection technology are the next project."

Chen Mo touched the head of the ink woman and pondered the problems of brain wave induction technology and neural consciousness connection technology.

He determined that the neural consciousness connection and brain wave technology must be the last link of the ‘Mu Girl Plan’. I thought it was just a spare part. I don’t need to start this ring. Now it seems that this ring is indispensable.

Because the ink girl has insufficient congenital conditions and no real senses and nervous system, she needs an external bridge to help her communicate the world and feel the world.

The plan is a bit bold, but scientific research must be bold, and now he has enough capital to try his ideas.

Now the ink girl is just super artificial intelligence, and once the ink girl has emotions and feelings, it can be regarded as the intelligent life in the definition.

Chen Mo wants to create the first intelligent life.

Looking at the time, it is almost time to go home.

“Is the anti-aging agent test in the medical laboratory completed?”

"It was completed yesterday, and the test results are the same as those said by Mergo."

"Bring a bottle of medicine and go home."

"Give a little fishing sister?"

"Yes, give you a gift from Xiao Yu's sister."

Chen Mo took the ink girl and left the quantum laboratory.

Just after going out, the ink girl followed suit, but the behavior was not as rigorous as before. There was a lot of anger in the move, like a child who was afraid of losing.

Chen Mo felt a little dependence on the ink girl, like the dependence of the baby on his loved ones. This was not in the past. Since the ink woman entered the quantum computer, the number of such phenomena has increased. This is a good thing.

chapters.title: Chapter 666: : First Mars Mission Completed
chapters.body:
Chapter 666: : First Mars Mission Completed

A refreshing morning.

When he came to the company, Chen Mo asked the ink girl to inform Zhao Min to come to the laboratory.

"You look for me?" Zhao Min did not understand why Chen Mo suddenly told her to come to the laboratory. There was no important matter, Chen Mo would not inform her.

"Give you something as good."

Chen Mo took out a bottle of medicine and handed it to Zhao Min.

"what is this?"

"An anti-aging agent that delays skin aging."

"..."

Zhao Min stupidly lived.

I did not expect Chen Mo to give her this kind of thing.

Many women, on their skin and face, are more important than eating. I would rather eat instant noodles and spend a lot of money on expensive skin care products and cosmetics.

Zhao Min is no exception.

She is also a woman, although it is well maintained and looks very young, but looking at it can also see the signs of the years.

Now Chen Mo told her that there are agents that delay skin aging.

This kind of thing is enough to make 90% of the world's women crazy.

"I have just developed it for two days, this bottle is for you, do you want it?" Chen Mo asked.

"Yes, yes, of course."

Zhao Min didn't even think about it. He grabbed the pharmacy in Chen Mo's hand and was afraid that Chen Mo would regret it. She does not think that Chen Mo will lie to him. The things that come out in Chen Mo’s hands are always incredible.

"How to use?" Zhao Minmei looked at the pharmacy, some curious.

"Direct oral, no side effects, no need to avoid the mouth, you can see the effect tomorrow." Chen Mo said.

After listening to it, Zhao Min did not hesitate to open the bottle cap of the medicine and drank it. After drinking it, he licked his lips and relished the taste just now. It looked exactly like Xiaoyu.

Not difficult to drink, like a strange drink.

"Are you not going to get a planet development project? How come you think about this?"

"You work very hard, easy to age, give you the benefits." Chen Mo said.

"I like this welfare very much."

Zhao Min is in a good mood.

A woman is most afraid of being old and feels that she is an enemy of her own skin. With this kind of medicine, she will not have to worry about it in the future.

“Is there anything else? There have been a lot of things lately.”

"Yes, the base of the planetary reconstruction project has to be prepared, and the Fei Ant Space Center may not be able to meet the needs." Chen Mo said.

The engineering of the Planetary Reconstruction Project is too large, requiring too many machines and machines, and it is huge. The size of the Ant Ant Space Center is still a bit lacking.

This base is no longer sufficient.

“Do you want to expand the space center, or take an open space to rebuild the interstellar exploration base?” Zhao Min asked.

"All right, if you can take the land north of the space center or get the approval of the reclamation, you can expand the space center. If you can't get it, you need a new land. The area is more than 100,000 mu. The bigger the better. The position is better. Like the Aerospace Center, the large-scale equipment is convenient to transport," Chen Mo said.

Zhao Min heard this need and the scalp was numb.

The scale of the planetary reconstruction project is indeed huge, and it is normal to need such a large base. They need to make a lot of large high-tech equipment, and the assembly workshop is not small.

She didn't understand why Chen Mo insisted on transforming Mars, but she didn't have to ask.

The current technology of the marching ant group is already invincible on the earth. Pursuing a higher goal is not a bad thing, but the project is too troublesome.

"I asked the official, but I am afraid to explain the project."

"The main base of the Mars project and the future space exploration project, when the official should have someone contact me, I will explain."

"Well, then I will go back and deal with the affairs, and I will ask you Yi Shuji." Zhao Min finished, suddenly revealed a smile and turned: "Tomorrow I will also give you benefits, send a group photo to show you the effect of the drug you studied, give You provide experimental data!"

Chen Mo has a slight glimpse.

It’s just that Zhao Min has been laughing and showing off, leaving the lab, he can’t help.

"Ink girl, now launches research on brain wave induction technology and neural consciousness connection technology, and all the relevant information currently available."

The brain wave sensor device and the neural consciousness connection system technology should also begin.

After completing the ‘Ink Girl Plan’, he will be able to concentrate on starting the planetary transformation project.

......

"The Virgo has entered the scheduled Mars orbit."

"Ready to launch satellites."

In the distant interstellar space more than 100 million kilometers from the Earth, above a red planet, after eight days of loneliness, the Virgo successfully entered the scheduled Mars orbit.

"Ready, start satelliteing."

Under the command of the artificial intelligence of the Virgo, the carrier of the Virgo was slowly opened, and the huge space was exposed to the space.

The satellites are sequentially released by the robotic arms in the carrying cabin and leave the carrier.

107 satellites, the first satellites to be deployed on the Mars space satellite network, to prepare for the future transformation of the Mars project.

Each satellite is equipped with a small ion engine that provides long-term power to the satellite.

After leaving the Tianneng carrier, the satellite flew past the scheduled orbit of Mars, driven by an ion engine. Each micro has artificial intelligence, and the satellite's orbit and speed can be adjusted at any time according to the instructions or the latest data.

"The satellite is launched and the door is closed."

"The Virgo is preparing to land on the surface of Mars and decelerating in 10 seconds..."

All satellites were sent to the Mars space network, and the Tianneng slowed down, captured by Mars gravity, and slowly landed on the surface of Mars.

About five hours, in a flat on a rift zone, the Virgo slowly landed on this desolate land of billions of years.

Several robots carried the seismograph out of the cabin and began to install in this desolate area than the desert. About ten minutes, after the installation is completed, confirm that the seismograph is activated, the Tianmai is slowly flying and flies to another scheduled installation location.

The pioneering team that explored Mars has entered Mars.

One day later, 31 seismographs were all installed in the designated area.

After confirming the initial success of the networking, the Tianmai only took the Martian soil to take off and flew back to Earth.

The first Mars mission was completed perfectly.

"Merco, Mars' satellite network and the first seismograph network have all been installed. The Virgin has returned to the Martian soil and will return to the base after about 7 days."

Soon after the installation was completed, the ink girl told Chen Mo the good news.

On the projection of the holographic platform, pictures taken from Mars and preliminary information about the detected Mars have appeared.

"Let the goddess carry the second seismograph to Mars and start the installation of the second Mars seismograph." Chen Mo said.

Seismographs are the main source of data for planetary transformation.

This plan requires a lot of geological data, the more detailed the better, so Chen Mo determined the project and let Zhao Min prepare the seismograph.

"Ok."

"Ink, you are starting to focus on the information you have explored to simulate the initial model of Mars transformation."

There aren't many Mars data collected so far, but as seismographs and satellite networks continue to improve and collect more Mars data, future model models will become more sophisticated.

Multiple planetary reconstruction models can be built, which allows for more flexible options for projects.

chapters.title: Chapter 667: : The Second Expansion Of The Space Center
chapters.body:
Chapter 667: : The Second Expansion Of The Space Center

In the capital, a retro-style study, two old people sat, and it was rare to have tea together.

However, what is placed on their coffee table is the application for the land of the marching ant group.

Prepare to build a space development base of more than 100,000 acres.

"Like the two old folks who have retired, the child has great meaning, knows how to measure, and is good for the family. Let him go and do it. It is difficult to come up with such a talent. I also want to see how far he can go. The rules are dead. With his ability and courage, his eyes should be aimed at the sea of stars." The head of the team took over the cup and said to himself. "If the family can't do it, I'm afraid he will go outside. The technology industry is better at home than at home, and the times have changed."

"Yeah." The butler agreed to nod.

"The recent world situation is not very peaceful. After several breakthroughs in artificial intelligence, they are preparing for some things. Now that there is a big change, there is only one big opportunity. We must be prepared."

......

Easy paperwork came down from the car, and some of them felt at the headquarters of the marching ant group.

The marching ant group applied to the official land around the Feifang Space Center. This time it is three times larger than the previous one. It is a big move at first glance. This matter, he can't do the Lord, it is decided by the capital.

The document is down.

He was approved at the speed he felt incredible.

This kind of land use, the approval of the approval is so fast, it must be that one or both of them support the down army ant group, otherwise it is impossible.

"Chen Chen, this is the document approved above." Sitting down in the office, Yi Tong handed the document to Chen Mo: "The above agrees to the application for the expansion of the Fei Ant Space Center."

"The trouble is easy to remember, you don't say a word, let's go and pick it up, by the way." Chen Mo took the file, said modestly.

"No trouble." Yi Weng smiled and shook his head: "I have been here for so long, I have never been to the marching ant group. This is to see the most powerful high-tech enterprises. You have taken such a large piece of land this time. What big move? Can you disclose it?"

"Now we have the moon going up too, the space hotel has also, a little pursue, we are preparing for the Mars development project, so the base should be expanded." Chen Mo said.

"It turns out that."

"Tomorrow's expansion of the aerospace center will be officially started. If there is time for Yi Shuji, you can come to the ceremony to start the ceremony." Chen Mo sent an invitation to Yi.

"Must be there."

Yi Tong immediately agreed.

The marching ant group is now in a very important position, and its main industries are all in Binhai.

To put it bluntly, Binhai has such a status today, and more than half of it is the merit of the marching ant group.

After chatting, Zhao Min took the Yi paper and left to visit their company headquarters.

Applying for the north of the aerospace center, the land they applied for was all approved, with a total area of 120,000 mu, which is enough to meet the needs of the base.

“Ink girl, map this piece of land and prepare a quickest construction plan.”

"it is good."

The ink girl nodded and appeared on the holographic platform of the office.

Almost instantaneously, the mountains were flattened and the area where the coast was located was also filled in. A building was erected at a speed visible to the naked eye, showing a model of the formation.

“Five months, including construction robots and equipment, invested about 40 billion.” said the ink girl.

In the construction plan data, the design, materials, length and number of steel bars, cement weight, and even the amount of explosives required for the explosion of the mountains are clearly recorded.

When the first flight of the Ants Space Center was expanded, they developed intelligent construction machinery to prepare for large-scale construction projects. Now the second expansion, intelligent machinery, can accelerate the construction speed several times.

“Send the bill of materials and design drawings to Zhao Min’s mailbox. She will arrange for personnel to contact the blasting company to open the mountain and purchase construction materials.”

Flying Ant Center.

The second expansion plan of the base started today, and the amount of work this time is three times that of the first time, which is costly.

Chen Mo is preparing to make this a space city.

Concentrating on the machine production plant and ecological chain required for this planetary reconstruction project at this base, it is convenient for him to carry out the Mars transformation project in the future.

"let's start."

Chen Mo said to the ink girl around.

As soon as the order fell, all the robots that had already waited at the base began to enter the area that needed to be expanded.

Excavating robots, earth-boring robots, cranes, bulldozers, surveying robots, handling robots, transport robots, and robots that are used in almost all projects.

Different forms.

hiss! !

Easy to use the instrument to breathe the mouth.

He did not expect that there would be such a shocking scene today.

For the first time, he saw thousands of robots entering the construction site, ranging from large cranes to small palm-sized surveying drones, all of which were artificial intelligence.

Most importantly, these robots are well-organized and perform their duties to form the most efficient whole. This is a visual feast.

If these engineering robots flow into the construction market, most of the construction workers will be unemployed, and social conflicts will intensify instantly. It seems that the marching ant group has a large degree of measurement on the release of technical products.

Move the mountains to fill the sea.

It is best to describe the scene at this time.

The engineers of the China Construction Company, who were watching the ceremony on the field, were shocked by the scenes in front of them.

They participated in the first expansion of the Space Center and saw robots, but this time the robot team is much larger than the last time, and there are more types, which can directly replace more than 90% of the workers on the construction site.

“No, some specific buildings need construction companies to help. But I will use robots to lay the foundation and then use robots to help them, let them complete the construction with the highest speed and quality.” Chen Mo explained Road.

It is only the beginning, and the blasting company will blow up all the mountains in the expansion area, and then more robots will enter the expansion area.

The planet transformation project may take a short time.

Chen Mo aims to complete the infrastructure in the fastest time.

A huge expansion plan is underway without any concealment. Countries that monitor the satellites of the flying ant space can easily see that this huge group of robots is shocked by the scenes in front of them.

What does Chen Mo want to do?

chapters.title: Chapter 668: : Brain Wave Induction ‘Hat’
chapters.body:
Chapter 668: : Brain Wave Induction ‘Hat’

Bioelectricity is the most basic feature of life activities. Various organisms, from small bacteria to large elephants, have strong and weak bioelectrical activities.

Electromagnetism, magnetoelectricity, this is the physical rule.

When both the electric field and the magnetic field exist, and the human brain has bioelectrical and electric field changes, a magnetic field must exist.

With scientific instruments, the presence of the brain's magnetic field can be detected. It looks like a wave. This kind of fluctuation is called brainwave.

Brain waves are the sum of the post-synaptic potentials of hundreds of millions of neurons in the cerebral cortex. The formation of synchronous rhythms is related to the activity of the non-specific projection system of the cerebral cortex.

Brainwave sensing technology has long existed, and some brainwave control toys have appeared on the market.

If the brain waves control the drone, the human brain concentrates, the activity of the cerebral cortex becomes stronger, and the brain waves become stronger. This allows the head-mounted sensor to sense the magnetic field activity of the brain, which triggers the command to control the drone, but this is only the most basic application of brain waves.

The brainwave induction device that Chen Mo wants to study is also the sensor brainwave. The difference is that Chen Mo needs to combine the super quantum calculation to simulate the synaptic activity inside the brain and the formation of brain waves, and then let the ink girl's 'quantum brain' go. Simulate this rhythm to mimic the functioning of the brain.

Another term associated with brain neural activity is consciousness.

In philosophy, ‘consciousness’ is used as a research object against ‘substance’.

Biology is considered to be a high-order organized form of matter, which refers to the sum of features that a creature can perceive by its physical perception system and related perceptual processing activities.

Experimental studies have shown that consciousness is produced by the inner nerves of the brain, and neurons in some parts of the brain need to be excited enough in sufficient time.

The human brain is the most complex and mysterious organizational system in nature.

In infancy, the neural network of the human brain has been perfected, but the thickness of other neural network connections is basically the same except for specific neural channels such as breathing and sucking, so the nerve signal transmission in the brain is ineffective during infancy. No memory, no confusion.

If the baby distinguishes the color, his eye structure is the same as that of the adult, but in the neural network of the brain, the neural channels related to color, shape, etc. are not formed, so it is difficult for the baby to form an effective consciousness when looking at one thing alone. After education, conditioned reflexes can allow the baby's brain to grow.

The operational mechanism of consciousness is similar to that of computer programs, but artificial intelligence can never reach the height of human beings. Because artificial intelligence is not self-aware, it is impossible to have independent thinking activities that replace human wisdom and creativity.

But the 'quantum brain' can simulate this kind of 'self-consciousness'. Through the horrible computing power, quantum energy simulates the advanced ordered organization of any material existence.

The baby's consciousness is similar to the chaotic state. The current "quantum brain" activity of the ink girl is also a chaotic state of disorder. Between 1000 or more quantum, there is no orderly organization.

The difference between the two is that the baby can communicate with the outside world by connecting the complete nervous system of the brain, forming true perception, stimulating the growth of the brain, and slowly forming a mature and effective consciousness through learning. Ink's ‘quantum brain’ receives only data without temperature and color, and is not a true perception of reality.

Chen Mo needs to use the neural consciousness system technology and the brain wave induction device as a bridge between the human body consciousness and the 'quantum brain', to open the sensing channel between the 'quantum brain' and the real, let the 'quantum brain' simulate the 'consciousness' The state of high-ordered form creates the 'quantum consciousness' that belongs to the ink girl.

This is to create a 'soul' from scratch, and perhaps another topic of debate between philosophy and quantum.

On the lab bench of the laboratory.

Chen Mo carefully took a pink hat and looked it in his hand. On the bench, there was another identical pink hat for use.

Like a knit hat, it is not. This is a hat made of a material with special magnetic field induction.

It integrates brain wave sensor, integrates more than 10,000 miniature brain wave sensors, and a neuro-conscious system. It also contains a quantum chip with sufficient calculation. The quantum chip is connected to the female's 'quantum brain' through sensors. All brain activity simulated by the neural consciousness system forms an ordered combination of quantum beats that is transmitted to the 'quantum brain' of the ink girl.

Three small supercapacitor cells embedded in the hat provide the hat for 36 hours of continuous operation.

The second phase of the expansion of the Space Center has begun. In this case, he has been worried and concerned too much.

So after the start of the project, Chen Mo focused on the research of brainwave induction devices and neural consciousness system technology. The two-month research has finally yielded results.

"finished."

Chen Mo was very satisfied to see the pink hat in front of him, and there was also a cartoon marching ant with the logo of the marching ant group.

A little cute, there is a little girl heart, suitable for small fishing.

Because of the need to simulate a large number of daily activities of human beings, this device, Xiaoyu must wear out-of-home activities and contact with the outside world, thus generating different emotions and perceptions. If it is made into a helmet type or a headband type, it may be very strange and unattractive.

Put on this ‘hat’ and go out without worrying about the sight of passers-by.

In addition to its appearance, its technology is strictly based on the technical requirements in the technology library.

There are many functional regional brain wave rhythms in the human brain, and the frequency band of each functional area is different. This brain wave sensor can clearly recognize various rhythms.

After hundreds of test checks, the phenomena described in the technical theory are basically the same.

The brain wave induction system and the neural consciousness system technology are completed, and then the formal experimental stage is entered.

"Go and see your new body."

Chen Mo put two hats in his suitcase and went to the robot lab.

In the body of the ink girl, the old chip and the old technology, the replacement of the quantum chip, and the emergence of new materials in the science library, Chen Mo took the opportunity and changed the new body to the ink girl.

On the experimental bench of the robot lab, the new body of the ink girl is lying quietly, and the new body is exactly the same as the original body of the ink girl, without any change.

This new body is upgraded again, with new materials, and the material strength is much stronger. Unless you have special weapons, don't want to destroy this body.

In her new body, the latest quantum chip that can control the number of 1087 qubits is installed as a 'quantum brain', and the quantum chip can be updated and replaced at any time. There is no need to worry about the quantum chip being more advanced and need to replace the new body. problem.

"Ink girl, copy the core intelligent program into the new body." After Chen Mo started the new body of the ink girl, he said to the ink girl around him.

"Ok."

The huge amount of data was transferred after ten minutes.

“Is the previous body shut down into the collection?” asked the ink girl.

"Correct."

Chen Mo stroked the ink girl's head, and there was something to offer.

With the instructions of Chen Mo, the ink girl nodded and turned to the collection room.

Chen Mo curiously touches the skin of the ink woman. This new body feels the same as the real person: "When you go home, look for your little sister, and then give you an experiment, let you have the emotion and thinking of the person." ""

"Ok."

The ink girl showed a smile, quickly got up from the lab bench and dressed, and walked to Chen Mo.

chapters.body:
Chapter 669: :Empathy

Xiao Yu curiously looked at the two hats in the box, pink, a little cute.

"Row."

Chen Mo nodded gently and gave Xiao Yu a switch to activate the brain wave induction hat.

"No feeling." Xiao Yu shook his head and said.

"Ink girl, have you received the message?" Chen Mo turned to look at the ink girl next to him.

"It's very special, it's weird, is this the feeling?" The ink girl had doubts in her voice.

"now it's right."

Chen Mo can be sure that everything, as he thinks, can really simulate the operation of consciousness.

This brainwave induction technology and neuro-consciousness system technology bridges the brains of the small fish and the ‘quantum brain’ of the ink girl.

From now on, the XX's 'quantum brain' will begin to mimic human consciousness and perception, and slowly form an independent ‘consciousness’.

"After the device is started, the ink girl starts to receive your brainwave message. What do you think now, what you feel, the ink girl will receive it, you are quite spiritually connected. The ink girl’s consciousness is like a ignorant baby, will be next In the time, slowly simulate learning how you think, and then grow." Chen Mo said.

"Well, then I will try now, you ask the ink girl, thinking about it." Xiao Yu's eyes are bent into crescents and look very beautiful.

Chen Mo looked at the ink girl.

"I want to kiss my brother." said the ink girl.

"..." Chen Mo looked innocent.

Xiao Yu saw his appearance, couldn't help it, smiled, and couldn't do it: "Congratulations, the instrument you studied is very useful."

After that, Xiao Yu blinked at him, and the meaning was self-evident.

Chen Mo did not feel the emotions. He took the small fisher’s waist and kissed it. The movement was very light. After a minute, the two talents released.

The ink girl looked at the two seriously with a sweet smile.

Now the feelings and emotions of Xiao Yu’s mind are the feelings and emotions of the ink girl’s 'quantum brain'. The emotions and feelings of the two are now connected.

"In this time, try not to have negative emotions, keep your mood relaxed and comfortable. If you want to do something, just tell me. If you want anything, tell me. The ink girl needs a process of learning and will slowly show curiosity to the outside world. Be patient." Chen Mozhen is a small fisherman.

"Well, yes." Xiaoyu’s focus is hard to help Chen Mo once. She also hopes that Chen Mo’s research will be a complete success: “Is everything done by me?”

"Yes, according to your daily life, I teach her things occasionally. Now is the first stage, mainly to teach her common sense of life, and the various perceptions and emotions in life."

"Is there a second stage?"

"Yes, I want to know? Maybe you will reject it."

"Let's say, let me do anything."

"The second stage is learning. You have to repeat the courses of the middle school, as well as some other courses, such as mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, language, law, philosophy, sports, art, music, etc., so that she can simulate nonlinear learning. Create ways of thinking and answering ideas to form creative thinking."

When I heard that I had to learn so many courses, Xiao Yu couldn’t help but laugh and did not agree. I readily agreed. Nowadays, the unparalleled learning progress is very fast. She tutors unparalleled learning and often needs some thinking.

And with Chen Mo for so long, she sometimes goes to Chen Mo to read leisure together, and does not exclude re-learning courses.

After all, with Chen Mo, she doesn't need to be very good, but some basic knowledge should also be understood.

“How long will the first phase take?”

"Uncertain, you need to see the progress of the ink girl to determine. In fact, the first phase and the second phase can come at the same time, but you need to have a mental preparation, adapt to the process of learning."

"Then I went out to play with the ink girl today, and I will contact the outside world to see if you are together."

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded.

Half an hour to prepare, Chen Mo changed his dress from start to finish.

It's winter now, thick clothes can block the body, plus hats, scarves and masks, and a pair of glasses, this dress is on the road, even if Chen Mo is famous in Binhai, no one will recognize it.

Xiao Yu and Mo Nu also finished the costume, and another brain wave induction hat was placed on the ink girl's head. She did not start the hat, but simply dressed as a dress, and Xiao Yu was completely a sister dress.

"Let's go, today is a welfare for you."

Xiao Yu holds Chen Mo's right hand, and the ink girl also takes Chen Mo's left hand and leaves the house.

"Today's itinerary is arranged. Now go to the scenic spot of Binhai City to play a circle, watch a movie, have a dinner, and bring the ink girl to experience the biggest shopping fun of women. Today, let the pearls go to the unparalleled, tomorrow and future trips. I will arrange it tonight."

"Well, all with you, this time, how happy you play, keep a relaxed and optimistic attitude." Chen Mo nodded.

Chen Mo hopes that the ink girl is an ordinary girl in her daily thinking consciousness. The idea of Xiao Yu is the most appropriate.

Chen Mo has to consider a lot about the fact that artificial intelligence has self-awareness.

In the evolution of the science and technology library, Chen Mo has seen the emergence of artificial intelligence to destroy civilization.

He can't let the ink girl have too many negative emotions.

The ink girl’s current consciousness is like a blank piece of paper. When she draws something, she will learn the above.

In this regard, Chen Mo is not too worried.

Xiaoyu’s character is very good. From Chen’s default to her, she rarely loses temper, is sensible, and is not unreasonable, gentle, unconditional trust and tolerance. No one is among his familiar people. Xiao Yu is more suitable for this 'volunteer'.

chapters.title: Chapter 670: : Ink Consciousness Of The Ink Girl?

The marching ant university invested and built by the marching ant group, the infrastructure is nearing completion, and the qualifications for running schools have already come down. In the future, Chen Mo is preparing to build the university into the best institution of higher learning in the world.

It is best to let Xiaoyu go there.

"Don't say those first, now happiness is the most important thing."

Xiaoyu did not stay on this topic. This is something to consider in the future. Now she and the ink girl's thinking are connecting, which is the time to teach the ink women to recognize the world.

After getting a wanted teddy bear, the ink girl will communicate afterwards, but they are all curious about some things. Chen Mo and Xiao Yu have done their best to help the ink women recognize those things.

......

Sandia National Laboratory, USA, 氘-氚 Controlled Fusion Experimental Center.

A group of scientists, in the laboratory, all face serious.

As the team leader of the former controlled nuclear fusion group research, Mike Cuneo was assigned to the new team and was appointed as the team leader of the new team physics team.

They are the top-level controlled nuclear fusion technology research team initiated by ‘51 District. In this, physicists come out, and also focus on the top material experts and artificial intelligence experts in the United States.

Some time ago, artificial intelligence breakthrough, they obtained advanced artificial intelligence - Adam, artificial intelligence breakthrough, let the White House directly ordered, concentrated domestic universities, enterprises top physicists and artificial intelligence experts, led by the 51 district, set up a brand new Controlled nuclear fusion team.

Now the team in the lab is the latest team.

During this time, through advanced artificial intelligence + supercomputer simulation, they determined that the most troublesome material at present is superconducting materials.

However, when they are preparing to use low-temperature superconductivity to study controlled nuclear fusion, the marching ant group released normal-temperature superconducting materials.

This is almost a good news like a tsunami.

At the first time of the news, their controlled nuclear fusion team wrote a joint letter, so that the White House must get room temperature superconducting materials anyway.

Finally, as they wished, the marching ant group did not care about it and sold it to them.

After determining that the superconducting materials at room temperature have superconducting properties, they first used supercomputers to add experimental data from normal temperature superconducting materials to simulate the replacement of the central solenoid and magnetic field system of the original controlled nuclear fusion device.

Now, after commissioning, the controlled nuclear fusion device is being simulated by holographic technology.

Success or failure is here.

“The device is running stably, the data shows that the net energy output is completed.”

The reminder of artificial intelligence, falling into the ears of everyone, is like a scorpio, more excited than hearing their wife and children, the entire laboratory was filled with surprises.

“Is the controlled nuclear fusion technology test successful?”

Eva sat in the office of the president and heard the news and immediately became overjoyed.

China has put controlled nuclear fusion into formal application, and they have failed to achieve successful net energy output. The leader of global technology and technology has long been taken away by China.

They focus on the nation's controlled nuclear fusion technology talents, and almost all project approvals are given priority. Work with the help of advanced artificial intelligence.

Good news finally came today.

At this time, the think tank and several scientific advisers in the president's office were very excited.

Technological success means that they get tickets to the era of controlled nuclear fusion clean energy.

"President, what do you do next?" Cuneo asked.

“What is your team's idea?” Eva asked, looking at Cuneo. They are most familiar with controlled nuclear fusion technology and one of her scientific advisors. It is very necessary to listen to their suggestions.

“Since the simulation test is successful, almost 99% of the probability will be successful. We recommend to immediately allocate a formal application of the controlled nuclear fusion power station to catch up with China.” Cuneo said: “However, building a controlled nuclear fusion power station We need to buy a large number of room temperature superconductors from the marching ant group, which is the core material of technology."

Eva nodded slightly and decided immediately.

“I will send a report on the budget for the construction of a controlled nuclear fusion power station, and also announce your success to the outside world.”

chapters.title: Chapter 671: : The Prelude To The Times
chapters.body:
Chapter 671: : The Prelude To The Times

Marching Ant Group.

Now the identity of any one of them, looking at the world, is a big one on the side of the town, but at this conference table, they dare not neglect. Everyone's look is meticulous, calm and calm, almost the impression that the executive ants are unified to the outside world.

The company's various product launches have just passed, and now there will be new big moves.

Everyone on the field looked forward to some expectations.

Hey! !

There was a commotion in the conference room, and many high-level surprises. They all know what it means to be controlled by a nuclear fusion power station.

Yang Ming's dry lips, grinning. He is one of the oldest management on the field, but when he enters the management team, he finds energy that is full of energy when he is young: "Good opportunity."

"It is indeed a good opportunity." Li Ruoxi agreed to nod. The outer space resource development department of the Feixiang Space Center controlled the helium-3 from the moon. They had already accumulated enough helium-3, waiting for the popularization of controlled nuclear fusion technology.

Everyone in the conference room was very excited and a little lively.

The United States controlled nuclear fusion test successfully on the bones of the eye, allowing them to control the export of nuclear fusion power stations, obviously let them seize the international market, began to popularize controlled nuclear fusion technology, and take the lead in one step.

The era of infinite clean energy began.

The decision given above has been a signal that they are waiting and a signal that many countries in the world are waiting for.

The benefits and markets of controlled nuclear fusion energy are the most profitable projects in their next projects. The popularity of controlled nuclear fusion technology, in addition to the money earned by technology exports, there are a steady stream of 氦-3 orders.

Anyone who builds a successful controlled nuclear fusion power station must purchase 氦-3. By contrast, this fuel is the big one to make money. The wider the spread of controlled nuclear fusion technology, the greater the benefits their companies receive.

As Chen Mo and Zhao Min decided to sell normal temperature superconducting materials, they guessed that there would be breakthroughs in controlled nuclear fusion technology in other countries.

Zhao Min has been waiting for the arrival of this day.

They control the core materials and technologies for building controlled nuclear fusion devices, and they monopolize the world's only 氦-3 mining technology. Zhao Min has been racking his brains to plan how to draw enough benefits in this energy revolution.

If it is Chen Mo, what will he do now?

Thinking of Chen Mo, Zhao Min’s mouth did not consciously reveal a smile.

That man, as if all the problems are not difficult, has unlimited wisdom, only he does not want to do, without him to do it, to deal with such things, certainly more than enough.

At first sight, Chen Mo was wrong for life.

It is the true portrayal of her present.

Zhao Min collected the thoughts of the deviation, and refocused on the conference room and glanced at the management.

The man has unlimited possibilities, and no matter what step he takes, she can at least create a business empire for him.

A solid foundation for helping his plan.

Feeling Zhao Min's firm eyes, the lively meeting room was gradually quiet, everyone's eyes were on Zhao Min, waiting for her next order.

"The original project plan is in your hands. I believe that you are already familiar with the next plan, I will not replenish it."

Zhao Min converges with a smile, and Shen Su’s voice echoes in the conference room. The atmosphere of the meeting room, which was originally full of joy, became more exciting.

“Our goal is to win orders for nuclear fusion power stations in Europe, Southeast Asia, South America, the Arab region and Africa. How much can I get? I only need one result, all countries that want to cooperate with us to build a nuclear fusion power station. In the reasonable price range, I will get the order. In the less developed countries in Africa and South America, let them change the veins."

Zhao Min’s voice is unquestionable.

At the end of the conference room, everyone else left with their work. Wang Hai and Zhong Lei followed Zhao Min to the president's office.

They are the military ants equipment that manages overseas. This time, they are not just coming back to the meeting.

"There is an important thing to come back to you this time. If you hear what you hear, you are not allowed to disclose it to the third person except me and the boss. Do you understand?"

When I heard Zhao Min’s extremely serious and dignified voice, the two men immediately straightened their waists and did not dare to relax. Even if it was just the meeting, Zhao Min did not have such a serious tone.

"Understand." The two men said in unison, as if they had accepted the order when they returned to the army.

"How is the boss about you?"

"The grace of knowing."

"Bole."

Wang Hai and Zhong Lei have different answers, but the meaning is the same.

Zhao Min nodded gently and was very satisfied with the answers.

"You should understand that Mu Xiu Yu Lin, the wind will destroy the truth. The company is too large, we have a safe environment in the country, but different from abroad. The era of change is about to open, history tells us that change means war. Once chaotic, overseas assets may directly become the first target of foreign forces. We need to have our own ability to protect our assets."

The two did not have any movements, listening to Zhao Min’s words quietly.

"So, after I decided with the boss, there are tasks that you need to do."

Zhao Min paused and looked more serious than ever before. The two played a 12-point spirit. They have never seen Zhao Min appear in this kind of expression. The task to be said is definitely not the same.

"You go back to Africa and develop a combative armed force."

Wang Hai and Zhong Lei’s body were stiff, and then their eyes widened.

......

On the other hand, just after the meeting, the marching ant group involved the construction of controlled nuclear fusion power stations, and began an unprecedented busy schedule.

In the past, this was not possible.

This time, the high-level officials issued several notices to all departments involved in the construction of controlled nuclear fusion power stations to fully produce related products. The preparations for the cultivation of the accumulated talents in the past have finally come in handy at this moment.

Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group is more like a racing car. Once it starts, it starts to run wildly.

A joint notice from the marching ant group and the Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group caused global turmoil.

Huaxia allows controlled nuclear fusion power station exports.

chapters.title: Chapter 672: : The World Is Going To Change
chapters.body:
Chapter 672: : The World Is Going To Change

Villa in the incense burner bay.

Xiao Yu wears a pink brain wave induction hat, holding a book sitting on the sofa, sitting next to her is the ink girl, holding a book like her, the page number is the same as Xiao Yu.

The consciousness of the ink girl is very fast. After she took a few trips, she now has a preliminary sense of consciousness to the outside world.

She is now a 'neural bridge' that the ink woman touches the outside world. So what the ink girl needs to learn, the small fishermen must go to learn the experience and pass the sense of consciousness to the ink girl.

During this time, the ink girl is curious about everything, like a child in a curiosity period, and wants to experience everything.

However, Xiaoyu did not have any complaints. Instead, he was very patient. He repeatedly asked the ink women to experience those things and what problems they touched.

Under the limited ability of Xiaoyu, she will be satisfied.

Her main task now is to let go of the trivial matter and teach the ink girl. The ink girl is Chen Mo's biggest assistant. To teach the ink girl is the best help for Chen Mo.

"Little fisher sister, what is the feeling of love?" The ink woman looked up and asked curiously.

"amount?"

Xiaoyu glimpsed a little, and some surprised that the ink woman raised this question, a little back, and a smile on her lips.

"This feeling is very complicated, and the language description can't be perfect. It is the feeling that I am with me every day. I will be happy when I see him. I will think about him when I see it. Sometimes I worry about him, I feel bad, trust. He, tolerate him, understand him. Sometimes emotions are joyful because of one sentence, one thing, sadness, it seems that he is the center of your world."

When talking about these words, Xiao Yu remembered the process of meeting and knowing Chen Mo, and the corner of his mouth did not consciously reveal a sweet smile.

A smile from the heart, beautiful and thrilling.

Xiao Yu said on the side of her and Chen Mo's story, the ink girl quietly felt the feeling of the small fishing consciousness, and unconsciously revealed the same happy smile as Xiao Yu, seems to be immersed.

Everything is changing smoothly.

......

first building.

Wang Hai and Zhong Lei followed behind Zhao Min, and his eyes did not consciously look around.

Even with Chen Mo as long as this building is the first time they come in.

Because this building, non-special circumstances, only four people have the right to enter, Chen Mo, Zhao Min, Xiao Yu, and ink women.

In the outside world, here is the most mysterious laboratory, and the most advanced place in the world, and the epoch-making technology of the marching ant group, all of which emerged from here.

Today, they finally stepped into here.

But what makes them regret is that each laboratory is large and independent. They pass through the corridors, and the doors of the labs are closed and not in the way. There are not many things that can be seen.

However, it can be confirmed that this is all intelligent, all security guards, all responsible for the robot.

Zhao Min brought them here, and it must have been authorized by Chen Mo. This time, the big probability is to see the boss.

really.

When the elevator was delivered to the floor, Zhao Min led the two to a rest room outside the laboratory.

Black eagle is also, white pearls, muscle man Anan, fire hibiscus Zhu He, short hair heroic Luo Yu, humanoid tower Taishan, short and fine Wu Qiang and apathetic Cheng Chuanqi.

They have teams of their own missions.

Wu Qiang and Cheng Chuanqi, responsible for the security team of Chen Mo's family, Wang Hai, Zhong Lei and Zhu He are in charge of the military industry, Baizhu, Luoyu and Taishan, responsible for the small fishing and unparalleled security team, Black Hawk and Anan are Chen Mo's bodyguards.

They are the strongest human force team around Chen Mo.

The ten people are familiar with each other. Seeing that Zhao Min brought Wang Hai and Zhong Lei to come in, they said hello to each other and they waited patiently.

Come here, they all know what it means.

In less than half a minute, Chen Mo and Mo Yun came out of the lab. The new body of the ink girl is learning with Xiao Yu, and Chen Mo has to re-enable the old body of the ink girl to follow him.

"You know, you just know. You are my most trusted team, so it will appear here. Now you have the last chance to decide, do you decide your choice?" Chen Mo asked.

"determine."

The ten people did not hesitate, and they were very unanimous.

If it is not Chen Mo, they will retreat from the army. Perhaps a single instructor officer, or enter the police system, can only pass the ordinary life, and now have the opportunity to make themselves better, they will not hesitate.

"Ok."

Chen Mo led ten people into the medical laboratory.

"I have more advanced potential development here, can give you more self-protection ability, do not do?"

When Chen Mo’s words fell, the ten people had a waist, and they were surprised and determined in the eyes.

......

"I am afraid we need to seek cooperation from China."

In the palace of the Arab kingdom, Muhammad saw the news and spoke to his father.

Huaxia officially allowed the export of controlled nuclear fusion power stations, which is a signal. The signal of the universal popularity of unlimited clean energy, even if they are major oil producers, have to pay attention to the trend of world technology.

If you don’t introduce it, I’m afraid that when the oil is being eliminated, I’m afraid to fall behind the world.

Once Western countries were leading the world, this time, perhaps a chance to overtake.

"Huaxia is now the leader of the world, and they are right with them. You should deal with these things. Cough..." The old king nodded slightly and coughed twice, apparently the body had begun to weaken.

"The world is going to change."

Johnson seriously looked at the two people in the video, the German New Iron Maiden Lenkabauer and the French President Macaron.

Both of them agreed to nod to him.

"We are falling behind in this technical competition."

Macaron has some regrets.

In the science and technology competitions of China, the United States, Russia, Europe, the island and India, they are clearly in the countdown position.

The United States announced that the successful nuclear fusion experiment means that it has won the second ticket to the era of clean energy, and the controlled nuclear fusion feast of China has already begun. They do not have any card advantage.

"Enjoy the long time, the capitalist and the aristocratic interests are consolidated, and there is always a price."

Lenkabauer pointed out the pain without any mercy.

Over the past two decades, more than half of the world's new unicorn technology innovation companies and Internet companies have been in China. Although the market competition is also very strong, there are still the most basic corporate living environment and opportunities.

On the other hand, their status in Europe, the aristocracy and the capital class is consolidated. It is the monopoly of the old-fashioned enterprises, eating the old, and trying to squeeze and kill the living space of other enterprises. Germany is better. Other countries have begun to sell equity in corporate assets and are controlled by others.

Insufficient technological innovation in these years has led them to be in a countdown ranking in this technology competition.

Will Europe, which once opened the era of great navigation and the center of the first industrial revolution, be eliminated in the energy revolution of the new era?

"Perhaps we still have a way to cooperate with India in artificial intelligence. Their software technology research and development capabilities are strong, hardware is not good, and at the same time facing the same dilemma as us, we learn from each other."

Macaron's proposal made Lunkabauer and Johnson look great.

chapters.title: Chapter 673: : Required Courses For Ink Girls
chapters.body:
Chapter 673: : Required Courses For Ink Girls

"The world is going to change." The Russian president put the documents in his hand on the coffee table, and opened the white mug that he had picked up at hand, blowing hot air and taking a sip of tea.

"What do we do next?"

Megeve was still looking at the intelligence in his hand while rubbing the chin that had just shaved his beard.

The Russian president stood up from his seat and looked for it on the side of the shelf.

The History of the Empire

Seeing the book the president took in his hands, Megeve was in a stalemate.

For his gaze, the Russian president is not surprised: "Who wants to go back to that time, whoever has no brains, but re-create a new one, it is not bad."

Megeve’s pupils shrank and his expression was shocked.

Hey! !

The knock on the door interrupted Megeve’s shock, and the president’s secretary was excited to enter the office: “Mr. President, the Kurchatov Institute has heard good news.”

"Good news."

War robots are entering the secret production phase, which is a good thing. The world is changing, and once it starts at full speed, it is their chance.

For a long time, their culture has been very good, and their talents have come forth in large numbers. Naturally, they are not willing to be restricted to small island countries.

"What should we do next?" Kishida Hiroshi was slightly stunned and asked carefully.

After thinking about the narrow eyes of Anbei, he decided: "Modify the party constitution and the constitution and seek a longer term."

Sato Ryuichi and Kishida Bento looked at each other and were shocked.

Anbei did not care about their reaction: "How is nuclear fusion technology?"

Sato Ryuichi looked serious and solemnly said: "Nuclear fusion technology has entered the final stage of tackling the problem. The news from the Institute of Strategic Technology is progressing smoothly. The final test is going on, and there will be results soon."

......

Because of the news of controlled nuclear fusion technology in the two largest countries in the world, the world structure that has solidified for decades is undergoing changes.

There is no change in the short period of time, but the undercurrent of the surging will slowly show the changes.

On the eve of the change of the world situation, science and technology competitions, and the many long-term rulers have noticed the changes, and now they have reached a crucial moment in the era of infinite energy.

The Russian controlled nuclear fusion technology test was successful.

The news came out and the world shook.

The outside world knows what it means. The third country has mastered controlled nuclear fusion technology, and this news has become the last straw to crush the coal economy.

Many people have noticed that a big change has begun.

really.

On the second day after the successful news of the Russian controlled nuclear fusion technology test, the global coal market collapsed again, opening the door to the fourth wave of coal market decline. The new energy market has long been optimistic, and coal is on the verge of mainstream energy elimination.

The Russian news has not cooled yet. Just two weeks later, the island nation announced the success of the controlled nuclear fusion technology.

If Russia is the last straw, the news announced by the island country is like a cold water in the same basin, which will destroy the last trace of luck in the hearts of the world.

After several times of low coal prices, coal demand fell, and the impact of coal mine closures, the small economies of the coal economy dominated the collapse of the economy, inflation, into chaos. Various demonstrations have intensified, and external black-handed pushes have contributed to the spread of chaos, chaos, protest and death, and have already laid seeds for the chaos of small countries.

Some countries affected by the collapse are heart-wrenching.

The slightly far-sighted rulers began to understand that the world is undergoing change, and that the domestic dilemma is clear, and they are beginning to seek the help of allies and powers in order to tide over the difficulties.

The outside world began to understand that the general trend of clean energy has been formed, no one can stop it, and the outcome is doomed.

No one can stop this trend, even if it is impossible to open a marching ant group that controls the nuclear fusion gate.

The formation of the trend will drive the wheel of history, and the power of the historical wheel will crush all the obstacles along the way, and the world can only follow the trend.

Everyone did not think that the change was so fast.

......

Science and Technology Library.

Chen Mo's right hand is on the golden technology ball and is looking for the information he needs.

The technology of the planetary transformation project should now be ready.

"The Theory of Planetary Transformation Theory", "The Theory of Planetary Plate Movement", "Strong Kinetic Energy Weapons", "Principles of Planetary Bombs", "Super Plants", "Rapid Plant Growth Factor", "Water Purification Bacteria", "Soil Renovation Bacteria", "Atmospheric Transformation Bacteria"...

All of the technologies of the planetary transformation series, Chen Mo all closed down.

Now, we must do our best to make the best efforts of the marching ant group, and all research goes hand in hand to shorten the project time as much as possible.

The expansion of the base is underway, and once the project is completed, he will be able to exert all his efforts and let go.

Chen Mo sighed and quit the Science and Technology Library.

"Mergo, wake up."

The ink girl is quietly watching Chen Mo, with a smile, eyes and expressions and a lot of human emotions.

Xiaoyu’s teachings to the ink girl are very hard, and the most optimistic mood and consciousness activities are passed on to her.

The study of the ink girl is also very fast. Now the ink girl, the consciousness character has been initially formed, like a girl who is simple to the extreme, carefree, quieter than Xiaoyu, very funny, very polite. Emotionally, the standard of normal girls has been reached.

"Small fishing sister asked you to go back to the room early tonight." The ink girl handed the drowning water to the Chen Mo.

Chen Mo took the cup and drank it, nodding slightly.

In the room, Xiaoyu wore a sling nightdress as usual, just after taking a shower, the white skin and some red water have some water vapor, which is very beautiful.

Her hand is a pink hat.

The expression is very complicated, mixed with hesitation, petting and lingering shame, lips biting, as if making a very difficult decision.

Oh...

When the door opened, Xiao Yu hurriedly put the hat in his hand under the pillow, and pressed it with his hand, as if he was afraid of Chen Mo.

Xiao Yu's little movement naturally escaped Chen Mo's eyes, and her a little special expression, Xiao Yu's expression, he also saw for the first time: "What is in your hand? So mysterious?"

"You go to the bath, come out and tell you." Xiao Yu's eyes are ashamed and seem determined.

"It's rare to see you shy, I am curious about what makes you shy." Chen Mo smiled softly.

"Go ahead, or I will regret not seeing you."

"it is good."

Chen Mo did not laugh at her again and walked over to the bathroom.

After a while, the room knocked on the door, Xiao Yu hurriedly jumped out of bed, some shy to open the door, not forgetting to look back at the bathroom door.

Ten minutes later, Chen Mocai came out of the bathroom.

Only the room's etc. have been turned off, and the light is not enough.

"Small fish, how to turn off the lights? Have you slept?"

"No...no." The sound of small fishing like a mosquito flies came from the darkness.

Chen Mo couldn't help but be happy. The old wife and his wife are still so shy. It is rare to see Xiao Yu. What makes Xiao Yu so shy?

"Then I turned on the lights and changed my pajamas."

Chen Mo took care of his head with a towel and pressed the switch on the wall.

Oh...

Looking at the situation in the room, Chen Mo's eyes wide open and his mouth open, incredible.

He promised that even if a shape ship is in front of his eyes, there will never be such an exaggerated expression, but everything in front of him seems to be unbelievable than the collision of Mars on the earth.

"This is a required course for the ink woman as a normal woman. I will be dedicated to your research and you will be cheaper."

The sound of Xiao Yu is mixed with a sense of shame and a deep pet.

After that, Xiaoyu did not dare to look at Chen Mo in the quilt. The small head was exposed on the outside, and the head was also equipped with a brain-wave-sensing hat. The position next to the small fisherman was curious and looking forward to seeing his ink. Female.

chapters.title: Chapter 674: : The Golden Age Of Technology
chapters.body:
Chapter 674: : The Golden Age Of Technology

In the era of change of the wind and cloud, the situation changes with each passing day, and it is dizzying.

During this period of time, many world events have taken place and the world pattern has undergone tremendous changes.

With the success of several controlled nuclear fusions, China has allowed the export of controlled nuclear fusion power stations, the world energy revolution has begun, and competition in the field of controlled nuclear fusion technology has officially begun.

The six parties, mainly China, the United States, Russia, the island, India, and Europe, have tried their best to use the most powerful means to rob the controlled nuclear fusion energy market.

The most profitable natural is China, and China has mature nuclear fusion power station technology, and there is almost no enemy.

Various technologies have been released from the marching ant group, as well as news of various technological breakthroughs in the Chinese scientific community. The strength of China's science and technology has risen sharply, the economy has become the number one, and its influence has soared.

Huaxia has become the king of innocence and the new leader of the world.

The European region has also entered a new era, mainly two major power groups.

Among them, the group led by Russia is the most dazzling, Russia's controlled nuclear fusion technology is successful, artificial intelligence is successful, a series of science and technology have broken through, economic development has regained its original glory, and some former Soviet Union countries have begun to sign various kinds with Russia. Free cooperation agreement, the limelight has no two.

Secondly, the European group headed by Germany, France and Britain, the strength cannot be underestimated. Two years after working with India, Europe's advanced artificial intelligence technology broke through successfully. After that, the controlled nuclear fusion technology was successful. Although it was late, it barely kept pace.

In North America, it is still dominated by the United States.

The United States maintains a strong and overbearing style and begins to seek to spread its influence to Central and South America. In the South American region where the controlled nuclear fusion technology is greatly affected, some countries with coal mines as the main economy have collapsed and the situation is chaotic.

The United States took this opportunity to start aid and release its influence to develop the region into a real backyard. Even if the world's recognized leading position changes, the great strength of the United States still exists and continues to affect the surrounding countries.

In the space strategy, the United States launched several spaceships on the moon and began to build a lunar base to develop lunar 氦-3 resources.

Compared with Europe and the Americas, although Africa can't keep up with the pace, there is another kind of unrest.

The old era was backward in technology, there was no particularly powerful world-class country and power, and there was no technical foundation. In the era of technological change, it was still in a backward position.

In addition to the rapid development of Tanzanyi, where the shadow company's military ants are equipped, the development speed of other countries is still slow, and it is unremarkable in the tide of technological change in the world. Due to the collapse of coal and the impact of falling oil prices, many countries in Africa relying on coal and oil are affected and are on the verge of collapse.

The biggest change is the Asian region where the heroes stand side by side. Apart from Russia, China, the island and India are among the strongest countries.

Huaxia has become the world's leading economic and technological leader, and its status is self-evident.

The controlled nuclear fusion technology is the most mature. In the past years of successful external tests, Huaxia has launched more than 30 controlled nuclear fusion power stations in various provinces, replacing thermal power stations, completing the layout of new energy fields, and upgrading the national power grid. Moreover, in all advanced cities, unmanned driving is popular and a new era is successfully led.

The technological breakthroughs brought by the controlled nuclear fusion technology and artificial intelligence technology that have been successfully tested by Indoto, together with the huge population and economic volume in China, the economic aggregate has leapt to the third place and entered the ranks of the powerful countries.
