The island's controlled nuclear fusion technology was successful, and artificial intelligence breakthroughs brought about a breakthrough in technology and the speed of technological development. After China and the United States, it entered the ranks of the world's powerful countries in the new era.

Not only that, the controlled nuclear fusion technology breakthrough, the island nation's power to build a nuclear fusion power station, the implementation of new energy industry, the demand for fossil energy has become smaller. After the last blockade, a new era is coming, and the influence of the United States on the island nation is gradually waning.

During the period, a small incident occurred, and the island’s constitutional amendment was successful. The island’s leaders could be re-elected for a maximum of five times, greatly extending their term of office. Finally, the island country chose to sign a cooperation agreement with Australia, and promised to help Australia build a controlled nuclear fusion power station and become the new island Australia alliance.

In addition, ASEAN feels that the changes in the world's pattern have become closer to each other and have established various technical research laboratories, hoping to lag behind the pace of development in the world.

On the other side of the Middle East, the old king of the Arab kingdom died and the new king Muhammad succeeded to succeed.

The Arab world is also aware of the changes in the world. Under the impetus of Muhammad, the Arab kingdom, the United Arab Emirates, and the Persian (I. Lang) countries are the mainstays. They are mediating and integrating the Arab world to abandon their predecessors and jointly set up a science and technology laboratory. The Arab League of the World is faint.

The reconstruction of the world pattern of the new era began to emerge as a prototype.

Huaxia, the United States and the United States, plus the North American Group, the Russian Union (New. Su. United), the European Group, the Australian Alliance, the South Asian Indy, the Southeast Asian Union, the Arab League, the South American Group, and the African Union. In addition to this, there are some scattered medium-sized countries and small countries.

The changes in the old economic structure system triggered a global financial turmoil.

The financial turmoil has brought about tremendous changes in the world economic system and has been completely shuffled.

In the old era, the oil and dollar economy system completely collapsed. The world began to form a diversified basket of currency trading systems dominated by the Chinese currency and the US dollar, supplemented by the euro, ruble, yen and rupee.

Some of the backward technology companies were eliminated, the world's science and technology began to integrate, and some small countries also collapsed due to the financial turmoil.

After the financial turmoil, it seems as if the big tree after the dead leaves are cut off, and the new world is revived, and the global economy is ushered in the most insane growth.

During these changes, the major powers have been tacitly calm, quietly carrying out their own layout, and concentrating on the resources needed.

During this time, one company attracted the attention of many parties, namely the marching ant group.

During the financial turmoil, the marching ant group was not affected at all, accumulated enough funds, operated through various channels, acquired some companies that were on the verge of bankruptcy, and seized the market resources of the integrated company. At the same time, in some small countries, through the shadow company, the company acquired the minerals. Resources.

The marching ant group has grown wildly in this change.

In addition, in the battle for controlled nuclear fusion cakes, the marching ant group has become China's most prominent pioneer, earning huge benefits.

Huaxia allowed the export of controlled nuclear fusion technology. Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group took the autumn wind and swept the leaves, and won the construction contract of 51 controlled nuclear fusion power stations in 37 countries in a short time.

The power station construction process took only three years.

In the past three years, the marching ant group has used the all-intelligent construction machinery to complete the construction of 51 controlled nuclear fusion power stations in advance and hand over to the house, which shocked the world.

Such a terrible infrastructure building capability, the limelight is no longer the same, let the world look at it.

After the shuffling, the world discovered that the tentacles of the marching ant group have taken root in various fields. The financial and technical strength of the marching ant group has long been a country, and the huge commercial empire that is rooted in the world market has taken shape.

Everyone who noticed all of this was numb and treacherous.

The situation is stable, no one dares to play the idea of the marching ant group. Even if it is a big country, try to touch the marching ant group, face their huge influence and scientific and technological strength, and they can't get away with it.

The news about the marching ant group is not limited to the scientific and technological community.

During this time, the marching ant group headed by Chen Mo, in the name of Zhao Min, Xiao Yu, Li Lingfeng, Zhu Li, Zhang Yi and other senior executives of the army ants group, the university was established in an all-round way, starting in Binhai City, named: unparalleled. Chen Mo served as the first president of the university.

Unparalleled universities are enrolled for global enrollment and can be entered through self-enrollment examinations. If you master top-notch special skills or talents that are beyond the ordinary, you may also be considered by unparalleled universities.

Wushuang University independently recruits no more than 3,000 talented students in each period, of which no less than 1,000 Chinese students have no back door, no relationship, no identity, all based on personal ability and school choice. It mainly recruits students majoring in physics, mathematics, biology, chemistry, medicine, computer, machinery, aviation, etc., and enrolls in full scholarships.

All textbooks and teaching content, edited by Chen Mo, are designed to cultivate top scientific research talents who lead the world in technology.

The unification of the university has attracted the attention of the global education community.

After the publication of the textbooks and teaching contents of Wushu University, it caused quite a small shock.

The content of all the textbooks of Wushu University is far advanced from the existing teaching content level. Many basic science fields, even the current laboratory research, have not been involved. Just the university textbooks shock the world.

The news of the first batch of self-enrollment examinations at the university was released, almost letting the global genius boy smash the scalp, only to get the admission notice of Wushu University.

The growth of the marching ant group has very detailed plans. Some strategists seem to be aware of the unprecedented ambitions of the marching ants in the layout of the marching ant group.

The reshuffle of the world pattern lasted for three years before it came to a close. Numerous major news news, countless shocks mixed with it.

Calm time, maintained for two years.

These five years are crucial to the marching ant group for five years, especially in terms of technology layout and R&D.

The expansion of the second phase of the space base was completed, the extension of the army ant headquarters was completed, various laboratories were established, and the basic equipment for research and development was comprehensively improved. No other thing could stop the ultra-fast development speed of the marching ant group.

Five years ago, the technology of the future that was once imaginary was just getting started, and it has now become universal.

Among them, Huaxia has the biggest change.

The popularity of new energy vehicles, the expansion of environmental protection projects, the promotion of automatic driving, the expansion of smart cities to major first-tier cities, the popularity of holographic technology and artificial intelligence technology, the leading of clean energy technology, and the leading space projects, deserved world leaders.

The country is almost the same every day, and the living standards and lifestyles of ordinary people have undergone tremendous changes.

The door to global technological innovation has opened, and the world's talents and companies have begun to focus on technological innovation. The application techniques and innovative ideas of various partial doors have begun to enter the ordinary life vision.

The continuous popularization of technology and technology, the technological breakthrough brought by advanced artificial intelligence, has reduced the technological gap between several major powers. The world pattern has returned to a new equilibrium.

Some established companies have been eliminated, and some new companies have seized the opportunity of this change and replaced it.

Every day, news of various technological breakthroughs has spread, and the world's science and technology system is constantly improving and enriching, full of vitality.

Students are passionate about innovation and creativity, basic education is changing, and the world is full of curiosity and anticipation for a new future.

This is an era of contending, a time of generations, a vibrant era. Unlimited vitality, opportunities and adventures coexist, success and failure are in the same box.

This is a brand new era.

Later generations called this time period: the golden age of technology.

chapters.title: Chapter 675: : This Is Mars
chapters.body:
Chapter 675: : This Is Mars

In the past five years, this is the fastest growing five-year period for the marching ant group.

In the past, they had to worry too much about rapid development, and during this time, they did not have too much scruples. With the globally disrupted situation, the marching ant group has gained too much benefit from it.

The outside world only knows that the marching ant group technology is very advanced, but they are advanced in technology and there are not many people who know it.

The reshuffle of the world pattern and the chaos of the financial turmoil are a test for the average enterprise, but it is an unprecedented opportunity for the marching ant group.

With the pattern of era-changing as a cover, they can be unscrupulous and no one notices them. When the outside world notices them, everything has already become a foregone conclusion. An unprecedented business empire has been rooted in the global business system.

In the past five years, the marching ant group has gathered the world's talents and is developing at a crazy pace every day.

A long time ago, Chen Mo and Zhao Min realized that the current earth science community has not kept up with Chen Mo’s development speed.

Even the talents of the marching ants group with information only barely keep up with Chen Mo's pace, to improve some trivial details of Chen Mo's research, and to slightly package Chen Mo's research into products and bring them to market.

Development and growth can't rely on Chen Mo alone.

Therefore, within the marching ants, a complete talent training system has been developed.

The importance of basic science and basic education, Chen Mo naturally knows that only by keeping existing talents on the basis, they will not become castles in the air.

The emergence of the unparalleled university is also a perfection of the talent training system for the marching ant group. Let the marching ant group quickly digest Chen Mo's research content, from the foundation, and keep up with Chen Mo's pace.

Some talents have flowed out, and the scope of patent authorization has expanded to give the world an overall opportunity, but the top talents remain in the marching ant group.

Inside the marching ants, two of the most efficient teams have been formed.

One is a young and energetic R&D team, and the other is a loyal and concerted management team. These two teams provide the best logistics for Chen Mo's efficient research.

Under the leadership of Chen Mo, all the way is like a broken bamboo.

Although there have been many technological breakthroughs in the world in the past five years, only the core team of the marching ants know that the so-called breakthroughs in the outside world are not worth mentioning compared with the marching ant group.

Almost all of the top products in the technology market have the shadow of the marching ant group.

Most of the top technology, born in the first building.

Some of the laboratories in Building No. 1 are open to the company's core research team, but anyone who can enter the No. 1 Building Laboratory is the core of the Army Ant Group and a symbol of identity and strength.

After the expansion of the headquarters of the Army Ant Group, the area has doubled, and the area of the No. 1 building area has also doubled.

Building No. 1 remains as mysterious as ever. It is the highest power area of the marching ant group and is also the forefront of humanity's top technology.

In the laboratory, before the holographic platform, only Chen Mo and Mo Nu.

After five years of continuous design optimization, the number of steerable quantum bits of quantum chips has exceeded 10,000, and the amount of calculation is almost unlimited.

In these years, in Xiaoyu, according to Chen Mo's request to learn a variety of knowledge, now the emotional enlightenment for the ink girl has been completed, the ink girl's emotions have reached the human emotional standards.

Xiao Yu will give Chen Mo's emotional awareness to all the students to learn.

The current ink girl, both in terms of procedural and ‘quantum consciousness’, relies on Chen Mo and has the purest feelings. Like a small fisherman, the ink girl has been erotically acquainted with Chen Mo, and he is very dependent on him.

Xiao Yu is also very satisfied with the results of his hard work.

Ink women have self-awareness, can think through quantum consciousness, and think creatively.

Now she, quite another ‘super brain’, exists like a shoulder.

In the past few years, half of the new application technology that has been continuously emerging in the No. 1 building is from the hands of the ink girl, and the technology provided by Chen Mo, the ink girl can be optimized in an instant and provide the best solution.

The success of the ink-creating consciousness of Chen Mou has increased the efficiency of Chen Mo’s technical research by countless times.

Now even if Chen Mo is not in the laboratory or not studying, the ink woman can create technology, which is a real intelligent life.

On the holographic platform.

A planet with a diameter of two meters is suspended. The blue, green and white alternate, like the blue sky and white clouds, but not the earth.

This is Mars.

Strictly speaking, it is a quantum computer simulation, after the successful transformation of Mars.

The planetary transformation project was prepared for a full five years. During the five years, a total of 11,463 ii-type seismographs, 167 exploration satellites and 4,354 various robots were installed on Mars.

The massive geological information collected on Mars, including the location of the Martian underground lake, and the weakest position of the Martian crust, are all clear.

Now Chen Mo has the most detailed data on Mars.

In the process of exploration, Chen Mo discovered that Mars once had life, but it was all low-level life, and there was no intelligent creature and civilization. Later, in the Martian climate change, the only creature on Mars was extinct.

Based on the collected Mars data, the ink girl simulated the activity modification.

The suspended planet on the holographic platform is now Mars after the successful transformation of the theory, and it seems to be alive and well. The plan to transform Mars is mature, and the next step is when the plan is implemented.

"Ink girl, are you ready for the preparation?"

"All are ready." The ink girl nodded, her mood was a bit shy, and her character was more like a shy and quiet girl.

“The planetary transformation project is going to be officially implemented.”

The sky is clear and the sky is clear.

The Ant Ant Space Center is as busy as usual, and the Ants Air Plane has been prepared at the airport.

Shi Dongting wore a space suit, sat in the position and fastened his seat belt.

The destination of this trip is the lunar base.

He is an astronaut trained by the Flying Ant Center. The mission is to go to the lunar base and pay attention to the situation of the lunar base.

Today, the lunar base business model of the Fei Ant Space Center has taken shape.

Every year, the company will send an astronaut to the moon to replace the work of the last astronaut and stationed at the base.

The stationed personnel are not alone on the moon.

Because on the moon, in addition to himself, there are scientists who are engaged in lunar and space research.

The space radio telescope matrix and optical telescope built by the Flying Ant Aerospace Company and the China National Astronomical Observatory have long been put into use. Every time, there will be scientists flying the spacecraft to the lunar base, or domestic or international scientists.

There are five resident scientists, plus six of them. In addition, there are passengers who travel to the moon every once in a while.

His mission is to serve as the head of the base, pay attention to the status of the base, and serve those who are at the base of the moon to help them, after all, those are their customers.

It will take a year to get back to Earth.

"In October this year, there will be a rare Orion meteor shower, but unfortunately there is no meteor shower on the moon, you have to miss it." A scientist in the same industry lamented.

"Not missed, there must be rain on the moon, ochre rain." Shi Dongting said with fun.

The scientist next to him was happy, and smiled and agreed.

"Ten ants will take off after five minutes. Please take the seat belts and prepare for the takeoff."

Ants artificial intelligence prompts, the two did not talk again, began to check if there are no other problems, ready to take off. Five minutes later, the Ants rose slowly, rising to the sky and disappearing into the sky.

chapters.title: Chapter 676: : Asteroid Propeller
chapters.body:
Chapter 676: : Asteroid Propeller

The planetary transformation project is very dynamic on Mars, and it can be concealed for a while, and strive for enough time for his transformation. Try to make Mars transformation a foregone conclusion before it is discovered outside.

In preparation for the transformation of Mars, as early as three years ago, Chen Mo began to clean up the Mars probe and other countries' orbiting satellites. The Mars probes and satellites launched during the period will fail indefinitely.

With the turmoil of the financial turmoil and changes in the world's landscape, the news of the loss of Mars and Mars satellites is well covered.

The outside world did not know that it was Chen Mo’s hand, only thought it was a malfunction.

Now on Mars, it has already been cleared.

The countries with the ability, now the main energy is to explore the moon, build a lunar base, because the controlled nuclear fusion technology is mature, the 氦-3 becomes the most critical resource.

Mars exploration now has no satellites or detectors other than the marching ant group.

For this day's arrival, Chen Mo has been preparing for a long time.

Today, this action is a bit big. There must be a big movement. I can’t help people outside. It’s just that what is so big and moving is what they say.

"Are the asteroids you need found?" Chen Mo asked.

"The asteroids that have been identified, the orbits of the asteroids, are all calculated clearly." The ink girl nodded seriously: "According to the calculation, after 431 hours and 37 minutes, the program 1 can be executed."

In the past few years, Chen Mo has launched a probe and a satellite, and traveled to the asteroid belt to find the asteroids needed to carry out the plan.

After exploring a total of 2,743 suitable asteroids, a variety of retrofit options were determined based on the asteroid's mass and orbit.

It has now been approved by the official launch.

it has started.

The instructions came from the first building, and the staff and artificial intelligence of the Feixiang Space Center base were all received.

All the staff at the Feiyang Aerospace Center turned their attention to the airport area of Area 3 after receiving the notice of the major mission of the No. 3 airport.

"What do you say about the big move of the boss this time?"

"Who knows? The project that the boss has done is never a small project. Maybe this time it is a Mars base."

"The boss is simply a god."

"I sometimes wonder if the boss is an alien."

"..."

The staff of the Flying Ant Space Center began to paralyze. The big screen of the command center is to cut the picture to the airport in the 3rd district. Suddenly I saw the picture of the launch site. Everyone opened their mouths and stayed in the clay.

The ordinary staff did not know what Chen Mo’s project was, but the core executives of the marching ant group knew a little.

In the office of the Flying Ant Center, Li Ruoxi looked at the situation at Airport 3.

The No. 3 airport is the second base to be newly built. Around the airport, it is a large-scale mechanical factory. It is fully intelligent in producing all kinds of machinery and belongs to the science fiction factory.

It was managed directly by Chen Mo, and ordinary staff could not get close.

The staff of the General Flying Ant Aerospace Company only knows that the base area 3 is producing various super-large machines and does not know the specific role.

But Li Ruoxuan knows that there are indeed a variety of machines in production, grotesque, and everything.

What impressed her the most was the mechanical column thruster, which the boss said was an asteroid thruster that could collect asteroid meteorites.

The funds they have concentrated on the company are all preparing for the boss's big project. In the past five years, their company has invested no less than three trillion yuan for that big project. Until now, it has continued to burn money.

The money spent every minute is not earned by ordinary people for a lifetime.

This is the project that has invested the most since the company was founded, like a bottomless pit.

Mars project.

The core executives of the marching ant group only know the name of the project, and the specific program content, except for the boss, Zhao Min and the ink girl, others know nothing.

Suddenly, in the vision of Li Ruoxuan.

A mechanical column rises from the sky, and there is no shortage of fireworks that are set off during the holiday season.

Li Ruoxuan recognized that the mechanical columns that flew to the clouds were the mechanical column thrusters she had seen, the asteroid thrusters.

Each mechanical column is four meters in diameter and more than twenty meters in length. The tail is equipped with a large thruster with a diameter of three meters. The top is a movable mechanical structure, like a giant claw, which can be cut into the rock to fix it.

A steady stream of propellers, neat and orderly, pointing to the sky,

Even if she knows some news, today she sees the amount of this size and feels scalp tingling.

Sure enough, the boss’s courage is not what they can compare.

The huge movement of the No. 3 airport could not stand other people. The intelligence personnel who paid attention to the Fei Ant Space Center through the surveillance satellites all saw this scene. They all breathed in the air and the eyes bounced straight.

Such a dense launch.

Really horrible.

"Is this a rocket?"

"Long is not like a rocket."

"Missile?"

"What does Chen Mo want to do? Who can explain what this Fuck is?"

"Chen Mo finally pulled out his long, thick iron bar."

"Fakyou, can you describe it well? Now it is collecting intelligence and observing the movement of the marching ant group. Why do you want to laugh at me?"

Seeing such a dense launch, many intelligence personnel in the country began to be nervous. In these long and dark ‘mechanical pillars, if there were missiles or bombs, it would be enough to bomb the world.

Such a terrible strength.

The flying ant's space-intensive launch was carried out for three hours, with thousands of mechanical columns being fired. The people I saw, from the beginning of the shock, to the later numbness.

The unprecedented action of the Ant Ant Space Center has shocked the global intelligence officials.

How much money and financial resources do you need to make so many large mechanical columns that can fly? What a terrible manufacturing strength is needed?

This is the largest number of launches they have ever seen, as if those mechanical columns don't cost money.

It is not known how many horrible big guys are hidden in the Ant Ant Space Center.

The shocking aftermath has not yet fallen. A large warehouse in Zone 3 of the Flying Ant Center has opened, and a super-large mechanical column that is over 100 meters long and nearly ten meters in diameter has been slowly pulled out.

Six super-large ring thrusters flew out of the warehouse, hung the top of the super-large asteroid propeller, and with the help of the crane, erected the propeller nearly 100 meters long.

The mechanical structure at the bottom of the giant mechanical column is scattered and stands firmly on the launch site.

A pillar of the sky?

No one has ever seen such a huge mechanical column structure.

Is this also going to be launched?

The person who saw this mechanical column has been shocked to speak.

Such a huge mechanical column, if launched, has reached the point of non-humanity.

It’s terrible! !

In the conference room of the marching ant headquarters, the core senior personnel are also watching the live broadcast of the launch from the Fei Ant Space Center. Even if they knew some insider information, they were also given this scene.

"The boss seems to be a bit of a bad day." Lin Zhiyuan stunned for a long time and took a word. He didn't know how to describe his feelings.

"The boss has always been very good."

Lin Shu eyes brave the stars, and the worship of Chen Mo did not decrease.

"President, is this really an ordinary Mars project?" Li Lingfeng couldn't help but swallow, and saw this scene for the first time.

In the conference room, many high-level demeanors were deeply impressed by Chen Mo’s courage. The investment of several trillions in the past five years, now seeing the results, shocked them.

"The eyes are wide open, the universe is very big, and it has only just begun."

Zhao Min remained calm and saw that the pig ran away, she was nothing to be surprised. That man, like a god, can create even the consciousness of the ink girl. There is nothing impossible in his hands.

The propellers under the giant mechanical column ignited, and under the stunned expression of everyone, they went straight into the sky.

chapters.title: Chapter 677: : Crazy Rosen
chapters.body:
Chapter 677: : Crazy Rosen

The Flying Ants Space Center fires thousands of unknown mechanical columns and twenty giant mechanical columns over 100 meters.

The news caused waves.

Some passers-by photographed the mechanical column far away from the space base on the outskirts of Binhai City. The screen was exposed to the network, making everyone open their eyes.

This is the largest launch of humanity in history, and it’s a terror.

The outside world is concerned about the marching ant group. When such a big move is a project, the marching ant group is only publicly announced in a lukewarm manner. It is a space mineral resource development project without much explanation.

The real situation is that thousands of mechanical columns enter space and leave the gravitational range of the Earth, speeding up the asteroid belt between Mars and Jupiter.

Island country.

A secret base.

The interior of the mountain is hollowed out, and it looks wide open.

This is one of the most secret military bases in the island country. There are no special identities and instructions, even senior officers cannot enter.

Oda Tenzaki stood in front of the base, like a clay sculpture, meticulous, behind him, all armed soldiers.

For a long time, the base door opened, and a car under the cover of the night, entered the base and stopped. A short man came down from the car, it was Anbei.

"The Prime Minister Sang." Oda Ten is heavily respected and looks serious.

"Ten Tibetan Mulberry, take me to see the situation of the robot." Anbei slightly sorted out the clothes and looked around.

"please."

Oda Tenzang did not dare to neglect and led Anbei to the base.

Two intelligent robots, fighting underneath, holding a samurai sword, are deadly and quite flexible.

Physically, the robot is more than two meters high and looks a little higher than the war robots of the marching ant group. The elbows and the fighting thorns look a bit strong. Like the armor of the armor, at first glance it looks like a warrior in the ancient times of the island.

This is a war robot developed by the island nation and is called: Samurai.

After the Syrian War, the world realized the horror of war robots and understood that the form of war is changing. Countries began to compete for the development of war robots and anti-war robot weapons.

Artificial intelligence breakthroughs make this development faster.

After several years of polishing, the technology of several national war robots is quite mature.

"These years have been continuously improved. There are three models of Samurai robots. As you can see, the samurai robot is very flexible. In addition, he has installed intelligent bullets, two small missiles, can use samurai swords, and functions basic and marching ant group exposure. The war robots are similar in function and are one of the most advanced war robots in the world."

"How is the brave robot than Huaxia?" Anbei looked at the fighting of the two war robots below and suddenly spoke.

"I don't know."

Brave robots, China was very mature a few years ago, and they are now reaching the level of others. They don't have much data on the robots of the China War. They haven't touched the war robots of the Army Ant Group. They can only say it.

"According to the test of our samurai robot, under the premise of not shooting anti-war robot missiles and anti-device sniper rifles, a samurai robot is quite a traditional team."

“How many units have you produced now?” Anbei looked at the test video of the samurai robot, and the narrow eyes picked up and seemed to be calculating.

"More than 3,000 units are still in production." Oda Tenzawa said: "In addition to samurai robots, there are other kinds of war robots."

The two arrived at the equipment room of the base, looking at them, a dense robot, cold and solemn.

In addition to samurai robots, there are also spider robots, with thousands of spikes and spiked spider feet that radiate cold light under the light, and can instantly pierce the human body.

"Prime Minister Sang, when is the plan to start?" Oda Ten Hides his lips, with madness in his eyes.

"Wait for the opportunity, it is not the time to prepare for it first. The war can't be provoked by us. Otherwise, we will repeat the mistakes of a hundred years ago."

Anbei gently shook his head and his mouth was hungry.

"The calm can't last long."

Eva looked at the information submitted, in front of her, her strategic think tank team, led by a man in his thirties.

Rosen, chief of the White House Strategic Think Tank, was born in a global strategic consulting firm. In the first five years, he succeeded in calculating the world's situation and it was undoubted.

It is to let the White House in the global strategic layout, look at the opportunities, get involved in South America, and achieve major strategic success, so that Washington can take the lead in the change.

So he was invited by Eva to be the chief of the White House strategic think tank team.

People who know him will have two impressions of him: mad, love wine.

But he has mad capital.

"Under the calm world, the undercurrents are turbulent. The reshuffle of the pattern also means that power is shuffled and the war is inevitable. The calm in front is just the accumulation of power. The longer the calm, the more fierce the war.

Hua Xia needless to say, the current one is a big one, returning to the glorious history of history. Russia’s national strength has returned to its peak and there is the meaning of rebuilding the new Soviet Union. Although it has not been formed, the embryonic framework has been completed. The island's scientific and technological strength is also getting stronger and stronger, and now it will not be willing to stay under us, nor will it be willing to stay in the same place. ”

"What do we do next?"

Eva put down the information file and handed a small glass of red wine to Rosen. For this kind of treatment, Rosen did not take any politeness and accepted it.

"Wait."

Rosen took the red wine and drank it.

"The history of thousands of years of civilization in the world, every time the pattern changes, is accompanied by war. This is the social will, which can be changed by non-individuals or the will of a country. From the outbreak of war, it is only the last fuse."

"On the other side of the island?" Eva nodded gently and asked seriously.

"Let." Rosen's voice was loud and his face was confident: "I can't help it, let it go, let him bite others. Their millennial history, who thinks they are an excellent nation, but they live in the disaster-prone island country, by the East The great powers suppressed the millennium. There was a chance to turn over a hundred years ago, but unfortunately it failed in the end. It was suppressed by us for a hundred years, and it was extremely wrong. Now the opportunity is coming again."

"Do you mean that they will shoot the big country in the East?"

"will not."

Rosen put down the glass and shook his head slightly.

"They are not stupid. The current big country in the East is not the look of a weak one a hundred years ago. At that time, the weak Eastern powers, they were all defeated. Now, when they are at their peak, there is no difference between them and death."

"Then they will do it for us?" Eva frowned.

The island countries were suppressed by them for a hundred years. In these years, the wool was cut several times. The two cannons were still thrown away by them. The island country hated them and was sure.

"Not too."

Rosen still shook his head and saw Eva's face puzzled and no longer sold off.

"Even if we fall into the second place, it is not what they dare to touch. In the shadow of nearly a hundred years, they have a fear in us. Once the chaos is opened, the island country has two roads, south or north.

The north is the polar bear. The Far East is vast, but it is underdeveloped and can be Raiders, but they have to face the anger of the polar bear. If the warriors open, the polar bears fight in Europe, and the backyard ignores them. They may wait for an opportunity to take a bite. But the polar bear had a cannon, and they had to face the angry revenge of the polar bear when they took a bite. It was not a joke. Therefore, things do not work on both sides, the probability of going north is not big, only south.

There are three roads south, South America, Southeast Asian islands and the kangaroo. South America is taken by us, he will not choose. Most likely it is the kangaroo and the island nation. After succumbing to the island nation for thousands of years, this opportunity will definitely not only choose the island country, the land of the kangaroo is probably their biggest goal. ”

"Are they not aligned?"

Eva is more confused. Just just said this sentence, she saw the smile on Rosen’s face and immediately understood it.

"There is no eternal alliance, only eternal interests. Enemy frontal attacks require cost, friends behind the sickle, it is easy to die. Their population, technology, culture are more powerful than Oceania, killing a batch, assimilation of a batch, almost swallowed Down.

In the past few years, the island country has witnessed the opportunity to cooperate with the kangaroo. It is also an investment. It is also a joint construction of a nuclear fusion power station. It is not like loving him. It is more like fattening before the annexation, and laying the foundation for the future. ”

Not waiting for Eva to open, Rosen took the lead.

"Don't think about helping them. They are doing dog walking. They must have the awareness of walking the dog. We have a South American strategy to carry out. The situation is different. We help them. The island country is not happy. It also helps South American countries. Our strategy is also troublesome. , pretend not to see it."

Eva finally did not speak, and nodded: "What then layout?"

"Still wait, the layout of all parties is almost completed, the world seems to be balanced, it is actually a deadlock. Now is not the time to break the deadlock, who can endure the last, who has the advantage is greater, now is different from before, we do not need to The water is simmering, letting other countries come to the end to fish. When a fire is enough to trigger the **** of the wolves, the war will be a matter of course."

Eva nodded and picked up the information and handed it to Rosen: "What about the large-scale launch of the marching ant group?"

chapters.title: Chapter 678: : Greek
chapters.body:
Chapter 678: : Greek

“The answer given by the marching ant group is to mine asteroid mines. Such a large-scale launch is in line with the mining of asteroid mines. The universe is so big that the scale of launch is not eye-catching.”

"According to intelligence, the marching ant group in Africa and South America, through the acquisition and nuclear fusion power station, a company has mastered more than 30 large and small veins, they are not lacking mineral resources."

“There is no conflict between the lack of mineral resources and the mining of asteroids.”

"..."

In the conference room, you said a word, chaos, Pu Jin had some headaches, and finally knocked on the table, the meeting room immediately quieted down.

As president, he has been in this position for too long, and now he is old, this is not a good thing.

Over the years, he has always wanted to train a successor, but he could not find a suitable successor. Nowadays, at the most critical moment of the global strategy, if the people with insufficient capacity take over the country, and if they fail to make the same mistakes, their country will be completely abolished.

He is daring and can only continue to rely on this position.

"The matter of the marching ant group is not important, the important thing is the future layout." Pu Jin said: "We are now concerned that the marching ant group does not have much effect."

Many think tanks in the conference room face each other.

Energy changes, changes in the pattern, have caused a deadlock today and entered a delicate balance.

Anyone with a strategic vision knows that this balance cannot last long. Once the deadlock breaks, the next war will sweep the world.

Russia has a vast territory.

To the east is North America across the strait. There are also ambitious island nations below. The South is currently the most powerful China, and the West is the European Union.

It is also that he is strong enough to maintain Russia's current situation and switch to other people. This country may have already collapsed.

"Next, for the time being, you don't have to worry about the marching ant group. Now, set up the highest strategic center." Pujin's voice is unprecedented.

All the strategic think tanks in the conference room were shrunk and full of doubts.

"why?"

"Deducting the Third World War."

In the conference room, everyone was stunned and looked stunned.

......

"The tenth batch."

Wang Hai stood on the high platform and overlooked the soldiers below.

Just one hundred, each soldier's clothes are made of special camouflage uniforms, neat and uniform, with a solemn expression, and the scent of the body, you can see that all of them have received the most professional training.

Five years ago, he was ordered to form an armed group. He has not slackened in these years.

This is the tenth batch of soldiers.

These fighters have been selected through layers, through loyalty assessment, and have also developed potential. They themselves do not know that they have received potential development, and only think that they are training.

There are not many soldiers at the base. Except for the damage, the team size is about 1,000 people, but each one is an elite, and it is a special force of any country.

And they have the most sophisticated and advanced equipment.

The tasks they perform are simple, secretly protecting the interests of the marching ant group, and using some unusual means to deal with those who want to deal with them, just like the mercenary group.

Every time it starts, we really need some abnormal means.

"How is the Greek map?" Wang Hai looked at the congratulations around him.

"Now, Hitu has become the armed leader, everything is normal." Hehe answered seriously and was meticulous.

"It seems that the progress is good, continue to sweep the road to him, send some potential drugs to him in the past, he needs to raise some strong confidants." Wang Hai thought about making a decision.

......

"General, they are coming." The man entered the war room report and looked at the back in front of the sand table, with a strong awe.

"Is it all arranged?" The man's low voice sounded.

"All arranged." The reporters who came to report quickly nodded and swallowed.

"Let's go."

The man standing in front of the sand table turned around and had a pair of sky blue eyes, which made people forget and couldn't forget it. The clear blue, feeling the gaze from the deep sea, but no one feels the eyes are very beautiful, but cold, as if the ghost is staring at the bones.

Seeing these eyes, the body trembled and did not dare to look straight.

Hitu glanced at the man who reported it, grabbed his hat and put it on, and left the war room.

In five years, he stepped forward to today and took the current position. The story is only known to him.

Five years ago, he was still a tribe of ordinary youth. Because of these blue eyes, he was regarded as an unknown and cursed by the tribe, and his family was blinded and bullied.

The instructor recruited him, healed his illness, trained him, taught him strategy, and made him a powerful warrior and became a commander. After the training is completed, he chooses the task that the instructor gives him, mixes him into an armed group, then controls the armed forces and becomes the leader himself.

He completed the task a month ago.

In the eyes of the subordinates, Hito is very powerful and terrible. Whether it is shooting, fighting, tactics and combat command, everything is proficient.

Strong ability, hot style, let him stand out in the team quickly, valued by the former leader of the army, selected as a confidant. In the past few years, their armed forces have continued to grow and their prestige has continued to accumulate.

His prestige also threatened the status of the leader. The rabbit died and the dog was cooked, but the leader was ready to get rid of the Greek figure and was killed.

Hetu seized power by means of Thunder, cleared the confidant of the former leader of the armed forces, completed the blood wash, became the new leader, and his fierce name spread.

Now in this small country, he is also a strong man, and the general armed forces dare not touch his mold.

In these years, the forces have continued to expand and become strong, and he hopes to rarely contact outsiders. Someone came to see them today, but he was very surprised and very curious.

Behind Hitu is a middle-aged man in a suit who doesn’t seem to be as fierce as other people, but is one of the armed high-ranking tops, called Abu She, who is the first to follow Hito, smart and has Business mind, specializing in the management of armed internal affairs and logistics.

After Hitus seized power, the armed logistics was well managed under the management of Abhse.

Normally, Hito is not in contact with people. He is training soldiers and expanding the territory. Now someone suddenly finds him, but it surprises him. He has always guessed that he hopes to have a backstage. Now this speculation is more certain.

"I am a bit curious, who is coming?" Abhssa spoke.

Just as the words just asked, Abhisha felt a stiff body. The cold guy behind Hittus turned and stared at him.

The meaning is very clear, you ask too much.

"Eminem, I am curious to ask, purely curious, no other thoughts, are you not curious?" Abhish scared a cold sweat.

Eminem is the loyal follower of Hitto. The people inside the armed forces call him a hyena, because his character is as crazy and cold-blooded as a hyena, and he is a warrior that Hitto has saved. He is loyal to Hetu. He will not hesitate to execute any of Hetu’s orders.

There are even rumors that the former leader was assassinated and the dog may be involved.

If he wants to make a sound, Eminem will definitely not hesitate to kill him. There is no extra sentence.

"Don't make trouble." A female voice rang, a woman dressed in **** clothes came, and she happened to be behind Hito.

The woman is the right arm of Hitu, called Kaya, although it is a black pearl, but it is a poisonous black pearl, extremely dangerous, no one dares to provoke.

When the woman appeared, Eminem’s original killings disappeared and she returned to her usual indifferent face.

"Scared the baby." Abhishe wiped a cold sweat, and he was embarrassed: "I am so ruthless, I am curious to ask."

"Let's say a few words."

Keya opened, and Abshashe closed his mouth.

However, in the eyes of Kaya, there was also a hint of curiosity.

In this chaotic and hunger-ridden land, conspiracy and blood never disappear, people worship the strong, and Hitu is the kind of person.

As they follow Hitu, they understand a lot of things, and Hitu's personal ability is at the top, his eyes and means are very decisive, and the management team is disciplined, making people feel like real soldiers.

The impression that Hitu gave them was that they were born to be generals.

Such a person, who was born in ordinary armed forces, guessed that the general must have a story that was unknown, but they did not dare to ask. Normally, the generals will not be in contact with people. Now they suddenly come and let him pay so much attention and have to make them curious.

In a relatively well-decorated house, the heavily guarded, armed high-rises were all present.

Hitu is headed, waiting quietly, and others are afraid to speak even if they are curious. It’s rare to see that Hito is so grand, it’s not easy to come.

Not long after, a helicopter landed.

The group of people came down from the helicopter and waited for other people to react. He hoped to take a step and quickly greeted him.

This scene, let Abu She and Kaya and other people shrink, face each other, some surprised, it seems that coming, more important than they think.

Seeing the coming people, many armed high-level look.

The players who came down from the helicopters were equipped with horror that was beyond imagination. Compared with the people who came here, they were self-proclaimed in the armed forces of the tribes. It was simply garbage in the garbage.

Really armed to the teeth, they have seen the most well-equipped US special forces, not so horrible. Every player has a strong breath and a serious look. From the pace to the formation, it is much higher than the regular military.

The actions of the pedestrians gave them an illusion.

Is this a regular special elite force?

"Mr. Gan, prepared a banquet, please here." Hetu personally led the way, his expression was dull, and he could not see the anger.

"General Hitu, very polite." Gan Yu looked around and gave a slight tribute.

He was the one who was sent to send potential potions. When Wang Hai and Zhong Lei came to Africa for development, he and He He were among the selected people. They first followed Wang Hai into African development.

Zhong Lei manages the arsenal, Wang Hai takes him and he celebrates the development of a secret base. He is the deputy of the base.

Now Gan Yu has been dressed and camouflaged, his skin is dark and his beard is a mustache. Even if an acquaintance is here, he will never recognize him.

Entering the house, Gan Yu looked around.

The decoration is simple, there is no luxury of some warlords, and there are many dishes on the table. Here, this kind of wine is very good.

"This time I brought what you need." Gan Yu looked around, it goes without saying.

"Please inside." Hitu's eyes lit up, leading Gan Yu into a room, indicating that others should not follow.

"This one."

A root agent appeared in the vision of Hito, even if it was tempered in the rain of bullets to a very calm hope, at this moment, I couldn't help but breathe the air and reveal the excitement.

This pharmacy, he knows.

chapters.title: Chapter 679: : Playing 'Billiards' With Asteroids
chapters.body:
Chapter 679: : Playing 'Billiards' With Asteroids

Far in the orbit between Mars and Jupiter, there are thousands of asteroids of different sizes and shapes.

An asteroid floats along the orbit of hundreds of millions of years. The asteroid has a long tube shape and a pit on the surface. It looks like a large corn with irregular rice grains and about two diameters. Kilometers, the smallest class of asteroids in asteroids.

On the asteroid, a tracking detector is attached to the rock, and the light flashes in the ancient space. On the detector, there are clear signs of the marching ant group and the flying ant space.

It is the tracker that Chen Mo launched a few years ago to confirm the position of the asteroid.

Standing on the asteroid, you can see a little bit of blue highlights are flying fast. About ten minutes, the dense blue highlights appear not far from the asteroid, which is the mechanical column that Chen Mo fired.

"Discovering 'corn', at the predetermined location, has locked the target asteroid, and Optimus Prime requested an autonomous implementation." The mechanical column follows the asteroid and carries the artificial intelligence to send instructions to the Earth.

Optimus Prime is the name given by Chen Mo to these mechanical column thrusters.

After an hour, the artificial intelligence of the mechanical column received an execution command from the Earth: "Request passed."

"The 'igniter' position is being confirmed."

Obtaining the command to execute the command, the mechanical column does not have the first time to approach the asteroid, but receives the position of the other tracker.

In the asteroid belt that is not known from the 'corn' asteroid, a giant asteroid that is dozens of times larger than the 'corn' asteroid, does not float in the asteroid belt, no one knows that it floats. how long.

This asteroid-like asteroid, the asteroid used to implement the planetary transformation plan, became the 'igniter'.

On the surface of this asteroid, grab the same tracker as the 'corn' asteroid. At this point the tracker is constantly sending signals in the direction of the 'corn' asteroid.

"The 'igniter' position is confirmed and the track is being calculated..."

There is no sound in space, and the surroundings are quiet and quiet.

The mechanical column begins to accelerate, the top end is close to the asteroid, and the bite is fixed in the rock embedded in the asteroid.

One, two, three... Thousands of mechanical columns are embedded in the 'corn' asteroid, including giant mechanical columns over 100 meters all inserted into the asteroid, and the engine is instantly activated.

At this point, the distance is the first 431 hours and 37 minutes after the mechanical column is launched.

"it has started."

On the holographic platform of the laboratory, the picture of the mechanical column is being accelerated to accelerate the asteroid.

Real-time video is also a picture that occurred half an hour ago. On the holographic platform, simulation animations are also used to simulate what is happening on the asteroid belt.

Zhao Min is the only audience. He can only watch quietly on one side, can't help, and can't interrupt.

The first step in transforming Mars is to get the internal magnetic field engine of Mars to work again.

To complete this condition, there must be enough energy to wake up the liquid layer of Mars, let the liquid layer of the Martian mantle flow, the star dissolves in molten iron, flows, and collides with the solid metal ball of the core to settle the convection, thereby activating the Martian magnetic field. .

Whether or not Mars has a magnetic field is the most basic condition for the success of the transformation.

Without the magnetic field of the planet, the Martian atmosphere cannot withstand the ravages of the solar wind and cosmic rays, and cannot create conditions that are consistent with the long-term survival of the Earth. Therefore, to transform the planet that conforms to the life of the Earth, you must start the magnetic field of the planet, and then you can carry out the next step of transformation, otherwise everything will be avoided.

In order to activate the liquid layer inside Mars, Chen Mo prepared a variety of programs, currently mainly implemented two.

One is an asteroid impact, and the other is a 'planetary bomb.' The use of planetary bombs is an alternative and the first asteroid impact scenario is now being implemented.

To achieve the conditions that activate the Martian magnetic field with an asteroid impact, the most important thing is that the mass of the striking asteroid is large enough.

Chen Mo is now well-equipped, but the current manufacturing conditions do not allow him to make such a large engine, enough to propel the asteroid that shakes the Martian cellar. So Chen Mo needs to find another way to push the asteroids that are enough to start the Martian magnetic field.

A relatively simple method is finally determined.

Collision method.

A simple kinetic energy model.

Use the propeller to provide acceleration to the smaller asteroid A engine, accelerate to a sufficiently large speed, generate enough kinetic energy to strike the large asteroid B, and deflect the asteroid C orbit generated after the impact. Deviated from the orbit of Mars's gravitational force, when the orbital motion intersects, it is captured by Mars gravity and hits Mars.

The model looks simple, but there are many conditions that need to be considered.

First, we must calculate the orbit of Mars. After the asteroid deviates from the orbit, the orbits of the two must have intersections, and they are the intersection of the same position and the same position. This takes into account the distance and position between the two asteroids and Mars. After the collision is determined, the asteroid and Mars arrive at the same position at the same time, otherwise it will take many years to collide.

Then there is the calculation of the kinetic energy of the asteroid, and the two collide. If the kinetic energy is insufficient, the combined asteroid C may not reach the predetermined expectation. If the kinetic energy is too large, the track deviates too much and is also not perfect.

If the orbit of the asteroid deviates by one more point and one less point, it may cause a difference of ten thousand miles between the two orbital intersections. In the space of the universe, a centimeter of orbital changes, and after running far enough distance, the distance will vary greatly.

Considering two asteroids, playing a pool of billiards in space, Mars is the ‘hole’.

Chen Mo must enter the hole with one shot.

The method determined that after Chen Mo explored more than 2,700 asteroids and confirmed the density and quality of the asteroids, through the careful calculation and simulation of quantum computers, millions of reconstruction models were established, and finally the optimal solution was selected to determine the small 'corn'. Planets and 'igniters', get the current transformation plan.

Although troublesome, this is the easiest way.

“How long does it take for the two asteroids to collide?”

"According to the data returned by the detector, the corn and the igniter will collide after 548 hours and 13 minutes." The ink girl gave the answer.

"It's crazy." Zhao Min looked at it for a long time, and finally he could open his mouth and secretly swear: "This is the biggest show of God's Genesis. I am your only audience."

"Lonely is the only gift that the mountain gives to the conqueror. I can still have an audience, and it is not bad."

"Not alone, there are ink ladies." The ink girl softly opened.

Chen Mo smiled and patted her head.

Now that the ink girl has self-awareness, she usually speaks actively and he is not so dull.

“What are you going to do next?” Zhao Min curiously looked at the simulated picture on the holographic projection.

"Wait."

Before the collision of ‘corn’ and ‘igniter’, it is only necessary to pay attention to the progress of the two asteroids before the collision.

There are still about 23 days, the two asteroids will collide, and Chen Mo can now do other work temporarily. After the collision of the two asteroids, he can proceed to the next step.

"After the transformation was successful, how did you deal with the planet? Have you thought about this question?"

When leaving the lab, Zhao Min couldn't help but mention the questions he always wanted to ask.

Mars transformation can be won for a while, and once the asteroid hits Mars, as long as the Earth's astronomical telescope is placed in the position of Mars, all changes will be announced to the world.

There will be many problems at the time.

The ownership and treatment of that planet belongs to the marching ant group, or belongs to all human beings. What should they do when other people compete for it?

This is a problem that must be considered and an issue that cannot be avoided.

Chen Mo nodded gently.

"Thinked."

chapters.title: Chapter 680: : Nano Robot (Supplement)
chapters.body:
Chapter 680: : Nano Robot (Supplement)

"The armed forces of the Anzaka tribe and the Xinmen tribe fought to seize the newly discovered copper mine."

Wang Hai put the intelligence in his hand and looked at the holographic map in front of him. Holographic maps are divided into different colors, with complete terrain and village town distribution.

This is a tribal distribution in the Congolese border zone, only a part.

Global energy revolution In the past few years, the worst losses have been in three places, South America, the Middle East and Africa.

The Middle East is still good. The kingdoms in the Middle East have invested in global technology companies in the early years, accelerating domestic industrial languages, and those royal families know about prevention, so the losses are somewhat painful, but they are within acceptable limits. In addition, several royal families began to resolve their grievances and joint development, so that they began to recover quickly.

The most chaotic is South America and Africa.

South America has become the goal of the North American Group. Although there are several South American countries forming a group, some small countries are under the control of the black hand behind them, and the country has fallen into chaos. The situation in South America is not very optimistic.

Africa is also similar here, and some countries rely entirely on resource output as the mainstay of the domestic economy.

Coal is nearing the edge of elimination, oil prices have fallen sharply, causing huge losses here, suddenly unprepared, the economy has been violently fluctuating, and the country has begun to be chaotic. Tribes have begun to **** new resources as the basis for tribal survival.

The struggle is inevitable.

"Instructor, what are we going to do here?" The source of the call was Hito, very solemn.

"What do you think?" Wang Hai's face is calm and faceless.

"Accept them."

Hetu has a firm voice in his voice.

Wang Hai glanced at the position of the holographic map on which Hetu was located. After a little thought, he promised: "Follow what you want, how to follow your thoughts and report to me in advance. The base will give you a batch of equipment and intelligence. ""

When the communication hangs up, Wang Hai drops the laser pointer in his hand and leaves the war room.

Hehe and Gan Yu put a silver safe on the table and looked serious.

"This is what Rego brought us back. Lei Ge said that a new batch of equipment was produced at the factory, and it could be taken in a week after the old place."

Wang Hai nodded and patted the box.

"Do you want to be stronger? Like me."

Hehe and Gan Yu have a whole expression and a good body.

They can appreciate the power and speed of Wang Haifei.

Although I don't know the reason, it is definitely related to the boss. After returning from the headquarters last time, although Wang Hai rarely did it, but only a few times against them, they are no different from the chicken. Zhong Lei did not move, but it is certain that Zhong Lei is definitely the same as Wang Hai.

"Think." Hehe and Gan Yu focus on the key.

"Come with me and come with me."

Hehe and Gan Yu followed behind Wang Hai and entered the basement of the base.

This is the most important place in the base. The high-level bases of Qihe and Gan Yu are very clear. Even if they are base adjutants, they cannot enter without the authorization of Wang Hai.

In the basement of the base, two hundred human-like war robots arranged neatly are the biggest guarantee of the base.

"Lie down."

Wang Hai pointed to the two chairs next to him.

Hehe and Gan Yu did not hesitate to lie in bed. When they saw Wang Hai taking out two potions from the boxes brought back by the two, the two immediately realized what to do and were a little excited.

They used similar agents and potential agents.

......

Chen Mo took goggles and looked straight into the test chamber made of pure iron, which was not like liquid, nor solid ‘gray substance’.

Some expectation, some caution.

The 'grey substance' inside is one of the most advanced technologies.

Nano robots.

Chen Mo's latest achievements.

With the help of tunneling microscopes, it is possible to control the independent atoms to form the desired structure, such as several atomic-sized gears and motors, with nano-computer chips of only a few hundred atoms.

Manufacture robots from the atomic level.

The nano-robot designed by Chen Mo is more complex than normal nano-robots, with moving structures, combined structures, capacitors, payloads, micro-electro-mechanical systems and the most important replication systems.

The kinetic structure of the nano-robot and the ‘hands and feet’ of the replica structure are made of carbon nanotubes, the strength is hundreds of times that of steel, and the diameter is only one-five thousandth of the hair. With these ‘hands’, nanobots are free to control the atoms and form the desired structure.

The micro-electro-mechanical system is a nano-scale micro-electromechanical device that integrates functions such as micro-sensors, micro-mechanisms, micro-actuators, and signal processing controls. It is quite a 'brain' of nano-robots.

This research, Chen Mo has been going on for some time, today is the time when technology is mature.

The control of nano-robots is different from conventional control methods.

Chen Mo uses a neural-conscious connection device and brain wave induction technology as a control terminal to create a brain controller for controlling nano-robots.

"Come and experiment once."

After Chen Mo finished, he started a brain-sized instrument like a headset and looked at the nano-robot in the glass box.

The next moment, the 'grey substance' in the iron box began to appear, slowly rising up to form a cube, and then into a sphere, column, teacup, teapot, tableware and so on.

Such as the shape of the slime, as Chen Mo thinks, what structure becomes.

The brain controller can control, indicating that it is mature, but Chen Mo still needs another experiment.

"Take those materials."

Chen Mo said to the ink girl around him.

The ink girl took a bowl of material prepared on the side of the experimental table, which was some waste materials, such as damaged chips, circuit boards, broken ceramics, glass, sand, wood, paper, etc.

"Mergo, let's go in?" asked the ink girl.

"Well, come one by one."

The ink girl would like to pick up a piece of charcoal and put it into the box through the robot. There is no direct contact with the nano robot in the box.

The next moment, Chen Mo controlled the nano-robot and covered it on charcoal.

Start copying.

Under the control of Chen Mo, the nano-robot began to replicate, the charcoal disappeared at a speed visible to the naked eye, and finally the size of the nano-robot grew.

The ink girl did not stop. After the charcoal disappeared, put a piece of glass, then plastic, paper, ceramics, circuit boards, etc.

After the material in the pot was put out, the ink girl stopped.

And looking at the box, there is only a pile of metal powder mixed in different colors, and the nano-robot is twice as big as it was at the beginning.

The main components of nano-robots are carbon atoms and silicon atoms, which are not needed as much as other atoms, so this happens.

Nano-robots don't dare to be smart, otherwise the program will be out of control and the robot will be copied indefinitely. The consequences are unimaginable.

Under the infinite expansion of exponential growth, it will not be long before the whole earth will become dead, and the biosphere will be eroded by them into riddled holes and become fragile biscuits.

This is why Chen Mo is treated with caution.

Therefore, when designing a nano-robot, a variety of specific password commands are required to enable the copy function, and Chen Mo sets it internally, and after copying a certain number of algebras, it will stop copying to avoid a runaway disaster.

"Get the second piece of material."

Chen Mo carefully removed a small piece of sesame from a new nano-robot powder and placed it in another large iron box container.

The ink girl poured the second prepared material into a metal box.

“Begin, record what they are copying.”

Chen Mo concentrated his mind and began to give instructions to the nanobots in the iron pipe, and then began to wait quietly.

There was no movement at the beginning. Two minutes later, the movement began to appear in the iron can, becoming a finger-sized nano-robot group wrapped in graphite.

After a while, the graphite disappeared and was replaced by gray powder, like flowing sand, more like a liquid metal. Every time the ink girl drops a piece of graphite, it will melt at a speed visible to the naked eye, and then the size of the gray powder will be a big point.

Five minutes later, when the ink girl dropped a basin-sized charcoal, this time it did not disappear as it did last time, but disappeared halfway. She tried to lose two pieces of graphite and went into it. There was no beginning of the ablation.

“The nano-robot has lost its copy function and copied a total of 18 generations, an increase of 262,144 times, which is consistent with the set situation.”

Chen Mo looked at the scale of the nano-robot in the iron box and nodded with satisfaction.

The 18th generation is the limit for setting up nano-robot replication. It cannot be copied indefinitely. According to the settings and then copied, these nano-robots will self-destruct.

Only sesame-sized nano-robots, which grew by 260,000 times, made nano-robots that only needed one bracelet-sized nano-robot, enough to use. When necessary, he can modify the replication algebra of the nano-robot to achieve his purpose.

"Try to form a battle armor."

In the brain controller, the data of the armor was entered, and the nano-robot began to pile up. In less than half a minute, a battle armor model was formed in front of his eyes.

Chen Mo took off his brain control instrument and took a deep breath.

"Go here first, go see the asteroid."

chapters.title: Chapter 681: :Emergencies
chapters.body:
Chapter 681: :Emergencies

“Don’t dare to take a risk?”

There was some madness in Nana’s thoughts, which was not good. Wearing a dark green military uniform with a general cap, in the camp where the light is not enough, except for the white eyes, the rest of the face should be carefully seen to see clearly.

In front of him is Nass, his brother,

"What risk?" Nass leaned back against the chair.

Now their tribes are not doing well, the economic sources are missing, and it is getting harder and harder to raise their men, so they must have money.

Nazar turned his head and the light that fell on his face was a little more. He could see his mouth cracking into the crotch, and there was a long finger scar that looked a bit sinister. “The rare earth mine of the marching ant group.”

"Not very good." Nass smashed and shook his head slightly.

"Big brother, the world is chaotic."

As the leader of the tribal armed forces, as long as they are not blind, they can see that the world is indeed chaotic. Now the battle between the armed forces is more frequent, for what? For resources.

"The marching ant group released controlled nuclear fusion technology and made so much money. Our coal mines are due to their collapse and grab their rare earth mines. We are deserved. We have only the rare earth mine nearby." Nasa grinned The muscles of the scars at the corners of the mouth are slightly twitching, and the appearance is a bit scary.

"They will retaliate against us." Nass shook his head slightly and instinctively told him that it was not appropriate.

“How can they retaliate? The financial turmoil and energy elimination have confusing the economies of several countries. Now the land is in a mess. In recent years, the price of rare earth has risen rapidly, and those developed countries are hoarding rare earths. Jinshan."

"They are very strong."

"What's the use of power? It's far from being thirsty. Can they do it for us in this mine? The official can't take care of us, and not only do we have a hand?" Nasha smiled and looked cloudy.

"What do you mean?"

......

Five mining areas in Africa were invaded by tribes and all workers were driven away.

The news has caused global turmoil.

This is something that has never happened before, and it is definitely not accidental. The tree of the marching ant group is too big and attracts a strong wind.

The global media began to pay attention to it. It was a matter of not stopping the high-profile hang and starting to watch the drama. They all want to see how this marching ant group will respond, and how the East will deal with this unexpected event.

The news shocked the top of the marching ant group in the first place.

Chen Mo looked at Li Chengzhi's holographic light and shadow, and his expression was calm, and he was not worried about the occupation of the mining area.

"How to say?"

"I am afraid that the situation is not very optimistic. The three countries are on the verge of chaos. They are self-sufficient and uncomfortable. The conflict between the tribal armed forces has intensified. As oil revenues have fallen, coal has gone bankrupt, and the contradiction between some tribes and officials has begun to increase.

Moreover, the tribal armed forces occupying the minerals did not hurt our people. For various reasons, we could not directly intervene. We only had to put pressure on them to solve them. It took time. ”

Li Chengzhi’s face is serious, and this is another incident against them, and it is far beyond the ocean.

“How long does it take?” Chen Mo asked.

"Unsure, the country that is on the verge of chaos, once completely chaotic, is the state of conflict, the next calm and do not know when. In that case you should be clear that not only you, all investors entering their country will be bloodless. Return."

Li Chengzhi paused.

"According to the current situation, the situation is very wrong, there are signs in this regard."

“Can I solve it in my own way?”

Chen Mo is not surprised by this situation. From the time they consider buying the mining areas of those countries, they will be prepared for the war in those countries. The coming will still come.

Li Chengzhi did not answer Chen Mo directly, but just looked at Chen Mo nodded slightly, meaning it goes without saying.

"understood."

"Hang up, if there is news, I will inform you the first time." Li Chengzhi said.

Marching ant headquarters meeting room.

Zhao Min is inside, and there are holographic projections of Wang Hai and Zhong Lei, waiting for Chen Mo’s instructions. Seeing that Chen Mo and the ink woman came in, everyone stood up.

“How about employees in Africa?” Chen Mo asked.

“The employees dispatched by the company temporarily returned to China after two days in the embassy. The local security personnel were injured. They said that the armed personnel just came in and disarmed, and drove all the people, did not kill, and did not hurt us to send the past. Employee," Zhao Min replied.

"What did you find?" Chen Mo looked at Wang Hai's holographic projection.

"Yes, those armed forces are armed with coal mine bankruptcy and oil production cuts. They spread the remarks in the villages near the mining area, because the marching ants company took away their wealth, so they took back their own things."

What Wang Hai will find is truthful.

"Someone will convince several other armed leaders to act together."

"Who?"

"The younger brother of a tribal armed leader in Zambia, he is called Nassa." Wang Hai did not finish, Nasa's holographic projection image has appeared in the conference room: "A rare earth mine, they occupied."

"Can you fix it?" Chen Mo looked at Zhong Lei.

"It's very simple, just kill the chicken and the monkey." Zhong Lei said seriously.

Those armed forces are right to see that as long as they don’t kill, there is no reason for the official to start. They can’t help them, and they can get the benefits through negotiation.

"This matter is to solve the problem, try to clear the relationship, do not let people fall into our mouths, this thing is watching the whole world. Wang Hai does not care about this matter, you do not need to expose, can you do it?"

Now the whole world is watching how they can cope with this unexpected incident. If they negotiate and pay the price to get back to the mining area, I am afraid that the armed forces in other mining areas will follow suit. At that time, the outside world will think that the marching ant group is bullied, so it must be given Give a strong warning.

"It's very simple." Zhong Lei nodded confidently.

"Okay, give it to you." Chen Mo said.

"It seems that I am going to prepare for public relations." Zhao Min said, she understood what it meant.

The holographic projections of the two disappeared, and Chen Mo and Zhao Min left the conference room.

"How do you say above?" Zhao Min asked curiously on the road.

"I am paying attention, but looking at the current situation, it takes time to get it back. At least after the situation is stable, the officials there are thinking about this. It is getting more and more chaotic, and the situation in several countries is not too good. Stable, so you can only do it yourself. Kill a chicken and give it to the monkey."

......

"Do we want to add fuel to the fire and give them a fire." Washington, Tom carefully asked Eva.

Eva did not answer him and looked at Rosen next to him.

Rosen shook the red wine and drank it, not forgetting his tongue.

"Don't, it's not the time. It's not our business now, there is no need to go in and provoke a slogan. The marching ant group is not as simple as the surface. Don't forget, the key material for controlled nuclear fusion, the room temperature superconducting material, is monopolized by them. We still have no way to produce.

Offended them, our controlled nuclear fusion power generation plan has run aground. Moreover, if we participate, if we anger the dragon, we will directly fall into indirect confrontation, which is not good for our strategy. It may even provoke direct confrontation between the two parties. It is not worth it because of the small loss. ”

Rosen’s mood is obviously good. When they encounter this kind of thing, they naturally like to go down the stone, but now it is not the time, they have not seen the marching ant group taking over.

When necessary, they do not mind giving them a little trouble if the marching ant group does not find it.

"Will the dragon participate?"

"probably not."

Rosen picked up the bottle and poured himself on the wine.

"In the case that their citizens are not suffering from loss of life, they have no reason to use force to intervene directly. Instead, they choose to put pressure on the official countries. If it is normal, it is easy to work, but now it is useless, the area has begun. In chaos, the officials of those countries are self-sufficient in dealing with the contradictions of domestic tribes."

"What do we do then?" Eva asked.

"Looking at the show." Rosen smiled: "The marching ant group has been overwhelmed in the past few years, and the tree has attracted a lot of money. Under the control of the nuclear fusion technology, 90% of the cakes, the big gains, there will always be people's eyes, naturally have to bear a little risk. ""

"Mr. Rosen feels what will the marching ant group do?" Tom asked curiously.

Rosen thought about it and said: "There should be tough measures. They have a lot of mining areas and assets in Africa. Once the performance is weak, the wolves there will all go around to discuss food. The South American side will certainly follow suit. Once They use hard-line methods, and the dragon will definitely close one eye, and the strength of the marching ant group is not weak."

At the same time, other powerful countries in the world are also watching the excitement.

For the technology of the marching ant group, countless people are jealous. This company has made Huaxia's technology jump for decades, but no one can stop it. Nowadays it is troublesome, and many people want to see how the marching ant group will handle it.

Not handled well, it is definitely a blow to the marching ant group.

chapters.title: Chapter 682: : Track Correction
chapters.body:
Chapter 682: : Track Correction

Asteroid belts deep in the depths of the universe, a two-kilometer asteroid, are moving in one direction at a high speed. There is no control, and the speed is fast, and it feels like the leaves in the universe, floating aimlessly.

The tail of the ‘corn’ asteroid with a blue ray is a dense mechanical column that is ejecting plasma into the universe.

The relative speed of the two asteroids is not small at first, but only in different orbits. There is no intersection. Now the orbit of the 'corn' asteroid changes, and the mechanical column accelerates, and the relative speed becomes higher.

All this is to have enough kinetic energy to hit the 'igniter' and let the igniter's orbit change.
