"Modifying the kinetic energy model..."

"Modifying the kinetic energy model..."

According to the originally calculated kinetic energy model, today's asteroid speed is sufficient, but the quantum computer carried by the mechanical column is still correcting the kinetic energy model between the two to achieve maximum perfection.

“Three minutes later, ‘corn’ hit the ‘igniter’ and Optimus went out of ‘corn’.”

The mechanical column carrying artificial intelligence commands, all the mechanical columns in the 'corn' asteroid stop the plasma jet, the mechanical claws embedded in the 'corn' asteroid at the top, slowly loosen and retract, control the direction of the mechanical column The ion engine begins to reverse accelerate and begins to detach from the asteroid.

In less than a minute, all the mechanical columns were removed from the 'corn' asteroid, and only the tracker was still there.

If space can be used as a canvas, it can be seen at this time that the trajectories of the two asteroids, 'corn' and 'igniter,' are continuing to extend until the intersection of a certain point.

The 'igniter' has experienced history.

"Crash one minute countdown, 60...59...58..."

The countdown began, and in the ‘corn’ perspective, the ‘igniter’ was getting bigger.

boom……

The collision between the two, like two stones that tell the flight, collided in space.

Chen Mozhen looked at the model on the holographic projection, which is based on the data from half an hour ago, and established two asteroid collision models.

According to the calculation, there has been a collision now, and it is not known how the situation in the asteroid belt. The first plan of the planetary transformation project will be successful again. If the collision, the orbit data of the 'igniter' deviate from the Martian orbit data. Too much, that means failure, it takes a long time to correct the 'igniter' track.

"Mergo, the two asteroids collided successfully and the data came back."

For half an hour, the ink girl suddenly spoke.

On the holographic panel, the transmitted 'igniter' data appears, along with the condition of the 'igniter'.

Two asteroids collided, the 'corn' asteroid had split, and a huge asteroid fragment flew off the original orbit, and countless small gravels exploded and spattered around.

Unfortunately, the three mechanical columns were hit by sputtered meteorites, two of which were malfunctioning and one was in a semi-failed state. However, Chen Mo does not care. The mechanical column propulsion system and the mechanical system operate independently. As long as the ion engine is not bad, it can return to the earth for maintenance.

Together, there are operational data for the Mars orbit.

The track deviates by 23 minutes and 03 seconds and is within the correctable range.

Seeing the orbital data of ‘Ignition’ and Mars, Chen Mo’s mind came up with this answer.

"Correct the 'igniter' track."

At the same time, far outside of space, the artificial intelligence of mechanical columns has already begun to correct the orbital plan. The small meteorite fragments were scattered and all the mechanical columns flew onto the ‘igniter’ after being hit and began to embed.

The volume of the 'igniter' asteroid is too large, and the thrust provided by the mechanical column is not worth mentioning at all. However, under the action of a long time, the 'igniter' asteroid can still undergo slight displacement, and these small displacements are accumulated enough. Slowly correct the track.

The correction can be done as long as the orbit deviates within the correctable range before the time the asteroid and Mars collide.

Thousands of mechanical columns are embedded in the asteroids and begin to accelerate. The mass of the 'igniter' is much larger than that of the 'corn' asteroid, and the acceleration provided by the mechanical column is invisible.

“The orbital correction can be completed after 859 hours, and the igniter will enter the Mars gravitational field at 1470 hours and 31 minutes.”

Take the solar system as the table, the asteroid as the ball, and the shot of a ball, can you enter the hole, it will take two months to see the difference.

The time when the igniter collided with Mars was two months later.

Chen Mo looked at today's date.

October.

......

Suomu looked at the visitors in front of him and was puzzled.

He does not know each other, and he does not know the origin of the other party. The other party suddenly comes to himself and says that he wants to talk about things and expand things. When it comes to this topic, he chooses to meet people without saying anything.

As the armed leader of a small tribe, he does not want to expand his power all the time. Recently, the surrounding armed forces are stunned and the situation is not very good.

If it is not a bit capable, I am afraid they have been annexed.

"General Suomu, are you interested in making your site bigger?"

Zhong Lei took the other party to prepare a poor quality wine and took a sip, with a natural expression.

Now Zhong Lei has been dressed and easy to accommodate. It is a look of Uncle Hu. The beard is half a foot long and is tied with a red string. Some of them are exquisite, and outsiders simply cannot recognize his original appearance.

If they don't expose their identities, they can't blatantly intervene in the struggles of others. Otherwise, they will certainly be caught by public opinion and attract more trouble.

There is no brave intervention, but there are still many premise methods.

Those tribes are armed, their weapons are terrible, and they are not worth mentioning. As long as they can have a way and dare to intervene, those people are just jumping clowns.

"Of course, do you have a way for us to expand?"

Suomu straight hooked on the bell, the breath, and did not forget to touch the black shiny head. Anyone who knows him knows what it means to do this. If he plays him, then he is not drinking, but eating bullets.

"Have."

Zhong Lei faintly looked at the people around him.

Suomu grinned and waved his hand, his voice was loud: "Doss left, others went out."

When all the people left, they stared at Zhong Lei. Beside him, the indifferent Doss, the palm of his hand has been pressed on the gun, if there is something wrong, there will be action in the first place.

For the alert of the two, Zhong Lei was unmoved.

"South."

"South? Nass Brothers?"

Suomu looked awkward and immediately understood who Zhong Lei said.

Although the news was blocked here, he also knew that the armed forces of Nass Brothers had recently done something and robbed a foreign mine.

The marching ant group.

Suomu is not stupid, immediately guessed a little meaning, but not sure if it is, the other party did not have to explain the identity.

Zhong Lei ignored the psychological activities of Suomu and calmly said: "I can rent two special equipments for you for a week. You only have to do one thing."

The camp was quiet, and Suomu stared at Zhong Lei. In two minutes, the camp was in a deadlock, and Suomu’s expression was uncertain and heighed the pros and cons.

Seems to be determined, Suomu licks his lips.

"What equipment?"

chapters.title: Chapter 683: : Ink Dreams?
chapters.body:
Chapter 683: : Ink Dreams?

Not far away, Nasa and the team members are celebrating next to the campfire.

The Secretary did not have the joy of victory, and the bonfire beat in his eyes, and it was uncertain.

They successfully won this rare earth mining area without any resistance. In order not to be injured, the person in charge did not even say a word, and cooperated with them to evacuate all the workers in the mining area and let them occupy the mining area.

The responsible person felt that the mining area in his hand was a hot potato, and they wanted to give them when they came over and snatched.

They took the rare earth mines worth more than three billion without any effort.

This situation is very unusual.

And it was his younger brother who went to the mining areas of other marching ant groups and armed with them to act with them.

An armed person may be targeted, and several appear at the same time. It looks like a public anger, and the marching ant group should take no way for them.

He read the news, the marching ant group did not have any tough words, they only care about the casualties of the personnel, in addition to the official negotiations.

Several large mining areas were taken and lost tens of billions. The marching ant group was indifferent. Once the marching ant group dared to face the hard-hitting US sanctions, it is now dead.

The calmer he is, the more uneasy he is, but now he is late, he still listened to his brother's proposal and chose to start with this rare earth mine.

“What's the latest news for the marching ant group?” Nass asked the information staff next to him.

“No, the marching ant group issued a statement requesting that the people in the mining area be immediately returned to the mining area. We urged our domestic officials to solve the problem as soon as possible.”

"superficial."

Take the priest.

In normal times, no one dares to move the mining area of Huaxia.

Now the official is in conflict with several large tribal armed forces, the tribes are active, and the official itself is difficult to protect. Even if the situation is stable, they can get some benefits when they negotiate, because the Chinese are very good at speaking.

It is because of this that he will choose to listen to his brother's words and take risks once.

He is also not sure if the adventure is right, but there is a very bad feeling.

boom……

A muffled sound, Nass saw, a bright light cut through the night, flying toward the smoldering fire.

At this moment, Nass’s face suddenly changed dramatically.

boom! !

The fire that exploded in the explosion covered the cheers of joy.

......

Suomu was hiding in the mountains, and the tablet in his hand returned to the scene, which made him shudder.

This is the horror of war robots.

In front of the war robots, they are as small as chickens and have no resistance. Killed more than 500 people in half an hour and slaughtered one side.

Even if he experienced the rain of bullets, he saw this horrible picture, but he was still cold and could not feel a trace of temperature.

The real killing machine.

He was a little pity to take the company, grabbed something that should not be robbed, and found himself dead, not blaming him.

"General Suomu, what do we do? Do you want to attack now?" Doss next to him, his voice trembled a little. Even if he was indifferent and killed a lot, he had never seen such a one-sided slaughter.

"We are waiting. I heard that this is the idea of a rotten dog. This time they provoked people who should not be provoked."

Dos did not speak, and did not deny this sentence.

"When they finish the clearance, we will pass again." Sumu swallowed and forced to calm down, but the forehead had already appeared cold sweat, and it was crystal clear in the night.

......

There was some panic in Nass, and the battle started now. He did not see a figure of the enemy. The other party seems to have more than a dozen snipers, one shot at a time, let them hide, there is no way to escape the bullets.

More than a dozen snipers in the night?

Totally impossible.

But the other side is like a **** of death. Every time they shoot and explode, they die at least one person.

The pressure and fear of this death has spread in the ranks.

Nass regrets very much. Is this revenge from marching ants? Or China's revenge? In addition to this, he did not think that other armed forces have this ability.

Hey!

Another shot was fired, and there was no screaming. Another member who was looking at the enemy's position with a night vision device fell in a pool of blood. He just reached out to the head of the window and added a blood hole.

No one dared to extend his head beyond the bunker, and shivered under the cover.

Fear is spreading, every second is a torment.

In half an hour, more than 500 members died, and his team was slaughtered by one side, and it was not even necessary to see the other person alone.

"General, general."

An armed member with a crying voice was particularly harsh in the room. I saw a member crawling over and covering his face with fear. In his hand, he also had a finger-sized **** bullet. He was just shooting a member. Bullets.

The bullets are very different in construction. They are well versed in firearms and naturally see such bullets.

"General, it is a smart bullet."

boom!

Intelligent bullets, at this moment, the company feels that the brain is bursting open, the whole person is stupid.

They have heard of these bullets, and they have been in contact with the guns. This kind of bullet is almost a hundred.

There are many countries with smart bullets in the world. It is enough to buy equipment for soldiers and ants, but the company is the company.

Marching Ant Group.

Unlimited regrets filled the minds of Nass, but there was no regret. He took the risk and was retaliated. The marching ants group did not intend to give them any chance.

It’s over.

Nassie was desperate in the eyes.

At the same time, the two figures came out of the woods, bright infrared eyes, especially in the dark.

......

Zhong Lei took the night vision telescope, and the explosion of the mine in the distance was mixed with the skylight, and the face was filled with the harmless smile of humans and animals.

His smile made the two players next to him shudder. It’s rare to see this kind of expression by Ray, and every time there is such a smile, there will never be a good thing.

The sound of gunshots and shells was dense and there was no screaming.

Zhong Lei just waited for a quiet moment with a telescope. After a while, the gunshots were weak and gradually subsided.

"It's over, let's go." Zhong Lei put down the telescope and boarded the car to leave.

......

Spaceship... aliens... handcuffs... cages...

despair!

As soon as the time came, the ink girl suddenly opened her eyes, as if she was awakened, the body's machine function had left the dormant state, began to work, looked confused and puzzled, and was somewhat uncertain.

What kind of scene was it?

After ten seconds in bed, the ink girl looked up.

At half past six in the morning, her built-in is the end of the machine to sleep.

From the bed, the ink girl as usual, went into the bathroom and wiped the body and face, and then took out a set of skirts from the closet.

This is the last time she went shopping with Xiao Yu’s sister, she bought the dress herself. Now, the ink girl will not wear a tight-fitting professional dress as usual. It is usually a little leisure.

After combing a little messy hair, the ink girl put on the slippers and left the room, let the nanny robot start preparing breakfast.

The ink girl sat on the sofa herself and picked up a book and looked seriously.

A philosophy book.

When she was alone with Chen Mo, she read the book. This is her hobby.

During the period of learning self-consciousness, sometimes the small fish did not wear the sensor of consciousness. She could not touch the outside world through the feeling of fishing, and read it herself.

After she forms her self-awareness and learns some emotional emotions, she can read it herself, and then use her own consciousness to understand words or images that do not require tactile perception, and think about the emotional content of the words.

Reading helps her self-conscious growth.

Over time, she likes to read, what books to read, philosophy, art, poetry, prose, etc., are some literature books. She can get it through the Internet, but the network information acquisition and the book feel different.

Usually Chen Mo does not go to the lab at home, or when she goes out to swim with her family, she likes to bring a book.

She also gave herself a screen name called ‘Merco’s literary female robot’. Xiaoying’s sister saw the name and laughed at her several times.

......

Xiao Yu was sitting on the bed and looked awkward.

Fortunately, just a dream.

She was scared of a cold sweat by her dream, and she did not dare to think about what happened in her dream.

Chen Mo was still asleep, Xiao Yu looked at the time, did not wake him, then gently went out to wash.

Out of the room, I saw the ink girl sitting on the sofa reading a book.

During the past five years, Xiaoyu returned to the university to study once, so that the ink girl simulated the way of thinking, she also made a deep study.

In the past five years, Xiaoyu has become accustomed.

The ink girl is now very self-conscious, her character is formed, she does not need to teach her emotionally, she will read and paint herself, and she will not use other things except her usual contact experience.

So now, Xiaoyu will occasionally wear a sensory sensor to let the ink girl experience the tactile sensation, but it will not be used often.

"Little fisher sister, I am doing breakfast."

"Well, I am going to do yoga now, do you want to experience it?" Xiao Yu glanced at the kitchen.

"Okay." The ink girl put down the book in her hand and gently nodded. She seemed to think of something. She said, "Small fisher sister, did you sleep wearing a sensor hat last night?"

"No." The small fishing back to the dressing table in the room took out the sensory headband and carefully put it on.

"That's weird."

"What's the matter? What happened last night?"

"I was dreaming last night."

Xiao Yu looked surprised. In the past five years, she first heard the ink girl said that she dreamed, and artificial intelligence consciousness would also dream.

"What did you dream about?"

"Dream that Mergue was taken away by aliens."

Xiao Yu’s surprised look was stiff and turned into incredible.

chapters.title: Chapter 684: : Telepathy And Quantum Entanglement
chapters.body:
Chapter 684: : Telepathy And Quantum Entanglement

The same dream.

Chen Mo sat on the sofa and listened to the description of Xiao Yu and Mo Nu, and they knew that they had the same dream.

The same aliens, the same spaceship, also caught a lot of people leaving the earth, including Chen Mo.

At the same time, the same dream, this is no coincidence.

"This is a telepathic phenomenon. This phenomenon usually occurs in identical twins, mothers and children, and couples who live together for a long time. The situation of the two of you is special, and the long-term consciousness is connected, causing the brain waves to be accidentally synchronized at a certain moment. So there is telepathy."

This phenomenon has been experienced by Chen Mo before.

He remembered that when he was in high school, he dreamed that his mother's left index finger was injured. As a result, he called home the next day and learned that his mother's fingers were cut and left a lot of blood when cooking last night.

After listening to Chen Mo’s remarks, Xiao Yu was even more curious: “Why is this happening?”

"It may be a kind of quantum entanglement, and there are still many phenomena that are difficult to explain now."

"Is that what I dreamed of, or is it a dream of the ink girl?"

In the absence of sensory devices, ink girls dream, intelligent life consciousness dreams, this is only in the film, Xiao Yu is extremely curious.

"I don't know, superimposed."

Chen Mo shrugged.

"But it is certain that the ink girl can dream, indicating that her self-awareness is very mature."

“Is there a telepathy in the future?”

"Not sure, you have to know it later. But your telepathic phenomenon is giving me an inspiration. Quantum communication with telepathy and superluminal speed can be studied." Chen Mo said.

"Do you want me to experiment with you?" The little fisheye turns into a crescent.

"No, the ink woman can help." Chen Mo patted Xiao Yu's head. This experiment is different from previous research. Xiao Yu can't help.

In the current technology, there is no technology for super-light speed communication.

In the super-light-speed communication technology, Chen Mo is only on the bookshelf of the technology library. He has seen the cover of the book, and the authority is not enough to obtain the technology.

Among them are "superluminal ether particle communication", "in telepathy and quantum entanglement" and "quantum orientation pulsation".

These are the technologies of super-light speed communication.

The etheric material distance Chen Mo's current research is still far away, which may involve the space and time source of the universe. The quantum-oriented ghost jump can not be studied for a while, but I did not expect to create a self-awareness for the ink woman, and mistakenly hit the telepathy.

Perhaps this super-light-speed communication technology can be researched on its own, without using the technology provided by the technology library as a reference.

......

Nass was tied back with his hands and squatted on the ground. Next to him was the body of Nassa. The explosion at the beginning of the battle, his brother died in the explosion, his appearance was a bit miserable, his face was **** and fuzzy, even the iconic The cracked scars are covered by blood.

Now, the Secretary is very desperate to look at Suomu, full of regrets.

"I didn't expect we to meet in this situation."

"I didn't expect it." Suomu was undecided.

"Can you let me die?"

Suo Mu shrugged, revealing a harmless smile of humans and animals: "You should understand that you seem to have grabbed something that should not be robbed, no way."

"Sure enough?"

The ridicule and remorse of Nassie’s face, an adventure, the place he had laid down for half a lifetime was lost. In front of those people, his arms were like a blown soap bubble.

"Go all the way, your site and equipment, I received it."

Suomu smiled out of the waist and pulled the pistol at the waist. He did not hesitate to pull the trigger.

Hey!

The guns rang through the night.

Looking at the Nass in the pool of blood, Suomu did not forget to make up a shot, then sighed at the muzzle and turned into the camp behind him.

Seeing that Suomu came in, Zhong Lei was looking up and showed a smile: "People are killing you, we have not seen each other."

When I heard this, Suomu also laughed and was unaware of it.

"I do not know you."

Zhong Lei shook hands with him, took two robots and turned away from the camp.

......

The Nass brothers who occupied the rare earth mine of the marching ant group were slaughtered and the brothers were shot.

The message is like wings, spread all over the world.

A global sensation.

“Is this a revenge from the marching ant group?”

"It’s okay to say that it’s okay with marching ants today, and I don’t believe in killing me.”

"The marching ant group is too embarrassing, too tough, and directly slams all the people and kills them. It is extremely terrifying."

"..."

There are various comments in the world, and they are noisy.

Although it was armed by Suomu, there is no figure of the marching ant group behind it. There is absolutely no one to believe that Somalia’s armed forces can easily kill nearly a thousand people’s brothers.

Some Western countries have clashed with the ants in the name of war crimes, and some media have accused the marching ants group of participating in the massacre.

Faced with various suspicions from the outside world, the marching ant group announcement only responded to a short sentence: the incident was not related to the marching ant group, and the marching ant group did not know and did not participate.

Despite this response, the outside world does not think so.

Several other armed men who robbed the minerals, after learning that the Nass Brothers were massacred, immediately threatened to evacuate and return the mine to the personnel of the marching ant group.

Those who are in the dark are all shocked by this decisive means, and dare not act rashly.

"The action is very fast." Wang Hai looked at the holographic projection of the bell, surprised.

"The action is not fast, is it necessary to keep the New Year? This is not the efficiency of our company." Zhong Lei smiled, did not mind: "After killing a chicken, other monkeys are not honest?"

The massacre of the Nass brothers was carried out by the hands of Somalia. At best, it was a struggle between the tribal armed forces. There was no direct evidence to capture his head, let alone the marching ant group, and he was not afraid.

Knowing that the marching ant group is not bully, people who are now carrying out the assets of the army ants group may have to weigh the pros and cons.

"How is your side? Do you need equipment support?" Zhong Lei is not entangled in the matter just now. For him, it is just a simple task.

"Not for the time being." Wang Hai shook his head: "But the ordinary equipment has to be prepared, and the blue eye will grow stronger next. It will be almost chaotic."

"Okay." Zhong Lei promised to come down.

......

Hito looked at the map layout, the sky blue eyes, with a thought of the look.

The map is an armed contrast of several forces around, in which the fighting between Anzaka and Xinmen is already in the heat stage, and the two long-term feuds are not small.

The two did not know that a lion next to them was watching their struggle. Now that the two ammunitions are consuming a lot, it is time for them to prepare for it.

"Tomorrow they start fighting at the beginning of the battle, first destroy the Anzaka armed." Hope's blue eyes picked up and licked his lips.

"Why don't you kill the Xinmen tribe first, they seem to be simpler, weaker, and relatively insufficient." Abhse asked curiously.

Hitu does not think that he is laughing.

"First kill the powerful gunman, weakly put it to the end."

chapters.title: Chapter 685: : War And Meteor Shower
chapters.body:
Chapter 685: : War And Meteor Shower

Africa is in chaos.

The contradictions between the tribes of small countries have intensified and the conflict has intensified.

As several tribal armed forces were eliminated and conquered, several tribes began to grow. Other tribal armed forces did not want to sit still and start to annex and grow, and the struggle channel between them opened.

The tribes are either annexed or destroyed, like fighting.

The struggle of the tribal armed forces began to spread from several countries and spread to the periphery.

An unprecedented scale of reshuffle, officially began on the African continent, first between the tribes, and then intensified to the state. From the beginning, the struggles of several countries began to spread to several important countries in Africa.

The spark of the war began to spread across the African continent and entered a state of loss.

No one is right or wrong, ambition appears and expands, chaos breaks out, and the first piece of dominoes has fallen, even if the United Nations intervenes, it will not help.

Africa entered the era of annexation of warlords.

The chaos does not stop in the land of Africa, and it is also a pity with South America.

The global pattern changes, South America's situation is similar to that of Africa, and no powerful group enters the ranks of the top international powers. The South American group headed by Brazil is weak, and it has become the backyard of the North American Group.

The chaos began with a few coal and oil-based countries in South America. The economy collapsed, inflation reached a height of terror, and only money was left in poverty. Banknotes became the most useless thing.

Inflation and economic collapse, the people did not eat enough, so that several countries began to riot, anti-official demonstrations, and gradually became conflicts.

Under the operation of a caring person, the war is turned on.

Some anti-armed forces have been formed, and they have begun to work with the official governments of the countries and, with the support behind them, have gradually grown.

Starting from a few small countries, the chaos began to spread to the periphery.

Soon, a shocking news came out.

The leader of the South American Group, the president of Brazil was assassinated. This news became the last straw to crush the camel. The whole South America was in chaos and the war was in a state of ruin.

The land of the two continents has fallen into the mud of war, and the unprecedented war panic has permeated the hearts of the whole world. Once the war machine is turned on, only enough blood and smoke will flow down, and it will stop.

it has started.

Each of the powerful countries is like a wolf group that smells meat, and is waiting for an opportunity.

Several top groups did not have the quick intervention, but the secret hand has already begun to operate. Everyone knows that war is not a one-off event, and it is not yet time for them to enter.

The global war is on the verge of breaking out.

......

Time is in October, and the order belongs to late autumn.

On the occasion of the chaos of war in Africa and South America, a special message has drawn the attention of people in other peaceful regions of the world.

A meteor shower from Orion will land on Earth at 9:00 on the 13th.

The news reports that this will be the largest Orion meteor shower that the Earth has ushered in for a hundred years. It is also maintained for a long time. The exact number is unknown. The base of the meteor burning tail can be seen at the basic global night.

On the occasion of the two continents plunging into war, a topic of wish for war, detonating Twitter and Weibo.

On the occasion of the meteor shower, wishing for the meteors, prayers and blessings, hope that the wars around the world will calm down as soon as possible.

The topic spread, attracted the attention of countless netizens, and spontaneously endorsed this topic.

Let's look at the meteor shower together.

A beautiful and romantic topic.

However, they cannot predict the future, what this meteor shower will bring to the earth, and how it will change the human cosmology.

......

Moon.

Unlike the noise of the earth, the back of the moon has always been dead for hundreds of millions of years.

The surface here is a vacuum and cannot transmit sound.

However, in the ant cave area, a variety of large-scale base buildings have emerged on the surface, including the construction of a radio telescope matrix and an optical telescope platform.

Since the beginning of the telescope matrix, there has been an uninterrupted work here, and in the lunar base, including the personnel stationed by the marching ant group, at least four or five members have been stationed here for research, and there are more than a dozen people.

It does not include the people who traveled to the moon.

Shi Dongting sat in the base command center, paying attention to the operation of various robots on the surface of the moon and the operation of various machines at the base.

The expansion of the lunar base has not stopped.

In the past few years, under the development of 3D printing robots and intelligent construction robots in the lunar underground base, a large enough enclosed space has been formed.

In the base, there are many biological laboratories, where vegetables and various crops are grown.

Today, on the moon, vegetables are basically self-sufficient.

An astronomer entered the command center and smiled at Shi Dongting.

He is Bi Shichen, one of the Chinese summer writers stationed at the lunar base. The station's garrison staff called him Lao Bi, or the old B. It looks like a middle-aged, literary-faced glasses, Svens.

"Commander, No. 13, there is a topic on the earth to see the meteor shower # together, do you want to go out and experience it?" Old Bi Shiran sat down on the seat next to Shi Dongting.

"You can't see the meteor from the outside, you can't see the earth, you can't see the sun, except look down at the moon, look up and see the cosmic starry sky, there is no sound around, no mosquitoes, look fart."

Shi Dongting threw a small tomato into his mouth.

The small tomato is produced in the laboratory of the base. It has been tested for harmful proteins that are not mutated and can be safely consumed. Therefore, as a basemaster, he has a certain amount of snacks every day, which is very rare.

"I heard that the earth is praying for war."

"War prayer is useless. Pray for war to stop? Impossible. The war is not fortunate. If it spreads, the world will be more chaotic."

Shi Dongting lost two small tomatoes to Lao Bi.

The parabola of a small tomato in the air is completely different from the earth.

"Also."

Old Bi will catch the small tomato and throw it into the entrance.

"This meteor shower, see if you can collect some meteorite specimens. The meteorites that fall into the ground on the earth are burned. The meteorites here are more valuable than the meteorites of the earth."

"The robots here are very precious. Without the instructions of the earth, I can't send robots to find the rock. If the rock falls on the nearby base, I can get it back. I have this power." Shi Dongting said. .

......

Chen Mo stood on the balcony of the villa and played with the starry sky and the sea in front.

His eyes are on the position of Mars.

After a while, the igniter will hit Mars, which is the key to his planetary transformation. If successful, he can enter the second phase of planetary transformation.

When Chen Mo looked into the gods, he came to the balcony and walked straight to Chen Mo’s face, leaning gently in his arms.

"What's the matter?" Chen Mozhen asked in the waist of Xiaoyu.

"On the Internet, there is a topic of meteor shower. I have come over with Zhao Min, and I will watch the meteor shower together tomorrow night." Xiao Yu looked up and hoped.

"Good." Chen Mo nodded and promised: "This meteor shower is quite big, what are you going to make? Don't let the world's peace aspirations, because it can't be realized now."

"My heart is very small and I can't fit the world."

Xiao Yu snuggled in Chen Mohuai, quietly watching the night and the starry sky, enjoying this moment.

chapters.title: Chapter 686: : Carnival Before The Storm
chapters.body:
Chapter 686: : Carnival Before The Storm

Half moon hangs, starry sky.

It is a good day for stargazing in the late autumn.

On the evening of October 13, an extraordinary day, news reports, tonight, the biggest meteor shower in Orion will arrive as scheduled.

This will be the largest meteor shower ever detected.

In various social platforms and circle of friends, the topic of meteor shower is being pushed, and people wish to pray, but everyone who has nothing to do with it has made friends and classmates to see the meteor in an open field.

On the playground of the school, a group of students lying on the grass in the football field are looking at the ideals of life in the night sky. They are in love with each other, on the international trend, and in the space and universe, very lively.

With a wide view of the sea, the friends of the camping star-watching are guarding the campfire, watching the sky from time to time, talking and laughing, waiting for the arrival of the meteor shower.

A pair of couples on the bottom of the sea are cuddling and waiting for each other.

Numerous professional photographers have already brought equipment and set up cameras in a wide field of vision, looking forward to this rare Orion meteor shower.

Rooftops, parks, campuses, mountains, grasslands.

Students, urban white-collar workers, photographers, astronomy enthusiasts, researchers.

Countless people are waiting.

"Wait for the meteor, what are you wishing?"

"Crap, of course, world peace. This wishing activity was initiated for the chaos in Africa and South America."

"World peace, shut me down?"

"If the meteor falls for a wish, then as soon as you look up, you will find that life is as splendid as a meteor shower."

"I wish I had a rich night."

" Wishing God to give me a big guy."

"People think that wishing for a meteor can be a matter of course, but I don't know that the fleeting meteor is just the tears that God has left for the fallen. Does God want to cry for this world?"

The meteor shower did not really start. There were already various comments and discussions on the Internet, on social platforms and in the circle of friends. All kinds of pictures spread on the social platform and friends circle, all kinds of wonderful wishes, all kinds of complaints, all kinds of disease-free.

This is a global topic, and it will be the longest and most massive meteor shower that has been maintained for so many years.

Africa and South America, immersed in the chaos of struggle, on the edge of the war, other countries and regions, are waiting for this romantic meteor shower, a carnival before the storm.

The world is still very calm.

From the meteor shower to the earth, there are still three hours, the earth is not concerned, the moon has been the first to usher in meteorite rain.

The space meteorite from Orion is hitting the moon at a speed of 130,000 kilometers per hour.

Even the astronomers in the ant cave are secretly stunned by this high-intensity meteorite rain. Fortunately, there is no atmosphere on the surface of the moon, otherwise the shock wave generated by this impact is certainly not small.

Each space rock with a weight of 40 kilograms is equivalent to twenty cruise missiles. Thousands of large and small meteorites are now bombarding the surface of the moon.

This is the largest meteorite rain discovered since the history of monitoring, and thousands of meteorites are falling.

Including Shi Dongting, the six scientists currently stationed on the moon are gathered in the satellite center of the lunar base.

They are all waiting to see if there are any meteorites falling near the base. The meteorites that have not been burned by the atmosphere are more valuable than the meteorites that fall into the earth, and are very helpful to their research.

"I don't know if there will be a meteorite falling near the base?" Bi Shichen said with exclamation.

“Would you like to send back an alarm to the Earth? This meteorite rain is probably much bigger than you think,” another scientist said.

"The alarm has long been there. The people on earth are waiting to see the meteor shower. There is only romance. There are not many people who care about the alarm. However, if the meteorite falls, you can only say the lottery."

A few people, you say a word.

Shi Dongting is sitting in the main chair and pays close attention to various situations.

Now he is the head of the base. Now, in special circumstances, he should always pay attention to the situation of the base. If a meteorite falls on their base, it is not a joke.

"The commander, the satellite detected, had a meteorite that fell in the plain of the F14 area 80 kilometers from the base. The earth has requested to send robots to search."

The artificial intelligence of the lunar base marks the place where the meteorite falls.

Shi Dongting’s spirit was shocked and his waist was straight.

Several scientists on the field were excited and looked at Shi Dongting: "Commander..."

“Small month, calculate the time it takes for the transport robot to reach the F14 area.”

"Two hours."

"Send the No. 7 transport robot to the ground and bring the meteorite back." Shi Dongting immediately decided.

......

Incense Bay Villa.

Controlled nuclear fusion has become popular, new energy vehicles have become popular, and many heavily polluting industries have been eliminated. The role of environmental protection policies is obvious.

Nowadays, in the big cities, where the light pollution is not serious, the starry night sky can be clearly seen.

Chen Mo, Xiao Yu, Zhao Min and others, also waiting to play again and again on the grass, the atmosphere is pleasant. There are robots responsible for the barbecue and several people are free to play the game.

Musou has passed the 10-year-old birthday, grows taller, slim, very delicate, looks much more beautiful than her mother when she was a child, has a little fat face and looks very cute. In terms of learning, the ten-year-old unparalleled, almost finished the high school knowledge, so now understand everything. It looks like a little adult.

However, there is a certain change. I love the candy that Zhao Min sent. I loved it since I was a child. The relationship with Zhao Min is intimate.

A few people are on the grass and draw a sticker.

"Dad, when did you have a brother with my mother to play for me?" There was no bilateral draw.

"amount?"

"Uh!"

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu were somewhat astonished at the unparalleled problems. Zhao Min was not happy at the side.

"Ink can't be born, or let the ink girl and father give birth."

"Ha ha..." Zhao Min couldn't help but laugh.

"The little man is big." Xiao Yu directly bounced the unparalleled head, and he couldn't help but laugh: "Is the younger brother playing for you?"

"The younger brother is used to play." Unparalleled touched by the head of the small fishing bomb, laughing out of the dimple, directly taking a card in the hand of the small fisherman, synthesizing a pair into the pile of cards: "Mom, you lost. , sticker strips, giggles..."

"You actually took the opportunity to peek at your mother's card?"

"This is called diverting attention to the duck."

"Ha ha ha ha..."

Chen Mo and Zhao Min couldn't help but laugh, and the ink girl smiled softly.

"Mom, grandparents and grandparents said that there are few males at home. They don't want to remind you and Dad, but you have to give me a brother to play, or else..." The little girl turned her eyes and smiled especially sweetly. .

"How else?"

"Don't tell you, I said quietly and sensitively."

"I also learned to be mysterious." Xiao Yu bounced her head again: "Go to my mother for a bottle of drink."

"Follow."

At the end of the game, a few people sat on the grass and chatted, watching the sky, unparalleled in Zhao Min, talking and laughing.

They are now just a little bigger than ordinary people, and life is still very common. Chen Mo is a two-point line between the family and the company. Occasionally, taking time off to go out to play, or entertaining, this opportunity to watch the stars with his family is also rare.

"Min Min, I told you that I saw the wish of the meteor, there are many, do you want to listen to the duck?" Unparalleled in Zhao Min, said with a smile.

"Mom can't listen?"

"No, I only said to Min."

Xiao Yu is crying and laughing. Sometimes she wonders if this daughter is her own.

Unparalleled attached to Zhao Min's ear, whispered, not all said to be scratched by Zhao Min, the two became a group, not long after, the war spread to the small fishermen and ink women, unparalleled is the home's seasoning Agent.

Chen Mo watched them play, and couldn't tell the ease.

Suddenly, a bright meteor crossed the starry sky and passed away.

"The meteor shower is coming."

When the first meteor appeared, countless times saw it smashing the starry sky. Rooftops, playgrounds, grasslands, beaches, the breezy mountain tops, the sea with salty air, countless people look up and make their wishes.

Outside the Earth, meteorites are approaching the Earth's atmosphere at incredible speeds.

If someone can see the situation of the meteorite flow, it will be shocked. The meteorite flow is mixed with the wreckage of the different sizes of the spacecraft, the broken wrecks, the freezing compartments, the unique bodies, and the rapid approach to the Earth’s atmosphere. .

A meteor shower that shocked the world is about to be staged.

chapters.title: Chapter 687: : Alien Corpse
chapters.body:
Chapter 687: : Alien Corpse

The meteor crossed the sky and became the most beautiful scenery.

One, two, three or four...

A flashing meteor, which continues to appear in the night sky, is an unprecedented event, such as a real meteor shower.

Numerous viewers who are watching the meteor shower, seeing such a strange scene, are all exclaimed.

The most beautiful scene, but if so.

No one saw that the alien bodies that were exposed to the incompleteness of the incomplete space fell into the Earth's atmosphere at a very high speed, and disappeared into the ashes in the fire, leaving no trace.

Some meteorites, mixed with debris from the spacecraft and a freezer cabin that has long since stopped working, fell into the atmosphere and burned.

One by one, or even a few, there are meteors appearing almost every second, visible to the naked eye, as if the stars are raining.

Such a wonder, unprecedented.

The stargazers on the earth, all looking at the stars, dare not blink, for fear of missing every meteor, seeing the exclaiming joy, one after another.

......

On the moon.

The No. 7 transport robot is a versatile robot with a very strange shape, like Tenny with many robot arms. The bottom is equipped with a small ion engine that can fly on the surface of the moon. It also has mechanical feet and wheels to adapt to various terrain.

This is for robots that specialize in exploring the moon.

On the earth, it can lift 200 kilograms of heavy objects. This transport weight can reach more than one ton on the moon.

On the back of the No. 7 robot, there are also two excavating robots.

After two hours of rushing through a rugged area, Robot No. 7 arrived at the F14 area, the nearest meteorite fall point from the base.

"The target is about 1120 meters at 1 o'clock."

Robot No. 7 determines the specific position of the meteorite, the mechanical foot starts, and slowly walks toward the position.

Not long after, a pothole appeared in the field of vision.

The base's command center, including scientists such as Shi Dongting, is waiting to stare at the screen, watching the picture returned by the No. 7 robot.

In addition, several young billionaires who came to the moon were also watching. For them, this is a rare experience. For the user experience, Fei Ant Aerospace is not surprised to arrange this kind of viewing.

The meteorites from Orion help them study the formation of cosmic planets, or whether there are special substances in them.

"I don't know how big this rock is."

"At least 60 kg."

"..."

Several scientists are waiting anxiously, and as the No. 7 robot gets closer and closer to the crater, the command room becomes quiet.

The light of the No. 7 robot falls on the crater, and the object hitting the moon reveals the true face.

Hey! !

Everyone in the command room suddenly changed his face and stayed in the mud.

......

Mongolian grassland.

Lixin believes that several friends are sitting on the grass beside the campfire, looking up at the sky, talking about the sky. ,

He is a photography enthusiast. He took pictures from the south and the north. When he heard the news of the meteor shower, they just happened to travel in the Mongolian area and came here to take pictures.

Their camera stands on the grass not far away, shooting against the sky.

This rare astronomical spectacle is unique.

Once the photo of the meteor comes out, absolutely the entire photo is a meteor.

This is a real meteor shower.

Suddenly, a faint light cut through the sky above their heads.

boom! !

There were no warning signs of explosions and shock waves, so that a few people sitting by the campfire snorted, and instantly they turned upside down, feeling that the body was smashed and fell to the ground and mourned.

"It's a big rock."

"In that position, good insurance."

"The chest is sore, grass."

"About a couple of kilometers, Mom, almost died."

Li Xin resisted the pain of being knocked out of the heart and climbed up from the ground, watching the place where the meteorite fell, with a look of embers. If you are closer, a few of them will be accounted for here today.

“Would you like to see?” A close friend climbed up and spit, licking his boring chest.

"go with."

Several people gritted their teeth and drove off the campsite to the place where the explosion was. Fifteen minutes later, several people looked at the things in the crater and they were cold.

......

Incense Bay Villa.

Xiao Yu, Wu Shuang, Zhao Min two big and one small, hands together, quiet and wish, the ink girl also sat next to them, followed them.

Unparalleled pulling them to make a wish together.

The three big ones sit in a row and the picture is very harmonious.

Chen Mo is behind him, watching them, not consciously showing a smile.

The meteors in the sky still appear from time to time, very much. This is the most meteor shower with meteors since the record. There are literally hundreds of naked eyes, and the naked eye is not visible.

For a long time, the ink girl opened her eyes and stood up.

Xiao Yu, Wu Shuang, and Zhao Min both opened their eyes, and some doubts looked at the ink girl.

"What's the matter? Ink girl." Muscle asked curiously.

The ink lady touched the unparalleled head and walked toward Chen Mo, and the two big ones followed.

"The news of the return of the moon has a very special discovery."

"Special discovery?"

Chen Mo looked cautious. At this time, there were new discoveries. From the words of the ink girl, he had a bad feeling.

"Unparalleled, go and give Dad a roast chicken wings."

Xiao Yu also felt the subtle changes in Chen Mo’s emotions. Knowing that the next may not be a good thing, urging the unparalleled past.

"This one."

Unparalleled, the ink girl took out the holographic mobile phone and projected the picture.

Seeing the picture, Chen Mo's pupil shrinks and his face changes slightly.

what! !

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min’s face changed dramatically, and the subconscious screamed out.

They saw this horror picture for the first time.

The eye is a strange instrument, like a freezer or an escape cabin. There is an unrecognizable body lying in the cabin. It looks strange.

Pink, slightly pale, head broken, a bit like a lizard, only sharp teeth are outside, eyes bulging, no ears, long fingertips on the top of the head break, can faintly see the strange lines on the skin, legs The scales are smashed and broken at a strange angle. The most conspicuous blood red tail is two meters long and full of various spikes.

"The alien corpse." said the ink girl.

Zhao Min is a little better, and his ability to bear is relatively large, but his face is not good-looking, and the subconscious is leaning against Chen Mo. Xiao Yu relies on Chen Mo, the body is not consciously shaking, clinging to Chen Mo's waist, fear caused.

"Mother and Dad, Min, you see, a lot of big meteors."

When Chen Mo was in a heavy mood, the screams of the unparalleled cheers sounded and pointed at the sky.

Looking up, a few meteors like fireballs across the sky, like the bright lights of the night, very dazzling, not flashing away, but burning all the time, dragging the long tail until falling far away, watching the light knows the fall The object is not small.

"Go back first." Chen Mo gave Zhao Min a look, with a double back to the villa.

"it is good."

Zhao Min did not hesitate, holding up the unparalleled hand and comforting her to go back to the villa. Chen Mo looked up at the deep starry sky and took a small fisherman and turned away.

This meteor shower is not as simple as a meteor shower.

chapters.title: Chapter 688: : The Sky Is Changing
chapters.body:
Chapter 688: : The Sky Is Changing

If the night sky vision of the end, let the carnival become panic.

Soon, they got news that the world was hit by meteorites and unidentified falling objects. At the same time, the wreckage of alien ships and the bodies of aliens from all over the world also appeared on the Internet.

Alien? what does this mean?

The Internet is completely boiling, the news is simply unstoppable, and the falling spaceships are ruined and found all over the world. Through the network, the first time spread throughout the world.

At the beginning, countless people scoffed at the news. Alien? A little funny. Now the computer synthesis picture technology is developed, just a few pictures are aliens? Space ship wreck? This kind of rumor has been too much before, and it is not credible at all.

However, with the increasing number of photos of the wreckage of the spacecraft exposed on the Internet, until the end, a dormant bin with an alien body crashed into the downtown area, causing a huge casualties, and the doubters began to doubt.

Even if governments want to hide, they can't hide it.

The global government remained silent and the news was confirmed.

The panic is spreading, and the news of the presence of aliens makes everyone feel uneasy.

Soon, all kinds of speculations surfaced, and the most reliable guess was that an alien spaceship wandering in Orion was hit by the huge meteorite stream of Orion, the spacecraft was destroyed, and all the aliens inside. Death, eventually, part of the wreckage of the spacecraft was brought into the journey to the solar system by the meteorite stream.

It’s good news that all the aliens found are dead, but everyone is not happy.

The biggest impact of the news is that the world is in chaos.

Intensive spacecraft wreckage and meteorite rain fell into densely populated areas, causing huge casualties, and all countries have news of falling objects. In the beginning, people only care about the casualties, but soon, the nature becomes different.

Alien technology and alien weapons.

At the beginning, everyone looked at the casualties and the panic of aliens until a wreck with alien weapons fell on the border between two small countries in South America. The two small countries that were already confused were fighting for this. Star weapons wreckage, directly into the war.

When the wars broke out in the two countries, many talents suddenly realized.

The alien technology and materials on the wreckage of the spacecraft are much more advanced than the current technology of the Earth.

The fight begins.

In one day, in order to compete for the wreckage of alien spaceships, six countries in South America have entered a state of war, but all countries that have discovered the wreckage of spaceships have been targeted by the surrounding countries.

In just two days, the world is discolored.

The countries fought fiercely for the wreckage of alien spaceships, the wreckage of spacecraft that fell into the high seas, dispatched warships to escort, and rushed to salvage. Alien spacecraft wreckage occurs in different parts of the world, varying in size and location. But the materials that have been identified are indeed much more advanced than the Earth.

No one has ever been aware of why this alien spacecraft was destroyed, but those who remain rational are aware of an unquestionable fact.

The world is in chaos.

After the energy revolution, the delicate balance of the world's major groups was broken.

The wreckage of the alien spacecraft became the last straw to crush the camel, and the world was really chaotic.

The wars in South America and Africa have not stopped, but have become more intense. China, the United States, Southeast Asia, South Asia, the Arab region, the East-European border zone, various wars have also started, all kinds of excuses, various contradictions broke out, the death knell of the war.

The long-standing contradiction between various countries and various alliance groups, with the emergence of the fuse of looting alien wreckage, broke out completely, dragging the world into this unavoidable war mud.

This is a disaster and the Third World War opened.

The sky is changing.

Chen Mo learned the news at the first time. Compared with other horror, he seemed to be much calmer. He has experienced the wars and changes of various civilizations in the science and technology library, and he knows the world. He knows more than any other person what alien technology means.

Zhao Min, Xiao Yu, Li Lingfeng, Zhu Li, Wang Hai, Zhong Lei, etc., all of them got this news, and their moods were different.

The conference room where the needle is audible, or the real person is present, and Wang Haizhong Lei and other important overseas tops are holographic projections.

Wang Hai calmly calmed down. He glanced at the holographic projection of a conference room. He looked calm: "The Congo fell into a huge spaceship wreck, five meters in diameter, and now it is in our hands. In order not to be exposed, it is now kept by Hitto. The Congolese official wants us. What should I do if I hand over the wreckage to them?"

Seeing that Chen Mo did not speak, Wang Hai continued to add, and with a wave of his hand, he projected the photo of the wreckage.

"The debris in our hands is one of the largest debris fragments of the African continent, like fragments of a certain weapon. Now several countries are staring, including the adjacent Angola and Zambia."

Wang Hai did not stop, waving his hand to release the map of the local forces.

"If you don't hand over the wreckage, Hito will suffer an attack from the Congolese official, next to Angola's robbing, Zambia will also start here, surrounded by three. They are asking us to hand over the pieces, and hope to face it. A lot of pressure, no matter who you give it, will offend the other two parties. The outside world does not know now, and Hetu is our armor."

After all the people listened, their eyes turned to Chen Mo. In this matter, Chen Mo also needs to be the master.

Chen Mo thought for a while, then slowly opened his mouth.

"Now there are no smokes, no strong country in Africa, there is a backward country, but the resources are rich, we need the resources there, and we need a weapon to protect the strategic deployment of our group. The things that fall in our hands, the soft delivery, is impossible. In times of trouble, the battle for contention.

The three weak countries have no threat to us. Since the contradiction between them and Hitto is open, they will help each other on the bright side. You and Hito send the alien wreckage to the junction of Tanzanyi. Zhong Lei, you transport the debris of the alien wreckage back to the factory where the ants are equipped, and transport it back to China. On the bright side, it was announced that he wanted to sell the wreckage of the alien spaceship to us. We ‘trade’ the war robot and other weapons and equipment to him and let him expand. ”

In the conference room, everyone swallowed, and they were all mad by Chen Mo’s crazy decision, which was a **** factor.

It’s impossible to get them in their hands and want them to be soft. They have the most powerful technology in the world, what is terrible? Even in the world's top powers, they are not empty.

"Don't kill them." Wang Sijia's voice seemed to be a horn. This shouted out and the entire conference room was shocked. I found that everyone's eyes were on her own, and she did not forget to show a shy smile, and the lady sat down.

Usually a technical goddess, lively and outgoing Wang Sijia, actually has such a scary side. Wei Zhe and Lin Shu, who were sitting next to each other, saw that Wang Sijia’s shy smile could not tolerate a chill, and subconsciously moved her **** away from her. This girl is definitely a dangerous person.

Zhong Lei’s hands clasped his chest and agreed to nod. “It’s true, we are doing business in a bright and straight way. If the ship’s wreckage is changing weapons, what can’t it be? If it’s bright, if they’re welcoming us, we can be enthusiastic.”

"Yes." Zhu He also spoke, licking the lips like flames. She used to be a soldier, and it was a troubled world, which undoubtedly aroused her militant factors.

Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min, Zhao Min, who was thinking about his chin, was still calm, or the taste of Gao Leng Yujie, but she looked up at Chen Mo and showed a smile. Seeing Zhao Min’s smile, the people in the conference room were a bit chilly, and Chen Mo felt terrified.

Chen Mo looked at Wang Hai, and now Wang Hai’s temperament is calm and calm, and he is a talented person. Wang Hai also saw Chen Mo’s gaze, and did not hide the excitement in his spirit. Wang Hai has always been calm and steady, and it is rare to show such a keen war.

"This matter is handed over to you, as much as possible to collect more wreckage."

"Must complete the mission." Wang Hai warfare shot.

With the authorization and order of Chen Mo, the huge machine of the marching ant group began to run wildly.

chapters.title: Chapter 689: : Nano Robots Mature
chapters.body:
Chapter 689: : Nano Robots Mature

The rough road, just after a heavy rain, the road has become more difficult. Looking around, the trees around. In the rainforest, I occasionally saw a village, but it was very small. The villagers who were on the side of the road were only curious to watch the team past and continue their business.

Along the muddy rugged road, the team traveled for two hours and still did not see the end of the trail.

"General..."

Abhcher endured the bumpy feelings of sorrow and muttered.

In the quiet car, Abhish's mutter was exceptionally clear, attracting the attention of everyone in the car. Feeling the cold eyes of Amna next to him, Abhcher was slightly horrified, and hesitated to continue to say what he wanted to say.

"How?" Hetu, who closed his eyes and raised his eyes, opened his eyes. The blue eyes looked at Abu Shek and could not see the anger: "Curious why I don't give the shipwreck to them, but choose to trade with others?"

Abhsh, silently, Eminem and Black Pearl in the car are really curious.

"Now the war has started. Our position is between the three. Once the war is ignited, no matter which one we hand over to the wreckage, the only ending is in the middle of the war, facing the anger of the other two. Since the end, The wreckage of the spacecraft is useless to us, it is better to give useful people."

Hitus’s voice was dull, but it was very clear. Abu She and others are more confused.

"Isn't that all three offended?" Abhscher questioned the export.

"To survive in this troubled world, we must make ourselves strong, we become strong, and how are we all offended?" Hetu's words are disdainful and cold: "In some people's eyes, the three of them are not strong and can be pinched at any time. dead."

Abhscher and others did not speak, and were scared by the disdainful tone of the general.

I am more curious now, who is dealing with them.

Is it the few?

The team walked for four hours on the muddy road, and the bumps for a long time made the people in the car extremely uncomfortable and tired.

At the end of the path is the border of Tanzaní.

They just appeared, a team of long transport fleets, they entered their eyes.

......

"Mr. Zhong, this is what you need."

Hetu looked serious and waved his hand, and the soldiers under his hand opened the canvas.

The wreckage of a meandering spacecraft lies quietly on the transporter. There are traces of burnt on the wreckage. You can also see the parts above, and you can't see what part of the spacecraft.

Like a car wreck that fell from the sky and was flattened.

Zhong Lei did not move, looked at the wreckage and took out a remote control.

The door of the transport container is opened, and the war robots are neat and tidy, like a dead **** standing there. Even if it doesn't move, it gives people a strong sense of oppression. The metal shell is cold and restrained, the streamlined shape, and the eyes blocked by the semi-circular black glasses, faintly visible red light. Cold, not a trace of emotional indifference, but everyone who sees, all heartbreaking.

"This is for your equipment, a total of 30 war robots, as well as portable ground-to-air intelligent missiles, ground-to-ground intelligent missiles, two anti-stealth quantum radars and some other weapons."

Zhong Lei opened the two containers behind.

Hey!

Abhscher and others were so embarrassed that they couldn't believe the equipment in front of them.

They were scared and their foreheads sweated.

I finally knew why the generals brought things to trade here, and finally understood why the generals were so arrogant.

War robots, anti-stealth quantum radars, intelligent missiles...

They are all state-of-the-art weapons and they are traded by the marching ant group.

The generals actually took the line of the army ant group and it was terrible. They now have to suspect that the background of the general may be related to this, but it is only speculation, and it is enough to say it in the heart.

"This is the first-level authority of the war robot, and it cannot be modified." Zhong Lei handed a bracelet to Hetu.

Without any hesitation, he hopes to bring his bracelet to enter his own information and obtain the first-level authority of the war robot.

Upon completion, Zhong Lei handed him six bracelets.

"This is the second-level authority of the war robot. You can give it to the trusted person to command. You can modify the information of the commander. When the command conflicts, the robot is based on the command of the first-level authority."

Hetu did not have the feelings and took the bracelet.

"Need to replenish ammunition, you can send someone to contact us." Zhong Lei said.

After the two parties changed their car, Zhong Lei waved his hand and left the car.

Seeing that Zhong Lei was far away, Abu She and other talents breathed a sigh of relief, and now they look to Xi Tu’s eyes and become fanatical. With this equipment, they are no longer a tribal leader.

"Go."

Hitu turned and got into the car.

......

Flying Ant Center.

The goddess slowly landed, and the staff and robots who had already waited for them were dressed in isolation suits and quickly rushed over to the goddess.

There is also a transporter going there.

The transport compartment was opened, and a large freezer slowly emerged from the transport compartment. The staff wearing the isolation suits began to disinfect the outside of the freezer.

After confirming that the disinfection is completed, the freezer cabinet is loaded onto the transport vehicle and returned to the institute.

The staff wearing the isolation suit did not stop working and continued to disinfect the goddess.

From the goddess landing to the freezer was sent to the transporter, the whole process was infinite, but fifteen minutes until the transport vehicle disappeared into the entrance of the base underground research institute.

Under the care of Zhao Min, the marching ant group was in an orderly manner, and there was no chaos caused by the outbreak of a large-scale war in the world. There is Zhao Min sitting in the company, Chen Mo, who has no worries, is physically and mentally researched.

Nanotechnology laboratory.

In a pure iron iron box, the 'grey substance' flows.

Like a liquid, it is not a liquid.

Nanobot research has been around for a long time.

This kind of technology is no small matter. The last time the technology was mature, it was being tested. Now, after many tests and tests, it is confirmed that the nano-robot has no technical defects and technology molding.

Now nano-robots can be used with confidence without worrying about the consequences of losing control.

Chen Mo reached out and gray matter flowed. When he touched Chen Mo’s wrist, he formed a ring in his hand and the structure slowly became clear.

A retro-style bracelet is formed on the wrist.

The bracelet does not look special, the appearance is not a technology product, it is an ordinary wooden bracelet.

With these nano-robots, Chen Mo can create what he needs, anytime, anywhere.

The wreckage of alien spaceships has been obtained by countries all over the world. Then, without mentioning other technologies, there will be no small breakthrough in material technology.

The nano robot will become another card for him.

In the midst of chaos, Chen Mo must save his cards as much as possible.

Aliens fell into the earth, confirming the existence of this universe, aliens. No one knows when the next alien will come. The aliens at that time may not necessarily be dead bodies.

Ink also used a nano robot to make a wristband worn on the wrist.

Suddenly, the ink girl moved and looked at Chen Mo’s long opening.

"Mergo, the moon's alien corpses and dormant bins have been transported back to the ant space center by the goddess."

chapters.title: Chapter 690: : Zuo Qianzhi.
chapters.body:
Chapter 690: : Zuo Qianzhi.

The rise of Hitto has caused a lot of shock in Africa.

For this land, the name has no visibility at all. But this is an obscurity armed, but within three days, it has become a rising star on the African continent.

In just two days, the Greek armed forces experienced two major battles.

Fighting with the Congolese army, killing more than 1,900 Congolese military soldiers, shooting down three armed helicopters, and one fighter plane, forced the Congolese official to retreat 50 miles to give up control of the land on the border with Tanzania.

A tribe is armed with only a few thousand people. It kills a country's military and smashes the battle, and the battle is so high that it shocks the surrounding countries.

Hearing around the news, he was ashamed.

But the battle has not stopped.

When the people were still digesting the battle information between Hitto and the Congolese army, the Greek armed forces suddenly appeared on the road of the Zambian military into the Mitombo Mountains, and the Thunder Force’s vanguard 1100 was fully provoked by the thunder. People, shooting down two planes, comprehensive control of the Mitongba Mountains.

Two seemingly ordinary struggles shocked the African land.

It’s just two battles, no one.

The number of casualties of the Congolese military and the Zambian military reached more than 3,000 terrorists. There were countless losses in weapons and equipment. The two countries suffered heavy losses and many generals were killed.

This casualty and loss is comparable to a large war conflict.

The Greek figure is like a group of big-eyed man with a machete, fighting two groups of children with small sticks in life and death.

When the outside world thought that the Greek armed forces would face retaliation from the two countries, the two countries did not move, but Angola, who was behind the Greeks, also died and did not dare to move.

Soon, the news was exposed, and the armed forces and intelligent missiles were in the hands of the Greek armed forces.

Hetu armed with the wreckage of the alien spacecraft in his hands and exchanged weapons and equipment with the marching ant group.

The news caused dissatisfaction between the two countries. The surrounding countries were furious and blamed and accused the marching ant group. They accused the marching ant group of being a war-monger and relying on war to send ill-gotten gains.

However, the effect was not great, and the marching ant group did not pay any attention to their condemnation.

The outside world did not dare to move, and the situation of Hito’s armed forces rooted in the Mitombo Mountains was confirmed. The Greek armed forces have also become one of the most powerful forces in the central part of Africa, joining the battle for competition in Africa.

In the midst of war, Angola’s spearhead turned, abandoning the Greeks and turning to the weak Congo, and Zambia also fell to the ground and bypassed Hetu to attack the Congo.

The wars of the three countries have exploded.

The chaos in Africa has spread to half of the country.

The world situation has been chaotic.

After the energy revolution, artificial intelligence and various technological breakthroughs, five years of development, replenishing the elite, allowing the powerful countries to accumulate enough powerful forces to prepare for this global war.

The first to take the shot is the North American Group.

The North American group spurred the invasion of their people on the grounds of the drug dealers in Moses, and invaded the land of Moses.

At the time of the opposition and resistance of the Moses Army, the North American Group dispatched war robots to strangle the Moses military.

Under the torrent of war robots, Moses did not have any resistance at all.

Within three days, the North American group army successfully broke through the capital of Moses, captured the President of Moses, forced him to abdicate, and then supported the new president.

The whole process, like the director's numerous stage plays.

However, the North American group's ambition does not stop there.

Central America is in the grip, the eyes of the United States, officially turned to the countries of South America, there is no strong country, rich resources, is a good back garden.

The North American group has been Chen Bing before the Panama Canal.

......

The North American group has started.

The news on the desk of the highest war room in the capital of China has already arrived.

The great head of the demeanor is the highest strategic institution that governs all the forces in China, and the general staff of the wartime.

There are only 24 people in the General Staff Department, but each person, status and power is not low, and has a wealth of experience in combat layout.

Nowadays, the world is in chaos, and China is still very stable in China, because no one is tempted.

Huaxia, which has the most advanced equipment technology, condenses up and down into one, and whoever provokes the brain has problems. But now their strategic layout faces a big direction.

The world is in chaos, no one can stay out of the way, and the mutual annexation and expansion between the various groups is a thorough reshuffle.

After this chaos, the world will have a new look and power.

"Get started." The head of the big voice was serious.

This sound made all the staff of the General Staff Department have a good waist.

Zuo Qian is the general staff of the General Staff Department. He is wearing military uniforms and his temperament is among the soldiers. It is a rare Sven, with glasses.

But everyone will not despise him because of Sven's appearance.

After being a famous artist, Zuoqian was good at the military strategy. When he was young, he entered the external guidance team and sent to overseas battlefields to perform special missions to help some countries plan some combat operations and train some small country combat commanders.

At that time, the Syrian state’s battle against the armed forces of Harab was the one he had presided over.

The tactics of interspersed with attacks and squadrons directly disrupted the operational steps against the armed forces, allowing the Syrian nation to regain the important town of Harab and become a turning point in the Syrian war.

Over the years, as a tactical instructor active in the world's first-line battlefield, even if the country is a peaceful period, he also has the most advanced strategic layout and tactical means polished by theory and practice, is a real handsome.

Zuo Qian also has a famous saying: War is not art, it is killing.

"The current global landscape is divided into ten group forces."

Left thousand calmly waved the laser pointer.

“The North American group, which is dominated by the United States and is the crown of the United States, occupies a continent of North America. The new Soviet Union, led by Russia and spanning the vast land of Europe and Asia. The European group dominated by Western European countries, the size of which is more than half of Europe. Island-Australian Union; ASEAN; Arab League; South Asia Indy; South American Group; We; and finally the African region and some small countries on four continents.

This is the approximate state of the world, among which we, the North American Group, the New Soviet Union, the European Group, the Island Australia Alliance, and the Indo-China are the most powerful.

The North American Group is now working to point the butcher knife to South America. The purpose is clear, to control the entire South America, and to sit on the American land to strengthen its strength.

The South American Group is weak, and it is impossible to resist the war machine in North America. If the North American group is eroding South America and is growing up in the Americas, even if it is separated by a Pacific Ocean, it is strategically unfriendly to us. We can sell the relevant war weapons to the South American Group, let them drag the pace of the North American group and consume its strength. ”

The holographic map in front of Zuo Qian is very clear. Each force has different colors as markers, which can be very intuitive to see the division of the situation.

"We here, we must be alert to a position, that is, Northeast Asia. Here we are concentrated, the new Soviet Union, the three powerful countries of the island, and the three have revenge, the situation is the most complicated.

Although the island country is small, it is powerful and has great ambitions and must expand. Their best expansion route is to go south. ASEAN, Oceania and South America. If they are iron-clad and dare to eat in North America, they will definitely travel to South America to dismember South America and share it with the North American group, but they must face the North American group.

If they want to be on the safe side, they will choose Oceania and ASEAN. According to intelligence, their alliance with Australia is strange. There is no good for no reason, heaven will not fall, so Oceania should be their first goal, and then look forward to seeing another South America or ASEAN.

The new Soviet Union is now in Eastern Europe, confronting the European group. It is not wise to provoke a war in this position.

But we must be wary of people other than the two, come here to create contradictions, and disrupt the situation in this region. It is not a wise question at that time. ”

Having said that, Zuo Qian stopped. The eyes of everyone looked at him and waited for his conclusion.

"So our current strategic direction is to help South America to drag the North American group; to maintain friendly relations with the new Soviet Union, to strongly suppress the stability of Northeast Asia, and to force the island countries to expand southward; to the west, to maintain friendship with the Arab League; help Pakistani Railway Dealing with Indy;

As for ASEAN, if the island countries choose to start, they will sell weapons to them, otherwise they will let them fend for themselves. We sell weapons and accumulate resources. The later we enter the war, the better it will be, and the strength will be preserved. At the end of the war, we will get the maximum benefit. ”

The big head sitting in the first place nodded gently.

chapters.title: Chapter 691: : War Feast
chapters.body:
Chapter 691: : War Feast

Chen Mo quickly received a research report on the disintegration of alien corpses from the Institute of Medicine.

There are very few alien corpses found on the earth, but the alien bodies brought back on the moon are only severely impacted and broken, and remain largely intact.

The first time the alien corpse was brought back, the official collection of the top planing experts, medical scientists, geneticists and biologists, formed a research team to come to the ant colony base to carry out the plan.

The report is now available.

“Preliminary research reports show that this organism is not a carbon-based organism, it is a nitrogen-based organism.”

A genetic expert has a complicated introduction.

This study of alien biology found that they have subverted their previous definition of life.

"Unlike the earth's biology, its nutrients are not carbohydrates, but nitrogen-based compounds. Experiments have shown that the genetic material of this alien is mainly composed of nitrogen. In short, they can be made with strong acid. Food and secretions are also acidic compounds."

Just a few words, too much.
