Human studies have focused on the carbon-based organisms of the Earth and believe that they are based on carbon. This discovery subverts some of the basic definitions of biology.

The universe is amazing, human beings are not unique.

"In addition, we found that their muscle toughness is very strong, it is 5 times the human muscle toughness, and the ductility and elasticity are very good. This is why they are super-high speed falling and the body can remain partially intact.

Their blood is pink and rich in acid, so the skin is pink. The bone density is similar to the bone density of a child about ten years old and relatively brittle.

However, the vertebrae and tail are the most special, red-red, mainly composed of iron. The structure is very special. The strength of the tail is very high. It is 6 times that of ordinary steel. It has bone spurs. According to computer simulation, the tail sweep can kill. An elephant. ”

Experts in the surrounding research have some embarrassment.

Chen Mo looked at the aliens in the refrigerator and left the report.

Chen Mo guessed that the degree of evolution and civilization of this alien is at most half the level of human beings.

He has already let the ink girl fully study the design and materials of the dormant cabin containing the alien body. In addition to the drug, the dormant cabin technology can be obtained in the technology library.

Chen Mo asked the ink woman to prepare some medicines after analyzing the ingredients, and experimented with rabbit mice. The medicine did not have any dormancy, but was poisonous.

The materials of the alien spacecraft wreckage and the dormant cabin materials are quite technical and librarians of silver and gold-grade technical materials.

If Chen Mo needs a dormant cabin, he can also manufacture, within the authority of the Science and Technology Library Gold Administrator, there is a dormant cabin technology, including dormant drugs for humans.

More than half of the human civilization, it is quite the technology that Chen Mo is now controlling.

Without a complete spaceship, the fragmented wreckage has limited appeal to Chen Mo.

I thought that these shape ship wrecks could have some gains, and now it seems that the harvest is not big.

Nowadays, these spacecraft wrecks are very rare advanced technologies and materials for technicians in other countries, but for Chen Mo, it is tasteless and a pity.

The Science and Technology Library has a variety of technologies that are inexhaustible. There is no technology that goes beyond the gold-level administrators. It is useless to him.

According to the material technology of the spacecraft, this level of civilization is only active in the galaxy, and it is absolutely impossible to think of jumping out of the galaxy and carrying out cosmic aggression and colonization.

Chen Mo guessed that because of some force majeure reasons, they would choose to leave their own planet and wander in the universe, and finally end up with this.

For specific reasons, Chen Mo does not have to guess, and now his next task is to transform Mars.

The igniter is already close to Mars.

......

"It's time to start."

Rosen picked up a glass of scarlet red wine, shook it, took a sip, and picked up the laser pointer.

In front of him, it is a map of the situation in the world. It is distinguished by color and the situation is very clear. In the strategic room, President Eva and Defense Minister Shanahan, Secretary of Love, Tom and a group of staff officers are also required.

"While starting with South America, we must find ways to disrupt the situation in Northeast Asia, Southeast Asia and South Asia. It is best to lead the war to China."

Rosen drew three circles on the world map.

"Now China is the most powerful, let them idle, they will help the South American group to create trouble for us, and they can save strength and accumulate resources. Once they are idle, the war is finally, they are the biggest profit-making party, so let They have something to do, and our plans in South America will be much smoother.

Especially in Northeast Asia, the top three, with two smashing sticks, have a deep hatred between each other. If we can instigate the war in this position, we can safely annex South America. As for how to fight, Minister Shanahan and Secretary Tom should be more familiar than me. ”

Rosen's analysis is simple and clear, the layout is completed in the early stage, and what remains is the overall game between them.

Everyone in the strategic room looks at Eva.

The war game begins.

They have completed the encroachment of Central American corn, followed by South America, only need Eva a paper authorization, the war will begin immediately.

"Give it to you and make our country even bigger."

Eva did not hesitate to sign his name on the War Power of Attorney and hand it to Shanahan.

"Received, Madam President."

Shanahan took over the power of attorney and paid a courtesy call to the Pentagon.

......

The feast began.

After the Thunder resort engulfed Central America, the North American Group officially declared war on the South American Group on the grounds of threatening national security.

The continent of South America has no peace in the past.

The people of all countries are full of fear and lingering. The North American group declared war on them, which is almost a declaration of death.

South America is inherently chaotic because of global changes. If it is in peacetime, it may still calm down. But now the world is in turmoil, smoke is everywhere, and the weakness of South America is exposed.

There are constant disputes between small countries in South America, and the economic collapse is sluggish, such as the same scattered sand. The joining countries of the South American Group are also very clear that they have reached the end of their lives.

North America declared war on South America.

The news spread, not waiting for the North American army to start, some small pro-American countries in South America took the lead and attacked the South American group.

This declaration of war seems to be the hallmark of the world's most powerful group entry war.

In the afternoon, Australia followed the pace of the North American Group, declared war on the South American Group, and sent troops to South America to quickly capture the capital of a small country of the South American Group.

The island nation also officially dispatched fleets and aircraft into the South Pacific.

Just as people thought that the Island Australia Alliance was preparing to join hands with the North American group to dismember South America, the news of a shocking world spread.

In Australia's elite travel to South America, the domestic military emptiness, the island country suddenly announced that Australia betrayed the alliance agreement, damage the interests of the island countries, and declare war on Australia.

No warning.

The island nation will stretch the bright butcher's knife to the allies of the honeymoon for several years.

After the beginning of the declaration of war, the islands and the South Pacific fleet and aircraft stunned, launched a comprehensive control attack on Australia, destroyed all air defense systems, controlled the Australian domestic power network, and placed war robots directly controlling the Australian capital and parties.

The powerful warrior robots and other war robots in the island countries were exposed to the world for the first time, causing an uproar.

The unprotected Australian country exposed almost all of its deadly weaknesses to the island's butcher's knife.

In the past five years, in the name of allies, the island nation has helped Australia upgrade its power network, build nuclear fusion power stations, sell high-tech equipment, upgrade computer networks, and invest in various fields. In almost all areas of Australia, there is a shadow of the island nation.

This time, the Australian country finally tasted the bitter fruit.

At the beginning of the war, the island nation revealed its long-lost fangs, and it was almost effortless to control the computer network, media network, power network and various resources in Australia.

The desperate mood enveloped the whole of Australia, and the anger of betrayal and calculated was erupted. A comprehensive counterattack began, and if the return of the dead person was returned.

Today, high-tech equipment, power networks, and computer networks are controlled by the island countries. The counterattacks of the Australian countries are not worthy of the moths, showing more of his hysteria and the end of the road.

The war is fierce.

The North American group’s cold-eyed gaze blew the last hope of the Australian nation.

The Australian country, which once spared the United States and spared no effort, finally tasted the tragic ending of the dog. What makes them desperate is that no world power has stood up to help them speak.

Slaughter, cleaning and control are being staged in Australia.

I thought that the first continent that fell under the iron hoof of the war would be South America, but everyone did not expect that the war reversal came so fast.

The whole world knows that Australia is finished.

chapters.title: Chapter 692: :Open The Sky
chapters.body:
Chapter 692: :Open The Sky

"The distance from the igniter to Mars is only 1 hour and 52 minutes."

In the space, the 'igniter' asteroid that is flying at high speed is flying at high speed towards Mars. After the mechanical column completes the predetermined orbital correction for the 'igniter', it is also accompanied by the 'igniter'.

Beyond Mars, the three space planes, the Virgo, the Virgo and the Ant, have already loaded what they need to arrive at the intended location.

Everything is going on in accordance with the Mars transformation program.

On the holographic platform of the laboratory, the images of the two planets are also projected, as well as the virtual orbits of the two running orbits.

The purpose of this impact is to let the liquid layer of the Martian mantle flow, the molten iron in the star flows, and the solid metal ball of the core nucleates and settles convection, thus activating the Martian magnetic field.

Now that you are ready, just wait for the asteroid to hit Mars after 1 hour and 50 minutes.

Recalculating the track again, confirming that there is no problem with the track, Chen Mo sat in the chair and began to wait.

Zhao Min and Xiao Yu are also present. They are sitting quietly waiting for Chen Mo. They are the few people who really know the Mars project. Now they are ready to witness this historical moment.

Mars, far outside the solar system, is partially equipped with an important detector of the ion thruster. Immediately after receiving the command, it stops working, the propeller opens, escapes the surface of Mars, and enters the space of Mars.

An hour and a half passed quickly, and the time from the igniter hit Mars was getting closer.

"The igniter is about to hit Mars and the mechanical column will fly away."

With the instructions of the built-in artificial intelligence, the mechanical column flying around the asteroid of the igniter begins to decelerate, leaving the range of the igniter asteroid and staying out of space.

The impact began.

An unprecedented manual control of asteroids striking the planet is opening.

Outside of space, you can see a huge asteroid that crashes into the equator of Mars at high speed.

boom! !

A large earthquake that struck the entire Mars, Mars was like a swaying egg, and the molten iron inside the star's interior solidified at that moment.

The sea of fire spread at a frantic speed, drowning the entire Mars, and the sleeping volcano erupted at that moment. The smoke of the smoke covered the sky and the magma flowed.

The flow of the liquid layer deep in the earth's crust, the emergence of large earthquakes, accompanied by ground collapse and alpine uplift. The underground liquid water ice layer is exposed, and at that moment it turns into a white mist, and the water vapor is transpiration.

If the sad song from the depths of the river flows back in the ear, Mars, who has been sleeping for hundreds of millions of years, wakes up at this moment and sings softly, tragic and passionate.

In the experimental room, various video data from the Mars satellites are being played, as if the scenes of the last days have shocked Zhao Min and Xiao Yuxin, and there is a touch and joy from the depths of the soul.

They seem to see a starting point for the creation of the gods.

"The Martian magnetic field was detected."

The voice of the ink girl is so savage that Chen Mo’s clenched fist is loose and unconsciously relieved. At this moment, he felt a sublimation from the depths of the soul, and there was an unspeakable atmosphere in the temperament.

The Martian magnetic field started successfully.

This is just the beginning.

Seeing the data from the satellite, the Martian magnetic field has not yet reached the required intensity.

"According to the plan, the planet bomb was launched." Chen Mo vomited.

The earthquake of Mars, the super volcanic eruption continues, soot and gas cover the entire planet, and occasionally lightning can be seen.

The Tianmai has already been waiting in the space orbit of Mars. It received instructions from the Earth, and the second step was started. It was time to add a scoop to the already hot oil pan of Mars.

Planetary bombs, as the name suggests, are used to bomb planets. A super nuclear fusion bomb using the J-3 as a fuel, the equivalent of one piece is enough to destroy an island country. If needed, you can make a more powerful planet bomb.

To be on the safe side, Chen Mo designed the planetary bomb into two parts, and the core and ignition device were separated to avoid accidents. When needed, they were combined.

Now is the time to use.

The planet bombs are assembled in the maiden and are now ready to be placed at the asteroid's impact to accelerate the activity of liquid movement inside Mars. Increase the strength of the Martian magnetic field and make the crustal activity more active.

As long as Mars is not blown up, or the equivalent is overdone, there will be no major problems.

Ten planet bombs are placed in the right position, which is more beneficial to Mars transformation.

A two-meter-diameter planet bomb, thrown from the Virgo, is driven by the ion engine and is rapidly flying toward the position where the asteroid hits Mars.

Booming...

Ten horrific explosions swept the entire asteroid impact crater, like pouring a scoop of water into the oil pan, landslides, and the volcanic eruption around it was even more crazy.

The magnetic field of Mars is increasing.

Still a bit useful.

If necessary, Chen Mo can let the Tianmao put down ten pieces, but now it is enough.

In the past five years, the technology for this preparation has already been prepared, only waiting for the asteroid to successfully launch the magnetic field of Mars.

Chen Mo looked at the image of Mars that was sent back.

"Ink, now building a high-level climate control satellite network system for Mars."

The advanced climate control satellite network system is not a meteorological satellite in the traditional sense, but a satellite network that can control the weather.

By deploying satellites carrying high-efficiency lasers, affecting Mars magnetosphere and cosmic radiation to control temperature, combined with ultrasonic satellites and electromagnetic satellites deployed in the atmosphere, a complete climate control system is formed to conduct lightning, cloud and rain.

If you let Mars confidently cool down, I don't know how many years it will take, so Chen Mo has to use this method to accelerate the cooling of the surface of Mars.

However, the number of satellites needs a bit more, more than 10,000, different heights, different functions, covering the entire Martian space.

In order to avoid the accident caused by the impact of the asteroid, Chen Mo chose to set up the climate control system after the asteroid successfully struck the Mars.

This kind of climate weapon is very horrible and can cause big troubles. There are precedents in the world. Therefore, the International Convention on the Prohibition of Environmental Change has long been in place to constrain the development of similar technologies.

Chen Mo will not use this technology on the earth.

The Earth now does not use climate control technology at all, it has a complete weather system and atmospheric evolution.

"The next step is to wait." Chen Mo said.

"For Mars, this project is tantamount to the Pangu Kaitian, you are the ‘Pangu’.” Zhao Min finally could not help but marvel, the shocking mood has not been calm.

This kind of inhuman means, a few years ago, when Chen Mo proposed to transform the planet, she could not think of it. But the scene I saw today, even if she is well-informed, has been psychologically prepared, but also deeply shocked.

In a certain way, Chen Mo is more than a god.

When I heard Zhao Min’s amazement, Xiao Yu was deeply impressed, and his eyes almost looked at Chen Mo.

At the moment when the asteroid hits Mars and successfully stimulates the magnetic field of Mars, Xiao Yu feels the change in Chen Mo, a temperamental and psychological change. At that moment, Xiao Yu really saw the same breath from Chen Mo, and now Chen Mo is more handsome, and there is a layer of mysterious temperament.

“How long does it take to complete the renovation?” asked Xiao Yu.

“Unclear, when the network of climate control systems is completed, the surface of Mars can be accelerated. After cooling, it is necessary to transform the soil, purify the water, transform the atmosphere, plant vegetation, and reach the conditions of human livability. This requires a process.”

Chen Mo looked at the sky in the video that was covered by volcanic ash and various gases. The current Mars has long been beyond recognition, without any traces of the past.

chapters.title: Chapter 693: : Rosen'S Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 693: : Rosen'S Plan

After the island country occupied Oceania, it did not rush to continue to expand, but began to digest the kangaroo that was hunted.

There are still some resistances within the Australian country, but in the face of absolute strength, the sporadic resistance can not withstand a trace of turmoil, and it is slaughtered clean.

The haze means that the island country can easily complete the suppression in Oceania, start to promote the cultural concept of the island country, completely replace the cultural consciousness of Oceania, and fundamentally destroy the foundation of the Australian country.

From the beginning to the end, the actions of the island countries were exceptionally smooth, no one stopped them, and no one helped the kangaroo.

Unsurprisingly, the Australian country has completely perished, and the time is short, beyond imagination.

At this moment, ASEAN is also aware of the horror of the island nation.

From this plan and steps to destroy Australia, the island countries are more horrified than the North American group, and their strength is not weak. Aware of the dangerous ASEAN, they began to look for China to buy smart weapons and equipment, in order to prevent them from being used after the island countries digested the foundation of the Australian nation.

The situation in the world is very lively and it is full of fire.

"Damn, **** rabbit."

Shanahan's face was black like a pot of gray, staring at the battle map, his eyes were red, and his mouth was very uncomfortable.

The occupation of South America was blocked.

As Rosen thought, Huaxia people sold equipment to the South American Group to consume their strength.

The war started very smoothly, and it took only a week to conquer several island countries in Central America without any blockage. When I was fighting with the South American Group, it was very smooth at the beginning.

The form of war has long changed. The current war is not based on the number of people winning in the past, but on technology and equipment. In the application of art of war, they have played so many years in the world, with absolute authority and the right to speak.

Destroy the enemy's air defense system, seize air superiority, satellite attacks and network control, occupy the advantages of information warfare, and destroy the South American Group's power grid system.

After the war, a series of actions were very smooth, accurate strikes, sea, land, air, information, four-in-one tactics, they almost paralyzed the entire South American group.

But when they advanced on land and prepared to occupy the city where the South American Group headquarters is located, there were problems.

When their vanguards attacked Rio, they encountered war robots and were completely annihilated. Their war robots were also destroyed by hundreds of aircraft while fighting the South American group of robots.

The war robot of the marching ant group.

The news, as if a bucket of ice water poured over their heads, the idea of occupying the South American group for a short time was ruined.

China is a war robot that is extremely difficult to deal with, and when they are ready to take advantage of the air superiority, carry out carpet bombing, and destroy the South American group’s rebellious army, the accident has appeared again.

Their stealth bombers were shot down two.

A $2 billion bomber, with only one action, lost $4 billion, and Shanahan’s heart was bleeding. Later, it was discovered that China’s anti-stealth radar and intelligent air defense missiles appeared in the hands of the South American group’s army.

They have always looked down on the South American group, and they have suffered two big losses since they were caught off guard.

Both major losses are related to China.

The unwilling Shanahan is mad.

In a wartime secret battle room in Washington, Eva sat on the sofa and looked unsatisfied. Next to her, Rosen is holding a small drink of red wine.

After reading the information given by Shanahan and Tom, Rosen, who was always crazy, was also very serious. The red wine glass in his hand was also put down.

"Do you have a good countermeasure?" Eva said.

Rosen thought about it and took another sip of the red wine glass. He licked his lips and looked at Shanahan and Tom: "Is the Northeast Asian war situation not provoked?"

"No, Huaxia sent heavy troops to guard the border, strict inspections, and imprisonment. They seem to have an agreement with the new Soviet Union. They do not provoke war in Northeast Asia and maintain communication. The two giants have joined forces to maintain stability in Northeast Asia. People dare not provoke the battle there."

"trouble."

Rosen poured a glass of red wine and stared at the map.

"Block the airspace around the South American Group and block the waters of the South Pacific. Don't let Huaxia's equipment be transported to the South American Group. The South American Group is weak, and the war weapons and equipment that can be purchased this time are limited, blocking the flow of Chinese equipment into the South American Group. Channels, they will consume their equipment and ammunition.

Some equipment can be assisted to the small countries in South America who are pro-used, let them go to bite the South American group of participating countries and accelerate their equipment and ammunition consumption. When the ammunition is consumed, we will do it again. ”

Rosen’s gaze shifted from a map of South America to Asia.

"The destruction of the kangaroo by the island nation has already caused ASEAN's vigilance. Now ASEAN is sure to ask for China to purchase equipment. The situation in Southeast Asia cannot be picked up. South Asia has Pakistan to deal with India. Good layout, good means."

Rosen finally understood why China has strong stability in Northeast Asia.

Huaxia also saw the desire of the island country to expand, and squadrons, forced the island countries to go south, or South America, or Oceania, or Southeast Asia, no matter which, the war can not burn them.

Now that the island countries occupy Oceania, the ASEAN countries have set up a broad barrier between Oceania and Asia.

As long as they strongly suppress the situation in Northeast Asia, assist the Pakistani railway, and sell weapons to ASEAN to deal with the island-controlled Oceania, they can keep all wars out of the country.

"So how are you going to lay out now?"

After Eva heard Rosen’s explanation, she looked dignified.

Huaxia also has strategic masters in the layout. If Huaxia is in the game, Huaxia will get the biggest cake in the later period of the war.

Rosen looked at him and picked up the laser pointer after drinking red wine.

"South America here, based on the blockade and consumption just mentioned, after the consumption is completed, it will quickly dismember and annex. ASEAN here, mainly based on differentiation. We are wooing South Vietnam, Lijiapo and Indonesia.

These three families have a bad relationship with the dragon, which has caused ASEAN to disintegrate from the inside and create chaos in Southeast Asia. Support the shackles of South Vietnam and let them go north. As for Northeast Asia here..."

Rosen flashed a cold light in his eyes.

"The first time I messed up the bear, the bear was in the old age, and the economy was the worst. The war is burning money. They can't support two big wars at the same time. Once the economy is exhausted, they will collapse from the inside like the old times. We can Divided into food.

Moreover, the president of the new Soviet Union, the age is high, the hero is late, they have no strong successor, and once the man falls, the new Soviet Union will fall.

We joined the European Union and they fought in Europe. We crossed the Bering Strait and entered Northeast Asia, letting them ignore it. Once the bear is tired and sees us, the island nation will join the battle and share this big cake. The island nation was suppressed in the island for a thousand years, and their desire to expand was stronger than anyone else.

However, we should not force too much, mainly to consume, warm boiled frogs. They have mushroom bombs. If they are too aggressive and crazy before destruction, no one can afford it. ”

In the combat room, everyone looks to Eva.

Eva thought a little and nodded, agreeing to Rosen's layout.

......

"Mars is hit by an asteroid and it has changed."

Howell took a photo and hurried into NASA's headquarters. The white hair shook, his face was happy, and he laughed into a chrysanthemum.

He was a Mars researcher at NASA. Just last night, when he used telescopes to observe Mars, he found that Mars was already unrecognizable.

An asteroid hit Mars, causing this.

The detector on Mars failed in the past few years, and the satellite was old and retired. They have not launched a new Mars probe, and now they can only understand Mars through a telescope.

Jim took the photo and looked at it, letting the technicians take the electronic photo to zoom in.

It’s really an unrecognizable photo that appears on the screen.

"Would you like to launch new detectors and satellites and explore Mars? This discovery is very important, like the early forms of the Earth. Once cooled, there may be conditions for life." Howell is eager to say.

"I'm afraid not."

Jim looked at the photo and shook his head.

"It is now in the war period. All the redundant projects we have now are almost stagnant. Domestic funds are mainly used for military expenditures. We don't want to engage in these big projects. It is not allowed in an extraordinary period."

"Oh." Howell looked disappointed.

"I am afraid that we will have to wait until the end of the war to have funding to support the continued exploration of Mars."

NASA announced that Mars was hit by asteroids. The news, in the war years, such as mud cows into the sea, a little stunned and disappeared. The outside world will not associate this kind of impact with human manipulation.

chapters.title: Chapter 694: : Yan Liang And Yan Qingfeng
chapters.body:
Chapter 694: : Yan Liang And Yan Qingfeng

"The North American group blocked the South Pacific and blocked the airspace in South America. This move is a bit interesting. They want to cut off the passage of our equipment into the South American group, and then catch the South American."

Zuo Qian took the information in his hand and immediately understood the intention of the North American Group.

In a short period of time, the plan to occupy South America suffered two major losses. The North American Group has realized that they are helping the South American Group, and the plan will certainly not be too smooth.

Therefore, they had to block the South Pacific and cut off their equipment flow into the South American Group.

"Bypassing and killing, differentiation and support, they want South America to collect internal consumption, and then annex it?" In the strategic combat room, another think tank said: "Although the time is longer, it is the most secure."

"Correct."

Left nod.

"But not all, we have trouble with their plans, and now their plans have to change. In return, they will certainly not let us be quiet for too long. They will pull us into the water, where are they pulling our water?"

Zuo Qian is thinking and deducing the next possible action of the North American group.

Together with the big head, everyone is guessing what the North American group will be.

The purpose of the strategic deduction is to gain insight into the opportunities. First, the enemy will analyze the enemy's plan in one step, and from the general direction, get the overall strategic advantage.

The combat room fell into silence.

"Now let's do some deduction. If we are the strategic think tank of the North American Group, how will we lay out and pull us into the water."

Left thousand went to the holographic sand table and stared at the holographic world map.

Everyone else was surrounded, and the head of the big man also stood next to the holographic world map.

"North-east Asia."

"Southeast Asia."

Two people in the combat room blurted out and said their answers.

"Talk about the reasons."

Zuo Qian touched the scar on the back of the left hand. This was a small mistake when he was commanded on the battlefield. After being discovered by the enemy, he was hit by the bombing during the bombing. Now he has developed the habit of touching this scar. Only then can he be reminded of his comprehensive analysis of the situation.

The staff of the Northern Theater were full of doubts.

"In Northeast Asia, we have heavy guards and a stable agreement with the new Soviet Union. At this point in the island, we should not make trouble here. And ASEAN now asks us, what trouble can they create for us?"

"Our previous layout only analyzes the situation of five countries in Northeast Asia. We have not analyzed another situation. If the sixth party's North American group crosses the foot, cross the Bering Strait and go to the bear?"

The staff officer who said 'Northeast Asia' used a laser pointer to draw an arrow from North America, pointing to the Far East of Western Siberia.

His name is Yan Liang, he is a special soldier, has performed special combat missions, and has experienced a real battlefield. Later he was admitted to the State. Defense. University Strategic Command Section. After graduation, he followed the left-thousand-out command and aid, which is considered one of the students of Zuoqian. It is the key training staff of the General Staff.

Everyone in the combat room is silent, and his mind is thinking about what happens after this happens.

After hearing the harsh analysis, Zuo Qian also glanced at him with appreciation.

It seems to be encouraged, and the spirit of strictness is shocked.

"Now the North American group is besieging the South American group, and the annexation plan is stagnant. The North American group only needs to unite with the European group and fight at both ends. The new Soviet Union cannot be both at the end. Now it is not during the Second World War. Although the Russian economy has improved a bit in recent years, it cannot support it at the same time. Such a huge war consumption. If the economy collapses, they will repeat the same mistakes and fall apart.

Now that Northeast Asia is stable, it is the island countries that dare not face us and the new Soviet Union. But the North American group will intervene and will be daring to the other three countries in Northeast Asia. There is a leading brother to take the shot, the island country and these two sticks, will never let go of this expansion opportunity, down the stone, then this place will be chaotic. ”

Yan Liang used a laser pointer to draw an arrow between Sakhalin and Western Siberia between the three countries.

“Why is it sure that the island country and the two sticks will definitely participate?” one general asked.

"Because of desire. Hope."

Left thousand does not hesitate to add.

“From the top to the bottom of the stick, it has been self-proclaimed how strong it is in history, which land is theirs. The island country has been suppressed for thousands of years, and it has great hatred with the old Soviet Union. Both national consciousness and social consciousness are both There is a desire for the territory, which is a good opportunity to expand the territory. If the new Soviet Union collapses in Europe and the United States and their joint attacks, they will naturally get the land they want."

"If the North American group really crossed the Bering Strait, what should we do?" asked the commander of the Northern Theater.

"It's not how we do it, but what the new Soviet emperor did."

Left thousand shaking his head.

"Their goal is the new Soviet Union, and then we pull the water, we have no reason to participate in it, there is no need to let our soldiers bleed to help him keep the house."

It was because of the weak national power that they needed a strategic buffer in the face of the game between the two powers.

Now they don't need a strategic buffer. Whoever wants to attack will fight.

"When the North American Group intervenes, Northeast Asia will be in a big chaos, and the North American Group will take the opportunity to pull us into the water. We only need to be strong, who will marry us, we will kill who, do not reason, do not need to be merciful.

After cleaning them up, they will return to the defense and not participate in the war here. Others, let them fight, we don't intervene, see how the great emperor makes decisions. But we have to consider the worst case, that is, the bear is using cannons in this area. ”

The head of the big head nodded and agreed with the idea of Zuo Qian.

“Southeast Asia?” asked the commander of the Southern Theater.

Everyone looks to the staff officer who speaks Southeast Asia.

Zuo Qian did not explain, indicating to him.

The warrior must always grow up. He can't always support the decision of the General Staff Department. He needs some talented young soldiers to constantly enrich the decisions and ideas of the General Staff Department. It is also training the younger generation of combatants.

The officer who said that ‘Southeast Asia’ is a major school in the Eastern Theater, named Qi Qingfeng, is one of the youngest people on the field. He was born with military experience and had overseas combat experience. In the exercises of red and blue confrontation, he had a lot of brilliant achievements and commanding experience. He was promoted as a general candidate by relying on the military achievements.

This time it is rare to follow his commander to participate in the decision-making layout of the General Staff. He is also a little excited now.

Seeing the eyes of the great head and General Zuo Qian, he turned to him, and Yan Qingfeng also felt the gaze encouraged by the commander of his theater.

"The North American Group wants Southeast Asia to create trouble for us. We can differentiate ASEAN from within. The four countries of South Vietnam, Lijiapo, Indonesia and the Philippines are not good with us. They only need to support these four ASEAN leaders and let the islands promise not. Attack them.

In order to give us trouble, the island country will agree with the North American group's proposal and even assist in several cases. If the two sides worry about elimination, ASEAN will point the finger at us. ”

Zuo Qian appreciates nodding: "What about countermeasures?"

Encouraged, Yan Qingfeng is also more confident in his heart.

"We can also support the old, Malaysian, Cambodian and Wenlai countries that are closely related to us within ASEAN and let ASEAN fight internally. If ASEAN splits internally, these four are our strategic buffers."

"Very good." Left-handed focus, unrecognized appreciation: "Today's general report."

When I heard Zuo Qian’s words, the commander of the Eastern Theater with Yu Qingfeng’s face was green. This is in the face of the head of the big head, who is brazen enough to ask him, how can he refuse? But also happy for Yan Qingfeng, after all, his soldiers.

Zuo Qian saw the ugly face of the commander of the Eastern Theater and smiled and continued.

"South Asia here, Pakistani Railway has our help, and has the upper hand in the war with Indo, India has no time and no courage to provoke us. The Arab League is trying to get rid of the country and the Ottoman Empire." The alliance uses our equipment, which belongs to us completely. There is no problem in both directions. So it is mainly the problem in the two directions just mentioned."

"Where is South America? Do they still do business?" asked the staff of the assembly department.

Zuo Qian did not answer and looked at the head.

"The blockade across North America is risky. They want to ship it back on their own. They can also contact the marching ant group. The marching ants have arsenals in Africa and only need to cross the African continent and the Atlantic Ocean to reach South America. The strength of the ant group is very easy to do.

The North American group wants to block South America, but he only pays attention to us and does not count on the marching ant group. If they are capable, they will not block the two oceans and all the coastlines. The forces will be dispersed and they will die very badly. Said the great head.

The staff officers present were all bright.

......

The world game is in the midst of a white-hot stage.

The actions of all parties continued, and Chen Mo did not idle.

The South American Group has come.

The South American Group sent a team of ambassadors, and Chen Mo did not have much surprise. The South American Group is among the world's top powers. The weakest party is only a little stronger than a deserted Africa and weaker than the Arab League.

Without the host of a powerful country, it is now surrounded by North America and ready to be annexed.

As the world's top arms dealer, the South American Group has been looking for them, which is completely unexpected.

The South American Group's ambassador team is led by a middle-aged man named Blair, who looks ordinary and looks calm, but the deep-eyed worries are lingering.

"Mr. Chen is really a talented man. When he is so old, he will build a business empire, young and promising." Blair can sigh.

"Mr. Blairke has won the prize. What is it about looking for me this time?" Chen Mo did not talk nonsense with the other party, introduced the theme and came to the fore.

Blair could look at it with a smile and immediately said: "This time I came to Mr. Chen, mainly for one thing, we hope to buy a batch of equipment."

"What to buy?" Chen Mo was not surprised by this.

"A lot, we need to look at the features and performance of the equipment." Blair can smile on his face: "The more the better, the stronger the better."

Chen Mo ran, now South American Group is besieged by the North American group, at stake, without strong weapons and equipment, it is difficult to withstand the North American group's attack, but the North American Group is now blocking the South American Group.

“Ordinary trading, we are not responsible for transportation. If we need to ship the equipment, the price will be much higher, and you need to pay the deposit in advance.”

"We need you to transport the past, the price is not a problem." Blair can look the same, seems to have long thought of this situation: "As long as the delivery is as soon as possible, other aspects can be discussed."

chapters.title: Chapter 695: : 280 Billion Arms Orders
chapters.body:
Chapter 695: : 280 Billion Arms Orders

Portable ground-to-air intelligent missiles, ground-to-ground intelligent missiles, first-generation export version of war robots, smart bullets, smart bombs, mobile anti-stealth quantum radar, intelligent sniper rifles, intelligent torpedoes, miniature intelligent drones...

Blair can look at the weapon that Chen Mo introduced, and he is very scared.

They are all smart weapons.

The artificial intelligence of the marching ant group is unquestionable.

Surface-to-air missiles can target enemy aircraft. Last time they shot down two stealth bombers from the North American group, they tasted a lot of sweetness. In order to increase deterrence, this is a must.

The first generation of export-oriented war robots, when the Syrian state used war robots, completely calmed the domestic armed rebellion, strength and reputation are there.

Portable ground-to-ground intelligent missiles can be counter-armored and anti-war robots.

Anti-stealth quantum radar, the eyes of anti-stealth aircraft, all invisible equipment, in front of this radar.

......

Every weapon is what they need most now.

If the deal is successful, they will solve the urgent needs of the country, and the pressure from the North American group will be less than half.

Soon, Blair could return to God from the excitement.

“What else is needed?” Chen Mo saw Blair’s emotional changes and opened his mouth.

This is a big business.

The global situation, the outcome of the South American group can be said to be a key node.

If the North American group quickly annexes South America and completes the integration, the North American Group will be able to quickly get out of the chaos and then turn its attention to Asia or Africa.

No matter which direction, it will bring them no small trouble.

It is the best choice to drag the North American group to South America and consume its strength.

This is also the reason for choosing weapons to assist South America.

"Yes, our communication network and computer network are being attacked, is there a secure communication product? Or help us repair the computer network and build a secure computer network?" Blair could have a hope in his voice.

In the information age, networks and communications, they are like a blind man, very uncomfortable.

Chen Mo nodded.

"Would you like the most confidential quantum-encrypted communication phone?"

"Quantum Encrypted Communications?" Blair was so excited.

"Yes, our company has set up its own quantum satellite communication network and successfully developed quantum-encrypted communication phones. The current quantum encryption technology, no one can crack, absolutely safe, do not have to worry about secrets being stolen during the call. But quantum communication phone Very expensive, 500,000 sets."

Blair can look bright: "Money is not a problem, confidentiality is safe and priceless."

"As for network security, you only need to use the termite system and server of our marching ant group, so you don't have to worry too much about network security. We are recognized as the highest safety factor in the industry. If you need to launch satellites, we can also help you launch. ""

Blair can look at the hot, these products of the marching ant group can completely solve their urgent needs.

If the network and communication systems are restored, they are not as passive as they used to be.

Soon, Blair can hand over a list of weapons under his statistics to Chen Mo: "This is a list of products that are needed. We will continue to replenish orders afterwards."

Just take a look, Chen Mo knows the approximate value of this weapon list, about 220 billion orders.

In the arms sales of the marching ant group, this is currently the largest single order.

"We only accept gold, jewellery, precious art, mineral resources, food transactions, cash ratios must not exceed 40%, and must be Huaxia. North American group is blocking South America, if delivered to the door, the risk is great, according to the present The situation, equipment prices need to go up 30%."

Chen Mo put away the list of weapons and gave Blair a reminder.

Now that the world war is going on, the global monetary system is unstable, and no one knows what will happen tomorrow. Hard currency is the most important thing.

"no problem."

Blair can do this mental preparation long ago.

Nowadays, there are several companies in the global equipment that have the ability to compete with North American group equipment. Now that the North American group has blocked them and has the ability to sell them with less equipment, they have no choice.

Spending money is better than killing them.

They have tasted the sweetness of Chinese weapons.

The quality of the marching ant group equipment is definitely only strong and weak. Once the weapons orders arrive, they will be able to maintain enough time.

Blair can immediately say: "But we have a request to deliver all the equipment within three months, the first batch of equipment, preferably within a week, to the South American group of countries."

"No problem." Chen Mo did not hesitate to agree.

"Thank you, Mr. Chen. After this difficult time, Mr. Chen will be our most distinguished guest." Blair can solemnly say.

"Polite." Chen Mo politely returned.

The two sides have discussed the construction of quantum encryption communication and satellite systems.

In this era, communication and networking are the most important. Once restored, they are not as passive as they are now.

......

There was a faint smile on the face of Zhong Lei, thinking about the method of transporting weapons to South America.

"Now the North American group is blocking South America, this order is a little risky." Zhu can not help but said.

Zhong Lei shook his head and put down the list in his hand: "It is really risky, but in this era, it is impossible to make money without risk. Many things we are doing now are taking risks."

"How does Haige look?" Zhu He turned to look at Wang Hai.

Wang Hai thought a little, and said: "The boss took the order and must have his thoughts. If the North American group occupies South America, it is not good for us. Now in the war, we are military companies. When we do business, when do we do business. 280 billion orders, where to find?"

"Be prepared to meet the retaliation of the North American Group." Zhu He reminded.

Destruction of the North American Group's plan, the price must be there.

Zhong Lei smiled.

"Revenge us, they also have to face our revenge to see who is more embarrassed. The boss wants us to develop mercenaries and support Hito, just want to have their own means of struggle, we are not a lamb."

Whether it is the development of the mercenary group, or the secret support of the Greek map, this step is for today's chaos.

"Think about the route to the door." Wang Hai looked at the list of weapons.

"Atlantic." Zhu He took a look at the map: "The South American Group originally mainly purchased weapons with the above, but the South Pacific and South America's airspace was blocked. The above does not provide home delivery. The South American Group will find us. In Tanzania, you can cross the African continent and the Atlantic Ocean."

......

In the highest conference room of the European Union, Johnson, Lenkabauer and Macaron sit around as the three most powerful countries in the European Union and the masters of the European Union.

Any major decision involving the European Union is determined mainly by a three-person vote, and the minority is subject to the majority.

Now they will face another major decision.

The North American group sought their alliance, and the two sides cooperated and cooperated in an all-round way to jointly dismember the new Soviet Union.

The North American group pits them, not once or twice. If the North American group violates the alliance decision, their situation will be very passive.

"Do you agree?" Macaron put the documents in his hand on the desk and glanced at the faces of the two.

Both Johnson and Lenkabau are hesitating.

"Now on the one hand, the new Soviet Union, the frontline is very stressed, the North American group joined, can share our pressure. Do not agree, we still have to fight with them, facing increasing combat pressure. Promise, the North American group joined the battle, We also have to fight, and if necessary, cooperate with them."

Lenkabau seemed determined to raise his hand.

"Comprehensive assessment, I agree to unite, but they must be forced to fight against the new Soviet Union. Confirm that the North American Group is working on them and we will cooperate with them."

"I agree." Johnson nodded.

"I agree." Macaron also raised his hand.

The three men showed a tacit smile to each other.

chapters.title: Chapter 696: : The Means Of God
chapters.body:
Chapter 696: : The Means Of God

Under the impact of asteroids and the bombing of planetary bombs, the liquid layer inside Mars oscillates and forms convection. The Martian crust plate is divided into four major parts, four land areas, and two large oceans.

The location of the asteroid impact creates the largest ocean on Mars.

Groundwater ice melts in the crustal changes, and liquid water has already flowed out of the surface. Evaporated water is mixed with volcanic ash, and it forms rainwater and falls. It gathers in the Martian Sea and has formed a small and large-scale sea surface.

In time, the sea will continue to expand in earthquakes and plate movements.

Now through the holographic projection of the planet, Chen Mo has seen a brand new Mars.

The strength of geomagnetism is sufficient to block the solar wind and cosmic rays, and the movement of the earth's crust is formed. The rift and the mountains have a preliminary outline.

According to normal planetary evolution, Mars already has the conditions for carbon-based living.

If you go through hundreds of millions of years, Mars will probably give birth to its original life.

Chen Mo can't wait for so long, only to accelerate the formation of this process, as far as possible in the shortest possible time, to make Mars a planet suitable for human habitation.

Within a month, Chen Mo continuously launched more than 10,000 climate control satellites on Mars.

The advanced climate control satellite network system was built.

On Mars, satellites have covered space, between low-orbit and high-orbiting satellites, with invisible signal connections to each other, forming a vast satellite network.

Chen Mo can call the Advanced Climate Control Satellite Group to control the climate in any part of Mars. Broadcast clouds, build rain, accelerate the surface of Mars to cool, and control the climate of Mars.

Chen Mo named the climate control system the ‘Dragon King’ system.

"This is the charm of technology."

Zhao Min looked at the video that Mars came back and was amazed.

The video content is an experimental process of using a high-level climate control satellite to perform a cloud-casting rain.

The rain has been successful, very amazing.

This means that Chen Mo can control any weather on Mars.

"This is the means of God, great God." Zhao Min smiled.

To Zhao Min gave him another nickname, Chen Mo did not care: "In mythology, the power of God can be realized by means of technology. The so-called God is only a higher civilization than ours."

Zhao Min is undecided: "What are you going to do next?"

"Renovate the atmosphere of Mars and solve the volcanic ash in the sky of Mars." Chen Mo called out the atmosphere of Mars.

On Mars, after more than a month, some volcanoes are still active and the sky is covered by volcanic ash.

Asteroid impact and Mars volcano eruption, a large amount of dust ejected to the top of the Martian atmosphere, thick volcanic ash, shielding the entire Martian atmosphere, blocking the sun's radiation, so the surface temperature of Mars is very low. And there are a lot of greenhouse gases such as sulfur dioxide and carbon dioxide in the atmosphere, as well as some toxic gases.

"As long as the Martian atmosphere is formed and the volcanic ash in the Martian sky is removed, the temperature of the Martian equatorial season will vary from 10 to 45 degrees Celsius to the standard of human habitation."

The first step of the Mars magnetic field has been started, the climate control system is successfully networked, and then Chen Mo needs to create the Martian atmosphere.

Biology laboratory.

On the experimental bench in front of Chen Mo, there are five large test tubes with different colors.

This is the microbe prepared for the transformation of Mars.

There are soil modification bacteria, water purification bacteria, atmospheric purification bacteria, decomposition bacteria and oxygen-producing bacteria.

This is a biotechnology-modified bacteria obtained by a gold-level administrator. It has a very fast propagation rate and can survive, hibernate and be non-toxic to organisms in the environment below -40 to 100 degrees Celsius.

There are also more than a dozen seeds of different sizes.

Radiation tree species with absorbing radiation for 'photosynthetic catalysis', oxidative tree species with very fast photosynthesis; gold trees for absorbing substances, transforming soil; and polycultures that rapidly multiply.

This is the super plant that Chen Mo has transformed through genetic editing technology. The common point is that it can survive in extreme environments, which is more than the grass.

These bacteria and plants will be the first creatures that Chen Mo sent to Mars and the most basic creature in the Mars biosphere.

"Mergo, the Virgin, the Virgin and the Ants are ready."

Chen Mo put down the seeds in his hands.

“According to the third step, the microbes and plant seeds of the planet will be transported, and some of the original nano-robots will be transported to Mars to build laboratories and factories. All the things that Mars will develop and build will not be transported on Earth. ""

Next, there will be nearly 80 tons of microbial-rich solutions that will be placed into the Martian ocean, and 20 tons of seeds will be placed into all areas of Mars.

There are nano-robots, and with the nano-robot horror possessing horrific replication capabilities, if Chen Mo needs it, he can build a large city on Mars in a few days.

"How do you deal with this planet? You didn't answer the last question." Leaving the lab, Zhao Min was very serious and serious: "Is the painting the king?"

Chen Mo’s current strength can do anything, no one can stop him, but he wants to do it.

Chen Mo smiled and said: "Do you want me to be king?"

"If you want, when my king is still ok."

The conversation was a bit fast, and Chen Mo was amused by her love story. Zhao Min couldn’t help but laugh.

After a while, Chen Mo stopped and looked up at the sky.

"It’s useless in the solar system. You saw the last alien. The universe is very big. It may subvert our human imagination. The solar system is in the universe, but it is a cell. Don’t just focus on this acre. Now is just the beginning. Our future is in the stars and the sea."

In the golden authority stage of the science and technology library, the transformation of the planet must be completed in order to obtain the next stage of the library.

At present, the gold administrator authority, all involved in the technology within the galaxy.

If you want to leave the galaxy, you can't do interplanetary navigation unless you are ready to sleep in a wandering universe for thousands of years, like an alien who is not a ship.

Therefore, Chen Mo judged that as long as he successfully transformed a planet, he has already had the ability to survive in the galaxy.

The next privilege may be the technology that leads to the sea of stars.

That would be a qualitative leap.

The Science and Technology Library is to train his heir to complete the final mission. The technology will be unlocked step by step, let him continue to learn and be strong, and complete the mission in the future.

As for what the mission is, Chen Mo does not know.

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo. From the side of his face, he saw Chen Mo’s deep gaze looking up at the starry sky. He couldn’t help but fall into it and smiled unconsciously.

Chen Mo turned his head and saw Zhao Min’s obsessive smile. This kind of smile is very difficult to see in Zhao Min: "What do you think so happy?"

Zhao Min returned to God and smiled. "You just said ‘we’, it seems that you still have mine in your future plans, so be happy.”

"Uh!!"

Chen Mo did not expect that only two words inadvertently made Zhao Min so happy. However, he did not refute. When he said the sentence, he did count Zhao Ming in the plan, and it was unconscious and naturally planned.

chapters.title: Chapter 697: : Cosmic Civilization And Superluminal Quantum Communication Technology
chapters.body:
Chapter 697: : Cosmic Civilization And Superluminal Quantum Communication Technology

Deep in the distant universe.

A strange planet with a diameter of hundreds of times the entire solar system, numerous special buildings, various forms of aircraft and flying creatures in the air.

If you know the history of this strange planet, you will know that this planet is naturally formed by the non-cosmos and belongs to the planet created by civilization. The name is: origin.

It is one of the places where the cosmic civilization meets peacefully. It is also one of the most prosperous cities in the universe. It is home to countless creatures from all over the universe, forming an intensive settlement in the origin city.

Even at a light-year diameter, settlements can be seen everywhere.

Fei Lei is the ordinary member of the lowest level residents in the original city. Both eyes are transparent green, like two emeralds, the skin is smooth yellow, the egg yolk, the humanoid creature, two meters high. This height, in the origin city, belongs to the dwarf level.

Get up and organize the backpack, confirm that the required space star map and quantum communication rescuer are brought, Ferry leaves the house, waits for the Asian light speed public spaceship, and goes to the meeting point of the team.

He is an interstellar explorer, and he bought a house in the original city by virtue of the proceeds of the Star Trek Guide. The small days are fairly ordinary.

This time there is a new expedition mission that requires him as a tour guide.

Ferre attaches great importance to this tour guide. If the archaeological and research success is successful, then his e-star tour guide qualification will be upgraded to a higher level, and the future income will be higher.

The archaeological team is a cosmic archaeological team of green and blue creatures.

The team leader is a cosmic archaeologist named Professor Lan Shi, a blue-level creature with extensive experience in the study of cosmic archaeology and cosmology. He has discovered several new civilizations and is included in the Universe Alliance. The universe of archaeological and cosmic creatures is a small achievement.

At the origin of the universe, Fei Lei turned a blind eye to the surrounding buildings, renting a hypersonic single-person shared spaceship and reaching the meeting point.

Going out here, crossing half of the origin city, spends an origin time (Earth time: two hours). The actual time is mainly spent waiting for the spacecraft, the boarding ship and the lower spaceship.

Not long after, Fei Lei successfully met Professor Lan Shi and his team.

Professor Lan Shi is about three meters tall, holding a thick book and wearing a pair of glasses. It is a kind of orc creature, with a wolf head, full body furry, chopsticks with long beards, two legs standing upright and tails The land is balanced.

"Mr. Lan Shi, I am honored to be your adventure guide." Fei Lei said solemnly.

"Yeah." Professor Lan Shi looked at him with two eyes: "Now the time is almost, when will it start?"

"anytime."

Ferre allowed a road to lead the archaeological team to board the ship.

"Professor Lan Shi, where is this destination?"

"Lania Kia Super Galaxy."

"That location is a bit remote and ridiculous." Fei Lei stunned, but these things are not under his control, he only needs to be responsible for guiding the way.

The super-light velocity curvature spacecraft slowly rises to the point of origin of the space port, and the space curvature engine starts. After a while, it disappears very quickly at the origin of the space port.

......

"Dad, are there many aliens on the starry sky?"

"Correct."

Chen Mo holds the unparalleled and gently nods. Unparalleled are eleven years old, already slim, still like to rely on his arms, like to compete with Xiao Yu.

"The dad will later catch an alien puppy and give me a pet."

"..." Chen Mo smiled and reached out and knocked on her head: "If you find an alien, your father is more likely to be caught as a pet."

"How is it possible, Dad is so powerful." Musou touched the forehead that Chen Mo had knocked on, and he did not believe it: "Yes, Mom."

"Yes, your dad is the best." Xiao Yu, sitting next to him, smiled and nodded.

Chen Mo looked up at the starry sky and his eyes became deep.

The world is not peaceful. The earth will be transformed through this chaotic baptism. With the fact that aliens have been determined to exist, the direction of humanity in the future is the sea of stars.

......

The quantum consciousness body is the most important part of the superluminal quantum communication.

The basic nature of quantum undetectable is an important bottleneck of quantum communication in over-distance. Solving this bottleneck and finding ways to determine the change of quantum entangled state, super-light-speed communication becomes possible.

Quantum has a ghostly overrange effect, but it cannot be observed by exploration.

Chen Mo chooses the quantum consciousness body to induce the change of the quantum entanglement state instead of the observation observation.

The telepathy of Xiao Yu and Mo Nuo gave Chen Mo the inspiration, the existence of quantum consciousness, and the quantum communication of super distance became a possibility.

Particles in quantum entangled state have ‘intelligence.’

The external force is used to change the state of the quantum entangled state. At the moment when the entangled quantum state changes, the quantum consciousness induces the change of the quantum entanglement state. It does not detect the specific state of the quantum and does not destroy the state of the quantum entangled state.

Quantum symmetry consisting of quantum entanglement is used to induce changes in the quantum entangled state without detecting whether it is up-spin or down-spin.

This is the mentality of Xiao Yu and Mo Nu, Chen Mo has been studying this technology.

There is something to gain today.

Initial success!

The ink girl led Chen Mo into the quantum laboratory. The two freezer-sized instruments were on the experimental bench. The box was transparent and could see the complicated structure design inside.

The development of quantum chips is very fast, the number of steerable quantum bits is increasing, and the computing power of ink-girls has reached an unprecedented level and is becoming more and more intelligent.

Now Chen Mo only needs to put forward an idea, determine a research direction and provide general experimental theory. Momo can perfect his specific theory according to his ideas and turn Chen Mo's thought into reality.

The ink girl is Chen Mo's most proud work, he created a wise "God".

"In both quantum induction machines, there is a quantum consciousness of quantum simulation. The particles of the quantum entangled state that are induced are divided into two parts of AB and are constrained in two instruments.

In a machine, the entangled particles of Part A are bombarded with electrons to change its state. The state of the entangled particles in Part B of the B machine will immediately become the same state as A, which is sensed by the quantum consciousness. The entangled particles are not entangled and are not bound by the spatial distance. ”

Quantum consciousness is only a change in the state of the induced quantum entanglement state. It is quite inductive that the experiment of 'Schrodinger's cat' was replaced by the experiment of 'Schrodinger's dog'. The specific life and death state of 'cat and dog' was not detected. The superposition of life and death was not determined. Quantum entangled particles do not solve entanglement.

This method works well. It only needs to use multiple pairs of quantum entangled particles to change and invariant through quantum entanglement states, and define 1 and 0. By arranging combinations and defining codes, it is possible to transmit related correlations like Morse code. Information.

There is no material carrying information or energy beyond the speed of light transmission, and also conforms to the theory of general relativity.

“I did a kilometer-long experiment at the headquarters. Quantum consciousness only needs 10 nanoseconds to change the quantum state. The distance will be more accurate and the error will be smaller. And there is no network connection between the two instruments. The data also shows that there is indeed a quantum ghost interaction between them," said the ink girl.

Chen Mo operated once on two instruments to observe the data obtained. Only the distance between the two distances is too close, and the error of the data will be larger.

"Send the 1st plane into space and do a super-distance communication experiment."

Chen Momo squatted on two machines.

If this experiment is successful, it means that he has completed the technology of the next privilege stage of the Science and Technology Library in the golden authority stage. This sense of accomplishment is unprecedented.

chapters.title: Chapter 698: : Shocking Marching Ant High-Rise
chapters.body:
Chapter 698: : Shocking Marching Ant High-Rise

“Has arrived at the Ocean, requesting the release of microorganisms.”

The Virgo is suspended above the Martian ocean.

This is the ocean formed by the impact of an asteroid, and it is also the largest ocean of Mars at present. Chen Mo is named ‘Maiyang’. The sea reflected the red sky, at noon, but like dusk.

“Request to pass, start to put oxygen bacteria.”

The Tianmai received instructions from the Earth, the transport compartment was opened, and the barrels containing the microorganisms were dropped from the transport compartment like the dumplings, and the cockroaches opened in the air. Water filled with microbes, integrated into the water of the Martian ocean.

The sea of water under the maiden woman, with the opening of a barrel containing oxygen-producing bacteria, was slowly dyed green, printed with the barrel of the marching ant group logo, and floated on the water.

After the release of the oxygen-producing bacteria, the water purification bacteria, the atmospheric purification bacteria, and the decomposition bacteria are placed into the ocean, and all the elements required by the microorganisms in the ocean are the breeding grounds for microorganisms.

On the other hand, the goddess scatters the soil-engineered bacteria on the land of Mars. The last plant seeds and the growth agents that accelerate plant growth were released, and the goddess flew over a plain near the ocean.

"Request to launch a nano robot."

Upon receiving instructions from the Earth, the goddess slowly landed in the plains. Under the handling of the robot, a large iron bucket was moved to the plain of Mars and the gray matter was poured from the bucket into the land. A small accompanying robot was released from the transport compartment.

After all the missions were completed, the goddess slowly rose into the air and returned to Earth.

......

The highest meeting room of the marching ant group.

When Chen Mo entered the conference room, many high-level executives had been waiting to arrive.

Every time the boss appears grandly, there will be big things. They are all looking forward to the big news that the boss wants to announce. They are all used to it.

"In the past five years, we have invested trillions of dollars to prepare a Mars project, but we have never said that the specific content of this project." Chen Mo calmly opened, and the conference room immediately slammed the commotion.

In the past few years, the company's revenue and main energy have been placed on the Mars project. Investing trillions of dollars before and after, it is bigger than the previous projects.

They speculated that the Mars base was built, but the boss and the president have never confirmed it, and it is just some of the arguments circulating between them.

"You are the top executive of the company and the mainstay of the company. The time is ripe today, and it is almost time for you to know the content of the project."

Today the boss personally announced that all of them have their ears up.

"Show everyone a video."

Chen Mocha nodded to the ink girl.

On the round table in the conference room, the holographic projections fell, and the lights in the conference room were dark.

At the entrance is a holographic projected orange-red planet.

Mars.

The people on the field recognized the appearance of Mars at a glance, but this is the previous Mars. Some time ago, there were news reports that Mars was hit by an asteroid and it has changed a lot.

Suddenly, the first thought of a possible number, some not calm.

Li Lingfeng, Wang Sijia, Wei Zhe and Lin Shu are staring at the holographic video, and their eyes are hot. If it is what they think, it is horrible.

As soon as the picture turns, the seismograph is arranged to collect data, the video of the mechanical column is lifted up, and then the asteroids are captured, the asteroids collide, the orbit is corrected, and the ignitor hits the scene of Mars.

Hey! !

The moment the igniter hit Mars, the conference room was awe-inspiring.

The horrible doomsday scene on Mars, the shocking scene, and the background music of the creation song, let everyone on the field tremble, not knowing whether it is excitement or other reasons.

They are the top leaders of the marching ant group, and they are also in charge of one side, and they have seen the world.

But the scene of this asteroid impact is only seen in life.

Even Wang Hai, Zhong Lei and Zhu He, who are working hard in the rain of bullets, are accustomed to the big scenes of life and death, but it is unbelievable to see such a scene.

The video is not over yet.

After the asteroid impacted, the Tianmai carried the network with advanced climate control satellites, and the scene of Shi Yunbu rain appeared.

In the end, I can't use shock to describe the mood at the moment.

Lin Shu stared at Chen Mo with his eyes wide open, and the adoration was overflowing. Her origin is special, the whole company knows her adoration and admiration for Chen Mo, and now she knows how much this man who changed her destiny is as powerful as God.

Li Lingfeng’s heart can’t be calm for a long time, and the power of creation is reflected in the video. This is God’s means. He used to wonder why the boss and the president would take advantage of the content of the project. Even the most senior executives of them could not know. Now he finally understands how terrible the content of the plan is.

Li Ruoqi is not even calm. She manages the Flying Ant Center, and she knows the mechanical columns, satellites and detectors in the video. She has seen those things, only knowing about the Mars project, but I didn't expect it to have such a huge project behind it.

Many high-level officials on the field did not understand until now that their company's strength is strong and how great it is.

At the end of the video, it is a green-filled Mars, quietly suspended in the center of the conference table, and all the lights in the conference room are lit.

The meeting room was quiet and they had not recovered from the shock.

Chen Mo did not hurry to speak, quietly waiting for everyone to return to God.

"Presumably everyone should have guessed. Some time ago, the world reported that Mars was hit by an asteroid. It was planned by us and it was the content of that huge plan."

The meeting room was silent, although the results were known, but it was hard to believe from the boss’s mouth.

“Our plan to prepare for more than five years is the ‘planetary transformation’ program, transforming Mars and making it a livable planet.”

Oh...

Transform the planet.

How much effort and confidence does this require?

"Today's choice is announced because this plan has reached the fourth stage. We have just put microbes and plant seeds on Mars to transform the atmosphere, soil and water quality. This stage is completed, the Martian atmosphere, soil and water quality transformation is completed, Mars will Become a human livable planet."

Many high-level executives are full of excitement.

The ability to transform a planet is only the strength and confidence of their boss.

This is an unparalleled glory. Only the legendary **** has this great power of creation.

Now they look at Chen Mo’s eyes, and they are extremely adored and excited. No one is talking, they are waiting for the boss's next task.

"Now the global situation is special, the international rules system is chaotic, and we have no time to take care of these things. This is a good time. We spend trillions to prepare this plan, and now it is time to harvest the fruits."

Chen Mo leaned forward and everyone else followed straight and straightened.

"Prepare to announce to the world that the whole Mars is owned by our marching ant group. This news and the video just now, including part of the Mars transformation plan, will be announced after three days. You only have three days to prepare for this news release. After all kinds of situations."

The spirit of the crowd on the field, the eyes of unprecedented fanaticism.

A company with a planet is unprecedented.

"We have announced that we own the ownership of Mars, which may lead to global opposition. You must be psychologically prepared." Zhao Min reminded.

Excited Wang Sijia has long forgotten the appearance of the lady, and took the case: "Who is opposed, kill them."

"..."

chapters.title: Chapter 699: : The Horror Of Nano Robots
chapters.body:
Chapter 699: : The Horror Of Nano Robots

Often followed by the team into a closed resort, this is a resort under the marching ant group.

All of their mobile phones, computers and electronic products have been taken away, and they have no connection with the outside world, and they can't even contact their relatives and friends.

This time, I said that I was preparing for a public relations copy and planning of a super project. A very important project of the project is related to the future of the company, and the time is urgent.

There is a public relations department director and even the president in charge.

The team members with him are the best public relations staff of the entire marching ant group.

When he first came to the resort, he also found that the other two team members also entered the closed resort, which is the legal team and propaganda department of the marching ant group.

Since entering the public relations department of the marching ant group, he has never seen such a big squad. Even when the bosses and presidents of the outside world were rumored, they did not see such a serious situation in the public relations department.

"Xin Xin, what kind of public relations do you say this time? So serious?" Chang Meng looked at Zhang Xinxin.

He heard that Zhang Xinxin entered the marching ant group after he graduated from the doctoral degree. He did not work in the company's finance department before work, and he worked as an intern accountant.

But I don't know why, Zhang Xinxin's great academic qualifications come in the bottom layer, starting from the company's front desk. It is said that she asked for it. She changed a few positions in the middle, entered the propaganda department, went to the marketing department, went to the finance department and the secretarial department, and now comes to the public relations department.

All the way, he did not see Zhang Xinxin has too many positions to promote, but sometimes the transfer will be downgraded, but Zhang Xinxin never complain.

Some employees of the company also said that Zhang Xinxin is not enough in the private situation, and often does not think so.

Zhang Xinxin is quiet in the company and has a low-key personality, but his ability is undoubted. The business capabilities in the group are excellent, and the public relations copy is an excellent level. Even if he was busy with work, he did not listen to Zhang Xinxin complaining.

In Changmeng's view, Zhang Xinxin is more like honing and accumulating experience. When the time is ripe, education and experience, her position in the company will certainly not be low.

Zhang Xinxin is no longer the sister who wants Chen Mo to take care of her worry. After the incident, let her grow a lot, and then she began to work hard, after the master's degree, directly studying for a doctor.

Now she just wants to learn more so that she can help her brother in the future.

In the company, her position is Zhao Min secretly mobilized, often the company's busiest and most tiring department, she also knows Zhao Min's good intentions. After her Ph.D., she has the ability, but her experience is not enough to make her a good management, so she has been working hard to learn.

People in the company, except those at the core, do not know her relationship with Chen Mo.

This project is a bit special, Zhang Xinxin can feel it.

Before they came, they were repeatedly warned that they could not discuss and exchange information about the project privately before the project was announced, and signed a confidentiality agreement.

"I don't know, I can't discuss it, or I will be fired." Zhang Xinxin smiled and shook his head.

"Right."

I often nod and no longer mention this issue.

If the director finds out that he is discussing the issue, I am afraid that he has to face the kind of dismissal and unrelenting.

Entering the secret small meeting room, Chang Meng and Zhang Xinxin found their position to sit down and look to the minister of the main position.

"This time the task is very heavy. You are all excellent public relations personnel of the company. Now you have to put enough public relations copy in two days to deal with all possible public relations issues." The Minister of Public Relations knocked on the table. Let everyone's spirits shake: "Next, it is the main content of this project."

The video screen opened, and the entire conference room was audible. Everyone grew up and stayed up.

......

Li Cheng got the car, took care of his clothes, and carried the briefcase to go to the headquarters of the Army Ant Group.

Chen Mo took the initiative to invite him to come a small number of times, each time is particularly important, and sometimes it is a phone call, and rarely let him personally come over.
