This time, Chen Mo was very solemn to ask him to come over, he was also curious, Chen Mo asked him what to say.

Following the robot, Li Chengzhi was quickly taken to the conference room of the marching ants.

Only Chen Mo, Zhao Min and Mo Nu were present. This lineup, Li Chengzhi is not strange, Zhao Min's importance to the marching ant group is self-evident, the ink girl is almost the shadow of Chen Mo.

"Lie Li, I didn't expect to meet again so soon."

Chen Mo and Li Chengzhi shook hands.

"You busy person actually invited me to come over, it is a great honor." Li Chengzhi sneered and smiled, and Zhao Min politely shook hands: "This lineup, it seems that things are not small."

"It's not too small, it should be able to scare you once." Chen Mo led Li Chengzhi to the holographic platform: "Remember that I launched so many satellites not long ago?"

Li Chengzhi came to the moment.

Chen Mo's flying ant aerospace, launching more than 10,000 satellites in just one month, is not a small alarm. If it is not the current global situation and the constant news of various wars, this action of the marching ant group is definitely a huge news.

At that time, Chen Mo only told him to form a satellite network of Mars. The specific role of the satellite was not mentioned.

"This time, it’s for this matter."

Chen Mo said from his own.

“Over the past five years, our group has invested more than 5 trillion, which is preparing a big project.”

More than 5 trillion.

When Li Chengzhi heard this number, he couldn’t help but secretly scream.

He knows that the efficiency of the marching ant group, 5 trillion can be 10 trillion flowers.

How big is this project?

Shocked and curious, but Li Chengzhi did not interrupt Chen Mo, quietly listening to him to continue to speak, intuition told him that what Chen Mo wants to say is definitely very important.

"It's the project you see next."

Chen Mo doubled on the holographic platform and transferred the holographic video.

"Mars Reconstruction Project."

Shocking scenes, powerful handwriting.

Li Chengzhi looked at the contents of the holographic video, his eyes almost bulged out, and his heart was shocked.

......

Mars, on the plains not far from the ocean, a gray mass of water flowing like water, growing in size, is the nano-robot that Chen Mo put on Mars.

"Ink, how large is the current nano-robot?"

Chen Mo mobilized the transmitted video to observe the nano-robot on the Martian plain.

"They copied 23 times, and now there are about 8.38 million cubic meters," said the ink girl.

"Not enough, let them copy 12 more times, stop after about 35 billion cubic meters. Send the design plan of the first phase base, build a base on Mars, build all the factories, production lines and research institutes that produce robots. Rebuild a residential town."

"it is good."

Fifteen minutes later, the ink girl released the video from Mars.

The nano-robots that received the instructions squirmed at a speed visible to the naked eye, and a building with a sci-fi sensation rose from the ground, rapidly forming, thousands of times faster than the printer.

If you let outsiders see it, you will be shocked by the speed of this horror.

The horror of nanobots is here.

If the nano-robot's ability to copy is out of control, it can make a biosphere of a civilized world become a riddled cheese in just a few days.

If the nano-robot that is infinitely duplicated on the current earth is almost equivalent to the dimensional reduction strike, it can directly capture the relevant atoms in the biosphere to self-replicate until the entire Earth's biosphere is destroyed.

Even if Chen Mo uses this technology, be careful and limit its ability to replicate.

Fortunately, the micro-core commands of these nano-robots are limited, and they need to receive external signal activation to work, which is much easier to control.

There are advantages and disadvantages. It has strong destructive power and strong construction capabilities. As long as it provides data and design, it can build a city that can accommodate millions of people in one day.

He even thought about using a nano-robot to erode a sea on Mars, but it is not necessary for the time being.

With nano-robots, the speed of infrastructure construction is no longer a problem that limits the development of Chen Mo.

chapters.title: Chapter 700: : Chen Mo Crazy?
chapters.body:
Chapter 700: : Chen Mo Crazy?

The marching ant group has appeared in the largest ever conference.

Now in the midst of a special chaotic period, the branch offices around the world are beginning to invite media from all sides.

In real time, the conference site of the marching ant group headquarters will be released to the global branch conference through holographic projection.

According to the information disclosed by the seniors of the marching ant group, this conference will be a super project to announce the investment of the army ant group. On the day when the marching ant group released the news of the press conference, it covered all the news about the war and seized the headlines of the major media.

The marching ant group has become the top jewel in the scientific and technological world. This marching ant group has announced a super project in this special period, which has aroused the curiosity of countless people.

Zhao Min stood by the office window and overlooked the vehicles of media reporters who continued to enter the marching ant group. Standing next to her, shouldering shoulders with her is Chen Mo.

"Do you say who will come out against it?"

"Whether people object to it does not matter, today the global chaos, the global system collapsed, the rules set in the past are almost abolished. And the opposition is useless, as long as we block, they can not reach Mars." Chen Mo confidently said.

"What reaction?" They have told the news to Li Chengzhi, but Zhao Min still does not know the specific reply.

“No response.” Chen Mo shook his head gently: “The last time the moon was developed, the results of any extraterrestrial development project belonged to the company and the individual. It is estimated that we are by default.”

"That's good." Zhao Min's smile was a bit amazing.

The marching ant group will have a complete planet as a fortune, how crazy, the business empire they built, and from now on, they will be a Star Group company.

"Thinking about the shocking expression of those people after the announcement of the project, I have some expectations."

Chen Mo smiled uncontrollably.

"Mergo, Zhao Min, the conference has almost begun."

Ink reminds two people.

On the morning of the launch of the conference, the 7th Cultural Building site where the conference was held was occupied by reporters and media people who came to the scene early, and the crowds were shaking.

The other venues that are synchronizing holographic releases around the world are full of people and full of people.

"You said, what will be the project announced by the marching ant group?"

"Lunar base project?"

“Impossible, although the lunar base project is large, it has already taken shape. It was announced a few years ago. It can be used by the marching ant group to say that there are not many super projects.”

"Is that a Mars project?"

"Mars has changed. I heard that it may be a life. It may indeed be related to this. The last time I developed the moon, this time I developed Mars."

"Maybe the marching ant group will invest trillions of dollars to solve the difficult problem caused by global chaos?"

"煞笔!"

At the press conference, many people have long been unable to withstand the guesswork of the marching ant group.

Because the marching ant group is a sole proprietorship, all finances and projects do not need to be publicly disclosed, and the outside world cannot know the specific financial information and project information of the marching ant group.

"it has started."

As the lights at the press conference lit up, everyone looked at the entrance.

It was Chen Mo, Zhao Min and the Mexican women who steadily embarked on the stage of the press conference under all eyes.

At this moment, global holographic live broadcasts are even broadcast live on major news platforms and live broadcast platforms. Global people, as long as they want to, can see their live broadcasts at the moment.

At home, unparalleled accompanied by a small fisherman sitting on the sofa, while eating snacks, while watching the live news, see Chen Mo came out, unparalleled smile asked: "Mom, do you think Dad is very handsome?"

"Shuai stayed." Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo in the live broadcast, his eyes bent into crescent.

She will never forget, the moment the asteroid hits, the temperament of Chen Mo’s creation is sublimated. Affected, her own mind and vision, as well as the idea of looking at the problem, are unconsciously changing.

"Mom, you have become a little girl of Dad."

"That is my husband, I am happy." Xiao Yu smiled.

The marching ant group is up and down and excited.

Informed employees and executives are looking forward to the arrival of this moment. This will be the greatest moment for their boss and the greatest moment of their company.

They stand at the very center of human history.

"It is really exciting, and the mood is not consciously excited." Li Lingfeng tightened his fist and said.

"In the future, our company is the Star Group Corporation. The former boss said that the company should be opened out of the earth. Now it has been realized." Lin Shu’s eyes have never left Chen Mo’s figure.

"The history of human civilization, I am afraid it will be in the annals of today." In the office of a certain base, Li Chengzhi looked at Chen Mo's live video and smiled.

He was shocked to think of the video that he saw at the headquarters of the Army Ant Group two days ago.

The facts tell him that it is not a picture of film production, but a real one. Chen Mo now has the ability to transform a planet, and the power of a god.

Chen Mo stood on the stage of the conference, and the whole world was quiet. His holographic figure was also projected to the rest of the world, almost equivalent to a press conference in various parts of the world.

The original noisy venue was silent.

Countless people stretched their necks and held their breath, hoping to not miss every word Chen Mo said.

Under the attention of everyone, a holographic projection of Mars appeared on the stage, and Chen Mo slowly said: "This conference, I only announced to the world on behalf of the marching ant group, the marching ant group will have ownership of Mars."

"..."

"..."

No shock, only horror, the world is quiet, the person who heard the news, first stunned for three seconds, wondering if he was wrong.

The scene of the conference was short-lived and the atmosphere was very different.

"Is Chen Mo crazy?"

"Chen Mo is crazy?"

"Not like it."

"He didn't announce that the sun is his, everyone who pays the sun has to pay, hahahaha..."

"Doing such a big press conference is to announce that Mars is his? This is the so-called super project. Is he a monkey sent by God?"

"I also lost the people to the solar system because of the important projects."

"..."

Some weird cynicism is filled with the press conference, live video barrage and everyone watching the live broadcast.

When Chen Mo said that Mars belonged to the marching ant group, countless people felt that the image of Chen Moshen collapsed at that moment. Falling into the altar, Chen Mo is now more like a science madman in their eyes.

Standing on the stage, Chen Mo can feel the atmosphere at the scene is very different. He could even see the reporters who were rushing to take pictures, the pity and sympathy in his eyes, and some collapses.

Chen Mo ignored these pitiful and ridiculous eyes and pressed the laser pointer button in his hand.

"Next, let's watch a video for everyone."

The next moment, the lights at the entire conference site were dim, and the holographic projection of Mars appeared.

The original noisy conference site began to calm down, enduring the loss of the idol image, and staring at the holographic projection. Perhaps they thought that this video was a kind of tribute to the fall of their idols.

The mechanical column appeared...

chapters.title: Chapter 701: : Name: Mercy
chapters.body:
Chapter 701: : Name: Mercy

The familiar picture, the mechanical column appeared, that is the scene of the marching ant group mechanical column lifted off. A giant mechanical column rushed into the sky, and the scene was shocking.

This scene was originally out of the news, but the marching ant group responded that it was developing an asteroid, so there is no following.

After the heat subsided, there were not many people concerned, but some people on the field who were doing the news still remembered the scene of thousands of mechanical columns rising.

It seems that I feel wrong, the sneer voice disappeared and I began to watch the video seriously.

Simple and understandable kinetic energy collision model, mechanical column thruster, corn asteroid, igniter asteroid, asteroid's precise flight orbit and impact orbit, Mars orbit.

The one-screened picture appears on the holographic video, and the reporters on the field notice that things are not as simple as they might be.

Asteroids hit Mars?

Some media people who have paid attention to the news of Mars changes have a terrible idea in their minds.

A real video appeared on the holographic projection screen. Everyone already felt that things were wrong, their breathing was heavy, and they stared at the simulated picture. The asteroids were following the orbit, and the intersection was the orbit of Mars.

boom! !

Until the end of the video, the press conference will be spotted.

"Asteroids hit the Mars event, which was planned by our company." Chen Mo interrupted their stay.

Oh...

The exclamation broke out. Chen Mo’s statement directly acknowledged that the asteroids hit the Mars event and they planned it by hand. This is definitely an explosive news.

Their shock was in the expectation of Chen Mo, no accident.

“Our company is carrying out a super project of ‘Mars transformation.’ Now, Mars transformation has entered the most critical time, and next, we will transform its atmosphere, water quality and soil.

This transformation will be realized in the near future. In real time, Mars will become a planet full of vitality and suitable for human habitation. This planet was funded by our group. So today I am here to announce to the world that Mars will be owned by our marching ant group. ”

This time, there is no cynicism. This time, the whole world is quiet.

Chen Mo has published videos and photos of some of the Mars transformation projects. Many of the previous unclear news about the marching ant group were explained at this moment.

"Chen Mo is the existence of the creation god?"

"Name: Mighty."

"God Chen Mo, living on the waterfront, creating an army ant. One year into the market, two years of fame, five years of annihilation, ten years of creation, the gods. The hundred countries are terrified, the four seas convinced. Tunnel into the universe, 斩Zerg, destroying Warcraft, Huaxia Xing... can't be edited."

"Pangu said: Chen Mo grabbed the work of others, hehe..."

"..."

"The videos and materials published by Chen Mo are fake, and the asteroids cannot be theirs to Mars."

"Mars is the first one our ancestors saw, he is ours."

"Mars belongs to all mankind. According to the International Outer Space Treaty, no organization or individual may privately occupy extraterrestrial objects as private ownership by any means and methods. Chen Mo declares that Mars belongs to them and cannot stand up. ”

"In this chaotic era, international agreements are ineffective and have no binding force."

"There are already a large number of robots on the Mars ants group on Mars. Any aircraft that wants to land on Mars must pass his consent. Chen Mo is not talking to the world, but telling the world about this news."

"If Chen Mo pushes an asteroid into Earth's orbit, what will be the consequences?"

"Chen Mo is an alien?"

Countless voices are filled with the world network.

This news covers all the topics of war. Compared to the topic of creation, any conflict and war are insignificant.

The country is full of joy, and abroad, all are voices of opposition and protest.

In addition to this is shocking, Chen Mo announced this news to the world, even more terrifying than any news in the past. Chen Mo’s technology has the power to create the world, and it also shows that there is power to destroy the world.

"what should we do?"

Eva saw the news and was not in a good mood.

Chen Mo announced that the entire Mars was owned by the Army Ant Group, which made them very upset. Almost watching the marching ant group do this, they are helpless.

"No way." Rosen drank a glass of wine and shook his head: "Chen Mo's current scientific and technological strength is not within the limits of anyone, even the rules of the earth do not believe. In the face of absolute power, no one can help him."

“Don't let him sit on the whole Mars?”

"If necessary, he can re-create the rules. Who else can deal with him on this planet?"

Touching the soul's counter-question, let Eva look stagnation and fall into thoughts.

Rosen stared at the video and he saw the video shocked.

Any calculation strategy is not worth mentioning in this kind of great power. Being able to turn a ridiculous planet into a livable planet has transcended a level of earth civilization.

It is now a new colonial era, but this time it is a star colony, not a big voyage.

The marching ant group has the most advanced technology and has an advantage. It is normal to eat the first crab. The current situation, the outside world can not be distracted to deal with Chen Mo, Chen Mo announced the time of the news is very good.

"Next, we will do it according to our own plan. As for the marching ant group, symbolic opposition, meaning means, no one can manage the marching ant group." Rosen said.

At least not on earth.

Eva sighed and nodded helplessly.

The world is too scattered, it needs a big reshuffle, re-integration of the power of human civilization, in order to condense new vitality, to cope with the new interstellar era.

This is one of the main reasons for this turmoil.

"In addition to the domestic, the whole world is a voice of opposition." Zhao Min looked at the news and he was happy.

"The opposition is also invalid." Chen Mo blinked the news.

There are various reasons that can be seen, and many voices of opposition come from space research organizations in other countries and some international organizations.

This kind of opposition is pale and powerless.

Now that Mars is under their full control, any flying object that wants to enter Mars research must pass their consent. Otherwise, they have a hundred ways to let the other's detector or satellite disappear.

"Ink girl, look at the situation of the microbes that are put into the Martian Sea."

......

Inside the constellation of the constellation Serpent.

A giant spaceship appeared, shaped like a carrot, sharp in front, cylindrical in the back, and the engine at the tail spurted inexplicable light, which was the flame of anti-material 'burning'. This is the space curvature spacecraft rented by the team of space explorers. The universe text number: Origin Universe Adventure 102357, code: Big Wolf.

The space curvature spacecraft stays outside an unknown galaxies in the constellation of the Serpent, and the huge planet is in sight, surrounded by space.

"Professor Lan Shi, has reached the Rania Kayaking Super Cluster, the Long Snake - Centaurus Superclusters group of the constellation of the constellation of the constellation of the constellation of the constellation. The great gravitational source of the Rania Kyle superclusters is near Centaur. The location is safe now." Fei Lei looked at the star map.

On the map of the universe, the Rania Kyle superstar group belongs to a very ridiculous, small and poor corner. Like the desert Gobi of the ordinary planet, there is very little life, the space is harsh, and it is more dangerous than other superclusters. Many, the chances of the birth of a wisdom civilization are small and pathetic.

Ferre does not understand why Professor Lanshi will choose to come to this place for archaeological research.

However, the study of blue-level creatures is not something he can dictate. He is responsible for guiding the guides.

"Ok."

Professor Lan Shi touched the long wolf of the chopsticks and looked at the professional instrument. He turned his head to a lizard head with a green body and a long skin.

"Starting the Life Planet Quantum Radar Detection System. The Rania Kayah Super Cluster is over 500 million light years. It consists of more than 1,000 known clusters of galaxies and galaxies. There are countless stars in the Stars. The scope is maximized, otherwise I don’t know how long it will take to complete the investigation."

"Okay, Professor."

The lizard head spit out the slender tongue, and the bulging eyes smashed twice, picking up an instrument and knocking it a few times.

The Life Planet Quantum Radar Detection System is turned on.

chapters.title: Chapter 702: :Ultra-Light Speed Communication Quantum Consciousness Sensing System
chapters.body:
Chapter 702: :Ultra-Light Speed Communication Quantum Consciousness Sensing System

400 kilometers high.

The goddess floats in space, and a special machine is fixed in its carrying cabin.

Ultra-light speed communication quantum consciousness sensing system.

It is the super-light-speed communication instrument that Chen Mo is studying. Quantum-aware molding, through quantum consciousness to sense the state of quantum, to communicate.

This kind of communication method that exceeds the speed of light, Chen Mo has already reached a critical stage.

The final accurate test is now in progress.

There is a quantum consciousness sensor here, and there is also a sensor on the ground. This is a space test, long enough to test.

400 km high-altitude and ground communication, according to the speed of light communication, the delay is about 1.33 * 10 ^ -3 seconds, as long as the communication delay is less than this time, which means the test is successful, the super-speed quantum communication technology will also be successful.

In both instruments, a cold atomic clock is installed with an error of 500 million years and an error of 1 second to ensure the time synchronization and accuracy of the two quantum-sensing communication system instruments.

Quantum Lab, in front of Chen Mo, is the quantum consciousness sensor of the size of the freezer.

In this quantum sensor, there is no network connected to the outside world. It is an independent system. The quantum chip is 'locked' into the entangled state quantum, and the other half is in the quantum consciousness sensor of space.

Once the instrument is turned on, the quantum consciousness sensor works at all times, and as soon as the state of the entangled quantum of the 'locked' changes, it can sense the change immediately.

"Start."

Chen Mo let the ink girl begin.

The first is 100,000 sets of data transmission, each set of data is sent, there is preparation time, and then compare the time received by the quantum consciousness sensor on the goddess to determine whether the two are instant messaging.

“The data has been sent and data feedback from the goddess has been received.”

“How is the result of the experiment?”

“The average delay for receiving was 3 nanoseconds and it was successful.”

The ink girl smiled and Chen Mo smiled.

Even if there is experimental error, it is caused by the ordinary circuit transmission part.

This result has proved that the communication method of the quantum consciousness sensor is feasible, and he can directly perform instant communication at any distance without worrying about the delay caused by the distance being too far.

“Immediately code the super-light-speed communication quantum consciousness sensing system to create a prototype of communication.”

Chen Mo felt that the science and technology library had already had a movement.

After the ink-sucking woman, Chen Mo lay down and entered the familiar science and technology library.

A book is suspended in the center of the technology library.

Chen Mo reached out and touched the book, and all the content appeared in his mind.

This is the technology he has just studied in the successful super-light-speed communication quantum consciousness sensing system, which involves theory, technology, research process and all experimental data.

The science and technology library should include his theory and technology of technology research into the catalogue of books.

In the past research, there have been similar things.

After being a technology administrator, he has not seen the emergence of technology and theory beyond the current level of authority.

I did not expect this technology to successfully develop the next stage in the golden stage. Although there are lucky ingredients, it is indeed a successful research.

"Superluminal Speed Communication Quantum Awareness System"

After Chen Mo confirmed the name of the book, the book flew up and disappeared into the depths of the bookshelf of the Science and Technology Library.

After the book disappeared, the technology ball at the top of the Science and Technology Library landed slowly and suspended in front of him.

The technology ball is as quiet as ever, with no color changes. Chen Mo guesses that the technology ball should not change much before he completes the task of transforming the planet.

At the time of Chen Mo's observation of the technology ball, a little water-sized golden transparent liquid was separated from the technology ball.

Chen Mo quickly determined the reason why the liquid was separated.

Successfully develop rewards that go beyond existing privilege technologies.

Without thinking about it, Chen Mo stretched out his finger and clicked on the liquid.

The golden transparent liquid slowly blends into your fingertips.

An indescribable feeling is filled with Chen Mo's body and mind. This feeling is much more comfortable than the development of the body's advanced potential.

The development of advanced potential, the whole body cells have a strong sense of excitement and excitement, and now it is a sublimation, like a primitive evolution, a qualitative change in the level of life.

If you can see the inside of Chen Mo's body, you can surely find that Chen Mo's brain is full of golden transparent light. The cells are a bit golden and transparent. The blood and body tissues contain precious light. .

I don't know how long it took, Chen Mokai opened his eyes and took a deep breath.

The ink girl is beside him, smiling at him.

The waking memo, gave her a very special feeling, especially Chen Mo's eyes, the feeling of being incomprehensible is more profound and fascinating.

However, in the eyes of the ink woman, Merle has always been the most important, the most special, and the best.

A feeling of sublimation of the soul, Chen Mo feels the unprecedented pleasure of mind and body, like a qualitative change from the level of life.

"How long have I slept?"

"Three hours." The ink girl replied truthfully: "Merco seems to have changed again."

"Ok."

Chen Mo smiled and nodded.

I didn't expect the ink girl to find out his changes, but I don't see much change from the outside, just giving people a feeling of change.

......

Standing in the sky above a huge planet, the blue master is a sea that cannot be seen at all. The whole planet is ocean and there is no land cover.

Put on protective clothing into the sea, a huge world of life is in front of you.

The 100-meter-high seabed stands, the leaves are fluorescent, and the bottom is seaweed and sea flowers. The colorful light, one breath and one suck, is the perfect underwater forest landscape.

In the seabed, a variety of fish and exotic creatures parade through the sea.

'Sea monkey' with its ankles and palms, squatting in the seabed trees; blue squid with flat body and long seaweed; 'sea turtle' with green hair with chopsticks; Red-ray fish; colorful fluorescent soft-body...

Countless peculiar lives make up this perfect underwater bio-chain.

With the arrival of the team of Blue Masters, these peculiar sea creatures are just avoiding and there are no other special acts.

“Beautiful is beautiful, but unfortunately it’s all red non-intelligent sea creatures.”

The blue master grabbed a fish that swam from the side and looked strange, and smoothed the skin, and the red blood flowed out, dyeing a group of sea water on the red hand.

Seeing the fish in his hand was struggling in his claws, the blue master loosened his paws and let the scratched fish escape. Just arrived by the woods, he was caught by a sea monkey and stuffed into his mouth.

"The life of a red creature is really fragile."

“Professor, the data collected by the Planetary Civilization Detector has been completed, and no information on the wisdom and civilization activities has been found on this planet.” The lizard head following him said to the instrument.

"This planet is really a bit beautiful. If it is not too remote, the surrounding galaxies are too ridiculous. This non-intelligent sea creature's planet lock coordinates are sold to marine creatures and should be able to make a little money. Unfortunately, this location is too remote. Classes should not be interested."

The blue teacher sighed.

Without intelligent life and civilization, the study of the planet is of little value to the archaeological archaeology. Unless a cosmic group is willing to buy a planet as a habitat, the planet is not as valuable as a star.

The location here is equivalent to the 'desert' in the universe, the environment is bad, the space is turbulent, and the life civilization is very difficult to breed. They found more than 60 living planets in the constellation of the constellation of the constellation of the Serpent. But for the time being, no intelligent creatures and civilizations have been discovered.

"Go to the next planet of life."

The planetary civilization detection instrument did not find information about the wisdom of life, and the blue teacher directly opened it.

The Rania Kayah Super Cluster is too wide. If you stay on a planet worthless for too long, I am afraid they don't know when it will be possible to complete this archaeological research activity.

chapters.title: Chapter 703: : Human Space Conference
chapters.body:
Chapter 703: : Human Space Conference

Jim looked at the news about Mars and the marching ant group, and he was very unwilling.

Their space agency, the first to explore Mars, is now strongly declared by Mars.

In addition to Mars, the entire solar system, there are not many planets suitable for humans to land for extraterrestrial research.

The official is dealing with the war and has no time to take care of these things. It is only a symbolic objection. As professionals, they know the seriousness of this.

If the marching ant group really dominates Mars' ownership, it will be a disaster for overseas research institutions around the world.

When the war is over, China will become the first country to enter the space of the galaxy, enjoying unlimited resources and opportunities. Their extraterrestrial space research with other countries will be limited to the rules of the marching ant group.

This will be a huge limitation on the exploration and development of their future interstellar space.

"Contact the space research institutes of other countries to launch a space conference for all mankind and to develop space rules." Jim made up his mind and said.

He must unite space experts in all other countries except the Chinese space researchers to oppose the ridiculous ownership of the marching ant group, so that the marching ant group can make concessions.

......

"Do you want to unite us to put pressure on the marching ant group?"

The European Space Agency, Yang Verner heard Jim's words, his eyes flashing, and he was uncertain.

Now the global space research community is indeed angry at the fact that marching ants have announced their occupation of Mars, but no one can turn the waves under the horrific technological ability of the marching ant group.

"Now it is only united to put pressure on the marching ant group and stand at the commanding heights of morality and rules. Otherwise, the longer the time is dragged, the Mars will be completely transformed, and the outside world will default their voices. It will be more troublesome at the time. We occupy absolute The commanding heights and the number of people, as long as the joint vote, is definitely our win, and other space agencies will certainly agree with our decision."

There was a heavy voice from Jim at the end of the phone.

It seems that he is determined, and Yang Verner’s eyes are certain. He said: “Where, where is the location?”

"Geneva?"

On the island of Kagoshima, Edo Castle heard the location of the meeting, and his eyes twitched and turned around, thinking about the pros and cons.

The marching ant group proposed ownership of Mars and greatly shocked the global space research institutions.

However, the marching ant group has the ability to control the orbit of the asteroid, which is a technology that no organization can fight at present, and there is no way to limit it.

The only thing that can be done is to suppress the marching ant group at the commanding heights of morality and rules.

The marching ant group will not care about them, this is a problem.

But this seems to be the only way for them to regain the stakes that Mars should have. If nothing is done, the default Mars belongs to the marching ant group, which is not what they want.

At least the world’s paranoia and moral high ground are on their side.

Edo City smiled: "Yes."

......

"Mergo."

The ink girl interrupted Chen Mo, who was watching the video.

"The Global Space Agency and space agencies must unite to host the Human Space Space Conference, collectively pressure us to re-establish rules for the use of extraterrestrial space in Geneva."

The ink girl released the call and recording of Jim in conjunction with the heads of other agencies.

Chen Mo’s expression is nothing but turbulent.

It is still coming, if the outside world does not oppose it, then it is impossible. When they made ownership of Mars, they knew that there would be some trouble coming to the door.

"What to do?" asked the ink girl.

"there is always a solution to a problem."

Chen Mo simply said, continue to focus on the video of Mars.

The ridiculous terrain of Mars, which was ridiculous for hundreds of millions of years, was destroyed after the impact of the asteroids.

In the sea of the sea, the sparkling waters have seen a hint of greenness in the near future.

Water purification bacteria and oxygen-producing bacteria are put into the sea. This fungus, which can rapidly divide and grow in harsh environments, has no natural enemies, no restrictions, and begins to grow wildly and splits under the action of advanced growth agents.

Now the entire Martian ocean has been spread over aerobic bacteria and several other modified strains. The situation of Mars sea water is changing rapidly.

Nowadays, in the atmosphere of Mars, the presence of oxygen has been tested with instruments that test the oxygen concentration. Although the concentration is not high, it is true.

With the increasing number of oxygen-producing bacteria, sulfur dioxide and carbon dioxide in the atmosphere are also being rapidly consumed, and it will take a long time to reach a concentration suitable for living organisms.

Crossing the mountains separated from the sea of silence, here is a plain.

Here, there were gravel, full of loess, the impact of asteroids, overwhelming dust was flooded here, and the rain was eroded, leaving the soil a little moist.

There has been a change in the land that has not changed since the ages.

A grass does not know when it has appeared on the land.

Multi-grass, a grass that is extremely fast-growing, can survive in low oxygen concentrations, high temperatures and low temperatures in the absence of sunlight. Once there is sunlight, they can mature in just three days and then madly breed. .

Mars, dead and dead, has shown signs of life.

The colonies and the most basic living conditions of the plants are formed. When the volcanic ash over the Martian atmosphere is completely removed, the sunlight falls on Mars, and the plant seeds put by Chen Mo will begin to grow wildly.

......

In the evening, the Global Space Agency and the space agency jointly issued a call to convene a conference on human space to discuss the new rules for the use of space.

The conference invited the participation of global space research institutions, including the space research scholars of the Feiyang Space Center and Chen Mo of the Army Ant Group. They also specifically emphasized that Chen Mo must be present.

It seems to be intended to expand, and the news came out, the global media began to report madly.

In just one day, the news of the space conference has spread throughout the world.

"The fools know that this is a banquet for Chen Mo, for the marching ant group, the fool will participate in the past."

"If you don't even have the power to participate in an international conference, then Chen Mo is also a waste, and is there a face that claims that Mars is theirs?"

"Mars is all human beings. It is the property of all mankind. Do you dare to come out and argue?"

"The world's elite agents are estimated to be staring there. If you can kill Chen Mo there, then you will make a big profit. Just look at Chen Mo dare to come over in person. If Chen Mo appears, it will be wonderful."

"If he has the courage to attend the meeting, I will serve him."

"I guess Chen Mo does not dare, fearing that death is human nature, Chen Mo is not stupid, he is so powerful, he should cherish his life more."

"The tortoise turtle does not deserve to have Mars."

"Yes, how can this kind of coward with Chen Mo be worthy of Mars? It is better to hide at home and eat milk."

"If Chen Mo does not dare to pass, he will be spurned and ridiculed by the global people. After all, how can the cowardly and shrinking tortoises with fear of death control the Mars?"

All about the Internet, all about it.

Countless people began to take the rhythm, and there were some gimmicks that watched the excitement.

In addition to the wars in various places, the marching ant group announced its ownership of Mars, so the news of the Human Space Space Conference has almost become the target of everyone's attention.

Chen Mo will not be there, almost everyone has guessed.

If Chen Mo is present, he may face countless assassinations; if he does not appear, then the world's people will not agree with the marching ant group's ownership of Mars, and countless public opinion will make a big fuss here.

At this moment, the eyes of the whole world are placed on the marching ant group, waiting for Chen Mo's response.

chapters.title: Chapter 704: : Tiannv And Nano Battlegear
chapters.body:
Chapter 704: : Tiannv And Nano Battlegear

"Don't think it's a banquet, don't go." In the holographic projection, Li Chengzhi's voice is more dignified than ever.

Experts from the domestic space agency also received an invitation to participate in the space conference.

At this time, the Global Space Space Conference is held, and the location is not at home. If you want to go out, you must consider personal safety issues.

The global situation is now chaotic and undercurrent, so it is not as simple as the surface.

Any big person, at this point in time, will not go out easily.

"I know, thank you for your reminder." Chen Mo said.

"Not a reminder, I will contact you, I hope you don't want to go, otherwise no one knows what will happen at the venue, what will happen."

Li Chengzhi.

"And for the ownership of Mars, they occupy the commanding heights of public opinion and rules. You used to be a good thing. The remarks on the Internet are all ulterior motives and radicals."

"Ok."

Li Chengzhi’s breath is stagnation, he doesn’t know what to say, he listens to Chen Mo’s tone, he still has to go, he can only be anxious.

Chen Mo’s identity is no different.

Before he said, Chen Mo spoke again.

"The network's remarks are quite right. If you don't even have the power to participate in a conference, how do you control Mars?" Chen Mo said with a smile: "Although I don't need their recognition, I want to see what waves they have turned up."

"You..." Li Chengzhi was stunned and somewhat anxious.

"More fun, or else all day is research, life is monotonous." Chen Mo laughed.

Li Chengzhi’s eyes are dark, and he really can’t move.

......

"You said that Chen Mo will not pass this time?" Tom asked the assistants around him.

"According to normal people, it should not pass. The world is in chaos. At this time, attending this kind of meeting that knows ulterior motives is quite dangerous." Tom's assistant shook his head.

"You are wrong, he will pass."

Tom shook his head and said calmly.

"Although he doesn't care about what others think of him, he is a very confident person and he is very aggressive, otherwise he will not dare to start a project to transform the planet."

"What if we are in the past?"

Tom's assistant looked flickering.

"Currently, Chen Mo's ability is stronger than anyone. If you move him, it is not a wise move. If he misses it, he may find out that he may face his revenge. His method is terrible, and no one can resist it."

Chen Mo told them that the scientific and technological strength of transforming the planet can no longer afford his anger and revenge.

He has the ability to destroy a planet.

Wanting to assassinate him is a hundred times more dangerous than the president of a powerful king.

"Enable the most secretive group, contact them at the past meeting site, and then listen to my orders and don't do it. Remember, don't use electronic communication and computer equipment, it's not safe." Tom blinked.

The success of artificial intelligence made them realize that the Internet is already insecure.

......

“This time I went to the site of the European Space Space Conference and secretly protected one person.”

Wang Hai is 30 players in front of him, and he is the best and most loyal 30 of the fighters he has trained.

The 30 players face each other. They have done a lot of assassination missions, but it is the first time to protect people's missions. At the same time, they are also curious about who is in need of protection.

"This is the person you want to protect."

Wang Hai transferred Chen Mo’s photo.

"Even if you die, you must also ensure his personal safety. This mission, the rank is the highest S class. You can use any means to ensure his safety."

Chen Mo, this person is no stranger to them.

These god-like characters, they have heard more or less.

......

The world is surging, and countless eyes are paying attention to the space conference, and whether Chen Mo will arrive at the scene.

And some people who are interested, prepared early, may be able to gain something at this space conference. Chen Mo’s limelight is too strong and does not meet the interests of many people.

The city hosting the space conference became the most stressful area. After the news was announced, the center of the conference began to be martial law, and no suspicious people were allowed to approach.

"Be careful in the past."

Xiao Yu carefully arranged Chen Mo’s tie, and he was meticulous.

"Yes." Chen Mo stroked her head and signaled her peace of mind.

Xiao Yu made a strange expression.

"When are you coming back?"

"Tomorrow, I should be able to come back." Chen Mo said.

"I am waiting for you at home." Finished, Xiao Yu looked up and down Chen Mo: "You have become more attractive these few days, do not allow to pick up girls, or come back to sleep on the floor."

"How do I count my girl?"

"Refuse."

Chen Mo is crying and laughing.

After Chen Mu’s face, Xiao Yu followed him to leave the room.

The ink girl has changed her tight vest for combat and waited at the door. Zhao Min is also there. The two and Chen Mo greeted each other and followed the underground lab to the villa.

"We have already notified the official of Switzerland that you will take a private jet to the venue and the plane is already waiting in the sky."

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo, who was wearing a suit.

In the past few days, Chen Mo’s breath has undergone a particularly big change. She seems to be stimulating the biological instinct. Every time I see Chen Mo, I can't help but want to be close.

This product definitely attracts the bee of the butterfly.

"Which aircraft?"

"The goddess, a high-profile. This is a good opportunity to show muscles, let the outside world look at our strength, completely dispel the thoughts they should not have." Zhao Min said.

The group went to the research room of the villa library.

Chen Mo walked to the side of the armor, only to see the armor of the cabinet instantly turned into a nano-robot, gathered on him, covering his body, black and red tone painted armor, looks very mysterious.

The ink girl did not hesitate to go to the purple armor, let the body be covered by the armor, it looks very noble.

Both are nano armor. After the nano-robot technology is mature, Chen Mote specially developed the control system of the armor, and also upgraded to the brain control system, using the neural consciousness control device to manipulate the armor through brain consciousness.

"Go, wait for us to come back."

The ceiling of the library was opened, Chen Mochao Xiaoyu and Zhao Min made a gesture, slowly floating, bringing the ink girl up to the sky and disappearing over the villa.

Zhao Min looked at the white armor in the window and the fiery red armor like a phoenix. The white theme is the armor of the small fishing, the red armor is prepared by Chen Mo to Zhao Min, but the two did not pass through several times.

"If you are worried, you can follow the past."

"These things he can handle, we are useless with the past."

Xiao Yu shook his head, she wanted to follow the past, but eventually gave up the idea. There are Chen Mo and the ink girl, she does not matter whether she goes or not, staying at home, Chen Mo is more assured.

At an altitude of 20,000 meters, two sets of armor are flying fast, and a black spot on the horizon is getting bigger and bigger, and the huge outline of the goddess appears.

As the two approached, the transport cabin door at the end of the Tianmai was opened, allowing two people to fly into the cabin to land, and then slowly close the transport cabin.

"boss."

Chen Mo and Mo Nu just appeared, and the black eagle and other bodyguards in the seat immediately stood up and took a ceremony.

Looking at the armor of Chen Mo and Mo Nu, the ten bodyguards on the field were shocked. The technology that appears in this kind of sci-fi movie is just in front of them. It is an indescribable shock, and at the same time, the two eyes are shining.

The technology of the boss has indeed reached a stage of horror.

"Well, it’s hard." Chen Mo came out of the armor and responded with a sigh of relief to the location of the rest area: "How long is it from the beginning of the conference?"

"Five hours."

chapters.title: Chapter 705: : Man Who Descends From The Sky
chapters.body:
Chapter 705: : Man Who Descends From The Sky

The Geneva International Conference Center, as early as the agenda of the conference of the Space Conference, the level of security here has risen to the highest level.

If Chen Mo is involved here, no one can take responsibility, and no one can bear the anger of the marching ant group.

Chen Mo now, on the ability of science and technology, is like a god.

An hour before the start of the space conference, the conference center was waiting for journalists from all over the world. This is the first time that Merce has been directed to the media and the public after Mars confirmed that it was being transformed by the marching ant group.

"Chen Mo did not seem to come."

"It should be that you are not courageous, afraid of death."

"This meeting is not friendly to him. It is normal for him not to participate."

The reporters waiting for the conference center are on the air, and some free journalists are whispering.

Many reporters confirmed according to various rumors that Chen Mo did not appear in the hotel center at the conference center yesterday, and the official of the army ant group did not announce whether Chen Mo was leaving.

Now that the meeting is almost at the beginning, Chen Mo has not appeared at this point in time, which means that Chen Mo can't attend the meeting on time.

But many people are looking forward to the content of this meeting and the upcoming consensus, especially in the West.

Mars was transformed by Chen Mo, and the marching ant group announced the ownership of Mars, which means that Mars belongs to China, which is unacceptable to nationals other than China.

......

In a conference room, Jim, Young Verner, Edo City, etc., the directors of several space agencies around the world all gathered together and whispered.

Without the eternal enemy, the interests are the most important.

Even in this chaotic era, their respective interests are still beliefs.

If they do not join forces to pressure Chen Mo, it means that Mars will fall into the hands of Chen Mo, which is what all of them are not willing to see.

"There is still an hour before the meeting, and Chen Mo seems to have not arrived yet."

Jim frowned, Chen Mo was not present, there were good and bad, the advantage is that they can freely formulate their own rules, no one objected. The downside is that Chen Mo can not admit it.

"I heard that Chen Mo did not stay at the hotel yesterday," said Yang Verner.

"I should not dare to come over."

"Then we will confirm the contents of this meeting." Jim signaled a few people and confirmed the contents of the meeting: "With the framework of the previous space agreement, we only need to ask..."

......

Ni Yali looked at the time and was anxious. She was the little princess of the royal family. As a neutral, she was inconvenient to make any position at the meeting. This time I learned that Chen Mo was attending the meeting, and the royal family asked her to come over to receive Chen Mo and promote friendship between the two sides.

But now, the meeting is about to begin, scientists from other countries have already entered the meeting and began to prepare the content of the meeting.

Chen Mo was not there yet, and she was very anxious.

Chen Mo is now almost the most prominent representative of human beings. Usually, Chen Mo rarely comes to Europe to attend international conferences. They are the first to contact Chen Mo, the legendary god.

"Mr. Alexander, is Chen still not here?" Niari asked the Alexander around her.

The cooperation with the marching ant group has revived the Roche family and became the most powerful family in Europe. Now the Roche family has once again entered the ranks of the world's top families, with influence throughout Europe, almost reviving the glory of the past.

And Alexander, the head of the Roche family, is also one of Chen Mo's friends.

Seeing Nialy’s anxious appearance, Alexander smiled.

"His Royal Highness, are you not saying that the marching ant group has already informed you about his entry into a special plane? He said that he will come over and he will definitely not be late."

He always wanted to invite Chen Mo to come to Europe to be a guest. He Chen Mo is in a special situation and rarely comes out, so he has never had a chance.

This time Chen Mo was extremely rare to come to Europe once, so he found a way to get a ticket for the guests and came to attend the meeting. Just Princess Niyali and he are good friends, I am waiting for Chen Mo to appear here.

Now the strength of the marching ant group exceeds the current limit of humanity. Any company or individual can make a relationship with the marching ant group and will benefit a lot.

Alexander has been fortunate that he had let go of his own efforts and bet on the marching ant group before he exchanged for the glory of Roche today.

When the people around whispered and discussed whether Chen Mo would appear, Princess Niyali’s bodyguard walked quickly to her side and whispered in her ear.

"Chen is coming."

Ni Yali showed a smile, raised the skirt, let the bodyguard take her away, and went outside the conference center.

Alexander looked at her back and followed.

Princess Niyali is only 27 years old. The typical European beauty has the best gene of the royal family. The temperament is noble and the deliberate dress is very beautiful.

This time, their royal family let Niyari come over, and certainly hope to develop friendship with Chen Mo, or to have a story, which Alexander can still guess.

The Star Age is coming, no one can say that he will maintain his position forever.

Chen Mo is the strongest person in this era.

Princess Niyali and Alexander suddenly appeared, and immediately attracted the attention of the reporter. The live footage in the hand was immediately directed at the two people. After all, even if they were in the upper class, there were not many appearances.

Chen Mo is coming.

The well-informed reporter quickly received news that Chen Mo is coming.

The scene on the scene began to stir up, and all the reporters were ready for the camera and live footage, waiting for Chen Mo to appear.

Three minutes, there was no movement.

Just as many reporters were smashing, the roar of the sky came, and several black spots quickly approached from the horizon, zooming in under the lens of many reporters.

God girl.

The Maid was flying over the convention center with the accompanying official fighter. The huge fuselage is suspended at a height of 100 meters, leaving a shadow on the square outside the conference center.

Hey! !

Through the live Ultra HD lens, the belly of the Virgo is the first time so close to the world. The huge body, the cool ion engine and the sci-fi design of the abdomen caused all the audience to be amazed.

There is a sci-fi movie in which alien warships come to the earth.

Chen Mo is coming.

In the conference room, Jim watched the live TV screen and his eyes were open and uncertain.

Chen Mo really came, and in this way.

Is it powerful to show off him?

The heads of several other space agencies, as well as some experts, are not very good-looking. Chen Mo must know that this is a banquet, but also dare to come in person, and is riding the most domineering spaceship.

They have to doubt that the horror of this meeting will not be so simple.

On the Tiannv, Chen Mo looked through the window and overlooked the city below. After a little curiosity, he calmed down.

The armor covers the body, strong winds are poured into the cabin, and the rear cabin door has been slowly opened.

"Go."

Chen Mo took a few steps forward and reached the side of the hatch and jumped.

"This is not a special effect."

"Tough enough, take the most powerful special plane to the scene, this B I give 82 points, the rest gives you 666."

"How is Chen Mo going down?"

"Chen Mo took the Tiannv to the conference center to install B. How did he land? Jumped off the plane? Or finished B and went to the airport to land, then walked down and drove to the conference center? There is a picture..."

The reporters at the scene and some viewers watching the live broadcast, when wondering how Chen Mo landed, the cabin door was opened, and the two shadows flew out from the cabin and crashed toward the ground.

Hey! !

All the sounds came to an abrupt end.

After the muffled sound, the aftermath was exhausted. The two armor stood firmly on the open space, and for the first time did not hide their appearance in front of the world. At this moment, the air seems to be quiet.

chapters.title: Chapter 706: : Telling A Fist Is Still Reasonable?
chapters.body:
Chapter 706: : Telling A Fist Is Still Reasonable?

Chen Mo's armor is painted in black tone. The dark red marching ant logo is covered in front of the armor. It has a metal texture and a sense of science and technology. The body is tall and straight, secluded and cold, mysterious and powerful. Ink's armor, purple main paint, chest is a black marching ant logo, the armor line is soft, noble and perfect.

hiss……

At this moment, the people in front of the live broadcast of the news are unbelievable.

iron Man?

These three words pop up in the minds of countless people.

The equipment in the sci-fi movies appeared in front of them, although the world is now enough sci-fi.

Shocking way of appearance.

Standing there is like the central focus of the world.

Just drinking the freshly brewed coffee, Tom saw the scene from the scene, scared his hands, and the hot coffee sprinkled on the thighs. In the office, there was a loud cry and a clutter.

Half an minute passed and the office was quiet.

Tom stared at the screen, cold and sweaty.

They have planned all the ways to play, including the top guard team.

This scene in front of us is far beyond all of their plans.

Chen Mo has been able to make a battle armor.

"All actions were cancelled and all actions were cancelled." Tom’s voice was a little trembling.

Once he suspected that the former director was bizarre to die, is it related to Chen Mo, he now has to be more skeptical. Because he knew that at the time, Secretary Lina was going to report on Chen Mo’s plan.

All those who are secretly in the dark, seeing Chen Mo’s armor descending from the sky, the assassination of Chen Mo’s thoughts disappeared.

With the secret hand canceling the task, the people in the dark have no interest in making fun. Chen Mo's technology and technology, and they are not at a level at all, the consequences of moving Chen Mo will be very miserable.

This scene of the appearance of the Battlegear, through the global live broadcast, appeared on every big desk that focused on Chen Mo. Chen Mo’s technology is like a bottomless pit. No one knows what his next technology is.

When the Black Hawks landed on a single-person aircraft, Chen Mo and the ink-woman's armor opened and walked out from the inside.

Countless shots, record the scene of this history.

No one will reconcile this as a space conference, and the news is expected to be enough.

Nowadays, the space conference has not yet begun. Chen Mo has the most powerful steel armor technology and is exposed to one of the most important technology conferences.

"Too handsome, dreaming of having a steel armor, the man's dreams have made Chen Mo achieve."

"It is the man."

"Too handsome, I want to give Chen Mosheng a monkey."

"awsl."

"It's so powerful, I can't stand it. I like Chen Mo, why isn't he my husband? Hehe..."

"The female assistants around him have armor, and the woman is so beautiful, so envious, I am not alive."

It’s crazy to see the handsome girl in this scene.

The man’s enthusiasm for the armor, the girl’s illusion of the strong, the eternal worship of all, is even more terrifying than any star. Chen Mo is standing there in the armor, which is the focus of the world.

"And play handsome."

Xiao Yu looked at the live broadcast of the picture, could not help but vomit, the eyes did not turn, the look bright.

"Hehehe, someone is groaning in his mouth, but his heart is beautiful, and he is proud of his man. Your mouth is awkward, Ms. Xiao Yu." Zhao Min next to him.

"I have become the public enemy of countless women. I knew that I would wear a ugly thing for him." Xiao Yu stared at Chen Mo in the live broadcast, his eyes bent into a crescent: "Come back to let him sleep on the floor."

"Look at your unspoken appearance, you know that he is back, it must be served by the big fish." Zhao Min deliberately bite the tone of a certain word, laughing and showing.

......

At the door of the conference center, Nia Li and Alexander witnessed the whole process. At this time, Ni Yali looked at Chen Mo with her eyes, completely dressed as a little girl.

Seeing Chen Mo, Niyali ran straight up, like a small fan who saw idols.

"Chen, my name is Niari, I am very glad to meet you."

"Hello, Princess Nialy." Chen Mo politely shook hands with the other party.

"You are too handsome, too charming, can I make friends with you?" Niyari looked forward to Chen Mo, completely forgetting her identity as a princess. Just the moment Chen Mo was wearing the armor, it was a handsome guy. Now that he saw the real person, his heartbeat began to accelerate.

"Of course." Chen Mo laughed and said hello to Alexander next to him.

"I will take you in." Nia Li like a passionate little fan, led Chen Mo into the international conference center.

Just entering the International Conference Center, Chen Mo became the focus of all media footage. Black Hawk, Anan and other guards are around Chen Mo, playing a 12-point spirit to pay attention to the surrounding people.

The group had just entered the International Conference Center, and the staff responsible for the meeting greeted them. They did not see the eyes of Princess Niyali, and led Chen Mochao’s security checkpoint.

Drops...

Chen Mo passed the sensor door and the security machine sounded an alarm.

Drops...

Not waiting for them to come to stop Chen Mo, the ink girl followed Chen Mo through, the alarm sounded again, the staff on the field suddenly picked up, the atmosphere was a bit embarrassing, eyes watching Chen Mo and ink girl.

Not waiting for them to stop Chen Mo and Mo Nu, they were stunned by Princess Nia Li and kneeling in the same place.

Others dare to stop, this great **** can not be provoked.

Chen Mo did not stop at the foot to accept the inspection. Princess Niely was with her, and the person in charge of the security inspection could only pretend that she had not heard the alarm.

Chen Mo with weapons admission?

The reporters waiting for the security gate near the scene captured this scene and were dumbfounded.

At this time, who dares to stop Chen Mo to check?

"Domineering."

"It’s not a good idea to pass the special passage. Now the security check is a bit embarrassing, hahaha..."

"Chen Mo said: Do you dare to search for me? Haha..."

Some people who eat melons are schadenfreaked and discussed.

Seeing this scene, Jim and Young Verner and others collectively closed themselves.

I thought that Chen Mo would not be present. Now Chen Mo is not only present, but also comes in the highest-profile way, showing his powerful technology and technology, and now he is carrying illegal items.

Not only was Chen Mo brought, but also the beauty assistant around him.

If there is a conflict at the venue, are they not very dangerous?

Several people have been amazed.

The security checkers did not dare to stop Chen Mo and his women from searching and checking. They opened their mouths and said that they were not interested.

"The meeting is almost over, now it's over." Jim glared at the crowd and headed to the central conference hall.

With the arrival of Chen Mo, the people who invited to attend the conference have arrived.

This is the era of chaos, the largest space conference, focusing on the world's top aerospace scientists, astronomical scientists and space research experts, as well as Chen Mo, the technology leader.

Extraterrestrial space exploration technology has made great progress compared to the past.

Chen Mo's case of transforming Mars shows the horror of his technology to the outside world. The next step for mankind is the starry sea.

This human space conference is also an important meeting of humanity to the world of stars and sea.

A round table.

Chen Mo sat in his position, and the ink girl sat quietly beside him. They represented the marching ant group.

The atmosphere is a bit strange. In addition to the representatives of the country and the representatives of the minority, the others look at Chen Mo's eyes are not friendly. It seems that Chen Mo grabbed them hundreds of millions.

All the momentum and pressure came to Chen Mo.

The air is filled with a dignified taste.

Chen Mo looked at the space agreement prepared by the conference.

"The next meeting begins." Jim, the initiator of the conference, took the lead.

"and many more."

Chen Mo interrupted Jim's words. Let everyone breathe.

Representatives at the round table of the conference, the audience of the guests participating in the exhibition, and the shots of all the reporters all focused on Chen Mo.

The interrupted Jim was also black.

"Before the start of the conference, I would like to ask, is this conference a fist or a reason?"

When the words came out, everyone's face was black.

Tell a fist? You have banned weapons, armor, countless advanced weapons, Mars is controlled by you, who tells you the fist?

"No one answered?"

"We are talking about space agreements, of course, it makes sense." Yang Verner said with a bite.

"Okay, then you continue."

Jim had a full suit and drank his mouth and snorted.

"There are members of the Outer Space Committee and representatives of the space exploration of countries, organizations and enterprises. This space conference is the rule for human exploration of the universe. Now the existence of aliens has been confirmed. In the future, human beings will definitely Carry out large-scale deep space exploration, so we must unite as one.

In your hands, the Mars Agreement has been added to the new space agreement drafted in accordance with the Law on Outer Space. This space conference is to hope that everyone will sign this agreement and later use it as a guideline for human exploration of space. If you disagree with which treaty of the agreement, you can come up and discuss it with everyone. ”

Chen Mo put the agreement in his hand.

"There is disagreement."

chapters.title: Chapter 707: : Is The Universe Open To Your Family?
chapters.body:
Chapter 707: : Is The Universe Open To Your Family?

As Chen Mo interrupted, the focus fell on him again.

It is not surprising that Chen Mo has objections to the agreement.

At the beginning, everyone knew that this meeting was aimed at the announcement of the ownership of Mars by the marching ant group. Just curious, what Chen Mo will say next.

"Mr. Chen Mo, which treaty do you disagree with?"

"All."

"The principle of our space agreement revision is space exploration and utilization. We must seek benefits and benefits for all mankind. Do you disagree?" Jim squinted and said: "Or, you just ignore it for your own benefit. Human interests?"

"The hat is deducted well, then I have a lot of tongue fights today, and it’s the fun of research."

Chen Mo picked up the water from the small fish to prepare for his drinking.

Other people see Chen's default, and can't help but feel the spirit.

Next is the highlight of today's conference.

"The first article of the agreement, the exploration and use of outer space, must be for the benefit of all mankind. I spent a lot of money to develop Mars, and ultimately for human use? Is it considered human welfare and benefits?"

"Not counting, you declare ownership of Mars, it is for your own benefit." Jim said without hesitation.

"Would you like to open it to you for free? Is it for the benefit of mankind? Who is the research fund I spend? You don't provide funds. Why do you want every space development agency to be the Virgin, use your own funds? Develop research, risk is your own, but the results must be free for the benefit of all mankind?"

When the words came out, the atmosphere of the venue was sluggish.

Chen Mo’s first question is to hit the soul.

But no one cares on the field, and I don’t feel embarrassed. They just want to follow Chen Mo’s meaning, but it’s best.

Jim didn't take it for granted. He took a sip of coffee and was leisurely. He didn't listen to Chen Mo's words, and he didn't care what he was going to say.

When Chen Mo finished, Jim was not salty.

“The international community can provide some financial support for development agencies.”

“Who is the international community? What is the amount of funds? 10% of the funds? 30%? 50%? 100 million or 200 million or 300 million?”

The people on the field are still in the same shape as Shen Shen, Chen Mo continued.

"The concept of this 'part' is finally interpreted by the 'international community'. Is it a bad check? Is it support for supporting 1 cent? Is the research institution receiving this insignificant financial support, and the results are free to all human beings? ?"

The scene is quieter, no one picks up Chen Mo’s words.

Without an answer, the outer space agreement was originally too idealistic, but Chen Mo said these idealizations.

Jim smiled coldly, put down the coffee in his hand, and cleared his throat.

After smashing for a while, it was secluded.

"You put a few videos and PPTs. It doesn't mean that Mars is your transformation. It is not enough evidence to prove that Mars is your transformation. Now Mars belongs to all mankind."

Jim did not get entangled in the topic just now, and other space researchers nodded in agreement.

“Is the video and project data still not evidence?”

"We can also make a similar video and data content. Is Mars ours?" The Edo City opening around Jim is now preparing to besiege Chen Mo.

Chen Mo was happy.

"There is evidence that you are making fraud, that is, it is unreasonable in the face of people all over the world?"

The people on the field did not put Chen Mo's words on their minds, just mocking them.

Innocent.

Originally it is a double standard. Where is the pure reason?

This world will never tell you pure truth, only shameless.

"Not reasonable, no evidence, then we talk about fists. Mars is under the control of my occupation. You want to develop Mars, launch the detector yourself, see if you can land successfully, or you can send teams to attack Mars. Or come attack me."

After the last sentence, Chen Mozhen laughed.

"Oh, oh."

Through the live broadcast, countless people saw Chen Mo's smile, and three words appeared in his mind. The smile can make people can not help but want to beat him up, very unhappy.

However, I dare not fight or fight.

I am so angry.

Originally, everyone at the conference table, who was going to double-label the end, heard Chen Mozhen’s laughter, was very harsh, and his face was green.

"Earth planets belong to all mankind, and you have no power to privately."

I have been listening, and now the most unbearable Yang Verner, suddenly took the case.

Look at the appearance, it is very uncomfortable to see Chen Mo.

"Now is a fist, you tell me that there is no power? Whose fist is big, who is power." Chen Mochao Yang Verner hooked his finger: "Do you have a fist bigger than me? Come hit me."

Oh, oh.

This meeting can be heard by people all over the world.

Chen Mo’s sly smile makes people feel very guilty and wants to beat him, but there is nothing to help.

Yang Verner's face turned red and mad.

He didn't dare to do it. He couldn't do it outside. The current conference table didn't dare. Chen Mo had a weapon.

However, they are not good to leave directly. If they leave the room, Chen Mo will leave the meeting and may not return.

"The Outer Space Treaty stipulates that outer space must not be used as its own, including the moon and other celestial bodies, through sovereignty, use or occupation, and any other measure. You should know."

Jim was so upset that Yang Verna sat down and turned the subject back on track.

Chen Mo gave him a look.

"It doesn't make sense to say the truth. Whose fist is big now, who makes sense. I beat you, I will give you Mars."

Jim's face suddenly turned black.

"We don't say for a moment that the evidence for your transformation of Mars is true or false. Even if it is true, you can't privately declare that Mars belongs to you. Article 2 of the Outer Space Treaty stipulates that no method of sovereignty, use or occupation should be adopted, and Any other measure takes the outer space as its own, including the moon and other celestial bodies."

"Now the world is fighting, how can you not constrain the rules? The old system has been broken, you use the old days of the law, as the rules of the new era? Who stipulates? Who obeys?"

Jim frowned.

I thought that standing at the commanding heights of human morality and the commanding heights of the rules, to constrain Chen Mo, can have some effects, and Chen Mo is so savvy.

Waiting for Jim to speak, Chen Mo continued.

"Don't say that this system is outdated. According to that rule, one day in the future, outside the solar system, a planet with alien civilizations will be discovered. That planet also belongs to 'other celestial bodies'. So the planet is also human? You Telling the aliens that they are breaking the law and letting them all move away?

Also, if a group of aliens come to the solar system to develop Venus, according to this regulation, is Venus a human being or an alien? Is the universe open to your family? ”

"The aliens are aliens, but you are human, you have to abide by the rules of mankind." Jim was asked by a series of questions and uttered a sentence.

"If you can't manage aliens, just come to me?"

Chen Mo looked at Jim with a sly look.

"I am a human being, I should spend money to build a good house and plant a tree, to live for you? Give you a cool ride? Are you enjoying it? Which rule are you talking about? Outer space law?"

"Good."

When Edo City saw Jim's face unable to continue to argue, he opened his mouth.

"Since Mr. Chen disagrees with this clause, it can be changed. In the way of building settlements, bases, production and development land, the land used can be legally occupied.

Other land is not legally occupied. Any organization or individual, as long as the settlement, base, production point and development point are established, the land used is owned by him. ”

"I don't agree with this treaty. The new treaty should be the planet with no living conditions. Whoever gives the planet the conditions to live and survive, whoever has the control, occupation and use of the planet.

You can't have a planet of life and discover a planet that already has life, just use your terms as a rule. Of course, the planet of life wants to occupy, provided that you can beat the creatures of that planet, rather than being counter-occupied by aliens.

If you disagree with this rule, you can use force to grab my Mars, provided that you are not being robbed by me. ”

"..."

The audience fell into silence.

chapters.title: Chapter 708: : Strong Rules
chapters.body:
Chapter 708: : Strong Rules

The people in the conference hall are now suddenly realized.

The strong set rules, the weak follow the rules, this is the status quo of the world.

Chen Mo is no longer a rule-observant, but a custom-maker of the rules. No one has more say in the rules of human space exploration in the present and in the future.

The conference table was immersed in contemplation, and the guests on the field also thought about the rules Chen Mo said.

The pressure is not reversed.

Chen Mo’s space strength is stronger than them, and his attitude is tough, so that all of them can’t help.

They are more afraid than Chen Mo to break the cans.

Once he smashed the table, Chen Mo could swallow the outer space, and he could not get all the benefits he wanted.

Jim's eyes are moving and his brain is flying. He is looking for ways to refute the loopholes in Chen Mo's rules.

Suddenly, Jim's eyes lit up, revealing a mocking smile, but soon disappeared, and also looked at the opposite Chen Mo, pretending to be a very angry look.

“What is the living condition of ‘life’ that you are talking about? Is life defined as bacteria, plants or animals?”

When Chen Mo glanced at him, he knew what his mind was in his heart.

“Non-manual intervention, under natural conditions of the planet, the organisms that have survived on the planet for more than a week and are capable of photosynthesis, including photosynthesis bacteria and fungi.”

Jim's face was a little better, and he took a sip of the coffee on his hand and licked his lips, surprisingly without strong opposition.

"what happened?"

Next to Yang Werner took the initiative to get rid of the body, frowning, not knowing what kind of ghost Jim was doing, Edo City also came over, with doubts in his eyes.

"Chen Mo only hits Mars with asteroids, and the environmental conditions of Mars have changed greatly, but now there is no possibility of living creatures and no conditions for living. According to his conditions, Mars is still owned by all mankind. After he signed the agreement, We have a landing study on Mars and he has no reason to stop it."

Jim and Edo Castle are clear and their eyes are bright.

"If he said that the terms should be revised, he promised him to let him sign the agreement and then make other plans."

The domestic representative next to Chen Mo also had some doubts and gathered around Chen Mo.

Ouyang Yuan, the expressionless face of indifference, is his standard. Only those who know him know that his character is very easy-going and enthusiasm, and does not look so indifferent.

He is a domestic space research expert. He has been in contact with Chen Mo in the cooperation of the lunar base. He is also an academician. He also knows Chen Mo.

The space conference, as the deputy director of the Institute of Space Studies, he came to participate as a representative.

Originally thought that Chen Mo will be besieged by their moral high ground. Now Chen Mo has repeatedly argued against each other, but it makes him feel unexpected.

Just the terms just mentioned, he feels a bit uncomfortable.

"Chen Chen, this clause is probably not good. Now there is no life on Mars. They may use this as a reason to refute your claim to Mars." Ouyang Yuan whispered.

"I know." Chen Mo nodded gently.

"Why did you propose such a condition?" Ouyang Yuan was more confused.

"On Mars, plants have been successfully grown, I have not announced." Chen Mo said with no expression.

Ouyang Yuan was shocked and took his own joy in an instant. He tried to control himself. He was not found by the opposite side. His emotions were wrong. He was still a faceless expression of indifference, a feeling of refusing people thousands of miles away. My heart has already blossomed.

Some other people are whispering to discuss the conditions proposed by Chen Mo.

Although the conditions are good, some weak countries are not willing. This method means that space resources will be fully occupied by the powerful countries. However, their opinions are not important.

The meeting is still going on. Chen Mo said that after the amendment of the agreement, some people opposed it, but the effect was not great.

Chen Mo’s strong attitude has absolute right to speak on Mars and space issues.

The most important part of this agreement is the rules on the issue of planetary ownership.

Divided into three categories.

One is the inanimate absurd planet. These planets have no ownership rights. All human beings can freely land in research or mining, and the bases and mines under construction are owned by developers.

One is the inanimate absurd planet, transformed from a ridiculous planet into a planet suitable for life.
