This type of planet belongs to the reformer (the area of the planet's topographical change must exceed 30%); if it is not caused by individuals or organizations, the planetary conditions change All human beings are free to land on research, and the base of construction is owned by the unit of construction.

The last one is a living planet that can be occupied, but it must not destroy the life of its planet. It will organize an international biological research team and an international cooperation team to conduct biological research on the planet. But if you really find alien life, it is not as simple as the agreement.

The rules of the new space agreement are mainly the ownership of the planet.

The ownership of extraterrestrial planets, with enterprises as the most basic units, companies can have planet ownership and encourage enterprises to participate in space development and exploration.

To put it bluntly, free development of outer space without causing a crisis to the Earth and Moon system, the Earth-day system and humanity, but it is necessary to abide by the safety rules and be responsible for the related responsibilities.

All that remains are some space security rules and some shared responsibilities.

These rules are optional.

For extraterrestrial space research, for the strong, when there is no interest involved, everyone is a good child who abides by the rules. If it involves interests, these agreements are just a few waste papers, and there is no binding at all.

The reason why Chen Mo came over is just to give the outside world an answer and do it.

The agreement mainly restricts individuals and small businesses, avoids them from using space, and creates a crisis for humans and the earth. There is no restriction or effect on him.

There is an old outer space issued as the original blueprint. Chen Mo only asked to amend the ownership of the planet and several unreasonable clauses. The other ambiguous clauses were not moved or modified.

Under the ‘consultation’ of dozens of people, Chen Mo proposed to amend several clauses and form them within three hours.

The efficiency is fast and amazing.

The new Outer Space Act, witnessed by members of the Committee on Outer Space, representatives of national space research, representatives of space organizations and aerospace enterprises and the President of the International Tribunal, was revised to the original document.

During the revision of the agreement documents, they have contacted their respective officials and informed the details, plus or not, each has an answer.

A revised agreement document was sent to the representatives of each of the international courts responsible for signing the agreement.

Jim stared at Chen Mo, waiting for him to sign, and everyone else’s eyes were on Chen Mo.

This space conference is aimed at the announcement of the ownership of Mars by the marching ant group.

Chen Mo signed his name on the agreement, Jim and others mocked and signed his name on the agreement.

The signing of the agreement was completed, and the space conference was settled.

"The following is the invitation of the sponsor of the conference, Mr. Jim, to summarize the results of the conference."

At the end of the meeting, Jim smiled after the host named it, as if the winners generally went to the podium of the conference, and they did not recognize the pace of the six parents.

"The biggest achievement today is to formulate new rules for the future development of human space. The agreement encourages organizations and enterprises to actively carry out space exploration and development, and get everything for themselves.

Outside is the star sea, with unlimited space. Our agreement today is to lay the foundation for human beings to enter the sea of stars, and the space exploration in the future will only get faster and faster. ”

Jim’s speech was a bit impassioned and very good.

"Next, our plan is to unite the space agencies and space research institutions of various countries and prepare to build a permanent base on Mars for research."

When the words came out, the scene immediately rioted.

Some reporters' live footage turned to Chen Mo and wanted to see Chen Mo's reaction.

Just let them down, Chen Mo quietly sat in the position, holding his mug in the water, not moving.

“Does Chen Mo give up his claim to Mars?”

"Chen Mo gave up Mars?"

"It costs a few trillions, can't you give up so easily? Is there any other reason?"

Some people were amazed and began to whisper.

Jim just looked at Chen Mo and continued his speech.

"You may be wondering, the claim of the marching ant group on the ownership of Mars, this claim is currently ineffective.

First, we are not sure whether Mars was caused by the marching ant group pushing asteroids. The plans and data they published are not sufficient evidence to transform Mars.

Aside from this, let's say that Mars is caused by the marching ant group pushing the asteroids, but the second paragraph of the agreement stipulates that the inanimate absurd planet is transformed from a barren planet into a planet suitable for life. The reformer is all.

This stipulated condition is suitable for the planet of life and survival, and belongs to the reformer. At present, there is no life on Mars, indicating that it is not suitable for life. The situation of Mars is in accordance with the first item of Article 2 of the agreement. Mars is a barren planet. It belongs to all human beings. Any organization or individual can develop freely on Mars.

When we join this agreement, we must have the spirit of agreement, strictly abide by it, and implement it..."

This sentence seems to be said to Chen Mo, most people on the field have begun to applaud, some people have laughed out of ridicule.

"Chen Mo has been routine, it is stupid, hahaha..."

"Using the loopholes and conditions of the rules, I successfully deceived Chen Mo."

"The advocacy of the Mars ants group on Mars ownership is a big joke."

......

After a few minutes of speech, Jim went down from the podium, but harvested the applause of the entire venue.

Representatives of Huaxia and some friends and collaborators of the marching ant group did not applaud, and looked worriedly at Chen Mo’s location.

Until Jim finished, Chen Mo was still watching the show.

"There is a space for exploring the pioneer Mr. Chen Mo to give a speech at the end of the conference."

When the host's words fell, Chen Mo rose from the position and went to the stage. The ink girl followed.

Everyone's attention is on Chen Mo, they want to see what Chen Mo has to say.

"This conference has achieved good results and laid the foundation for the exploration of human space. The agreement encourages human beings to actively explore the space. There will be more and more teams joining the space exploration in the future. The outside is the sea of stars. The progress of human civilization, this is me. Very happy to see.

Here, let me talk about what Mr. Jim just said about setting up an international organization and building a permanent base for Mars. According to the second paragraph of Article 2 of the agreement, Mars is the development and transformation of our marching ant group, and it belongs to my marching ant group. ”

The scene swelled again, and everyone said hello.

Just now Jim also said that the second item of Article 2 of the agreement, now Chen Mo said this one, who is right and who is wrong?

"I want to build a base on Mars. I welcome it, but it must be approved by our group. Otherwise, we have the right to confiscate any objects that invade Mars.

As Mr. Jim said, the second paragraph of the agreement stipulates that the inanimate absurd planet is transformed from a barren planet into a planet suitable for life. This planet belongs to the reformer.

Mars was transformed by my marching ant group, and the facts are already there, and there is no need to prove anything. We have already placed microbes and plant seeds on Mars. I am very happy to tell you a good news here that the plant seeds placed on Mars have sprouted. ”

Chen Mo clicked on the phone and put a few photos on the big screen in the conference hall.

On the land of Mars, a tender green grass.

chapters.title: Chapter 709: : All For The Future Of Mankind, If You Have Money, You Can Do It.
chapters.body:
Chapter 709: : All For The Future Of Mankind, If You Have Money, You Can Do It.

Life has been cultivated on Mars.

In the solar system, there is already a second planet that can nurture life.

The news, like a blockbuster, landed on calm waters and the meeting exploded.

Jim squinted, unbelievable, and his face turned red. At this moment, he realized that Chen Mo knew what they wanted to do at the beginning, but it was only Chen Mo who played them.

"Impossible, this is a fake, evidence of the impact of Mars, you made a fake, this photo is also fake."

Jim's voice echoed through the microphone in the conference hall, some hysterical.

Chen Mo just looked at him and ignored it.

"The Outer Space Agreement is to regulate the space development of human beings in the future, to maintain spatial order and space security. When we join this agreement, we must have a spirit of agreement, strictly abide by it, and implement it."

Chen Moluo has a ridiculous tone, which makes Jim awkward and his face instantly black as the bottom of the pot.

"Your evidence is fraudulent, we quit the agreement."

Jim interrupted Chen Mo’s speech again.

Chen Mo looked at him and was condescending on the podium.

"If someone does not abide by the agreement, I am one of the signatories to the space agreement and have the right to sanction those who do not comply with the rules of the agreement. The space research organization that is not within the agreement wants to disrupt the order of the space agreement through barbaric means and sign the agreement. In one case, I also have the power and obligation to impose sanctions on organizations that destroy order."

Jim's face was ugly, and Chen Mo was like a speech, but he heard the threat in Chen Mo's words.

Now Chen Mo is the undisputed overlord in the space field. Whoever is sanctioned by Chen Mo, space research and exploration will face the most terrible disaster, and it is still lucky to stop.

Chen Mo’s speech at the venue ended. Just after coming out of the conference hall, he was surrounded by a group of reporters.

If it is not for security personnel to stop the reporters, I am afraid that Chen Mo has already been drowned by the crowd. Taishan and Anan are two muscle men like two hills, blocking in front of Chen Mo, other bodyguards around Chen Mo, the ink girl is still around.

After the comfort of the staff, the emotions of the crazy reporters on the field only slightly eased.

"Mr. Chen, you just said that life has been cultivated on Mars. Is the news true?"

“Really, we have planted some special plants and oxygen-producing bacteria on Mars, which are transforming the Martian atmosphere. Soon, Mars will become the second human livable planet in the solar system.”

Chen Mo’s words once again caused turmoil.

Just in the conference hall was a summary speech, and did not reveal the news, and now there is a new news.

"Mr. Chen, just now Mr. Jim said that he wants to withdraw from the agreement. What do you think?"

"They changed their minds and made no credit. We are used to it. They have no intention to withdraw from the agreement. No matter the agreement or the agreement, the ownership of Mars belongs to our group. Any organization wants to enter Mars research. All must be approved by us.

If we launch the spacecraft into the orbit of Mars without the consent of our group, we can regard it as an intrusion, have the right to destroy or confiscate the spacecraft, and counterattack and sanction the organization that launches the spacecraft. ”

"Are you doing this, is it space hegemony?"

"The parties have just signed an agreement. I strictly carry out space development in accordance with the rules of the agreement. If you have to understand space hegemony, what is hegemony?"

When Chen Mo said this, some Western reporters were angry and anxious, but they could do nothing.

"For the great progress of mankind, if the international space organization wants to enter Mars research, would you agree?"

"We can rent out bases and land for their research. Like the lunar base, they are for the future of mankind. If you have money, you can do it."

As soon as this was said, many reporters were convulsed.

For the future of mankind, can you have money? I have never heard such a shameless words.

Chen Mo seems to have been unable to spend money with money. Shouldn’t he generously provide a free research site to international organizations? Unfortunately, Chen Mo is not generous.

"Bastard."

Hearing the comments that Chen Mo was interviewed, his chest was full of breath and he could not keep going.

This meeting was originally intended to stand on the human righteousness and to deny Chen Mo’s claim to Mars. As a result, he now lifts his own feet.

Chen Mo now declares that he owns Mars, which is legal and reasonable. If he does not comply, the marching ant group can still sanction and counterattack.

Without this meeting, they launched spacecraft to Mars. If they were destroyed by Chen Mo, they could stand on the righteousness and morality of all mankind and condemn and pressure Chen Mo. Now they have all the last chips.

Moral height? They have been sent out by them.

grab? Can't grab it.

"What now?" Yang Verner's face is also not good-looking. He also felt that he was put together by Chen Mo.

"I don't know," Jim said with a black face.

"Don't you say that you can succeed?" Edo Castle is not very good.

"I don't know that Chen Mo has planted plants on Mars so quickly." Jim is now on the verge of breaking out.

“Waste.” Edo City stood up directly and left the small meeting room.

Because Jim’s self-righteousness was taken by Chen Mo to take the last moral high point, he was also very upset.

"you……"

People who used to be like dogs, now openly mocking his waste, Jim almost vomited blood. But nowadays, the island countries of today are no longer the island countries that used to be theirs.

"Ugh!"

Yang Verner sighed and turned and left. The former 'Boss' has already been pulled down from the altar, and now is the time to change partners.

“Contact the marching ant group to talk about space cooperation.” Yang Werner told the assistants around him.

There are no eternal enemies, no eternal friends.

"Damn."

Jim licked the coffee cup on the floor, the freshly brewed coffee splashed on the floor, and the hot air, the smell of a house of coffee.

......

Mars.

On the plains of the ocean side, you can see the green grasses that emerged from the ground in the near future. It is not far from one another, and it can be seen everywhere.

In the plain, a huge base of one million acres is located in it. If it is a prosperous city, this is the first Mars base built by Chen Mo on Mars.

The entire Yingcheng City is a whole, the underground systems are all together, and the layout is perfect.

The most central high-rise is like a king, overlooking the entire base. This building is the data center of the entire Mars base, the marching ant building.

A nuclear fusion power station that provides energy for the entire city.

Ore processing plants, material production plants, 3D printing workshops, smart transport vehicles, intelligent machines, airports, launch sites, and four train track systems lead to various mines in Mars.

All the factories and equipment needed for the research base are complete and orderly.

There is an industrial system that transcends the current industrial civilization of mankind.

Before the construction of the Yingcheng City, the ink girl had made careful design calculations and reasonable planning for the base. The use of nano-robot stacking is many times faster than 3D printing, and it is many times simple.

In the sky above Yingcheng, a black spot slowly approached, and the goddess slowly landed on the platform of the space launch site.

A special container was placed in the transport cabin of the goddess from the transport vehicle, and went straight to the marching ant building, all the way through.

Arrived at the marching ant building square, the ground slowly landed and the container disappeared in front of the square.

In a wide and enclosed space underground, ten freezer-sized cases were lifted out of the special box by the robot, placed in a designed position, plugged in cables, and connected to the data center of Data Yingcheng.

The whole process is done in one go.

The first generation of super-light speed communication quantum consciousness sensing equipment was successfully installed.

chapters.title: Chapter 710: : Mars Commercialization
chapters.body:
Chapter 710: : Mars Commercialization

"Chen, so late, didn't bother you?" Alexander glanced at the ink girl behind Chen Mo.

"No interruption, please come in."

With the permission of Chen Mo, the Black Hawk made a gesture to Alexander and went to Chen Mo's room. The Black Hawk stood in the hall, and the ink girl sat down next to Chen Mo.

Chen Mo poured two glasses of red wine and handed him a cup of Alexander.

Here is the suite of the Royal Hotel. Chen Mo is going to have a rest here, go back tomorrow morning, just in the afternoon, and still have dinner at home.

"It’s a bit of a thing to bother you so late," Alexander said.

"You said."

"Mars is now owned by your group. How do you think about development and utilization? Have you thought about its profitable projects?" Alexander asked.

"I have given these things to Zhao Min's plan." Chen Mo said: "Do you have any thoughts?"

"Yes, this time I bothered you, there is a special Mars profit project."

Alexander put down the glass and turned to look at the night sky outside. He didn't know if he was looking for Mars.

"I thought about going to your group to find you and Zhao for a while. I heard that you came here, I will come over, just to talk to you in advance, if you feel it can, after two days, I will talk to Zhao again." Cooperation."

"What project?"

"The jewel on Mars."

Said Alexander.

"You also know that we have experience in marketing jewellery and art. We are rare, jewellery and diamonds are huge profits, diamonds and jewels on Mars, special, can be a top jewellery brand.

And they are small in size, easy to transport, and don't worry about profits. So I hope to work with you to set up a Mars jewelry company to sell Mars diamonds and gems. ”

"Good idea." Chen Mo nodded. I have to admit that Alexander is really going to do business.

"It’s really nice to get Chen’s appreciation.” Alexander was overjoyed, taking two long boxes out of his pocket and placing them on the table solemnly: “This is the three emperors green and three pinks I collected. For loose diamonds, Chen should be useful."

"Amount! How much?"

"A glass of wine." Alexander picked up the red wine at the table and drank it: "I will go to Huaxia for two days to talk to you in detail. Now I will not bother you and Ms. Mo.

At the end of the space conference, a global protest against the marching ant group announced a demonstration of the ownership of Mars.

In the Western world and on the Internet, all protesting against the marching ant group has the voice of Mars. Some demonstrators have blocked the stores of the marching ant group and forced the offline stores to close.

It’s just that all these actions don’t work much.

From the beginning to the end of the marching ant group, they ignored the protesters.

No matter how troublesome they are, they can't change the fact that the marching ant group has already controlled Mars.

Chen Mo will not pay attention to the voice of these protests.

At this time, Chen Mo is conducting a meeting...

Although Chen Mo owns a planet and is self-contained, money does not make any sense to him. But technology is for human progress, it must be in line with society, and money still has to be.

"Our development of Mars has reached a new stage. The first city of Mars, the construction of Yingcheng City is completed, the project is mature and can be announced. You must now assist Zhao Min to let the Mars project enter the eyes of ordinary people and use Mars. Commercial profitability."

Chen Mo clicked on the platform in front of him, and the projection of the entire Yingcheng City floated in the middle of the conference table.

A large complex on the plains of Mars.

In the project of Yingyingcheng, the executive ants are not informed.

Moreover, Mars has been hit by asteroids until now, and it is not too long. Even if such a large building is built on the earth, it is impossible to complete it in such a short period of time.

"Boss, when was it built?" Li Lingfeng was a little shocked.

"It has been built for a while, built with new technology." Chen Mo said.

“What technology is so powerful? Can you build a city in such a short time? The infrastructure madness is not so crazy.”

"Nanobot technology."

Chen Mo let the ink girl release the video of Yingying City, and she was shocked by a underground bus.

Comparable to miracles.

Have you ever seen such a rapid construction of a city and playing games?

"Also, the first generation of super-light-speed communication has been successfully installed. Now, between the Earth and the Moon and Mars, the construction of instant messaging has been completed."

Another shocking news, collective petrification in the conference room.

Super light speed communication?

This is something I didn't even think about before.

"Isn't it said that the material that carries the information cannot exceed the speed of light? How is this successful?" Lin Zhiyuan blinked his eyes, unbelievable.

Learning technology is not very likely, the boss's research has gone beyond the scope of their knowledge.

"This is related to artificial intelligence. I have successfully used quantum computing to create artificial intelligence awareness and find ways to induce entangled quantum state changes without letting the quantum entanglement state disappear. There is no transmission of energy and matter, in theory, and Does not violate the basic rules." Chen Mo said.

Artificial intelligence awareness.

The upper level of the army ants, now numb, is not strange.

Listen to the name to know the meaning of this technology.

They are all senior executives of the marching ant group. They know the existence of super quantum computers. Many other top technologies know a lot. Their artificial intelligence has developed to such a terrible point.

Although I don't know how Chen Mo did it, each of the three technologies revealed is a cross-century achievement.

It’s just this shocking news, so it’s not easy to be announced by the boss, and it feels so good.

It is also a super-light speed communication, but also a quantum consciousness, a Mars city, and a nano-robot. The amount of information received today is a bit large, and everyone feels dizzy.

"Boss, are you sure that you are not a god?" Wang Sijia swallowed his mouth and looked at Chen Mo with his eyes burning.

"Ordinary people."

Ordinary people?

The people on the field all rolled their eyes.

Within an hour, they announced the news of super-light-speed communication, nano-robots and building a Mars city in a short time.

This is simply a science fiction movie.

Who is this ordinary person, who believes?

"I have never seen an ordinary person who can transform the planet and build a city on Mars overnight." Wang Sijia looked at Chen Mo admiringly.

"..."

Zhao Min, who is surrounded by Chen Mo, is speechless and ignores Wang Sijia’s gimmick: “The next step is the commercialization of Mars. Any suggestions for the profitability of the Mars project can be raised.”

"Mars travel."

"Mars jewelry."

"Mars volcanic mud beauty."

"Mars mineral water."

"Volcanic rock sample."

"Volcanic plants."

Wang Sijia seems to have beaten chicken blood, and a series of words are drawn in his mouth. He can't stop it, and he is very excited. Suddenly, Wang Sijia felt that she had thought of a wonderful business project and started to shoot.

"Mars Real Estate."

The scene was quiet in a moment, everyone opened their mouths, didn't know what to say, and stared at her, speechless.

Lao Luo and others around her couldn't help but give her a thumbs up.

"Is there any problem?" Wang Sijia saw the strange look of everyone, restored the appearance of a well-behaved, a look of a lady: "Isn't these projects very good?"

Zhao Min saw Wang Sijia's appearance, couldn't help but laugh, and trembled.

"Mars travel, Mars jewelry is okay, other projects collapsed. Now Mars is not settled, the cost of going to Mars is also expensive, Mars real estate projects, Shantou is enough, the market is not big. But dozens of sets, sell billions, It’s okay to buy those who have money and identity. After all, some people have more money to spend.”

chapters.title: Chapter 711: : Buy A Mars Villa And Send An Alien Wife
chapters.body:
Chapter 711: : Buy A Mars Villa And Send An Alien Wife

Like Mars mineral water, returning a ship from Mars, even if it is more expensive, the profit is too low and the effect is not great.

After the discussion at the meeting, Zhao Min finally made the first stage of the Mars development project, including the Mars research base, jewelry, Mars travel and Mars real estate.

The idea of Mars commercialization is being carried out vigorously by the marching ant group.

Zhao Min requested that the specific plan and plan of the project be handed over in the shortest time. In just three days, all project plans were completed.

She is the person in charge of the flying ant space, and the flying ant space is the most direct bearer on the Mars project. Fei Ant Aerospace is responsible for two projects, research bases and Mars tourism.

“Now there are already some international space agencies to contact us to inquire about the Mars research cooperation project. I have prepared three options for renting, selling and research sharing.

First, we built the bases for rent to them as research institutes and did not provide research equipment. Second, we built the Mars research base and sold them to us for 50 years and recovered.

The third is the cooperation mode of the moon, let them buy tickets to station in the Mars research base, and share all the research data. Tickets to Mars, food, equipment transportation costs are calculated separately, they are responsible. ”

"According to your thoughts." Zhao Min said.

It is what she has to do to cultivate the high-level independent decision-making ability. She can't manage every project, and the marching ant group is too big, she can't manage it.

"The Mars tourism project is similar to the lunar tourism project. Both can be used for reference. This project is very mature." Li Ruoxuan said.

Zhao Min looked at Li Lingfeng.

The tentative price is 6 billion and the property rights are 70 years. As a residence, research facilities cannot be built. At the same time, we provide long-term rental and short-term rental villa business, as a rental place for Mars tourism, which can be connected with tourism projects. ”

Zhao Min turned his eyes to Julie.

Julie sorted out the ideas and spoke.

"Inkwoman assistant said that for geological reasons, there are few diamond mines and gemstones on Mars. At present, only a small diamond mine and a small gold mine have been discovered. No jade has been found yet. The rock formations and the rock formations inside the ancient Martian volcano are being explored.

I have already negotiated with Roche about the details of the cooperation. The newly established jewelry company is called Galaxy Jewelry. ”

“Today, all the development projects of Mars will be announced, advertising and publicity will keep up, let the outside world see how we develop Mars.”

Zhao Min immediately made a decision.

It was decided that the department responsible for these projects began to work in an orderly manner.

......

Zhang Xinxin carefully watched the advertising video of Galaxy Jewelry. She served as the vice president of Galaxy Jewelry Huaxia District, responsible for the consumer market.

After years of exercise, although not familiar with management, there are also some concepts.

Zhao Min transferred her to serve as the vice president of Galaxy Jewelry, directly at the speed of light. Many people in the company don't understand, and behind the discussion and questioning whether she can do this position.

Now that the Galaxy Jewelry brand has just been founded, it is up to her to be able to make a blockbuster.

Brother and Zhao Min have had enough training and help for her.

"Wang Hua, this publicity program is good, let people release." Zhang Xinxin signed his name on the plan and handed it to her assistant.

......

Under the night sky, two men and women embraced each other and looked up at the stars. Suddenly, the man kneels down on one knee and raises his hand to pinch the brightest star. Like the magic, the stars are drilled, turning into a diamond ring, holding the diamond ring in both hands and putting it in front of the woman.

"You are the most embarrassing star in my eyes. Galaxy diamonds, diamonds from the stars."

......

Space Space Station Hotel, experience the fun of weightlessness, appreciate the face of Mother Earth; lunar base, see the moon ecology, enjoy the endless universe of the Milky Way; Mars travel, experience the second life-giving planet of the solar system, watch the sunset of Mars, you are also an alien people.

The universe is so big, are you going to see it?

"This promotional video is barely available. Just put this video ad on it." Li Ruoxuan made a promotion advertisement for the extra-territorial tourism project, and attached three beautiful locations with some beautiful Martian landscapes and starry sky pictures, which is very attractive.

......

Li Lingfeng squinted at his face and finally gave the advertisement directly, letting the propaganda department put it on the Internet.

This group of propaganda personnel is doing a lot of publicity programs on the tall, and occasionally weird, anyway, the contrast is cute, can attract the attention of traffic news.

Netizens who like to browse the news platform and social platforms suddenly found that on the hot search list and the news platform, the advertisements of the marching ant group increased.

Marching ants group enters real estate?

The eye-catching title, when many netizens enter the connection page, the real estate promotion graphic of the marching ant group is very simple in design, and the advertising words are clearly visible.

‘Yingxiang Mansion, Mars Seaview Villa, limited supply of 20 sets, 1 million per square, you can’t buy a loss, you can’t buy it...’

Simple and rude advertising words, everyone collectively petrified.

Below the promotion text is a cover video of the ad on the tall.

Mars rotates quietly, the lens zooms in, Mars sea, sparkling, gentle breeze, you can also see the grass under the sunset, a futuristic villa, located on the Martian Sea, through the glass window, you can see The layout and design of the futuristic into the villa.

Suddenly, a word with a loud voice appeared: Ying Gong Mansion, buy a Mars Villa, and send an alien wife.

The person who saw the advertisement almost vomited an old blood.

......

famous.

The Mars project of the marching ant group is a popular network.

On the day of the advertisement, Galaxy Jewelry received a large number of customized consultation rings for wedding engagement rings and wedding rings, and even some paid for the full payment in cash, in advance, only to get the ring at an early date.

The promise that once gave the man the star to give ta can be realized.

The diamonds from the starry sky are full of enough gimmicks, meaning enough, difficult to mine and rare enough.

The employees of Galaxy Jewelry went to work on the first day, and they were so busy that they were so tired that they had a face from day to night.

As for the craziest Mars real estate project, it attracted all the people.

The less serious advertising words, the price of the expensive to the heavens, became the focus of the public discussion, but also shocked the ability of the marching ant group. Other space agencies, even a simple Mars base, do not have the ability to build real estate projects on Mars and sell them externally.

On the day the ad was released, a prince of the Arab royal family who likes space tourism announced that he would buy the first house of Mars. Soon after, the European Roche family Alexander announced the purchase of a Mars property...

In just one day, there were 4 sets of 20 sets of Mars real estate projects, which attracted a lot of sensation.

......

"You are going to live on Mars?"

Chen Mo and Xiao Yuxi looked at Xiao Man, and they were a little surprised.

Xiao Man suddenly came over and thought it was something that was important. I didn't expect it to be this matter.

"Yeah, can't you? Sister, brother-in-law." Xiao Man looked at the two with hope.

"No, now professional astronauts are not going up. If you go up, there are too many unmeasured factors." Xiaoyu didn't think about it and refused directly.

This sister, I really dare to do anything.

"sister."

"It’s not a good idea to call a sister. You are not a big boss. You can’t be willful.” Xiao Yu said.

"I have gone up both in space and on the moon. Mars should be fine. Can the environment on Mars be complicated by the moon?"

Xiao Man still does not care.

"Now the brother-in-law company, Mars tourism is hot, I am on Mars, become the first Mars tourists, can advertise for the brother-in-law's Mars travel, and now I am also a fan of tens of millions of net red anchors."

"No."

"Sister, you talk about your sister, can't even have confidence in your own projects? Space travel, moon travel so many times is no problem, Mars you are not once again let the space shuttle pass, very mature." When the goal is turned to Chen Mo.

"Don't pull me up, convince your sister, your sister promised, I have no problem."

Chen Mo smiled, using a toothpick to take care of the apple with a fruit platter.

"Sister~~~"

Xiao Man opened the spoiled mode, the sound of the hair, let Xiao Yu a bit.

"Small, I have a goose bump." The unparalleled side of the mathematics that followed the ink girl couldn't help but spit.

"Little girl, hurry to learn. Sister ~ ~ I have even gone to space, the moon has also been. More than a lot of professional astronauts have experience, training so hard, just want to see it!

The brother-in-law’s company is so powerful that the safety of Star Trek is better than the car. There is also a safety cabin and double insurance. Later, maybe my brother-in-law will take you to Mars for a sweet trip, right? Brother-in-law. ”

"..."

Chen Mo was happy at once, Xiao Man pulled him up again, and the angle of this problem was not a general drill, and he dug pit to him.

"There is this idea."

"Look, my brother-in-law said that I will take you to Mars in the future. Don't you go? Sister~~" Xiao Man grabbed the key and asked the little fisherman.

"..."

Xiao Yu was asked.

This girl will actually set the way, put Chen Mo in, and Chen Mo came back to say that it is for this routine. If Chen Mo wants to accompany her in the past, she will definitely not refuse.

"Is that sister not answering yes?"

"First go and tell my parents clearly, my parents promised to go, or they will worry." Xiao Yu said helplessly.

"Space tourism and moon landing tourism are very mature. There are return-type safety cabins on the plane. Xiao Man is trained, has traveled in space and the moon, accompanied by professional astronauts and robots. It is no problem to land on Mars. Tomorrow. I will give you a bottle of advanced potency and better physical fitness."

"Thank you brother-in-law, you know that your brother-in-law is the most open-minded." Xiao Man suddenly smiled.

Xiao Yu ignored her and couldn't help.

chapters.title: Chapter 713: : Wushuang Forum
chapters.body:
Chapter 713: : Wushuang Forum

"Merco, a global physicist and a physics academic organization, jointly wrote an open letter to you, hoping that you can disclose the basic principles of super-light-speed communication and publish relevant papers to fill the gaps in the basic theory of this field."

Eating a lollipop, looking at the books on the sofa, looked up at them and smiled. "You are true love, I am an accident, do not disturb Dad and your three worlds."

Chen Mo personally sent an invitation letter.

Recalling the memory of the high school students at the same time, and the situation when they met Chen Mo last time, Li Wei also had some emotions. Unconsciously, time is so fast.

This is almost certain of the small man.

Fortunately, in the live broadcast of Xiao Man, there are mentioned excessive sub-devices, and the words "quantum" have made some physicists feel a little relieved. The quantum ghost-like ultra-long-range effect is the only phenomenon that has been proven to surpass the speed of light.

Quantum mechanics and relativity are theories that explain the rules of the universe from both micro and macro directions. They belong to two different sets of rules in the universe.

Quantum properties can be free from space constraints. There can be any position at the same time in a given space, but that is uncertain and probabilistic.

The physics community does not believe that Chen Mo now has the ability to deliver quantum at a very long distance.

The invitation letter and the unparalleled forum confirmed that the outside world began to speculate on Chen Mo's method of achieving super-light speed communication.

boom! !

Answer some insignificant questions, professional problems, and Xiao Man does not understand.

Chen Mo and the two academicians in the same position shook hands and made a greeting, then turned around and greeted several other physics representatives from various teams around the world, the top of my quantum communication team.

"Chen Chen, how did you achieve super-light speed communication?"

“What are the basic principles?”

“Is it a technique to detect quantum entanglement without letting it entanglement disappear?”

When Chen Moyi sat down and sat with him, he was a little bit eager to ask, and had several questions.

"Now there is no way to answer your questions one by one. Wait a minute, you can tell me, I will tell you on the stage." Chen Mo politely rejected the questions of several people and pointed to the host on the stage.

The host is a female intelligent robot. Chen Mo was sent to Wushu University to help him manage the school's robots. Wu Yong University Dean: Zhao Moyu.

The name was taken by Zhao Min and Xiao Yu. When he heard it, Chen Moile could not.

However, the university is open for the unparalleled. The three women are the main characters of the education unparalleled. The name of the provost robot, Chen Mo naturally has no way to oppose it, nor dare to oppose it.

For Chen Mo to use the intelligent robot, to serve as the provost of the top universities, many people were surprised at first, and then there was no opinion.

Because they soon discovered that half of the professors in Wushu University were mentored by intelligent robots.

In order to facilitate student identification and identification, each robot's design style and appearance are different.

The explanation given by the headmaster of the University of Musou is that the subject education of the school transcends the current level of education of human beings.

There is a lot of knowledge in textbooks, even the professors of top universities don't understand. Therefore, the school currently uses intelligent robots as a mentor to train the first generation of talents.

In Wushu University, the status of intelligent robots is the same as that of human beings. Therefore, students of Wushu University are not strange to intelligent robots and will not be excluded. They will be treated as normal people.

These artificial intelligence robots have the intelligence that is not low.

When the forum was quiet, the provost Zhao Moyu held the microphone opening.

"Hello everyone, I am Zhao Moyu, the provost of Wushu University, a female intelligent robot. Today is a special day, the opening time of the first unparalleled forum, the forum will be hosted by me. Below is the president of Chen Mo, the first unparalleled forum. Conduct an opening speech."

chapters.title: Chapter 717: : No Double Prize
chapters.body:
Chapter 717: : No Double Prize

"I saw the situation of Yingxiang City with everyone yesterday. I will not go out today and broadcast a special program for everyone."

Sitting on the back chair, he made a cup of hot tea.

Mars' gravity is much better than the moon's, and her body has been developed, so after reaching Mars, it quickly adapts to the gravity environment here.

She came to Mars without experimenting and other experiments. Her mission was to broadcast live to the fans of Mars.

"Is it broken again? Little scorpion!"

"Your brother-in-law can't wait to catch Mars to hit your ass, do you want to break the news?"

"You are a little bad, very bad, but I like it."

......

When Xiao Man entered the live room, the barrage instantly became lively.

These days, the news broke, and all kinds of black technology made people change the advanced level of the technology of the marching ant group.

Now I heard Xiao Man said that the first thing I thought was that Xiao Man had to break new technology.

"I didn't expect it to burst."

Xiao Man glanced at the barrage.

"Now on Earth, it is the opening time of the "Women's Forum". The brother-in-law will hold a lecture on 'Super Lightspeed Communication Theory'. There is an era of advocating science, science is the best, and scientists are the best idol stars. Listen Listening to the epoch-making 'Super Lightspeed' lecture is good for us, so today everyone will watch the lecture of the brother-in-law."

Xiao Man will switch his live video to the live broadcast of the Wushuang Forum.

"Yesterday, didn't you ask me the principle and theory of super-light-speed communication? Now I have shown you the live broadcast of the unparalleled forum, listening carefully and knocking on the blackboard."

Chen Mo’s unparalleled forum is being broadcast live around the world.

Chen Mo has already stood on the stage at this time, facing the lens of the world.

The guest's ceremonial speech ended, Chen Mo paused, waiting for the applause of the venue to fall.

He convened this forum, and it was not a simple lecture to get a ‘super-light-speed communication theory’. Naturally, there are other plans.

When you start the ‘unparalleled forum,’ you have to let the unparalleled forum have some things that have been handed down. Otherwise, after a one-time carnival, you will be forgotten. This is not what Chen Mo wants.

What he needs is to make the unparalleled forum the world's top academic forum and the most authoritative academic platform.

After the applause of everyone was extinguished, Chen Mocai solemnly spoke.

"I am holding a unique forum today, the purpose of which is to provide a platform for academic exchanges in this war-torn world. I hope that all researchers, in this troubled world, should not give up their pursuit of academics, and should not give up using scientific research techniques to benefit mankind. .

In the future, the unparalleled forum will be held every two years. It is hoped that the unparalleled forum will continue to play its role in human science research and provide a fair, open and inclusive academic exchange platform for researchers around the world. ”

Having said that, Chen Mo stopped and swept in the meeting room before he started.

“At the same time, I will set up a ‘unparalleled award’, select various scientific fields, contribute to humanity, and make the most attention to scientific discoveries and achievements. I will set up a special fund to provide special prizes for the awards.”

When Chen Mo’s words were exported, the entire venue was in a state of turmoil.

The quiet meeting place has become noisy, and many people have already whispered.

Careful interpretation, Chen Mo's words can be a lot of meaning.

The top talents from all walks of life around the world can naturally hear the meaning of Chen Mo's words.

“The amount of information is a bit big.”

“Chen Mo is trying to replace the Nobel Prize to create the highest academic award?”

"Listen to this."

“Overview of the global scientific community, it is only Chen Mo who has the ability, strength and authority to set up a new award. After all, the Nobel Prize has been subjected to more and more external interference over the years, and it has lost its purity and Authoritative. There are new awards."

Some academic masters on the field began to whisper.

In the past ten years of the Cold War between the United States and the Soviet Union, the Soviet Union developed many top-notch and epoch-making scientific achievements, and even once surpassed the United States in strength, but in that decade, the number of Nobel Prizes in the Soviet Union was zero.

In these decades, China's academic research is also a top-notch presence in the world, and there are many new discoveries, but the number of Nobel Prizes is still very small. The Chinese members of the Nobel Committee are even less pitiful.

There are also scandals of various awards such as the Peace Prize and the Literature Prize, which makes its purity and authority collapse. The award loses its authority and loses its true soul and meaning.

Moreover, the number of winners of the Nobel Prize is limited, and in modern research with teamwork as the core of research, the restrictions are very large. Winning the Nobel Prize is often not the top technology in the field.

“Here, I announced that two years later, when the unparalleled forum will be held again, the unparalleled award will be officially awarded. The unparalleled forum will end, Wushuang University will invite experts from the world of science to select and form unparalleled committees to evaluate global research projects. Selection.

The findings and research results of my personal laboratory do not enter the assessment. Successfully entering the research results of the winners, the discovery staff or the research team will receive 10 million Huaxia coins. ”

When the words came out, the scene was awkward.

After the energy revolution, the world economic crisis, the reshuffle of the international economic market, and the international monetary system have long since changed, Huaxia Coin has become one of the two major trading currencies, and its value has increased, more than five times higher than before.

The bonus of 10 million Huaxia coins may be a drop in the ocean for Chen Mo, but for the general research team, this is definitely a great bonus.

Moreover, Chen Mo is an award established by the general figures of the scientific community.

"There is power."

"Chen Mo is good."

"With my unparalleled, it is the highest pursuit of the scientific research team. With this pursuit, science will continue to advance."

"The significance and authority of the Nobel Prize, although touted by ordinary people, but in the academic world, in addition to the physics award and the medical award, other awards have long lost its authority, like chicken. And no computer award, mathematics award, biology Scholarships, etc., can't keep up with the times."

After Chen Mo confirmed the establishment of the ‘unparalleled award,’ the people watching the live broadcast were extremely excited.

This is an epoch-making forum, and they seem to witness a legendary award that has risen from here.

"Why are my father named after me?" The unparalleled audience in the audience shouted at Xiao Yu.

"Because Dad loves you very much, and the name has a special meaning." Xiao Yu said softly.

"Why don't you use the name of Dad? Call Chen Mo." Unparalleled thought: "It is exactly what Dad founded, no one else will object, and Dad is so powerful."

"Your father's achievement does not require an award to pass on his name." Zhao Min smiled.

"I don't need that."

Unparalleled look at the father on the stage.

"Know that you don't need it. Your father's naming of this award is that the winners and teams are as unique as your name." Xiao Yu explained.

"I don't want to be unique. I want my mother to have a few brothers and sisters to play for me."

"Ha ha ha ha..."

The style of painting changed a bit fast, Zhao Min was amused by the side, Xiao Yu was funny and helpless, and gently knocked on her head twice.

On the stage, Chen Mo’s establishment of the award has been explained.

This unparalleled forum has attracted the attention of the global academic community. Chen Mo’s opening speech at the Musou Forum proposed the establishment of a top-level award, which made the atmosphere of the unparalleled forum more intense and full of vitality.

At the end of the opening speech, according to the agenda of the forum, the next lecture was Chen Mo’s ‘Super Lightspeed Communication Theory’, which is the highlight of the forum.

chapters.title: Chapter 718: : Screaming Einstein-Newton Superposition
chapters.body:
Chapter 718: : Screaming Einstein-Newton Superposition

The lecture on "The Theory of Superluminal Communication" is the highlight of this unparalleled forum.

Attracting the attention of the global academic community, especially the physics community.

If there is a super-light-speed particle, the general theory of relativity collapses and the foundation of the physical building will be shaken. Once you lose your faith, the consequences are terrible.

If it is about the application of quantum entanglement, it is also a huge breakthrough.

For the first time, the application of quantum inspiration to the state is applied to the physics. This is a breakthrough across the ages, and humanity is further stepping away from the mystery of quantum mystery.

Either way, this lecture has a profound role in the development of physics.

No one doubts the problem of speed of light, because Xiaoman is now on Mars. According to the distance from Mars to the Earth, the transmission of ordinary communication signals now takes about 10 minutes, and what Xiao Man is doing is real-time live broadcast.

This has proven the existence of super-light speed communication.

Chen Mo holds the super-light speed communication technology. On the stage, even if he is arrogant, no one will doubt the true and false of technology.

This is an academic forum for global live broadcasts.

At the forum, more than 200 of the world's top physicists and experts and professors were concentrated. It is impossible to sit on the seats without a little strength.

The hair is white, the thick glasses, the smart top, the savvy, the serious expression, etc., the impression of the ordinary people on the top researchers, the corresponding characters can be found in the seats, but there are many young people only 40 or 50 years old. Expert professor.

The atmosphere was very serious, and the observers in the audience did not dare to speak out loud.

Chen Mo let the robots on the field begin to teach the experts and distribute the paper lectures and manuscripts. The audience in the audience also has a lecture.

On the title of the cover of the manuscript, it is the "basic basis of quantum sensing based on quantum entangled state and super artificial intelligence". The authors are Chen Mo and Mo.

The length of the paper is not long, only 10 pages.

But this is a short paper that chronicles the basic theory of the foundation of human superluminal communication.

"The title of this paper has a feeling of unclearness."

"I know all the words in the title of the paper, but they are connected together. Why can't I understand?"

“The June graduate tells you that this scene reminds me of the thesis defense scene, and now there is a bitter feeling of heartbreaking.”

"Hurry to take Chen Mo's paper to check the weight (dog head body)."

"Don't throw a bomb at the forum. After a few decades, your children and grandchildren will thank you for your great contribution to them. Half of the physics book."

"In high school, I hate Newton's law of thermodynamics. I hate Newton's calculus at the university. It is estimated that my children and grandchildren hated Chen Mo, and they rubbed their faces manually."

Some reporters get the documents and papers of the lectures, put them in front of the live footage, or take photos with their mobile phones and post them to the network. Under the global attention, the cover of the paper was released, and it was made into a variety of expression packs by countless people, spreading in the circle of friends and social platforms.

At the unparalleled forum site, Chen Mo’s lecture has begun.

When Chen Mo took the ink girl to the podium, everyone was holding their breath and swaying.

"Hello everyone, I am very honored to be here today to explain to you the topic of 'super light speed communication theory'. I am Chen Mo, who is by my side, is another protagonist of this research, the subject is me and her. Work together. During the explanation process, you can ask me questions at any time. If you can answer them, I will answer them one by one."

The beginning of Chen Mo’s brief introduction also allowed people all over the world to re-recognize the ink girl who almost existed like Chen Mo’s shadow.

I thought this beautiful woman was Chen Mo’s personal assistant secretary, a confidante, and one of the researchers who did not expect such a powerful and epoch-making achievement.

"Relativity is one of the foundations of physics. The speed of light is the limit of material speed and has become a recognized truth. Over the years, the scientific community has experimented with the spirit of questioning and exploration. Many research teams and individuals have done experiments. I hope to find a material particle that exceeds the speed of light, but unfortunately, no success.

When exposed to super-light speed communication, many people have strong doubts and curiosity about this technology. Is technology a fake? Or is it that I found the existence of superluminal particles?

The real answer is that the technology is real, and I have not found the existence of superluminal particles for the time being. But how do you achieve super-light speed communication without super-light-speed particles? This is related to another set of rules of physics, quantum mechanics.

The quantum entangled state is the only phenomenon in the natural world that confirms the existence of superluminal velocity. The super-light-speed communication instrument I developed is based on the nature of quantum entangled states...."

Chen Mo took out the laser pointer and clicked the button.

The holographic light curtain falls on the stage and shows a dynamic PPT with the quantum of the entangled state.

"We all know that quantum has a special property. The entangled quantum is divided into two parts, separating the two places. When we change half of the state, the other half will become the same state at the same time, not The effect of the spatial distance between the two. This property provides a possible basis for the development of super-light speed communication.

However, once the quantum entangled state is detected by the outside world, it will lose its entangled state and become a fixed state. How to determine the state of quantum and let the quantum remain entangled is a key issue. ”

Having said that, all the experts on the field stopped to look at the manuscript and seriously looked at Chen Mo.

The ones mentioned above are for the explanation of ordinary people. They all understand, and then, it is the key to technology.

This problem has always been a problem that plagues the physics community. Solving this puzzle is the answer to super-light-speed communication, but for a long time, no team has been able to determine the state of quantum without letting the quantum entangled state disappear. Variety.

"On this issue, I have used the results of another research topic, super artificial intelligence."

Super artificial intelligence?

The term appeared, the scene began to commotion, and some computer experts and artificial intelligence researchers in front of the live and live screen immediately began to work.

They have heard of advanced artificial intelligence, an artificial intelligence that is quite human, and the current research on advanced artificial intelligence in all countries is progressing well.

Now Chen Mo gives a concept of super artificial intelligence.

Does the theory of superluminal communication involve the computer field?

"Super artificial intelligence is a new product that I developed after using quantum computers combined with artificial intelligence. It is smarter than advanced artificial intelligence and can learn the way of thinking in the human brain. Quantum entangled states cannot be detected, so I use quantum sensing quantum. The method uses super artificial intelligence to sense changes in quantum states.

Note that here is the change of the quantum state, not the state of quantum, and the induction is not the detection. For example, Einstein and Newton are better behind me, and then they are in the 'quantum entanglement' state of Einstein-Newton, and they have quantum 'intelligence' between them. Once I turn to look at them, they will be shy and the state of telepathy will disappear. ”

When Chen Mo said, the ink girl was in control, and the animation of Chen Mo was played behind him. It was just the 'quantum entangled state' of the 'Einstein-Newton' hand in hand that Chen Mo said. The style of painting was too beautiful, causing the scene to burst into laughter. .

"Now I am a good fight, let the machine switch them in two boxes, one to Mars and one to the earth, but I don't go to see who they are in the earth, who is on Mars.

Then I used the iron rod to hit the box of Mars, and the ‘people’ inside would make a scream. At the same time, the ‘human’ telepathy on the earth would also make a scream.

I didn't see who was in the earth box. I was not sure who was inside. They still had the entanglement of ‘intelligence.’ When I heard the screams, they changed from the beginning of the 'Einstein-Newton entanglement' to the screaming Einstein-Newton entanglement.

For me, they are still in the 'entangled state', because I didn't look at them, they are not shy, the telepathic entanglement has not changed, I am not sure who is in the earth box, who is in the Mars box, they are still 'Einstein-Newton superposition state'.

But I can control the iron bars, control the iron bars or do not hit the box, carry out multiple sets of experiments, four Einstein and four Newton groupings, paired in pairs. The screaming state group is 1, and the ‘not screaming’ state group is 0. This arrangement of the code, not screaming - not screaming - not screaming - screaming, is 0001, followed by traditional communications. ”

Chen Mo describes it, and the holographic picture behind it is also interpreted according to his statement.

The witty cartoon picture, but it makes people feel unbearable and impressed.

"66666."

"Newton and Einstein's coffin boards can't be pressed."

"The basics of overflowing the picture..."

"When the physics class heard sleep, if there was such a physics teacher, 985, 211 would be my choice."

"Screaming Einstein-Newton superimposed state? No, I have not saved. Hahahahaha..."

"The picture is too beautiful to bear to look straight."

"He also said seriously."

"The original quantum entanglement can still be explained..."

Countless people were thrown at the beginning of the cartoon style, but after the beginning of the funny, the talent behind is slowly serious, began to think about the meaning.

“Chen Chan, you just said that super artificial intelligence ‘sensing’ entangled quantum state changes, why does super artificial intelligence “sensing”? How to make artificial intelligence to sense?” On the ladder seat, a physicist asked questions.

"This is another subject of research. In the research of artificial intelligence, I found that quantum computers and artificial intelligence, combined with special quantum algorithms, can be modified to create quantum consciousness. This is equivalent to the position of 'I'. Quantum consciousness goes 'listening' to the screams of the Einstein-Newton superposition state, without looking at them, their entangled state will not disappear."

"Chen Chan, according to what you mean, what do you mean by super artificial intelligence, can I understand it as a kind of conscious artificial intelligence?" another quantum computer expert asked.

"Yes, you can understand this."

Oh...

The scene exploded in an instant.

chapters.title: Chapter 719: : New World Of Light Speed ​​Communication
chapters.body:
Chapter 719: : New World Of Light Speed ​​Communication

Chen Mo has mastered the super artificial intelligence with consciousness.

Artificial intelligence that is conscious and thinking?

This news blasted in the minds of the global audience. Reminiscent of conscious artificial intelligence, many people would think of the Skynet in the Terminator, as well as various sci-fi movies, want to control human robots.

People watching the live broadcasts around the world almost panicked on the spot, just like the sky fell.

The outside world is crazy speculating about super artificial intelligence, but the unparalleled forum scene, but after the turmoil, once again restored calm. The technology of the marching ant group is a bottomless pit. It never knows what other technologies Chen Mo still hides.

Chen Mo’s lecture on super-light speed communication is still going on.

"The quantum consciousness of super artificial intelligence is an indispensable part of super-light speed communication. In my current research, I only found the method of 'quantum consciousness induction', which can sense without affecting the quantum entanglement state. The change in quantum entanglement state."

After Chen Mo simply answered questions about artificial intelligence, he continued to return to the topic.

"This process is equivalent to using a quantum system composed of multiple quantum entangled states to perceive changes in a single entangled quantum state without detecting its specific state..."

In this lecture on super-light-speed communication technology, Chen Mo chose to explain the basic principles in an easy-to-understand way, language and examples, and avoid formula calculations as much as possible.

This lecture is aimed at ordinary audiences, and strives for the general audience to further understand the mystery of quantum and make science one step closer to life. Experts and professors on the field have relevant basic theoretical papers in their hands, and there are professional answers.

If you explain in depth, it involves advanced quantum algorithms, super artificial intelligence algorithms, super quantum computers, quantum chips, quantum entanglement distribution, quantum cages, and intelligent consciousness creation.

These contents, formulas and algorithms are all the knowledge that the current scientific research personnel have not mastered. Even if Chen Mo is now speaking, the people on the field do not understand, and they are also playing the piano. If you talk about it in detail, you may not be able to finish it in one year.

In 40 minutes, Chen Mo explained the basic theory of super-light-speed communication, supplemented by the interpretation of holographic animation, and the whole process was vivid.

"The next question, you can ask us questions, we try our best to answer you." Chen Mo called the ink girl to the side, facing the entire hall, in front of him, mainly from the global physicists.

The physicists on the field face each other. In the papers published by Chen Mo, there are some new formulas and theories. These are not available in the basic theory of the quantum mechanics system. Without careful calculation and research, it is impossible to debate with Chen Mo.

An old man with eyes and a shirt raised his hand. He is a quantum physicist from abroad, Martinis.

"In your paper, there are no experimental techniques and methods, and there is no super artificial intelligence technology. How do we verify the super-light communication experiment you said?"

His words were translated by the robot and the audience could hear it.

"In this experiment, only the equipment in my laboratory can carry out relevant experiments. The paper is written on the most basic theory and principle, and does not involve related technologies. If verification is required, we can directly connect to the Mars base. Chen Mo said.

“Why not publish the intelligent awareness technology and quantum sensing method that you want to close? This helps quantum research.” Martinis continued to ask.

“This has involved a deeper level of technical confidentiality, and those technologies are private research results, not shared technologies such as basic theory and principles.”

When Chen Mo’s words fell, applause sounded on the field.

The basic theory and principle of super-light-speed communication is announced to tell the scientific community that on the other side of the physical ocean, there is a new continent of 'super-light-speed communication'. With this method, we will move in this direction. Sooner or later, we can find the continent. However, Chen Mo will not release all the shipbuilding techniques unselfishly, because he is also one of the adventurers.

Einstein can publish the energy equation, but it will not announce the technology for making nuclear bombs.

Reasonable refusal also allowed some people to take the idea of technology from Chen Mokou.

"In the future, I will gradually publish a deeper layer of quantum mechanical equations and quantum algorithms and other basic theoretical principles, and write textbooks into Wushu University. Later generations learn these algorithms and basic theories, and later study what, then look after Human R&D capabilities."

When Chen Mo’s words came out, he once again attracted intense applause.

The deeper layers of quantum algorithms and equations, just this achievement, can rival any physical great, even though Chen Mo is already a living physics legend.

The debates and questions and answers on the floor continue.

With realistic technology, Chen Mo’s answer, no one will question.

In the combination of super-light speed communication, quantum computer and artificial intelligence, everyone on the field is a student, and Chen Mo is the teacher.

"Next, we can see the connection with Mars on the spot, experience the use of super-light speed communication, and have an instant dialogue with Mars." Chen Mocha nodded.

The ink girl will know and drop a holographic light curtain.

The live video of Xiao Man is directly popped up in the light curtain.

"Hey, isn't it necessary to connect to Mars to station the base? The light curtain of the forum, how is my live room? Isn't it a mistake?"

The live broadcast of Xiao Man, seeing the live broadcast of the holographic light curtain on the live broadcast of the forum, scared a big jump, and fooled around with the camera to see if it was wrong.

The picture of the busy and messy scene attracted the laughter of the forum.

The barrage of the live broadcast room is also ridiculous.

"Now are you not on Mars?"

"Your brain is watt? You are at the base of Mars, a ready-made communication screen."

"You still don't know if you are using super-light speed communication?"

......

"Oh, yes, I am on Mars."

After the little man knew it, he stopped playing with the camera's hand and made a greeting to the camera.

"Hello everyone, I am now in the center command room of Mars stationed base, and now it is 3:17 pm in the capital time."

This is the first time that Mars has been connected to a public official occasion. This formal occasion is used to prove the existence of super-light-speed communication. The applause from the forum has already sounded.

“How do you feel at Mars?” Chen Mo asked.

"The feeling of Mars? Lighten, direct weight loss success. I am more than 100 kilograms, only 40 kilograms left on Mars, the body is light and fluttering, especially magical." Xiao Man directly picked up a scale and stood up, and also shot Align the displayed numbers.

"Outside the base?"

"I was wearing ordinary protective clothes yesterday and went out with an oxygen cylinder. The atmospheric pressure is low, like in the highlands. I can also move normally without wearing a spacesuit. I also saw the grass growing on the Martian ground. Now around the base, I have grown a lot of grass and a few trees."

Xiao Man pointed the lens at the window, and he could see the green and several saplings on the ground.

"The sky is still gray and the weather is not stable. There are a lot of clouds on the side of the Martian Sea. There was an artificial rain last night."

A few words of conversation, indicating too much.

The super-light speed communication can mature application, and the development of Mars by the marching ant group is beyond the imagination of others.

After the simple connection, Chen Mo’s unparalleled forum theme lecture officially ended.

chapters.title: Chapter 720: : President Chen Mo
chapters.body:
Chapter 720: : President Chen Mo

When Chen Mogang left the lecture hall, a group of reporters had already waited in an orderly manner at the door. When Chen Mo came out, he shouted and asked.

Upon seeing it, Chen Mo also stopped and suppressed the crowd to calm down.

The scene was quiet and calm down.

A recent reporter hurriedly said: "President Chen Mo, why do you want to create a unique forum?"

Black Hawk and others blocked in front of Chen Mo, maintaining the order of the scene, and took a small microphone and handed it to Chen Mo.

"Ordinary people need a better platform and channel to understand the progress of science and technology, and to bring technology closer to the lives of ordinary people, so that technology can develop faster.

Let technology be closer to ordinary people, not to ordinary people. In the future, let ordinary students chase science with the attitude of chasing stars, then science will win. ”

After Chen Mogang answered, another reporter began to rush to ask.

“President Chen Mo, what do you think of the students who have often been admitted to Wushu University to take some partial courses, low scores and some special skills?”

Chen Mo looked at the reporter who asked the question and smiled politely.

"I have thought about this problem. In my school, there is no bad student. The students admitted to our school, even if the grades are not good, but there must be a talented skill on the one hand, which is appreciated by the school, so the students who enter the Wushu University are in me. None of the eyes are ordinary students.

Even if a few or two rely on luck to enter the University, it is part of their strength. Today, the school is their luck, maybe tomorrow they are the luck of the school. ”

"You don't worry about the poor grades and quality of students, can't keep up with learning, and thus affect the quality of students at the university?"

“If a school only relies on the best students to maintain the school’s strength, it’s not that the school is strong, but the students are excellent. Because her students are the best performers before entering the school, the school is strong. Of course, of course.

If you are afraid that some students have low scores, not good enough, and fear that losing a good student will make the school ordinary, and even have confidence in making their students better, this school is not really strong.

I believe in the education and teaching ability of Wushu University. Even if the students are ordinary, Wushuang University has the confidence to make the students excellent. As a university, we are not looking at whether students themselves are excellent, but to make students better. This is our task. ”

Some reporters on the field were so bright that they fell into thought.

The students at the University of Wushu, who were on the scene, began to applaud and scream with pride. This is their school, this is their principal.

“How do you see some unfair problems in education today?”

"The only thing in the world is absolutely fair, and that is death."

“You mentioned conscious super artificial intelligence in your speech. You developed super artificial intelligence. Are you afraid that artificial intelligence will get out of control? Does super artificial intelligence cause a crisis for humans?”

"There is no absolute good in the world, and there is no absolutely bad tool. The quality depends on the person who uses the tool. The energy equation is used. It is a nuclear power plant. If it is not used well, it is a nuclear weapon that destroys human beings. Artificial intelligence is used properly. It is the greatest boost to the rapid development of mankind. The key is the person who uses it, not its own good or bad."

“But super artificial intelligence is conscious? Will it actively betray humans?”

"No, the process of creating quantum consciousness is very special. It cuts off this possibility from the source. It is a kind intelligent life and is very friendly to us."

Chen Mo does not worry that the super artificial intelligence in his hands will destroy humanity.

At present, only he masters the methods and techniques for creating quantum consciousness, and the popularity of super artificial intelligence technology. In the future, quantum computers have been widely used. In the future, quantum encryption, network and information will be very safe, and artificial intelligence can not control the network and create large-scale network intrusion.

"Why are you so sure?"

"Because it was created by me."

"Your lecture is over, some people have already opposed super artificial intelligence on the Internet. What is your thought?"

Chen Mo smiled and said without a thought: "Everyone has the right to accept and reject. If you are worried about the sun exploding and destroying the sun, it is no different from the end of the world. In the future, the marching ant group will develop a research standard for super artificial intelligence for research. Use the reference."

“How was Super Artificial Intelligence created?”

"This is a technical secret."

Chen Mo stretched his finger to his mouth and made a squeaking gesture. He smiled politely at the many reporters and turned away. The ink girl followed him.

I left a group of questions that I didn’t ask, and I was still asking the reporter.

There are too many questions. If Chen Mo is standing here to answer, I am afraid that tomorrow, there will be questions that cannot be answered.

......

The forum process of the unparalleled forum includes the opening ceremony of the forum, the award-winning awards, themed lectures, the awards dinner, the unparalleled dialogue, the release of scientific and technological achievements, the science and technology exhibition, the debate of young scientists, the future prospects and the closing ceremony of the forum.

The forum is three days long and has different content arrangements every day.

However, Chen Mo just held the first unparalleled forum, just announced the establishment of the unparalleled award, and has not yet selected the results of the unparalleled award, so there is no award-winning awards and dinners.

In the future, Chen Mo does not appear in the theme lectures. This session will be won by the unparalleled winners and will be given to the general audience for their own research topics.

The subject does not have to have a lot of formulas, mainly for ordinary people to understand.

Chen Mo just used the popular language to tell the webcast of peaceful and accessible people, which is to make these sciences close to ordinary people.

The purpose of the forum is to promote science.

The most eye-catching forum for this unparalleled forum is the Science and Technology Exhibition Area.

Because the world is in the midst of war, companies in other countries are inconvenient to send high-tech products to the exhibition. Therefore, at the site of the unparalleled forum, only the marching ants group and several top domestic companies will send the products to the exhibition.

There are exhibition areas of physics, chemical materials, biology, medicine, mathematics, computers, robots, energy, etc., all of which are filled with top-notch technology products.

Large-scale steel armor and super-light quantum communication equipment, as small as a cubic centimeter of new materials, nail-sized chips.

It contains almost all of the leading technologies of the marching ant group leading the world.

Wushu University has a full-time school holiday today. The students from the various colleges of Wushu University are gathered in the exhibition area to watch the latest technology products.

In the position of the steel armor, almost no water is leaking, everyone is competing for a photo.

"The principal is here."

"The principal is here."

"..."

Excited shouts resounded throughout the exhibition area.

For a moment, students who were still watching various science and technology, all turned back, and came to Chen Mowei.

Chen Mo, the principal who rarely appeared, was in their eyes a god-like figure.

Chen Mo said that Black Hawk and others do not need to block these students: "Students, I am not a giant panda, don't be on the lookout, what to do."

"President, we want to take a photo with you." A courageous boy shouted.

"this is okay."

Chen Mo took the selfie stick of a girl next to him, and the students at the back rushed over and stuffed himself into the camera.

After ten minutes, I took a few photos and signed the name. Chen Mocai successfully got out and came to the front of the steel armor.

"That classmate wants to put on the armor to try?" Chen Mo asked the armor.

"Wow!!"

"I, I, I."

"President, I am..."

"..."

Crazy screams, shaking the entire exhibition area.

When Chen Mo left Wushuang University with Wushuang and Xiaoyu, it was already night.

The first day of the unparalleled forum ended, and everything that Chen Mo needs to say has been fully expressed. Then there will be other people presiding over the forum to continue, and then come back to the end of the speech.

When I returned to the villa, the ink girl and Chen Mo said a good news: the oxygen generator that captured the decomposition of carbon dioxide and sulfur dioxide was completed.

chapters.title: Chapter 721: : Do The Officials Want To Create A Race?
chapters.body:
Chapter 721: : Do The Officials Want To Create A Race?

In front of Chen Mo, it is a basin-sized instrument.

The shape of the instrument is strange. The middle of the ring is hollow inside. It is filled with a red transparent liquid. The whole is a thumb-sized tube. The center of the instrument is a fan. Below the fan is a large tube. The inside of the tube leads to the inside of the ring.

This instrument is an oxygen generator.

Chen Mo is used to accelerate the conversion of Mars carbon dioxide into oxygen and accelerate the transformation of Mars atmosphere.

The liquid in the tube is a catalyst that captures carbon dioxide and sulfur dioxide in the air, makes the molecular structure more active, and then conducts electrolysis to decompose carbon dioxide into carbon and oxygen.

"Run and try."

"it is good."
