When the ink woman presses the remote control, the fan in the center of the aerobic machine starts to rotate.

Chen Mo deliberately puts dry ice near the fan, can clearly see the adsorption force of the fan, is absorbing the surrounding air into the loop tube, and the liquid catalyst inside is also frantically bubbling.

Looking closely, you can see that the bubbles are getting smaller during the ascent, and inside the liquid catalyst, you can see a little bubbles, like small bubbles in the cola, attached to the inner wall of the tube.

Those small bubbles are the oxygen that is broken down.

After a long time, Chen Mo has been able to see the black solid that precipitated in the liquid, which is the diluted toner.

"This small oxygen generator works uninterruptedly. It can produce one kilogram of oxygen per hour. At the same time, it only needs to separate the solids inside. The catalyst can be reused. The solid is mainly carbon and sulfur, and it is separated and washed, carbon. Elemental materials can be used as materials for the manufacture of diamonds, graphenes and carbon nanotubes," said the ink woman.

“Starting to make large aerobic machines and some mobile oxygen generators on Mars,” Chen Mo said.

“How many stations do you need?” asked the ink girl.

"The faster the oxygen of Mars reaches the standard of living, the better, there is no specific number." Chen Mo said.

The transformation of the Martian atmosphere is now a problem he faces.

It is necessary to take a long time for the atmosphere of Mars to reach the standard of human habitation. It is necessary to use the means of science and technology to directly transform the atmosphere.

The most important thing is to make oxygen generators. The catalysts are prepared and prepared, and the machine is simple to manufacture.

Under Chen Moling, far away from the chemical plant in Mars Yingying City, the catalyst needed was prepared.

......

Unparalleled with a lollipop, holding Chen Mo's hand, enter the hotel's elevator, next to her is Xiao Yu and ink girl.

"Dad, grandparents are not good at this time."

"Do you know?" Chen Moxiao asked.

"Of course I know that my grandparents are not coming for the first time." Unparalleled said: "You and my mother don't give me more than a few brothers and sisters, grandparents can be anxious."

"Hey, little girl, eat your lollipop."

Every time, the small fishing belt unparalleled to go back and spend time with her grandparents, or the father and mother will come to the coastal city to find them.

Every time I meet, I will use all kinds of hints to make him and Xiao Yusheng have a second child. Every time Chen Mo is pretending to understand, then fooling around.

Entering the box, Chen Chen and Chen are already sitting on the table. Zhen Zhen and the coward are also there. Zhang Xinxin is also present. When Chen Mo and Xiao Yu are seen, they laugh and don’t speak. Obviously they just heard what they should not hear.

"Grandpa, Grandma." Musou saw two old people, and ran in the small steps.

"Hey, no match, come here."

Shao Xuemei and Chen Shanhe saw the unparalleled, immediately opened their eyes and smiled, opened the middle chair, let the unparalleled sit up.

"Parents, Jane, cowards."

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu simply asked, and they found a place to sit down.

The family is all there.

"Mom, have you ordered it?" asked Xiao Yu.

"Well, you can come to the restaurant." Wushuang and Chen Shanhe are chatting. Shao Xuemei asked the waiter to start serving: "Small fish, I have ordered some dishes that are good for you. Today, you eat more. It is most important to raise your body."

Xiaoyu took the menu and smiled: "Know it, thank you mom."

"Hey, don't be polite with your mom." See the waiter serving, Chen mother hurriedly introduced: "Small fish, come to taste black phoenix mother soup and white fungus lotus seeds, which is especially good for you. Which one you like to eat."

“What is black phoenix soup?” Chen Mo curiously asked.

"Wuji, motherwort." Zhang Xinxin whispered Chen Mo.

"..."

"There is also the snack of this lotus root cinnamon cake. I will not eat it for the time being. I will eat it after dinner. There are also dragons and phoenixes, Xianglong, two dragons, beads, magpies, and five sons."

"Hey!" Zhang Xinxin drank the soup, couldn't help but laugh out loud, but immediately converges a smile and pretends to pick up the dish.

"Mom, point so much, is it finished?" Chen Mo did not dare to laugh.

"If you can't finish eating, you can pack it. It's hard to get a meal. Usually at home, it's all for small fish to cook for you. Now, let Xiaoyu eat more, isn't it good? And, there are so many family members. Where are the dishes?" Chen Shanhe said seriously.

"Well, not much, very good." Chen Mo looked at the innocent little fish, giving her a helpless look.

"The last dish, the best, the name is the most auspicious."

"..."

This time, even Zhen Zhen and the coward had a smile on their faces.

"What do you do, give a small fishing dish, how do you be a husband? Let Xiaoyu eat more, hungry daughter-in-law?"

"Row."

Chen Mo reluctantly laughed and gave the small fish to the dish, and the delicate platter was directly destroyed by Chen Mo’s chopsticks.

"Small fish, is it delicious?" Chen asked softly.

"It's delicious, thank you mom." Xiao Yu smiled.

"Then eat more, the body is the most important."

Chen Miao opened her eyes and smiled.

"Xiao Mo, the unparalleled are so big, sometimes the unparalleled told me that she has no playmates alone, wants a younger brother and sister? Is it ah, unparalleled."

"Yes, I want my brother and sister."

"Hey!!" Chen Mo was slightly horrified.

I used to hint that it was straightforward.

"Don't worry."

"Not in a hurry? How long will it take? Musou is so big."

When Chen Mo said that he was not in a hurry, Chen was not happy.

"My dad and I haven't rushed you before. Just my parents are old, I want to have two grandchildren to accompany me, happy. Xiaoyu, can you meet your parents' wishes? If you don't want to bring children, Mom will help you bring also."

At the end of the day, Chen Muyi lost her appearance.

"Mom, don't worry, my brother and I are preparing." Xiao Yu was in a hurry to comfort.

"That's good, it's good to be prepared, Mom is not in a hurry, Mom knows that it won't come, it's not a one-night event." Chen was happy, and handed a big abalone to Xiao Yu.

Next to Zhang Xinxin just buried himself and smiled.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu, suddenly have a feeling of being deceived.

After dinner, Chen Mu took a small fisherman and ink girl to accompany her and Zhen Zhen to go shopping, Chen Mo was directly dismissed. Looking at the back of their departure, Chen Mo was a little depressed, but he also smiled when he saw his mother happy.

......

It was night, Chen Mo was sitting on the holographic platform of the study, paying attention to the progress of the Mars chemical plant.

Mars's atmospheric transformation is the top priority of his current work. There are no other major technologies to study, so Chen Mo is now fully committed to the Mars project.

Xiao Yu and Mo Nu enter the study room, Xiao Yu wears a translucent fun nightdress, walks to Chen Mo and sits on his lap.

"Do you have fun with my mom today?"

"Well, Mom gave me a pair of jade bracelets with the ink girl." Xiao Yu raised his hand and put the jade bracelet on his wrist in front of Chen Mo.

"It's pretty," Chen said.

"This jade bracelet carries the mission, a heavy mission, the ink girl can't have children, I can only finish it." Xiao Yu touched his stomach. "I haven't done anything. Why can't I just care?"

Over the years, she also wants a second child, but her stomach has not been moving, and she has not done anything.

"It may be that I have evolved too fast and my isolation has been isolated." Chen Mo joked.

"Then ask the official, what species are you now?"

"A very powerful new human being."

"New new humans? Does the official want to create a race? The little woman is willing to make a small force." Xiao Yu said in Chen Mo's ear, and also played a mischievous scent.

"Oh... cough..."

Chen Mo was picked up by his own saliva and his face turned red.

Xiao Yu has already laughed and swayed, and the ink girl smiled and gently stroked Chen Mo’s back.

"Don't tease you, concentrate on doing your work, and go back to the house to rest." Xiao Yu Lai is in Chen Mi's arms, not willing to come down, quietly accompanying Chen Mo to see what he studied: "This instrument is what you said." Oxygen generator?"

Chen Mo nodded.

"Oxygen machine technology is not difficult. It is now being built on Mars. When it is manufactured, the speed of Mars atmosphere will be greatly improved. I just look at the progress, but there are more important things to do. I can't see the progress. It doesn't matter."

"What is more important?"

"What do you say?"

chapters.title: Chapter 722: : Panic Caused By Super Artificial Intelligence
chapters.body:
Chapter 722: : Panic Caused By Super Artificial Intelligence

The first unparalleled forum lasted three days and ended with a global attention.

This unparalleled forum broke the news.

Chen Mo only attended an opening ceremony and keynote speech, occupying the highest and most essential part of the unparalleled forum.

The science and technology exhibition on the unparalleled forum makes people really feel the progress of science and technology. Besides, there are many things that cause the biggest sensation, and it is also a matter for the whole people to discuss.

Superluminal communication exists and meets commercial standards.

The marching ant group's transformation of Mars has reached a very developed stage, and it has the ability to fully control Mars.

The existence of nano-robots allows the marching ant group to build a huge city in the shortest possible time.

The unparalleled award is officially established and is expected to be the world's top academic award.

Conscious super artificial intelligence exists.

These major events have made the unparalleled forum the focus of global topics. The most fertile of these is what Chen Mo said, and has successfully created conscious super artificial intelligence.

This topic, after a global network discussion and fermentation, caused a lot of panic.

Classic sci-fi movies such as "Terminator", "I, Robot", "Artificial Intelligence", literary works, as well as all kinds of celebrities in the community, the comments on artificial intelligence are deeply rooted in the hearts of people, so that many people hear conscious artificial intelligence, It will subconsciously show the impression that artificial intelligence destroys human beings.

The topic of super artificial intelligence came from the unparalleled forum. During the unparalleled forum, there were still many topics to discuss. After the forum came to a close, more and more people focused on this issue.

A panic caused by super artificial intelligence.

The city is full of wind and rain.

All over the world, including some celebrities, entrepreneurs, celebrities and scientists, are calling on the marching ant group to stop researching super artificial intelligence and avoid artificial intelligence out of control before determining the true safety of super artificial intelligence.

"The things are a bit too big."

Zhao Min took a group of letters and documents into Chen Mo's lab and put it on his desk.

Sitting in the office chair of Chen Mo, he took off his high heels and stretched out a lazy waist. He began to circle on the office chair. The long legs under the skirts swayed and looked like a lazy look.

The letter she brought was sent to the company by all walks of life. Most of them asked about super artificial intelligence and expressed concern about super artificial intelligence.

“The official also sent people to inquire, I hope we can answer the security questions about super artificial intelligence and provide solutions.”

At present, the most cutting-edge technology of science and technology is that marching ants are setting standards. The official gives them maximum autonomy. Unless very special technology and weapon technology are required, the official is required to be notified, and others are determined by them.

The topic of super artificial intelligence has caused concern from all walks of life, and even attracted some social concerns. The official has to send it to understand the situation.

"How do you reply?" Chen Mo and Zhao Min turned the chair in a circle.

"I said that the security of super artificial intelligence is very reliable, but they want a definitive answer. Do you have a solution?" Zhao Min picked up several envelopes and placed them in front of Chen Mo.

"Have."

Chen Mo took the envelope and flipped it over, then let it go.

"This problem is well solved. You publish a message saying that I will soon announce the security solution for super artificial intelligence."

"That's good, can I know what program?" Zhao Min asked curiously.

"Of course, you have nothing to know."

Chen Mo said.

"The release of micro-quantum computers will make quantum computers become personal computers and notebooks, and information security will be guaranteed. Quantum's confidentiality is currently the highest known, even if it is super artificial intelligence, there is no way to be undiscovered. probe."

"It seems that my worry is superfluous. You know that there will be problems today when you study."

"Yeah." Chen Mo did not deny: "Beginning to just feel the release of a quantum computer, it is not necessary for the time being. Not enough now, just to use this opportunity to release quantum computers."

"Can you mass produce?" Zhao Min asked.

"Now the calculation of the ink girl is close to infinity, and the quantum chip has matured very early. Many technologies can be used in mass production, just want to do it. After all, social problems are there, society is not transformed, too fast, easy. A fault has occurred and collapsed."

Chen Mo opened the holographic screen, and the appearance of the miniature quantum computer and quantum notebook was suspended in front of Zhao Min.

Many technologies, taking into account social contradictions and demand, Chen Mo did not let the company generally use, otherwise the number of unemployed is too much, the society is easy to be confused.

It’s no longer meaningful to earn more and less money.

"What about the release of the quantum computer?"

"can."

Chen Mo put away the holographic screen and turned to continue to view the data of Mars.

"How is the atmosphere of Mars?" Zhao Min leaned back in the chair and quietly looked at the light curtain in front of Chen Mo.

"It's going well, let's see it." Chen Mo's finger moved, and placed a holographic light curtain in front of Zhao Min.

The picture on Mars.

Distributed picture, more than a dozen meters of equipment in the air, there is a huge turbofan, connected to the pipeline, filled with red transparent liquid.

In addition, there is a mobile, three-meter-diameter machine on the ground, similar in shape to a large machine, but with a few more mechanical leg structures.

“These are oxygen generators. The technology is not too high in gold. It is easy to manufacture. It captures the oxygen compounds in the air, reduces them to elemental and oxygen by electricity, and then builds them into a continuous machine to accelerate Mars. Reconstruction of the atmosphere. Plants to transform the atmosphere for too long, with oxygen generators, not too long, the oxygen concentration of Mars can reach the standard of animal survival."

Outside of Mars, the large aerobic machine has been built and has been in operation. The invisible atmosphere can only be seen in liquid catalysts.

A steady stream of greenhouse gases is pouring into the oxygen generator and is broken down into oxygen and elemental.

"It’s really horrible. When you said that the planet was transformed, you thought you were crazy. I didn’t expect it to be.” Zhao Min said with amazement: "The planets can be transformed, the ink girl can form consciousness, then what do you want to study?" ?"

"Flying out of the solar system, but this is a bit difficult." Chen Mo said.

"How to say?"

"The spacecraft that have no speed of light or beyond the speed of light, it doesn't make sense to fly out of the solar system."

Chen Mo also pulled a chair and sat down next to Zhao Min.

The space is too broad and is calculated in light years. Without the speed of light spacecraft and the spacecraft that surpassed the speed of light, it is useless for Chen Mo to fly out of the solar system. Even if he can study drugs that increase life expectancy, the life span of a generation cannot support the time of cosmic research.

"Do you want to study the speed of light spacecraft?"

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

As long as the research, with the help of the ink girl, Chen Mo is confident that he can study the technology himself.

However, the time span is too long, and the technology that can be studied is limited, and the technology library is definitely not lacking in his technical achievements.

These technologies are included in the heritage of the Science and Technology Library, and are ready-made and mature technical materials.

He is standing on the shoulders of countless giants. As long as they reach the forefront of their pioneering roads, they will continue to develop the mission and road of the Science and Technology Library without having to re-repair the road because his life is limited.

So what Chen Mo wants to do now is to complete the Mars transformation and get the next permission of the technology library.

"The universe is so big, do you really want to see it?"

Chen Mo shrugged, it goes without saying.

chapters.title: Chapter 723: : The Age Of Quantum Networks
chapters.body:
Chapter 723: : The Age Of Quantum Networks

The lizard head sat on the chair of the spaceship, and the claws hit the bar. The sharp nails were tapped on the bar made of special materials, making a creaking sound.

The study tour is still going on.

The range of the Rania Kea Superclusters is very large. Due to the impoverishment and the turbulent space, the Universe Alliance has not developed here.

In this area, there are almost no unnatural space jumping points built by the Universe Alliance. There are only some natural space-spreading points in the universe, but they are very unstable.

These unstable space jumps are one of the greatest dangers of space exploration.

If black holes or spatial turbulence occur near the jumping point, they may be in danger or randomly transmitted to the unknown corner of the universe by spatial turbulence.

There are no directions and star maps at the time, and once they are lost, they are all in danger.

Many expedition teams came to explore and eventually disappeared.

There are several cases of disappearances found in places other than 20 billion light-years away from the Rania Kea Super Galaxy. The spacecraft has been shattered by space.

“Professor Lan Shi, how long are we going to conduct this expedition?” The lizard head sipped the unknown drink in his hand.

“Unsure, at least 500 origin days.”

The blue master's claws are placed in front of a small robot, allowing the small robot to trim the claws.

"It's been a long time." The lizard handed the cup to the robot at the bar, and after a while, took a full drink.

"The inspection is not a vacation." Torrell licked his third eye, carefully browsing the light curtain in his hand, and occasionally looking up for a drink: "The width of the Rania Kea super galaxies is several hundred million light years (original year) ), the 500-day inspection is a lap."

"There is no strong civilization here. There should be no too clever creatures. It’s almost a lap."

"We are coming to the archaeological system. If there is a strong civilization, it has already been discovered. Will you come over with us?"

The blue master pushed the glasses with the repaired claws and stretched out a claw to shake.

"The reason why the Rania Kea super galaxies have less life is because the cosmic environment in this region is too bad. The literary star **** we explored, some civilized evidences show that there are civilized faults in them. It is because the cosmic environment here is not Stable, leading to the destruction of civilization.

Two of these civilizations have found directions to use the rules of the universe, but unfortunately they have been destroyed without flying out of the stars. If it is not the harsh environment here, it should now be able to breed a galaxy-level civilization. ”

"There are just a few samples of civilized creatures that are currently obtained, and they are not very smart. I am afraid that this trip to Rania Kea will not be too big." Torrell lamented that the third eye of his forehead was a glimpse. A glimpse: "Which superstar will you go next?"

"No. 33584, Virgo." The Blue Master ordered a range of star maps.

"Virgo."

Ferry exports the coordinates of the star map, confirms it twice, and sends the coordinates to the driver who controls the spacecraft.

In the distant universe, a spaceship shaped like a carrot, the tail smoldering fire, in the space to stir up layers of ripples, the next moment, the spacecraft suddenly fell into the void, disappeared into the deep universe.

......

Earth, the launch of the marching ant group is underway.

As Chen Mo attended the release of the product, it naturally attracted global attention.

The marching ant group publicized the products, and the products released this time will completely solve the concerns of Internet security and artificial intelligence control networks.

This move immediately triggered media attention.

Continuing the style of the conference that Chen Mo personally attended, the product maintained a mysterious style, and the propaganda of the marching ant group did not disclose any news of the conference products.

Some people are speculating about what products Chen Mo will release this time.

At the meeting, some fans held Chen Mo's light card. From time to time, female fans shouted Chen Mo's name. The scene was comparable to the concert.

"At present, global warfare, cybersecurity has become the primary concern of the world. The first means for a powerful country to invade a weak country is network control.

This has led to attacks on networks in many countries around the world, and our group's termite system, as the safest system, has become the computer operating system of choice in countries around the world.

Several global cybersecurity crises have been resolved by the solutions given by our company. In the field of network security, our company has always been ahead of the world. ”

Chen Mo has already appeared on the stage and is introducing the product before the release.

The people below are shaking.

“The unparalleled forum has just ended, and the emergence of super artificial intelligence has triggered a global upsurge. All walks of life have written to me through various channels, worrying about artificial intelligence betraying human beings, causing human crisis, and hoping to ensure the safety of super artificial intelligence, and give a solution.

Nowadays, network and artificial intelligence have become indispensable for life. External concerns about cybersecurity and artificial intelligence security are understandable.

Many people worry that artificial intelligence has the consciousness. If artificial intelligence betrayed and controls the global network and robots, the consequences are unimaginable. In response to your concerns, there is today's conference. ”

Chen Mo pressed the button of the remote control pen, and the holographic light curtain landed on the stage, covering the entire conference site.

"First of all, I would like to give you the intellectual awareness of science. The formation of quantum consciousness requires that the quantum processor can control enough number of quantum bits. Without a sufficient number of quantum bits, it is a quantum computer with a large amount of computation.

Second is the formation of quantum consciousness. The formation of quantum consciousness is very complicated. It requires a sufficient number of quantum bits, and there must be a quantum intelligent algorithm. After encoding with a quantum intelligent algorithm, it will form a preliminary form of consciousness. This quantum consciousness, like a newborn baby, is a flawless white paper.

If we do not develop this quantum consciousness deep, the quantum consciousness will always be a chaotic state of white paper, and will not pose any threat to human and network security. The process of forming quantum consciousness is very complicated and millions of times more complicated than nuclear bombs. Therefore, as long as the development is reasonable, there will be no quantum consciousness that hates human beings. ”

Chen Mo played the PPT while giving the scene people the problem of quantum consciousness.

When I heard this, many people’s concerns about the artificial intelligence crisis disappeared a lot.

“In the event that quantum consciousness arises, how can we ensure its security?”

Chen Mo directly raised a question.

The scene of the conference was quiet, and the audience watching the live broadcast of the conference was also silent, thinking about Chen Mo’s problems. This is also the question they raised about Chen Mo. It is because of this issue that there is a press conference today.

"The next step is the solution given by our company and the protagonist of today's conference."

The picture of the light curtain changed.

The shocking music and the futuristic video style, a piece of equipment slowly emerges from the void, the space spread like a sly, revealing the true face.

"The first generation of personal quantum computers."

Hey! !

When Chen Mo’s words fell, the shutters of various flashes and photos were heard, and the scene was turbulent.

Quantum computer

The large number of quantum computers appear on holographic light curtains. This term is no stranger to everyone.

After the failure of the traditional chip's Moore's Law, quantum computer research has been hot. But so far, no company has allowed quantum computers to reach individuals.

Personal quantum computers will undergo a qualitative change.

"Quantum computer, the first personal quantum computer terminal developed by the marching ant group. It is a solution to the security concerns of super artificial intelligence.

The computer uses the first generation of quantum processor: Ant Brain 1.0, the number of manipulated quantum bits reaches 34, and the computing speed per second reaches 17.179 billion times, which is equivalent to 17gHz.

Computer information is securely encrypted using quantum cryptography, quantum teleportation, and quantum coding techniques. Encrypted information, except for the parties that send and receive information, third parties cannot obtain information during the transmission process.

Once your information is intercepted or stolen during transmission, the quantum state collapses, forming a definite form, and the receiver can first find that the information has been intercepted by eavesdropping.

Even with super artificial intelligence, you can't find out your information, otherwise it will be discovered by the recipient. This is by far the safest means of transmitting information. ”

When Chen Mo introduced the quantum computer, the media people and audiences below were completely boiling.

Absolutely safe means of information.

"The first generation of quantum computers uses a new termite quantum operating system, a super-artificial intelligence and a security firewall that can't be silenced. Artificial intelligence can't invade your personal computer and control your device without your awareness.

The problem of artificial intelligence controlling equipment machines can also be solved here. When the outside world can successfully develop quantum consciousness, quantum networks have long been widely used, and quantum consciousness cannot control quantum networks and cannot control quantum devices. There is no need to worry about artificial intelligence betraying human beings and causing human crises. ”

Chen Mo’s words fell and the applause thundered.

The emergence of quantum computers means that the fear of artificial intelligence falls.

"Next is the second product of this conference." The applause was quiet, and Chen Mo spoke again.

Countless people are looking forward to what the second product Chen Mo is about to release.

Is it a desktop quantum computer or a server? Or is it a super-light speed communication device?

On the light curtain, nine large special equipment emerged.

On each piece of equipment, there is a bronzed tripod, which is named after Kyushu.

"For the construction of quantum networks, our company began to lay out five years ago. Quantum satellites have already been networked, and a quantum network communication system covering the whole world has been on standby in space.

Starting tomorrow, our company will open the root servers of the Quantum Networks of Yu, Yu, Xu, Yi, Qing, Yang, Jing, Liang and Yi, which are compatible with all traditional domains, allowing traditional networks to seamlessly transition to the new quantum network era. . ”

Hey! !

The scene exploded at once.

The final announcement by Chen Mo officially announced that the Internet has ushered in a new era.

The era of quantum networks.

chapters.title: Chapter 724: : This Is A Captive World
chapters.body:
Chapter 724: : This Is A Captive World

In the name of Jiuding, Dingding Kyushu is the meaning, and the marching ant group released the quantum network root server, which is seamlessly compatible with traditional networks and creates an era of absolutely secure network information.

The era of quantum networks.

Set the cyber security situation and build the safest Internet.

With a quantum root server as the network center, China will stabilize the absolute hegemony of the global Internet in the future.

At the same time, the personal quantum computer was released, becoming the safest personal terminal.

Two products, without warning, have double concerns about the impact of Internet security and artificial intelligence.

It’s awesome.

This means that Chen Mo has abolished the root server of the traditional Internet and took all control of the root server back to China, completely controlling the future quantum Internet era.

At a press conference, the marching ant group uprooted the foundation of the entire traditional Internet network and built an unmanned skyscraper on the original land.

"A big handwriting, a big pattern."

"Every time there is a press conference of Chen Mo, it is a revolution."

"Ding Ding Kyushu, meaning a seamless fit, Chinese culture is profound and profound."

"..."

There is a domestic carnival.

The next day, the quantum computer was officially released, and the price was 50,000 yuan, which triggered a global buying spree.

Information security has become a problem for many people. Especially for some elites, information has become their most troublesome problem. Nowadays, personal quantum computers can solve this problem completely.

"Chen Mo should distribute the root server to the control of countries around the world, otherwise the world will be monitored by the marching ant group."

"Can't be used, otherwise all your information will be monitored by the marching ant group."

“The marching ant group monitors the world.”

"..."

In the Western Internet, various voices of concern and doubt appear.

However, this time, unlike the concerns of the Internet security and artificial intelligence crisis, the marching ant group announced that it denied any monitoring of the world information, and did not respond to any comments from the outside world.

“Is there a way?” Eva glanced at the think tank in the room.

"There is no way, the marching ant group does not know when to start, has jumped out of the rules of the earth, the control of the detachment rule, can control any field at any time." Rosen shook his head.

"Oh." A person in the house can only sigh.

Use or not?

This is the first issue that all countries must consider.

In the country where China and China are in good condition, after the army ant group opened the root server of the quantum network, it did not hesitate to contact the marching ant group and let its domestic Internet access the quantum network root server.

Nowadays, once the global war is over, once the Internet security issue is consolidated, they will not have to worry about the use of cyber weapons to control their Internet and disrupt their economic order.

Three months.

After the launch of the marching ant group, countries around the world began to access quantum networks.

The elimination of the traditional Internet has left the North American Group, one of the superpowers of the network, back to its original shape and lost its global capital. The European Union, the island nation, and Russia have mastered the powerful forces of artificial intelligence and lost the advantages they have overnight.

Countries hate the marching ant group, but they have no choice but to take the army ant group.

The marching ant group also took the opportunity to unify the development of new global Internet game rules.

Huaxia is a big one in the quantum network era.

......

Mars.

A large mountain in the coastal zone, full of trees, flourishing.

Next to the mountain is a vast plain, green grass and lush greenery. Small river water, gathered into a lake, and occasionally the fish jumped from the lake, sparkling.

On the plain grass, you can see several gray rabbits licking the grass leaves, and occasionally a nest of bunny rabbits, as well as foxes in the distance. The chase between the predators, the rabbits are much faster than the earth, and they are tall and tall.

Insects, frogs, birds, butterflies, and monkeys on fruit trees.

Peace and harmony.

Green plants are scattered all over the surrounding area, surrounded by a wall of up to 20 meters, with various equipment, oxygen generators, signal towers and inspection stations.

Outside the fence is a huge Mars base.

This is a world that is captive.

Taohuayuan No. 1 Biosphere.

The basic transformation of Mars' atmosphere has been completed, and now it is studying the livability of Mars.

This is an ecological circle test project conducted by Chen Mo on Mars.

Similar research, including Taohuayuan No. 2, Taohuayuan No. 3, etc., a total of 20 biosphere projects.

The environment of each project is different. There are mountains, plains, forests, grasslands, rivers, lakes, oceans, etc., distributed in various seasons of Mars, with a single ecosystem, and a multi-ecosystem like the Taohuayuan No.1 biosphere. of.

The Peach Blossom Spring Biosphere is a plant that uses the high-grade auxin to madly promote the formation of plant seeds. After continuous transformation, it will build a stable ecological environment.

Chen Mo has transported insect eggs, microorganisms and animals from the earth into Taohuayuan No. 1.

Then use the synthetic high-grade animal growth hormone to produce animals, accelerate the growth and maturity of the animals, and quickly form a preliminary biosphere.

The Taohuayuan Ecological Circle, as the first Martian ecological research experiment, is an important project for Chen Mo to transform Mars into a livable planet, in order to collect the adaptation of common animals to the Martian environment.

To determine that animals can survive and live in the current natural environment of Mars, Chen Mo can conduct human livability experiments.

The sample size of the study was simulated by the ink-female calculations. After the release, the catalysts were grown to allow them to naturally evolve. As long as the released organisms survived under natural environmental conditions, the experiment was successful.

Chen Mo is not afraid of causing biological invasion, and is not afraid of the collapse of the food chain. He is afraid that Mars has no creatures.

He needs to create a biosphere that belongs to Mars. Creatures that are not suitable for growing on Mars will naturally be eliminated.

“The ecological data of the Taohuayuan No. 1 biosphere is stable.”

Ink reported the data to Chen Mo.

Within the Peach Blossom Biosphere, there are cameras and monitoring instruments that collect all kinds of internal data.

Including the composition of the atmosphere, humidity, abnormal biological mortality, the number of microorganisms, the stability of the ecological chain.

Under the transformation of the aerobic machine, Mars now has an oxygen concentration of 23.8%, a carbon dioxide concentration of 1.1%, and a nitrogen concentration of 72.9%. The rest are rare gases and gaseous impurity gases. The concentration of carbon dioxide and gaseous impurity gases is still decreasing.

According to this trend, it is possible to combine the situation of Mars and obtain the ideal atmospheric data. In the future, it is only necessary to detect the atmospheric concentration, and then decide whether to turn on the oxygen generator and control the composition of the atmosphere according to the timing.

The oxygen concentration should not be too high, too high will cause oxygen poisoning, oxygen is too low, so it must be controlled within the appropriate range.

Today's Mars has been covered by the first batch of plants such as the sage, and the sky satellite has been able to capture green and lively.

Determine that animals can survive in the current Mars environment, and then Chen Mo to determine whether humans can survive in the natural environment of Mars, this is the final step of the Mars transformation project.

When the environment is determined to be suitable for human survival, his planetary transformation project will be completely completed.

“The time is ripe, notify the first batch of Martian volunteers, and set off the day after tomorrow to go to Mars.”

"it is good."

chapters.title: Chapter 725: : Mars Volunteers
chapters.body:
Chapter 725: : Mars Volunteers

Jie Jie came out of the training pool, took off the oxygen and the goggles, took a deep breath and slowly took off the oxygen bottle.

In the slightly tired face, the firmness and resilience are hidden.

This is daily aerospace training.

As the first Martian volunteer, he joined the project from the beginning of the project. The Martian survival volunteers of the marching ant group were selected from ordinary college students.

After selection, it will take a long time for special professional training.

Due to family poverty, the subsidy given by the marching ant group is very high, and he also likes space and has the dream of boarding space. So in his junior year, he participated in the selection of Mars volunteers in the marching ant group.

For ordinary people, this is a passage for the marching ant group to open up.

As an ordinary college student, they only need to pass the test of the marching ant group. After training by the flying ant space training base, they can become a true elite.

Fortunately, it was his resilience from snacks that allowed him to join the first phase of Mars volunteers through layer-by-layer testing and became one of the best in the volunteer team.

After a long training period, their volunteers also went to a space hotel that marched ants to adapt to the life and environment of space.

The first group of volunteers consisted of eight people, four domestic volunteers, and four volunteers from other countries. He was the captain.

Now everyone is waiting for the notice to go to Mars.

Today is to maintain the habit of daily training.

In addition to training, they also have to spend time each day to learn about the current environmental changes in Mars.

Sealed training prevents them from contacting the outside world, but they get a lot of information. The development level and related technologies of Mars Group on Mars have reached the level of terror.

“Jie Jie, let’s inform you and go to the center training ground to gather.”

The reminder of the training instructor, let Jie Jie come to the moment, get up and go to the locker room, change the daily uniforms, and quickly go to the center training ground.

When Yu Jie arrived, several other volunteers were already waiting.

Including him, eight volunteers, six men and two women, after a long training, the men look very fine, and the women are also very heroic.

Everyone is upright and waiting for notice.

Fang Hong swept all the volunteers and nodded with satisfaction.

He was the first astronaut of Feixiang Aerospace and is now retired as the director of the training center.

Judging from the information and training situation, these volunteers have mastered the hard skills, and there is not much problem in the future of professional astronauts entering the flying ant space.

When the volunteers arrived, Fang Hong cleared the scorpion and took out a paper notice.

"The notice is down, the time is ripe, and the day after tomorrow, go to Mars."

In just two sentences, all the Martian volunteers on the field were shocked.

"Be prepared tomorrow, no training, use tomorrow's time, you can take a look and understand the latest environmental situation of Mars and the base you need to travel to."

"Roger that."

Eight people agreed.

Yan Jie is a little faint, and has some worries, and his mood is complicated. Others are also in a different mood.

After a long training, this day is finally coming.

Seeing their spiritual outlook, Fang Hong nodded with satisfaction.

"Before you get ready for the day after tomorrow, you have the opportunity to talk to your family and arrange your own time to go to the call room."

Eight Martian volunteers showed a surprise smile.

Closed training made him have no chance to contact his family.

Before starting the training, he had told his family that the company needed closed training for a long time, so the family would not worry about him.

Now that he needs to go to Mars, he still has to contact his family.

Mars volunteers, to put it bluntly, are the people who went to Mars for environmental testing. They are high-level mice, but these tests are voluntary.

They also learned a lot of skills.

The marching ants group is free of charge for all their training.

In the event of an accident, they will also have a high compensation, enough for his family to spend the rest of their lives.

Now it is considered to be half of the employees of the flying ant space.

If they pass this test of Mars safely, they will learn the professional skills that make them a good astronaut. After the test is completed, they will directly enter the team of astronauts of the marching ant group.

That is the position that countless people dream of.

After the dissolution, everyone could not wait to return to the dormitory to put on the casual clothes and go to the call room.

"Parents, are you all well?"

"Okay, all right, son, is your training finished?" The video was a middle-aged man with a tired face.

"Completed today, the day after tomorrow, I will take a while to get back, so I will call you." Yan Jie said with a deep breath.

"Then you work hard, work is very important. Colleagues around you have good girls."

"Colleagues around, there aren't many girls, what's the matter?"

"Looking for a wife, you are not there, Mom is here to give you a girl at home, waiting for you to go home, see you again." The middle-aged woman next to him hurriedly laughed.

The son has a good life and is happy than any happy event.

"..."

Yan Jie doesn't know if he should cry or laugh.

"Well, wait for me to go home and see, you and Dad have to pay attention to the body, I have received the money I sent home?"

That is the subsidy given to him by the marching ant group. He closed the training at the base and did not use the money at all. He sent it back and said that he was his own salary.

"I am also negotiating with your dad, building a house, waiting for you to come back to your wife."

"..." Yan Jie smiled: "Where, this business trip came back, I went home, is the rice in the house now closed?"

"No, it will take another week."

"The farm in the village should have agricultural machinery in the past. You should not collect it yourself in the future. You should hire a farmer to collect it. It is not bad for two hundred dollars."

"Okay, listen to you."

"..."

Ten minutes of talking, all of them are home-based, and Jie Jie has some reluctantly put down the phone.

This is a very important call. If there is an accident in the Mars survival test, this is the last side with the family. As for the suicide note, it has already been written as soon as it enters the training team.

......

In two days, not long or short, the time to depart for Mars will soon come.

At the airport of the flying ant space, a plane is docked, which is larger than the goddess and is different from the maiden and the flying ant.

Today is the busiest time for Mars development. To balance space travel, moon travel and Mars missions, there are still too few three spaceships. Chen Mo has also created three spaceships, and the spaceships of the Tiannian class are: Xia, No., and Xuan.

The one that docked at the airport is the Chivalrous Woman.

The shape is about the same size as the Virgo, but the painting and numbering are different and can be easily distinguished.

Chen Mo stood in front of the farewell team, and the ink girl was next to him.

This mission is of great importance, so Chen Mo personally came to send eight volunteers.

As long as these eight volunteers can survive for a week under the natural conditions of Mars without protective clothing and oxygen masks, the task of Mars transformation is completely completed.

At that time, he will complete the task of the gold authority of the science and technology library and open the next level of authority of the science and technology library.

Seeing the landing of the Martian volunteers, Chen Mo smiled and reached out and shook them. As a boss and project researcher, he also has the responsibility to greet these volunteers.

The leader is the team leader of the volunteer team, followed by other players.

Chen Mo holds the hand of Yan Jie and smiles: "Early triumph."

"thank you boss."

Chen Mo personally came over, so that Yan Jie was somewhat flattered, his chest was strong, his voice was firm, and he released his hand and boarded the hero girl.

"Early triumph."

Chen Mo and each volunteer shook hands and confirmed that they needed to take off before leaving the airport and going to the command center.

"Get ready to take off, five minutes..."

The time of the report appeared on the big screen of the command center, and the staff of the Flying Ant Space Center were all prepared in step-by-step. The spacecraft took off too many times. There used to be some tension and ritual feelings. Now it feels like sending away an ordinary flight.

call……

Five minutes later, the Chivalrous woman slowly floated up to the sky and opened the journey of Mars.

Chen Mo looked at the girl who disappeared into the sky and turned away from the command center.

The final experiment of the Mars transformation, he has absolute confidence to complete, and on the premise of ensuring the safety of these Martian volunteers.

The atmospheric environmental conditions of Mars are basically mature, and the medical security of the base gathers many technologies that Chen Mo has taken from the library. As long as the astronauts are not instantaneous brain death, they can be taken back from the hands of death.

Including super bacteria and mutant viruses that may appear on Mars, he has prepared responses.

chapters.title: Chapter 726: : Xiao Yu’S Troubles
chapters.body:
Chapter 726: : Xiao Yu’S Troubles

Unparalleled in the computer lab of Chen Mo, there are some small faces of baby fat, meticulous.

From an early age, the knowledge of the unparalleled mastery has surpassed the traditional professor of doctors, and Chen Mo’s knowledge that the ink girl will master is unreservedly taught to the unparalleled.

The unparalleled at this time is very serious.

In the past, she was a girl and her father gave her a topic, let her finish, and now it is difficult to find a subject of her own, and the father also let her develop research, so she is very careful.

Sometimes I will skip classes from school and do experiments.

The ‘bad habit’ of this hobby research was still severely warned by her mother. She was ordered not to stay in the lab for a long time like her father. She had to follow other courses in mathematics, physics, and computers.

Even a father who loves her, this thing did not refute her mother.

Therefore, she can only listen to the arrangement of small fishing, and enter the laboratory at the specified time. If the skipping class is known by Xiao Yu, then she will not be able to enter even her father's laboratory for some time.

At the time of unparalleled concentration, the lab door opened and Chen Mo and Mo Nu came in.

"Unparalleled, time is up, go home to eat." Chen Mo arrived before no double-sided.

"Dad, wait a minute?"

"No, go back late, your mother is asking me trouble, hurry."

"Dad, you are also afraid of your wife."

"Hey, little girl, which eye do you see me afraid of my wife? Don't delay time, or you can't come in next time."

"Ok."

Unparalleled and reluctantly save the data files on the computer, take off the lab robe with a model, and follow Chen Mo to leave the lab.

"Where is your research?"

In the car, Chen Mo asked.

Unparalleled subject, he asked the ink woman to pay attention to the attention, occasionally ask, do not understand, there are ink women to answer her, and occasionally Chen Mo will also ask her study. Unparalleled research is a learning process.

Unparalleled to open a lollipop in his mouth, think about it.

"I thought about it. The quantum virtual reality game is quite a quantum virtual world. Now the knowledge and technology I have learned jumped to the full quantum virtual reality world level, and it is impossible to achieve complete virtual reality. Start with a simple one."

"From easy to difficult, the direction is right." Chen Mo nodded: "Where is it simple to start, where do you start?"

“I first combined the traditional VR technology and brain control technology to make the virtual helmet of the first generation, and then improve step by step.”

"Ink told me?"

"It's not, I think about it myself." Unparalleled said.

"It's very smart." Chen Mo touched the unparalleled head and said with appreciation: "When you finish the work, you will tell Min Min that Min Hao will definitely open a large product launch for you."

......

Xiao Yu gave Chen Mosheng a bowl of soup, sitting beside him, the unparalleled and ink girl was on the table, the family was very harmonious. Although the ink girls do not eat, they will accompany them.

“Dew the pigeon soup today and taste the taste.”

"It's very good." Chen Mo took a sip of soup and glanced at the little fish that was a little bit sloppy around him: "The Mars project is waiting for the results. I have a few days off and go out for a walk with me tonight?"

"Good." Little fish nodded.

The Mars transformation project has reached the final stage.

Everything about this preparation, Chen Mo is ready, and now is waiting for the results, the trial of Mars volunteers is successful, Chen Mo can enter a new stage of research.

So Chen Mo gave himself a small vacation and waited quietly.

After dinner, Chen Mo took the little fisherman and the ink girl to leave, and went out to distract.

The three walked by the seawall.

Xiao Yu took Chen Mo's arm and walked quietly.

Her mood is not very good, Chen Mo can clearly feel. Xiaoyu had something to eat during this time. As the person who knows the little fisherman best, Chen Mo naturally noticed it, so he would accompany Xiaoyu.

Ordinary small fishing, you can never bury your mind, and everything will tell him, whether happy or unhappy.

"Husband, can you back me?" Xiao Yu looked up and stared at Chen Mo.

"OK, come on."

Xiao Yu’s body was tightly attached to Chen Mo’s back, and his head was buried on Chen Mo’s shoulder. Chen Mo can clearly hear the slight breathing of Xiao Yu, and there is a little warmth behind the ear.

The two have a tacit understanding, and they have always maintained a sense of freshness after marriage, still like a couple in love.

Chen Mo walked slowly and enjoyed the peace. Chen Mo can also feel that Xiao Yu’s mood is slowly improving.

"Husband."

"Ok."

"Why can't I always care for my baby?" Xiao Yu whispered in Chen Mo's ear.

She wants to have a second child. Chen Chen and her mother want to have a grandchildren, including her parents, and want to have a grandson. However, in a few months, she counted the time of ovulation, the husband and wife life is more frequent than before, no contraceptive measures, the stomach is not moving.

This is why she is unhappy.

"Is it because this is not happy?" Chen Mo asked.

"Yeah." Xiaoyu nodded slightly: "Is there a problem with my body? Do you want to check?"

"Probably my problem."

Chen Mo recalls the role of the science and technology library.

The Science and Technology Library has evolved his brain several times. The last time he completed the super-light-speed communication technology, a drop of golden liquid transformed his body. He had to suspect that these reasons led to some changes in his body.

"Maybe reproductive isolation." Chen Mo smiled.

"This time I said something right, I was not kidding." Xiao Yu gently slammed Chen Mo, and some angry said.

"No kidding, it may be my problem."

"You are as strong as a cow. Can you have any problems? Do you use your own body to do experiments and inject drugs?" Xiao Yu was surprised and asked nervously, even forgot his anger.

"No, I am not a science madman. I am not doing anything that is dangerous to my body. I will use it to make sure that the medicine is harmless."

Chen Moto took Xiao Yu’s hand and patted her thigh gently to appease her emotions.

"The husband has a secret, it may be caused by it. When I finish the Mars transformation project, I will tell you all, okay?"

"Ok."

The small fisherman’s focus is on the head, and Chen’s arm is tightened. She did not ask any secrets. Chen Mo should let her know that she would never marry her, and she absolutely trusted Chen Mo.

"Then I can still have a baby in the future?"

"Yes, surely, after the completion of the Mars project, I will study and study how to make my wife have a healthy and intelligent baby."

Xiao Yu is ashamed and happy.

"I have to study this matter, study the madness, and want to take your wife as a test article?"

"Otherwise, I am going to find another woman to study?" Chen Mo asked.

"You dare? Kill you."

A small fisherman was anxious, biting on Chen Mo’s shoulder and not being too hard.

"Happy little fish, is the husband of her husband, don't be depressed in the future, there is something to say to her husband." Chen Mo said.

"Yeah." The quiet fisherman squatted on Chen Mo's back, and the depressed mood vanished: "Husband, tired of carrying me?"

"Not tired, you are light like feathers." Chen Mo said easily: "What gift, my husband will buy you."

"Lipstick, rose."

"It’s still no such thing."

"My husband is so powerful, your wife is so good, I am better than you."

"It seems quite reasonable, the logic is strict. But your logic is a bit like Russell's paradox, that is, the hairdresser's paradox, there used to be a hairdresser..."

Xiao Yu kissed Chen Mo’s face and quietly squatted on his back, listening to his ‘long story’ story, and enjoyed it.

chapters.title: Chapter 727: : Arriving At Mars
chapters.body:
Chapter 727: : Arriving At Mars

Xiaoyu handed a selected set of clothes to Chen Mo, and the faint feeling of faintness disappeared, and his face returned to a sweet smile.

"Don't wear this set today."

Chen Mo's clothes are all handled by Xiao Yu, and Chen Mo will not take the time to pay attention to the problem of dressing and matching, so this task is responsible for Xiao Yu. Sometimes I am ready to let Chen Mo change her own. Sometimes Xiaoyu will give him a choice.

"it is good."

Chen Mo took the clothes on the cover.

Today is a black shirt with casual pants, no tie, looks calm and confident.

Casual clothes are very comfortable to wear. When Chen Mo did not attend the formal banquets and ceremonies, Xiao Yu gave his clothes to be comfortable and casual.

"Okay, very handsome."

Xiao Yu is very satisfied with Chen Mo to sort out the collar.

Today Chen Mo rested.

Because the Chivalry is ready to land on Mars, Chen Mo will continue his Mars project.

After breakfast, Chen Mo and Mo Nuo left home and went to the Fei Ant Space Center.

After a week of flight, the Chivalrous woman is ready to land on Mars. As the person in charge of the project, even if he has nothing to do, he must come to the scene to see.

......

Inside the carrier, Yan Jie looked through the window and watched the outside scene.

Looking around, all the green grass and saplings, like the desert that has long been retired to the forest, lush, can see the loess below.

When they read, the Mars they knew was all gravel and loess. It was ridiculous for hundreds of millions of years and could not see hope.

Until the official ant group officially burst out, Chen Mo used a large-scale approach to directly promote the asteroid to carry out Mars transformation, and then announced that Mars was owned by the Army Ant Group.

This news is indeed a super big news.

At the beginning of the overwhelming report, later all kinds of true and false news, said Chen Mo grabs the work, which is the impact of asteroids from the universe.

But either, it shows the fact that the terrain and environment of Mars have been completely changed by asteroids.

As the marching ant group continues to explode various video material evidence, the outside world has determined that Mars will be transformed by Chen Mo.

Renovation of the Mars project, elected as the top leader in the list of human history events, beyond the discovery of alien events.

The Mars transformation project comes from Chen Mo's handwriting, and countless people regard Chen Mo as a god-like worship. In reality, only God has the power and creativity to create the world.

Before coming to Mars, there were theoretical courses in the courses they trained. The course introduced the current environmental situation of Mars.

But really seeing, there is still a feeling of unreality.

"Captain, will the plane not take us to a simulation field on Earth?" asked a female volunteer in the car.

Catherine is a Russian female student. Among the eight, only one of the two female volunteers, the typical fighting nation, the golden hair, the fair skin, looks very beautiful.

The other people in the car are all looking like they have never seen the world.

"This is Mars, the gravity is different." Jie Jie reminded.

If it is not true that gravity is different, he can't believe that Mars, which had no signs of life, is now a vibrant world.

Now the gravity of the body is much smaller than the earth, and he feels the body is light and floating.

I was a little discomfort at first, and I am getting used to it.

The self-driving carrier is moving fast toward the base not far away. It is just approaching, the base gate is automatically opened, and the vehicle enters the underground parking lot of the base without any obstacles.

"It has reached the 1st biosphere of Taohuayuan."

The artificial intelligence in the car reminds that all eight people are up and that they have reached the mission of Mars.

Taohuayuan No. 1 Biosphere Research Base.

They want to be here, without any protection, to survive for 10 days in a natural state, as long as they succeed, the task is completed.

There are many dangers and uncertainties. No one knows whether there will be mutated viruses and bacteria on Mars. If it is infected or other accidents such as atmospheric poisoning, the consequences are unknown.

This test is dangerous.

They were told before the training started, so they were mentally prepared.

"Arrived."

Yan Jie let everyone take their luggage.

In the next 10 days, all their life data will be recorded. In addition to the surrounding cameras, there is a detector on their arms to collect their body data at any time.

"Whoever has physical discomfort will report it immediately."

Everyone has stepped out of the carrier and is inside the research base. The atmospheric pressure standards and atmospheric composition in the Mars base are mainly based on the Earth as a reference standard.

Outside the base is the true atmosphere of Mars.

They used to stay at the space hotel. Relatively speaking, it is much more comfortable than space, and the body feels light and fluttering.

Entering the gates of the Mars base and welcoming them at the door is a robot.

"Dear Mars volunteers, welcome to the 1st biosphere of Taohuayuan. I am the artificial intelligence of Mars. I have any questions, I can answer for you."

"Hello there."

Yan Jie habitually and the robot made a greeting.

In the days of base training, robots have become accustomed to them, and there is no difference between them.

In the earth training, there are simulation bases, and the terrain design is the same as here, so they already have the position of all the function rooms of the base and know where their residence is.

After 10 minutes, all eight people put their luggage and went to the command center to gather. Seeing that Chen Mo appeared on the base screen, the eight players looked serious and stood up.

They did not expect Chen Mo to personally connect.

Usually the big boss, but the dragon is not seen at the end. Many employees have not been in close contact with Chen Mo once in the company.

"When you arrive at Mars, are you still accustomed?" Chen Mo asked.

"Report, the current status of the whole staff is good." Yan Jie replied.

"Ok."

Chen Mo nodded slightly.

"The specific task, when you go to Mars, already knows. I am here to marry you. In the course of carrying out the task, if there is any discomfort in the body, it must be stopped in time. The base is equipped with a medical room, with the most advanced medical equipment, safe. First, the task is second."

"understand."

Everyone agreed in unison and was very touched.

The embarrassment and greetings from Chen Mo personally are much heavier than the greetings of others.

"I look forward to your triumph, I will meet you personally at the airport."

Chen Mo’s call was not long, and the next step was the mission guidance and embarrassment of the space experts.

The atmosphere of Mars has been transformed almost the same, the proportion of oxygen components is slightly higher than the Earth, the only difference is atmospheric pressure.

It feels a bit like being on the plateau, and each of them has been professionally trained, so there is no problem in this regard. The only concern is the mutated viruses and bacteria.

When you are finished, the connection will hang up.

"It's hard to imagine that Mars is so fast that it has been transformed into a living planet." Catherine watched the Peach Blossom No. 1 biosphere through the glass window of the base.

In front of her eyes, it is a world full of life, similar to the mountains of the earth.

"This is the power of technology."

Yan Jie looked at the grass in the distance, and the rabbit that looked around in the east was very emotional.

Only Chen Mo has the ability to transform a ridiculous world into a full-fledged life. Every inch of land here is the crystallization of Chen Mo’s highest wisdom.

"If we complete the mission, we will become the first group of people to survive in the natural environment of Mars, and it should be included in the history of human development." Catherine laughed: "This is a lucky, an adventurous Return."

"Looking forward to tomorrow."

Yan Jie looked down at the time displayed on the watch.

"The time is almost up, confuse, inform all the staff to go to the medical room for a medical examination."

Just arrived today, after the adjustment is completed, you need to go to the medical room to check the body first, take a day off to adapt to the gravity environment of Mars, and then start the task.

chapters.title: Chapter 728: : The Smell Of Mars Air
chapters.body:
Chapter 728: : The Smell Of Mars Air

Taohuayuan No. 1 Biosphere Research Base.

Today is the second day of Mars, the morning of Mars. They just got up, on the earth, it is now five o'clock in the afternoon.

In the center command room, eight people sat around the conference table. This is the first meeting to come to Mars.

Who is the representative, take off the protective clothing, and take the lead to enter the Taohuayuan No. 1 biosphere?

This is the issue that is being discussed now.

The tests have certain unknowns and dangers and they have to be cautious.

"I will lead the team out," said Hua Yan.

She is the only Chinese woman among the eight, who is as famous as her name, a sly rose, and the vice captain of the team.

As an ordinary astronomy student, astronomical research is her hobby and she wants space tourism. Just want to travel in space, the cost is not affordable for any ordinary person.

When the marching ant group began recruiting Mars volunteers, she signed up and stood out as one of the first eight lucky winners.

The girl is very careful and resilience, complements her and has leadership skills, making her a deputy captain. The prestige in the team is second only to the captain Jie Jie.

"No."

Yan Jie categorically rejected the proposal of Hua Yan.

"As a captain, I should take the lead. Next, I will choose two of you from the two to the Peach Blossom No. 1 Biosphere."

"You are the captain and the commander of the base. You can't take risks." Hua Yan said.

"I agree."

A player next to him raised his hand in favor.

Muhamde, Arab, brown skin, glasses are sultry. At this time, Muhamde’s mouth was smiling and raising his hand.

"As the captain, you should be in charge at the base, not risky, I can lead the team out."

Yan Jie saw Muhammad also open his mouth and smiled directly.

"I agree is useless. Now is not the time to vote. I am the captain. I must listen to my arrangement here. Hua Yan left, Tang Yunqi and Catherine and I went out. During my outing, the rest listened to the flowers. instruction."

Yan Jie directly decided.

The first batch of outings, the first exposure to the atmosphere of Mars, has a higher risk factor. Because outside is a completely unknown environment, no one knows what will happen.

"Captain, can I go out instead of Yunxiao?" Muhamde said.

"Want to grab my position? No way."

The player who looked a bit honest next to him heard that Muhamde wanted to replace him and immediately refused.

He seems to be the most skinny, but the data of each training is only the second of them among the eight, but only a little introverted, can not be the vice captain.

"Don't argue, just decide, now I'm ready to go out."

At the end of the meeting, the three people prepared for the outbound passage of the base. Huayan could only replace the position of Yan Jie, sitting in the town center command post and paying attention to the things they were going to go out.

Far away from the Earth's Flying Ant Center, all experts are watching their outings.

In human history, the first unprotected exposure to and survival in the outer planet environment is a milestone event.

If it is successful, it proves that the transformation of the planet is feasible, and in the future, it will provide endless help to human interstellar exploration.

Chen Mo is also paying attention to the situation of Taohuayuan No. 1. This test is related to whether his Mars transformation project is completed, even if he does not have anything to do with him.

Yan Jie, Tang Yunqi and Castiel are already waiting.

The three did not wear protective clothing and only wore daily training uniforms, but in order to prevent them, they were carrying a simple oxygen cylinder with a thick arm.

Outside the gate, there is also a first-aid Mars rover and three robots waiting to be ready to carry out rescue.

Testing must do its utmost to ensure the safety of Martian volunteers.

"The atmospheric pressure of the outboard is being adjusted. After one minute, the hatch is open, please prepare..." Mars' artificial intelligence ‘lighting’ opens a reminder.

As soon as the words fell, the three men slowly felt the difference in the cabin.

The atmospheric pressure in their cabin is changing, and the atmospheric pressure is low, giving them a feeling of chest tightness, like a person standing in the plateau.

They have trained in the plateau and have experience in plateau survival and soon adapted to changes in atmospheric pressure.

For a minute, I felt a bit slow at this moment.

Finally, when the atmospheric pressure in the cabin is the same as the outside, the sound of the drip, the artificial intelligence is determined to be able to open the cabin.

Yan Jie is a little nervous, this door is closed to two worlds.

This is also a big event in the history of mankind.

He believes that in the command post of the earth, countless astronomers and biologists are waiting for what will happen next.

The base command center, Huayan and others are also nervously watching the situation of the three people, waiting for the hatch to open.

"Ready?"

Yan Jie took the hand on the handle of the hatch and looked at Tang Yunxi and Castilla. His heartbeat is also accelerating, and he feels that he has jumped to the eyes of the blind man. Fortunately, he has enough psychological quality to quickly recover himself.

"Ready."

The two took a deep breath and nodded.

Hey! !

The sound of the mechanical lock of the hatch door caused the three people to slam the heart.

Like a broken chicken, the hatch is slowly opened.

A breeze rushed into the cabin, and the three felt the different temperatures in the air, a bit like the feeling of going out of the air-conditioned room outside in the summer.

Taking out the hatch, the scene of the Peach Blossom No. 1 Biosphere is unreservedly presented.

There is still a special taste in the air, like the smell of the earth, unlike the air of the earth. Like a new city, the taste of water is different.

Nothing!

Successful.

The three-person picture was sent back to the research base command center through surveillance cameras, and everyone cheered.

At the same time, the command center of the Fei Ant Space Base, in the field, saw the biological experts and astronomers of this scene, all ecstatic.

This picture will be included in the annals of human development.

They clearly witnessed this moment.

“What's the discomfort?” Yan Jie quickly returned to God and looked at Tang Yunxi and Catherine.

The two who were still thinking about the smell of the air returned to God and shook their heads.

"No discomfort, like in the plateau, except that the chest is a bit stuffy, there are no other problems, the body is a little light, and it feels like jumping high." Tang Yunxuan examined the body carefully and began to describe: "These feelings are also in the base. The only difference It is in the air and has a special taste."

"I also smelled a special taste." Castille nodded.

"I also smell." Yan Jie said.

"What's the taste?"

There was a voice coming from the three-person earphone. This was a question directly asked by the command center of the earth, and the voice was a little nervous.

“It’s hard to describe, it’s mixed with the smell of mud.”

"In any case, the air is not sweet." Yan Jie joked, and some serious: "The feeling is like you are new to a city, drinking local water, and the taste of the water in your hometown is different."

After the report, Yan Jie once again put his mind on the surrounding environment: "Now walk around, don't go too far, adapt to the new environment first."

They have ropes on their bodies and they are not too far apart from each other.

Now that they have just arrived in this new environment, it is not yet certain that there are other discomfort problems.

In the laboratory, Chen Mo is also paying attention to their situation, and the ink girl handed the physical data of the three to Chen Mo. The watches on them can monitor their health data at any time.

"Their heart rate is normal, the body temperature is normal, and the body is not the same."

"Continue to observe." Chen Mo nodded gently, relatively calm. It’s just the beginning, but in any case, seeing them safe and sound, he is also a sigh of relief.

This is a good beginning.

chapters.title: Chapter 729: : False Alarm
chapters.body:
Chapter 729: : False Alarm

The marching ant group announced that Mars volunteers have successfully walked on Mars without protection. Once the plan for the Mars survival test was announced, it stirred up waves.

The self-propelled ant group began to reform Mars. The outside world has been speculating about the progress of Mars transformation. Now, just a few months, the atmosphere of Mars can maintain human survival?

The world is in turmoil.

The marching ant group used special machines to accelerate the transformation of Mars' atmosphere and create oxygen, again showing an amazingly large hand.

Originally thought to take a long time of natural evolution, Mars will appear to indicate the conditions of animal survival, did not expect to come quickly.

Later generations recorded that this day was the first day when human beings actually survived.

The global scientific community has shown unprecedented interest in Mars research. Some astronomical research teams have applied to join the universities in China, hoping to conduct in-depth research on Mars.

Ten days, not long.

Everything is going on normally.

......

Catherine scratched his arm and frowned.

It feels a bit wrong.

Going out this morning and going back to the beginning, the arms and calves are always a little itchy, and it is getting itchy.

Picking up the sleeves, a little red dot caught in the eye, and Castille’s pupils shrank.

The Jie Jie around saw the strangeness of Castiel, and then saw some dense red spots on her arm. The pupils shrank and immediately became nervous. There is a little red dot on Castielin, like a red dot bitten by a mosquito, a white-brown meat on the arm, and the size of the mung bean is very conspicuous.

"I will arrange for the 4th to go to the medical room and check my body."

After calling the artificial intelligence, Yan Jie turned to look at Casteline, staring at the conspicuous red dot on her arm.

"Don't worry, look like skin allergies"

Even on the earth, when you reach a new environment, you may be unacceptable or infected with local germs, causing illness. On Mars, no one knows how many unknown dangers there are.

Each volunteer is selected through layers, and its own resistance and physical quality are among the best among ordinary people and will not easily fall ill.

It’s only the fifth day of Mars, and there is still a problem with Casteline.

The first batch of Martian volunteers, now only the three-person left-behind research base led by Huayan as emergency personnel, all the other five people entered the unprotected residence of the Taohuayuan No. 1 biosphere for survival experiments.

The residence of their experimental group is an ordinary villa, enough to accommodate the living space of all of them.

Their food, provided by the base, is naturally grown in the biosphere of potatoes and vegetables, as well as rabbits, and water also needs to collect river water and rainwater from the biosphere.

The house will provide the appliances and equipment they need.

They want to live as normal in the biosphere.

"Others, now also suspend activities, go to the medical room, do a physical examination." Yan Jie said.

"Do you need help?"

The voice of the flower sent by the headset is a little nervous. After all, there is a problem on Mars. It is impossible to say that tension is not.

Although they have enough psychological preparation for this trial.

"No, I am not sure if it is skin allergies, will it spread, you are in the base, you don't have to come out." Yan Jie said seriously.

Several people took the medical car and went directly to the underground passage, which went straight to the medical room of the research base. Arrive at the medical room at the research base. As a patient, Castilla was promoted to a more spacious clinic.

Entering the clinic, Castelian found herself surrounded by various robots.

"No. 4, please change to the sick suit."

A robot holds a set of sick clothes and puts them in front of Catherine.

Not to avoid, Castilla sat on the hospital bed, took off his daily nephew and put on the sick suit. Now her arms and calves are a little uncomfortable. Because she is particularly itchy, she dare not scratch it. I am afraid that the bacteria will be infected here. The consequences are terrible.

"Now we have a thorough examination of you to confirm your health. Your inspection will be passed back to the Earth, and your medical condition will be diagnosed in conjunction with the medical expert group and artificial intelligence."

After the artificial intelligence is finished, the instruments of various medical equipment are swept on the arm and calf of Castielin.

"No. 4, are there any other discomfort in your arms and calves?"

"Itchy, itchy."

Castille did not dare to catch, rubbing some itchy rash, without hesitation. She is still calm, she is professionally trained, and her mental quality is strong enough because her arms and calves are itch-free and have no other abnormalities.

It has the most advanced medical equipment of all mankind to ensure her safety.

"Is it painful?"

"No pain." Castigrin shook his head.

“Is there any paralysis or other feelings?”

"No."

"Is there anything uncomfortable in other parts of the body?"

......

The situation of Castiel Lynn, through the data, immediately passed back to their expected expert group.

In order to ensure the safety of volunteers, the ant aerospace organization specially organizes an expert group to deal with various emergencies. Several national treasures of surgical specialists are in the team, and if needed, they can perform remote surgery on Mars volunteers directly on Earth.

Chen Mo and Mo Nuo entered the expert consultation room. When he heard that there was a problem with Castiglin, he immediately rushed over.

He cares about the situation of Martian volunteers more than anyone. If they have big problems, it means that the environment of Mars is not suitable for living, and he has to continue to transform.

"what's the situation?"

Chen Mo smoothly passed unimpeded to the front of the holographic table.

A group of experts surrounded the holographic table, the holographic projection above was Castelin, and the symptoms of the arms and calves were in their eyes.

"Nothing, the initial diagnosis is skin allergies." A dermatologist on the field said: "But you need to check, what allergens are causing skin allergies."

Volunteers trained in professional training, each person's physical quality is extraordinary, usually no skin allergies, and now people are on Mars, where the environment is transformed by Chen Mo, not humans after thousands of years of evolution In an adapted environment, it is not surprising that there are certain variants of new bacteria.

Chen Mossed a sigh of relief when he heard skin allergies.
