I am afraid that it is a big deal.

If it is skin allergies, it is easy to solve.

Ten minutes later, Mars' medical room also sent back news that the allergen was found to be caused by a mutant fungal spore. Others did not find allergic symptoms.

This conclusion makes Chen Mosong a lot.

After fifteen minutes, after applying the ointment, the itching of the Castelian arm slowly disappeared, leaving only a small point.

However, Castiel still has to stay in the medical room to observe.

A false alarm.

......

Back at the office, Zhao Min sat next to Chen Mo, looking up at the holographic projection of Mars.

“Is there a follow-up Mars immigration plan?”

The first batch of Martian volunteers just entered the natural environment of Mars, and the body was temporarily safe and sound. Now that Mars is a successful transformation, there is a final step.

The above gives them the authority to manage Mars autonomously, quite a Star Zone.

Once Mars becomes a livable planet, there are other issues to consider. If you want to make Mars look like it, it will be mastered by the marching ant group, and the decision-making level of the marching ant group will be counted.

Quite above, all the wealth of Mars is owned by the Army Ant Group.

A planet, no inhabitants, has no soul, so Zhao Min will raise this question.

"No, there is no need for Mars to immigrate." Chen Mo shook his head: "Mars gravity is small, people who grow up there, the body will be much worse than the earth, easy bones are loose. Only a few years of short-term stay, return to the earth to rehabilitate It is not suitable for long-term growth."

Growing up the environment, determining the strength of physical fitness, although it can be improved with drugs, but the symptoms are not cured.

And people who need professional training can go to Mars, the number is too small, and the cost of immigration is too great.

After the promotion of clean energy, the environment of the earth is now getting better, the building capacity is enhanced, the population can be accommodated, the casualties caused by the war are not small, and there is no need for immigration.

"Mars is a base for a tourist planet and a company, and it doesn't need to be used as a human immigration planet."

Chen Mo made a conclusion.

chapters.title: Chapter 730: : Mars Transformation Completed
chapters.body:
Chapter 730: : Mars Transformation Completed

"Today is the 23rd, Martian weather is cloudy. Today is the 13th day of our Mars survival test team landing on Mars, and the last day of the Mars test. After the allergies of Castiellin, everything is shocking, these days No one has any discomfort.

Five minutes later, we will have a general examination. After the physical examination, the Mars survival test will officially end. From the perspective of everyone's spirit, there should not be too many problems.

I am a little bit of a family now, I want to go back to Earth early, and then tell my parents, I have been to Mars for nearly half a month. Now I am going to prepare for a medical examination and I am looking forward to the next physical examination. ”

Hey! !

Yan Jie closes the camera of the video log and turns away.

Each player has a video log record, quite a diary, regardless of time, free to record.

Today is the thirteenth day of the coming to Mars and the end of the first Mars survival test.

Arrived at the entrance of the research base medical room, all the players have long been waiting. The three people in the interior of the left-behind base are separated from them and undergo a medical examination in another isolation area.

"Fuzzling, can the medical examination begin?"

"Yes," said the base's artificial intelligence.

"Castelin advanced." Yan Jie looked at Casteline.

"Yeah." Castielian nodded and opened the door to the medical room.

After the allergies of Catherine returned, they returned to the biosphere. Until today, the same symptoms did not appear again. It was a false alarm.

Ten minutes later, Catherine came out of the medical room and smiled at him.

"no problem."

"That's good, Muhamde went in." Yan Jie looked at Muhamde, this is awkward.

Everyone's physical examination time is almost ten minutes, and soon, four physical examinations are completed, no problem. Yan Jie finally opened the door of the medical room and went in and sat directly on the hospital bed.

"Open your mouth."

Yan Jie did not hesitate, opened his mouth, and the next moment he saw a camera-like thing stretched out.

"The top is taken off."

Yan Jie still did it, letting some machines that could not be named, swept back and forth on himself, lying quietly.

Ten minutes later, the robot had given him a full physical examination and eventually found no abnormalities.

This conclusion, let Jie Jie breathe a sigh of relief from the hospital bed. At the end of the medical examination, their Mars survival test ended. They will adjust to the Earth for two days.

......

Building No. 1, the celestial laboratory.

In the center of the laboratory, there is a holographic projection of the planet, with the sea, white clouds, vegetation, and the Earth, which is now Mars.

All the data on Mars are displayed on the holographic light curtain, including the temperature of the location, the weather, and information about earthquakes and volcanic eruptions. In addition, there are data on the composition of the Martian atmosphere, atmospheric pressure and other data.

The Mars survival test is still underway. After a false alarm from Catherine, no big problems were found behind.

Everything went smoothly.

It’s been ten days now, and every two days, a physical examination, the body of Mars volunteers is no problem.

Chen Mo is watching the progress of the unparalleled subject.

He is now waiting for the judgment of the Science and Technology Library on the Mars project. Only if the technology library is successful, the Mars transformation project will be successful, and the technology library will open the next phase of authority. So now that he has time, take the time to check the progress of the unparalleled subject.

According to the feedback from Mo Women, the development of the first generation of brain-controlled virtual helmets was very smooth.

Because the brain control technology has matured in the hands of Chen Mo, the unparalleled is very clever, and under the guidance of the ink girl, she quickly learned to use brain control technology.

Now Musou is trying to combine brain control technology and games. Through its own programming instruction set, the first generation of brain-controlled virtual helmets can be realized, and the mouse and keyboard can be removed to develop a new game mode.

According to this progress, there is also the help of the ink girl, giving her enough time, no accident, the unparalleled will successfully complete his first work.

As a father, Chen Mo is very happy.

Oh...

As I watched the unparalleled research project come to the fore, suddenly, a very strong sense of excitement emerged from Chen Mo’s brain and swept the whole body. This excitement is more intense than ever, and every cell feels beating.

Is Mars transformation successful in the science and technology library?

This idea came to my mind.

Excitement makes Chen Mo's body warm, very comfortable and full of spirit.

"Merco, Mars sent back the news, the volunteer's physical examination was completed, the volunteer's body did not find any abnormalities, the first trial ended," said the ink girl.

really.

Chen Mo put away the unparalleled research materials and got up from the position.

“Continue to renovate Mars in accordance with the original plan, notify the training base, and prepare to start the second phase of the volunteer test.”

"Ok."

"Go, come here today, go home."

Chen Mo reluctantly urged to enter the technology library now.

The hunch tells him that this privilege escalation is definitely more important than the previous one, so he needs to adjust his mindset, and no one knows what kind of pain he has to suffer this time.

The ink girl naturally took Chen Mo’s arm and left the laboratory.

......

Xiao Yu was drilled out of the pool, and a three-point blue swimsuit with white skin and a graceful body, without a trace of fat, was very sexy. Also accompanied by Zhao Min, the same three-point red bikini, the body is perfectly displayed.

Both of them have their own characteristics. Zhao Min is mature and charming. Xiao Yu is fresh and natural, with different styles of beauty, but they are very sexy.

They use the skin care products that Chen Mo gave them, all of which are products in the technology library, so that they can maintain the most beautiful skin color and appearance.

It is now in the open-air swimming pool of the villa.

Sometimes, when Zhao Min is on vacation, Xiao Yu will call her over.

Now that the company has been thoroughly formed, the business empire is shaped, and the details of the business are not complicated. Zhao Min is worried. She is now at the top of the business empire and making the most decisions.

The following people and artificial intelligence will complete her request.

So when she got to her current high, the work was easier than before.

"The stomach is not moving." Xiao Yu lay down on the chair, touched his belly without licking meat, and sighed.

"I haven't moved yet? It won't be a problem? What did he say?" Zhao Min asked in amazement.

"He said it was his problem."

"His problem?"

Zhao Min’s voice has changed and his face is strange.

"It won't be him..."

"Don't think about it, he is as strong as a cow, and he is tossed by him every time. He said that he has evolved and is isolated." Xiao Yu's face is red.

"Speak well, don't drive." Zhao Min snorted and looked speechless.

Between the two chat, Chen Mo and the ink girl have returned.

Chen Mo put on a pair of beach pants, stepping on the flip-flops, the upper body is exposed to the air, the perfect muscle lines, the outline is faint, enough to attract the attention of any woman. Ink girl put on a purple swimsuit, the style is the same as the two, very sexy.

"Husband." Seeing Chen Mo appear, Xiao Yuyi said: "Is it back so early?"

“The first batch of volunteers was safe and sound. The first phase of the Mars survival project was basically completed, and no other research was started. So I came back first. I stole half a day and lived.”

Chen Mo sat down beside Xiao Yu, took the towel in her hand and wiped her hair.

Zhao Min's love for the two, she has become accustomed to look at Xiao Yu with envy, then she lays on her long legs and lies on the chair, while drinking a drink while looking at the blue sky, a look of coziness.

This kind of day is not bad.

chapters.title: Chapter 731: : Body Evolution
chapters.body:
Chapter 731: : Body Evolution

It was night, Chen Mo was sitting in the study.

Relaxing today, he is ready to meet the next stage of the Science and Technology Library.

Chen Mo is not clear about the technology to be completed in the next stage, but the task of transforming the planet is released, and the task of the next stage will certainly not be simple.

"Ink girl, wait a minute, no matter what happens, don't send me to the hospital."

"Mergo, are you having a problem with your body? Need to check it for you?" asked the ink girl nervously. She now has her own emotions, but she is quiet in peacetime, but she is still obedient to Chen Mo.

"Nothing, remember my words. You don't have to go to the hospital, you don't have to treat."

Chen Mozhen finished the ink girl, leaning on the chair and entering the science and technology library.

Still familiar with the giant gate.

Chen Mo looked up at the door, reached out and pushed forward.

In the center of the science and technology library, the technology ball is quietly suspended, and the original technology ball is inflated. At this time, the internal light is shining, and it is extremely dazzling. It seems that the entire technology ball is melted into liquid.

As long as Chen Mo's hand touches the technology ball, he will open the authority for the next stage.

Taking a deep breath, Chen Mo tightened his nerves and slowly raised his hand on the technology ball, like grabbing a crystal ball.

A huge suction, from the inside of the technology ball, Chen Mo's palm is like a suction cup, is tightly attached to the surface of the technology ball, his body is also fixed, unable to move.

The golden light that was originally shot by Jin Guang, the golden light inside turned wildly. On the surface of the crystal ball, a golden thread appeared, like a palm extending out of the capillaries.

Suddenly, Chen Mo’s face changed and his forehead began to sweat.

He clearly felt that there were thousands of needles that passed through the skin of the palm and penetrated into his body, and the palms began to suffer severe pain.

Deep into the pain of the bone marrow, he felt that countless wires went into the flesh and bones and were slowly spreading up along the palm of his hand.

what! Your uncle.

Chen Mo finally couldn't help but the neck and forehead blue veins appeared, painful and embarrassing. This is a severe pain from every cell, and there is only a sense of pain in my mind.

He saw that the golden thread was already covering his palm, replacing his blood vessels and cells, and spreading to his arms.

Chen Mo can even clearly feel that the body's cells, flesh and bone marrow are being eroded by Golden Light. The pain is like someone starting from the palm of your hand, crushing his flesh and blood, and sprinkling a handful of paprika.

He is psychologically prepared, but this horrible pain far exceeds his psychological expectations.

The spread of the golden thread continued, slowly climbing up the arm of Chen Mo. If Chen Mo’s body is not fixed, Chen Mo can’t wait to break his arm to escape this terrible pain.

Every second is a torment.

Two minutes later, the golden thread has spread to the shoulders and is spreading to his spine and chest.

what! !

At the moment when the golden thread penetrated into the spine, Chen Mo felt that his brain exploded like an instant, and the pain was like a storm, as if he was under the 18th floor of Purgatory.

"Mergo, Merle."

There was an anxious cry from the ink girl, but Chen Mo had no ability to think about other things, only pain.

At this time in the study, Chen Mo’s body had already rolled to the ground, unconsciously closed his eyes and struggled, his mouth was unconsciously low, and the blue veins on his forehead and neck almost exploded.

Even if the ink girl screamed anxiously, Chen Mo still had no reaction.

"Husband, what happened to her husband?"

Xiao Yu Jiao rushed into the study, feeling nervous.

She received a notice from the ink girl and ran over everything.

Seeing Chen Mo, who was unconsciously struggling on the ground, Xiao Yu’s pupils shrank and his face was instantly bloodless.

This is not the first time.

"Husband, husband, you wake up. Ink girl, call the ambulance, save the husband, save the husband." Xiao Yu hurriedly hugged Chen Mo's struggling body, tears could not stop leaving, the body was shaking, fear.

"Mergo said before going to sleep, no matter what happens, don't send him to the hospital, no treatment." The voice of the ink girl is crying.

“Why? Why do you say this?”

Xiao Yu tightly buried Chen Mo’s head on her chest, her voice trembled and desperate, full of fear.

Seeing Chen Mo's appearance, she felt that her heart would be broken.

This is her world.

"I asked Murgo, he didn't say it. He seems to know that there is something in the body. I said to check him, he said no." The ink girl is also anxious, her consciousness is complete, and there is a small fishing and affection for Chen Mo. .

"Medical room, go to the medical room at home."

Xiao Yu will hold Chen Mo and go to the medical room. The ink girl did not dare to neglect and followed closely.

"Ink woman will check her body quickly, fast." Xiao Yu will put Chen Mo on the medical table. There are the most advanced medical equipments, which are made by Chen Mo and Mo Nu.

"Good." The ink girl should come down and the medical equipment in the medical room has moved.

Retreating to the side of the small fish, the body still trembled in fear, watching the painful Chen Mo on the medical table, tears continued to flow down, no blood on his face.

"Merco's life characteristics are stable and better than before." said the ink girl.

"Why is that husband like this?"

Seeing the painful Chen Mo, Xiao Yu has collapsed. This feeling of powerlessness made her feel desperate.

"I don't know. Before I went to sleep, I knew my physical problems. He wouldn't let the hospital go, and he wouldn't let the treatment. The medical equipment here couldn't find out the cause, and the hospital couldn't find it."

There is an anxious cry in the voice of the ink girl. If she has tears, she must be crying now.

"Husband, husband will be fine." Xiao Yu holds Chen Mo's hand, as if praying.

"Merco's body seems to have changed, and his life characteristics are increasing."

What the ink girl suddenly saw, and reached out to untie Chen Mo’s clothes, the faintly visible golden thread was like a blood vessel spreading Chen Mo half body. Still continuing to extend to other corners.

“Why is this?”

In front of the scene, Xiao Yu feels broken, she does not know what happened to Chen Mo.

"Husband, you wake up, you wake up."

"Merco is like evolution." The ink girl opened her mouth. Being as clever as she is, she still finds some possible answers, because Chen Mo presupposes that he is evolving.

"Yes, evolution. Husband will be fine." Xiaoyu seems to find supportive beliefs, holding Chen Mo's palm and not letting go.

The cry of desperation and the anxious cry of the ink girl, Chen Mo heard it very clearly, but the pain made him unable to lift any emotion.

Chen Mo felt that the golden liquid was replacing his bone marrow, connecting the nerves and going straight to the brain.

If you can see Chen Mo's brain, you will be surprised to find that the golden liquid has invaded Chen Mo's brain and is spreading wildly to every corner. Every cell in the brain is becoming golden and transparent.

The heart beats more vigorously, the golden liquid flows down the blood vessels into the heart, and as the heart beats, the golden liquid accelerates to every corner of the body.

In the science and technology library, Chen Mo's entire body is covered with golden blood vessels, and the golden liquid is transforming every cell of his body, and the pain occupies his consciousness.

I don't know how long it took, Chen Mo gradually lost consciousness, and the hand that was absorbed on it suddenly loosened and fell to the ground of the Science and Technology Library.

Everything is calm, as if nothing has happened. The only change is the color of the technology ball.

The golden light of the technology ball disappeared and it has turned purple.

Chen Mo, lying on the ground, the golden light of his body, flowing under his skin, slowly disappearing, returning to normal skin tone.

chapters.title: Chapter 732: : Golden Blood And Zijin Permissions
chapters.body:
Chapter 732: : Golden Blood And Zijin Permissions

Chen Mo did not know how long he had lost consciousness. Maybe it was an instant, maybe it was a long time. When he opened his eyes, he saw the white ceiling.

Next to it is Xiao Yu and Mo Nu.

Xiao Yuyuan’s eyes that love to laugh, have lost their brilliance at this time, there is no focal length, the tear marks on the face are still not dry, the eyes are swollen, and the appearance of sputum makes people feel distressed.

Seeing that Chen Mo opened his eyes, the ink girl finally smiled.

Originally a godless fisherman, his eyes gradually recovered and he recovered.

The two are silent.

The eyes of the little fish have become red, and the tears are spinning in the eyes.

Wow! !

It finally broke out.

Xiao Yu was crying and screaming, slamming in Chen Mohuai, holding it tightly, and seemed to be afraid that Chen Mo will run away, and let go of the despair and worry in his heart.

The hysterical crying made Chen Mo feel badly.

"It's okay, it's okay." Chen Mo caressed Xiaoyu's back and whispered softly.

It was only the comfort of Chen Mo, which made Xiao Yu cry even louder and vented unscrupulously. No one can understand Chen Mo’s desperation when she is in trouble.

The ink girl also walked to Chen Mo's side and sat down. She gently grasped Chen Mo's hand. She also had emotions. Although she was not as strong as Xiao Yu, Chen Mo was in a coma. She also knew about worry and anxiety.

"My husband is back."

Chen Mo whispered and comforted Xiao Yu, letting her vent in her arms, otherwise her emotions were accumulated in her heart and it was prone to more problems.

After crying for fifteen minutes, the little fish in my arms left only sobbing sobbing, and finally quieted down, crying tired, and already slept in Chen Mohuai. Just sleeping, my hands still clinging to Chen Mo, not relaxing.

"Small fisher sister does not eat or drink a day, you are unconscious for a day and night, she sat here and cried for a day." said the ink girl.

"Ok."

Chen Mo saw the tear marks on Xiaoyu's face, and he was distressed and guilty.

Gently take down the small fishing and hold his hand, Chen Mo put the small fish on the bed and lay it, wiped the tear marks on her face, very distressed.

Kissing on the head of the small fishing forehead, Chen Mocai left the room.

Lost consciousness for 34 hours.

Chen Mo looked at the time, some smiled, remembering the pain at that time, he didn't want to experience it again in his life.

"Mergo, have you got any unknown disease?" asked the ink girl.

"No."

Chen Mo shook hands and he had clearly felt the changes in his body.

The thumb is pinched on the index finger, the nails fall into the flesh, and a drop of golden blood flows out of the wound with a metallic luster.

The blood of the body turns into gold, which is the biggest change that Chen Mo feels in the evolution of the body. The brain does not know what it will look like. Chen Mo can't open his head to see it.

“Why is this?” asked the ink girl nervously.

"It is a kind of evolution of life." Chen Mo stared at the golden blood of the fingertips, and there was no wave.

In the gym, Chen Mo put on his shorts and the muscles of his upper body were completely exposed. There was only one person listening to him, and the bodyguards were not there.

The secret of physical changes, except for a few people like Xiao Yu, Chen Mo does not intend to let others know.

The blood turned golden, and Chen Mo's appearance looked a little different. The skin changed to a color, and it did not turn white. The skin color was dark, and it looked very masculine. The muscles had a hint of metal.

Chen Mo, who showed his muscles, had no sense of researcher Sven, but was full of power.

"get ready."

Chen Mo clenched his fists.

He can clearly feel the change in body strength and strength, and rises completely to a grade.

At the moment when Chen Mo's body was tight, the golden silk appeared and spread to the whole body, like a weird tattoo, and even the eyelids contained a touch of red gold.

Hey! !

Chen Mo was punched on the dynamometer, a huge collision sound, the steel on the dynamometer became distorted, and the power could not be measured.

"This is the evolution of life."

Chen Mo clenched his fists. He has already noticed the existence of life. Now he is no longer an ordinary human in the traditional sense, or a new life after evolution.

The body and the brain are completely detached from the existing human beings.

The changes in the body were confirmed, and Chen Mo washed it again and re-entered the Science and Technology Library.

The entry of the science and technology library into the next stage is what Chen Mo is eager to know. He is also unclear about the permissions and projects of the next stage.

Everything has not changed. The only change is the technology ball that landed at the top of the technology library.

The golden light of the technology ball has disappeared, turning into a transparent purple gold, and the purple light is flowing, looking very mysterious and noble.

[Technology Administrator·Zijin]

When Chen Mo’s palm is placed on the technology ball, he knows the message.

Zijin permissions, or have a suffix, not the highest authority. The task of the Zijin level is [manufacturing a space curvature super-light speed spacecraft].

It is the technology of the super-light speed aircraft that Chen Mo did not expect.

A task that looks simple is not simple.

The space curvature super-light speed spacecraft involves a combination of various technologies such as space curvature engine, curvature engine fuel, special material of the hull, and interstellar positioning navigation.

This requires re-upgrading the basic technology to prepare the required materials.

"Space Curvature Engine Design and Principles", "Space Folding Theory and Technology", "Space Jumping Technology", "Space Navigation Technology", "Space Quantum Radar Detection Technology"

Antimatter Extraction Technology, Antimatter Preservation and Use

"Dark material capture and application"

"Artificial Gravity Technology and Theory", "Application and Principles of Anti-Gravity Technology", "Artificial 3D Quantum Brain"

Particle Storm, Antimatter Bomb

"Super Power Awakening Method and Technology", "Super Ability Development"

All the technologies for manufacturing super-light speed spacecraft are complete, all of which are theoretical techniques and principles, or whether they should be developed according to theory. Among them, Chen Mo is the most interested, which is the technology that Chen Mo always wants to see.

"Super Power Awakening Method and Technology"

......

When Xiaoyu woke up, it was already the next morning and slept for a dozen hours. Waiting day and night, all emotions are in my heart, heart and soul, and Chen Mo woke up, sorrows and joys, emotions, ups and downs, tired enough.

At the moment when she opened her eyes, Chen Mo was lying beside her.

Seeing Chen Mo's face, Xiao Yu's eyes were red again, and he cried in Chen Mohuai's arms.

"Don't cry, don't cry, my husband is fine."

Not comforting, Chen Moyi comforted, Xiao Yu cried even louder.

Five minutes later, Xiao Yu raised his tears and stared at Chen Mo, flattening his mouth, making Chen Mo laugh and distressed.

"Husband, I am so scared, I am useless, I can't do anything."

Xiao Yu sounds with self-blame.

"Not afraid, Xiaoyu is great. My husband is not good, but it is your heart." Chen Mo whispered softly: "Don't cry, crying is not beautiful, go to wash, my husband gave you a porridge."

Chen Mo wiped her tears, picked up Xiao Yu from the bed and went to the bathroom.

After eating breakfast, the small fish color gradually recovered, but a pair of eyes were still very red and swollen, sitting on the sofa in the living room, still holding Chen Mo's arm tightly, for fear that Chen Mo would run away.

It became sticky.

"Why are you doing this? Is there any disease in the body?" Yesterday Chen Mo's body spread the golden silk thread, and Xiao Yu's memory is still fresh.

"This is not a disease."

"What is that? Yesterday I saw what was the gold thread on your body?" Xiao Yu worried.

"Let's show you something first."

Chen Mo cuts the knife of the fruit and strokes the tip of his finger. The golden blood flows out from the fingertips.

"My blood has turned golden."

Xiao Yu stayed in the blood of Chen Mo’s wound, showing the color of panic: “Why is this? Are you experimenting with your own body? Why are you doing this, why not care for your body?”

When you talk about it, you have to cry.

"I am now a monster, I am afraid not afraid?"

"I am not afraid, I am not afraid of what you become. Why don't you care for your body? Why?" Xiaoyu said, tears continued to fall down, and Chen Mo was dying.

"Hey, don't cry." Chen Mo patted Xiao Yu's back and calmed her to stop crying: "I didn't take my own body to do the experiment."

"Then why did you become like this?"

Xiao Yu looked up at Chen Mo, and the tears in his eyes were still dry. He was pitiful and angry.

"Remember that I told you about reproductive isolation? My body and brain are evolving and getting smarter, but every time I evolve, it will be very painful. The brain was changing, and this time the body has changed. This time. After evolution, the blood turned golden."

Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu’s eyes and said it was very serious.

“Why is this?” Xiao Yu has already believed Chen Mo’s words.

"It’s going to start from college, from the library to meet you..."

Chen Mo holds a small fisherman and begins to tell Xiaoyu about everything. When this is the time, there is no need to hide it, lest the fishermen will worry again.

When he heard the despair of the little fish hysterical, Chen Mo’s distress was self-evident, and he did not want it to happen again.

Chen Mo told Xiao Yu about the situation.

Xiao Yu listened quietly, like listening to stories, although bizarre, but still believe Chen Mo, those secrets are not important, it is most important to confirm that Chen Mo is okay.

"Why didn't you tell me before?" Xiao Yu said with a flat mouth and red eyes on Chen Mo: "You liar, when you get married, you will not let me cry, I cried so many times, my eyes are crying. I die. You, kill you."

Concerns and panic lifted, Xiao Yu’s mood is slowly recovering.

chapters.title: Chapter 733: : The Upcoming Alien
chapters.body:
Chapter 733: : The Upcoming Alien

In the study, Chen Mo took off the brain sensor and closed his eyes.

The days are back to normal, or the company's lab and home, two days and one line.

But this kind of day is busy and happy.

Do what you like.

New permissions and tasks are enough to bring the civilization of the earth into a new phase.

The technology and equipment for the super-light-speed space curvature spacecraft are completely blank, which means that Chen Mo needs to start from scratch, and all basic equipment research needs him to design and manufacture.

Each technology involves a complete set of technical systems. Chen Mo needs to let the ink girl participate in the research and development of these technologies, so that the speed is fast enough.

Therefore, Chen Mo chose to use brain control technology, transfer consciousness, and pass the required technology to the ink girl record. Otherwise, let him describe it to the ink girl record one by one, and it will not be recorded until next year.

Therefore, Chen Mo chose brain-sensing instruments to transfer all the technical data obtained from the technology library to the computer to learn from the ink girl.

“The manufacturing plant and dark matter extraction machine for dark matter detectors are now being built.”

The ink girl put the video of Mars out, and at the horror speed of the nano-robot, a special building rose.

The space curvature spacecraft project is very large.

Now that Mars has given him the entire planet as a research and development base and production base, Chen Mo is no longer restricted by land and related resources, and can freely develop any technology.

Without any constraints, Chen Mo can complete the relevant infrastructure construction at a very fast speed.

Chen Mo chose to start with dark matter first.

Dark matter materials are a whole new field.

Without dark matter, Chen Mo could not make a space curvature ship.

Technically speaking, the space curvature spacecraft needs the most important space curvature engine. The material of the space curvature engine needs dark matter to be mixed in the material to form a new material for mixing.

This special substance, on the time scale of the age of the universe, is the most stable material, so it can resist the loss in the process of space folding and stretching, and can also resist the enormous energy effect of the space curvature engine.

Dark matter cannot be detected using traditional detectors, let alone capture and extraction, and new dark matter detection radars and extraction techniques need to be developed.

There are many dark matter, which exist in the universe. The microscopic background radiation anisotropy observation in the universe knows that dark matter occupies between 85% and 90% of the total mass of the universe, so Chen Mo does not have to worry about not finding dark matter.

"It is another huge project." Chen Mo stretched a lazy waist.

"Mergo." The ink girl suddenly spoke.

"Well, what?"

Chen Mo looks at the ink girl. Now the ink girl is already a member of the family and is a very important member.

"I am sleeping with you tonight." The voice of the ink girl was a bit shy.

"Uh??"

Chen Mo's slight glimpse, the ink girl's initiative to ask is not common, but the ink woman now has a complete consciousness, feelings and emotions, this situation is not unexpected.

"This is going to ask you a little fisherman."

"I asked, Xiao Yujie promised. Xiao Yujie said that she was tossed by you in the past few days and wanted to rest."

"She is arguing about having a baby." Chen Mo was stunned and laughed.

If you let Xiao Yu hear it, you will have to worry about it.

Now the old people in the family are eager to have more grandchildren, and Xiaoyu himself wants to have one more. He used to create races to tease him, and he suffered.

Chen Mo is not sure if the situation can be born now, but always try it.

No, Chen Mo will not force it.

......

"Heng Star Civilization, is this the first star-rated civilization we found in the Rania Kea Super Galaxy?" The Blue Master calmly looked at the red planet in front of him.

The radar shows that this is a planet rich in nitrogen and iron.

The image in front of them is a pink-skinned creature.

It is about three meters high, with a lizard-like head, a bulging eye, no ears, a long tentacles on the top of the head, a pink jelly on the skin, a strange texture on the top, a scale on the legs, and a blood-red color on the back. The tail is covered with various spikes.

If Chen Mo is here, he will surely find that this creature is an alien creature that has fallen on the earth.

"Red-level intelligent creatures, nitrogen-based life, class of orcs." Torrell took a look at the basic characteristics of this creature.

"They are running away, looking for a new colonial planet. This escape has been going on for thousands of years, slow and poor, in the nearby galaxies, without their habitat, it should all die in space."

The blue division glanced at the life-detecting quantum radar, and other galaxies did not show the sensory characteristics of this life.

"The life of this star is about to come to an end. Once it collapses, the entire star system will be destroyed. It is still possible to capture some sample research and preserve the diversity of the universe."

Torrell glanced at the star's data and licked the eyelid of the third eye.

The Law of the Universe Union stipulates that it is not allowed to interfere with the natural evolution of the universe below the star-level civilization, including the war between civilizations below the star rating, and the natural evolution of the universe. If it is a disaster of extinction, you can choose the protection part to avoid extinction.

"This constellation is a rare oasis. There are hundreds of living planets. Do you leave some capacity to catch other?" asked the Blue Master.

"Don't worry, I will catch some elites, and they will be extinct anyway," said Torrell.

This kind of red-tailed creature is his journey of research and exploration. For the first time, he discovered a civilization that knows how to make use of the rules of the universe to create technology. The wisdom is not low and the value is large, so Torrell intends to grab a little more.

Low-level intelligent creatures have always been the subject of his research. He needs to do research on intelligent creatures, and then figure out the evolution and development of low-level intelligent creatures to advanced intelligent creatures to find the direction in which life evolves toward higher-order intelligent life.

This is an advanced topic in the study of intelligent creatures in the universe.

I hope that my race will evolve into the most intelligent and intelligent creature in the universe, and climb the higher class of the universe.

Once he finds the direction of evolution to higher-order life, he will gain endless benefits and benefits.

The Blue Master's cosmic biological archaeology also has research in this area as a reference, so Torrell chose to go with the Blue Division for research.

After the decision was made, in the cabin of their spaceship, thousands of containers quickly flew over the planet and began to arrest. This high-level civilization was captured and captured, and no creature could escape.

Ferry came over and glanced at the arrester that fell to the planet, without waves.

As an explorer and interstellar tour guide, he has long been eccentric about catching low-level civilized creatures. If it is a planet of non-intelligent creatures, destroying it will not violate the laws of the Universe.

The universe has class existence, and ordinary wisdom creatures are destined to be inferior.

"Where is the next destination?"

"This interstellar cloud area." Torrell looked at the red dot on the radar and said: "This location is very interesting. The stars are so sparse, surrounded by supernova explosions, and there is a life planet."

At that location, the area of 300 light years, only a few rare stars, in the universe, this star density, there is a life planet, like the desert stone cracks are as rare as grass.

......

"Dad, this is the first generation of brain-controlled virtual helmet I have completed."

Unparalleled holding a helmet, the same as the treasure in front of Chen Mo.

"so smart?"

Chen Mo stopped the work at hand, took the helmet and looked at it carefully.

A safety helmet like a locomotive, but the shape is more sci-fi. On the helmet, the logo of the marching ant group is also printed.

In front is a large screen, wrapped in a half-day helmet, there are two glasses inside, can be free to move, according to the user's situation, the top of the helmet is a brain-controlled instrument.

"I have tried Uncle Lin Zhiyuan and I can use it." Wusou said with a smile.

Lin Zhiyuan is now responsible for the business of the Army Ant Group and the artificial intelligence. He is one of the senior executives, so he is looking for Lin Zhiyuan.

"Now our company cooperates with Penguin, so there are several classic game tests temporarily in the helmet. There are chicken, CS and CF, these are 3D competitive games.

In the future, we can develop our own games to join, including large virtual online games. You can also access "Hero" and "King" to fight with the first perspective of the character, which is more exciting and competitive. ”

Unparalleled has a good eye.

"I have a good idea, then daddy try?" Chen Mo smiled.

"Yeah." There is no double focus.

chapters.title: Chapter 734: : Giving An Exclusive Release To The Unparalleled
chapters.body:
Chapter 734: : Giving An Exclusive Release To The Unparalleled

Zhao Min holds the brain-controlled virtual helmet and looks at it with great care.

Just heard the unparalleled self-completed work, she rushed over.

The brain-controlled virtual helmet is beyond Zhao Min's surprise. Although the brain-controlled virtual helmet is much worse than the technology developed by Chen Mo, it is a very popular product for young people. For game enthusiasts, this is an epoch-making one. product.

Unparalleled is only 12 years old, so smart, the starting point is not high.

Once this product appears, Musou will have enough fame, and in the future, she will take over the burden of Chen Mo and enter the army marching ant group. There will be no obstacles.

"My family is awesome."

Zhao Min kissed him on the unparalleled face and looked polite. That looks more happy than Chen Mo’s release of super-light speed communication.

"Thank you Min."

Musou also kissed Zhao Min’s face.

Xiao Yu has doubts at this moment that she is not her own. Zhao Min and the unparalleled, sometimes really more than her.

But the match is so smart, Xiaoyu is also very proud.

"Xiao Yu, Chen Mo, I am going to hold a product launch conference for Wushuang, let Wushang go to the stage to release, how?" Zhao Min asked.

"What does the husband think?"

Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo protects the unparalleled, rarely exposes the unparalleled to the media. Even if it is photographed by the media, Chen Mo will make people try to downplay the news and limit the spread.

So now the outside world knows that Chen Mo has a daughter, but most people, as long as they do not deliberately search, do not know the unparalleled appearance.

Wanting to stand on the big stage and being known to the public, Chen Mo nodded and agreed.

"Yes, we can give a unique product launch to the unparalleled, officially stand on the big stage, let the world look at the little prodigy of our family." Chen Mo touched the unparalleled and some baby fat face.

"Yeah! Thank you, Dad."

Unparalleled excitement jumped into Chen Mo's arms, holding tightly, laughing very happy.

Chen Mo’s recognition is more fulfilling than any achievement.

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min smiled at each other.

Chen Mo tried, the unparalleled product is good, with the help of the ink girl, some details of the design are handled better, wide-angle 3D field angle of view, field of view occlusion is small, the field of view is wide enough, the simulated Cg picture, the visual realism is relatively Higher.

According to the ink woman, the unparalleled is to deal with the distortion problem of 3D images and complete the realism upgrade of the picture.

Chen Mo also looked at some of the techniques and did handle it.

This shows that the unparalleled control of computer imagery and visual technology is good, and the program framework and instruction set combined with brain control technology and game screen are all unparalleled.

Although brain control technology is not unparalleled research and development, she has mastered brain control technology and learned to use it.

This proves that she has mastered the knowledge she has learned in the project.

As long as she continues to study while studying, her future achievements will never be low.

......

Lu Jiyuan was dressed in formal attire, hung headphones, and stood on the chest of the headquarters building. He was in a very good mood.

Joining the marching ant group for a week, although it is the security of the marching ant group, this security guard is not something that ordinary people can do. It requires excellent quality to be selected through layers.

After the selection, it will also be trained by the company's security department.

Today is the tenth day after he joined the company. He is currently responsible for the security and order of the company's door. He will continue to adjust his posts in the future, but the benefits and wages are very good, which is better than the average white-collar workers of the general company.

Suddenly, Lu Jiyuan saw a little girl coming down from the company’s self-driving sightseeing car, holding a box in her hand.

Very pretty little girl.

I haven't seen a beautiful little girl for ten days here, and the company's working hours, non-special circumstances, are not allowed to enter the building.

"Little sister, who are you looking for?" Lu Jiyuan asked softly.

"Hello, uncle, I am looking for President Lin Zhiyuan." Wudi looked at Lu Jiyuan and said seriously.

"What is your sister's name? Working hours, no appointments, you can't enter the company building."

"Thank you, uncle, have you just arrived in a new position? I don't have to make an appointment."

Unparalleled smile and thank you, walked toward the gate, just arrived at the door, the company's glass door automatically opened, and the robot inside the door personally led the unparalleled walk inside, seeing Lu Jiyuan face.

The company's artificial intelligence face recognition, not a member of the company, is inaccessible.

Even if you come over, you must register your appointment in advance, and I have seen the list of clients who have made an appointment today, but there is no one girl.

"Total station, the little sister who entered the gate, have an appointment? How come in?" Lu Jiyuan asked the earphones.

Those who can enter the company without any obstacles, he can not just stop it, need to ask clearly, so as to avoid misunderstanding.

"Little sister? That is Missy, the boss's daughter, usually do not come to the company."

"Hey? Missy?"

......

Zhou Xiaofeng looked at the door and opened, a little girl came in with a box and didn't even have a doorbell and a hint.

The door is automatically opened, usually the employee who has access to the company will automatically open. Those who have the right to enter their department's office, only the employees and management personnel of their department have the authority, and the outsiders need to register.

The company has artificial intelligence face recognition and no errors.

Obviously, there is not such a young employee in their department. It is impossible for other departments of the company to have it. It is obviously a minor child.

Zhou Xiaofeng looked at him with his unparalleled.

"Hello, sister, I am looking for President Lin Zhiyuan." Musou said.

"Hey? Little sister, what are you looking for in Lin? Is there an appointment?" Zhou Xiaofeng looked surprised and had to wonder if this little girl was someone from Lin.

"I don't have to make an appointment, my name is Chen Wushuang." Musou said.

"Chen Wushuang? I contact Lin." Zhou Xiaofeng felt that the name was familiar, but I couldn't remember where I heard it: "Lin, there is a girl named Chen Wushuang who is looking for you, a person holding a box."

"I will come out soon."

Dudu! !

A blind voice, let Zhou Xiaofeng glance, can not help but look at the unparalleled one. Lin Zhiyuan is now the president of the consumer software department of the marching ant company. He is one of the company's executives. I didn't expect this little girl to really know.

Still feel that the name is familiar.

"Little sister, you wait, Lin has already come out, sit down first."

"No, I go in."

Unparalleled holding the box, facing the door of the software development zone.

"Hey, you can't go...go..."

Zhou Xiaofeng just wanted to open her mouth, and the door of the development area was automatically opened, so that she could see it one by one.

The standards and standards for confidentiality and safety of the marching ants group are very strict. Outsiders, non-special circumstances, without high-level approval, are not allowed to enter the technology development area.

This little girl, even the door card is not used, directly brush the face?

Even the directors and managers of other departments have to come to the door card, and there are not many people in the marching ant group who can freely enter and exit the technology development area.

"Unparalleled, how come you?"

When Lin Zhiyuan just arrived at the door of the development zone, he saw the unparalleled coming in and hurriedly took the box in her hand. At the same time, other team members in the development area were puzzled by the sudden arrival of the little girl.

"Min Min let me come over, and you are ready to hold a product launch."

“Publishing?” Lin Zhiyuan asked with surprise.

"Yeah, Dad said that the product is good, Min Min wants to hold a press conference for the brain-controlled virtual helmet and asks me to go on stage. Mom said that I only have three hours a day to prepare, and I have to go to school at other times. So I want you Help test the helmet, get real experience data, make PPT and video."

“The boss said that success?” Lin Zhiyuan said with a surprise.

"Yeah." There is no double focus.

Unparalleled in the software technology of the brain-controlled virtual helmet, sometimes Lin Zhiyuan will help to test and guide, so he also knows that the unparalleled research on the brain-controlled virtual helmet, did not expect the unparalleled success, but also the boss's approval.

It is a daughter of the boss, a talented girl.

"Yes, no problem." Lin Zhiyuan took the chest and promised: "Take me the test and promotion video."

"Thank you, Uncle Lin." Musou said.

"You're welcome."

"Then I will come early tomorrow, Uncle Lin will see you again."

After the unparalleled departure, several software development teams in the lab looked at Lin Zhiyuan and were curious.

It is impossible to enter the development area, even if it is Lin Zhiyuan’s relatives.

"Boss, who is the girl? Good polite girl, are you a prostitute?" asked a team leader who had a good relationship with Lin Zhiyuan.

"My niece? I don't have this kind of blessing. She is the daughter of the boss, and our big lady Chen Wushuang."

"The daughter of the boss?"

All the researchers on the field looked at Lin Zhiyuan, as if to discover the new world, the boss has a daughter, they all heard that they occasionally come to the company to find the president Zhao Min to play, or go to the laboratory of the first floor, they are also the first time See the real person.

"What about the boss's daughter looking for Lin?" A group of straight males were curious in their eyes.

"Missy has developed a product and needs to find a team to test."

“What product?” The researchers in the half-developed area didn’t get together, and they stretched their ears one by one. The original noisy voice was much smaller.

"The confidentiality regulations of the development area are clear, and the next is a confidential product. The brain-controlled virtual helmet is the first generation of virtual reality equipment." Lin Zhiyuan took out the virtual helmet from the box.

A group of programmers looked at the virtual helmet, his eyes wide open and his mouth open.

They usually live in amateur life, and many of them spend their time in the game. This device is just a generation of artifacts.

"Tell everyone a good news, just received the notice from the boss, the marching ant group will hold a press conference, release products about the game hardware, and invite me to the scene."

When the white willows fell, the barrage style of the live broadcast changed.

After all the major social platforms and game circles, after experiencing its charm, various fancy styles blew virtual reality helmets.

Nowadays, many people have started to use virtual reality helmets to play games. Waiting for one second is a torment for Long Xinyu.

Anxiously, the elevator door opened, and I saw two courier brothers carrying a big box and slowly coming out, Kong Xinyu ecstatic.

"finally come."

Kong Xinyu hurriedly opened the door, cleaned up the small obstacles on the road, and let the courier brother easily carry it into the house.

"it's beautiful."

After seeing the unconventional version of the virtual reality helmet after unpacking, Kong Xinyu was heartily praised.

The Extreme Edition has a seat that is very comfortable, you can sit and play, or you can lie down and play.

The virtual reality helmet is much more beautiful than the one seen at the press conference. The texture and painting are very detailed. There is a sense of texture and texture, and the details are in place.

After the preparation, Kong Xinyu did not even pack the foam in the box and the ground, and could not wait to sit in a chair and put on a brain-controlled virtual reality helmet.

A brand new world appears before his eyes.

The production line problem of the marching ant group is almost non-existent. Only when necessary, can quickly produce enough products, and there is no shortage of goods.

Not only Kong Xinyu, but now many game fans have received virtual reality helmets, and more and more game esports fans have begun to use virtual reality helmets to play games.

The immersive picture, the direct brain control game, the more powerful game substitution and the sense of gaming experience, which was not available before.

Shortly after the launch of the virtual reality helmet, Penguin, Blizzard, Ubisoft, Netease and other top global game companies announced that they would open a server for brain-controlled virtual reality games and provide experience and match as a virtual reality device.

Several also specially dispatched teams to the marching ant company to discuss cooperation and prepare to cooperate to develop more virtual reality games.

For the game industry, this is an opportunity for change. If you seize the opportunity and gain more share in the virtual reality game field, it means a bigger opportunity.

Not only are some of the top game companies fighting for it, but some outsiders are also starting to buy medium-sized gaming companies to get a share in this new field.

Soon, the Wild Fish Platform and the World E-sports Alliance jointly announced that the virtual reality game will be included in the future eSports Super League as a major event.

The virtual reality game is on fire.

At the same time, the fire is up, there is no match.

The tender and confident unparalleled, at the press conference, a blockbuster.

This conference, the unparalleled desalination is the identity of Chen Mo's daughter, becoming the most outstanding representative in the game circle and the younger generation.

Numerous e-sports enthusiasts will be unparalleled as the supreme **** in the field of e-sports.

Three months.

In the world of e-sports, it took a full three months to complete the update.

A steady stream of virtual reality games is launched, and traditional games are designed and developed in accordance with the standards of virtual reality games.

In the field of games, virtual reality helmet equipment began to gradually replace traditional screen computers.

......

Booming...

In the gym room of the gym, a loud noise blew open. In front of Chen Mo, a robot slammed into the wall and quickly climbed up and rushed toward Chen Mo again.

Ten minutes later, all the robots stopped, and in the center of the military room, Chen Mo stopped and took a deep breath.

After relaxing, the muscle lines on the body are much softer, and Chen Mo's body returns to its original appearance. The sweat of the beans gives a feeling of heartyness.

"Mergo, drink water."

When the ink girl handed Chen Mo a bottle of water, she began to wipe the sweat from Chen Mo.

The robot is a sparring robot that Chen Mo used to train as an opponent.

Since the Zijin authority of the Science and Technology Library has changed, the body has changed. Chen Mo now feels that his body is getting stronger and stronger, and steel can be bent under the fist.

This kind of improvement is amazing.

"I am going to take a shower, wait for the breakfast to go to the company." Chen Mo looked at the time and went to the bathroom of the gym.

Xiao Yu wears an apron and is busy with breakfast in the kitchen.

Although the servant at home, the robot can do breakfast, but she is used to personally preparing breakfast for Chen Mo.

Watching Chen Mo eat his own breakfast, Xiao Yu will be very satisfied, so that it tastes good when eaten, and there is also a kind of home warmth. Tied up the man, to tie his stomach, this little fish still knows.

After so long, the relationship between the two has not faded.

After the marriage, Xiao Yu took Chen Mo and his family as the center of the world. Chen Mo spent most of his time studying, so Xiao Yu helped him deal with his family's relationship and made Chen Mo no worries.

Chen Moqian is with her, she also moved to Chen Mo, and easy to meet, a little bit of fun is happy for a long time.

Chen Mo Lao said that she did not have a good time, it was a kind of petting tone. Doing things that little women do every day, managing the family, it is also a kind of happiness.

When Chen Mo accompanied her, she could be happy for a few days, unscrupulous and spoiled, doing whatever she wanted to do. When Chen Mo was busy with research, she read books, asked her family, or looked at the charity foundation and the unparalleled things.

I know when I can interrupt Chen Mo, when I can't bother him, so Xiao Yu's sensible things, let her get Chen Mo's best favorite.

Life is simple and not boring.

"The porridge is good."

Xiaoyu turned off the power of the induction cooker and carefully opened the lid.

Suddenly, Xiao Yu’s brow wrinkled and the smell of steam from the pot made her feel nausea.

Is it a problem with porridge?

Xiaoyu hesitated, grabbed the spoon next to it and took a spoonful. After a cool blow, he slowly tasted it.

vomit……

Just tasted the taste, an extremely strong nausea sensation hit, let Xiaoyu dry a few times.

what happened? Is the taste normal?

Xiao Yu patted the chest and slowly came back, recalling the taste just now, no problem.

Vomiting... vomiting...

When Xiao Yu just wanted to taste the second bite, a more intense nausea hit.

Xiao Yu ran to the sink next to the cupboard and retched a few times. The nausea made her tears fall out and her face was pale.

After a long delay, I looked up and smelled the porridge floating in the pot, which was a strong nausea.

Did not dare to stay in the kitchen, Xiaoyu fled directly to leave, ran into the bathroom, two minutes later, only came out from inside, a pale face.

Suddenly thinking of something, Xiao Yu hastily rushed back to the room.

"What happened? The nanny robot said that you spit?" When Chen Yu came out of the room, Chen Mo just rushed back.

Just now, the ink girl told him that the nanny robot saw that Xiao Yu was vomiting. He didn't want to, he just turned back. He just took a shower and his hair was still not dry.

Seeing Chen Mo, Xiao Yu ran straight to jump on him and hugged him tightly.

"What's the matter? What happened? There is a husband, not afraid." Chen Mo caressed Xiaoyu's back.

"I have it."

"Is not afraid, yes? What do you have?" Chen Mo suddenly felt wrong, his voice improved a lot, with expectations.

"I am pregnant." Xiao Yu Xianbao put the pregnancy test stick in front of Chen Mo, with a deep joy.

"Then you still run so fast."

Chen Mo spirit shocked, with a surprise, gently picked up the small fish and put it on the sofa, gently touched her belly.

"A good rest in the future, no need to cook, I told Mom to come over and have someone to take care of you."

"Yeah." Xiao Yuqi nodded his head and was still immersed in joy.

In the past few months, she has always wanted a second child, often entangled with Chen Mo to the one, and each time she was tossed to beg for mercy, and then challenged authority for two days, and so on.

In the past, Chen Mo was horrible. Now, after the evolution of the body, it is even more horrible, with endless energy and physical strength.

In addition to rest during special times, she has worked very hard and has not missed any chance.

But after a few months, my stomach still didn't move, and with Chen Mo's physical changes, she is not forced now.

Just a little doubt, I only came there last month, it will be twenty days, there should be no morning sickness, but when I think of Chen Mo's situation, Xiao Yu still tried it. I didn't expect it to be true.

This is a big surprise.

chapters.title: Chapter 740: : Alien Arrival
chapters.body:
Chapter 740: : Alien Arrival

vomit……

Xiao Yufu retched on the small washbasin and felt the stomach in the river. There is a great vomiting sensation when I see the food now.

After a long time, Xiao Yu was sitting up straight and his face was pale and exhausted.

Take a bite and vomit, not eating a few things in these two days.

This can make Chen Mo anxious, this morning sickness is too strong, so going down, the small fishing body can not hold, is a big problem.

Nowadays, the state of small fishing makes people look very anxious and can't eat anything. This is the most troublesome.

"Is it better?" Chen Mo asked the back of Xiaoyu and asked softly.

"Well, it’s better." The little fisherman was slow and his face was pale and tired.

"Don't hurry to eat, first slow down, slow down and eat again." Chen Mo helped her manage the scattered hair before the balance, and helped her back to the sofa, did not go to the dinner table.

After vomiting for so long, Xiaoyu did not eat anything, and spit it out when she ate it, and tossed her up.

Chen Mo looked in his eyes and hurt in his heart.

I have checked that Xiaoyu was only pregnant for less than three weeks, and pregnancy is so horrible that I have never seen it before. In just two days, she was tossed into a tired look. If this is the case in the future, or if it is stronger, I am afraid it will be very troublesome.

In the past two days, Chen Mo has not studied the mind, and is accompanying Xiao Yu. I hope she is in a good mood and can eat something.

After ten minutes of rest on the sofa, the little fisherman recovered, but the paleness of his face did not fade.

"Husband, I suddenly want to eat grapes, I want ice." Xiaoyu said.

"Okay." Chen Mo did not want to agree, let the robot take the grapes in the refrigerator.

Now Chen Mo does not care about the heat of ice. As long as Xiao Yu can eat it, he will not care about other problems.

After the robot took the grapes, Chen Mo immediately put the grapes in front of the small fish.

Seeing Chen Mo’s anxious appearance, Xiao Yu’s heart was moved.

"Thanks husband."

"Try one, slow down, and spit it if you don't feel right." Chen Mo sent a grape to her mouth.

Xiaoyu slowly tasted two and didn't spit it out. This can not help but let Chen Mo happy, immediately give her a third, let her eat slowly.

After eating a bunch of grapes, the small fish stopped.

"I want to drink yogurt."

"Okay." Chen Mo immediately let the robot take the yogurt, and now everything is not important for small fish to eat.

Fifteen minutes later, Xiaoyu continued to drink four bottles of yogurt to stop, and the color recovered a lot.

"How are you feeling?"

"Well, much better, it seems that the little guy in the stomach is very picky." Xiao Yu touched his stomach, his face was helpless, and he was extremely happy, with the gentleness of his motherhood.

"I want to eat something to tell me later."

"I don't want to eat now, I want to go out and walk." Xiaoyu said.

"...good." Chen Mo looked at the current state of Xiao Yu, biting his teeth, or promised to come down.

Now take her out for a walk, maybe the mood can be better, and the discomfort will not be too strong in the future.

Packing up some things, Xiao Yu put on a pair of flat shoes, put on a set of loose clothes, and then Chen Mo left home.

The shopping malls in Binhai are as busy as ever.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu wear masks, and Xiao Yu wears loose maternity clothes, holding Chen Mo’s hand, like an ordinary pregnant wife, and her husband is out shopping.

The ink girl is on the other side of the small fishing, protecting the small fish.

Judging from the look of Xiao Yu, it has recovered a lot.

The two are stopping in front of the mother and baby supermarket in the mall, and there is a parenting lecture in front. Ordinary parenting lectures, mainly during pregnancy, what to pay attention to and taboos, how to prenatal education, what to pay attention to in the production process.

There are also a lot of pregnant women around, with her husband, and I am alone.

The content of this kind of lecture, although Xiaoyu knows it, still listens to it with gusto, both hands protect the flat stomach, and the eyes are happy.

This little guy, before it appeared, she was tossed to death, and after it appeared, it was tossed to death, hard to come by.

"Husband, let's go." Xiao Yu took Chen Mo's hand and turned to leave the lecture area.

Just a few steps away, Xiao Yu and Chen Mo were stopped by a lecture staff and looked at the two with a smile.

“Ms. is a pregnant woman?” The staff glanced at the loose fishing clothes and asked with a smile.

"Do you have something?" Xiao Yu did not answer directly, watching the staff with vigilance.

The staff also saw a little defense from Xiaoyu, and did not care. The smile said: "This is the case. Our event has a live experience. Lady, you would like to let your husband experience the delivery of pregnant women. The kind of pain?"

"No, thank you." Xiao Yu shook his head.

"Ms. Why do you refuse?" The staff immediately asked: "Isn't it good? Let your husband realize the hard work of giving birth."

"My husband is also very hard. He has the responsibility and burden of the head of the family. He never let me experience his hard work."

Chen Mo’s heart was warm and his face was always softly smiling.

After Xiao Yu refused the staff of the parenting lecture, he took Chen Mo’s arm and left to go to him.

"Where do you want to go next?" Chen Mo asked.

"The stomach is hungry again," said Xiao Yu.

"What to eat?"

"I don't know... vomit..." When I thought of eating, Xiaoyu felt a strong sense of vomiting, and the stomach fell over the river, and the garbage bin was retching twice before recovering.

"Go home first." Chen Mo helped the small fishermen and quickly left the mall.

Then there was another difficult battle, and now Chen Mo frowned. He thought about whether or not to find a drug to cure the problem of morning sickness in small fishing, so that it would not work.

......

In the space outside the solar system, a spaceship resembling a carrot suddenly appeared.

In the window of the head of the spaceship, the Blue Master and Torrell stood side by side, patrolling the scenery of space and looking awkward.

Other people's faces are not good-looking, and there is fear on their faces.

There was a problem with the space jump just now. No one expected that this space jump would be unstable.

If the space jumps collapse when they jump in space, all their creatures will be crushed into atoms. And if there is a turbulent flow of space jumping points, they may also be sent to a deep space unknown to the universe, and finally lost.

Almost equal to the boat when sailing in the sea, was into the tornado.

These are the real dangers of space navigation and tourism, so non-average people will not be able to sail around the universe in spaceships.

Fortunately, this space jump is a surprise, they are here.

If you let them go in this space again, I am afraid I will not take risks.

"A small star system." The blue master looked at the planet's trajectory map of the solar system, and some surprised.

This star is located in a remote location, so small, actually gave birth to life, which is very rare.

“It’s just in line with the most basic living conditions of red-level creatures,” said Torrell.

"Looking over the past and see if there is any gain this time," said the Blue Master.

The engine of the spacecraft is started again, and the coordinates set are on the third planet of the solar system. After the coordinates are set, the light speed cruise starts and the spacecraft disappears in place.

chapters.title: Chapter 741: :Crisis
chapters.body:
Chapter 741: :Crisis

Kong City Lala's tight spacesuit, loosen the handle and floated to the observation deck of the space station.

His location is the Space Space Station of the Marching Ant Group, which is a tourist of the Space Station.

Nowadays, space tourism is very developed. It only needs 10 million. After half a month of training by flying ant space, it can adapt to this weightless state and get into space.

The average billionaire has the ability to experience the charm of space.

Floating to the lookout cabin, Kong Cheng looked out to look at the space outside the window.

This period of space tourism, for five days, he has been up for two days, used the space telescope to watch the universe, and has a new understanding of the vastness of the universe.

Only by being immersed can you realize that kind of smallness, and the world has proved that aliens in the universe exist.

The billions of years of the universe, the history of human development, is just the moment between the bombs, and the short life of mankind is even more worth mentioning.

At the time of emotion, Kong City frowned and looked at a strange point in the distance. Not yet, the point seems to suddenly appear.

Other space stations? It is also a spaceship of the marching ant group.

Curious, Kong City turned a small goggles in the cabin to that position.

There are simple applications for training these devices during training.

When looking at the true face of an unknown object, Kong Cheng opened his mouth and stayed in the woods.

......

"Husband."

"Ok."

"I don't know why, I have a little bit of uncertainty."

Xiao Yu took Chen Mo’s hand and walked on the beach. He suddenly stopped and his brow wrinkled.

Suddenly she had a feeling of flustered, and she always felt that something bad happened. This is the sixth sense of a woman.

"Well? Is it uncomfortable?" Chen Mo asked nervously.

"No." Xiao Yu shook his head and couldn't tell where it was bad.

Since I found out that I was pregnant, I couldn’t sleep well, and it was very hard. When Chen Mo had time, he took time to accompany her.

“Maybe it’s a problem with the sea breeze? Go home now?”

"Wait, I made a wish."

After the fisherman finished, he closed his eyes with his hands together. Xiao Yu, who grew up on the beach, had this hobby when he was a child. He always liked it, so Chen Mo was holding her next to him and waiting quietly.

A minute later, Xiao Yu opened his eyes and took Chen Mo to go home.

"What is your wish?" Chen Mo asked.

"Have two, it will not work if you say it." Xiao Yu said.

"You can guess if you don't say it."

"Then you said what I promised?"

"One is that the baby is born healthy, one is about me, it should be your husband, I am in good health, research is smooth, and so on, you will be a little bit more promising, and you will be guessed."

"How come I have no interest, I am better than you."

"How can I prove that I am better than me?"

"I am hungry. I want you to cook for me tonight." Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo proudly.

"..."

The ink girl next to her smiled.

Suddenly, the ink girl looked up at the sky, the smile on her face converge, looking at Chen Mo.

The stranger of the ink girl was also noticed by Chen Mo and Xiao Yu, and her eyes were confused at the same time.

"There are visitors." The ink girl took out the holographic mobile phone, the light curtain of the holographic projection, and put the picture out.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu’s pupils shrank and looked shocked.

......

"finally reached."

Beyond the Earth, a huge radish-shaped spacecraft drifts within the gravitational field of the Earth and rotates around the Earth.

On the spaceship, it is the Blue Master and Torrell.

At this time, the archaeological team and the biological research team were all looking at each other and gathered the entire inspection team to observe. This trip was only this time.

In this remote corner, they are curious as to what biological civilization is here.

“How is the detection data of quantum radar?”

"Completed, red-grade carbon-based organisms, pure anthropoids, civilization is evolving from the planetary level to the constant star, and the evolutionary direction is consistent with the evolution of technological civilization."

The lizard head holds the instrument, which is the development information of the earth detected by the quantum radar.

"A very intelligent civilization, a very strange planet."

This is the final conclusion.

Various data show that this civilization is smarter than the creatures of the red-tailed star they caught last time.

The humanoid is one of the more intelligent creatures in the same class of the universe, which is the conclusion of the study of the Universe Alliance. The humanoid brain is developed, and it is also one of the most vulnerable creatures of natural vitality. Perhaps it is the fairness in the world.

"This planet was born 200 million years ago, a large class of orc, very clever, developed to the edge of wisdom and civilization, but unfortunately congenital body constraints, no words, will not use the rules of the universe, and finally 65 million years ago, The planet was hit by an asteroid and the climate change was extinct. The lizard's head clicked on the instrument a few times and the dinosaur's projection appeared.

The dinosaur creature and the lizard's head look a bit like, so the lizard head is a pity.

The blue master held his chin and looked at the blue planet in front of his eyes with interest: "I don't know if they have found us."

"It should be discovered that there are many satellites here," said the lizard head.

"How about Torrell?" The Blue Master looked at Torrell.

At this time, Torrell glanced at the earth in front of his eyes, and there was an excitement in his eyes, forcing himself to calm down.

This is a big discovery.

"How much do you want to grab this time?"

"From 100,000 samples, there are 65,000 capacity, and I am going to grab 50,000." Torrell said with a deep breath.

"Catch so much?" The Blue Master was extremely surprised.

There are still many life planets to go, and Torrell is ready to arrest so many times that it is hard to get. After all, the Cosmic Alliance stipulates that a red-class civilization can only capture up to 10 for a study.

"Yes, I feel that this kind of human race is very special. It is absolutely rare in the place of Raniaia."

Torrell looked down at the information he had discovered.

"The wisdom of red-level creatures, but to create a civilization close to the star rating, learn to transform the planet, learn to use the most orthodox rules of the universe, very smart. And this civilization is very young, such a young civilization, to this extent, Their brains and wisdom are more developed than we think. If they continue to develop for thousands of years, they can definitely develop into more advanced technological civilizations. According to my experience, their wisdom is higher than imagined."

“So confident?” asked the blue teacher.

"Yes." Torrell did not hesitate to answer, based on his archaeological experience of biology for many years.

The blue division gave a little bit of a wolf head and did not continue to ask.

Torrel itself is a humanoid, low-level humanoid research, is his main subject.

This kind of red-class humanoid is a good research object, and they are more likely to evolve to a higher level. Once you find a way to let Torrele's ethnic group master the evolution to a higher level of life, then there is no limit to the benefits.

This kind of project, many high-level races are studying, not a special topic.

Standing at the top of the food chain has always been the pursuit of all wisdom and civilization.

"What are you going to do next? Continue to observe their habits? Or directly arrest the research samples. But it is a bit late, we are already entering their territory. This level of civilization, once we find us, will be instinctively prepared, say Will not attack us," said the Blue Master.

This kind of situation is the law of the forest. They are like hunters carrying guns into the territory of aggressive creatures. The other party will definitely be prepared, and it is still such a clever creature.

chapters.title: Chapter 742: : The Person Is Not Good
chapters.body:
Chapter 742: : The Person Is Not Good

In the villa, Chen Mo and Mo Nu also watched the movement of the alien spacecraft, and did not act rashly.

The other party seems to have been observing them all the time. Now that the telescope is aimed at the lens, the other spacecraft has no special action.

He does not understand the other party's intentions now. If he rushed to make a mistake, the consequences would be unimaginable.

But there is no waiting.

Now that the weapons that Chen Mo can prepare are ready, if he is not good, he will not be able to get rid of it.

"Mergo, what should I do?" The ink girl looked at Chen Mo.

In this case, for the first time, an incomparably huge alien spacecraft stopped in space and overlooked them.

"Drips... Li Laoge came to the video call."

On the occasion of their quiet observation, the artificial intelligence of the mobile phone sounded, Chen Mo did not want to connect.

"Chen Mo, is that huge carrot-shaped spaceship in space?" The holographic image of the video call popped up, and Li Chengzhi opened the door, his voice was a little short, and his appearance was extremely anxious.

"No." Chen Mo didn't think about it.

"No?"

The voice of Li Chengzhi has changed, looking at the old man behind the camera.

I was just dealing with the business and suddenly I was invited by the 100,000 rush.

One of the most secret underground bases, when he came, he was blindfolded after being asleep. He didn't even know where it was and how he came.

When he woke up to see the old man sitting in the house, he knew that something had happened, otherwise he would not use this urgency to find him in such a serious way.

Now, there are only two pictures in the cabin, one is the video call with Chen Mo, and the other is the unidentified spaceship that the space station and telescope are concerned about.

When I heard Chen Mo’s answer, everyone on the field was confused, only the old man was calm.

Of all their impressions, only Chen Mo has the ability to make such a huge spaceship, and others can't make that level of spacecraft.

Chen Mo denied now.

"Ask him if he knows who?" The old man opened his mouth and his voice was thick.

"The current technology of the earth can't make such a spaceship. I can't make it now. The big probability is alien."

Chen Mo pays attention to the video of outer space while answering. I don't have to think about it, I also know that some people on the phone are concerned about this matter.

The emergence of such a huge spaceship, if it is not good, it is a matter of human life and death.

"Alien?"

Hearing Chen Mo’s answer, the old man’s serious face finally appeared to move, and his pupils shrank slightly, but he quickly calmed down and let Li Chengzhi step down. The video call turned to him.

"If it is an alien, can you deal with it?" the old man asked by phone.

"I don't know the technical strength of the other side. Now I am also paying attention to it. So it is best to first understand the foreign visitors this day. It is an enemy or a friend." Chen Mo appeared on the camera with the old man, and there was no accident.

"If the person is not good, I hope that you can shoot when the time comes." The old man said heavily.

"If the person is not good, it is about the time when human beings live and die. I don't think it is possible to stay out of things." Chen Mo was serious.

"The head, the president of the North American group came to the video call." Just hang up the call with Chen Mo, the next secretary attached to the old man said.

"Take it over," said the old man.

......

Eva sat in the seat of the secret lodge, an emergency safe house used during the war to guard against special weapons attacks by opponents.

Their space station also found the huge spaceship in space, so in the first time, hid in a safe house.

She hid in with her, in addition to the control buttons of the big mushroom, and her brains Rosen.

No one knows what the spacecraft is, and now it is a time of global war. This danger must be guarded.

The first idea that emerged was the marching ant group, and then the eastern power.

When I heard the assistant say that the video call was connected, Eva sorted out the emotions slightly and walked to the camera.

"Hello there."
