"Hello there."

Seeing the old man in the video, Eva smiled and said hello, directly into the theme: "The spaceship in space, is yours?"

"No, I asked Chen Mo, not his, it may be an alien." The old man calmly said.

"Alien?"

Eva's face changed dramatically, and Rosen and other assistants next to him were all moving and facing each other. At this time, I believe no one thinks this is a joke. And aliens really exist, the world knows.

"Now, at a critical time, it may be related to human survival. I hope that both sides can unite at this time," the old man said.

"What do you want to do?" Eva said after he blinked.

"In conjunction with several other companies to send a message together, ask the intention of the person to come, confirm the other party's intentions, explore the strength of the other party, and be prepared for the response."

"First promise him." Rosen hurriedly pointed to the headset, very serious.

"Good." Eva promised.

After a simple exchange, the two people's topics are over.

Eva looked at Rosen and frowned. "Why promise them?"

"If they have such technology for us, we have no room for rebellion. At this time, he does not need to lie to us. If it is an alien, it is about human life and death." Rosen drank the red wine in the cup. The tone is serious.

......

"Professor Lan Shi, Professor Torrel, the country of the planet sent electromagnetic messages." The lizard spit out his tongue and handed the electrons in his hand to the Blue Master and Torrell, a greeting from the Earth.

"It seems that they found us and translated it out."

"Our light brain compilers are different from their programs. Languages are different, symbols are different, password systems are different, and they use quantum encryption communication. Important networks cannot be cracked!"

"That can only be caught," said Torrell.

The language message is unreachable.

This is the most troublesome part of the universe, but for them, this is a must.

"Catch a few ethnic groups." The lizard pointed to the space station in the distance, and said to the players next to it: "There are a few there, don't have to run around."

"Okay." The player who was called next to him nodded and turned away.

......

Kong City looked nervously at the distant spacecraft, next to him, other people in the space station.

After discovering this shape spaceship, they could not wait to leave the space station immediately.

Here they are not far away, aliens may find their presence at any time. Now people in the entire space station are worried.

The carrot spacecraft suddenly opened a hole, and a small spaceship appeared and flew over them. The spacecraft gradually grew bigger in their eyes, and finally stopped in front of the space station, extending the robot to grasp the entire space, dragging the space station to fly toward the carrot ship. At this moment, the entire space station was filled with desperate emotions.

“Immediately enter the safe cabin to escape.” The robot said to several space station personnel, urging them to leave the space station in a safe cabin.

A word awakens the dreamer.

When the robot came out, several people immediately got the idea, and all went to the escape hall of the space station.

Oh...

Several escape cabins were just launched, and Kongcheng felt a huge shock. When he looked up, he saw that the escape cabin was caught by the robotic arm and could not move.

chapters.title: Chapter 743: : Arresting Humans
chapters.body:
Chapter 743: : Arresting Humans

"There is a bad person."

When I saw the space station of the flying ant space and the escape cabins were captured, Chen Mo’s mood suddenly broke down.

From the action point of view, it has been determined that the other party is not good.

Things are trickier than he imagined.

From the perspective of the spacecraft technology that is displayed, the other party is one level higher than the technology he masters.

trouble!

For the space station to be captured, Chen Mo can only watch, powerless. For the first time, there was such a feeling of powerlessness and the experience was not very good.

Now launching rockets or weapons to attack, the effect is not great.

"Ink girl, prepare all the weapons and aircraft, the defense level is up to the highest level." Chen Mo on the lab bench, enter his fingerprint and password information.

"Good." The ink girl nodded.

At this time, the Villa Underground Research Institute, the Fei Ant Space Base, the No. 1 Building, and the Armed Forces Ant Weapons R&D Base in Africa, all the weapons that the Ms.

All aircraft and armored engines are launched, and large-scale flying weapons appear in the sky.

In the special period, Chen Mo did not intend to start weapons. This is the first time that Chen Mo has started weapons on a large scale since its research and development.

"If there is fighting, you will bring a small fishing, unparalleled and parents to the safe house." Chen Mo said heavily.

He does not know the intention of the other party. If the other party wants to destroy the earth, it should not stay for so long, but it is not malicious, and the other party captures the space station.

Drops...

At the moment when Chen Mo launched the weapon on a large scale, the phone sent a rush of ringing.

Zhao Min’s phone.

"What happened? Are you going to destroy the world?"

"A little special situation." Chen Mo said.

"What special circumstances?" Zhao Min's heart was lifted up.

Just now she was in the office. The armor and war robots in the No. 1 area all flew up, and the movement was not small. Now the entire headquarters of the park can be seen.

Zhao Min was also the first to see this situation.

Zhao Min is one of the few people who know the true strength of the marching ant group. Zhaomin has to worry about this situation.

"The alien spacecraft captured our space station."

Zhao Min’s face changed.

"I am going to you now."

After that, Zhao Min put down the phone and quickly turned away from the office.

"Transfer the video of this video to the official countries." Chen Mo put down his mobile phone and looked up at the space station that disappeared inside the carrot-shaped spaceship.

The signal from the space station also disappeared as it entered the interior of the spacecraft.

......

"There is a bad person."

In the secret underground base of the capital, the old man looked at the video images passed by Chen Mo, and he was deeply dignified.

On his other side, there are two videos, the armor of Chen Mo Villa and the alien spacecraft returned from the Space Station.

"Be prepared for the worst." The old man said seriously: "Continue to send them an inquiry signal."

The signals they sent up did not get a response, but instead the space station of the marching ant group was captured.

The space station's ordinary small toys were captured and dragged into the alien spacecraft. This video was passed on to the top of the powers of the various powers of the earth, and panic spread in the hearts of the top leaders of various powers.

But no one dares to act rashly, but the weapons are all ready, and all kinds of fighters have been launched. As long as the situation is not right, they will never sit still.

......

Kongcheng was caught in a transparent compartment, like a sealed cage, with the same oxygen and air pressure inside the space station.

His body was fixed and could not move.

In the transparent cabin, it is a strange environment and a strange group of creatures.

Alien.

This is the first time he has seen an alien at such a close distance, or is alive and grotesque.

Blue wolf head aliens, lizard heads, and blue-skinned humanoid aliens, if not personally experienced, would think it was a dream.

Just now, he saw with his own eyes that the entire space station, like the captured doll, was captured and dragged here.

All the aliens’ eyes are on him.

This is an unknown fear, and an unprecedented sense of panic permeates the mind of Kong Cheng.

Kongcheng was so swallowing that he was waiting for a prisoner.

In the movie, there are too many stories of aliens catching earth people to experiment, killing people on earth and destroying the earth. Subtle and subtle, the impression of his aliens is not very good from the beginning.

Now he is really caught.

"What do you want to do?" Strong and courageous, Kong City still used his last courage to ask this sentence.

? ? ?

The Blue Master and Torrell looked at each other and shook their heads. The meaning was obvious. They didn't understand what Kongcheng was saying and looked at the head of the lizard.

"Lizard, let's get started."

"it is good."

The lizard's head was more than a gesture, and a head-like instrument was placed in a transparent compartment. The machine in the cabin placed the instrument on the head of Kongcheng.

In the exploration of the universe, language barrier is the most troublesome thing. In the exploration of the universe civilization of hundreds of millions of years, neuro-conscious translation instruments came into being.

This kind of instrument can directly translate the language of a creature into a language they can understand through neural consciousness.

This is the main reason why they capture space stations and arrest humans. They just need a translational intermediary organism.

I saw the lizard head click on the controller in the hand.

Wearing a translator in Kongcheng, I feel that the scalp is stinging, and there seems to be something that penetrates his skull and is tangled in his brain.

"What do you want to do?" The pain made Kong City's fear disappear a lot, and now it is broken and broken.

"All right."

The lizard headed a blue ball and Torrel gestured, turned to look at Kongcheng, took out an electromagnetic audio player and placed it in front of Kongcheng.

"The blue-eyed humanoid, we will not kill you, you will not die, don't be afraid, help us translate a message."

Kong City heard the sound of the lizard's head, and had a desperate look, looking up at the head of the lizard, covered with scales.

"Respected foreign visitors, we welcome you on behalf of all human beings on earth. We humans love peace and hope to have friendly exchanges."

"Respected alien friends, we are human beings on earth, welcome you."

Kong Cheng read two messages, all of which were sent by the earth, namely Chinese and English. Japanese and Russian Kong City did not understand, so there was no way to read them.

The fear disappeared, and Kong City calmed his mood and scanned the aliens in front of him.

“Several welcome messages.”

The blue division and Torrell smiled.

"We seem to have robbed their toys. It is estimated that they have now regarded us as intruders. There are many weapons against us."

The lizard spit out the slender tongue and clicked on the instrument. All the structural projections of the space station were placed in front of a group of people.

"This kind of toy is used by low-level civilizations such as planet-level and star-rated. It is a simple spacecraft toy that has no technical content, but it is very precious for them."

The alien aliens just looked at the projection of the space station and turned their eyes to Kongcheng.

Creeds without intelligence are aggressive, not to mention the civilization of wisdom. Even if the lizards say that the humans on Earth are aiming at them with weapons, they don't care.

If the planet's creatures attack them, they only need to use their fingers to destroy them.

No aliens care about humans' welcoming, and no aliens care about the anger of this low-level civilization. Just arresting space stations and humans, just translating information, is purely curious about what the earth people would say and the language of collecting such civilizations.

"This kind of human race is the most typical kind of human race. The body is very fragile, the brain is very developed, very intelligent, and it is a good sample of humanoid research."

Torrell looked at Kongcheng satisfactorily, as well as several astronauts who had just caught it.

"Then you are ready to arrest now?" asked the Blue Master.

"Yes." Torrell nodded. "If you want to be together, you are doing archaeology. I am doing biological research. We are not in conflict."

"Then start preparing to collect evidence and biological samples of this civilization, as well as language, civilization trajectory." The blue teacher said to the lizard head.

"I have also started."

Torrell took out a controller and ordered a few times. Thousands of catching aircraft crashed toward the earth.

chapters.title: Chapter 744: : Prepare For Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 744: : Prepare For Battle

Xiao Yu is sitting in the underground laboratory of the villa and is restless. The unparalleled has been picked up from school and sits quietly in her arms.

The aliens are coming.

Xiao Yu has a feeling of palpitation. This is the first time this feeling has appeared. Today, the feeling of flustering has intensified, unprecedented.

Now Chen Mo is out of the aliens, she has no gods, but she does not dare to disturb Chen Mo.

In the window in front of her eyes is the armor, these armor did not give her a sense of security, only Chen Mo is around her, the mood will be stable.

"Mom, don't be afraid, Dad will protect us." Unparalleled comfort said that she did not meet the maturity of her age.

"Well, my mother is not afraid."

Xiao Yu squeezed a smile and worried about it.

Suddenly, the lab door opened, and Chen Mo and Mo Nu came in. Xiao Yu instantly found the backbone.

"Is it all right?" asked Xiao Yu.

"A little trouble." Chen Mo took the small fishing and unparalleled hand, entered the secret passage in the laboratory, and entered a 20-square-meter, three-meter-high metal hut.

It was Chen Mo's preparation for special circumstances. The real size of the small house is more than four hundred cubic meters. The interior of the house is made of special shock-absorbing and impact-proof materials. The exterior is made of special ceramic alloy, which can easily resist the impact of nuclear bomb explosion and isolate high temperature and low temperature.

In the safe house, the food and water stored, as well as the oxygen and thermostat system needed to sustain life, are enough for three people to live for a month. In addition, Chen Mo has placed nano-robots here, and there are several amethyst energy cores, small fishing. The armor was also sent in, not afraid of mountain burial, and not afraid of flooding.

"You and the unparalleled stay in the safe house, waiting for me to come back."

"What happened?"

"The aliens put some things on the earth. I don't know what it is. You and the unparalleled stay here will be safe. Parents and they are all transferred to a safe place by the robot. You can rest assured here." Chen Mo looked serious .

"Do you want to go out?"

Xiaoyin’s voice was a little trembling, and Chen Mo looked at him, and his eyes already knew the answer.

"I don't want you to go out."

Xiao Yu is holding Chen Mo tightly, for fear that he will run away, and the uneasiness of his heart is unprecedented.

"be good."

Chen Mo kissed Xiao Yu's lips and kissed his unparalleled forehead.

"Take care of your mother and wait for Dad to come back."

"Yeah." There is no double focus, holding the hand of Xiao Yu.

Tightly hugged the two, Chen Mo and the ink woman turned and left the safe house. Before the door of the layer was closed, the appearance of the little fisherman’s tears made Chen Mo’s heart twitch.

"Go."

Chen Mo took a deep breath and adjusted his mood.

The satellites came back to the picture. Thousands of unknown objects were falling to the earth. Chen Mo did not know what weapons, bombs or viruses, or something else?

If it is a weapon, no one knows how powerful the weapon is and how much damage it will cause to the earth.

If a higher civilization wants to destroy the earth, it should not be too difficult, just as much as he wants to destroy a nest of ants.

The worst thing is still happening.

Back in the lab, Chen Mo took out a core of amethyst energy on the chest, and the nano armor spread like a stream of water from the foot, covering his whole body. By his side, the armor of the ink girl has also been covered.

On the bench, the arranged radar is scanning, and the satellite is also tracking the position of those falling objects as much as possible.

"Ink girl, at any time to determine the situation of those falling objects, what weapons are in the end."

Chen Mo still did not leave the laboratory.

The gap between a level of scientific and technological civilization is not self-confident and can be compensated by standing up and screaming. Even if he is strong now, he is only a tall man, and he encounters a higher level of civilization. Without any help, it is good to be able to protect yourself.

......

“The endless scenery is at the peak.”

Sitting on the stone at the top of the mountain, Jinyun looked at the beautiful scenery under his feet, and a sense of accomplishment that was extremely satisfying filled his heart. It is fully equipped, so even on the peaks of more than 3,000 meters above sea level, it does not feel cold.

Adventure and mountain climbing are his greatest hobbies. This kind of conquest of the mountain peaks and the sense of accomplishment of the beautiful scenery at the peak is his greatest pursuit.

Take out the camera and Jinyun is ready to record this important moment.

Just the moment the camera is aimed at the distant scenery, the clouds are all shocked and stunned.

Drops! !

Tomilia madly pressed the car's horn, got up today for half an hour later, in front of a car accident, traffic jam, and a few minutes to go to work, the company's building is in sight.

If you are late, you have to be deducted.

This is not a good thing.

This situation made her very helpless, I can't wait for my car to fly.

"Damn." Tomilia took out his mobile phone and dialed a phone call. He could only call the supervisor. Otherwise, it was not a pleasant thing to be deducted.

Hey! !

The strange sound suddenly appeared, and Tomilia glanced up and looked up at the sky.

I saw a huge egg-shaped object that was falling from the sky and suspended above the road. Suddenly, the cover of the egg-shaped object was opened, and the strange rope of five chopsticks was extended.

The next moment, the strange rope, like tofu, easily penetrated the glass of the car, bound Tomelia, and pulled it toward the egg-shaped machine.

Fear filled her heart. Before losing consciousness, Tomilia only heard the horror on the streets around.

......

Zhao Min landed on the armor platform of Chen Mo Villa and went straight to Chen Mo's underground lab. His expression was dignified.

Upon receiving the news of the aliens, she entered the company's No. 1 area and put on the armor to fly to Chen Mo's home. This is the first time she used the armor in the true sense. It used to be Chen Mo’s practice.

"What about aliens?"

"I am arresting people."

Chen Mo pointed to various video messages on the holographic platform.

It is a video of people who are caught on the Internet or from unknown machines around the world. It is the machine where the alien spacecraft falls.

Campuses, streets, shopping malls, sparsely populated alpine grasslands, tourist areas, company buildings, and even flying into the subway, more and more people are being taken away, unidentified panic is spreading, ordinary people simply do not know what happened.

Zhao Min saw the alien spacecraft and the catching machine on the holographic light curtain, and a heart sank.

"They won't want to catch all the humans?"

Chen Mo shook his head.

"No, there are only tens of thousands of arresters that they have fallen. One arrester only took two people and left. These were taken by the camera."

The number of machines that landed from spacecraft is not many, only tens of thousands, and the volume is not large. Compared with the population base of several billion people, this number is not worth mentioning.

In a war, the number of people affected by death is much larger than this number.

Do higher civilizations use them as experimental samples or food to arrest them?

Even if he guessed the intention of the aliens, Chen Mo did not waver.

His current position, seeing more things, thinking about more things, will not be angry because of this kind of thing.

Because he is also the authority, he has used a variety of small animals to do experiments, but now the position has changed, the higher civilizations to capture them humans, in essence, and the Earth people to capture wild animals is no different.

Weak meat and strong food.

This is the most basic law in the universe.

There is no right or wrong in this law, no mercy and morality. If you want to stand at the top of this law, you must keep yourself strong, and anger and decadence will not help.

"Mergo, the radar shows that there are eight alien machines entering the coastal city, two machines falling toward our house, just above the sky, there are two hundred kilometers, it seems to be coming to us, and half a minute to arrive." The woman suddenly said.

"When Zhao Min is sent to the safe house, don't let her out before he is sure of safety." Chen Mozhen sighed and said, Shen Sheng said.

"Chen Mo, what do you mean?"

Zhao Min realized that he was not good. He just wanted to resist and was controlled by the armor. The body could not move and automatically flew in the direction of the safe house.

"Chen Mo, you are a bastard, you let me go, I am not finished with you, Chen Mo, I hate you..."

Zhao Min’s angry and panicked voice eventually disappeared behind the layers of the door.

The helmet of the Nano Armor covered Chen Mo's head, and the faint light in his eyes lit up. The radar picture of the villa showed that just in front of him, a red dot was going crazy near the villa. Obviously, he came over to him.

"Ink girl, prepare for the battle."

chapters.title: Chapter 745: : Civilization Pioneers
chapters.body:
Chapter 745: : Civilization Pioneers

Boom! ! !

Several small missiles pointed to the falling alien catcher, and the violent explosion exploded over the villa.

A huge fireworks group enveloped the entire sky, and the next moment, the alien catcher fell from the fire to the villa.

boom! !

The machine fell on the villa, and it was easy to withstand the walls and ceilings of the bombings of the bombs. It was as fragile as biscuits, and the smoke and dust caused the shock waves to smash the villa.

For the first time, Chen Mo looked at the true face of the alien trap.

The violent collisions and explosions did not cause any damage to this strange machine, and the surface had strange lines and texts, like numbers. Chen Mo did not know the words, so I don't know what was written above.

But I have seen it on the video, this thing is not easy to provoke.

The catcher suddenly opened, and the strange rope of several chopsticks stretched out and came over to him like a snake.

This arrester is coming to him.

"go."

Chen Mo didn't think about it. The armor quickly pulled up, and opened the distance from the rope. The laser shot in the hand swept the rope. When it passed, several ropes were broken.

Oh...

The catcher vibrates slightly, as if it was irritated, and quickly rushed toward Chen.

boom! !

Not waiting for it, the ink girl appeared in the armor behind the arrester, the metal crashed and the catcher was kicked into the air like a football.

Several armor around them accelerated, and the catcher was only hung, and the laser beam was shot in the hand and cut quickly.

Oh...

The material on the surface of the catcher melts, and the sparks are transmitted from the inside. The catcher is like a leaking balloon, and there is no movement at all.

boom! !

Chen Mo appeared in the sky above the trap, kicking his foot, sweeping down and kicking toward the sea.

The whole process is less than half a minute.

"what?"

Torrell was stunned and looked at the red dot on the screen.

It was unexpected that the catcher of the Blue Star catching creature was actually destroyed.

Although this is not a high-tech product, it can withstand huge impacts. The catching cable is also made of special materials. It is very simple to catch the creatures of the star-star civilization. There is no reason to be so easily destroyed.

Torrell checked the location of the destroyed trap, and transferred the map where he was, seeing that Chen Mo and the ink woman were wearing armor, and there was a slight interest in their eyes.

Other aliens have come around and watched the pictures appearing in the light curtain with great interest.

"Very interesting armor." The lizard's head suddenly opened.

Cosmic civilization also has armor, and it is very common. It is an essential weapon for many creatures. However, the Cosmic League's armor, technology is more advanced, the most powerful armor can easily destroy a planet.

I did not expect the civilization of this small planet, but also studied the armor.

"Isn't it a small toy armor? Is the toy worn by my son better than this?" A female alien with a black lips next to it disdainfully said.

"No, no, no different meaning."

The lizard's head shook his head, and the claws that stretched out the scales shook.

"This level of armor can be used as a toy because of the billions of years of technology accumulation in the Universe Alliance. The origin of the Cosmic Alliance's armor should start from a billion years ago. According to the records, the first generation of armor originated from the Universe Alliance. One of the seven rogues, the Ziwei civilization.

At that time, the Ziwei civilization was still a planetary-class civilization, and the first-generation armor did not even have such an advanced armor. However, because of the successful development of the armor and robots, the Ziwei civilization in the interstellar colonial era of the first generation of the universe at that time, to make up for the weakness of the purple micro-stars human body weakness, combat strength.

The Ziwei civilization rises to conquer the five life planets of this star system and unify the Ziwei star system civilization. Later, various armor appeared constantly, and the strength of Ziwei civilization continued to increase, allowing them to accumulate enough resources and sites to rapidly rise in the cosmic expansion of the first generation of cosmic civilization and lay the advantage.

Later, the technology of Ziwei civilization continued to develop, and their ethnic groups continued to evolve, eventually becoming one of the seven hooligans who founded the Universe Alliance. The Ziwei civilization is one of the seven god-level civilizations that have become the highest order of the Universe Alliance because of the first generation of armor unified Ziwei Galaxy, occupying the first opportunity. The power of the armor is also growing, and until today, it is still the strongest equipment for the individual combat of the universe. ”

Referring to the Ziwei civilization, the lizard's head has an infinite fear and awkwardness.

"You mean this little planet, can you compare the Ziwei civilization?" The female alien with black lips smirked and smiled a little scary.

"No, I just saw the embryonic form of the armor. I was amazed. The anthropomorphic family of this small planet, the direction of civilization is correct. I have not found a road for a while, but it is a bit late. The Ziwei civilization is standing on the ruins of countless civilizations. Only developed by a small civilization can be compared." The lizard head stared at the light curtain.

"This kind of humanoid creature seems to be related to the transformation of the fourth planet." The blue-eyed eye of the eye is condensed and fixed on the sign of Chen Mo's armor.

The logo of the marching ant group.

They saw images of the city of Mars, and at the top of the building there was a huge sign, exactly the same as that on Chen Mo's armor.

"Not going to be the pioneer of civilization on this planet?" said the blue master.

"If it is, then luck is a little better." Torrell smiled.

There are few pioneers of civilization, because a smart civilization is generally created and developed by the entire civilized group. The pioneers are the leaders who lead the continuous progress of civilization in a certain era of civilized groups.

Civilized pioneers are rare, but they must be the most intelligent creatures in the biological group, leading a generation of civilization.

The Law of the Universe Union stipulates that, for the protection of the basic planetary-level civilization, researchers are not allowed to deliberately arrest the pioneers of the planetary-level civilization, because the arrest of the pioneers may lead to the slow development of the development of the planetary civilization.

However, random arrest is possible. From the billions of biological groups, the pioneers of civilization are randomly caught, and it is a difficult one for thousands of years, which is better than the luck of the Grand Prize.

"It seems to be a better catcher."

Torrell's eyes were a little hot, and he took a few points on the instrument in his hand. He dropped two arresters from the spacecraft and crashed toward the earth at a rapid speed.

Pioneers are the most easily evolved organisms from intelligent creatures to more advanced intelligent creatures. They have the best genes and the most intelligent brains. This is very helpful for the evolution of his graduate students.

"Mergo, the alien spacecraft dropped two unknown machines." The ink girl hurriedly reminded.

"trouble."

Chen Mo’s heart is sinking.

“Give the planet bombs and nanobots to them, and the other ships will go up.”

Even if he knew that his weapon might have a limited threat to the other party, he was never a beaten person.

"it is good."

The ink girl nodded, far away from the research base of the soldier ants in Africa, a rocket rocketed up, and the spacecraft of the flying ant space all started, and quickly rushed to the sky.

Chen Mo stood still, looked up at the sky, looked back at the villa and flew toward the sea.

He has a hunch that the aliens’ machines this time may have been directed at him, destroying the arrester and attracting the attention of aliens.

chapters.title: Chapter 746: : Chen Mo Was Arrested?
chapters.body:
Chapter 746: : Chen Mo Was Arrested?

Boom! ! !

The laser of the alien spacecraft swept through, and the spaceships and missiles that were hundreds of miles away exploded in an instant. The planet bombs that were carried also burst and lit up brighter than the sun.

"The power is not small."

The lizard's head is swaying, like watching fireworks, admiring the explosion in space.

Even the electromagnetic waves generated by the planet bombs will not affect their super-light speed spacecraft. Here is space, and there will be no impact wave.

Oh...

The alarm sounded as they communicated.

"what happened?"

"Nano-worms."

The lizard's head spit out the slender tongue and knocked it on the instrument a few times to bring up the display of the quantum radar. I don't know when there are nano worms that are corroding the hull of the spacecraft.

"This little guy is a little dissatisfied, but also very clever, the nanoworms have been researched, stalking us, almost turning over the ship in the gutter. Shielding the electromagnetic waves around the spacecraft, turning on the electromagnetic pulse and jammer on the spacecraft to clean up the nanoworms. ”

They see too much of this kind of thing.

The arrest of non-intelligent creatures will have resistance, arresting civilized creatures, and not being attacked by counter-attacks. In the face of the more intelligent red-level intelligent biological civilization, it is not uncommon to accidentally be killed.

......

Deep in the Congo rainforest.

Chen Mo and Mo Nuo are wearing armor and are entangled with alien traps in the rain forest.

Flying over the earth for half a lap, or was easily found, Chen Mo realized that he could not escape. The arrester is faster than his armor and can only destroy the catcher.

"Can't beat."

The laser beam of the armor was swept on the shape trap, and Chen Mo sank down.

The strength of both sides is not at one level.

This is a civilization that is much more advanced than them. Just a machine has already made him try his best.

Chen Mo tried various weapons to destroy the two arresters.

High-energy lasers can only leave a trace on this strange catcher. The missile could not come to any damage at all, and the small electromagnetic pulse machine did not cause any impact, let alone the shock wave and the ordinary blow.

This alien trap is faster than them, and if he sneak away, he will follow up like a candy. If you are caught by the ropes that are caught, Chen Mo can't think of the possibility of escape.

Just now the ink girl was entangled, and the ink woman only cut off her arm and armor before she escaped.

Chen Mo feels like resisting the arrested kitten, even if he escapes now, he can't escape the small place of the earth.

For the first time, this feeling of powerlessness made him extremely uncomfortable.

"Mergo, the spaceship and the planet bomb were destroyed, and the controller of the nano-robot disappeared."

"Ok."

In Chen Mo's expectation, perhaps his weapon, for the aliens, is just a joke, and the threat is not great.

"The power of the laser is too small, the energy to cut off this material is not enough to destroy them." The ink girl is still closely following Chen Mo.

The laser that cuts the steel plate easily has little effect. The nano-robot has electromagnetic interference, and the missile has no effect.

Chen Mo is dodging, and his mind is thinking about the countermeasures.

Xiao Yu was pregnant and was waiting for him to go back in the safe house. If he was taken away by an alien, his home would be gone. He believes that powerful technology is in the face of aliens of higher civilizations, like ordinary toys, and is vulnerable.

Still not enough.

Chen Mo’s heart is sinking.

Now is not a movie, he does not have a heroic aura, the gap and gap between civilizations, not by his anger and a few screams, can resist a few times.

With completely different levels of collision, any strategy and ideas are dazed.

If he is given time, he can develop rapidly with the technological advantages of the technology library.

Unfortunately, aliens will not give him this time.

"Ink girl, if I am not there, help me take care of them."

Chen Mo’s voice is as low as ever.

"Mergo, what do you mean?"

The voice of the ink girl is extremely anxious, and there is a little panic.

"I don't know what I am going to face. When I am not there, you develop technology based on the road I am talking about, developing super-light speed ships, stronger materials and weapons."

“Why do you say this?”

"When we insist on catching a kitten, can it run?" Chen Mo stared at the machine in front of him and said, biting his teeth.

This is something he does not want to admit, but the truth is this.

"If I can't escape this time, if you listen to Xiao Yujie later, take care of them and don't let them suffer." Chen Mo's voice is extremely heavy.

Even if he is not willing, he can't help, as if he is explaining things.

The other party is just a simple arresting machine, let him use all the solutions, unless he died here, or can not escape.

......

The sudden emergence of strange machines around the world has caused global panic.

Various pictures were transmitted madly on social networks and in the circle of friends, and tens of thousands of people were arrested and disappeared. The public opinion could not be suppressed. In just one hour, it had caused a tsunami-like sensation.

Aliens arrest people.

The aliens came to earth.

Various public opinion came along with photos and videos. Not long after, they found that the unknown machine was like a flash in the pan, and when the person left, he could not find any trace.

"Control public opinion."

"Guiding public opinion."

After the official call of several major countries, a consensus was reached.

In order to avoid the spread of panic and the collapse of social emotions, this has to be done.

Several countries collectively stopped the war at hand, put in various special effects videos and news, and guided social public opinion to rumors and film special effects.

For a time, the water of public opinion became cloudy and confusing.

I saw it with my own eyes, I know it is true, I have not seen it with my own eyes, I am dubious, at least suppress the panic to the smallest extent, and when things are over, the society slowly accepts the existence of facts, buffers in time, and will not cause harm to society. Too much turmoil.

Only the authorities will know the horror. The aliens are in space, and they can't do anything, such as the same nest of ants, allowing the aliens to arrest.

"The sample has been arrested and the pioneer of this civilization is left."

Torrell stared at the light curtain with enthusiasm, as excited as the grand prize.

Just now he carefully looked at the man-made city on the fourth planet. It was exactly the same as the logo on Chen Mo’s armor, and he also asked several astronauts who were arrested to make sure that this person was a pioneer of civilization.

There is a good experimental body, and the harvest is not small.

"I am almost the same." The Blue Division retracted the recording instrument.

As a group of interstellar archaeology, their team will not capture any creatures, mainly to record the development trajectory and information of these civilizations.

If it is a civilization that has been destroyed or disappeared, he needs to record the species, language, civilization, technology, identity and location of civilization. If there is still a wisdom civilization, he needs to record the location of those materials and civilizations, so that future generations can easily come back here to explore and record the growth of civilization.

When the wisdom civilization here develops to a certain extent, it can be compiled by the forces of the Universe Alliance and included in the ownership of the Universe Alliance.

"This little creature is quite difficult, and it’s almost the same. It’s time to close the net.” Torrell called out a control light curtain and ordered it a few times.

On the Atlantic Ocean.

As time goes by, Chen Mo’s mood is heavier.

Escape, can't escape!

Hit, beat!

This machine is more like teasing him, like a funny cat. Anyone facing this situation is a sigh of relief, but in addition to being powerless, it is powerless. This feeling is very wrong.

Suddenly, the machine that was fighting with him paused in the air, slammed and slammed into Chen Mo, and dozens of finger-sized ropes wrapped around him.

Chen Mo’s face suddenly changed dramatically.

chapters.title: Chapter 747: : The Change Of The World Pattern
chapters.body:
Chapter 747: : The Change Of The World Pattern

The underground safe house of the villa.

Xiao Yu is restless, his brows are together, and they have not been scattered for a long time. Suddenly, a spurt rushed into my heart and made Xiaoyu’s eyes dark.

"Zhao Minjie, I have an inexplicable fluster, will my husband have something?"

Xiao Yu’s voice was anxious and overwhelmed.

Zhao Min and Musou, who are next to each other, can clearly feel the worry of Xiaoyu, not only the worry of Xiaoyu, but also their concerns.

"Don't worry." Zhao Min said comfortably: "He must be fine."

"But my heart suddenly panic."

Xiao Yu’s heart became more anxious and his face became pale.

During this time, the morning sickness was severe and the body was somewhat weak. At this point she could not wait to leave the safe house immediately, but Chen Mo gave the ink girl an order and did not let her leave.

"Don't think about it, we are all here, he will definitely come back."

Zhao Min forced to calm down.

She also has a bad feeling.

Before coming in, the ink girl said that an alien machine was falling towards them, but she did not dare to say to Xiao Yu. At this time, she was worried more than anyone else, but Xiao Yu was pregnant and did not dare to stimulate small fishing.

"Ink girl, how is your husband and you? Where are you?"

"..."

The only one who answered her was silence. The ink girl had Chen Mo’s instructions. Before the safe house was opened, she could not disclose any information.

Hey! !

While waiting anxiously, the door of the safe house heard a voice.

Xiao Yu excited, his fists clenched, staring at the door of the safe house.

The last door opens.

Seeing the situation outside the gate, Xiao Yu’s body was shocked, his eyes were dizzy, his body was awkward, and if Zhao Min was not there, he might have fallen.

Only the ink girl is reflected in their eyes.

At this time, the ink girl disappeared from the right hand to the shoulder, the palm of the left hand was also broken, the internal machine and the line were exposed, the artificial skin was torn, and the thigh part was also missing, revealing the internal circuit.

The perfect figure, it looks a bit bleak now.

There are no bloodstains, but many problems have been explained.

"Ink girl, husband?"

Xiao Yu’s voice was a little trembling, tears couldn’t stop, and he kept looking behind the ink girl, hoping to find the familiar figure.

"The aliens took it away." The voice of the ink girl also shivered.

Zhao Min was shocked and his face was pale. Unparalleled has been holding the hand of a small fisherman, tears can not stop.

"Impossible, ink girl, is my husband joking with me?" Xiao Yu's voice was pleading.

"It's true." The voice of the ink girl is somewhat lonely and sad.

This moment, as if the sky had fallen, the eyes of Xiaoyu lost their looks, and there was no trace of blood on his face.

“Small fishing, small fishing? Wake up.”

"mom……"

Zhao Min returned to God and hurriedly supported the small fishing. The unparalleled and slow, hurriedly held the other side of the small fishing.

"Ink girl, immediately send a small fish to the hospital."

Zhao Min took Xiaoyu out of the safe house. Outside, the robot was ready to greet, unparalleled dry tears, holding the first aid kit of the safe house, trotting to keep up.

......

In an secret base in the capital, an old man sits.

His eyes were on the table, all of which were information on the missing persons that had been identified in the incident in China. The screen in front of the desk was empty and the aliens had left.

His face is not good, even if the public opinion is guided in time, the impact of the aliens is still a big sensation.

Various arguments such as human beings' captivity theory and alien humanism have already appeared in the network.

Aliens can arrest humans with impunity and they can't help.

This kind of powerlessness is uncomfortable.

In addition to the national justice, there is also human justice, from the perspective of human beings, this is a very terrible thing. They let the aliens arrest like pigs and sheep.

"The electromagnetic pulse of nuclear explosion in space caused the failure of electrical and electronic power in several cities, causing no small confusion. The news of the Intelligence Bureau is that the whole of Southeast Asia and South Asia are affected," the secretary said.

"Can you contact Chen Mo?" The old man looked at the secretary next to him.

"There is no contact. The following people replied. They saw an instrument falling into Chen Mo's villa. Then Chen Mofei left and disappeared. According to the judgment, he may have been arrested."

The secretary clicked on the screen a few times, and a few photos popped up, which is the broken wall of Chen Mo Villa.

The old man’s pupils shrank.

Just said that the impact of electromagnetic pulse, but also calmly calm, a pair of Lintai landslides do not change the look, finally moved.

The worst thing happened.

After the secretary left, the old man’s brow was tight.

With the advent of aliens, the development of human civilization has become an unprecedented urgency.

Chen Mo was arrested, which means that the pioneers of the rapid advancement of Earth science and technology disappeared, and their technological development may be slow for hundreds of years.

......

Affiliated Hospital of Wushuang University.

In a special ward, the security here is unprecedentedly strict.

Those who do not agree are not allowed to approach. Only a few doctors and nurses know that there is a special patient living here.

Xiao Yu lay in the bed of the intensive care unit, relying on the hospital bed, his eyes are godless.

The tears dried up, and now the eyes are a little red and swollen, as if the world had collapsed and lost its soul.

Chen Mo's parents, Xiao Yu's parents, Xiao Man, Musou, Zhao Min, and Mo Nu, are all in the body of the ink girl and returning to the original. Everyone has sadness and anxiety on his face.

Chen’s father’s eyes are still red, Chen Mo is arrested, and they are also the horror of the sky.

The pillars and backbone of this home are lost.

Nowadays, Xiaoyu is the mother of the family.

But now it seems like losing the soul, people look very weak. In addition to the adults, there is a small in the small fisherman's belly, everyone is very anxious, but can only be anxious.

"Small fish, your body is tight, eat something first." Shao Xuemei wiped the tears in his eyes and shook hands to open the insulated lunch box next to him.

"Thank you mom."

Xiao Yu’s voice was a little bit trembled, and he resisted the emotions and took over the bowl in Shao Xuemei’s hand.

"Dad, Mom, you go out first, I have something to say to Zhao Min."

"Help me persuade her to take care of her body."

Before leaving the fishing parents, I did not forget to get rid of Zhao Min. After I got Zhao Min’s nod, I left the ward with peace of mind. Chen Fu and Chen Mu also screamed, taking the unparalleled hand to leave the ward and handing the space to Zhao Min and Xiao Yu.

"Zhao Min sister, husband will he return?" Xiao Yu eyes instantly red, emotional collapse.

Just in front of the parents, she did not dare to show her emotions.

Chen Mo is not here. She is the mother of the family. If she even collapses, this family is really chaotic.

"Will do."

Zhao Min has some whimpers and tries to calm the small fishing.

"Ink said that he was caught, remember what he said when he was traveling in space? He said that even if it is a bacterium, he will become a deadly super bacterium. He is the protagonist of this era and will definitely come back. You raise Body, give birth to a healthy baby, wait for him to return one day."

Xiao Yu’s eyes are a little restored, recalling Chen Mo’s words at the time. After a few minutes, Xiao Yui wiped his tears.

"Zhao Minjie, I can't support his career. I want to raise my body and give him this baby. The company will hand it over to you and the ink girl management. I don't want to wait for him to come back. His career has fallen apart." Living in Zhao Min’s hand, there are some pleadings in his eyes.

"it is good."

Zhao Minzhong focused on his head and his eyes became red.

......

Aliens arrested the incident and shocked the world.

In just a few hours in the world, tens of thousands of people have disappeared. This is a rare event except for large wars. Only a big country can understand the horror.

This time, the arresting incident has brought the world’s major powers to awaken.

The emergence of aliens, unscrupulous arrest, let many powerful countries deeply feel the threat, the war of the world war stopped. The rumor is hailed as the most intelligent singer Chen Mo, who was also arrested and missing in the incident.

However, the style of the marching ant group has become more rigid.

When people have not reacted, the war machine of the marching ant group has started to work in Africa.

Armed with the control of the soldiers behind the ants, like a sharp knife, swept across the African continent with lightning speed.

Along the way, the team was armed with the help of the marching ant group's war machine, and became the most horrible team. Almost all the armed forces gave up resistance.

The outside world believes that the loss of Chen Mo’s marching ant group will not last long and will soon fall apart. However, I did not expect that the army ants group that lost Chen Mo would completely expose the fierce fangs.

When the armed forces of Hittite occupied the entire African continent, people were shocked to realize that the marching ant group controlled by Zhao Min was colder and more ruthless than before.

A world-wide chessboard kicked off.

The marching ant group controlled the Greek armed forces and completed the unification of the African continent. The development of the pattern was beyond the expectations of all.

Swallowing the Greek map of the Greek map, began to vigorously consolidate control.

Under the strong support of the marching ant group, various machine manufacturing plants, development plants and cities began to rise on this backward land.

Air-to-air weapons, ground-to-ground weapons, and space weapons began to deploy.

Everyone knows that the arrival of aliens and the arrest of Chen Mo have already stimulated the marching ant group. There is no scruples in development, and the means are not as mild as before.

Once the marching ant group completes the layout, the entire African continent will be swallowed by the marching ant group.

As far as the marching ant group is concerned, it is also a big country in the East.

No longer care about the world situation, the official directly invites the marching ant group to help, accelerate the construction of various research and development bases, and at the same time popularize the entire set of education systems of the unparalleled university, and cultivate talents regardless of everything.

The great integration of the world began.

The North American Group also began to integrate the South American Group;

Europe is one;

India is not far behind.

......

The whole world, like being beaten with chicken blood, lost the contradictions and competitions of the past, and the development of science and technology became the main theme.

Time is in this order and chaos, passing without a trace, moving forward.

chapters.title: Chapter 748: : Alien World
chapters.body:
Chapter 748: : Alien World

Chen Mo woke up.

Wake up in a dormant cabin.

As you can see, there are seven or eight aliens outside the dormant cabin, all of which are humanoid creatures with blue-green skin on their faces.

The size between them is very large, ranging from three to four meters, to a small one, only one meter five, the shape is different, but these people have a common feature, three eyes.

What makes Chen Mo stunned most is that the aliens are full-body armor, like soldiers.

These armor, in different forms, are very scientific and technological. When you think of the other catcher, you can easily arrest him. In front of these armor, he has no resistance.

Was arrested.

I don't know how long I have been caught.

Chen Mo remembers that when he was on Earth, he tried his best and eventually destroyed only one of the arresters, but he still could not escape the arrest of the alien trap.

If it is not because the ink girl is a robot, the arrester does not catch the robot, I am afraid that the ink girl will also be caught.

Thinking of Xiao Yu still pregnant, Chen Mo's heart is a little bit colic.

He understands the situation under the eyes, and there is no room for resistance. Now, under the control of the other party, if they are angered, they will be mercilessly obliterated.

I don't know what I am going to face, I just hope that I don't sleep too long.

As long as you don't die, you have hope to escape.

Going back to God, outside the dormant cabin, a light curtain video demonstrates the instrument, which means it is obvious.

Chen Mo thought about it and put the instrument on it.

“The instruments you wear are conscious language translators that translate your own conscious language into the universal language of the Universe Alliance.”

Torrell's voice was translated and passed to everyone's ears.

In the dormant cabin that has been awake, there is a slight commotion, and there is no way to escape.

Many emotions such as calmness, fear, panic, awe and worship, some timid lives, and the aliens around them are screaming and horrified.

Torrell ignored these emotions.

The exploration of the Rania Kea Super Galaxy has ended. Just after returning to the origin city, he is separated from the team of the Blue Master. Now he has to start his own research activities.

The Blue Master is an archaeological study. He is engaged in biological research. The research projects of the two are different.

The neatly arranged sleepy bins are the harvest of this space exploration.

In each dormant compartment, there is a creature, including more than 20 different red-level intelligent biological species of the humanoid, orc, marine, and zerg.

100,000 creatures are still alive.

Torrell's eyes are locked in Chen Mo.

Chen Mo is also watching him.

He was very impressed with Chen Mo. This is the pioneer of the remote little blue star civilization. It can be said that it is the most special one among the 100,000 creatures he arrested.

In order to arrest Chen Mo, he damaged two arresters, one low-level and one high-level.

But Chen Mo also brought him a lot of surprises.

The evolution of this civilization pioneer is much higher than that of the other blue races. The color of the blood is different, the physical quality is much stronger, and it almost reaches the level of green level.

Little Blue Star is a red-level intelligent life, and in the contrast of brain wave detection, Chen Mo's brain is developed to a level of blue life, which is equivalent to his equal brain development and is very smart.

Moreover, Chen Mo's blood is golden, like the evolved humanoid, very special.

"Sanya, come over." Torrell turned and said to the wrist.

Hey! ! !

Over a huge training field, two armor were fighting in the air, a blue-blue paint, a silver paint, on the armor, with a very conspicuous sign, three eyes.

The life of the origin city knows that this is the hallmark of the three-eyed civilization.

The collision of the metal blasts, causing pain in the eardrum.

boom! !

I saw the two armor of the battle being suddenly separated. The silver-white painted armor bounced off and fell like a meteorite on the training ground, exploding a big hole.

The blue-blue armor hovered in the air and landed slowly. The armor was put away to reveal the true face. The third end of Torrell's mouth is a three-eyed, short-skinned, clever youth.

"Professor, are you coming back? I am fighting training, what is it?"

"Help me arrange a group of creatures to Qing Shuixing." The sound of Torrell came from the ear.

"Okay, Professor, I am passing now."

Ten minutes later, Sanya appeared in the research area where Torrell was located. He glanced at the dormant cabin in the cabin and regained his gaze.

“This is the harvest of Professor Rania Kea’s trip?”

"Yes, this time it was very dangerous. I encountered a turbulent space and almost couldn't come back." Torrell remembered the turbulence in the space and looked at the sleeping cabin in front of his eyes: "You will be the red class." Humanoids are arranged to Qingshuixing, and these arrangements are arranged at Qingshui College."

Torrell pointed to Chen Mo in the first row of dormant cabins and several other different lives.

“Do you arrange these low-level lives into Qingshui College so quickly?” Sanya’s voice is curious.

"Yes."

Torrell nodded.

"The trip to Rania Kea, found a lot of new intelligent species, their civilization, is rapidly developing into a star-rated civilization, very clever, understand the rules of the universe. Especially this kind of human race, he is a ethnic group The pioneer of civilization is more precious. You arrange him to enter the research class of Qingshui College."

Torrell pointed to Chen Mo.

After the arrangement, Torrell turned and left.

This is not the first time, the rest of the things, Sanya will deal with, he does not have to worry too much.

......

Qingshuixing is one of the millions of unremarkable satellites in the original city. It is located in a livable zone 1 day away from the original point city.

This is a very common terrestrial planet, belonging to a small star under the three-eyed civilization. It is a biological training experimental planet of the three-eye civilization.

Red-grade carbon-based organisms must rely on oxygen and water to sustain life. Qingshuixing is an oxygen-rich planet.

This kind of planet, in the universe, is everywhere, quite a small experimental base, and many of them are places where high-level civilizations study low-level creatures.

Looking down from space, Qing Shuixing is a blue-green planet.

The spacecraft landed in Qingshuixing, and Sanya walked to the cabin of the dormant cabin and scanned for a week.

"Next you will survive on a brand new planet, we will not kill you, remember to follow the rules of the planet, otherwise you will be killed in other lives in the planet."

The cold, unfeeling language, passed from the translator to the ears of every creature, so that all the life heard is chilling.

"After the spaceship, there will be arrangements to obey the order."

Sanya speaks sharply and raises his hand. The door of the spaceship cabin is opened, and the dormant cabin is suspended and flies outside the cabin door.

The warrior wearing the armor followed, leaving the cabin of the spacecraft.

Chen Mo, who has been quietly staying in the dormant cabin, only feels bright in front of him, and a strange planet appears in front of him.

The style of the planet is much more than that of the Earth's avant-garde, and there are various sci-fi high-rise buildings and holographic projections everywhere. There are also many towering trees, beautiful greenery, no sun in the sky, only a huge incomparable planet, looks like a scene in a science fiction movie.

Everything is strange, but it is another world, an alien world that doesn't know how far from the solar system.

chapters.title: Chapter 749: :He Is Very Smart
chapters.body:
Chapter 749: :He Is Very Smart

In an empty square, more than 70,000 dormant cabins are suspended in a neatly.

Among them, there are 50,000 Earth people, occupying the majority, and the rest are the lives of other planets.

The three-eye civilization itself is a humanoid family, so Torrell captured the samples used for research, mainly based on the humanoid family. Other captured lives are not on this planet, because the environment of this planet is not suitable for them to survive.

The life in the dormant cabin is different, the height is short and the weight is not good, the shape is strange, the number of hands and feet is different, there are three feet, even the life of four feet and four hands.

These lifes have a common feature, that is, the hands and feet are clearly distinguishable, the skin and muscles of the body are soft, without fur and scales, and there are visible facial features.

This is the characteristics of the cosmic human race.

The classification of the life group of the universe is divided according to these characteristics.

"I will open the hatch and warn you once, don't try to escape, otherwise the consequences will be very miserable." Sanya wore the armor suspended in the air, overlooking the bottom, reaching out and clicking on the wristwatch.

Oh...

More than 70,000 dormant cabin doors are open.

Ah, ah...

The screams of fear rang, and several people who were extremely fearful, like the madman who broke free from the cage, went around.

Chen Mo stunned at the people who fled, most of them were people on earth, and several others were other aliens. There were even thousands of lives on the ground, as if they were here as heaven, and Sanya and others were gods.

Fear, panic, excitement, etc., as well as a variety of complex emotions, each of which has different levels of life and performance.

boom! boom! boom……

A few muffled sounds, the cry of fear stopped abruptly.

A few people who were as crazy as they were, all fell in the pool of blood and did not move. Several three-eyed stars in the high-altitude armor, without the slightest expression fluctuations, seem to be watching a few cockroaches were killed.

The people on the field were stunned, and they dared not scream and shout, and put all their fears in their hearts.

"Everyone has a wristwatch that is worn on your hands. It will be your identity at Qing Shuixing in the future."

The Sanya dialect, the robot took out a string of wrists and handed it to the first person, let them pass on.

Chen Mo passed the remaining wristwatches to the people behind him and looked at the wristwatch in his hand.

The wristband is wide and looks like a bracelet. The strap is stretchable and stretched. A series of extraterrestrial characters appear in the middle of the wrist. It is an electronic instrument.

Thinking about it, Chen Mo put it in his hands.

The next moment, the wristband tightened and the entire wristband was attached to his wrist. Chen Mo tried to take it down and found that the wristband was worn and the wristband could no longer be stretched and could not be taken down.

Thinking a little, Chen Mo did not do any useless work.

Everyone else found this strange thing, but there were still a few warriors in the sky watching the warriors, and no one dared to scream and accept this reality.

"On your wristwatch, there are 10,000 stars, which is the currency of the transaction. You can buy the items you want to buy. After the flowers, you can find ways to earn stars. There will be a place to live for you, want to be better. The place of residence, think for yourself. Wait a minute, someone will vaccinate you to prevent you from being infected by the virus and bacteria on the planet."

Sanya asked a team member to explain common sense to them, and ignored some creatures who did not develop into the stage of technological civilization. They did not understand what a vaccine was.

Then Sanya turned to look at the creatures designated by Chen Mo and Torre.

"You, you, you, come with me."

After the end of Sanya, Chen Mo left.

For the first time, Chen Mo was squatting and flying. The strong wind poured into the nose, which made him a little difficult to breathe and the temperature was low. But fortunately, the other party seems to be deliberately controlling, and within his tolerance, he was not killed.

"Sanya, these low-level life, do you need to pay attention to the professor?" On the way, a member of the Azong team looked at Chen Mo and others who were being shackled.

“Professors value, we must pay attention to it, and the research of professors is related to the status of our entire civilization. Once successful, we will benefit a lot.”

Sanya cold and cold answer.

"I have entered Qingshui College in the first place. They are a few red-level intelligent life, enter Qingshui College? It is the highest school of the planet. They should all be the top elites of this planet. Can they do it?"

"Professor has his own arrangements."

"Okay." Azong is no longer asking questions.

After flying for about twenty minutes, Chen Mo was kneeling down in front of a house, and several other alien lives were taken to another place. I saw it in the air. This area is surrounded by a long wall, which is comparable to a city on earth.

"Here is Qingshui College. Later, you will be a member of Qingshui College. You will report it at 2.5 origins (5 hours). This is a vaccine that can help you to immunize the planet's viruses and bacteria."

Sanya pulled out a refractor and hit Chen Mo's thigh, then took off and did not stop.

Qingshui University is the highest school on the planet. For the understanding of the universe between red and yellow, the knowledge here is enough for them to study for a lifetime.

Sanya is very clear, and it is definitely smart to let the professor directly arrange the red life into Qingshui College. It must be understood, and Chen Mo’s calmness and performance are enough to see that he is indeed special.

Until Sanya left, Chen Mo still looked puzzled.

The other party did not ban his freedom, did not take any experiments with him, except for a dose of vaccine, did not give him any drugs. This can not help but let Chen Mo be puzzled by the other party's painstaking efforts to grasp his purpose.

I thought that this murder was too much, and now Chen Mo sees hope at least.

Escape from the planet and return to Earth to find family hopes. It’s just that Chen Mo still doesn’t know how long the earth has passed.

Thinking of the family and care of the earth, Chen Mo tightened his fists.

I was thrown into this strange planet.

There is nothing in him, the nano-robot bracelet is gone, and even the clothes are not the earth. It is not realistic to want to escape the planet in a short time.

If you want to escape, you must have a good plan. Otherwise, it is no different from finding death.

After a long time, Chen Mo’s gaze gradually returned to the calmness of the past and looked around.

Unlike the house of the earth, the house in front of Chen Mo is very tall, 15 meters high, but only two floors, and there is a small warehouse next to it.

As for the architectural style, Chen Mo can't say what style it is. It is definitely not the European style and retro architecture of the earth.

They come, the security.

Chen Mo now wants to settle down, and while he is familiar with the situation of the universe, he plans to escape.

This strange planet does not belong to him, he does not want to stay in a lifetime of a planet surrounded by alien civilization. This feeling is like a zoo gorilla, for researchers to observe and study.

Soon, Chen Mo familiarized himself with the place where he lived.

Bored, Chen Mo began to familiarize himself with the means of transportation.

Equipped with an anti-gravity suspension bike. The suspension motorcycle is like a sea motorboat, but the shape is more cool and full of technology and futuristic. As for the styling, it should be designed according to the situation of the humanoid.

This school is a bit big, a city is so big, and a vehicle is indispensable.

After all, the humanization point is that the suspension motorcycle has a manual, and there is an electronic audio version. Chen Mo can know which position has the function according to the translation of the translator.

After simply familiarizing himself with the function, Chen Mo was careful to board the suspension bike and began to practice its driving.

It took an hour, Chen Mo from the beginning to familiar with the suspension motorcycle, and spent about two hours, Chen Mocai thoroughly mastered the suspension motorcycle.

Anti-gravity technology is the technology he has just developed on Earth. I did not expect it to be here.

Five hours passed.

Chen Mo put down the familiarity of the suspension motorcycle, drove the suspension motorcycle, and screamed in the direction of the Qingshui College, which was directed by the map.

"He is very smart, without any teaching and help, so master the driving of the flying motorcycle so quickly."

In a research institute of the three-eye civilization of the origin city, Torrell looked at the light curtain, and Chen Mo drove the figure of the suspended motorcycle.

Next to Sanya also nodded and agreed. Joining Chen Mo with several other intelligent life in Qingshui College, I still haven't figured out what it is, and Chen Mo has mastered the driving skills.

"Is it a key concern?" asked Sanya.

"Well, let's first look at his performance at Qingshui College. I am studying his genes here and looking for his password from the red-level wisdom life to the present."

"Why not let him mate with his fellow sex, how many more?"

"Not yet that step."

Torrell shook his head.

"Remember, don't let him die in Qing Shuixing. Other things make him free. He is very smart. It is the experimental subject I want. The freedom to restrain him is not good for the brain. I feel that he is pulling this time. The biggest harvest of Nia Kea’s trip."

chapters.title: Chapter 750: : Ziwei Civilization
chapters.body:
Chapter 750: : Ziwei Civilization

Chen Mo sat on the suspension motorcycle and looked at Qingshui College.

He does not know these words.

However, he knows that his location is the inner school district of Qingshui University. The outer campus is the place for students to participate in activities. The inner school district is the place where Qingshui College teaches and works.

Alien Academy.

Chen Mo feels unreal.

A planet that is captive of civilization develops a complete social system, and the degree of technological development of the society here is stronger than that of the earth. If it weren't for aliens of different shapes who came in and out, Chen Mo would think that this is the earth after decades.

What is waiting for him in front?

Maybe there are countless unknowns and dangers! The sober consciousness tells Chen Mo, this is a world that is captive of civilization. This college is just a petri dish.

The solemn and large school gate, in the eyes of Chen Mo, is already a jungle full of thorns. Freedom here, he needs to plan to escape. The road ahead he will face countless warriors wearing armor, as well as hidden in the unknown darkness, secretly observing his three-eyed star.

Chen Mo suddenly woke up from his thoughts, his eyes became clearer and clearer.

If he doesn't run away, he is similar to the captive monkey in the lab. If he fails to escape, he will die without a whole body, even more miserable consequences, but being confined for a lifetime, the truth is terrible.

In the depths of the distant universe, Xiao Yu and his family are waiting for him to go back.

After fixing the mind and rectifying the emotions, Chen Mo resumed the calmness of the past. He brushed the machine with the ID card and pressed the acceleration handle of the suspension motorcycle to enter the school gate.

"Hello, I am Chen Mo, come to report."

Chen Mo's suspension motorcycle drove down to an office building and walked into an office. He had been looking for a long time to know that this was the report office, and he had just learned a universal language from the translator.

The three-eyed person who arranged him to come in should arrange his student status. For those people, the student status here is just a matter of words, the simplest.

Although Chen Mo did not understand the purpose of the three-eyed person, he was to be arranged here.

The teacher in the office looked at Chen Mo, picked up a camera and pressed him, and looked up at him. Then he took out a printed, photo card and handed it to Chen Mo.

"This is your class, report it yourself."

The teacher’s words are disdainful. At Qingshui College, there are very few transfer students. They are all dependents who come in through the back door. Not only the teachers look down, but the students here will also look down on such students.

Chen Mo ignored the teacher and took a look at the student card. The text still doesn't understand, and you can only identify the class you are in by the same text. The translator can translate, but he doesn't know the pronunciation of these words.

He is now eager to learn the words of the world. Otherwise, it is impossible to escape from the control of the three-eye civilization.

After looking for a long time, I found the class in which he was located.

A teacher led him into the classroom.

The teacher called Cray, this is the transliteration name, with Chen Mo into the classroom, let him find a seat, and then continue to explain the classroom knowledge. Students in different styles in the classroom curiously glanced at the new transfer students and began to whisper.

Each of these classmates is very unique. Anyway, each one is not like ‘Earth Man’ and the style of dress is different. Can smell some special taste, not stinky, but not fragrant, the air is also mixed with fragrance.

Chen Mo did not know if this was the perfume they used to cover up the smell of a classmate.

"Where is the life? People who have never seen this look."

"Who knows? Maybe it's new, what does he do?"

"His appearance looks very pleasing to the eye, it should be male, maybe he just came to the life of this planet, ring, do you want to taste the past, try the length?"

"Just on him? Isn't that old lady a mucus?"

?......

Chen Mo’s mouth was pumped.

He was sitting in the corner of the classroom, his hearing was very sharp, but he couldn't understand what they were saying. It was just the translator hanging on the ear, and the whispers of the two female students next to him were all translated to him, making him laugh and cry.

Looking around, Chen Mo felt that he was incompatible with the surrounding, did not know whether he had not adapted to the exclusion of the environment, or because it was controlled by civilization.

The book is a tablet-like device, and Chen Mo still can't understand the above text.

Mr. Crane is teaching, and the speed is very fast. The translator translates what he said to Chen Mo. However, many professional vocabulary Chen Mo can't understand, so the information obtained is intermittent.

The general content of Chen Mo knows that it is a suspension technology, and occasionally some techniques that are mixed with the armor.

Everyone else listened carefully and took a few quick notes.

For two hours, Cray announced that after class, the next two days, when the class was not in class, the entire classroom suddenly cheered with joy.

No one cares about Chen Mo, no one minute, people have run out.

There was only Chen Mo in the classroom, and there was a teacher on the platform to pack things up.

"Teacher, where can I learn the universal language of the universe?" Chen Mo struggled. This is what he learned from the translator. He is unfamiliar and somewhat swearing.

"Uh?"

Curry stunned and couldn't help but look at him.

“In the library, the tenth floor, the linguistic area, the introduction of the universal language of the universe is proficient.”

Cree used the light curtain of the wristwatch to give Chen Mo the appearance of the library, and by the way, wrote the name of the book he needed, and let Chen Mo remember.

"Thank you."

After Chen Mo finished, Cree left the classroom.

Chen Mo rode on the suspension motorcycle and quickly found the library.

The library is very large and very large. It is much larger than an international airport. Even with the title, Chen Mo found it in 20 minutes.

The library is the best place to learn about a civilization.

Chen Mo must learn the language, words, and normal communication before he can survive here and then find ways to escape. But he can't show signs of escaping, otherwise he will be defeated if he is caught by his three-eyed person.

When he got the book and the text translator, Chen Mo was immersed in it.

......

“Is the Ziwei civilization sent people to visit the origin city?”

Torrell almost screamed, three eyes round, blue-green face, the color became deeper.

Excited.

For the origin city, there is no news, more explosive than this news.

Even an ordinary person of the Ziwei civilization was appointed, which was a surprise. One of the seven god-level civilizations, the first generation of the universe, the rule makers, has the supreme status in the main universe.

Countless lives are the most awe-inspiring, most admired big god-level civilizations, creating and developing a battle, making the armor the most common and most commonly used combat weapon in the universe.

Recognized by the Ziwei civilization, the status of the origin city will be a step into the sky.

If there is any civilization, can cooperate with the Ziwei civilization, or provide help for them, the benefits are endless.

"What does the king say?"

"Wang is ready for the highest ID card, and will be given a gift to the Ziwei civilization, who are free to enter and exit every place they want to go in and out."

“Why did they suddenly come here for inspection?” asked Torrel.

"I don't know, so the king ordered the three-eyed people to be notified. Don't irritate the messengers of the Ziwei civilization. Don't inquire and ask about their whereabouts and affairs, otherwise it will be very troublesome." The three-eyed people around said.

"Good." Torrell focused on the head.

The origin of the city is vast, the natural planet of flying universe created by science and technology, one civilization in the vast origin city, just like the giant family in a small city, three-eye civilization is one of the largest families in the origin city.

This is an opportunity to climb up.

The Ziwei civilization sent messengers to visit the origin city. This news has already spread in the origin city. All civilizations are like chicken blood, hoping to seize this opportunity.

chapters.title: Chapter 751: : Warship Genre
chapters.body:
Chapter 751: : Warship Genre

Closing the book, Chen Mo stretched a lazy waist and snorted comfortably.

It is daytime, there is no sunshine, but the sky is very bright, and the sky is a huge outline of the planet.

The concept of time here is different.

Chen Mo has experienced three nights, which is three days of the planet, but it feels like a day longer than the earth.

During this time, Chen Mo looked at more than 30 books on the universal language of the universe. From the beginning of the word, he read and listened to it, and later to the article, he became more and more proficient.

Memory and language learning are very simple for Chen Mo.

At first, looking at this new world is unknown. It is now much clearer and there is a lot more to see.

The superstars he saw in the sky, called the origin city, the mother star of Qing Shuixing, a city that all creatures of Qingshui Planet are yearning for, the non-cosmic natural formation, is artificially built, which is an incomprehensible existence of ordinary people.

The preliminary outline of the alien world has been opened to Chen Mo.

the world is large.

The rules of the universe are founded by the seven god-level civilizations of the Universe Alliance. There are countless other civilizations, divided by the color of light, the lowest red level, the highest level of purple, black and white, because the god-level civilization is this level.

There is a complete civilized rule here, which is an enlarged version of ordinary civilization.

The biological hierarchy is like a social class.

The universe forms a system, but the interior is not an absolute peace. The struggle between the civilizations is like the big family of the earth, the intrigue between big companies, and even the war between nations.

The rules of the weak meat and strong food will not change as long as there are creatures and desires.

Chen Mo found the thing that surprised him the most, or what made him feel very interesting, that is, the armor.

In addition to the R&D department, Qingshui College also has a combat department.

Every classmate has a set of armor. Everyday training, fighting and entertainment projects will be integrated into the armor elements. The armor is an essential equipment for a strong man, just like the car of the Earth.

As long as you are familiar with mastering the skills of the armor, you can equip your own armor.

Chen Mo observed that the armor elements are integrated into all corners of society. As long as they are soldiers, they will have their own armor.
