The person who uses the armor also has a special group name: Warrior.

This is not unique to Qing Shuixing.

Chen Mo deliberately read the information. The armor of the Universe Alliance originated from the Ziwei civilization, one of the seven god-level civilizations. The technology used since the expansion of the universe has become more and more powerful, and the armor developed into the preferred equipment for comprehensive operations.

This made the Ziwei civilization occupy an advantage in the first cosmic war, and the latter advantage snowball grows and evolves into a god-level civilization.

The order of the seven god-level civilizations of the universe is determined, and the genre of warfare has become the main weapon of individual combat in the struggle of cosmic civilization, which is highly respected by individuals. The powerful armor of the god-level civilization, equipped with devastating weapons, can destroy the galaxy.

This special system also gave Chen Mo a new understanding of the world, but at the same time he knew the world, I am afraid it is more cruel than reality, and the struggle will be more intense than the jungle.

If you want to become stronger in this social system and become a person, you must master a powerful armor and become a warrior.

Both the escape plan and the armor require a lot of money.

Chen Mosong loosened his neck and took a few books at the table and put them back on the bookshelf. Returning to the old bank that made money, Chen Mosi thought for a few seconds and left the library.

......

In the area of the origin city, the cosmic port jumps.

A beautiful drop-shaped spaceship appears in the area where the space jumps. The spacecraft is purple and transparent, and the purple flower sign can be seen in the middle. If anyone else sees it, it will definitely recognize it.

The symbol of the Ziwei civilization.

A crystal clear zinnia flower, reflecting the deep universe of the stars, noble and mysterious.

This crape myrtle flower is a totem that countless civilizations admire, representing one of the seven supreme rights of the Universe Alliance, governing the prosperity and life and death of countless lives.

"Welcome to the point of origin in the universe city space, please accept the security check..."

The electromagnetic broadcast of the universal language of the Universe Alliance, jumping to routine safety checks, to prevent someone from bringing devastating weapons into the origin city.

The water-dropping spacecraft ignored the security broadcast, left the space to jump, and flew toward the original point city at the speed of light. The spacecraft responsible for security inspection did not dare to block.

They have all been told in advance, Ziwei signs that they all know, the people inside kill them, and no one dares to say more.

Thirty minutes later, the water-dropping spacecraft appeared in the dock of the origin city space universe. A transparent purple spacecraft with a body width of more than 50 meters appeared from the water-dropping spacecraft and quickly fell to the ground of the original point city.

The messenger of the Ziwei civilization came.

The king of the top ten civilizations of the origin city is waiting quietly at the stop of the ground, lined up.

No one dares to be impatient.

No one dares to have any dissatisfaction with the low-level life, the indifferent, and the ordinary subjects who greet the king. Because the Ziwei civilization only needs one sentence, or wave, their entire civilization will disappear.

"The messenger is coming."

Seeing the purple spaceship landing, the ten kings of civilization are hot, with a face of worship and a slight body, they are welcoming the nobles. If they are recognized by the people inside, their civilization will step into the sky and become one of the top civilizations of the universe.

"Trouble everyone."

A soft, unvoiced voice appeared, and a woman came down from the spaceship, which was born with a noble and mysterious temperament.

A long, purple, translucent hair, long skirts, purple skin with fluorescing, and strange lines. Where she stands, there is a unique temperament, noble and mysterious.

The shape of a woman's body is almost the same as that of a human being, but her height is slightly higher than that of a human being. The division of the universe into races, the humanoids are represented by the body shape of the Ziwei civilization.

The civilized leader on the field stayed and felt a high-level life attraction from the gene instinct, but still resisted.

Offended women, they must be buried in the entire origin city.

"The messenger, this is the supreme passport of our civilized territory. All the places in our territory, you can go in and out at will. If there is anything that can help you? You can tell me."

The man who is open is about two meters and sixty-seven. It is a noble royal costume, blue-green skin, and the most conspicuous is the three eyes on the head. He is the king of three-eyed civilization, but in front of the woman, his momentum and nobleness are not worth mentioning.

As the king of three-eye civilization, he is an unattainable **** in the eyes of other lower life, and holds a powerful high-level civilization. However, in the face of the Ziwei civilization, their identity is not worth mentioning, even less than any Ziwei civilization. Ordinary warrior.

The horror of the Ziwei civilization is that a casual soldier can destroy a high civilization.

The leaders of other civilizations saw the three-eyed king take the lead and open their faces, and they offered their supreme passes.

Ziyun grinned and let the accompanying people take the pass in their hands.

“I also need a guide who is familiar with the origin city.”

"Our three-eyed civilization has the most powerful warriors in the origin city. They are familiar with everything in the origin city. I can send them for you to drive." The three-eyed king can't wait to say.

Also being preempted.

The kings of several other civilizations were somewhat annoyed and screamed: "I also have the most powerful warriors here. I am familiar with the origin city and can serve the messengers."

"Just look at your civilization, go back and send him to the place where I stay."

Purple rhyme led the crowd to the Asian Lightspeed spacecraft, leaving a look of excitement, as well as the leader of other civilizations with confession.

“Is the specific location of the space fluctuation found?” On the Asian Lightspeed spacecraft, the purple rhyme restored to a light and elegant opening.

The man who accompanied him shook his head.

“Not sure about the location, you need to explore.”

"Well, there should be people paying attention to our whereabouts, and then investigate the purpose of our trip. The embankment is not to be discovered by other people. It is a normal inspection." Ziyun said faintly.

chapters.title: Chapter 752: : Battle A Maintenance Staff
chapters.body:
Chapter 752: : Battle A Maintenance Staff

The palace of three-eyed civilization, a royal underground, in the hidden space, only three eyes, and a man.

The appearance of the man is somewhat the same as that of the three-eyed king. He is the twenty-seventh son of the three-eyed king and the prince of the three-eyed civilization.

Confirmed that there were no ones, the three-eyed king opened.

"Three questions, you are going to be the guide to the messenger of the Ziwei civilization, pay attention to see what they are looking for." The three-eyed king kept his voice to a minimum.

“Does the father suspect that they are coming over to find something important?” asked three questions.

"It’s not doubt, it’s for sure.” The third eye of Wang Yan’s third eye: “The people of God-level civilization are not born easily. Now, when they appear, they suddenly come to the origin city. If there is nothing enough to attract them, you think They will send people over? What can attract God-class civilization is definitely not an ordinary thing. If there is a chance to get it, it will benefit us infinitely."

The eyes of the three eyes are firm.

On the surface he can obey the Ziwei civilization, but in the face of the opportunity to climb up, which civilization wants to seize the opportunity.

Take the risk once, if it is successful, their civilization may be able to go one step further, or help the Ziwei civilization find what they need. When they are given to the people of Ziwei civilization, the benefits they receive are also very large.

"You are the best child of the family. This time the messenger is a woman. If you have the ability, you can try to communicate with each other, but remember, don't anger them." The three-eyed king said.

"Okay." Three questions nodded.

After all, it is the best young man in the three-eye civilization, the best soldier. He is confident in this woman.

After the three-eye Wang Zhong’s heart was long, he opened the chamber and left.

......

Make money.

This is what Chen Mo needs most now.

There are two ways to escape the control of the three-eye civilization. One is to have enough powerful weapons to destroy the three-eye civilization; the other is to use a speed of light spacecraft, and perhaps even a super-light speed spacecraft to directly escape the planet.

Both of these require a lot of money and technology.

Now that both hands are empty, Chen Mo is no better.

Light speed spacecraft and super-light speed spacecraft need anti-matter as energy material to promote, anti-matter extraction and preparation, large projects are required, and spacecraft manufacturing also requires large projects. Chen Moke does not think that if the big project is carried out, the three-eye civilization will not notice him.

Even if he plans to escape, all actions must be careful.

The life of Qing Shuixing knows that this is the planet under the jurisdiction of three eyes. The people here do not seem to be panicked and feared by the control of the three-eye civilization.

Think about it too, the three-eyed people are quite bringing them from the mountains to the bustling big cities, and the vision is open. Once accepted, the world is completely different.

There must be people who want to flee like him. It is only within the Qingshuixing. The direction of research and development is limited by the three-eye civilization. It is impossible to develop a light speed spacecraft and cannot escape.

For the first time, Chen Mo walked on the street of Qingshuixing City. Qingshuixing is very prosperous and social development is several grades higher than the earth.

Looking around in the business district, this scene used to be the future of his planned future.

Holographic cities and different high-rise buildings, anti-gravity suspension vehicles and flying armor are constantly flowing in the air.

The commercial plaza is no longer the first floor with gates. The third floor, the fifth floor, and even the higher buildings are all open. The people sitting in the suspension car and the armor can land directly on the high floor and then enter the commercial plaza or go home. .

"Do you want the peak of life? Ace armor, you deserve it."

"Qingyun Battle Armor, handsome in style, picking up a weapon, you can't buy it, you can't buy it, you can't buy it."

"Dragon War Armor, make yourself faster, stronger, and beautiful."

"..."

Huge holographic light curtains are advertising, and the same taste as the bustling city, Chen Mo feels interesting.

There are a lot of armor shops on the roadside, all kinds of armor, and parts stores, all brand new, like the 4S shop of the car, in addition, there are shops painted in the armor, and finally the armor maintenance And modified shops.

Most of the repaired and refurbished shops are on the first floor, which is convenient for landing and maintenance.

There are many techniques and materials that Chen Mo has not touched.

Chen Mo walked into a Warrior repair and modification shop. Several technicians were debugging and checking the armor. A battle armor of more than 3 meters should be the armor of a large alien.

"Do you recruit technology apprentices here?" Chen Mo asked in the omnibus language of oysters.

Several people stopped their work and looked at him with amazement. They were only surprised to see Chen Mo’s life like this for the first time and continue to do the work in his hands.

“Do you have work experience?” said a person with a yellow body.

"No."

"We only recruit skilled apprentices here."

Chen Mo nodded slightly, did not bother, turned and left. I tried several times in a row, and there were big and small, and the final result was the same.

All the way to the suspension of the motorcycle to the corner of the street.

After hitting the wall for more than a dozen times, Chen Mo did not give up. He wanted to escape from Qing Shuixing and must contact the technical field. Only then would he have the opportunity to accumulate technology, otherwise there would be no hope.

When Chen Mo is ready to give up, the next time he comes back, he finds that there is a small repair shop in front.

With a mentality of trying, Chen Mo still flew over the floating car.

The repair shop is very small, only a few hundred square meters. This scale is quite the size of the 'tire repair motorcycle' on the roadside of the earth. Inside the store, there is a wine-red person, skin folds, like the gully of the mountain range, it should be a Old man.

The remaining spider engineering robots, did not work, just stood quietly in the corner.

"Boss, do you recruit technology apprentices here?" After listening to it many times, Chen Mo said a lot.

"Young man, how long did it take to come to Qingshui?" The old man greeted Chen Mo.

"How do you know?" Chen Mo nodded.

"The pronunciation is raw, should it be just after learning the language, was it caught?"

"Yes."

Chen Mo is not jealous. At least people on this planet know the rule of three-eyed civilization, and they will catch people from outside. This is not a secret.

"After being caught, will you understand the knowledge here?"

"My hometown knows something, but there are still some things that don't work, but I learn very quickly."

"I just got used to it, and I learned the language. You really learn very fast. I only have one person here. I really don't have an apprentice who can get a hand, but the salary may be lower. The apprentices in other stores are paid 500 yuan a day. There are only two hundred stars a day here, would you like it?"

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

He never thought about relying on the apprentice's salary to earn the capital to escape from Qing Shuixing. Now he mainly contacts and quickly familiarizes with the armor technology here, and then finds ways to make money and develop armor technology.

“When can I work?”

"It's okay now, but I am at Qingshui College, and sometimes I have to go to class, but I can come over after class."

"After you arrived, you entered Qingshui College?" The voice of the old man was obviously a little surprised.

"They arranged it in the R&D department."

The old man knew it, and he knew who Chen Mo was talking about. He looked at Chen Mo deeply and looked with appreciation.

"My name is Jia, and I will call it like this in the future. When you are in class, tell me to do it. If there is no problem, start working today, count you for a long time. There are some technical books about armor, look at it yourself, there are still There are a few old armor that no one wants, and you try to dismantle your hands."

The old man pointed to a few books that were randomly placed in the distance, continued to sit in the chair, doing nothing.

......

"According to intelligence, it can be determined that spatial fluctuations occur around the origin city, but the specific orientation is not confirmed." Zeqi pointed to a star map and a dynamic map of the waveform, and there are various data on it.

In front of him is Ziyun and two other members of the accompanying Ziwei civilization.

Purple rhyme looks cold, puts on the instrument handed over, receives the above content and data, and the purple scorpion is erratic.

"How can I be sure?"

"Requires space quantum detectors to detect at close range, which is still based on the fluctuation of space." Zeqi said: "Space fluctuations are difficult to capture, and the time of appearance is short, and it is difficult to find without grasping a specific time. ”

"It's a big deal, don't worry, as long as the news doesn't leak, but it can't be too slow. Try to narrow down the scope of exploration. Staying here for too long will attract attention from other families." Ziyun said.

"Good." Zeqi immediately accepted.

"Ziyun, Zeqi, three-eyed civilization sent people." The light curtain popped up a man with a purple eyes and reported it.

"Let them come over."

The purple rhyme is cold and the mouth is calm and the water is calm.

Three questions try to make yourself look natural, but the heart is somewhat nervous. In the origin city, he is the best glimpse, standing at the top of the origin city, but for the Ziwei civilization, a tribe is more noble than them.

For the first time in close contact with the messenger of the Ziwei civilization, although he was confident, he was still a little nervous. His so-called self-confidence, in the eyes of the other party, is nothing but a joke.

"The messenger, my name is three questions, three eyes of civilization sent to you for sending." Three asked to see the purple rhyme, shocked to heaven.

"My name is Ziyun. You will call me Ziyun in the future. We are going to go to the origin city and you will lead the way." Ziyun smiled and recovered the cold look, as always.

chapters.title: Chapter 753: : Small Fisherman
chapters.body:
Chapter 753: : Small Fisherman

The small fish was lying on the bed, his face was painful and sweaty.

Next to Zhao Min holding her hand tightly, her eyes were red, and her eyes were anxious. It had been three hours passed, and she did not dare to disturb the doctor. She could only comfort herself in the small fisherman's ear.

Chen Mo has been missing for more than nine months, and Xiaoyu has reached the delivery period.

"Husband, husband."

Xiao Yu is a little tired and his voice is hoarse.

When he heard the name of the little fisherman, Zhao Min’s eyes were red: “Nothing, you will be back when you give birth to your baby.”

"Ok."

Xiao Yu’s tears could not stop falling and his face was more painful.

"The husband will come back."

"It will definitely come back." Zhao Min nodded.

An hour passed, accompanied by a baby crying sound, Xiao Yu's painful face was loose, relieved, and the tense atmosphere in the delivery room turned into joy.

what……

Suddenly, a scream, everyone looked at the doctor who delivered the baby. I saw that the female doctor who was responsible for the delivery was a little flustered. The nurse who was giving the baby was not calm.

They delivered hundreds of times and saw this strange thing for the first time.

"what happened?"

Zhao Min looked cold and let the ink girl take over the baby. Some vigilance looked at the doctor.

"The cord blood is red gold." Some of the doctors who gave birth were not calm.

Zhao Min’s hole shrinks, and a heart is lifted up in an instant: “What is going on?”

"Ink girl, the child showed me."

Xiao Yu’s eyes are red, so that the ink girl will hold the child. Seeing the child's stretched skin, surprise, tears can't stop, the voice is crying.

"The blood of her husband is like this."

The death in the delivery room was generally silent. The doctors and nurses who delivered the baby squinted and looked at each other with incredible thoughts, as if they had discovered a big secret.

Zhao Min was also a little shocked, but immediately returned to God.

......

Shi Wei was a little nervous, sitting quietly in the room, surrounded by robots, not allowing them to contact the outside world.

After giving birth for more than ten years, she had never had any problems in the delivery room where she was delivered. Today, I heard the secret inadvertently. Chen Mo’s **** night is different from ordinary people.

But it is also relieved that the genius of Chen Mo is special.

Only now, Zhao Min let them come here, not allowing them to leave, nor allowing them to contact the outside world, which has to make them nervous.

Since Chen Mo’s disappearance, Zhao Min has exposed unprecedented iron and blood means.

The current marching ant group, but it is very horrible, it controls the African continent, technology is unique, and it is also sitting on Mars. It can be said that it is powerful. If you want them to keep secrets forever, it is only a matter of words.

After a while, the door to the room opened and Zhao Min walked in.

Shi Wei was tense, and the three doctors and nurses next to him were nervous.

"Today is a big day, I won't be like it, don't be nervous."

Zhao Min’s voice did not waver, and they handed them an agreement.

"You have heard some secrets just now, but I hope that you will smother this secret in your heart. At least I don't want it. This secret leaks out of your mouth. This is a confidentiality agreement."

"I signed." Shi Wei did not hesitate to pick up the pen, signed his name, and did not read the terms.

Originally, she did not want to talk about it. If this incident was offended by Zhao Min and Chen Jia, they could not escape because they could not escape the earth. Another doctor and two nurses did not hesitate to sign the name and press their fingerprints.

Seeing their decisive appearance, Zhao Min nodded slightly and was a person of interest. She was not worried that they would talk nonsense.

"The four cards, each with five million, are your secrets and the rewards for the birth of the students today. The password is six after the bank card. You are just an ordinary delivery, and Xiaoyu has a healthy birth. The son will do, forget the blood." Zhao Min gave each person a card.

"it is good."

Shi Wei nodded and promised that the other three also hurriedly nodded and hesitated. The four still accepted the bank card.

Let people leave them, Zhao Min turned and went to the small fishing room.

......

Xiao Yu is leaning on the bed, holding a squat, looking a little tired, but very gentle, his eyes are still red. It was a male treasure, and the old man at home remembered Chen Mo and cried for a while.

After Zhao Min came in, his family had already gone out and left the space for her and Zhao Min.

"Zhao Min sister, remember that every time her husband will vomit and suffer in his sleep?" Xiao Yu gently touched the baby's face without stretching.

"Yeah." Zhao Min nodded gently.

"He also told me last time."

Xiao Yu thinks of Chen Mo, and his eyes are wet again.

"At the end of the Mars transformation, he had another incident in his study at home. He told me. He said that every time, his body and brain showed almost a change, similar to evolution, and it changed every time. It’s smarter. The last time it was a bit serious, his blood changed and it became golden.”

"No wonder he will be more and more smart." Zhao Min is a lot easier.

"So before he said his new new human beings, I have never been pregnant, I thought that the reproductive isolation, the baby's appearance, is also a kind of luck." Xiaoyu said, tears fell down.

"Nothing, he will come back, we are still waiting for him here, he will definitely come back."

Xiao Yu wiped his tears and said with a certainty: "Well, my husband must still be alive, the baby is the bridge between me and him, I can feel it."

"Ink is developing a light speed spacecraft and a super-light speed spacecraft. When the time comes, if Merle does not return, go out and look for him."

The ink girl who has been standing quietly has been interrupted.

"Now the machines on Mars have discovered dark matter and antimatter, and are trying to capture and extract. As long as the extraction is successful, the materials of the spacecraft and the energy that drives the engine will be there."

In order to develop super-light speed spacecraft faster, Chen Mo’s theory of space-light spacecraft, space curvature engine theory, design theory of light-speed spacecraft, space jump theory, light speed engine technology and extraction technology of anti-matter and dark matter all tell the ink girl.

At the same time, there are a variety of technologies and super-capacity development techniques, which allow the ink and female's enormous computing power and special quantum consciousness to assist in research and development.

Information on technology and direction, all in Mexico.

Chen Mo was arrested before passing the ink girl, let her develop according to the original direction and plan.

Dark matter is an essential material for spacecraft hull and engine materials. Antimatter is an essential energy source for curvature engines and light speed engines. As soon as the dark matter and antimatter are successfully extracted, the construction of the superluminal spacecraft and the speed of light spacecraft can begin.

After Chen Mo was arrested, Zhao Min let the armed forces quickly rule Africa, and then let the ink girl do her best to develop the experimental equipment needed for construction.

Under the super artificial intelligence and fully mechanized blessing, despite all the development, the earth has been beyond recognition for more than nine months, and the level of development has reached another height.

“How long will it take to develop successfully?” Xiao Yu asked.

"It's hard to say that at the current development speed, it can be done within a year or two. My consciousness will not be tired, there is no limit, and the calculation is very fast, but the current conditions can only be so fast." The ink girl said.

After listening to the words of the ink girl, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min looked at each other with a firm look in their eyes and a quiet return in the room.

"Little fisher sister, what is the name of the baby?"

The ink girl broke the silence again, she didn't know the baby's name.

"Now there is no name, wait for her husband to come back and give him a name." Xiao Yu looked at the baby in his arms, and his eyes were infinitely gentle.

hiss……

Chen Mo, who is far away from the other side of the universe, is dismantling the armor, and suddenly feels a sense of heart.

An inexplicable incitement.

After the incitement, Chen Mo’s mood seemed to be comfortable, and he couldn’t tell why, it was an inexplicable joy.

Is it that Xiaoyu has been successfully produced?

Chen Mo’s mind came up with an idea.

Waking up from the dormant cabin, he did not know how long he had been arrested. If the joy of the joy was due to the small fishing production of the distant earth, then he was only nine months old.

He slept for nine months in the dormant cabin.

Time flies not long. If you escape, return to Earth, your loved ones are there.

Chapter 757: : Dark Matter And Small Universe

Chen Mo carrying a large bag of things, suspended motorcycles stopped in the repair shop in Ka. Came back to Chen Mo, quietly sitting in the chair of Jia, just glanced at him and continued to raise his spirits.

"How come back?"

"Buy something, get some materials to sell." Chen Mo took off his backpack.

Gai nodded slightly: "You are short of money?"

"Well, that's right, after all, you have money to do what you want to do."

Chen Mo took a backpack and went in to the small room of the repair shop.

Each of the armor maintenance technicians is a material scientist and a machine scientist. They all have their own laboratories. Without technical strength, it is impossible to repair them.

The small room that Chen Mo entered was Jia’s small laboratory, where he had the equipment needed to prepare the materials.

When entering the laboratory to close the door, Chen Mo put on special goggles and protective clothing, began to add raw materials, and prepared refining materials.

The laboratory of the research department of Qingshui University is more complete. He does not return to the Qingshui University to use the equipment of the research laboratory, but to come here. The Qingshui College always made him uncomfortable, and no one wanted to stay in a certain cage.

There are inexhaustible materials in the Science and Technology Library. Chen Mo does not have no technology, just the material that is being developed. As long as there is a start, things are much simpler.

......

At the Mars base, a huge ring sits in the plains, large in size, comparable to the diameter of a small city. Inside the huge ring structure, it is equipped with extremely complicated lines and instruments.

This is the dark matter extraction machine designed and created by the ink woman according to the theoretical data given by Chen Mo.

In the center of the underground structure of the machine, a two-meter-high transparent container is erected, and special machines are installed above and below the container.

The container is transparent and does not seem to have any substance at first glance, but as long as it is observed by means of the instrument, it can be seen that the bottom of the bottle is different, and there is a special substance on it. This is the fifth state substance, Bose-Einstein condensed matter.

This is the physical condensed state formed by the fixation of dark matter after capturing dark matter.

Dark matter is smaller than electrons and photons. It has no charge, does not interfere with electrons, and can traverse electromagnetic waves and gravitational fields. This characteristic is destined to be difficult to capture, so only special methods can be used to capture and extract.

The capture method introduced by the Science and Technology Library is to use a special gas of quantum degenerate state to capture dark matter. In the science of the earth, this special gas is similar to the quantum degenerate Fermi gas.

The gas itself is a free electron gas. When in the quantum degenerate state, the internal 'degenerate pressure' is used to capture dark matter, and then use the magnetic field to adjust the interaction between the atoms to convert the special electron gas pair into a color. The type of particles are then subjected to low temperature processing to form a fifth state substance to fix the dark matter.

After Chen Mo’s disappearance, this large-scale construction project was carried out by Mars in independence on Mars, desperately.

There are two kinds of dark matter that the earth has recognized, neutrinos and black holes. Chen Mo captures another form of dark matter: the dark, a relatively stable dark particle different from the black hole and the neutrino.

Dark matter is the main material for building a super-light-speed spacecraft. It is a special material that incorporates a specific proportion of dark matter and can withstand space compression during space folding and light speed flight.

Without dark matter, it is impossible to create a space curvature super-light speed spacecraft and a speed-of-light spacecraft.

Therefore, according to Chen Mo’s original thinking, the ink girl first extracted dark matter and antimatter.

These two substances are the basis of everything, and the design of the space curvature engine and the super-light speed spacecraft is also in progress. As soon as the dark matter comes out, the ink girl can use the dark matter for the material at the fastest speed.

Suddenly, the working machine stopped, the container was taken down by the processing robot, removed from the laboratory, and the other bottle was fixed again.

There are not only one container for extracting dark matter, but many.

"The dark matter extraction was successful." This is the message that the ink girl got.

“Is the condition mature?” Zhao Min asked as she looked at the holographic projection of the ink girl.

Since Chen Mo’s disappearance, Zhao Min’s expression has been indifferent, and the huge marching ant group has fallen on her. Chen Mo used to be a supporter on her, and she is now on her.

"Mature," said the ink girl.

"Yeah." Zhao Min nodded slightly.

The current marching ant group is desperately developing the entire Mars and outer space to build a defense system against the alien invasion of the solar system. The asteroids in the asteroid belt are also eroded by nanobots, and the ink girl is preparing to build resources for space jumps.

For humans, this is an unprecedented project.

The extraction of dark matter was successful, and the huge project of planning a super-light speed spacecraft and building space jump points was also initiated.

......

Back to the place where I lived, the purple rhyme was cold and let Zeqi take the equipment data. It’s been too busy to wander around the origin city for a long time. Their purpose is not for sightseeing.

Collecting spatial data is what they want to do most.

"How is the result?"

"The location I arrived today did not reveal abnormal spatial fluctuations." Zeqi shook his head.

“Is there any other way to find it?” Ziyun put an instrument next to the temple, and the purple eyelids flashed to restore the cold look.

“No, that is the spatial fluctuation of uncertainty. When there is no fluctuation, it cannot be detected.”

Zechi explained.

"Now it is only based on the obtained spatial fluctuation data, guessing that there may be a small universe here, but it is impossible to determine whether it is true. The spatial fluctuations of several small universes that have been identified are not exactly the same."

The purpose of their trip is the small universe.

The small universe is a very special main space. At present, in the main universe where they are located, only seven small universes are discovered, which is the supreme base of seven god-level civilizations.

The small universe is one of the necessary conditions for a god-level civilization.

A civilization gains a small universe and blocks the space entrance of the small universe, which prevents the opponent from using the devastating regular weapons to destroy the entire Wenxing domain.

Otherwise, civilization will be exposed to the enemies of the universe. Even if the civilization is higher and more developed, it will be destroyed in one fell swoop.

And there are many benefits to the small universe, including civilizations that can sit on all the resources and space of the entire universe.

The emergence of a small universe may create a new god-level civilization, so they get news of fluctuations in the small universe, just appearing in the name of investigation, and not dare to sway.

If it is learned by the other six god-level civilizations that they are investigating the spatial fluctuations of the suspected small universe, they will come to fight at all costs.

If the seven god-level civilizations fall into war, the most terrible consequence is that the entire universe will suffer.

"The extra life of the origin city during this time is a bit more. It may be that some news has been received. I am afraid we have to grasp the position of the small universe," said a purple pupil. He is one of the colleague of Zimu and Ziyun who came out this time.

"Now it's just a doubt. I'm not sure if there is a small universe. If you can't find it, you can't find it. If the news doesn't leak, we will follow the current plan." Ziyun said lightly.

chapters.title: Chapter 758: : Freedom

Chapter 758: : Freedom

In the secret room, the three-eyed king watched a map, which is the route of Ziyun's spaceship.

When the three questions came back, he did not stop at the foothold of the Ziwei civilization. The people of the Ziwei civilization would not let them stay.

“What did you find?” asked the three-eyed king.

Three questions shook his head: "For the time being, they are like sightseeing. I asked if there is any special place in the original city. According to our understanding of the origin of the city, I have seen this route several times and found nothing special. Place. But I don't dare to send people to investigate the specifics of this route, otherwise it may be troublesome if found."

The three-eyed king nodded.

He knows the hegemony of the god-level civilization. If he is not happy, he will never be kind. The development of the god-level civilization to the present, the law of the universe is already very familiar.

But he does not believe that Ziwei civilization is a sightseeing tour.

Although the origin city is one of the cosmic ports, for high-level civilization, it is only a port behind a small country. People of the god-level civilization generally do not appear easily, let alone send special messengers.

"On this route, is there anything special happening during this time? Or is there anything happening on the way you took them?" asked the three-eyed king.

"No." Three questions recalled shaking his head: "The female messenger is standing by the window and looking at the space. She is a bit cold, cold and cold, and I dare not ask and bother."

"There have been a lot of special lives in the original city, and they are all very strong. There must be a relationship here. It should be heard by the wind." Three eyes said.

"Father said that the powerful life outside is from the messengers of the god-level civilization? Or, is it for some purpose of the Ziwei civilization?" said the three questions.

"I can't say it." The three-eyed king has a little confidence in his own inference: "The life that comes, the level of civilization is not lower than ours, they must also think that the self-proclaimed civilization is a bit strange."

People of God-class civilization, what scenes have not been experienced, have not seen? To come to their small place to visit, 80% comes with purpose.

"What could it be?"

The three-eyed king shook his head: "Who knows? The food that makes them look good is definitely a big meal for us, but it is not good to snatch. You continue to stare at them, try your best to help, don't ask anything, and don't guess their topic. Remember that you followed their process and found something unusual."

"Okay, father." Three questions nodded and said yes.

"I am afraid that the origin city will not be very peaceful." Three eyes Wang Yu said.

If the Ziwei civilization really comes with the purpose, it is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity for the three-eye civilization, but if it is wrong, the worst consequence is that the entire three-eye civilization has become a ruin.

......

Chen Mo took a piece of cardboard-sized material and came out of the lab. The slightly khaki-colored material does not seem to be eye-catching, but it is the result of Chen Mo's work in the laboratory.

"Cal, do you know where there is a place to buy materials?"

"Oh? So fast?"

Ka looked at the material in the hands of Chen Mo, and he groaned in his hand, with a strange look in his eyes.

"It's quite light, talk about its characteristics."

“It weighs a quarter of the strength of high-strength titanium alloy, and its strength is more than twice that of the armor material on the market, and its structure is a six-sided structure with excellent cushioning and unloading performance. It is a battle. A good material for the shell."

"Ok?"

Ghana was a little surprised, picked up the gadget next to it and knocked it on the instrument again.

“Very good material, ready to sell materials in the future?”

“I want to sell its formula and smelting process.”

During this period of time, Chen Mo has already determined that Jia is only an old man who will endure his life. He was arrested from an early age. Sometimes he can feel his dislike of the three-eyed civilization from his words, and he is tired of this cage. .

Chen Mo’s answer surprised Jia, and could not help but smile, and then returned the materials in his hand to Chen Mo.

"If you sell it to the company, the price will press you, maybe you will refuse, and then send someone to rob, but there is a place to sell high prices, but that place is a bit special."

"Where?" Chen Mochi questioned.

"Freedom field." Jia did not say salty: "A trading market."

The location of the free field is not remote, but instead is in the center of the city of Qingshui's largest city, Star City. Star Zero City, the largest city in Qingshui, is more than 400 kilometers away from Qingshui City.

Chen Mo rode on a poor suspension motorcycle and it took two hours to arrive.

The tall and expansive buildings, as early as the Star City, see the airborne vehicles and the projections of various screens and holograms. The life of Qingshuixing is very beautiful, very comfortable, much better than the earth, here is the imagination. The future.

If you don't think about it, no one will know that he lives in a cage.

When it was too late to feel, Chen Mo lowered the height of the suspension vehicle and entered the scope of the Star City. This is the first time Chen Mo came to the Star City.

According to the map marked by Cana, Chen Mo shuttles between the high-rise buildings to find the location of the free field.

According to Kay's introduction, the free field is a bit special, because here a long list of activists a special life, free.

The captured life, in addition to surrendering its fate, is still not convinced. Passed down from generation to generation, the goal is to escape from the planet. After generations of generation, it has become a free person living in the dark corners of the city.

Freedom has no identity since birth, quite a black household. They can't use the public facilities of the planet, education, so they work hard to create.

Escape from the planet is not a taboo topic. Many creatures here want to escape, but they are numb. Many lives live here without any restrictions, and after slowly proliferating the next generation, the escaping mind will gradually disappear.

The three-eye civilization will not care about the idea that the worm wants to escape from the prison. There is no light speed spaceship, and there is no possibility of escaping here. The outer space of Qing Shui Xing is guarded by space-based weapons. Any flying object, without the permission of identification, will be shot down.

As long as the free people do not destroy the normal order of the planet, the three-eye civilization allows them to freely multiply. The three-eye civilization needs the constant reproduction of the creatures here, the exchange of genes, and then the evolution of mutations.

Suspended motorcycles pass through high-rise buildings and bustling streets, eventually falling behind a bustling street.

Unlike the tall shopping malls outside, this is a small downtown area. Do not drive a levitation bike, retaining the style of the original pedestrian street. There are many people, a variety of forms, and different skin colors.

Chen Mo bought a large cloak that covered his body and made a disguise on his face before he entered the free market.

On the sidelines of the battlefield shops on both sides of the free-field street, many armor are placed like clothes, with a clear price tag, a cheap 200,000 starcoin, and a tens of millions of stars.

Finding the free-standing plaza, Chen Mo rented a small location and put his own materials.

Many people are setting up stalls.

The origin of the free field is related to the free.

Freedom is a black-boxer, unable to use the many benefits of Qingshuixing, can't accept the education of Qingshuixing, has no formal working status, but also needs money and resources.

Therefore, the free field has become the choice of many free people.

There are free people activities all year round, but no one knows who is free if they don't check the authenticity of the wristwatch in their hands.

The products on the open-air plaza stalls include food, clothes, decorations, various technical toys, technology products, used suspension vehicles, second-hand armor, armor components, rare ores, and various materials.

"The sale of armor material formula and material smelting process." Chen Mo's stalls write their own goods, waiting quietly.

chapters.title: Chapter 759: : Little Beast
chapters.body:
Chapter 759: : Little Beast

The quotation of the business was patrolled in the square, and the final gaze was locked in a staller wearing a cloak.

In the free field, it is not surprising to wear a cloak. Many lives are wearing large, long mopping cloaks just to disguise their identity. Some life, do not want people to see his identity.

He was not interested in what the people under the cloak looked like, but was interested in Chen Mo's material. Few people will come here to sell materials for the formulation and smelting process.

After all, every material is a golden chicken that lays eggs.

"Can you look at this material?" The merchant stopped at Chen Mo's booth.

Chen Mo looked up at the business.

He sat here for ten minutes, but he didn't expect it to be very fast. The person coming is a two-meter-five person, with orange-yellow skin, long arms, sharper voice than the average person, and narrow eyes.

As for the other businessman who is a free agent or a Qing Shuixing, Chen Mo did not care.

What he cares about is whether the materials can be sold.

"This is data."

Chen Mo handed the test data of the materials to the merchant.

“Oh?” The deeds took over the data of the materials and were shocked and surprised: “Is the data correct?”

"Yes, you can test."

Chen Mo took out a biscuit-sized material and placed it in front of the merchant. He is not afraid that the other party will use the material to crack the formula.

In Qingshuixing, there is a special kind of syrup, which mixes one of the raw materials into the smelting, and does not affect the properties of the material, but can cover the analysis of the machine for analyzing the components.

Without a component and smelting process, it is very difficult to crack the composition of a material.

The merchant did not hesitate to take over the materials in the hands of Chen Mo, and took out a small instrument of a fist size and stuffed the materials. This is a test instrument for materials that can easily confirm the properties of the material and obtain preliminary data on the material.

Hey! ! !

The small instrument rang for a while and stopped.

The deeds looked at the data and some surprises.

“What is the price of your material formulation and smelting process?”

"Two million stars." Chen Mo said lightly.

When I heard the price, the business took a sigh of relief, and I was a little surprised at the moment. He is guessing where the formula and process of the material comes from. This level of material should only be found in the labs of several of the top companies in Qingshuixing.

"I bought this material formula, there will be no trouble and danger?" asked the business.

"There is a formal way, no one will find you trouble, at present I only have its recipes and crafts, this is exclusive. But I can't guarantee that your opponent will want to grab it from your hands in the future." Chen Mo calmly said.

"can it be cheaper?"

"No." Chen Mo shook his head directly.

“Yes, 20 million.” The merchant no longer bargains: “I need to find a place to verify your recipe and craftsmanship.”

"Yes, go to that house."

Chen Mohe and the two businessmen went to the shared laboratory next to the square.

The shared lab is used to test the people in the square for everything they buy.

The free field has no agreement on this kind of thing. There are many free people here. They have no identity. In Qing Shuixing, the ruling party of Qing Shuixing does not recognize their identity and will not accept their agreement and arbitration.

So in the free field, there is no need for an agreement, and neither party knows the identity of the other party.

But in order to prevent the purchase of fakes, the sharing laboratory has its existence. Many people buy the materials they need, and test their characteristics in the first place, they will all go to the shared lab, but the cost is a bit expensive.

An hour later, Chen Mo and the merchant came out from the shared lab.

After the verification process, the transaction between the two parties has been reached.

Deeply looked at the back of Chen Mo wearing a cloak, the business turned and left, disappeared into the darkness of the square alley.

......

20 million.

Now that the initial funds have been made, there is no need to worry about the money in the future. The next thing to do is how to make the light speed spacecraft and escape from Qing Shuixing.

Only by escaping the cage of Qing Shuixing can we develop unscrupulously and then build a space curvature spaceship to find the Milky Way and the Earth.

Chen Mo does not know where the universe is now, nor where the earth is, everything depends on his own.

Three-eye civilization can not provide the Earth's data to his mobile account.

Mo Mo Mo...

Thinking about it, an anxious ‘mo Momo’ call called to interrupt his thoughts, and the voice was a bit strange. Chen Moyi stunned and turned to find the source of the sound.

A little beast.

Strictly speaking, it is a small beast with a big palm. It is kept in a cage and placed on a small stall. There are many lives on the crowd, and they are curiously watching the little beasts, as well as some small pets in other cages.

The small animal is silver-gray, with no bright fur, but it is very cute.

The pupil is pure black, deeper than the black hole. The rainbow trout is as pure as the starry sky. It is exquisitely cut, and the silver-white hair is in the eyebrows. The pattern composed of silvery white hair is very strange. Chen Mo can't say it is strange, but it looks good and just right.

Such a cute little beast, if the woman of the earth sees it, it must be crazy.

The little beast looked at the life on the side, and the call was a little panicked.

"100,000?"

Chen Mo saw the separate price of the little beast, and his face was pumped.

No wonder so cute, no one buys, this price to buy a pet, can not be worthwhile. After all, on this planet, there are strange pets, and there is no shortage of this.

Momo... Momo...

Chen Mo is not going to buy, ready to step away, but this is called the voice around his ear, just like calling his name, just stepping on the footsteps.

"You are lucky."

Chen Mo turned back.

"Where did this little beast come from? What kind of variety?"

"In the mountains outside the city of Xingcheng, I have seen new varieties that I have not seen. It is very smart. I took a lot of effort to catch it." The lean boss answered truthfully and looked at Chen Mo with hope. He is a professional pet catcher. He sells some cute and special pets for a living. If this little beast can be sold, this is not a small gain.

“Can it be cheaper?”

"No." The stall owner shook his head.

"Five thousand, sell it to me, leave me without selling." Chen Mo took out the star card and shook it in front of the booth owner.

"Row."

The skinny boss finally nodded his teeth and rejoiced to take over 50,000 of Chen Mo’s star card.

Chen Mo squinted at the little beast and left with a cage, completely ignoring the little beast that was screaming inside. After buying a new suspension car in the free field, Chen Mo went straight to the small apartment of Qingshui College.

The money has already made initial progress, and the speed will be faster and faster in the future. What he wants to consider next is how to use the money.

Momo...

Chen Mogang returned to the room, the little beast in the small cage began to call, watching Chen Mo a little panic.

"Think out?" Chen Moqi asked from the small cage.

I saw the little beast nodded and looked at Chen Mo with timidity.

"After escaping, don't be caught again."

Chen Mo put the cage on the table and opened it. The little beast seized the opportunity to pull out the cage and disappear into the room. The speed is fast, even Chen Mo is a little surprised, no wonder the boss said that it is not a small energy. Chen Mo did not care about the little beast that fled, and he did not intend to pay attention. He threw the empty cage to the side of the trash can and began to wash.

If it is not the cry of a little beast, Chen Mo will not buy it. After all, there is no mood to raise a pet.

After the washing was finished, Chen Mo walked out of the hall, only to see the movement on the table. The little beast did not run away, but on his desk, holding a fruit.

The little beast noticed that Chen Mo came out and hurriedly turned around and watched him with vigilance.

Just seeing Chen Moguang's upper body, hurriedly lost the fruit in his arms, his two eyes squinted, a shy look, quite human.

"..."

Chen Mo almost didn't get angry, went to the table and grabbed the back of the little beast and let the little beast struggle.

"Is it shy? It won't be the mother?" Chen Mo reached out and opened the fur between the legs of the little beast. It was indeed the mother. He also squeezed the small **** and smiled happily. "The little **** is quite soft, no wonder. It’s eye-catching.”

"Mo Mo Mo..."

Chen Mo looked over there, the little beast was desperately calling, and he was flustered and angry, struggling. Just put down, the little beast disappeared on the table again, and ran to the door and yelled at Chen Mo, as if blaming.

Chen Mo smiled, did not care about the little beast, took out the light brain and began programming. Chen Mo is not around, Chen Mo needs to develop an artificial intelligence, so that he needs to assist him in technology development in the future.

"Who wants you to massage."

When I heard this, my pink face turned red, like a ripe apple. This race, the shy expression is so obvious, Chen Mo could not help but take a look.

"No."

Chen Mo still shook his head.

When Chen Mo refused, but with disappointment in his eyes, he looked helplessly at the ring and said that he could do nothing.

Uh? ?

They are all humanoids, and their body structure is similar. Seeing that the whole body is red and squatting in front, looking at the ring in annoyance, Chen Mo knows where he has just hit.

This plastic sister flower, said to sell and sell.

The atmosphere is a bit strange, Chen Mo is a bit embarrassed.

"Well, help you once, don't use it for your body." Chen Mo did not know, if he did not agree, this woman would be confused.

This time, the skin of the child, red to almost drip bleeding.

Chen Mo sat in a suspended motorcycle and followed the two to the south of Qingshui College. On the road, the two men wearing armor seem to be bickering. As for what to say, Chen Mo did not know.

The destination was a large research workshop, and Chen Mo looked around for four weeks. He had never been here. But it is normal. He came to Qingshui College soon. Qingshui College is comparable to a city. Chen Mo is not interested in discovering it.

Surrounded by students from Qingshui College, the three or five groups gathered together to whisper, and occasionally excited laughter.

"pretty good."

Chen Mo is still a look of indifference.

This particular way, it is a special way.

Speed, passion, blood, violent and screaming, this is a place full of hormones.

Listening to the introduction of the ring, Chen Mo also had to feel that the Ziwei civilization found a way to make life stronger, and this road is very correct.
