"He is the person who re-written the fragrant bird battle control system. This time, let you take out the baby I modified last time and let him write a flight control system," said the ring.

"Great God, brother." Huangpizi's face is adored, and the appearance is more and more cumbersome: "Where is the brother mixed? Do you want to join me?"

"Don't be close," said the ring impatiently.

Chen Mo was invited by her sister to sell, and if Chen Mo walked away, she was not sure if she could come again. In the ring of eyes, Chen Mo's temper is a bit strange.

"The violent old girl, you don't want it, you have to be like it."

"roll."

"..."

Huangpizi helpless, led the three into a small workshop. On the window, Chen put a set of armor, painted in pink, very similar to the skin of both children and rings.

"It's called pink memories." The ring proudly said: "This is the armor that I modified according to my design ideas."

"For you, pink may be really a memory..." The yellow leather has not finished, and has been swept two meters away from the ring, touching the terrible eyes of the ring, and immediately shut up.

Chen Mo looked at the armor and looked at the holographic image design and data next to it.

This armor does have something special.

In terms of power layout, it is very special, using the shape changes of the armor components, affecting the power and aerodynamic layout, so that it can make various difficult movements at high speed.

The armor's engine is also special, the soles of the feet, hands, back and legs, eight sets of vector push engines, with six sets of auxiliary engines and armor parts deformation, this armor can even make the ultimate moment of steering.

The beauty of this armor design is that it is flexible enough, whether in flight or in combat.

At least on the Battlegear fight, it has very good performance.

"how is it?"

"Excellent design." Chen Mo said.

After hearing the praise, the ring is still very happy: "Can you design a flight control system suitable for it?"

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded. "But there is a condition that I will use it once for my design. It is a reward."

"What are you doing with the design?"

"I just missed a set of armor. Your design is good. I have modified it myself." Chen Mo said truthfully.

Now that his financial problems have been solved, the next issue is the armor. Here, the armor is the combat power and one of the guarantees for his future escape.

"Yes, no problem."

OK, Chen Mo took over the light brain, inserted the circuit design of the armor, connected to the analog light quantum chip, and began to write the system.

Writing a flight control system is very simple for Chen Mo, and it is not difficult.

The yellow skin and the ring next to him have already seen it, but the face is full of surprises. The last time was fast enough. I didn’t expect this time to be faster, and I still didn’t have to think about it when I started.

When did the flight control system design become so simple?

Suffering from failing to design a mature flight control system, this 'Pink Memory' has been placed here. If Chen Mo can write a suitable flight control system today, it is good news for them.

Two hours later, Chen Mo is still writing a program.

He misses the ink girl a little. If it is a female ink, this program only needs to be completed in a flash. Chen Mo also felt the need to train an artificial intelligence as an assistant, at least in the following, it may be of great use.

"Well, I will test it."

After completing the system writing, Chen Mo stretched out a lazy waist and called up the holographic projection armor model.

Seeing the data of the crazy movement on the light brain, several people on the field saw Chen Mo’s eyes become different. The design of this set of armor is too complicated, the flight control system has always been a problem, so it will be placed, just the concept armor.

Now Chen Mo actually designed the flight control system, which is equivalent to giving this armored soul.

The armor is the mainstream equipment in the entire universe, and anyone who will modify the armor and design the armor is superior. Chen Mo only used a few hours to design a complex flight control system, which is already an excellent armor designer.

Now several people have to guess the origin of Chen Mo.

"Where did you lie to this master?" Huangpizi's eyes burned, and he wanted to pull Chen Mo into his own society.

"Fart, he is a sister's classmate."

"You haven't seen your class?"

"I didn't know the origins of the new transfer students not long ago." The ring shook his head.

"Yes, you try the armor." Holographic debugging is completed, Chen Mocai stopped his work, and gestured to try.

chapters.title: Chapter 761: : Air Soccer
chapters.body:
Chapter 761: : Air Soccer

"feel good."

The ring has been put on the armor, revealing a head outside, constantly looking at the armor of the body, very satisfied. This is the armor she designed with great pains. I thought I couldn't wear it. I didn't expect it to be made today.

Pink painted, slender and slim body, perfect fit, like a female warrior.

Put on the helmet, the ring will start the armor and slowly suspend it. At the moment when the workshop door opened, the figure of the ring slowly flew out.

Wow……

The screams and exclamations outside were one after another. This is a stunning masterpiece, the armored enthusiasts in the workshop, immediately boiled.

For a moment, the students wearing all kinds of armor were all around, looking at the armor of the ring.

They have been in contact with the armor since childhood, and they are very sensitive to the design of the armor. The armor on the ring is absolutely stunning.

Some women's lives are staring at the stars, and I can't wait to grab the armor on the ring. The kid behind him is also a little envious. This armor is much more powerful than its bluebird, and it is so beautiful.

Chen Mo looked at the data in the light brain. The design of this armor is very mature, taking into account speed and flexibility. As long as you upgrade its hardware and weapons, this combat armor will have a very strong combat capability.

" throw a ball up." The ring touched the ground in the air.

"Connected."

Wearing a blue bird armor, he picked up a large suspended metal ball of watermelon and kicked it into the air.

boom! !

After the metal ball appeared in the ring, the bow was swept away and the sound of the sound exploded again.

The sound of the sound of the explosion and the sound of the metal collide all over the field. In an instant, the whole audience boils. The shouts and screams are endless, comparable to the scene of the World Cup.

boom!

The football flew in the direction, another set of armor appeared, the power was swept away, the sound explosion exploded again, and the metal ball flew back toward the ring. More than a dozen lives wearing armor have come on stage, and an air football game immediately opened.

Air football.

In the process of writing the flight control system, Ring and he said that the armor was designed for the team of the Qingshui Academy Air Soccer Cup.

The air football cup is an interesting entertainment project. The venue is in the air and is wearing a battle armor. It is the favorite entertainment sport of the Universe Alliance.

The air football will show the speed, passion, strength and flexibility of the armor. It is very helpful to be familiar with the performance of the armor and master the combat armor. It is also a project to test the performance of the armor.

Chen Mo appreciates the battle in the air, and technology makes the world a wonderful place.

After watching for two minutes, when everyone was immersed in the hormones and passions of the air football game, Chen Mo quietly turned and rode on the suspension motorcycle. He needs it, but Chen Mo reminds himself that he can't be numb and comfortable. This is not a comfortable place.

Going back to the small apartment of the college, as soon as I entered the door, I saw that the little beast was carrying the sweet fruit unique to Qing Shuixing. Seeing Chen Mo coming back, the little animal hurriedly jumped to the window and watched him with vigilance.

The fruit that Chen Mo bought was eaten by this little guy.

"You haven't gone yet? You are not going home? Are you still stealing from me?"

Chen Mo was amused. He started from yesterday, and he didn’t pay any attention to this little guy. Yesterday, because Chen Mo saw its ass, he pinched its small butt. As a result, the little guy’s 'mom...’ called for a long time. I screamed Chen Mo for a long time.

I woke up this morning and didn't see this little beast. Chen Mo thought it ran away and the result was not gone.

"Momo..."

The little beast yelled at Chen Mo, ignoring Chen Mo, arrogantly holding the sweet fruit in his hand.

Chen Mo didn't know what it was saying. He took two eggs from the freezer and went to the kitchen. This is a kind of egg that cultivates birds in Qingshui. It is a little bigger than the goose egg. It has a unique flavor and is very strong.

There are many times when the staple food is a liquid food. It tastes unappetable and is suitable for all carbon-based humanoids. But it is particularly disgusting to eat, and Chen Mo does not like it, so he will cook something himself.

Qing Shuixing's kitchen is not like the earth, there will be no smoke and fire, all use electricity. And there is no kitchen utensils on the earth, the kitchen utensils are still smashed by Chen Mo himself, and the tableware is also on his own.

Pour a little vegetable oil and open the egg and let it go. The sound of the scent is filled in the house, and the aroma of the eggs leaves. After half an hour before and after, Chen Mo was able to do two dishes and one soup.

Just put the food to the dinner table, I saw the little beast at the dinner table, and the two eyes looked straight at the food on the plate.

Seeing that Chen Mo was there, he did not dare to approach.

"Want to eat?"

Chen Mo shook an omelette with homemade chopsticks. Seems to understand the meaning of Chen Mo, the little beast nodded and licked his tongue.

Chen Mo put the egg in his mouth and smiled slyly: "It's incense."

"Mo Mo Mo..." The little beast saw Chen Mo's appearance, apparently being mad, calling him, a very angry look, able to erupt a **** face.

"And, do you want it?" Chen Mo picked up an egg and gestured to the little beast.

"foam……"

The little beast’s head is not over the side, a look of disdain.

"Don't you? It's really fragrant." Chen Mo put the omelette in his mouth and laughed badly.

"Moo!" The little beast screamed arrogantly, some angry, fat little face is very cute.

"Give you."

Chen Mo did not tease it again. He put a few fried eggs in a small glass bowl and put it over. The little beast's clear little eyes sneaked a small bowl, and the little tongue inadvertently groaned.

Make sure that Chen Mo didn't tease it anymore, and the little beast quickly pulled the bowl to his side.

"Hey?" The little beast who ate the omelet was bright, and the two small claws directly held the omelette into the mouth. The full food was eaten, and the beginning of the arrogance disappeared.

After a while, the little beast came directly to the plate, and did not dare to move the dishes on the plate, looking at Chen Mo with pity.

"Eat." Chen Mo nodded.

"Moo!" The little beast is excited, grabbing the omelet and eating it, just smash the plate.

After eating, Chen Mo began to pack his luggage. With a few pieces of luggage, there are two sets of changing clothes and a large cloak. Qingshui College may be the place where the three-eye civilization focuses on surveillance. Chen Moke does not want to live here.

Now that there is funding, Chen Mo needs to start preparing for the plan to escape from Qing Shuixing.

"Mo Mo Mo Mo?" The little beast looked suspiciously at Chen Mo to pack things up. He bought the little beast for a meal. Now the little beast has not begun to fear and reject Chen Mo.

"I am gone, I will not come back later, where do you go back and forth." Chen Mo said to the little beast.

This little beast is really smart, the character of the arrogant and the cat have a fight, but also very cute, but now is not the time to raise a pet.

"Mo Mo Mo?" The little beast walked to the bag and was pure and big eyes.

"gone."

Chen Mo took the bag and walked outside the door.

Just just on the floating car, the little beast has come up and jumped to the suspension car.

"Want to follow me?" Chen Mo asked with some surprise.

"Moo!" The little beast nodded.

"Let's go."

Chen Mo opened the backpack and slammed the little beast into it, revealing a head out. The suspension car started and left the small apartment of Qingshui College.

"Captain, he seems to be leaving Qingshui College?" A team of monitors looked at the back of the three.

They are at the base of the origin city, where they can directly monitor all the satellites of the origin city of the three-eye civilization. And important concerns, they will also monitor.

Chen Mo is the object that Torrell wants to focus on, and they are naturally monitoring at any time.

"With him, these are not the main tasks. Now, you mainly pay attention to the occurrence of any unusual abnormalities around the satellite, and report it to me at any time." Sanya said.

This is what the three-eyed king directly hints at what he did.

Chen Mo, after leaving the small apartment of Qingshui College, Chen Mo bought a set of independent small buildings in Qingshui City near the city center, which is not expensive, only 800,000 stars.

"I have lived here since." Chen Mo took out the little beast and put it on the table.

Obviously, this is a new environment. The little beasts looked around and began to swim on the sofa and ignored Chen Mo. Simply packed up, Chen Mo left the small building, the armor manufacturing and escape plan will also officially begin.

chapters.title: Chapter 762: : Space Fluctuations
chapters.body:
Chapter 762: : Space Fluctuations

"coming."

Ka saw Chen Mo coming over, sat in a chair, looked at him leisurely, and continued to drink, a specialty drink of Qing Shuixing.

There are a lot of maintenance points in the armor, and the repair shop in Ka, the location is not too good, the store is not big, so there are not many customers, occasionally selling a few accessories or repairing the suspension car and some worn armor.

More often, Cana is sitting leisurely and watching the video.

"How is it so early today?" Jia asked.

"I moved out of Qingshui College." Chen Mo took the work clothes and went to the workshop of the repair shop: "Can I use the workshop and the light brain equipment?"

"Do you experiment again?"

"No, modify a set of armor."

Chen Mo took out the storage device with the design of the armor, connected the light brain, and released the outline drawing of the armor. It was the ‘pink memory’ of the ring.

This set of battle armor is not suitable for Chen Mo, so Chen Mo needs to be modified according to his body shape and join the weapon system. A armor without a weapon system is a set of toys. The armor that Chen Mo needs is not the armor used as a toy.

"Where is the design?" Ka was a little surprised, walked to the light brain, carefully looked at the design, and nodded gently: "It's a very special design, look at the body, it should be the armor of the blush."

"A classmate of the college, let me help her design the flight control system, I will use this design as a reward." Chen Mo said.

"I will design a flight control system in such a short time. It seems that you are a bad person in your hometown." Jia was a little surprised, and slowly walked back to the position and lay down.

"Cay, why don't you find a child with you?" Chen Mo talked while modifying the design.

Jia shook his head and smiled, and continued to drink slowly.

“Let my children live in this cage? It looks good, but the reality is cruel. Even if the mainstream of Qing Shuixing thinks that they are the people of the three-eyed civilization, but they cannot change the essence, here is the cage that is captive. ”

Chen Mo is silent.

The blushing man that Jia said is the ethnic group of the ring and the children, a kind of pink-skinned humanoid. Those types of people are generally tall, and the armor needs to be modified a lot.

These things are not difficult for Chen Mo, who has rich experience in designing armor.

The armor was easy to modify, and Chen Mo was thinking about the weapon system of the armor.

The weapon system is the most critical part of the armor.

He was arrested, mainly because the weapon system was backward, unable to crack the material of the three-eye civilization trap, and finally used all the solutions to destroy one of the traps, but unfortunately was caught.

All armor must have a powerful weapon system.

He is not planning for this set of armor now, but the next set, and now it is just a transition.

When preparing materials that transcend the three-eye civilization, Chen Mo will re-create a set of armor so that he can be less passive in the battles that may occur with the three-eye civilization.

Without the weapons and abilities to fight the three-eyed civilization, he alone hits the stone with an egg.

......

Oh...

The humming sound of the instrument roused the dead house, and the whole house was alarmed in an instant.

Purple rhyme appeared first next to the instrument, followed by Zeqi and several accompanying people, all appearing in the hall of Chen Fang Instrument.

"There is a signal that the space does not understand."

Zeqi quickly walked to the strange light ball and looked surprised. Less time to think, Zeqi pressed a few times on the virtual keyboard, two waveforms were put out, the approximate band is similar.

“It’s space fluctuations, and the general direction is around the origin of the asteroid belt.”

A map is placed, and the flashing spot is on the asteroid belt.

"Start now."

As soon as the purple rhyme fell, a transparent spaceship with a crape myrtle appeared in the sky above the small house. The armor of several people started and instantly rushed to the open ceiling.

A minute later, the spacecraft disappeared above the house at the speed of light.

In the space of the origin city asteroid belt, the spacecraft that disappeared at the origin city suddenly appeared.

“The spatial fluctuation signal has disappeared.”

Zeqi stared at the instrument that flashed the signal, sorry to say.

Opportunities for spatial volatility can be met, especially at the entrance to a small universe, which is extremely unstable and will last for a short time.

"This time there is a fluctuating position, it is around here."

"Ok."

After accepting the data, Ziyun nodded slightly and looked around the space around the spaceship.

"Look at what planets are nearby."

"Good." Zeqi nodded immediately and turned on the detection instrument. After a while, he got the data he needed: "There are 3,405 planets nearby, of which 2,750 have life, which are the places where the origin city civilization is captive."

Purple rhyme lightly daggers, glanced at the information, pointing to the position of Qing Shuixing: "Which planet is this?"

"Three-eyed civilization is a planet used to study evolutionary experiments. All of them live on red-level intelligent creatures. Those lower-level lives are three-eye civilizations that are used to study the methods of life evolution."

Zechi handed a sensor for transmitting information to Ziyun.

Ziyun just touched the temple with a sensor, and then nodded: "Go to Qing Shuixing to see it."

......

"They didn't call you?"

The three-eyed king sat on a crystal blue throne, his eyes were in doubt, and he was thinking about the problems.

"Without notice, they acted suddenly, the action was very fast, like an emergency, would you like me to go with the past?" asked three questions.

"No, they suddenly act, they definitely don't want to take you, don't look at them, so as not to anger them, you shouldn't know." The three-eyed king immediately vetoed: "You return to your position, other news, I will send people. inquire about."

The three-eyed king stroked the eyes on the arm of the throne, and the voice was serious.

"Wang, the messenger of the Ziwei civilization appeared on the asteroid belt. They landed on the Qingshuixing and closed all the satellite systems over the Qingshuixing." Three questions just retreated, and the projection of Sanya suddenly appeared.

Just now he was responsible for the planetary surveillance system. At the position of Qing Shuixing, the Ziwei civilization spacecraft suddenly appeared. Then all the surveillance satellites and space-based weapon systems were closed. They completely lost the monitoring signals and control of Qingshui.

The messenger of the Ziwei civilization has the highest control authority granted by the three-eyed king, and Sanya does not dare to act rashly.

"What are they doing there?" asked the three-eyed king.

Qing Shui Xing is one of the relatively important planets of evolution of the three-eye civilization. It is home to the carbon-based red-class human beings that have been captured by the three-eye civilization from all over the universe.

The three-eye civilization itself is a humanoid, so there is a relatively little research on the humanoid.

"I don't know." Sanya shook his head.

“Before they arrived, what was the special movement around Qingshuixing, or Qingshuixing?” asked the three-eyed king without thinking.

"not found."

"Well, first of all, don't bother them, you always pay attention to what special movements around Qing Shuixing."

"Ok."

Sanya did not say more, the holographic projection disappeared into the hall.

"What the **** are you looking for?" The three-eyed king on the throne, three eyes picked up and hesitated.

The messenger of the Ziwei civilization suddenly left the station.

The news that secretly pays attention to the movement of Ziwei civilization has received this news.

This is the news of the big day.

The Ziwei civilization has no signs of action, and people have to think about the purpose. However, no one dares to immediately investigate the movements of the Ziwei civilization. Otherwise, if it is discovered, it will be very serious if it angers the Ziwei civilization.

chapters.title: Chapter 763: : First Encounter With Ziwei Civilization
chapters.body:
Chapter 763: : First Encounter With Ziwei Civilization

Ziyun wore a battle armor and flew on the streets of the Star City. The expression was cold, and Zeqi followed several people. The pedestrians flew in the air and were very eye-catching. Although they are anthropomorphic, they are especially abruptly purple with shiny skin on their faces.

I have never seen such a human being, and Ziyun has a noble and noble temperament. When I see Ziyun and others, the pedestrians on the road consciously let the road open, obviously knowing that the other party is not good.

In addition, over the city, the spacecraft is still floating there, knowing that this is a foreigner.

"It's very interesting." Purple rhyme glanced at the surrounding environment, faintly said.

"This small corner, life is a low life, still in the low-level stage of maintaining life with the atmosphere and food." Zeqi said indifferently, without a trace of feelings, did not look at the people on the street.

"These lives are the basis of the life and wisdom of the universe. The difference between life and wisdom is the magic of the universe." Ziyun did not care about the indifference of Zeze, and looked at the surrounding environment.

"Would you like to destroy this planet to find?"

"Useless." Purple rhyme sounds cold.

The natural small universe entrance space is very special, very unstable and fragile. The impact of the destruction of the planet is enough to make the entrance to the small universe disappear, and it is impossible to find it. And they are not sure where the entrance is, even now, not sure if the volatility is a fluctuation in the small universe, just a rough guess.

"The bigger the movement we have, the more important we find, and the attention of the other six is not good for us."

"So, are we hanging out here now?"

"if not?"

Ziyun looked at him coldly and was not happy.

"Do you know the specific location of the small universe? Now it is determined that there is fluctuation in this space, deploy space detection instruments to detect, wait for the results. You can find the natural can find, can not find, you can not find the ruin of the original point. Do not worry about doing things. Discouraged, rational thinking is one of the differences between higher civilization and lower wisdom."

Zeqi noticed the dissatisfaction of the purple rhyme and immediately shut up.

Several other accompanying personnel did not dare to talk nonsense. For the first time, they saw the cold purple rhyme unhappy, and some looked pitifully at Zeqi.

The main task of this mission is the purple rhyme, and the status of Ziyun in the Ziwei civilization is not low, and the identity has never been announced. Purple rhyme returned to the cold, did not pay attention to Zeqi and others, wearing a battle armor to land more than a place below.

......

Chen Mo moved a large box on the floating car and spit a sigh of relief.

The material in the box.

The design of the armor is optimized, and now the materials are being purchased, and the first set of armor in Qingshuixing is prepared. Mainly engines, chips and some components.

In Chen Mo's plan, he needed a set of armor for combat training, and then developed a set of the most powerful armor.

From here by the market, it is a little more selective and relatively cheaper.

When Chen Mogang wanted to leave, he saw a group of people landing in front of him.

Seeing people coming, Chen Mo is obviously a glimpse.

Purple people with fluorescent skin, he first saw, some strange, and there is a different mystery and beauty, it looks very noble. In Chen Mo’s impression, Qing Shuixing does not have such a humanoid group.

Seeing the pattern on the purple rhyme armor, Chen Mo’s hole was shrunk and his figure was shaking.

While Chen Mo looked at the purple rhyme, Ziyun was also watching him. Almost a moment of confrontation, but also the first time to see each other, Ziyun feels a bit special.

Fearless, confident, calm, purple rhyme did not see any inferiority from the man's eyes.

Even if Zech sees her, her eyes will flash inferiority and timidity, and people on the road will not feel self-confident when she sees her. Ziyun saw this special life for the first time. Both sides are a calm level of sight.

The collision of the eyes was only a moment, and Chen Mo made a slight sigh, riding on the suspension motorcycle to leave.

"Good special kind of people." Looking at the back of Chen Mo's departure, Ziyun's cold eyes flashed a hint of surprise.

“What?” Zeqi curiously asked: “Is there a problem with life?”

"No, that class is a bit special."

"Do you want to catch it back?"

"No need to."

Purple rhyme shook his head slightly and regained his gaze.

She is not in the heart, there are countless lives in the universe, there are always one or two special. Life confined by the three-eyed civilization is destined to stay in the future of the planet, and the bottom layer is always the bottom layer, and she will not have an intersection.

Purple rhyme is just an illusion of a moment, back to God, Ziyun will focus on the free market.

On the way, Chen Mo also recalled the moment of the eye touch.

That is a higher life, a higher life than a three-eyed civilization. Just now he saw the armor on the leading woman, reminding him of a pattern recorded by Qing Shuixing.

Ziwei civilization.

The crape myrtle flower logo of Ziwei civilization, purple fluorescent skin, purple pupil, noble and mysterious.

Same as described.

In the rumor, the Ziwei civilization of the Universe Alliance is one of the seven god-level civilizations. It is mysterious and incomparable. It is rare to see it now. Now it appears in Qingshuixing, a planet that is captive of three-eye civilization.

If it is really a Ziwei civilization, Chen Mo does not think that the three-eyed civilization people dare to catch the people of the Ziwei civilization to captivity.

purpose.

Chen Mo has flashed the purpose of Ziwei civilization here in his mind.

In the end, it is still uncertain.

Going back to the repair shop, Ka is still sitting and drinking. Chen Mo came in with a box full of materials, and he just took a look and regained his gaze.

"Cay, how much do you know about the god-level civilization?" Chen Mo asked the material.

"Oh? How suddenly are you interested in this?"

Jia was surprised to put down the drink in his hand.

"I don't understand, I just heard that some of the current cosmic alliance system is led by the seven god-level civilizations. They are Ziwei civilization, Raytheon civilization, the body civilization, the endless sea civilization, the black civilization, the dark forest civilization, the white star civilization, The life of every god-level civilization is very strong."

"What do they all look like?" Chen Mo’s mind flashed the look of the woman she saw today.

"I don't know this. Qingshuixing is a cage. I don't get much information. But the life of the Ziwei civilization has been heard. It is rumored that they have purple fluorescent skin, blood and eyes are purple, and the blood is noble. Ziwei civilization is the most inherited. The long-standing civilization, the current system of the armored civilization, is from the Ziwei civilization."

After Chen Mo heard the story, he confirmed the identity of the group he saw today.

The god-level civilization appears in Qingshuixing. This is not good news. The life of that level depends on ordinary life like an ant, and wants to destroy it.

In this case, just like a group of humans appear next to a nest of bugs, they can be trampled to death at any time.

Throwing away the distracting thoughts, Chen Mo began to process his own armor parts. It is useless to worry that the Ziwei civilization will destroy Qing Shuixing, and the other party will destroy it. He can't escape.

Qing Shuixing is still quiet, but the origin city has already been fried.

A message that does not know the source quietly spreads in the origin city. There is a special space fluctuation signal around the origin city. There may be a small universe. The action of the Ziwei civilization is for the small universe.

When the news came out, it shocked the entire origin city.

chapters.title: Chapter 764: :Undercurrent
chapters.body:
Chapter 764: :Undercurrent

"Who will leak the news?"

Zeqi’s face is very different, and the other members of the messenger group are also in the same mood.

The news of the existence of small cosmic space fluctuations in the origin city spreads, which makes them very passive.

It is almost equivalent to exposing their mission to all civilizations in the origin city. Their next move will be watched.

And the civilization of the origin city will certainly have a small calculation.

Small universe, any civilization wants, to get a small universe, means a safe site and endless resources, especially for the development of civilization.

The high-level civilization does not dare to openly release the god-level civilization. The main reason is that the interests are not enough. A small universe is enough to make all the high-level civilizations and even the top civilizations crazy.

"It should be a tentative message released by someone who is secretly in the dark." Ziyun said coldly.

The news of space fluctuations and small universes is released, and the reaction of their trips is tested. Whether they are true or false, they will be very concerned about this trip. The other party is definitely not a normal opponent.

"What should I do now? Destroy the origin city?" Zeqi said indifferently.

All the members of the Ziwei civilization look at the purple rhyme.

The origin city is now mixed with a lot of people who are coming to them.

Now that the news of the small universe is released, I am afraid that there will be more people with a heart, even those who are secretly aware of the truth of the news.

“Directly destroying the origin city is not telling the other six. Is there something very important here? Even if you don’t care about the countless lives in the origin city, you have to think about the effects and consequences behind it.” Ziyun looks indifferent.

Zeqi immediately shut up.

Seeing that everyone does not speak, Ziyun said after thinking: "Inform the origin city, we will requisition that area, and then deploy and put space detection instruments."

“Is this too eye-catching? If the other party’s news is tentative, isn’t it a plan?”

"What you want is to attract attention." Ziyun said coldly.

The messenger group of the Ziwei civilization expropriated the asteroid belts outside the original galaxies from the high-level civilizations of the origin city, and deployed more than 350,000 asteroids to deploy 40 million space exploration instruments.

When the news came out, it caused an uproar.

Ziwei civilization blatantly admits that there is a small universe in that position?

For advanced civilization, this is an opportunity. If a small universe is really obtained, the strength of their civilization will grow wildly, and maybe the future will become the eighth-order god-level civilization that rivals the seven god-level civilizations.

The temptation of supreme power is unstoppable for any life.

In the origin city, all the advanced civilizations began to secretly align the space detection instruments with the areas where the Ziwei civilization was requisitioned, hoping to receive the spatial fluctuations of the small universe.

The undercurrent in the origin of the galaxy is turbulent.

"Father, what is the meaning of the Ziwei civilization?" Three questions and doubts.

The three-eyed king thought for a moment: "Introducing the worms out of the nest."

"Father's meaning is that the Ziwei civilization is ready to design a trap?" asked three questions and whispered.

Not only is the three-eye civilization, but other civilizations are waiting. It is definitely not a wise move to jump out at this time. In Qing Shuixing, Chen Mo is not aware of the undercurrent of the origin city.

In this storm, Chen Mo is nothing, but the outside world is fighting for a small bacterium in the region and does not have any effect.

The first set of armor was assembled and placed in the repair shop of Cana. It was a brand new armor. More than two meters high, according to Chen Mo's body design, black and red painting, and Chen Mo in the Earth's armor is somewhat similar.

The logo is also a sign of the marching ant group, which has been used habits.

Chen Mo named it: Hunter.

It is hard to imagine that Chen Mo has changed from a mechanic apprentice to a war designer in such a short period of time. He is more and more certain that Chen Mo is not an ordinary person on his previous planet.

This talent for learning is that he has lived for hundreds of years and has seen the most terrible.

At this time, Chen Mo is testing the entered armor control system, including the flight control system and the weapon system, which can only be tested by holographic virtual.

I don't know why, although the language is unreasonable, this little beast can understand his meaning. He seems to know what emotion this little beast wants to express. It is very magical.

Chen Mo asked Jia, and Jia also said that he had never seen such a small beast. He did not know what kind of variety.

The little beast will slap the head and jump to the table flexibly.

"Commissioning is complete." Chen Mo stood up and stroked the armor attached to the line: "I am going to try the armor, you stay in the repair shop, don't run around."

The little beast jumped to the table of Cana and sat there with a drink, very human. This is an uncompromising food. Chen Moi also feeds and feeds. He usually eats more than Chen Mo. He feels that there is a bottomless pit in his stomach.

Chen Mo put on the armor and adjusted it slightly.

This is the first time I put on the armor after the earth was caught. A strong feeling reappeared.

Just started the armor, the slight operation of the cicada appeared, and soon disappeared. In front of Chen Mo, the basic data and functions of the battle armor emerged.

"Hey!!"

When the engine started, Chen Mo’s body slowly floated and floated outside the battle shop, rising to the sky.

chapters.title: Chapter 765: : The Shock Of 泷玥
chapters.body:
Chapter 765: : The Shock Of 泷玥

Chen Mo rented a high-level battle training ground at the Battlefield Training Ground in Qingshui City.

The advanced combat training ground, the venue has a radius of 10 kilometers, only he is used by one person, but it takes 10,000 stars an hour, a little expensive. The divisional division is a profession that burns money.

The controller is turned on, and obstacles and attackers are suspended in midair.

The training difficulty of the advanced combat training ground is controllable, and it can control the speed of the obstacle activity and the attack speed and intensity of the attack object. Control the difficulty of training according to individual needs.

The training of the armor is mainly combat and flight.

Flight training has straight-line flight, corner flight and obstacle dodge. Straight-line flight is related to the engine power of the armor. There is not much skill, and the corners and obstacles dodge rely on personal ability.

The battle includes distance weapon training and close combat training.

Chen Mo mainly trains close combat.

When he was caught by the catcher of the three-eyed civilization, he realized a problem. Although long-range attacks such as lasers are convenient, sometimes the intensity and energy of the laser beam cannot break the defense of enemy equipment. The weapon of close combat does not have this problem in terms of the strength and energy of the attack.

In the face of unknown enemies and unknown equipment, Chen Mo must make himself as strong as possible and cannot fall twice on this road.

Seeing the obstacles suspended in the sky, Chen Mo started the armor and rushed into the air.

The strength and speed of the armor made Chen Mo feel **** and a passion in the chest.

Being caught by this strange planet, the backlog of emotions in the heart instantly ignited. Chen Mo did not hesitate to raise the speed of the armor to the fastest, and the difficulty of obstacles was also adjusted to the maximum.

Chen Mo feels that the vision has also become blurred. The control system of the armor connects his brain consciousness. How fast Chen Mo can think, how fast the armor reacts, and the delay is very low.

This set of armor is much stronger than before.

The hypersonic speed is turned on, and under the high speed stimulation, Chen Mo feels that the blood of the body is boiling. Before he even experienced the hearty, suddenly the armor was hit once, the battle track changed and the ground was planted.

The auxiliary flight system quickly adjusted the balance, and Chen Mo quickly stabilized his body and his chest was stuffy. Learning to manipulate the armor also requires a strong physical quality, otherwise the speed change and the buffering problem after the impact are embarrassing.

Chen Mo, standing in the air, feels a lot better. During this time, the depression of this strange planet was caught and disappeared a lot.

The mood is adjusted well, and Chen Mo starts the flight again.

This time, I did not fly at the same speed as I did just now, but seriously carried out obstacle avoidance training.

Chen Mo’s body has changed and his reaction is beyond ordinary people.

There used to be experience in manipulating armor, but there was no opponent in the earth. Weapons and inter-generational technology, directly crushed, did not pursue the ultimate armor combat skills.

Come here, Chen Mo opened a new world. Training flight skills now makes Chen Mo's progress very fast.

The flight obstacles evade this standard, can get 80 points, this score is already good, and Chen Mo is the first time to try this extreme skill training.

Recalling the previous technique, Chen Mo changed the scene of the obstacle again.

Flying is the foundation of the armor. Chen Mo has a lot of room for improvement. Familiar with this foundation, there will be more benefits in the battle of the armor.

Immersed in the training of flying obstacles, Chen Mo enjoyed it. With his superb learning ability, Chen Mo feels that his flying skills are rising rapidly.

When flying at high speed, the collision encountered is not small. Even if there is cushioning, the armor will spread the impact force to the whole body, which is still enough. If the physical quality is not strong enough, I am afraid that it will be in the shock, not dead or seriously injured.

After four hours of flight training, Chen Mocai left the training ground.

I saw Chen Mo coming back from the training ground and looked at it.

She is the service staff of this training ground. She has been working here for several years. She just changed her class and saw Chen Mo’s life for the first time.

She has seen many armored divisions, all races, but it is the first time that Chen Mo has attracted her attention. It looks very comfortable and is a kind of temperament.

Chen Mo's unique self-confidence and calm temperament unconsciously attracted her attention. Although she and Chen Mo are different races, she still feels that Chen Mo is very special.

“Hello, is it checkout?” he asked.

"Well, Senior Room 7." Chen Mo returned the identity card of the training ground to Yu. He was a male waiter when he came in, but it doesn't matter, he doesn't care about it either.

“A total of 43,000 stars, this is your deposit.”

泷玥 Simply check the training ground and confirm that the equipment is in good condition and return the deposit to Chen Mo.

"Thank you."

Chen Mo collected the deposit, the armor's helmet was set, turned and left.

Looking at Chen Mo's back, I was a little curious, until Chen Mo disappeared into the field of vision, her eyes were put back to the training ground that Chen Mo had rented, and the internal situation was carefully examined.

"what?"

Suddenly, he snorted and his eyes locked on the data of the training ground.

Generally speaking, the data of the training ground is confidential. Only the user knows that the user runs out of cleanup, and the service desk cannot see the data here. If the data is not retired without clearing the data, the service desk can obtain the training data.

I have been working here for so long, I know that only two people will leave data. One is not to care about the training data, not afraid of the training data exposed, the other is a novice, still do not understand the importance of the data.

I don't know Chen Mo belongs to that kind of thing.

Think about the appearance of Chen Mo just now, curious, open the data of the training room, the next moment, stunned.

Obstacle dodge, difficulty: purple, 43 points.

Obstacle evasion, difficulty: 靛, 75 points.

Obstacle dodge, difficulty: purple, 80 points.

Obstacle dodge, difficulty: purple, 87 points.

......

The expression of 泷玥 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼 撼Above the level, most of them are purple.

Here is the difficulty, distinguished by the rainbow color, the lowest red level, the highest purple level. This means that the man just challenged the highest purple level and was all excellent.

very scary.

In the impression of jealousy, no one has ever had such terrible data.

A good warrior.

Suddenly, Chen Mo should belong to the first type of people, regardless of the data. With such terrible data, how could it be a novice, and the powerful armored division of Qing Shuixing will not have such data.

Although obstacle avoidance is the basic skill of manipulating armor, it is very important.

This skill requires a combination of the powerful performance of the armor, the control level of the division's division, and the reaction ability of the division. The purple level is a metamorphosis in metamorphosis. The purple level is the training field. The disorderly flight speed of the dense obstacle exceeds the speed of sound.

At this speed, Chen Mo scored an average of nearly 90 points, which can only be described as terror. 80 points is a watershed, 90 points is a watershed, can achieve 90 points or more, basically the top players.

This means that Chen Mo's eyes and reactions have exceeded the speed of sound. The most difficult close-up dodge, if there is no strong strength, it is impossible.

Close-up dodge is the most important basis for melee combat armor.

The divisional division has a lot of long-range attack weapons and means, but when the level of the two armor is equal, melee is also very important.

The current defense of the armor is strong, and the means of long-range attack is easy to lose its effect, and the threat to the other party is limited. When purchasing a custom armor, the general armor creator will explain the characteristics of the material in the armor and how much attack and temperature it can withstand.

But the close-in weapon is more terrifying than the remote in terms of power. Imagine if you can't break the enemy's armor defense by your own long-range attack, how close is it by the fighting master? The battle can be ended in almost an instant.

How strong the obstacle dodge is, how flexible the opponent is when he is close, although it does not represent real combat, but there is a big explanation. To get this result, you must have a strong reaction speed to keep up with it. .

Seriously looked at Chen Mo's results, delusional thoughts, or choose to delete the above training data, while remembering Chen Mo's name.

chapters.title: Chapter 766: : Small Universe Screams
chapters.body:
Chapter 766: : Small Universe Screams

"Mo Mo Mo!!"

Returning to the house with a little beast, Chen Mo threw it on the sofa. This little guy's temper is quite big, pointing to Chen Mo's skunk, because Chen Mo does not create a battle armor, but also sulking.

Chen Mo has nothing to do with it. He doesn't want to raise it. It doesn't depend on it.

"What do you want to eat today?" Chen Mo asked.

When I heard that Chen Mo was going to cook, the little beast still disappeared and looked very bright.

Immediately jumped to the side of the freezer, pointed to a few big bird eggs, and pointed to the meat of a beast, and then looked at Chen Mo excitedly, not forgetting to lick his tongue, just sulking all the way behind.

"Food."

Chen Mo took out the two things he ordered, took some food he needed, and went into the kitchen.

During this time, Chen Mo insisted on daily research and training to prepare for the escape from Qing Shuixing. Coming back every day, Chen Mo needs a lot of energy to supplement, organic food is too disgusting, so he is cooking himself.

As a result, the appetite of the little beast was slowly raised, and now he often wraps around him for something to eat.

For the little beast, there is nothing that can't be solved by a meal. If it can't be solved, it is not enough.

Seeing Chen Mo cooking, the little beast jumped on Chen Mo’s shoulder and squatted on it to watch him cook. The exquisite eyes didn’t blink, and the saliva did not flow out.

Not long after, the little beast standing on the shoulders of Chen Mo suddenly felt a sense of heart, and immediately raised his head, some swaying.

"Mo Mo! Mo Mo Mo..."

"Why? The rice is not cooked." Chen Mo stunned the little beast and put it aside.

"Momo~~"

The little beast pulled the hand of La Chen Mo, pointed to the sky outside the window, and then began to draw a 'round round'.

"Is there a hole in the sky?" Chen Moxiao asked.

"foam!"

The little beast took a serious nod and let Chen Mo a glimpse.

Regardless of the other, Chen Mo slammed the little beast back on his shoulder and wiped his hand out of the door. The sky is still blue as always, the huge origin city in the sky has not changed, and there is no hole in the little beast.

"Momo~~"

The little beast pointed at the sky and began to draw.

"I can't see a hole, and I can't get out for a while."

Chen Mo looked up at the sky, still no movement, went back to the house.

He guessed that this little beast might find something special, but he is now in a state of imprisonment in Qing Shuixing, and he can't do anything about it.

"Moo~~"

The little beast looked a little pity, looked up at the horizon and squatted on Chen Mo’s shoulder.

Oh...

The sound of the instrument awakened all the Ziwei civilization members stationed in the station. They didn't even think about it. A team of people wore armor and flew into the spaceship and disappeared into the station.

“How is the situation?” Ziyun did not expect that the space fluctuations will appear again so soon.

“The spatial fluctuation signal is in the space two light days away from the origin city, which is just the range of the space fluctuation signal.” Zeqi looked at the position of the spatial fluctuations and looked very excited.

The specific location of spatial volatility has been identified, and the probability of a small universe here is already large. If things go well, this little universe will fall into the hands of their Ziwei civilization.

"Ok."

Purple rhyme is still cold, paying attention to the signal of the instrument.

“Is the complete spatial fluctuation frequency determined?”

"confirmed."

The purple eyes around me nodded without hesitation, and a pair of purple eyes were extremely excited.

The fluctuating frequency of the entrance to the small space is the key to entering the small universe. If there is no such key, even if it is in a specific place, it will be awkward.

Soon, the Ziwei civilization amethyst-like spacecraft was suspended in space, and in front of them, it was the area where space fluctuated. It is invisible to the naked eye, without any traces, just ordinary space.

With the aid of the instrument, you can see this position, and the space around the circle is spreading at the speed of light.

Ziyun stared at the display of the instrument, and there was a strange snoring. The cold expression of the year finally showed a hint of joy. This special sound is like the screaming of the space. They call this voice a space whistle, also called a small universe scream.

"It is indeed the entrance to the small universe, blocking the space around it, ready to open the entrance to the small universe."

"it is good."

Purple eyes focus on the head.

The amethyst-like spacecraft slowly receded, and a strange purple light and undulations centered on the spacecraft, and the speed of light spread.

Where the purple light and the undulations pass, the surrounding space seems to be solidified. If there is an instrument, it can certainly be tested. At the point where the fluctuations pass, the speed of the photon has become slow, like falling into the mud.

Block the speed of light.

Avoid attack by people, or have large asteroids crash into this area, disturbing the frequency of space.

Once the frequency of the entrance to the small space is disturbed, the original space entrance fluctuating frequency disappears, and it is almost impossible to find the spatial entrance fluctuation frequency of this small universe.

As they spread the fluctuations, the space entrance fluctuations displayed by the instrument disappear and return to calm.

Every time there is a limited time at the entrance to the small space, and once it passes through, the space fluctuations will disappear. So the whole universe, countless civilizations, and only seven civilizations that succeeded in acquiring a small universe.

There are two prerequisites for opening a small universe. One is the specific coordinates of the entrance; the second is the accurate spatial fluctuation frequency, and this fluctuation frequency is subject to change at any time.

The entrance to the space fluctuation disappeared, and the purple rhyme was not in a hurry. After confirming the preparation, the exit of the spacecraft was opened and stood in space.

"The space is blocked." Zi Zi stared at the instrument and said.

"Open small space."

Ziyun stood on the top of the amethyst-like spaceship and stared at the space area ahead.

"Start."

The spacecraft was ready, and in front of the amethyst-like transparent spaceship, a laser beam with a diameter of ten meters was immersed in the position shown by the instrument, and the laser column extended to infinity in space.

The giant laser, the high temperature of tens of billions of degrees disturbs the surrounding space.

Zech grabbed the light quantum memory chip in his hand and carefully looked at the spatial fluctuations displayed by the instrument. The chip in his hand records the frequency of the spatial fluctuations of the entrance to the small universe, which is the key to opening the entrance to the small universe.

The laser beam is turned on and a group of people are waiting.

I don't know how long it took to see the space displayed by the instrument. Zeqi did not hesitate to insert the quantum chip in his hand into a groove of the spacecraft to start the spacecraft's instrument.

A space is paralyzed, centered on the amethyst spaceship, and spread out at a very fast speed.

When this space fluctuates and touches the location of the space entrance, a space vortex appears and slowly expands at a high temperature of tens of millions of degrees. Within ten seconds, the vortex diffuses to a diameter of ten meters.

In front of the spacecraft, there is a large vortex ray, with a temperature of tens of billions of degrees, which is strange but beautiful.

In a flash, the spatial fluctuations disappeared, and the laser beam that was directed into infinity space seemed to be cut off by space. All the lasers were immersed in the vortex of space fluctuations, and the vortex was expanding wildly.

After a while, the space vortex has expanded to a diameter of a thousand meters, the middle part has become a deep space black, surrounded by white light, like a light door suspended in space, beautiful.

"Successful."

Zeqi and others saw the vortex of space appearing and his face was ecstatic. The appearance of this deep vortex means that the space entrance is formally stable, and as long as there is no accident, they can enter another brand new small universe through this space entrance.

"Notify the Ziwei Star, the small universe has found it." Zi Yunmei stared at the space vortex in front of her eyes, and the cold look eased a lot.

Just as many members of the Ziwei civilization were pleasantly surprised, the accident happened suddenly.

chapters.title: Chapter 767: : Cat Head Sneak Attack
chapters.body:
Chapter 767: : Cat Head Sneak Attack

The shape of a small 10-meter-long spaceship hidden in space emerges. A muzzle is opened at the front end, hundreds of shells are fired from the inside, and a flame is sprayed from the tail, which is very close to the spacecraft of the Ziwei civilization.

"Enemy."

At the moment when the spacecraft emerged, Ziyun turned his head, and his armor covered it, and the laser was lifted from the shell.

boom! !

Huge shells exploded in space, and a huge amount of liquid spurted out of the shell and spread in all directions.

Everything is in the middle of the command.

The shield has been activated when the liquid is close to the spacecraft of the Ziwei civilization.

Unexpectedly, the purple-black liquid passed through the energy cover and attached to the ship's ship. The amethyst hull shows signs of corrosion. All the hulls that have been corroded by the liquid, like tiles, burst open and the spacecraft is boiled into a large hole.

Purple rhyme's cold face finally showed a slight fluctuation, and rushed to the side, not touching the liquid.

"Dark energy acid?"

The material of dark matter synthesis is very special and is the main material of the spacecraft hull, which can be used to resist space extrusion and relaxation. But it is not impossible to damage. Dark energy acid is a composite that specifically etches dark matter synthetic materials. By absorbing the dark energy in the material, the material loses its original properties and can no longer resist the space squeeze when the space jumps, otherwise it will disintegrate in the space jump.

The ultra-high-energy laser lasing of the front end of the sneak attacked spacecraft was cut from the rear of the Ziwei civilization. When the laser hits the energy hood, all the energy is shunted, blocked out of the energy hood, and turned into a light group in the dark space.

At the time when the spacecraft was ready to continue the attack, Ziyun’s hand had been lifted and the armor flashed and appeared next to the small spaceship.

The long sword in the hand flashed purple, all of which did not enter the front end of the spacecraft. Subsequently, the purple rhyme was cold and heavy, and the entire spacecraft was split into two in an instant.

boom!

The spaceship exploded in space and turned into a dazzling fire.

A black figure flashed through the fire and disappeared into space.

The cat head has been waiting for this position for a long time. As early as the Ziwei civilization blocked this area, he has entered this area to wait. I just found out that there is a special space fluctuation here, he will come over.

It was only the Ziwei civilization that suddenly came over and made him have to hide.

His spacecraft has a very strong concealment. As long as it does not move, the engine is turned off, and the radar of the Ziwei civilization cannot find his existence.

He is also not sure if there is an entrance to the small space, just guessing. The news of the origin city was that he released it. The purpose was to disturb the rhythm of the Ziwei civilization, at least to set out the purpose of the Ziwei civilization.

What he didn't expect was that there really was an entrance to the small universe.

Resisting the excitement, he has been waiting for the Ziwei civilization to open the space entrance of the small universe. If you can get the small universe, this trip will be a huge harvest.

The space entrance has been stabilized, there are no special large fluctuations, and it will not affect the space entrance of the small universe.

As long as he kills the members of the Ziwei civilization, he can get this small universe, so he chooses to shoot at this time.

The cat heads hidden in space are slowing down and the action is extra careful. His disappearance has already alerted all members of the Ziwei civilization, turning on the detection radar, looking for his figure.

All the members of the Ziwei civilization, their faces are extremely angry. This is an insult. No one has ever dared to challenge the authority of the Ziwei civilization. Today they came out and were actually attacked.

The cat's armor is moving silently, like a lurking serpent, attacking the armored division of the Ziwei civilization at any time. His armor is an assassin-type stealth armor that can simulate any environment, perfectly integrated into the space environment, and quantum radar is hard to find.

Behind a Ziwei team member, with his murderous claws lifted up, the long claws in the hands of the cat heads shimmered with dark green light and stabbed behind the soldiers.

The armor of the god-level civilization, the materials are the top, the ordinary weapons can not be destroyed, the long-range attacks will basically be blocked, the need for strong enough melee weapons, melee attacks can destroy the materials.

Advanced weapons are weapons with super-energy, which can easily break any armor material.

There is no sound in any movement in space, and all battles must be maintained by the armor's detection radar, as the armor's eyes.

Sting! !

The paws fell into the chasing of the Ziwei civilization, and they passed through the chest. The purple blood shot and the armor was shaking.

The next moment, the armor, together with the body, was torn under the claws. The naked eye can see that the soldiers of the Ziwei civilization, their eyes are still roaring, their expressions are unwilling, their mouths are screaming, but space can not pass his voice, vitality is extremely tenacious.

"Danger!"

The danger of the warfare radar prompted the cat head to shock, and did not hesitate to push the engine down.

Master.

The cat head who stabilized his body saw the purple rhyme and his heart tightened. The instincts of the master told him that the female warrior of the Ziwei civilization was very dangerous. If I just took a step back, I am afraid I have to explain it here.

He underestimated the strength of the team of the Ziwei civilization, and now it is dangerous.

Purple rhyme covered the face under the armor is extremely bad, someone killed her players under her nose, this is playing her face.

Assassin master.

This kind of master appears in the origin city, no doubt, the identity of the other party is certainly not simple. From the opponent's killer and dodge, you can judge that the other party is a veteran, and the strength is not low.

Ordinary life, absolutely dare not challenge the majesty of the Ziwei civilization.

Judging from the occultity of the opponent's spaceship and the armor, the strength behind him is not small, and may be one of the other six.

"Speak your origin, I can let you go."

Ziyun chased the cat head, and prevented the other party from hiding again, sending electromagnetic waves to the other party.

The big eyes under the cat's armor smashed, and within the scope of his radar, eight armored divisions of the Ziwei civilization surrounded him.

Did not reply to the purple rhyme, the surface of the armor on the cat head, slowly turned into a mirror, once again hidden in space, in the purple rhythm of the armor radar, the other's body shape signal is also flickering.

Very strong stealth performance.

Purple rhyme is a glimpse.

God-class civilization has the most powerful scientific and technological strength, and their radar detection is not real, almost the same stealth technology, the power behind the other side, certainly one of the other six.

“Turn on optical and quantum dual detection.”

The weapon in the hands of Ziyun, surrounded by purple light, exudes a scent of destruction. The other players opened the dual radar at the same time, but the light curtain displayed in front of the eyes was still not clear.

"You pay attention to avoiding his sneak attack, I will deal with him."

After the rhyme is finished, the armor disappears into space.

Cat heads are getting faster and faster, but they also feel strenuous. Ziyun’s armor is too horrible and the performance is too strong. When chasing a dense asteroid belt, the cat's head flashed, and the palm of the hand bowed and slammed into the asteroid.

boom!

The huge asteroid exploded from the inside and turned into countless pieces. The cat's head appeared and quickly became skilled in the asteroid fragments. After hiding in a piece, the whole process was completed in one go.

"Want to run?"

Under the mask of the purple rhyme armor, the cold scorpion is covered with frost, cold and slamming, and instantly accelerates. All the asteroid fragments are smashed into powder as paper.

Seeing the cat head with the asteroid fragments falling into the planet not far away, Ziyun hovered in space, reaching out to the front of the planet, a little pigeon egg-sized light group flew out from the palm of the hand, falling straight to the planet below .

Drops...

Dangerous signals, let the armor's radar crazy tips.

Behind him is a terrible energy group.

"Damn." I didn't even think about it, the cat head speed was a fold.

boom! !

A planet, in space, turns into a mass of flame fragments that collapse, and then evaporates into a light group, together with several satellites of the planet, turned into a gaseous molecular group, and there are countless lives on the planet, not even knowing what happened, and already have components.

"Block him."

See the cat head people flying toward the entrance of the space, the purple rhyme sounds cold.

chapters.title: Chapter 768: :Red Substance
chapters.body:
Chapter 768: :Red Substance

The order to get the purple rhyme, including Zeqi, six members of the Ziwei civilization surrounded the entrance to the space. The laser in the hand is directed at the armor of the cathead.

The stealth of the Assassin's armor has great advantages. This kind of armor is best at sneak attack. Once it is successful, it is a fatal blow to the enemy. If the failure is exposed, it is very dangerous to face the entanglement of the same level of opponents.

This is the case with cat heads now.

A lot of Warcraft's technology is used in stealth and flexibility, and other aspects of performance will be slightly shortcoming.

For example, in defense, because the material requirements of the Assassin's armor are special, it has high requirements for concealment and flexibility, and the material is not as strong as the general armor, and the defense is not so high.

The demand and characteristics of the Assassin's armor, the defensiveness of this armor is a short board. This is one of the reasons why the Assassin's armor did not dare to fight face to face with them.

The cat's armor, the protective cover lit up, and the laser jumped in space.

Judging mistakes is the biggest mistake he made in this operation.

I thought that the person who came here this time was not a top player, but the fact was unexpected. The woman’s strength is beyond imagination. He has no chance at all.

The feeling of oppression that this woman gave him was what he saw in his life. He thinks that he is strong, and there is also a sense of extreme danger at this time. This woman is definitely the top warrior in Ziwei civilization.

If you know the strength of Ziyun and the armor is so strong, he will definitely not choose to start at this time, but unfortunately too late, no regrets can be eaten.

The spaceship was damaged, and his armor could not escape the pursuit of Ziyun. The other party would not give him a chance to escape.

Even if he escapes into the planet of life, this woman will not hesitate to ruin, and the woman with a slap in the face makes him feel terrible.

The Ziwei civilization sent such a monster this time, and the cat head is sinking.

The shield of the Assassin's Battlegear can not support the ultra-high-energy pulsed laser loss for a long time. He can only rely on the random jump in the space to avoid the shield being sprayed by the laser for a long time.

The only way to go is the small universe entrance.

Cat heads only want to escape the chase of Ziyun. If you can control the small universe, it is the best.

Want to get close to the entrance of the small universe, Zeqi and others can not agree. Almost aiming at the area where the cat head is located, a little purple light gathers in his hands and shoots out, flying out at a speed of 100,000 meters per second.

The radar showed six super-high energy groups in front, and the cats with high mental tension changed.

Light drops.

Compressed to the ultimate solid state light.

Very scary weapon.

The weapon of the Ziwei civilization can destroy a planet at will. The most important thing is that the photon impact of the explosion center and the temperature of nearly 100 billion degrees are enough to make him disappear in the universe. His armor can not withstand such a high temperature. .

This weapon is only weaker than the one just released by the woman.

Without hesitation, the armor's engine was fully motivated, turned in one direction, and flew away with all strength, lest it be affected by the explosion center.

The rear ‘light drops’ blasted, and the dazzling light clusters filled the surrounding space. The cat head only felt white around, without any pause, and the stealth system of the armor opened again.

The other party is strong, he is not an ordinary person.

As a qualified assassin, he knows that the stronger the enemy, the more calm he will be, or the more likely he will die. Calmness allowed him to escape from the hands of death countless times.

Throwing a few radar-sensing sources as a cover, flashing a few times, the cat-headed person concealed again, and the speed was approaching Zeqi and others.

Everything is silent, the space is silent, like the forest in the night.

This is a hunt, he is a hunter and a prey.

Behind the Ziwei Civilization Warrior, the cat head sneered and instantly flashed.

Drops...

"Danger! Danger!"

The quick reminder of the armor system, the small virtual window that jumped out of the field of vision, let the cat's eyes cool down instantly, the face under the armor, the hair blows up, and the cat's eyes shrink into a gap.

That woman.

At this point he remembered that his opponent was the woman.

Behind him, the woman holds a long sword in her hand, surrounded by purple light, with the armor of the Ziwei civilization symbol, exuding endless murderousness, and the blade points directly to his heart.

When did this woman appear behind him? How does she determine her position?

Oh...

With the blade and the armor, the cat's head is removed.

boom! !

The engine is motivated, and the cat head is far from the purple rhyme. The wound is exposed in space and the blood flow is like a column.

Fast speed, good means.

Just now he has avoided the key points with the fastest speed, or can't hide. This woman's imaginary horror is definitely a top expert. This time, without looking up the strength of the other side, I rushed over.

"Speak your origins, I will spare you a life." Purple rhyme is standing in space, the sound is cold.

"Dreaming."

The cat head man with a decisive decision, pressed in front of the armor chest, a duck-sized instrument appeared in his hands.

The container is transparent and hollow, filled with a transparent liquid, with a little red droplet suspended in the middle, which is condensed and not scattered. Like ordinary red-level biological blood, but the color is deeper.

Seeing the red droplets, the purple cold face finally changed color.

Red matter, a substance that disturbs the spatial frequency, produces a black hole that lasts for a few seconds as long as it is consumed. The red matter is not very powerful, but it creates a space for the small black holes to stir up, which can make the unprotected small space entrance collapse and close.

"Stop, I will let you go."

"It’s late, the little universe can't get you."

The cat head smiled and pressed the button of the instrument to release the hand and let it float in space.

"Then you will die." Purple rhyme sounded with frost, and instantly flashed behind the cat head, the purple blade penetrated the armor and cut off the neck of the cat head.

Sweeping the body of the cathead, Ziyun grabbed the transparent instrument and just wanted to take it away from the entrance of the small universe, it was too late.

The instrument is broken and sharp space vibrations appear in the red liquid.

Ziyun did not hesitate to throw the instrument away and quickly flashed away. A black hole of black bean size emerged, vibrating the surrounding space, arousing the layers of space and spreading at the speed of light.

Oh...

Not far from the entrance of the small space that has just stabilized, it began to fluctuate violently, and the scream of the space vibration became especially clear through the collection of the armor.

Small universe screams reappear.

This time, unlike when it was opened, under the attention of many members of the Ziwei civilization, the entrance layer of the small space collapsed and turned into a vortex of light, which shredded the Ziwei civilization ship in front of the entrance of the small universe.

The planet within a light-distance distance from the center of the explosion is swept by a large stream of high-energy particles, which instantly turns into scorched earth and sparks.

After the particle storm, the purple rhyme floated in space, holding the head of the cat head in the hand, and the look was very bad.

Going back to where the small universe entrance was, the space entrance has disappeared.

The space of red matter disturbance, the frequency of fluctuations in the unconserved small universe entrance changes, causing the space to collapse, want to find a small universe, do not know where to go in the universe.

"How to do?"

Zeqi's face is also not good, hatefully staring at the head of Ziyun's hand. Zimu and other players are not in a good mood.

Purple rhyme looked very bad, and glanced at the disappearance of the entrance of the small universe: "Go back first."

chapters.title: Chapter 769: : Headless Armor
chapters.body:
Chapter 769: : Headless Armor

The Ziwei civilization left the origin city, and the news caused a lot of waves.

An investigation, the end of the grass.

However, the origin city soon received news that in the space area blocked by the Ziwei civilization, a fierce battle took place. Two planets were beaten into air masses, and fifty-six planets became fire seas and completely destroyed.

And the lives and deaths of countless lives on the planet are not concerned by civilization.

As for what forces are fighting against the Ziwei civilization, no one knows.

Worried about the anger of the Ziwei civilization, for a time, all the civilizations of the origin city are thinking. If it provokes the anger of the Ziwei civilization, the entire origin city will be destroyed.

The civilization of the damaged planet, the atmosphere does not dare to breathe, and even dare not ask the people of the Ziwei civilization to compensate for the loss. Those planets are only an important experimental place for them. If they talk indiscriminately, they will be angered by the Ziwei civilization.

At the same time, the news that the Ziwei civilization was looking for a small universe was almost confirmed, because the civilization of the origin city received space fluctuations from space and detected the existence of small universe screams.

This news stirred up a thousand waves in the origin city, and finally understood why such a fierce battle took place.

When the Ziwei civilization announced its departure from the original point city, the indigenous civilization of the origin city was just around the corner. This is the closest step they feel they are to the top civilization.

With a small universe as the cornerstone of civilization, after hundreds of millions of years of development, they also have the opportunity to become top civilization.

In the origin of the city, the area blocked by the Ziwei civilization, with the departure of the Ziwei civilization, the major civilizations began to prepare for the area where the Ziwei civilization was blocked.

Even if the fluctuations of the small universe have disappeared, they have to fight for the chance of a possible one-hundredth of a billionth of the small universe.

......

Chen Mo was immersed in the training of the armor, and he was more and more skilled in controlling the armor. The armor training field became the place where he often came, the obstacle dodge training came to an end, and now it is combat training.

Combat training, mainly melee attack training.

Close combat is a must-have part of the armor. It is similar to the fighting with bare hands. It is just a close combat in the armor. In the attack dodge mode, there are more free changes.

Chen Mo's opponent is still the training ball of the training ground. Thousands of extremely high-speed training **** have become the best training hands to train him to dodge and attack, which requires him to have a very high reaction ability.

Predict the direction of the attack, enhance the sense of crisis and combat, advance and retreat, the rhythm of avoidance and attack must be mastered.

This requires him to be fully familiar with the performance of the armor.

These are the foundations.

Three hours, after finishing the last training ball, Chen Mocai stopped and flew back to the rest. Chen Mo has become accustomed to three hours of high-intensity training every day.

Taking off the armor, the sweat has soaked through the body.

Now Chen Mo’s body has changed a lot, and the muscle lines are more obvious than before.

In the earth, wearing clothes is more of a calm image of Sven, now a more masculine breath, a pair of sharp eyes are very aggressive.

In the universe, no longer a place on the earth, Chen Mo is very clear that he must have strong strength to enjoy his freedom, otherwise he will stay in this cage forever.

After replacing the clothes soaked in sweat, Chen Mo was able to pack things and put on the armor to leave the training ground.

"Hello, 307 training grounds to rent out."

Chen Mo went to the front desk and saw the embarrassment.

This time to train here, check out these girls. The girl looks like a normal humanoid, with both hands and feet, and the skin is like the white whale of the earth, but it looks very pleasing to the eye.

"Yeah." He took over the card from Chen Mo's hand and was skilled in giving Chen Mo a refund.

"Sir, you wait." After handling the rent retreat, he suddenly stopped Chen Mo.

“Is there any other problem?” Chen Mo asked strangely.

"There is a problem, I always want to ask you. Your training record, why not delete it?"

I will ask my doubts.

During this time, Chen Molai’s training time was just the time she was on duty. Every time Chen Mo came out, the training data and records were not deleted. She looked at Chen Mo’s record of almost horrible scores.

Combining various training data, I can almost judge that Chen Mo is the top warrior of Qing Shuixing.

But a top warrior can't leave his training data right.

"Training record?"

“Don't you know?” I was a little surprised: “When you use the training ground, there will be a training data record, which is generally only visible to you. You can delete the record after the end, otherwise we will get you at the front desk after check-out. Training data."

"Oh, I didn't pay attention." Chen Mo did, he did not think about it.

"Your previous training record, I have helped you delete it. You should note that some armored divisions like to collect the opponent's training data to understand the opponent's level, you leave a record, it is easy to be found by your opponent. ""

"Thank you." Chen Mo reported with a smile.

"You're welcome."

Looking straight into Chen Mo, although different races, she can feel that this man is more and more pleasing to the eye, seems to have a special temperament and attractiveness.

Thanks again, Chen Mocai left the training ground.

It was not until Chen Mo left that he regained his gaze. She knows that the top warrior will never look at her ordinary little person, so she just appreciates it.

Skilled to open Chen Mo's training record, see the above score, stunned.

Going back to the small apartment, Chen Mo went to take a shower.

The little mother is not there, I don't know where to go.

These little guys often go out these days, and when they come back to eat, Chen Mo doesn't care about it. If it runs away, Chen Mo saves the pet's energy.

The weather was very different during this time, the weather was a lot hot, and there were several large fires in the forest. And there are a lot of meteors at night. A few days ago, many of Qingshui’s electronic instruments and communication equipment failed.
