Chen Mo can guess the impact of the cosmic radiation storm, or what war broke out outside the space. Because of the falling meteor of the Mercury, there are some wrecks of the spaceship.

The catastrophe can't hide, and the catastrophe doesn't have to hide. Chen Mo is very calm.

"Mo Mo Mo..."

After Chen Mogang took a shower, the little beast was already on the table, holding a fruit in his hand. Seeing Chen Mochi. Naked on the upper body, hurriedly stretched out his small claws and screamed with his eyes.

Chen Mo has become accustomed to this situation.

"You call me to pinch your little ass."

"Momo!" The little beast directly licked his little **** to hide in the corner, watching Chen Mo with vigilance. Just seeing Chen Mo did not wear the upper body of his clothes, and squinted.

Chen Mo did not pay attention to this shy little mother beast, put on clothes and sit in front of the light brain, and began programming work.

Research on technology and technology has continued. Chen Mo is writing a super artificial intelligence, only super artificial intelligence, and he is very helpful to him now.

"Mo Mo Mo!"

The little beast jumped on Chen Mo’s shoulder and pulled Chen’s clothes.

"Want to eat?"

The little beast licked his tongue and shook his head again, extending his small claw and pointing at the outside.

"Is there something outside?"

"Moo." The little beast nodded and jumped to the ground and pulled Lamu's trousers, and made another stroke.

“Are far away?”

"Moose." The little beast nodded again.

"Row."

Chen Mo put the little beast into a fully transparent comet space bag and hung in front of the armor. The comet's space bag is still made by Chen Mo. Usually, Chen Mo went to the repair shop in Cana. This little guy had to follow, and Chen Mo gave him a backpack.

"Where to go?" Chen Mo asked.

He knew that this little beast was a bit special, so he would accompany it out. He also wants to see what the little beast pulled him out to see.

"Moo." The little beast pointed in one direction and let Chen Mo fly.

The armor flew for five minutes before reaching the destination pointed by the little beast. In the dense jungle, a headless armor lay in the deep pit.

chapters.title: Chapter 770: :Reward
chapters.body:
Chapter 770: :Reward

Black armor, one arm and head disappeared, the upper part was filled with purple liquid, it was dry, like blood, there was a headless body inside, the arm and neck incision was very flat, and even the armor was cut off together. of.

Chen Mo can see the black fur on the surface through the part of the wound. The other parts are not covered by the armor. It should be an orc.

The flesh and blood of the body are also fluorescent, which is very different from the flesh and blood of red life. Chen Mo deliberately squeezed the flesh and blood inside, and the toughness is beyond the horror of imagination.

A body of higher civilization life.

This is Chen Mo's initial judgment, 靛 grade or purple life.

Chen Mo learned from Kazak that the division of life in the universe is divided by the color and wisdom of the blood.

Red-level life, the blood color is red or red, and is still in a state of relying on the atmosphere and nutrients of the planet to maintain life. From the green to the gradual stage, life can survive for a period of time in the vacuum of space.

The purple-level and above-class god-level civilizations, they have escaped the state of the planet's atmosphere and nutrients to maintain their lives, can survive in space for a long time, and rely on cosmic radiation particles to sustain life.

Judging from the potholes under the armor, it was falling from the sky. Chen Mo quickly thought of the abnormal weather in these days. It should be a creature with higher civilizations fighting in outer space, and Qing Shuixing.

A near-violet life is fighting, and Chen Mo has to judge that a big event that he does not know is happening outside the planet.

If so, Qing Shuixing may be at risk at any time.

Looking around for a moment, without seeing the armor's head and arms, Chen Mo locked his eyes on the armor's energy and parts.

Armored energy and parts of higher civilization.

These are all good things.

The armor energy of higher civilizations uses antimatter, and some materials use dark matter synthetic materials. Qingshuixing's equipment can't refine antimatter. There is no antimatter and dark matter sold here, so this set of broken armor is especially important for Chen Mo.

The level of civilization of the three-eyed civilization should be at the blue level and belong to the middle and lower positions in the universe. With this set of armored anti-matter energy, engines and weapons, Chen Mo can make a set of armor that surpasses the three-eye civilization more quickly.

"This time helped a lot." Chen Mo touched the head of the little beast.

Get the praise of Chen Mo, the little beast is a little excited, proudly raising his head.

Back to the house, Chen Mo rewarded the little beast for a delicious quiche, and took the broken armor into the basement.

The underground small laboratory stood with a battle armor model. This is the second set of armor that Chen Mo is preparing to make at Qing Shuixing. It is painted in red and black. The design is adjusted and modified on the basis of ‘hunting’.

He has been preparing to upgrade the armor technology during this time, but there is no anti-material energy, the power of the weapon is insufficient, and the dark matter cannot be extracted, and the dark matter material cannot be synthesized.

Chen Mo does not dare to manufacture extraction equipment. Once the large equipment for extracting dark matter and antimatter is manufactured, it is easy to be detected by the three-eye civilization of Qing Shuixing, and it will be more troublesome at that time.

This incomplete armor, with its intact antimatter energy and a good engine, is a treasure for Chen Mo.

The equipment in the laboratory was bought by him, enough to support his research materials and armor weapons. After the scan, Chen Mo has confirmed that the armor control core chip disappears and should be smashed in the head.

Without the core chip, there is no armor to confirm the master's sentinel system, which is quite unowned and easy to disassemble.

Exquisite craftsmanship, this is what Chen Mo said.

In Chen Mo's opinion, this is almost a perfect armor.

After spending three hours in Chen Mo, Chen Mocai found the repair point of the armor and dismantled the armor.

A body with a headless broken arm is placed in front of Chen Mo, with black fur, and the remaining arm is like a cat's claw, and the claws are as long as a human. The life of the orc family, in this class of orcs, is also wearing a suit.

Chen Mo tried the material for the test clothes. It is a shock absorbing material that spreads the impact force to every corner of the body to minimize the impact on the body.

After coming here for so long, Chen Mo has a preliminary concept of the life system here.

In addition to the anthropoids, there are also orcs, orcs, seas, zergs, etc. These are also distinguished by intelligent life and non-smart life, each with its own characteristics and characteristics of civilization.

Wisdom life can develop into civilization, non-intelligent life is like other animals in the earth, there is no way to form civilization, use the tools of the universe.

Put the body in the refrigerator, Chen Mo will focus on the dismantled armor.

What surprised Chen Mo was that in addition to the original energy, there was an alternate energy source. Two palm-sized anti-matter generators, in Chen Mo's hands, feel that the weight is not small, very textured.

Putting the antimatter generator on, Chen Mo put his eyes on other parts.

The long, sharp claws are a weapon. The material is unclear, but the claws are inserted into the ordinary steel. It is as simple as inserting the sharp edge into the tofu. There is also a short pulse generator attached to the energy system to increase the attack power of the claws.

In addition, there is a laser transmitter, a special transmitter with more than a dozen transparent marbles, do not know what ammunition, a small container with a drop of red liquid, a large palm of the radar, and a piece do not know What weapon, and finally a bottle of dark green solution at the arm.

The weapon system is a bit more.

Put a good weapon, Chen Mo picked up one of the main engines of the armor.

The size of the engine, the workmanship is very delicate, the lines are very beautiful.

As for the material, Chen Mo is not clear. There is no instrument and equipment and it is impossible to analyze the material. The material of advanced civilization should have the means to cover up the analysis of the composition, otherwise the material of the armor is easily obtained by other civilizations.

Including the small engine on the parts, a total of 28, 6 big 22 small, the complexity makes Chen Mo stunned.

After removing all the engines and putting them in place, Chen Mo began collecting the remaining materials.

Every small part, Chen Mo did not let go.

The parts of this armor are not in conformity with the shape of Chen Mo. Chen Mo can't use it. You have to re-melt the material or develop new materials to make the armor.

He needs to make the most of all the materials in it, so that he can save more time and make the armor more powerful.

......

“Professor, when the Ziwei civilization blocked the 8753 area, they destroyed the surveillance and detection satellites of all the planets in that area, and we are unable to monitor those planets now.”

Sanya constantly exchanged the projection map, a blank.

The space has their important experimental planet. In the last battle, they have seven planets in the three-eye civilization destroyed in the battle. All the low-level lives in captivity are dead. After years of research, it is the most costly one. .

There are now five important experimental planets in the blocked area, including the most important Qingshui.

Torrel is not in a good mood.

The life study of the three-eye civilization has been carried out for thousands of years, and experiments with so many stars have been maintained, and the results are not as good as the battle of the Ziwei civilization.

Now that you want to restore the surveillance of several planets, you must redeploy the planetary surveillance system.

"How long does it take for the overbearing Ziwei civilization to redeploy the planetary surveillance system?"

"Two months." Sanya answered truthfully.

"trouble."

Torrell turned black.

"Then start deploying now..."

Drops...

The sound of Torrell's voice did not fall, and the scream of the Sanya communication device interrupted their conversation. Without hesitation to connect to the communication device, Sanya looked calm and did not take long to put down the communication device.

“Is there anything important?” asked Torrell.

"I am afraid that the planetary surveillance system will not be able to be deployed for the time being." Sanya said seriously: "The blue blood civilization has united several civilizations to form an alliance, and announced to us that the 8753 area belongs to them and has sent troops to occupy the area."

"What?" Torrell's voice was full of anger: "What does the king say?"

"Getting started."

The battle at the origin city began.

The competition between the most powerful civilizations for the blockade of Ziwei civilization has become more and more fierce, and there has been a conflict of interest between them, which has caused the situation in the origin city to become tense.

The origin of the undercurrent, the end of the blue blood civilization combined with several civilizations, announced that the area blocked by the Ziwei civilization was temporarily under their jurisdiction, and the three-eye civilization clash, the struggle began to be clear.

The origin of the city, centered on the conflict between the three-eye civilization and the blue-blooded civilization, and the rapid spread, coupled with the secrets of other civilizations, the situation has become extremely complicated.

At the beginning, the three-eye civilization that hosted the Ziwei civilization became a target of public criticism. But soon, the three-eye civilization united with the origin of the city and several good civilizations to counterattack.

The war quickly fell into a stalemate, slowly evolving into a war of two major civilized groups centered on three-eye civilization and blue-blood civilization, vying for the area blocked by Ziwei civilization.

The small universe is full of temptations, even if it has not been found yet, it is still coveted.

If they still appear there, they will become the cornerstone of the god-level civilization.

Both sides maintained the last restraint and did not dare to launch weapons that could destroy the entire origin city.

And whether it is a three-eyed civilization or a blue-blooded civilization, they are cautious, just vying for the temporary jurisdiction of the 8753 region, because they are not clear, the Ziwei civilization will not come back, they do not want to offend the Ziwei civilization.

The ordinary life of the origin city became the most direct victim.

The armor and the spaceship are all over the sky, and life is not worth mentioning in the face of such conflicts.

Spaceships, nuclear bombs, neutron bombs, antimatter bombs, destructive lasers, high-energy particle attacks, nano-bug attacks, biological virus attacks, facing the conflicts of advanced civilizations, and the destruction of a city with a size of a planet.

In the center of the origin city conflict, hundreds of millions of lives have become a member of the scorched earth.

In the era of the national armor, the fighting spread especially quickly, and the civilizations that stood by and watched warned the three-eye civilization and the blue-blood civilization, and could not affect their territory.

The stale battle is extremely horrible, and you will sing me to debut. From the beginning of the high-energy weapons to the bombing, to the final dispatch of the two powerful armored divisions debut.

The two civilizations are in the zone where the civilization and territory intersect, and they are constantly fighting terror. The junction of the three-eyed civilization and the blue-blooded civilization has become a field between the two civilizations.

The conflict between the two civilizations is only a partial small fight in the Universe Alliance. The official of the Universe Alliance, controlled by the seven god-level civilizations, only verbally warned that two civilizations should not use galaxy-level weapons of destruction, and they would not pay attention to them. .

This type of war is very common in the universe and can only be regarded as a child's house.

As the cause of this war, Ziwei civilization did not say a word at all. In the seven god-level civilizations, no one cares about this war, and everything seems insignificant.

chapters.title: Chapter 771: : Launching A Super-Capacity Development Project
chapters.body:
Chapter 771: : Launching A Super-Capacity Development Project

In the villa of the earth incense burner beach, Xiaoyu is watching the baby crawling on the carpet, and the corner of his mouth is a gentle smile. The baby's nickname is unnamed. The meaning of Xiaoyu is to let Chen Mo come back and give him a name.

Zhao Min and the ink girl are by her side, all looking at the baby on the ground with a smile.

The baby was born until now, and learned to climb for more than three months. The growth rate is terrifying. But the baby has a golden red blood different from ordinary people. At this point, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min are not so surprised.

This is a super baby, Chen Mo's child.

Seeing Chen Mo on the screen of the mobile phone, and then watching the baby who will climb, Xiao Yu is somewhat hurt.

"We will be able to find him soon, rest assured." Zhao Min said comfortably.

"Yeah." Xiao Yu nodded lightly.

After a while, the little nameless climbed to the side of the small fisherman and drilled into the arms of the small fisherman.

"Hey."

Xiaoming pointed to Chen Mo on the Xiaoyu mobile phone wallpaper.

The three women looked happy when they heard the unclear voice. Usually, the small fisherman will hold the baby and show him the photo of Chen Mo. He said that this is Dad. I didn’t expect to shout it out today, although it is not clear.

"The baby will call Dad." Xiao Yu's eyes were a little red, and he kissed him on the little nameless face.

Seeing that Xiao Yu’s eyes are red, the ink girl knows that she wants to be a murderer. Over the past year or so, she has seen countless times that Xiao Yu is crying at the photo of Mi Ge, but she can't help anything.

After playing for a long time, I gave the little name to my grandparents.

Zhao Min and Xiao Yu followed the ink woman into the underground laboratory. Today, the ink girl has another research project to be announced, which requires Xiao Yu and Zhao Min's decision-making authorization.

The marching ant group now has the highest authority of Chen Mo by Xiao Yu, and the company affairs are fully managed by Zhao Min. The ink girl supplements Chen Mo’s position as the most important R&D personnel. The horror ability of the ink girl, in some respects, even Chen Mo is not enough.

Ink is making a super-light-speed space curvature spacecraft on Mars, preparing for the entry into the sea of stars.

The technology of the whole earth began to develop unscrupulously after Chen Mo’s disappearance. It can be described as a small change in three days and a big change in five days. The armor has been popularized in the hands of soldiers, and the war robot has become the most powerful force in guarding the marching ant group.

The marching ant group is deployed in the solar system, using nano-robots to transform the entire solar system planet. Once the super-light speed spacecraft and space jump points are built, their goal is the star sea.

Without development restrictions, the ink girl has begun to simulate and test various powerful anti-material weapons.

After Chen Mo was arrested, they knew the importance of weapons. Chen Mo left a lot of scientific and technological theories for the ink girl, and the ink girl completely digested and completed the development, enough for the two stages of the rise of the earth civilization.

Chen Mo’s technology for the ink girl is not only the super-light speed spacecraft and space jumping technology, but also a project that Chen Mo is most valued.

"Xiao Yujie, Min Jie, this is the technical information and theory that Mi Ge prepared before. Mu Ge has attached great importance to this project. The equipment and research methods have been prepared in the early stage. The ink girl has not announced it to you. Now it is ready. No, you need Xiao Yujie to confirm the start of project authorization."

The ink girl transferred the laboratory information to the two women. This is the highest secret of the marching ant group. In the past, only the ink girl and Chen Mo could view it, and no one else could adjust it, including Xiao Yu and Zhao Min.

Now the highest authority of the marching ant group is in the hands of Xiao Yu and Zhao Min, and the time is ripe.

"What project?"

Both women were a little curious. After seeing the project materials, the two were in a good shape.

"Super-capacity development technology."

......

Place a transparent marble on the instrument and Chen Mo gently turns on the instrument.

If you want to use the materials of the incomplete armor, you must first figure out what you got in the armor.

After the inventory, the things harvested in the armored armor were basically confirmed.

A paw weapon with a short pulse, a long-range ultra-high-energy pulsed laser, a radar, a protective cover, and a bottle of horrible corrosive solution. These liquids are sprayed onto the armor material to make the armor become like a biscuit. It is as fragile and should be used in melee.

What makes Chen Mo unable to understand is the fourteen transparent marbles and the red liquid.

Drops! !

There was an incomparable alarm sound on the instrument, which made Chen Mo feel a whole body and his face changed. Did not think about it, Chen Mo immediately turned off the detection instrument.

"The energy of horror."

Seeing the energy intensity of the test instrument, Chen Moxin was shaking.

Initially, the energy band of this bead can destroy a planet ten times larger than Qing Shuixing. Fortunately, he left a mind, did not take the test, otherwise he did not know how to die.

Chen Mo secretly wiped a cold sweat.

Careful to put the transparent marbles, this is an unexpected harvest, these four marbles is an important weapon for him to leave the Qing Shuixing.

Finally, the red liquid, in a small transparent container, Chen Mo is not clear about the role of this liquid, but do not know what this is.

With the horror of marbles, Chen Mo did not dare to take out the liquid to detect it, otherwise it would be a big problem if something went wrong.

Hesitating, Chen Mo collected all the materials and left the underground lab of the apartment.

Science and Technology Library.

Chen Mo walked in front of the technology ball with purple gold light.

Obtaining the armor of the armor, solving Chen Mo's many troubles, the design of the armor can speed up the progress.

Now that only the drop of liquid can not be determined, so Chen Mo decided to look in the technology library to see if there is any information and records of the liquid in the technology library.

The palm of the hand pressed on the technology ball. For a moment, Chen Mo felt drowned by the purple gold light, and the picture that appeared in his mind was an endless book and technique.

Here only Chen Mo thought, the technical theory he needs will come to his mind, but only theory, there is no design of physical products. The science and technology library is to let him learn to create.

The only complete technology is the material formulation and formulation.

Concentrated, Chen Mosi thought about the red drop just now.

In the next moment, countless techniques emerged in front of Chen Mo, and the cover of the book was a drop of red liquid.

"harmless red paint"; field: chemistry, authority level: trainee; product introduction: red paint, harmless to the organism, can be used for painting, decoration, painting.

"Red Medicine"; field: medicine, authority level: apprentice; product introduction: external use, can stop bleeding, sputum.

"Stealth Painting", field: Chemistry, privilege level: silver; Product introduction: mechanical stealth coating, high temperature resistance, can avoid the detection of electromagnetic radar.

......

Countless red liquids, including all the permissions of all fields, let Chen Mo amazed, think about it, Chen Mo will remove all the technology below the gold authority.

The more advanced the technology, the smaller the number.

really.

After Chen Mo chose to remove the technology below the gold authority, in front of him, there are only thousands of red liquid technologies left.

Chen Mote has selected technologies in several fields of military, biomedical, chemical and physical fields to view. He speculated that this technology would definitely be related to these areas, otherwise the red liquid would not be of much use to him.

After the screening, there are only twenty techniques left in front of Chen Mo.

"Red Poison", field: biology, medicine, privilege level: gold; product introduction: super virus, with strong contagious and latent, can survive in space for five years, after the outbreak of toxicity, the organism within five minutes death.

"Red Regenerant", field: biology, medicine, authority level: Zijin; Product introduction: external use, restore cell pluripotency, repair wounds, rehabilitated limbs.

......

"Red matter", field: space physics; privilege level: Zijin; Product introduction: Black hole derivatives, after high-energy activation, can produce small black holes that exist for a short time, create space 涟漪, change the frequency of space fluctuations.

Chen Mo finally locked his eyes on "Red Matter", which is distinguished by color and quality. At present, this substance is most likely.

Probably confirming that it is a red substance, Chen Mo will focus on other technologies. After looking for a while in the Science and Technology Library and getting the ten kinds of skills he needed, Chen Mocai turned and left.

chapters.title: Chapter 772: : Create A New Armor
chapters.body:
Chapter 772: : Create A New Armor

"Heah, I am going back, see you tomorrow."

Chen Mozheng was holding a snack and eating the little beast and throwing it into the space capsule of the comet. He turned his hand and waved at Jia, and took two boxes and left the repair shop.

"see you tomorrow."

Jia smiled and waved.

Chen Mo's technical strength is much stronger than the Warrior maintenanceman. Even Jia is scared by Chen Mo's horrible skills.

From the design of the armor, to the armor system, engine power, armor materials, etc., it is omnipotent, and then slowly adapt to the ability of Chen Mo this freak.

He saw Chen Mo's extraordinary, and also knew that Chen Mo wanted to escape from Qing Shui.

Many of the lives that have been caught, including Gai himself, have just wanted to escape from Qing Shuixing at the beginning, but only later found that they are powerless and in vain. Chen Mo wants to escape, he can help, maybe Chen Mo will be almost like himself.

Seeing Chen Mo licking two boxes and urging the armor to leave, Jia looked at the sky and sighed, continued to drink tea and watched the video.

Chen Mo fully urged the armor and rushed back to his small house.

At this stage, what he needs most is time, because he is also uncertain, when will the three-eye civilization discover that he has so many advanced technologies in his hands.

Although Qing Shui Xing is comfortable, it is not a place to stay for a long time.

He has a family and a loved one, and he does not want to be kept in the planet forever.

Most importantly, the discovery of the incomplete armor made him aware that something unknown is happening outside of space, and that Qingshui may be in danger of being destroyed at any time.

Since the three-eyed civilization put him on the planet, the plan to leave the Qing Shuixing has been going on.

Chen Mo does not expect the three-eye civilization to suddenly erupt, and let himself leave Qing Shuixing.

He is now only an individual being studied. Maybe three days of civilization in order to speed up the research progress, directly forcing him to mate with other humanoid females, using future generations to study, or using his body directly as an experimental body, it is very painful. of.

Three-eye civilization has not come to him until now, but time has not come. If there is no armor that can defeat the three-eye civilization at that time, Chen Mo does not think that he can escape from the three-eye civilization and then return to the earth.

There are not many opportunities to escape from Qing Shuixing. If you don't succeed, you will want to escape in the future. It is tantamount to idiots and dreams.

Chen Mo will pin his hopes on the armor and technology library being built.

Although he has not seen all the strengths of the three-eye civilization, Chen Mo guessed that the broken armor, the technical level is very high, should not be lower than the three-eye civilization technology. Moreover, the technology library Zijin-level authority, the technology that can be obtained is also extremely powerful, and beyond the three-eye civilization is not a problem.

The Science and Technology Library is the largest capital that Chen Mo escaped.

He has a technology that transcends the three-eye civilization. Now he only needs to implement these technologies, and the chance he will escape. Time is tight, there are a lot of techniques to study, and it takes time to train.

Every time he is busy, Chen Mo will sort out the plan to escape.

The most critical part of the plan is the super-light speed spacecraft.

Qing Shuixing cannot manufacture light-speed spacecraft and super-light speed spacecraft. There is no dark matter required for materials and anti-matter as energy, and there is no such powerful technology.

Chen Mo has that kind of technology, but if it is to make huge equipment, then the big movement, the three-eye civilization that monitors Qing Shuixing will certainly find out, and the time period for making that kind of equipment is not small.

Therefore, according to Chen Mo’s plan, when he fled Qingxingxing, he had to flee to the origin city for the first time. Before the three-eye civilization reacted, he fled in the original point city by a super-light speed spacecraft.

The longer the time drags, the more difficult he is to escape.

Chen Mo is now making his second set of armor in a race against time.

"Go to the freezer to find the fruit to eat, wait a minute to cook for you." Chen Mo returned to the house, dropped the little beast, carrying two boxes to the basement.

The little beast looked at Chen Mo's back, did not bother him, jumped to the freezer alone, found a fast-food snack, and ran to the sofa.

The basement is a bit small compared to the laboratory, but after Chen Mo's simple transformation, it is barely well-organized, and the equipment needed to manufacture the armor is basically complete.

Chen Mo was wearing protective clothing and took out two pieces of wet material from the small room and turned into an isolated small workshop.

There is a precision machine tool in the workshop, the price is 5 million stars, and there are other precision equipment in the underground laboratory. Chen Mo spends 50 million stars to purchase these equipment.

Not enough money, he also went to the free field to sell two material formulas.

The formula of the material is sold to the free, and the last time the purchase of the material formula is the free.

Chen Mo does not understand the group of free people, only know that they are the part of the life of Qing Shuixing walking in the dark corner.

Chen Mo did not look down on them, but they admire them very much, because they are also in Qing Shuixing, they are much stronger than those who are willing to be captive and enjoy the comfort.

Chen Mo put the materials on the incomplete armor on the machine tool, and then walked to the side of the light and began to retrieve the data of the design parts.

He tested the material of the incomplete armor, a very special material that can be hidden on the quantum radar, can change color or even become a mirror, just like an invisible chameleon, and it is very strong, and the technology library The purple gold grade material is similar.

Being a stalker in front of the radar is just in line with his escape plan.

Chen Mo intends to use the material of the incomplete armor to transform into a new armor. The material strength of the incomplete armor is too high, and the laser power of the Qingshui machine can't leave any cuts.

In order to make better use of these materials, Chen Mo specially looked for a kind of armor that could reduce the strength of the material and reshape it from the technology library.

This kind of solution is "gold softener". If the metal-containing alloy material is immersed in the gold softener for more than 50 hours, the strength will be reduced. After the machine tool is processed, the gold softener on the material is removed at high temperature, and the material will return to the original strength. And does not change the original nature of the material.

The armor is designed according to Chen Mo's body shape, and most of the parts of the incomplete armor are reshaped or cut.

No accidents, the incomplete armor parts, easily cut by the laser of precision machine tools. Looking at the individual parts being transformed, Chen Mo did not relax a bit. On this planet, he did not dare to relax, just wanted to escape from birth.

Three hours later, the parts of the incomplete armor were completely rebuilt.

Chen Mozhen's tired eyebrows opened the two boxes next to it, which were packed in various materials. This was brought back in the repair shop of Ka, and Chen Mo's small laboratory had no synthetic equipment.

The set of torn armor that came back, lacking the head and left hand, wanted to make a new armor, and needed strong enough materials to make up the missing part, and the shape of the armor parts also changed.

From the Science and Technology Library, Chen Mo selected several formulas of purple gold grade materials that were strong enough to repair the armor and synthesized these materials.

Taking out the required materials, Chen Mo began to process the left hand and the head parts of the armor.

chapters.title: Chapter 773: : Free Black Ants
chapters.body:
Chapter 773: : Free Black Ants

In three months, the war between the three-eyed civilization and the blue-blooded civilization has become increasingly fierce. From the battle of the origin city to the battle for the space area.

Area 8753 has become the two main competition points.

Things have developed to this point, except for the survival of the small universe in this region, the rest is the hatred of both sides.

The battle was carried out, and the space in the area of 8753 became the main battlefield of the two. The spaceship is on the blast, the battle of the armored armies, the space hunting is insane, and the battle between the two sides has reached a stage of white fever.

Qing Shuixing.

During this time, Chen Mo was completely immersed in the manufacturing process of the battle armor.

He noticed that the situation outside the Qingshuixing seems to be bad, because the Qingshuixing often has spacecraft fragments and armor fragments from space. Outside of space, it seems that a fierce war is taking place.

Researching technology, manufacturing armor, training, this is what Chen Mo is doing every day, everything is preparing for the control of fleeing the three-eye civilization.

The basement of the small house, through the private transformation of Chen Mo, the basement of the small house has now expanded twice, and various experiments are fully equipped.

According to Chen’s sign of the debris of the spacecraft and the debris of the warships outside the space, the three-eye civilization is now fighting a certain civilization, and it is temporarily unable to take care of the Qingshuixing.

He deliberately investigated it in the dark, and did find that the intervention of the three-eye civilization on Qing Shuixing almost disappeared.

Some news is still known from the mouth of the free.

With these news, Chen Mo's development speed has increased a lot, because in action, Chen Mo is still cautious, but will not be as shackled as before.

The new armor was completed.

In the window of the central laboratory of the small house, there is a complete set of armor. This is the new armor that has just been tested, a set of armor made using the most advanced technology Chen Mo has currently mastered.

The lines of the armor are perfect streamlined, rich in power and fluidity, all in one. The classic dark night and dark red are still the symbol of the marching ant group, full of mysterious colors.

The elbows and knees are equipped with short-pulse fighting thorns, which are modified from the paws of the incomplete armor and can easily pierce the protection of ordinary armor. This is designed according to the melee fighting form of the armor. In the close combat, the fighting stab can pose a great threat to the opponent.

In addition, the right hand has a remote laser with the original armor, and a cold weapon like a dagger.

The left hand of the armor is repaired with the new material of the Zijin class of the Science and Technology Library. In terms of strength and stealth, it is not inferior to the founding incomplete armor.

Left-handed weapons are not cold weapons, but solvents, a solvent used for fighting.

In the Cosmic Alliance's armor system, there are two types of combat: remote and close.

Even in the super-developed universe of the Armor, the cold weapons that are close in the same level of combat are still the mainstream.

As the armor materials are getting stronger and stronger, the requirements for weapons are getting higher and higher. Long-range weapons, such as laser weapons and other long-range pulsed weapons, can be twisted and protected by energy shields.

Super-destructive weapons, powerful but limited in speed, are easily detected and escaped.

Therefore, if you want to kill a single master with the same level of armor, the close-knit cold weapon is more efficient.

Ordinary cold weapons can not break the armor, so the cold weapons of the armor are generally combined with short-pulse laser weapons, in order to cut the armor, and hurt the armored division inside.

But the high-energy short-pulse laser blessing is not the uniqueness of the melee weapon.

Today, with the high development of the armor system, chemical agents and corrosive armor solutions have also become an effective means.

Let the solution erode the original properties of the armor material. Even without the short-pulse laser blessing, the ordinary cold weapon can still hurt the warrior in the armor. Therefore, the pharmaceutical solution also plays a small role in the battle of the battle.

"Mo Mo Mo?" Seeing Chen Mo's armor, the little beast suddenly jumped to Chen Mo's body and shouted with dissatisfaction.

"You also want armor?" Chen Mo asked.

"Moose." The little beast nodded.

"Prepared for you."

Chen Mo took an ostrich egg-sized egg-shaped machine armor from a box. Pressing the button, the inner hollow is just the shape of the little beast. The form of the armor is like an ostrich egg with eyes and limbs.

"Momo!!"

The little beast saw his own battle armor look like this, suddenly protested, full of arrogance and dissatisfaction.

"Don't? That's forgotten." Chen Mo is ready to take back the armor.

"Moo~~"

The little beast hurriedly jumped to Chen Mo's hand, although his face was arrogant, he still had to leave an egg-shaped armor.

Let the little beast into the egg-shaped armor, Chen Mo presses the start button, only the egg-shaped armor changes instantly, several mechanical structures turn, become a beastly armor, looking like the shape of a small beast, Just not so fat, less energetic, and a little momentum.

"Momo."

The little beast saw the reflective self on the glass and excitedly called twice, indicating that he was very satisfied.

Chen Mo put his gaze on the new armor. This new armor, Chen Mo gave it a name: free ants, very straightforward name.

......

As usual, I changed my overalls to the front desk of the training ground. Habitually check the registered training ground, and did not find Chen Mo's information.

In the past few months, she has been deeply curious and shocked to the man.

Chen Mo's training broke the history of the training field and scored almost the full score of the purple level training. This is the standard that Qingshuixing's top experts can't complete, and it shows how terrible it is.

The man, with a special temperament, and a mysterious atmosphere, made her extremely curious.

"Hello, open a training ground."

While thinking about Chen Mo’s stunned, a man wearing a black and red armor appeared and interrupted her thoughts.

The size of the armor makes you feel familiar.

"It's me." Chen Mo opened the helmet of the armor, revealing his head, and gave a smile to the shackles.

He looked very bright and curiously looked at Chen Mo’s armor. For the first time in a few months, she saw Chen Mo wearing this set of armor. It looks very powerful, black and red, adding a mystery out of thin air, very handsome.

"This is your new armor?" asked curiously.

"Okay, I just came out today." Chen Mo handed the star card to Yu, indicating that she would open an advanced training ground.

"It looks very powerful." He looked straight at Chen Mo's armor. He was amazed and skillfully opened a training ground for Chen Mo: "I wish you a happy training and a good result."

"Thank you."

After receiving the door card of the training ground, Chen Mo put on the armor helmet and went inside.

......

In Qingshuixing, a huge underground building, the lights are bright, like a white. At this time, there are a group of people, more than 20 people, if Chen Mo is here, I can definitely recognize one of them.

It is the person who often buys materials with him.

Freedom, Qing Shuixing has been seeking to get rid of the three-eyed civilization in the dark.

The current location is the headquarters of the Freedom, where the most outstanding R&D personnel of the freelancers are recruited.

In front of them, there are more than 20 armor, the armor is gray, in various forms, and the height is different. If you look closely, you can see the shape of these armor, similar to a group of people standing, is the armor for them.

This is the latest first battle armor.

In the distant assembly line, there are also different forms of armor being assembled.

"The business, the materials you bought this time have helped a lot. These armor are very strong. They should be the most powerful armor of Qing Shuixing. Maybe we can have the opportunity." An old man headed by him said with appreciation.

"It can be best to help."

"We only have fifty-two anti-material energy sources, which is the most troublesome, and the number is a little less," the old man said.

Antimatter They have no technology to manufacture. Fifty-two anti-material energy sources are their savings for hundreds of years. They are obtained through the fall of the armor, the wreckage of the spacecraft, and the ordinary warrior who bought the three-eye civilization by means of means.

"If you let the most powerful armored divisions in the organization use it, maybe we have an opportunity. According to intelligence, the wreckage of these months has fallen a lot. It is the three-eye civilization and the blue-blood civilization in the war. As long as the opportunity is right, there is escape. Maybe." said the merchant.

"Well, you will bring the armor to familiarize yourself with the training. Remember, the sooner you get familiar with the armor, the better. I feel that the chances of us fleeing are getting closer and closer. This is the only chance that you have five years. Twelve people must completely control the armor and lead the players to **** the spacecraft that they left." The old man said seriously.

"Yes."

In front of the old man, all young lives are full of seriousness and firm eyes.

chapters.title: Chapter 774: : Before Escaping
chapters.body:
Chapter 774: : Before Escaping

There is no small difference between 'free ants' and 'hunting'. Although it is the same template, the 'free ants' are more powerful. There are only 32 engines, 6 big and 26 small, which are incomplete. Add 4 engines to the armor's engine.

It turns out that the armor lost its head and arms, and the engine was missing, so Chen Mo added it back when he made the ‘free ants.’ The small engine of Qing Shui Xing is not as powerful as the incomplete armor, but only needs to be balanced and the impact will be very limited.

‘Free ants ant’ began to be difficult to control, but Chen Mo started very quickly.

He understands the performance and design of free ants, and masters ‘hunting’, adapting to the armor he designed.

Now that ‘free ants are finished, Chen Mo needs to be ready to escape. He is not sure when the three-eye civilization ship will come, but the opportunity is for those who are prepared.

The armor is connected with a neural reaction. As long as the nerve responds fast enough, Chen Mo can make a very fast dodge. He didn't know which step he had, but Chen Mo had already been able to get out of the game with a training ball attack that surpassed the speed of sound.

Oh...

On the training ground, the training ball near Chen Mo's body was opened. The training field was filled with the popping sound of the collision. It was the sound of the armor fist colliding with the training ball, and the sound of the training ball and the armor speed surpassing the speed of sound.

Chen Mo's spirit has never been concentrated before, and the body is constantly twisting. If the speed is slowed down, it can be seen that the training ball is almost wiped from him, and the other ones are all opened by Chen Mo.

Multi-purpose, you need to guard against training ball attacks from multiple directions.

The training mode of the training field can be modified with the trainer. Now it is the highest difficulty purple-level dodge plus attack training mode in the training field. In the training field, this close-up training mode is called **** mode.

This training mode, the training ball attack is completely random, the training ball is rubbed around, when you think it has been dodged, it may suddenly turn, without any flight track rules, so you want to dodge by inertia and rules ,Totally impossible.

The high concentration of the spirit, coupled with the rapid response of the body, the load on the body is very large, without strong physical fitness, it is impossible to make such terrible attacks and dodge frequencies.

Chen Mo's body has evolved, and the speed of response and physical strength have already surpassed ordinary people, but this training mode is still very hard.

Suddenly, Chen Mo felt that the brain was clearer. The training ball that attacked him slowly became slow in Chen Mi's eyes. The moment he saw the training ball, it seemed as if a trajectory appeared in Chen Mo's mind.

Everything becomes clear.

The brain's response speed and information processing capabilities are faster.

Chen Mo’s movements are much faster, and the coordination of hands and feet has become more convenient.

On the training ground, there is only one body that is lightning fast, and the sound of sound is spread throughout the training ground.

Under the height of mental and physical concentration, Chen Mocai stopped for three hours. The rest area of the training ground where the armor flew back, took off the armor, and Chen Mo was just like fishing from the water.

One of the benefits of ultra-high-intensity training is adaptability. Now Chen Mo has fully adapted to the 'free ants'.

If other war divisions know that Chen Mo has adapted to a new armor in just a few hours, he will definitely be shocked by the chin. This speed is beyond imagination.

Even the top warrior, if you want to fit a completely new armor, will take at least one day or more.

Sitting in the rest area, Chen Mo replenished his energy while thinking about the training.

Looking at things around now, everything becomes very slow, so slow that he can easily calculate the original flight path of the training ball in his mind, and everything is only in a short moment.

Resting for half an hour, restoring physical strength, Chen Mo once again put on the armor and put into high-intensity training.

No coach.

Chen Mo is completely trained in a fighting style, the opponent is himself.

In the following month, Chen Mo was completely immersed in the ultra-high-intensity training. The performance of the ‘free 黒 ant’ was very strong, and it could satisfy any training of his strength, and it was important to develop the fighting style and style of the armor.

At the beginning of the design of ‘free ants, it was determined that its opponent was a three-eyed civilization.

Chen Mo does not know his own strength. He is in the level of the three-eyed civil warrior. There is no warrior to give him a comparison and no opponent. He can only force himself to make progress and explode the potential of the body and the brain.

The training ball flashed through the training ground. In the eyes of others, there was only a very short time of a few tenths of a second, but for the combatant in combat, the life and death of the divisional division can be determined in a flash.

On the earth, Chen Mo never thought about one day, so longing for personal force. Chen Mo did not expect it before, his personal strength can be so powerful.

......

As usual, Chen Mo was in the repair shop in Cana.

The medicine that was made in the laboratory of Kas received the box, and Chen Mo sighed and held another prepared box to the front of Jia.

Today is the last day of the repair shop in Cana.

Chen Mo was very rare to sit opposite Jia, and took a drink from the drink that Jia often drank. It was a bit sweet, and Chen Mo’s taste was not too good.

For a few months, Chen Mo is still not used to this taste.

Jia glanced at the box that Chen Mo took over, and did not open it. Some emotions: "I remember that when you first came, you said that you had to apply for an apprentice. The result was such a good armored division."

"At the time I arrived, I needed a window to understand the planet."

"You are the most powerful class I have ever seen in centuries. I didn't expect that a technical apprentice would be so powerful." Jia laughed.

"This is my property and other assets in Qingshuixing. I will give you the money after I leave."

Chen Mo patted the box and pushed it to the front of Jia.

"Decision?" Jia did not take the box, and looked straight into Chen Mo.

"Decision." Chen Mo nodded.

"I didn't expect this day to come so fast. I thought that my old bones would leave first. You sent me, but I didn't expect it." Jia smiled: "In the way of your hometown, how to say goodbye."

"Drinking, a drink containing ethanol, clink a cup and wish goodbye."

"Qing Shui Xing does not seem to be the kind of drink, I will replace it with this drink." Jia took up his own drink cup: "By the way, don't come back."

The two are like two prisoners in prison. One day, one of them is going to leave.

"Thank you."

Chen Mo touched the cup and Jia, and the little beast on the table also picked up the cup and held it and touched them.

After drinking the other drinks, Chen Mo put on the armor and took the little beast away from the repair shop.

Looking at Chen Mo's back, Jia sighed, he knew that Chen Mo's turn was a farewell. Whether Chen Mo succeeded or failed, it was impossible to come back.

Although Chen and Chen defaulted to a few months, but the two were also good friends, did not expect to leave so sudden.

Back to his house, Chen Mo began to prepare.

Escape must be lightly loaded, and he needs to be ready. At the beginning of today, he will wait for the arrival of the three-eyed civilization ship, and flee with the help of a three-eyed spaceship.

Prepare all the required items, and open the armor of Chen Mo's arm, revealing the identity wristwatch when you first entered Qingshuixing, pinch your finger on the wristwatch and press it gently.

Snapped! !

A clear sound, the wrist broke open, and turned into a mass in the hands of Chen Mo.

In order to crush this wristwatch, he began to prepare from the arrival of Qing Shuixing, and finally crushed today, like opening the shackles that are imprisoned on him.

chapters.title: Chapter 775: :Special Number 777
chapters.body:
Chapter 775: :Special Number 777

Drops...

A sudden alarm sounded suddenly and alerted the entire monitoring room. This kind of seldom appears, I did not expect to appear on this section of the bone.

"what happened?"

Sanya looked at the assistant next to him.

This alarm sound is that Qing Shuixing has an important research body to get rid of the wrist device.

The wristwatch attached to the life of Qing Shuixing, in addition to identifying identity, has a role in collecting genetic information. The wristwatch can detect genetic changes in the living body and then pass the genetic information back to the laboratory through the quantum light brain of Qing Shuixing.

Their labs can monitor the genetic changes of each of Qingshui's life wearing wristwatches in real time, and they will receive information whenever there is significant genetic evolution or mutation.

Similarly, once someone removes the wristwatch, or if a living body dies, it can receive information.

Among those living individuals, there are some important monitoring objects, which are the living bodies that they think are most likely to undergo major evolution.

"The wrist of the special number 777 was destroyed."

Hearing this number, Sanya has a trip.

He is most familiar with this number, but Professor Torrel has one of several numbers that they pay special attention to.

I have been monitoring it before. Later, after the Ziwei civilization closed the planetary monitoring system there, there was no way to monitor it.

The wrist instrument was destroyed, not the disappearance of vital signs, but it also shows that he has problems. Now Qing Shuixing is still in the occupation of blue blood civilization, they can not go to Qing Shuixing, confirm the state of Chen Mo.

"You continue to monitor, I contact Professor Torrell."

Sanya left the base's monitoring room and immediately dialed Torrell's contact number.

......

"The wrist number of the special number 777 was destroyed?" Torrell heard the news, his face was not good, and Qing Shuixing had temporarily left the surveillance area. He did not know what happened.

Hanging up the phone, Torrell left his home and rushed to the experimental base.

On the way, he was still thinking about the special number 777.

He has always attached great importance to the individual Chen Mo, but the Ziwei civilization interrupted the monitoring system of that area, and now it is occupied by the blue blood civilization, and he is in a hurry and useless.

Now Sanya came to tell him that Chen Mo’s wrist watch was destroyed.

Not death, the wrist device was suddenly destroyed.

He clearly remembers that when Chen Mo was arrested, Chen Mo was unyielding. Under the circumstance of science and technology, the hard-worn ruined the arrester and took a lot of effort to catch it. The life has high wisdom and will never yield to being captive.

For thousands of years, Qing Shuixing’s spacecraft technology has been unable to grow under their limits. The Qingshui space deploys space-based weapons defense, and the low-level life of the planet cannot escape. They never want to escape from the life of Qing Shuixing.

Now think about it, the only possibility is that Chen Mo wants to ruin the wristwatch and escape their control.

If it was before, he would let the team members go back to Qing Shuixing and regain it. But now, the space field that Qingshui belongs to is occupied by the blue blood civilization.

A pioneer of a red civilization, wisdom and physique, it is rare, and the blood is special.

Thinking of Chen Mo's blood, Torrell suddenly froze.

He ignored one of the most important things. Chen Mo's blood is not yellow, it is golden. The yellow life is only a little higher than the red life, but it is not much different, but the gold is unprecedented.

Thinking of a possibility, Torrell hurriedly took out the communicator and dialed the number of the lab assistant.

In the few seconds waiting to be connected, Torrell, who has always been calm, is not calm. When the other party is connected, a holographic projection pops up in front of him. The projection is a three-eyed person with the same shape and three eyes.

"Professor, what's the matter?" He is the assistant and student of Torrell.

"You check the genetic information of number 777."

"okay."

Sancha did not dare to neglect, immediately ran to the front of the brain, transferred the information, and quickly found the required documents.

"Tanning they made a report." Sanchao glanced at the report.

"Talk."

"His genetic information was not confirmed, and the test results were different every time. Our team performed 8 analyses on the number 777 individual genes, each time the results were different, and the analysis results were very different.

At first we thought it was an instrument problem, and we changed the two genetic analysis instruments for analysis, and the results were different. We believe that it may be the internal cause of the 777 individual. After many inspections, no problems were found. So we suspect that there may be a factor in the genetic material that interferes with genetic analysis. We have used a variety of methods, and we have not found such a factor that affects gene detection. ”

“Is there any other report?”

“Shenzhen also conducted a somatic embryo cloning experiment, but it has not been successful, and the report is also there.”

Sancha has already noticed the professor's anger, struggled to swallow and began to read the conclusions of the report.

This super artificial intelligence is designed using the procedural language of the Universe Alliance. There is no quantum consciousness of the ink girl, just a simple artificial intelligence.

There is no earth's development tools and input methods here, and Chen Mo can't re-do all the earth's computer foundation. Therefore, according to local conditions, using the procedural language of the Universe Alliance, when you access the core of the ink girl in the future, you can make the ink girl seamlessly over and over, and instantly master the algorithm language algorithm of the Universe Alliance.

The reason why she called the ink girl No. 2 is that Chen Mo has already called the ink woman a habit. In his past studies, the ink girl was by his side.

"Mergo, hello." The holographic image of the ink girl showed a smile: "I am very happy to serve you."

Seeing the appearance of the ink girl, Chen Mo feels very intimate, and it is rare to show a smile.

"Ink girl, control the spacecraft system, learn all the information in the spacecraft system." Chen Mo will press the palm of the hand on the biometric identification button to grant the highest authority of the ink girl 2.

"Mergo, machine learning has been completed."

"Control all the robots and weapons in the spacecraft," Chen Mo said.

"The control has been completed."

"The inspection was completed and no unknown authorized location was found."

"Start the defense mode and turn off the spacecraft's positioning system."

Confirming that Momei 2 successfully controlled the spacecraft, Chen Mo focused on the three-eyed person who was captured. A total of 54 people, including spacecraft drivers.

All three-eyed armor has been unloaded, and Chen Mo is locked in the trap with electric locks. He does not have any threats now.

Torrell did not expect that the capture device used to capture Chen Mo became their place of residence.

Chen Mo walked to Torrel. He recognized Torrell. He woke up and saw him on the spacecraft once, that is, he asked Sanya to send himself to Qing Shuixing.

Taking out a syringe from the box, Chen Mo ignored the fear of Torrell and plunged into the root of his neck.

"What did you inject to me? Didn't you say that you wouldn't kill us?" Torrell's voice was not calm, with fear.

"Don't worry, this is a potion, really a potion." Chen Moping said lightly.

This is a recipe from the technology library. In his box, there are hypnotics, amnesia, deformed agents, nano-robots, etc., all of which are partial doors.

Within Chen Mo’s plan, he was prepared to let the unconsciously hitchhikers leave Qing Shuixing, but there was a change, and he had to use force, which eventually led to the current situation.

Seeing Torrel's look began, Chen Mo began to ask.

"Where is the coordinates of my hometown?"

"In the Rania Kea super galaxies, the specific spatial coordinates are not recorded here. It is necessary to retrieve the records I have examined before the space coordinates are recorded, but my investigation records are in the origin city laboratory." Torrell said truthfully. .

Chen Mo looked depressed, and the most unwanted thing happened. There is no earth's coordinates.

"Where is the approximate location?" Chen Mo transferred the cosmic star map loaded by the spacecraft and placed it in front of Torre.

"it's here."

Torrell pointed to a small point on the huge star map.

"The Rania Kea Super Galaxy, which has a range of more than 500 million light years, the origin city to the Rania Kea super galaxies, needs to make a space jump of 8 billion light-year units, spanning about 4.3 billion light years. Here, you must rent a large space curvature spacecraft."

"4.3 billion light years."

This distance spans Chen Mo’s heart. What Torrel said is the time of the origin city. The definition of the origin city time is about twice that of the earth. The distance of 4.3 billion light-years here is equivalent to more than 8 billion light-years defined by the Earth.

"Which location is the Rania Kea Super Galaxy?"

"This position." Torrell did not dare to conceal: "Virgo."

After several inquiries, Chen Mo quickly confirmed the approximate location of Orion. Here, Chen Mo has confirmed where the approximate location of the Earth is.

“Where is there danger on the way?”

"The Rania Kea Super Galaxy is called the paradise of life. There is another name, the **** of life. The name is different and the meaning is similar. The space environment and the cosmic environment there are so bad that the life planet and civilization cannot develop for a long time. There has never been a high-level civilization there, and there are few natural space jumps, and space jumps are unstable, and few teams will go there. Our investigation was almost inhaled into the space vortex."

Torrell opened without any concealment.

“How to rent a super-light speed spacecraft?”

“The universe port of the origin city can be rented, and many military warships are equipped with a super-light speed curvature engine.”

"You went to Qingshui City this time, what are you going to do?"

"Catch you." Torrell answered truthfully, his expression was fearful, but the brain was always uncontrollable to tell the truth.

really.

Chen Mo initially suspected that this was for him. He did not expect it to be as he expected. The three-eyed person came to arrest him. The emergence of the free person was just an accident, and all the plans of both sides were disrupted.

"Why catch me?"

"We suspect that you are an advanced life of evolution and may be more advanced than our life form, which is helpful for our research."

Chen Mo’s hole shrinks.

After asking a few questions, Chen Mocai will stop and close the star map. He has some headaches.

At a distance of 8 billion light-years from the Earth, there are various unknown dangers on the way. And the super-light speed spacecraft, I am afraid it is not as easy to obtain as I imagined, and now I can only step by step.

However, Chen Mo confirmed that the origin city was jointly controlled by several high-level civilizations, and it was not a single-eye civilization. The coordinates of the earth are still in the hands of the three-eyed civilization. If Torrere and others are put back, it may be dangerous to the earth.

He needs to make an illusion, a free man resisting, capturing the illusion of a spaceship, letting the attention of the three-eyed civilization on the free agent and freeing himself from this matter. No one has seen his face, Qingshui City has been destroyed so badly that the three-eyed civilization must have thought that he was dead, and no one will hold on to his research. And if Torrell is dead, his research will be put on hold for a long time.

Sanya saw Chen Mo took out a box of pharmacy, and there was a bad foreboding. He regretted surrendering a bit.

"You said that you will not kill us."

"This is an amnesia drug, a neurological agent that can make people lose some memory. After you wake up, you will forget what happened within seven days." Chen Mo calmly and handed the syringe to the robot.

"I don't believe it." Sanya stared at Chen Mo.

"Do you believe that I have nothing to do with me, after the injection is completed, throw them into space." Chen Mo finished, turned and left.

The rush around me kept up with Chen Mo and didn't dare to stay here for a while. What Chen Mo said, naturally there are robots to perform.

Returning to the spacecraft control room, Chen Mo transferred the navigation route of the spacecraft.

The star speed routes of the light speed spacecraft are all explored and developed, and there are no obstacles on the route, which is stable and safe. If it is on a non-development route, unless the space jumps, the spacecraft may hit the stars and stars along the route at the speed of light or super-light. This kind of accident is not rare in the universe.

There are many routes to the origin city, and there are several routes to the star field adjacent to the origin city.

The flying ship he now grabs has a speed of light, a curvature engine without space to jump, and wanting to go home for more than eight billion years is simply impossible.

Thinking over and over again, Chen Mo chose a route to leave the original city.

After all, the origin city has three forces of civilization, the risk is not small, in order to avoid the exposure of the three-eyed civilization, he can go to other galaxies, and then find ways to get the super-light speed ship from other galaxies and return to the earth.

chapters.title: Chapter 784: : Spatial Turbulence
chapters.body:
Chapter 784: : Spatial Turbulence

The three questions are very annoyed now. In front of the ruins of Qingshui City, there is a wreck on the ground after the explosion of a spaceship. The sign of the three-eye civilization is still in a semi-coke state. The smoke has not been exhausted, and the body is wearing body armor everywhere.

Needless to know, there was a big fight here.

"The prince, who caught the low-level life of Qing Shuixing, asked. The freeman attacked the spaceship and finally hijacked the spacecraft." One of his men stopped wearing the armor and stopped at the three questions, and said quickly.

"Freedom? Impossible." The first reaction to the three questions is this.

Qingshui’s lower life rebellion, robbery of the spaceship, Professor Torrel and others missing?

This argument is like ridiculously hearing a group of armed men with guns and cages, driving to capture the monkeys, and then letting the monkeys rob the car.

Their level of life is several levels higher than the red civilization. The life of Qing Shui Xing is the monkey group they have captured in the experimental area. Now this kind of thing has happened.

Although the ridiculous things of the anecdotes are everywhere in the universe, they first happened to them.

"This is the battle video captured by Qingshui City's lower life."

Click on the player to adjust the battle screen to the third question. It is the scene of the freeman attacking the spaceship. Not long after, the third question noticed that Sanya was captured by a mysterious armor.

"A good and powerful warrior, is this a level armor?"

Three questions saw the video of Chen Mo’s ban on Sanya, and it was shocked.

靛-level armor, more advanced than the blue level armor. The blue-level armor is already the best armor in the origin city. Only the master of the military, the senior armored division will be equipped.

Only the class-level armor usually appears in the class-level civilization, the top-level armor, equipped with weapons can destroy the entire origin city. Now suddenly there is such a terrible armor in Qing Shuixing, which makes him feel incredible.

"Where is the strange armor of Qing Shuixing?"

Three questions have already focused on this set of armor. If this set of armor can be obtained by the three-eye civilization, they can create a top-ranking warrior in the origin city.

When asked, several soldiers under his face looked at each other and finally shook their heads.

They also felt incredible when they heard the level armor. They only heard about it. Now it is the first time to see it, or it appears on an ordinary small planet.

“Is it related to the Ziwei civilization?” one of his men carefully reminded.

What they can think of is the Ziwei civilization that came over from time ago. For them, the level armor is unattainable. For the Ziwei civilization, it is a bad street.

When asked about the pupils, he suddenly remembered that when the last Ziwei civilization came over, he landed on Qing Shuixing.

Was it the armor left at that time?

If so, why should Ziwei civilization help free people to leave? You know, for the Ziwei civilization, the low-level life of Qing Shuixing is like a worm.

When the Ziwei civilization destroyed several planets and tens of billions of low-level lives died, they did not even say a word.

"Do not let this matter happen." Three questions reminded the next to the man, turned and left.

"Ziwei civilization?"

Three-eyed civilization palace, three-eyed king looked at the video into meditation.

From the perspective of the armor, it should be the Assassin's armor, which is definitely not the origin of the city. If the civilization of the origin city has a set of such armor, it is quite a top assassin warrior.

According to the speculation of the three questions, Ziwei civilization blocked the area and went up to the Green Mercury. The only possibility is that this set of armor is related to the Ziwei civilization.

As for why the Ziwei civilization left a level armor in Qingshui, they are not known.

"Is this thing still not checked?"

"Where do you know where the spacecraft they snatched went?" The three-eyed king frowned.

"I didn't find it for a while, they closed the spacecraft positioning device, and we didn't know where they were going." Three asked to shake their heads. The space is too wide, the coordinates are different, and the direction of travel is different. The light speed spacecraft can escape any blow.

"Don't check it first." said the three-eyed king.

If it involves the affairs of the Ziwei civilization, they will check it out and it will be no different from finding death.

Chen Mo never imagined that the three-eyed civilization would think of things to the Ziwei civilization and give up the deep investigation.

At this time, Chen Mo is on the spaceship, and is traveling at the speed of light to another galaxy adjacent to the origin galaxies, the Ami Galaxy. This galaxy has a light-moon distance from the origin of the galaxy.

On the spaceship, there were only Chen Mohe and the two, and the little mother who was not killed by the dead.

The three-eyed civil warrior has been thrown into space. The medicines given to them are not amnesia, but a toxin. Now the three-eyed civil warrior and spacecraft driver have been thrown into space, and there will be no possibility of living after the poison.

From the beginning, he did not intend to let go of the three-eyed warrior.

He is not the Virgin, this civilization that brought him from the earth here, is doomed to hatred between the two sides.

What kind of system is the Universe Alliance? Chen Mo is not completely understood yet, but it can be confirmed that the Universe Alliance should be the same as the United Nations on Earth, maintain the balance of the universe, and avoid the complete disorder of the struggle of species in the universe.

The universe spans nearly 100 billion light years, and this system is too big.

It is impossible for the earth's civilization to stay out of the way. Human beings must integrate into this cosmic system. They don't know whether it is a good thing or a bad thing. Step by step, the destruction of the entire human civilization is possible.

More than 8 billion light years of road, a difficult journey.

Now the spacecraft cruises at the speed of light, and the next time is only waiting. This is the benefit of a super-light speed spacecraft. The super-light-speed space curvature spacecraft spans a galaxy and only takes a few hours, while the speed of light spacecraft takes a month.

Like the solar system, where the surrounding galaxies are scarce, it takes several years to travel to other galaxies.

It is no problem to determine the route and equipment of the spacecraft. Chen Mo is involved in the research.

He never gave up research, even when it was a combat training. The technology of the science and technology library is his greatest advantage. Now that I realize the cruelty of the Universe Alliance, Chen Mo is more determined to develop technology quickly.

He was fortunate that the spacecraft that he snatched had a lot of research equipment from the Torrel team and three research facilities that were civilized to meet his needs, especially the nano-level 3D printer.

Yongzheng played with the little mother beast and did not dare to disturb him. After seeing this little mother beast, this female alien liked it. Sure enough, the trick of sprouting the dead is universal in the universe.

"Momo~~??"

The little mother who was arrogantly bouncing on her chest suddenly stopped, her ears kept moving, and she stood up and began to look around. The next moment, the clean eyelids suddenly rushed, jumped from the sly chest, and jumped a few times, and jumped to Chen Mo's shoulder.

"Mo Mo Mo ~~"

“What?” Chen Mo stopped his research and was curious to see the little mother who danced to the ground.

"Mo Mo Mo ~~~"

The little mother jumped to Chen Mo's workbench. The little paws began to draw, pointed to the window of the spaceship, painted a circle, and then gave her little face a paw, spit her tongue down on the table, looks very cute.

"Is there a hole? Is it dangerous?" Chen Mo stunned.

The last time in Qing Shuixing, the little mother beg gave him a plan, but he made a hole, but there is no back.

"Mo Mo Mo! Mo Mo."

The little mother nodded and hurried to the egg-shaped armor that Chen Mo gave it, and the small body got in.

"Hey, wearing a armor, it can be dangerous."

Chen Mochao shouted, and he also put on the "free ants". The last time the little mother took him to find the wreckage of the armor, only to make him so easy to escape from the Qing Shuixing, he knew that this little mother may have something special.

"Can't you stop the spacecraft?" Chen Mo looked at the little mother.

"Momo~~" The little mother beasted her paw and jumped directly to Chen Mo's armor.

"Can't you slow down?"

"Momo!" The little mother animal shook her little claws and let him not slow down.

Oh...

The strange screams appeared, let Chen Mo sneak, this is not from the outside of the spacecraft, but echoed in the ear, like the surrounding space is screaming, the armor wants to reduce this sound is impossible.

The screams of the space appeared, Chen Mo began to calm down, and his sights seemed to be erratic, like the wilderness in the summer, the slight fluctuations.

This kind of appearance, Chen Mo is also seen in space for the first time, like the space is boiled, layer by layer.

"Drips."

The warning light of the spacecraft began to flash, and the alarm sound was also rushing.

"The spacecraft encounters a turbulent space. Please fix your body in position, keep the speed of light cruising, and don't slow down."

"The spacecraft encounters a turbulent space. Please fix your body in position, keep the speed of light cruising, and don't slow down."

"..."

The light-speed spacecraft encounters spatial turbulence in the space route. Just like the high air current encountered by the earth plane, most of them can pass safely. Fortunately, the machine is destroyed.

A sense of vibration of a magnitude 10 earthquake has emerged and is growing stronger.

Chen Mo was nervous, feeling that his body was sore and his hair was bursting, like the space was tearing his body. He tried the airflow, but the light speed spacecraft encountered space turbulence. For the first time, he did not know how to intervene.

The first time the speed of light traveled, this space turbulence occurred with such a small probability. Chen Mo did not know that he said that he was lucky, but he was still unlucky.

"Mo Mo Mo!"

The little mother also became anxious, loosening Chen Mo, ran to the position of his armor's weapon and kept typing, pointing at the things inside.

"What are you looking for?" Chen Mo transferred the weapons inside, that is, the dozens of ultra-high-energy beads, and the liquid suspected of red matter.

"foam!"

The little mother pointed at the liquid of the red substance and looked at Chen Mo anxiously.

"use this?"

"Mo!" The little mother kept nodding.

"Is it used here outside?" Chen Mo has already obtained the material of red matter. If this thing is really red, maintaining a black hole for a few seconds is enough to tear him.

"Momo!"

The little mother pointed at the window of the spaceship.

"it is good."

Chen Mo does not have a better way now. He only hopes that this special little beast will do the right thing. Enduring the violent vibration and the tearing of the body, Chen Mo swayed to the release compartment and started the device with the red substance and threw it into the mouth.

chapters.title: Chapter 785: :Unknown Space
chapters.body:
Chapter 785: :Unknown Space

"Purple rhyme, three eyes of civilization to get this." Zeqi put the video frequency in front of the purple rhyme, looking at her gaze, full of love, but unfortunately Ziyun did not look at him from beginning to end.

The video frequency played by Zeqi is the picture of Qing Shui, Chen Mo’s captive Sanya.

Purple rhyme a purple long skirt, skirt with a touch of fluorescence, with purple fluorescent skin, very beautiful. At this time, Ziyun looked cold and looked at the shadow of the micro-microwave to restore the plain.

"This is the cat's armor."

Her voice was very cold, so that Zeqi and others around could not help but jump and jump.

"Will they be a group?"

Thinking of the cat head, Zech was very upset.

The door to the small universe has already been opened. As a result, the cat's headman has been shut down with a drop of red matter. Until now, they have not found out which force they are doing. Ziyun was also punished by Ziweixing because of the failure of the mission. This time I don't know what punishment to accept.

"This warrior is very weak, not a complete assassin style." Purple rhyme is as cold as ever: "Do you know the identity of this warrior?"

"For the time being, it is unclear. The video is happening on the small planet we have been to. The low-level life that was captive of the three-eyed civilization rebelled and robbed the three-eyed civilization of the spacecraft to escape. This armored division did not show up, but He grabbed one of the ships."

"Look at the spaceship where the three-eye civilization was robbed, and look for it along this clue."

When Ziyun finished, he set his sights on his own affairs.

"Can the punishment of Ziweixing not be canceled?" Zeqi asked with a bite.

"The task is to be punished for failure. This is the rule. There are no exceptions, including me. This is the decision of the star owner." Ziyun calmly shook his head.

"But to accept the punishment of the black hole level, will it be too heavy? Maybe it will die."

Purple rhyme paused, and the coldness of the year is unchanged: "I lost a small universe. No punishment can be overstated. It is the same for other people, and I don't necessarily die."

Seeing the purple rhyme is still the same cold and calm, Zeqi is anxious, and finally can only sigh. The only way now is to find the forces behind the cat head, and maybe the star will cancel the punishment for the purple rhyme.

......

The turbulence of space has passed. The spacecraft stopped flying and was floating freely in space.
