Just after driving at the speed of light in the turbulent space of space, Chen Mo did not know what happened after the red matter was started. Behind the space turbulence disappeared, the vibration disappeared, and his spaceship was safe.

It’s just that the speed cruise of the spacecraft stops automatically, and it seems that something is wrong.

Chen Mo got up from the control chair, the muscles on his body were a little painful, and the effect of the space tearing should be very uncomfortable. It was much more exciting than the aircraft flying on the earth.

Looking around for a week, hundreds of square cockpits, the instruments are intact. Soon, Chen Mo’s mood is not good.

The light speed engine has failed.

Does the house leak in the rain? Chen Mo hurriedly called up the engine's data.

In interplanetary navigation, the speed of light engine fails, just as the ship is sailing in the sea and the engine is damaged. If there is no rescue, you can only drift in the space and wait for death. The vast and innocent universe, wanting to cross, the minimum requirement is to sail at the speed of light, otherwise it is a waste of life.

Soon, Chen Mo found the fault location of the speed of light engine. The commonly used parts were damaged and damaged. It was not a serious fault. The spacecraft's maintenance compartment had spare parts, but the repair took a little time.

Confirm that the speed of light engine can be repaired, Chen Mo completely relieved, and if it is not repaired, he probably will finish playing.

He got up from the spaceship's chair and removed the armor. It looked weak.

She is a red-level life and her physical fitness is not strong. The tearing of the space turbulence completely ignores the armor's blockage, and there is no hole in it. She can't easily deal with the tearing of space fluctuations like Chen Mo.

Pulling out the clothes, from the shoulders to the arms, the whale-like smooth skin is covered with bruises, smoldering a lot of blood bubbles, and there is a skin tear on the back, blood flow.

This is the injury caused by the shock of the space, while other body tissues and internal organs are still uncertain about the injury.

"How?" Chen Mo looked at him.

"It hurts, the internal organs may be damaged, and you need to go to the medical room." 泷玥 Some weakness said.

"I will take you there."

Chen Mo helped to enter the medical room, opened a medical cabin, and put the donkey in. The equipment of the spacecraft is neat, and the liquid in these medical compartments can quickly repair the damage of the body. As long as it is not brain death, other injuries can be repaired.

When settled down, Chen Mo left the little mother. This soft and cute little mother has set up two merits, which is a great hero. Chen Mo does not know its specific special skills.

"Ink girl, look at the current space coordinates."

The speed of light cruise stops automatically, it has been determined to deviate from the original route, and the current position must be reconfirmed before proceeding. And the speed of light engine is faulty, things are a bit troublesome, and it may take time.

"Unable to determine spatial coordinates."

"Unable to determine? Is the radar malfunctioning?"

"No, it is impossible to detect the marked pulsar."

Chen Mo’s hole shrinks and realizes the seriousness of the problem.

Cosmic interstellar routes, using pulsars as markers to locate navigational beacons, can determine the specific location as long as they detect the position of the pulsar.

In the data of the spacecraft, Chen Mo has learned that the pulsar coordinates of the space navigation are derived from the statistics of the universe civilization in the past hundreds of millions of years. Finally, the seven god-level civilizations are unified and recorded in the star map of the universe.

Except for some unexplored hazardous areas, most of the places have marked pulsars. But now that no pulsars are detected, it means that the coordinates cannot be determined.

Could it be that the turbulence of space brought him to an unexplored universe?

If this is the case, if you are in trouble, and you are not sure where to go, he does not know how to go out. There is no southeast or northwest in space. And even a light speed spacecraft, in this unknown area, does not know how many years to leave.

After all, thousands of years, for the universe, it is not very long, but for Chen Mo, it is too late.

"Do you know where we are now?"

After calming down, Chen Mo put the little mother on the console.

"Mo Mo Mo ~" The little mother began to draw up, drew a circle and jumped in, and then looked straight into Chen Mo.

"We are inside the cave?" Chen Moyi asked, curious. The hole that he understands as a little mother beast should be a turbulent stream of space. It should be flowed by space to an unknown area.

"Moo." The little mother nodded.

"How come?" Chen Mo asked.

"Mo Mo Mo!" The little mother moved her head.

Uh?

This time, Chen Mo has a headache. It seems that he is entering an unknown space. How to leave depends on himself.

"Ink girl, start the detection radar and see if there is a life planet nearby, preferably an oxygen-rich planet." Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

Soon, the ink girl gave a reply.

"Detected coordinates: 5452682, -265235, 685523, with an unknown oxygen-rich life planet."

"Just go there."

Chen Mo took the picture and took a look at it. A blue-green planet, the detected data is a terrestrial planet, which is more than twice as large as the Earth. As for other data, it is unknown.

"The main engine is faulty, can't fly, is it starting the standby engine?" asked the ink girl.

The standby engine can't accelerate to the speed of light in a short time, and it can't maintain the speed of light cruise. It can only speed up the spacecraft to make the speed of the spacecraft increase. It is relatively slow, but it is enough as a backup.

"start up."

“The standby engine starts, the voyage begins, and the destination can be reached after 14 days.”

chapters.title: Chapter 786: : Five Times The Gravity Of The Planet
chapters.body:
Chapter 786: : Five Times The Gravity Of The Planet

Fourteen days, during this time, Chen Mo is learning the maintenance skills of the speed of light engine.

The principle of the light speed engine, Chen Mo has the theoretical support of the science and technology library, plus the maintenance instructions and maintenance robot assistance on the spacecraft, it is not difficult to learn.

For Chen Mo, he needs to prepare various technologies, and this time is easy to pass.

On the way, Chen Mo constantly let the spacecraft's radar detect, but the pulsar is detected, all of which are unmarked pulsars, and the position cannot be confirmed.

Chen Mo used quantum communication to connect with the outside world, but could not lock his position. Without enough stars, other civilizations and rescue groups would not come to help him.

The most important thing is that Chen Mo did not dare to release the position of the spacecraft, fearing that the three-eyed civilization would find him.

"Mergo, has entered the orbit of the planet, ready to land." The reminder of the ink girl, let Chen Mo stop the work in his hands.

The star system they came to is a small star system that is ten times larger than the Earth's sun. The planet they want to land, the fifth planet of the technology star, is located in the livable zone, suitable for life and survival.

Just arrived at the control cabin of the spacecraft, Chen Mo saw that Yongzheng and the little mother beast were playing in the boredom.

After the treatment of the medical cabin, the injury has been restored. This female alien, after starting to excite the space, went to the gravity-free warehouse to experience several weightlessness, and then slowly quieted and began to learn various instructions of the spacecraft.

The long journey of space is a test of the spirit of any life, let alone such untrained people.

Seeing Chen Mo appear, he is very excited to hurry to hold the little mother.

Now on the spaceship, only she and Chen Mo, there is a cute little pet. After getting along with this time, she has already touched Chen Mo's temper. A man with a good temper, calm and confident, not as difficult to get along as you think.

She also tempted Chen Mo twice, and the results ended in failure. Chen Mo did not take her sex.

In Qing Shuixing, cross-racial exchanges are not unusual, very common, and there is no such thing as monogamy. There is no jealousy, but Chen Mo is not interested in her. The first time I tempted a man, the result was such an ending, which made her feel very unsuccessful.

"You are coming." He looked forward to Chen Mo.

When Chen Mo studied, she didn't find a word. Moreover, when Chen Mo studied, she did not understand those things, and did not dare to disturb Chen Mo.

"Get down soon."

Chen Mo walked to the window of the spaceship. There was a blue-green planet outside the window. It looked very thick and beautiful.

The 'moon' locked by the tide of the planet is red, like the **** moon, very strange, not sure whether it is rich in iron. Chen Mo did not see satellites, nor did he have signs of a reinforced concrete city, like a primitive planet.

"Beautiful?" Chen Mo asked.

"Beautiful." Looking at the eyes, some expectation, she is the first time to leave Qing Shuixing, landing on other planets, in the past, this is not to think about it.

Losing the stable life of Qing Shuixing, she now has a layer of shackles on her body, and her mentality is quietly changing.

"Mergo, the gravity of this planet is five times the standard you set." When the preparations entered the atmosphere, the ink girl reminded.

Chen Mo set the gravity of the spacecraft to be based on the gravity of the Earth. The gravity of Qingshui is more than twice that of the Earth, and the gravity of this planet is five times that of the Earth.

A hundred pounds of people stood up and increased the load of four hundred pounds. If the physical quality is not good, it will not last long.

"After landing, I will open the anti-gravity system of the spacecraft and adjust the gravity inside the spacecraft. You should stay in the spacecraft and don't go out. When you slowly practice to adapt to the gravity of the planet, then leave the spacecraft." Chen Mozhen said.

"Okay." He nodded.

She naturally understands the gravity of Chen Mo.

Entering the atmosphere, as the land slowly descends, the gravity of the planet will soon be sensed on the spacecraft. Chen Mo let the ink female No. 2 adjust the gravity system of the spacecraft to maintain the gravity of the spacecraft and a level of Qing Shuixing.

Chen Mo chose to land the spacecraft in a plain surrounded by mountains on three sides.

Five kilometers away, there is a large river into the sea. Two kilometers away is a mountain forest. The front is the sea. If there are animals on this planet, it should be active in this river and sea. This is the place with the most food.

“What about the outside atmosphere and soil environment?” Chen Mo said.

“Atmospheric toxic gas content is in a safe range. The soil contains a variety of harmful bacteria, the toxicity is unknown, and the heavy metal content is high.” The ink girl put the test results on the light curtain.

Landing on a planet, the threat that is invisible to the naked eye is the greatest danger, because I don't know, the bacteria here are beneficial and harmful. If there are super bacteria that kill the human body, the consequences will be very serious.

After the test is completed, Chen Mo puts on the armor and opens the door of the spacecraft.

There may be other ferocious beasts here, five times the growth of the beast under the gravity, Chen Mo bare hand can not fight, can only be dealt with through the armor.

As soon as he stepped out of the spacecraft, the anti-gravity effect of the spacecraft disappeared and a force was pressed from the body.

It is not the kind that presses on the back, but the internal organs, which are pressed against each cell. Chen Mo felt that his footsteps became heavy, his chest was stuffy, his abdomen was like a stone, and when he came out, his eyes were dim.

The blood receives the influence of gravity, leaving the blood in the head to decrease. Chen Mo feels that the brain is slightly stagnant.

This feeling is uncomfortable. If ordinary humans are under such gravity, it will not be long before they will be crushed. Chen Mo's body has evolved and his body is strong. He only experienced a short period of incompatibility. After the body adjusts to gravity, the state is gradually recovering.

call! ! After recovering, Chen Mo breathed a sigh of relief.

Looking around, the plants of this planet are different from Earth and Green Star.

Blue-green plants everywhere, and the leaves of the plants exude a touch of green fluorescence. In his position, the plants are relatively short, the unknown small flowers open the plain, the small flowers on the nails, and the corresponding color of fluorescence.

The smell of the air is unclear, but the oxygen concentration of this planet is very high and life is definitely very strong.

Did not see any special creatures, Chen Mo directly opened the radar of the armor, the next moment, the life and community of the planet, clearly fell into his eyes.

......

Tie is staring at the black beast in front of him, very nervous. In the cave, Grandpa never let him out to hunt, he sneaked out to hunt. I did not expect to encounter the fiercest beast in the jungle.

He regretted not listening to his grandfather's words, thinking that he could hunt in the jungle like other fighters.

A black beast with a height of three meters, a claw to tear him apart.

And in the jungle, this black beast has almost no natural enemies. Many powerful warriors in the family came in the jungle to hunt and died under the claws of the black beast.

At this point, there was some panic, but I dared not show panic. Grandpa said that if the black beast saw the fear of prey, it would not hesitate to shred the prey.

He was thinking about how to escape, but he couldn't think of a way.

As long as he turned and walked, the black beast would leave and rush, and his speed in the jungle could not escape, and the black beast would come to the tree.

Roar! !

It seems that I saw the retreat of the extension, the black beast screamed, and the legs slammed and rushed toward him. The speed is so fast that the top of the face changes greatly, and the brain filled with danger and fear is blank, and can only instinctively jump towards the tree trunk next to it.

boom! Was swept away by the tail of the black beast, and the body was smashed and stunned. He lost his balance and hit the trunk. The javelin in his hand was released.

Finished!

Seeing the black beast rushing over to him, Tuo rushed to catch the javelin, but it was too late.

Roar! A roar, shaking the forest, the imaginary pain and bite did not appear, let the look away from the look, let go of the hand to protect the head and let go, you see an incredible scene.

chapters.title: Chapter 787: : Iron Beast?
chapters.body:
Chapter 787: : Iron Beast?

The animal in Chen Mo's hand looks like a black tiger, and there are some differences. Its claws are very sharp, like a small sickle, emitting black cold light, the baby's arm-sized fangs, like the saber-toothed tiger in the life of the earth. A pair of scarlet eyes, very cruel.

The black tiger's strength is very large. Chen Mo wears the concept of 'free cockroach ant' and has no strength, but he knows that if he does not wear the armor, the black tiger can tear him apart.

He is comparable to the physical strength of the blue-level life, and it is a little difficult in front of this black tiger.

At this time, Chen Mo, like a kitten, grabbed the black tiger's neck and lifted his fur in the air, letting the black tiger struggle and roar, indifferent.

It is not far from the spacecraft, only a few kilometers away.

Just now Chen Mo saw something from the armor radar, and came over. It happened to see the scene of the black tiger eating, but the object was a humanoid, and he saved it.

Kneeling in the trunk, with a vigilant class, a little lean, tall and only one meter five, is a short, dark red skin, fur protects the lower body, a bit like a barbarian in the movie, even if it is small, it looks very good A sense of power.

The most striking thing is his ruby-like eyes, crystal clear, and impressive at first glance.

Chen Mo determined that this is a child. The eyes are ignorant and clean. They are not available to adults and cannot be loaded.

laugh!

Chen Mo opened the tactical thorn of the ‘free 黒 ant’ and inserted the black tiger’s back neck. The black tiger, who was still struggling to bark, was silent for a moment, and his limbs were stiff in midair.

Then Chen Mo palms loose, throwing the black tiger to the side of the extension.

The black beast around him was so scared that he jumped away from the side, and he did not forget to use the javelin to scream and confirm that the black beast died. He dared to relax.

The two men are opposite each other, so they are squatting, and they are still watching the eyes of Chen Mo’s armor. They are still vigilant. The javelin is already in their hands, and Chen Mo looks at him through the armor.

There are some weird pictures in front of me.

An unknown black-red iron beast can not only fly, but also easily kill the black beast. In front of this strange armored beast, the black beast is like a small pet with no resistance at all.

The huge body of the black beast fell to his feet and motionless, giving him both the visual and the spiritual shock.

The king's black beast, known as the jungle, is as simple as a small animal in the other's hands.

Is this iron beast so powerful?

He never heard Grandpa say that there are such powerful iron beasts in the jungle and they will fly.

Extension has become more vigilant, Grandpa said, in the jungle, any beast is dangerous, and will be killed by wild beasts if you are not careful.

"Hello there."

Chen Mo spoke, using the universal language of the Universe Alliance, but responding to him is the vigilance of the extension.

In the view of extension, his voice is a kind of animal bark.

Can't understand?

Unexpectedly, the other party is the original dress, and the civilization is not completely open.

Hey! The armor opened, revealing the true face of Chen Mo wearing a tight suit, slender figure, the contour of the muscles is obvious under tight clothes, and the lines are smooth.

Seeing the true face of Chen Mo, Tuo was shocked and shocked.

Just killing the black beast is not an iron beast, but a warrior like him. Although their skin and eyes are different, they look like each other.

The vigilance in the eyes disappeared, and the eyes of Chen Mo were full of worship and gratitude. Chen Mo is not an iron beast. It is a powerful warrior. A warrior who can easily kill a black beast saves it from the black beast.

The innate worship of powerful warriors allowed Tuo to look at Chen Mo’s appearance and let his eyes shine.

"This one."

Chen Mo took out a headphone-style neuro-conscious translator from the armor and gently handed it to the extension. His movements were not too big, for fear that this kind of person thought he was malicious.

After he was hesitant to take over the translator, Chen Mo took out another translator.

"Don't wear."

Chen Mo put the translator in his ear, slowly hung it on his ear, and then pointed to the translator in his hand.

Looking at this strange thing, Tuo was somewhat hesitant, but the other party did not seem to be malicious, and saved his life. After thinking for a while, I learned the appearance of Chen Mo and put on the translator.

"Hello." After the extension of the headset, Chen Mo opened again.

Headphones convey meaning through brain wave fluctuations, so that there is no language barrier between the humanoids. Even if they do not understand the language of the Universe Alliance and the Earth, Chen Mo can communicate with each other smoothly.

I can understand Chen Mo's words, and this understanding makes Tuo look brighter.

The first time I encountered such a magical thing.

Chen Mo saw the change from his expression and knew that he understood: "What is your name?"

"Take off." Tuo said with hesitation.

"Take off? Do you know what the name of this planet is?"

"The planet?" pulled away from the look of doubt, and finally shook his head.

“Take me to see your family, right?” Chen Mo’s radar found that there were large-scale humanoid communities in the caves ten miles away. This child should be the child in the community.

"can."

Extension nodded and promised.

Because Chen Mo was not an iron beast and saved him once, he was still a powerful warrior. He had a lot less warning for Chen Mo.

"Go."

Chen Mo returned to the armor.

Cool armor, seeing the eyes shine. Going back to God, Tuo looked away from the horror of the black beast on the ground. In their community, the black beast is very precious, and the teeth of the black beast are the most powerful symbol.

In the tribe, only Jinge has the teeth of the black beast. Jingo singled out a black beast and killed the black beast. Jinge is also the most powerful warrior in the tribe.

And the fur and flesh of the black beast are very precious, this black beast is enough for them to eat for a long time.

"Want?" Chen Mo pointed at the body of the black tiger.

"Yeah." Tuo nodded without hesitation.

"Go."

Chen Mo grabbed the black-necked neck and let the extension lead the way to his tribe. The black tiger, three meters tall and nearly six meters long, left long trails on the ground, and the black blood was soaked in the soil.

On the road, Tuoba is like a curious baby, constantly looking at the armor of Chen Mo, this body armor is very cool in his opinion. The more he saw the power of the armor, his deeper worship of Chen Mo, and he knew everything about Chen Mo's problems.

Chen Mo also took this opportunity to understand the general situation of the extension of the tribe.

An original tribe, called the Manshan tribe, the grandfather of the extension is the patriarch of the tribe. The other men are mostly warriors. The most powerful warrior is Jing Ge, who can single out the black tiger.

The ability to extend the spirit is to learn from Jing Ge, although the body is small, but the speed is not weak, you can easily shuttle through the jungle.

About half an hour later, Chen Mo dragged the body of the black tiger and followed it into the scope of the tribe.

In a cave area, many wooden houses are built in front of the cave. The whole area is surrounded by trunks of more than ten meters high. The bottom is full of thorns, like a small siege.

chapters.title: Chapter 788: : Extraterrestrial Visitors
chapters.body:
Chapter 788: : Extraterrestrial Visitors

"The extension is back."

The tribal warriors saw the extension coming back and excitedly ran into one of the largest caves. Not long after, an old class leader led a group of people out and saw the excitement and ran over.

The old man who took the lead was the grandfather of the extension of the mountain. The appearance and extension were similar to those of a few, and the body was the same lean, with a gaze, more like a wise man.

When Tuoshan saw the extension, he was excited to hold him and lost the calmness of a senior. The tribe found out that he was rushing into the forest to hunt. He was in a hurry and asked several experienced people to look for it. Fortunately, he is now safe to come back.

"Is that a black beast?"

A voiceless scream shook the audience, and the words 'black beast' scared everyone. The class of talents that followed came to notice Chen Mo, who was behind him, and the prey that was dragged behind Chen Mo.

It is a black beast.

Seeing the black beast, all the warriors of the Manshan tribe became nervous, and the javelin in their hands was subconsciously clasped, and the expression was instinctively vigilant.

The fierce name of the black beast is so eloquent in the tribe. Many warriors in the tribe enter the jungle, which is under the claws of the black beast. It is the psychological shadow of the entire tribe. Now there is such a **** beast here.

"The black beast is dead, there is no danger." Seeing everyone's defense, Tuo rushed to explain.

There was another exclamation on the field.

An adult black beast is hunted, and only one person in the tribe can do it, the strongest warrior Jinge in the tribe.

Everyone looks at the man standing next to the mountain.

Standing about one meter and seventy-five, the muscles of the body do not have explosive sputum, but the sharpness and sharpness like a knife, the same kind of person as the extension, red-purple skin, the most conspicuous eyes, not ruby red, but Dark red, much darker than the eyes of other people. His eyes are cold, cold and cold, and people dare not look at each other.

He is Jinge, the most powerful warrior in the tribe. His height and size are not eye-catching, but no one dares to fight with him.

Jing Ge glanced at Chen Mo, who was wearing a battle armor. He walked to the black tiger and touched it. He opened a wound at the back of the black beast. He said coldly: "Death for a time, a fatal stroke."

"what?"

The tribes of the tribe are unbelievable.

A trick to kill the black beast requires a lot of terrible strength, even if Jinge is not possible.

At the level of extension, they all know that it is impossible to kill the black beast. The only possibility is to follow the strange iron beast.

"How did the black beast die?" Tuoshan glanced at Chen Mo, who was wearing a battle armor, and bowed his head to ask about the extension.

"It was killed by Mr. Mo."

Mr. Mo said that Chen Mo gave him the name to call himself, and that he would suffer from the black beast and finally he was saved by Chen Mo. His description was full of worship of Chen Mo.

This kind of worship, before he only mentioned Jinge, will become apparent, this time become Chen Mo.

When Chen Mo was caught and the black beast flew up, a trick was fatal, some people exclaimed, and the look of the strange ‘Iron beast’ changed. One is the gratitude to Chen Mo, and the worship of the strong.

Tuoshan heard the description of the extension, and his expression was dignified, from the beginning of the tension to the later sigh of relief. Just as I left the point, I almost died in the mouth of the black beast, but I was saved.

"Thank you for saving the extension. I am Tuoshan, the patriarch of the Manshan people. Later, you are the most respected guest of our Manshan people." Tuoshan thanked Chen Mo.

The tribe's mountain people are looking at Chen Mo, and Chen Mo is also looking at them. Did not feel the malice of this tribe, perhaps because he saved the reason for the extension.

Thanks to Tuoshan, Chen Mo couldn't understand, but through the translation of the translator, he understood the meaning of Tuoshan.

The armor opened and Chen Mo’s body was revealed.

The surprised eyes fell on Chen Mo, and they realized that this was not an iron beast, but a life similar to them, except that the skin and eyes were different.

Jing Ge's cold face was a little wrong, and he took a look at the armor and looked at Chen Mo. The two looked at each other and staggered slightly.

"You're welcome, patriarch, this black beast is a gift for me."

Chen Mo asked the extension to be a translator and began to communicate.

From the beginning, Chen Mo was observing the situation of this tribe. In his observation, this barbarian tribe was not as unconcerned as he thought, but the wisdom was not low.

As a long-term tribe, Tuoshan should be much better than other tribes.

"Thank you."

Accepting the gift of the black beast, Tuoshan Chen Chen gave a ceremony and reached out to lead Chen Mochao to the largest cave.

The cavern is not small, more than two hundred square meters, more like a conference room or lecture room. There is a wooden long table and several large wooden frames in the cave. The wooden frame is also covered with animal fur and thick wooden books. Some text is recorded on it.

From the arrangement, it is a trace of civilization.

Most importantly, Chen Mo was on a shelf and saw civilized machine parts and weapons.

There is evidence of civilization everywhere.

There is another elder on the stone table in the cave room, writing on the fur, seeing a few people coming in, only to put up the wooden book.

"This is the wise man of our barbarian family, Muxi, he is the teacher who is responsible for teaching the characters and knowledge of the tribe. This is Chen Mo, who saved the guests from the extension." Tuoshan introduced Mu Chen to Mu Mu.

Muxi heard Chen Moe killing the black beast and saved the extension. Seeing that Chen Mo’s eyes have changed, he is very friendly. After the introduction, Muxi carefully looked at Chen Mo. When he saw the armor of Chen Mo, his expression became excited.

"What is machinery on your body?"

Mudu walked to Chen Mo's side and stroked the armor of Chen Mo. He seemed to see something unreasonable. The movement was very light. He was afraid that he would break the armor when he was strong, but his tone was very excited.

What is machinery?

The translator responsible for the translation was ignorant and hesitated. He put the translator on the teacher, and he communicated with Mr. Mo, which would be convenient.

“Machinery is a powerful tool created by the use of knowledge and wisdom.” Muxi gave an explanation.

"It's mechanical." Chen Mo nodded.

The machine parts and weapons-like things in this cavern are not unusual for wood to know the machinery.

The little things in the ear of the raft can make him understand Chen Mo’s words, but he quickly forced himself to calm down: “Are you a foreigner?”

“A foreign visitor?”

This time, a serious look from the curiosity, even the cold Jinge, cold eyes flashed a hint of curiosity.

"Yes."

A seemingly primitive tribal civilization, who knows the extraterrestrial visitors, is amazed by him, but it is also a windfall, and maybe you can figure out where this space is.

"Great." Mudu muttered, his body was shaking, it was caused by excitement.

"Have you seen an extraterrestrial visitor?" Chen Mo asked.

If he wants to leave, he must figure out where it is now.

"I haven't seen it, but strictly speaking, we are the descendants of the strangers." Muxi threw a shocking news.

chapters.title: Chapter 789: : Square Machine
chapters.body:
Chapter 789: : Square Machine

When things are said, Muxi has some sighs, some memories, and his expression, and the patriarch Tuoshan.

The raft led Chen Mo to a large shelf and opened the animal skin wrapped around it. A laser transmitter and gun reflected the eyes of Chen Mo, which was made of metal.

"Sir, you should know what this is? This is the machine left by the ancestors of our Man Shan people. It used to be a lot. It was slowly lost. The mechanics on your body are the first time I have seen except these. Machinery, which is somewhat similar to what the ancestors recorded."

Chen Mo asked the armor to scan and restore the structure of the ‘weapons’ left by the Manshan people. The design is different from the guns of the earth, but the function is similar, that is, the guns, but there is no ammunition, and the small lasers have no energy.

The level of this weapon is quite a level of craftsmanship of the Earth's civilization.

See Chen Mo carefully studied the machine, Muxi took the translator to Tuoshan, and signaled him to introduce.

"This is actually related to the history of our ancestors and the history of our wilderness. According to the records, our ancestors originally lived in a peaceful planet. Later, the disaster of the planet was no longer suitable for living, and the ancestors began to plan migration. Migration There are many teams, and our ancestors are one of them. After five hundred years of flight, we finally reached the planet."

Tuoshan sighed and continued to speak.

"The ancestors recorded that, seven hundred years ago, on the way to the migration, they encountered a change in the sky. They called it a 'space vortex'. After our migrating team fell into the space vortex, they arrived here. Two million people migrated. The team, after five hundred years and various disasters, has only 50,000 people left here."

The voice of Tuoshan is somewhat low, like opening an old history book.

Jing Ge and Tuo Li were attracted to him, and Chen Mo also listened carefully. He needed to find clues about this place from these history.

"But the disaster did not end. The remaining 50,000 people were lucky and found a planet. But when they arrived on the planet, they discovered that the environment here is different from the planet of ancestral life.

The weak physicists and intellectuals all died, and only a few thousand highly trained fighters survived, which was the unfortunate beginning. Warriors are not proficient in technology and knowledge, and cultural knowledge inherits faults. I began to want to rely on the spacecraft's machine to maintain the knowledge transfer. Later, the spacecraft failed, because the technical requirements were high and I did not understand the maintenance, and it was completely scrapped. ”

Chen Mo can imagine that situation.

A person with a planet that is not too heavy will suddenly land on a planet of five times gravity, and the weak constitution cannot bear it.

In the case of a small number of people, cultural knowledge is faulty, which is very scary.

This means that their civilization is deteriorating.

"The ancestors realized that the crisis was coming, there was no technical support. On this planet with a poor living environment, their physique is weak, and sooner or later they will be extinct. The urgency of destroying seeds has forced ancestors to use the only remaining technology to solve this problem. .

But more serious in the back, the surviving ancestors, women can not afford the environment after pregnancy, and may also endanger life, even if the offspring are born, it is also a dead baby. It is impossible to continue the race. ”

“How did you solve this problem later?” Chen Mo curiously asked.

“The ancestors found some indigenous people on this planet. The indigenous intelligence is low, but the body and characteristics are similar, and they are the same species. The last ancestors compromised and combined with the indigenous women, so we have our wild mountain. Inherited the ancestors’ intelligence. And the ancestors of the indigenous ancestors, the intelligence is normal, and the physical body can resist the living environment here.

The continuation of the crisis has solved, the population has begun to increase, but the fault of knowledge has become more and more serious. Technical faults, as the energy is exhausted, some machinery begins to be scrapped, although the ancestors recorded the knowledge they knew before they died. However, the situation in which knowledge loss is becoming more and more serious cannot be changed, and the loss of machinery is also intensified.

Up to now, seven hundred years, after many disasters and migrations, the knowledge retained has only the knowledge that these ancestors recorded on fur and wooden books. Fortunately, the inheritance of the text is not broken. We can only learn from these retained knowledge to understand the world, but the role is limited, many esoteric knowledge, words we all know, but can not understand the interpretation. ”

Tuoshan is invincible and carries heavy concerns.

Jing Ge and Tuo Li did not speak, but although they were small, they also understood the words of Grandpa.

"After this natural environment, they are all powerful fighters. Their ability to learn knowledge is not so strong, and the deeper knowledge is less and less. The ancestral civilization of the ancestors is losing, so there is a situation of today's fault. Only What can be preserved is the basic truth and the truth of heaven and earth, at least for the hope of future generations to rekindle the civilization. If one day, these words and knowledge are lost, the wisdom of our ancestors will completely die out."

Chen Mo ran, the civilized fault is very difficult to receive, the efforts and knowledge of countless ancestors disappeared because of the civilization fault. Like the Mayan civilization of the earth and other ancient civilizations, it is the fault that is encountered, leading to the final demise.

No wonder there are traces of mechanical civilization, and the wild mountain is still using the original cold weapons.

After hundreds of years of interplanetary migration, all personnel with advanced technology and energy technology will die, and the machine will be scrapped. In the case of only a few thousand people, it is admirable to be able to stand firm and prosper in this extreme environment, to grow and to retain the most basic knowledge and textual inheritance of civilization.

"Have your ancestors said that, where is this?" Chen Mo asked.

Chen Mo is a bit embarrassed now. He is a lost traveler. He needs to determine where it is. Tuoshan said the history of the Manshan people, but it did not help Chen Mo to understand this spatial position.

"No." Tuoshan shook his head.

"However, there is a very important thing that has been passed down." Mudu learned about Chen Mo's problem, remembered an important item, and hurried to a wooden cabinet, carefully taking out a layer wrapped in fur. Big box.

I took the translator from the hands of Tuoshan and put it on, and Muxi began to introduce it seriously.

"This is something that the ancestors must pass down. It is a record of the ancestral civilization, and there are many important materials that can be used later in the civil revival."

The raft carefully opened the box.

The box opens, and a square machine appears in Chen Mo's field of vision, looking like the machine cube.

The square machine is well protected and has no traces of damage, such as a computer such as a computer mainframe, a whole body metal, and a projection-like lens. The process technology is very high, and there is a technical level when Chen Mo left the earth.

Chen Mo carefully looked at it and guessed it might be something like a microcomputer. If so, Chen Mo has the opportunity to find some clues about this space from here.

Originally thought this was an original planet, I did not expect an unexpected gain.

“Can you give me a try?” Chen Mo asked, pointing to the square machine.

Tuoshan and Mudu whispered for a while, and finally made up their minds and nodded.

Their family has waited for too long, and since the energy technology was broken, this thing has never been opened. Nowadays, Chen Mo is a stranger, and Chen Mo is not malicious. This is an opportunity for them to regain their civilization.

Even if this thing is precious, they also want Chen Mo to try, otherwise they can't see hope.

chapters.title: Chapter 790: : Big Monster?
chapters.body:
Chapter 790: : Big Monster?

Carefully picking up the square machine, Chen Mo began to check carefully.

According to Tuoshan's remarks, Chen Mo determined that the ancestors of the Manshan people were constant star civilizations, and that they were not discovered by the Universe Alliance.

The planetary civilization is in the beginning and development stage of the planet. Like the original earth, it is impossible to carry out large-scale interplanetary migration. The ancestors of the Manzan people migrated and flew for hundreds of years, indicating that there was no light speed spacecraft.

There is no light speed spacecraft, the degree of civilization is less than the galaxy level, and it can only be the technology of constant star civilization.

But even if it is a star-rated civilization, it is already advanced in technology and technology, otherwise it is impossible to carry out long-term large-scale interplanetary migration, so the technical content of this square box is not low.

The conventional basic physics rules are common to the whole universe. Even if the words and symbols are different, the rules are the same. The essence of the words expressing the rules of the universe is the same. At present, all the machines of civilization are developed according to the basic rules of the universe.

This is the common point of the universe's scientific and technological civilization.

As long as you understand the mechanical components and functions, it is easy to understand the operating principle of this machine and thoroughly understand the machine.

"Ink girl, the spacecraft will come here." Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

The battle armor came to the ink girl to respond.

Tuoshan and Mudu face each other, I don’t know who Chen Mo is calling, I can only watch it quietly. Jing Ge and Tuo Li looked quietly and wanted to see what magical things Chen Mo could have.

About ten minutes, a soldier ran in, looked and panicked.

"The patriarch, there is a big monster in the sky."

"Monster?" Tuoshan was shocked.

"It should be my ship."

Chen Mo led the way out of the cave, and Tuo Ge and Jing Ge followed up, and Tuoshan and Mudu did not hesitate to follow.

Over the village of the Manshan, a huge spaceship floated on it, looking from below, like a big monster covering the sky. This is a very dangerous monster for the Barbarian who has never seen such a large flying object.

When Chen Mo came out, all the old people and children in the whole village had already come out from the small caves and wooden houses. They were looking at the sky with their heads horrified. Several children had been scared and cried, and several children were cheering. The male savage people underneath, all holding guns and spears and shields, nervously watching the sky, ready to fight.

The entire village is like an enemy.

When Jinge and the patriarch came out, the people in the village suddenly found the backbone of the heart, and the subconscious moved closer to the top of the mountain.

"Don't panic, this is Mr. Mo's spaceship." Tuoshan shouted and appease the Hanshan people.

The word spacecraft is obviously strange, but the patriarch said nothing, it should be fine. All the barbarians began to stare at the spacecraft in the air and whispered, with curiosity in their expressions.

"I can stop at the open space next to it?"

Chen Mo asked Tuoshan, and with the permission of the other party, the spacecraft slowly landed on a large open space next to the village. The spacecraft has a body length of more than 800 meters and a height of more than 60 meters, which makes all the barbarian people shocked.

The biggest creature they have ever seen is not worth mentioning compared to this spacecraft.

The spacecraft stopped and the entire village was surrounded by people, curiously looking at the spaceship, but no one dared to touch.

"Is this the spacecraft recorded by the ancestors?"

Tuoshan and Mudu had tears in their eyes. They knew the glory of their ancestors, but they never saw it. They only heard it in books. Now I really see that they can control such a huge thing to fly into the sky, it is a miracle.

If they can reproduce the glory of their ancestors in the future, they will not have to worry about it all day long.

"I need to bring this machine back to the spaceship laboratory to start research. Do you want to see it?" Chen Mo looked at Tuoshan.

"go with."

Tuoshan has already begun to trust Chen Mo. When he saw the spaceship, he saw the hope of the Manshan people. He could live a very good life as described by his ancestors. Instead of living in the embankment every day.

"Rare stone, let the people do not get close to the spaceship, can not destroy the spaceship, and I went to see with Ms. Mu, and Mr. Mo." Tuoshan said to a middle-aged man who is a calm and handsome man.

After receiving the response from the rough stone, Tuoshan led the raft and Jingo to keep up with Chen Mo’s pace. He was afraid that Grandpa would not let him go up. After three steps, he followed Chen Mo’s body and saw Chen Mo’s rejection. Less, curious to look at the spaceship.

"Gravity is different, you pay attention."

When Chen Mo stepped into the spaceship, he reminded Tuoshan and others. Regarding the concept of gravity, Tuoshan did not quite understand it. When he entered the spacecraft, he immediately understood Chen Mo’s meaning.

The extension took the lead to follow Chen Mo into the spaceship. At the moment of entering the spaceship, the extension felt away from the uncontrollable lightness of the body. The strength and habits of the feet were different when they used force. They suddenly lost their balance and fell a dog. Followed by the extension of the mountain and Mudu, the body is also awkward, but fortunately finally stood firm. Jingo is relatively stable. When he stepped into the spaceship, his body just shook slightly and quickly adapted to the difference in gravity.

“Why is this?” Tuoshan feels that the **** of the body has become much less, and he is amazed.

"This should be the difference in gravity that the ancestors said. The gravity in the spacecraft of Mr. Mo is different from the outside, which leads to weightlessness. When the ancestors first arrived at the planet, the gravity here was too large, and the load on the body was too great, so that the scholars with weak constitutions And the scientists died collectively, and women could not get pregnant."

Mudu studied books and understood more things than Tuoshan.

After a little pause, to determine how many people adapt to this change in gravity, Chen Mocai continued to move forward.

I was told that Chen Mo came in and waited at the door early, and I was a little excited. A person can be bored in the spaceship, only the little mother and artificial intelligence accompany her to chat.

When Chen Mo came back, even if she didn't talk to her, she wouldn't feel so lonely and helpless, at least a little bit safe.

"Come back." Seeing Chen Mo enter the spaceship, he smiled, then looked at the four people who were following up with Tuoshan and Jinge, and nodded politely: "Hello."

"Hello." Tuoshan wore a translator and understood the greetings.

"Is the gravity of the spacecraft a little higher?"

Chen Mo let the little mother climb to his shoulder and curiously looked at the Tuoshan four. The gravity of the spacecraft, when it was just out, was 2g, and now it is back, at least 2.5g, it should be adjusted by itself.

"I want to get used to gravity and get out of the spacecraft," he explained.

Chen Mo ran, a person staying in the spaceship, is really a bit stuffy: "Give them a consciousness translator."

"it is good."

He hurriedly ordered the robot to come up with three conscious translators, handing them to Mudu, Jingo and Tuo, while looking at the three, dressing up like primitive people, and not tall, maybe the gravity of the planet is too Big reason.

The three people are also looking at this flaw that is completely different from Chen Mo's shape, but just take a look at it and follow Chen Mo's pace to the spacecraft's laboratory.

I also rushed to wear the translator to keep up.

Along the way, Tuoshan and Mudu marveled at the magic of the spacecraft. Whether it's lighting, display, moving, talking machinery, etc., everything is magical. This is a magical thing they can't understand. It is only recorded in the books left by the ancestors, but now it is the first time.

They dare not touch these machines, be careful, and fear the damage. The books record that their ancestral spaceships were broken because of the worsening of their knowledge gaps.

Entering the laboratory, Chen Mo placed the square machine on the stage and turned on a professional instrument to scan and analyze.

Although I don't know what is inside, Chen Mo has to try. This may be the only thing that knows the location of this space. If you figure out the location of the space, it is possible for him to leave here quickly, otherwise he will get lost in the universe, even if he has a speed of light spaceship. It is also very difficult to go out.

"Ink girl, analyze the situation of this machine."

chapters.title: Chapter 791: : Zech'S Guess
chapters.body:
Chapter 791: : Zech'S Guess

Several people were around the lab bench, staring at the square machine on the bench, waiting.

Tuoshan and others are waiting to see what the ancestors kept protecting them. And Chen Mo is waiting, there is no clue about this space on this square machine.

"Mergo, after the test is completed, it is a computer, the power is gone." The machine that was tested was put away, and the ink girl opened it.

"Connect it to the power supply."

When the Chen Mo robot connected the power to the square machine, he pressed a raised position on the square box. He just saw that the square machine has only two different positions, one is the lens, and the other is the bump, it should be the start button.

Sure enough, the light from the small lens on the square machine lit up, and there was a movement behind the box. The machine in the box moved to reveal an interface, and then a palm-sized display rose.

The shape of the interface is hexagonal. Different from the existing interface, Chen Mo does not understand the interface line, so it is impossible to connect the machine with data.

"Really."

The most exciting is Tuoshan and Mudu. The things left by the ancestors can be started for hundreds of years, and they are not allowed to be excited. It is possible to hide the history of their ancestors and the crystallization of the civilization of the ancestors.

The slight sound of the machine is coming out of the box and the display is on.

After putting the computer for thousands of years, it can still be used normally. Chen Mo is also amazed. The ancestors of the Manshan people have just been so powerful in their interplanetary migration, which is also the power of technology.

On the small screen, the words of the Manshan people are displayed. If Chen Mo does not understand, he will look at the raft.

"Can you read these words?"

"can."

"Read it all."

“Navigation log? Basic education knowledge; advanced education knowledge? Manshan history; optical computer? Technical information...”

The raft pointed to the icons one by one.

Some of the icons make the hibiscus full of doubts, and the words don't make sense. Chen Mo also knows a little.

Because of some phrases, Muxi only knows the words and does not understand its true meaning. There is no such term in the knowledge he has learned, and there is no such impression.

These icons, Chen Mo judged, this is the knowledge left by the ancestors of the Manchurian civilization, which embodies the knowledge and wisdom of the entire mountain civilization. This method is somewhat similar to the technology library. In this way, as long as the language is complete and the descendants start the machine again, they can read the knowledge a little bit.

“Do you know what it means?” Chen Mo clicked on a piece of technical information.

"I don't understand." Muxi shook his head.

He knows the above words, but many mathematical symbols are not passed down, he does not know. He does not understand the formulas of these words and symbols combined. There is no such knowledge in his knowledge reserve, and he has not seen it.

The consciousness translator is the meaning of the translation of the raft, and then conveyed to Chen Mo, now the raft does not understand, Chen Mo does not understand.

The language barrier has come out.

This is still just beginning. A lot of things involve technical terms. I haven't learned this knowledge and can't convey professional knowledge. It is impossible to translate the complete meaning to Chen Mo through the conscious translator.

"A little trouble."

It seems that he needs to master the language of the Manshan people in order to fully interpret the information in this square machine.

"These profound knowledge, you can't interpret, I need you to teach me your words, and I will interpret them." Chen Mo pointed to the square machine.

"Yes." Muxi did not hesitate to agree.

After Chen Mo started this square machine, he had completely trusted Chen Mo.

......

Zeqi slowly landed on a barren planet in a battle armor and walked into a small building.

There is only one building on the entire planet, and the rest of the world is endlessly ridiculous. Seeing the coldness of the look, sitting in the purple rhyme of the hall, Zeqi's pace slowed down and put the information in his hand on the table.

This planet is not the planet where Ziyun lived. It is the independent planet prisoner of the purple MSI. The purple rhyme is the prisoner of this planet.

Ziyun lost a small universe this time, the high-level anger of the Ziwei civilization, gave her the highest black hole level punishment, was unloaded, and was locked on the planet, waiting for punishment.

"What are you doing?" Ziyun opened his eyes and looked cold.

"I found two messages to tell you." Zech said.

"Say."

"The first news was to find one of the three-eyed civilizations that was robbed. It was confirmed that Qingshui was taken away by the captive low life, and the other did not have news."

Zeqi released a video clip, which is the confession video of the business.

"He said that he didn't know another warrior who snatched the spaceship. He didn't know the identity of the other party. They wanted to know, but they were rejected by the other party, and then separated. We checked the records of nearby galaxies, and there was no trace of another spaceship. ”

Ziyun looked at the video and fell into thoughts.

From the video, this low-level life does not lie, and from the perspective of her observation of the escape of Qing Shuixing, the mysterious warrior is not a low-level life, but a senior life of more than three eyes.

If the other party does not go to the surrounding galaxies, go to other galaxies at the speed of the speed of light, it takes too long, it takes hundreds of days or even years, unless the other teammates meet them to leave, this possibility is very big.

"What about the second message?"

"When we investigated, there was a special discovery. In the light of the origin of the galaxy to the Ami Galaxy, there was a turbulent space, and there was a space scream and a small universe scream."

Zechi put a photo on the light curtain, the photo is a bit fuzzy, but can see the outline, there is a point.

"In addition to the speed of light, we collected the light and shadow restoration in this space turbulence, and found that there is a spaceship in the space turbulence. I counted the time, and the mysterious warrior escaped from Qing Shuixing, the speed of light arrived. The time of this space turbulence coincides. But in the Ami Galaxy, the shadow of this spaceship was not found."

"What do you mean, when the mysterious warrior went to the Ami Galaxy, was he caught in a turbulent stream?"

Ziyun looked at the photos, and the look was cold forever.

The spatial fluctuation is transmitted by the speed of light. Generally, the spacecraft maintains the speed of light and does not fall into the turbulent flow of space. In the event of a turbulent flow of space, it may be taken to any corner of the universe, not to mention the murderous, but they are more difficult to find someone.

"There is this possibility, and there are still suspected small universe screams, I guess will they enter the small universe?"

"guess?"

"Because you can't be sure, you can only guess. You will tell Ziweixing about this, let Ziweixing lower the punishment for you, or it will be too late."

"This is the punishment for losing the small universe. The rules of Ziweixing, the high-level will not break the rules because of your uncertain news. It is stupid to say it. Don't be naive." Ziyun shook his head and looked indifferent.

"Black hole punishment, you may die."

"This is my business, let's go. After ten days, I will accept punishment. You are useless here, can't help me." Purple rhyme said coldly.

Zeqi was stagnant and finally sighed and left.

Until Zech left, Ziyun regained his gaze on the photo of the light curtain. Zechi’s photo of the turbulent space was too small. Even if they were technologically advanced, the image was still blurred, only a small spot, but only a small spot. The silhouette is indeed like a spaceship.

chapters.title: Chapter 792: : Second Generation Virtual Reality Technology
chapters.body:
Chapter 792: : Second Generation Virtual Reality Technology

Earth.

After the extraterrestrial event, under the strong transformation of the marching ant group, the earth has undergone a comprehensive turbulent dishwashing. The biggest changes are in China and Africa.

The city of China, completely sci-fi, has only appeared in the scenes of science fiction movies, all realized in the city of China. The marching ant group opened its hands and applied technology to renovate the basic science of global technology.

Unmanned driving, smart city, deformable car, aerial cloud track, holographic scene, etc., all popularized, in the medical field, the special effects of human diseases encountered by human beings have been overcome by Haixing Company. Renovation in the fields of life, medical care, entertainment, science, infrastructure, military, materials, etc.

Huaxia official and marching ant group open potential drugs, so that ordinary people can use, and begin to comprehensively improve the physical fitness of ordinary people.

All humans know that they have a common enemy, an unknown alien.

The universe is boundless. If human beings are not united, the final result is to be enslaved or extinct by aliens.

As the leader of human science and technology change, the marching ant group has concentrated on the greatest wealth and the most advanced technology in human history, and has become a superstar group.

After Chen Mo was arrested, Zhao Min’s strength was known to all mankind. Zhao Min replaced Chen Mo as the backbone of the marching ant group and controlled the super group of marching ants. No one objected.

Zhao Min is crazy and generally develops the army ant group without any consequences, so that all the technology of the earth is exploding.

A large number of space-based weapons and quantum radars are scattered throughout the solar system. At the L4 position of Lagrange point, a super-large space jump port with a diameter of 200 kilometers is rapidly being built. On Mars, super-light speed ships and light-speed spacecraft are under construction, and Venus is being transformed.

Everything is preparing for the space to jump into the sea of stars.

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo's photo on the table in a daze. She didn't know how many times she saw this photo. She told herself many times that this man is still alive, and she firmly believes that Chen Mo is still alive.

Now the marching ant group has become a super group, and she has to face the public opinion and the pressure from all sides.

If she didn't have a big heart, she didn't know how to stick to it.

The universe is too big, she only hopes to hold this home, at least one day they can't find Chen Mo, and Chen Mo can find them when they return.

"Min Min, are you at the company?"

When Zhao Min was in a daze, the unparalleled holographic projection appeared in the office. Seeing the unparalleled, Zhao Min showed a hint of a smile, his eyes became softer, and he did not face the strength of outsiders.

"What are you doing?"

"Come to the 1st building, there is something for you to see." Musou said.

"it is good."

Zhao Min put Chen Mo's photo in a good position and left the office after finishing it.

In the experimental room, wearing a lab robe and wearing goggles, you can see the shadow of Chen Mo.

The unparalleled now, although it is the age of the cardamom, has already grown. The young man is slim, and the mother is quiet, and inherits Zhao Min’s strong character. After Chen Mo’s disappearance, he lost his father’s care and love, and he has grown a lot.

Seeing that Zhao Min came in, Wusou led her to the central area of the experimental area.

“Min Min, this is a new product that I developed in cooperation with the ink girl according to the technical information left by my father.”

In the center of the experimental area, there is a device similar to a game table and chair. There is also a helmet-like device on the chair, similar to the first-generation virtual reality device she released.

"What equipment?" Zhao Min asked curiously.

“This is the second generation of virtual reality devices I developed, and the quantum virtual reality world is fast.”

Musou has been conducting technical research on virtual reality, and is very interested in the neural-conscious connection technology that Chen Mo has left. She has been thinking about developing a quantum virtual reality world. This idea has not been abandoned.

“Is this device mature?”

"Preliminary maturity, can be used normally."

Unparalleled let Zhao Min sit up and experience it.

Although she is not old, she is the most authoritative in the study of neuroconsciousness and virtual world.

Quantum virtual reality is like a dream world. This device is a bridge that communicates the virtual digital world and human consciousness constructed by quantum computing.

Guide human consciousness activities through virtual reality devices, reproduce the quantum virtual digital space in the human brain, communicate neural consciousness, control the changes in the virtual space, make people feel that they are in a dream, not a real dream, but a creation Dreamland.

"It's very powerful." From the virtual reality device chair, Zhao Min's face showed a petite smile: "Would you like to give you a press conference?"

"Don't have to develop a cloth meeting, Dad can't see it, it's useless." Unparalleled touch of virtual reality equipment, thinking of his father, look dim.

Now my father doesn't know where in the universe, nor how it is. The universe is too big, there are countless planets, even if they enter the sea of stars, the probability of finding them is not great, although she is convinced that her father is still alive.

"Min Min, do you want my father?" Unparalleled look up, seriously watching Zhao Min.

"I don't want to be sure to lie to you." Zhao Min bounced his unparalleled head and looked a little sigh.

"When Dad comes back, let Dad compensate you, anyway, you like my father."

Zhao Min smiled and pinched the unparalleled face: "Say this, don't you fear your mother licking your ears? Hit your ass?"

"Mom is clearer than me, she is not stupid. I can see how she might not know. Just before she trusted her father and trusted Min. The universe is so big, after going through so many things, some things are no longer important. Mom is unconditionally handing over all of my father's business to you. She looks better than me. Mother is the smartest person in the family."

"I don't know if you want to break it? Little girl." Zhao Min gently licked his unparalleled ear: "And, don't mention your father, mention the **** and come to talk about your equipment."

Unspeakable spit tongue, eyes bent into crescents, no mention of this topic, focus on the equipment.

“This device is strictly designed for games, but it is not designed for games.”

"What do you mean?" asked Zhao Min.

"I asked Mohyun, now we have popularized armor in the armed team, but the training venue is limited, and the actual combat training is very depleted. Our armor is strong, but it does not really enter the battlefield, we need a You can explore the place where the battle armor is fighting.

The power of the armored weapon is great. This training place cannot be the earth. It is also troublesome to train on other planets. Therefore, I want the armed personnel to enter the virtual reality world to train and explore the battle style and skills of the armor. ”

Unparalleled to tell Zhao Min all his thoughts.

The existence of the armor is indispensable, whether it is human or animal, this is the main weapon against the aliens.

"I want to release a competitive battle game for the armor, let the world's armored enthusiasts enter the game, freely formulate their own armor, let them play the battle armor, we collect their battle data and skills for analysis and learning.

Then put all the data collected and analyzed into the artificial intelligence, let the artificial intelligence learn the combat skills of the armor, and cultivate the artificial intelligence into the battle armor master. At the same time, in the game, continuously optimize and improve the functions required by the armor, we can Continuously design and mass production of various types of armored robots.

The current nerve response rate in humans is too slow, and even after potential development and training, the reaction speed takes 0.1 second. The personnel of advanced potential drug development also have a reaction capacity of only a few milliseconds.

The robot does not have this limitation, and the robot's response speed can reach nanoseconds. As long as the artificial intelligence battle skill database is large enough, the artificial intelligence learning changes enough, its combat power can easily surpass human beings, and the future is the main force against aliens. ”

Zhao Min stayed and watched the unparalleled talk. At this moment, she saw the shadow of Chen Mo in the unparalleled body, the same self-confidence and cleverness. The unparalleled has grown up, and an inexplicable touch is full of hearts.

"Min, what's wrong? I'm not correct?" Unparalleled to see Zhao Min's eyes flushed, nervous.

"No, you are right, but I suddenly think of him. You are as confident and intelligent as your father." Zhao Min touched the unparalleled head and showed a happy smile.

"How about my idea?" asked the unparalleled.

"Your thoughts are very good, you can implement them tomorrow, and now you can mass-produce virtual reality devices, so that you can develop a competitive game of armor."

It is foreseeable that the idea of unparalleled will greatly accelerate the development of the armor.

Now their armor is no opponent, can only explore on their own, development is a stand-alone game.

If you put the armor into the game, concentrate the wisdom of all mankind to optimize the development of the combat armor function, let the people in the game become opponents of each other, don't worry about the armor's unlimited destructive power, and constantly strengthen the design of the armor. Combat skills, which are historical developments for the armor.

chapters.title: Chapter 793: :Super Warrior
chapters.body:
Chapter 793: :Super Warrior

Building 1 Biological Laboratory.

The ink woman wore a test gown in it.

In the transparent glass box in front, there are several animals, namely rabbits, mice, pigs, monkeys and orangutans, which are used for experiments.

The animals in the glass box are no longer animals in the traditional sense.

These animals have visible changes to the naked eye.

The rabbit's legs look a lot stronger; the white rat's teeth become sharp and sharp, and the pig's body flashes with a small arc visible to the naked eye; the orangutan's muscles and body are well developed, like the movie King Kong, the biggest change is Monkeys, red light in the body, under the infrared detection, can see the high temperature of hundreds of degrees Celsius in monkeys.

This is the experimental body of super-power technology. Although the above animals have changed, they have one thing in common. They are like crazy in the glass box, their temper is violent, they lose their senses, and the high temperature makes the monkey's vitality disappear.

The super-power technology has not been successful yet, and it is still a semi-finished product, but it has made great progress.

This is the technology that Merck gave her, hoping to explore the superpowers of human beings.

Some super powers are found in nature's life. Like electric rafts, they can generate electricity, and sputum is reborn. For animals, this is a special life characteristic of cells, but for humans, this is super power. For other animals, the powerful wisdom of mankind is super power.

Superpower is relative, and now it is studying the ability to let humans have other life and animals, even those that no other animal has.

Now it is the 63rd experiment. Without success, the experimental body loses rational side effects and vitality loss is not solved.

"Destroy the experiment body."

With one instruction, the medicine machine in the glass box was opened and several animals were euthanized. Both monkeys and orangutans are cloned, so don't worry about the amount of experimentation required.

The machine cleaned the body of the experimental body, and the ink girl in the lab glanced at it and turned away.

Now is the time to work, she wants to bring home with her unparalleled.

She can't come to the lab. The network and sensors control the smart machine. It is the same for her, just getting used to it. She is now thinking, she wants to follow the normal person's daily routine, and it used to be the same when she followed Merma.

There are infinite possibilities for a female with a combination of super quantum computing power and human thinking.

She can use it to control the operation of the top laboratory of the entire marching ant group, and at the same time preside over the super-light speed space curvature spacecraft project, space jump project, light speed spacecraft project, super-capacity development technology and space exploration technology, etc. The leader and controller of technology.

Put on sweater jeans and high-heeled boots, the ink girl in the lab where the unparalleled.

The current ink girl has a lot of humanity. Like a normal woman, just beautiful to unreal, tall figure and perfect face, attracting attention everywhere.

She already has feelings, emotions and thoughts, and she often misses her, but her emotions are the most rational.

Xiao Yujie and Zhao Min sister can sneak when they miss Mercedes, or look at the photos in a daze, she won't, she can't cry, no tears, only sadness and thoughts, but also believe that Mi Ge is still alive.

She spends the most time with Chen Mo, and she knows the most about Chen Mo.

"Ink girl."

Just entering the lab, I heard the unparalleled voice of her, and the ink girl smiled.

"Mount Nguyen, the second generation of virtual reality equipment can be produced, Min Min promised my ideas and plans." Unparalleled face full of joy, holding a female ink.

Musou did not communicate with the ink **** the machine network. In the eyes of the unparalleled, the ink girl is not a robot, but a member of the family. Some things are used to face-to-face communication.

The second generation of virtual reality technology was jointly researched by her and Mo Nu, and she is now the most prosperous in mass production. This is her recognition.

"Okay, now production, but you have to go home to eat." Ink said.

......

Xiao Yu, Zhao Min and the ink girl sat around the dinner table, and they sat next to each other to tease their younger brother. The ink girl didn't have to eat, but she also went to the dinner table. The position next to the small fisherman was always empty.

They are used to being empty and have been waiting for Chen Mo to come back.

"Ink girl, how is the research progress now?" asked Xiao Yu.

Every once in a while, Xiaoyu will ask about the super-light speed spacecraft, and I hope to enter Chen Xinghai early and look for Chen Mo, but I also know that I am not coming.

"I tested a super-capacity development technology today, and it is still immature. The construction progress of the space jump point is within the expectation. The super-light speed spacecraft is almost finished, and there are about four months to test flight. The light speed spacecraft is almost the same time."

Ink said several major projects.

"There is still a big progress in the project, which is the core armor of antimatter energy. There are anti-material energy armor and powerful weapons to win the aliens."

At the beginning, the armor of the armor was too weak, so that the aliens could easily take away the murderer, so the ink girl was very attached to the development of weapons.

"Also, the second generation of virtual reality technology developed by Wushuang is mature, and she has some ideas." Zhao Min said the unparalleled thoughts and Xiaoyu.

"The unparalleled she has grown up."

Xiao Yu is somewhat pleased, just seeing the vacancies around him, can not help but sigh, Chen Mo is not, this family always feels incomplete, lacking too much.

"I dreamt of him again last night. I dreamt that he brought a few extraterrestrial women back. The women are grotesque, and there are two like the green-skinned monks. They don’t know how he got his hands. I am mad at me and laughed."

"Oh... hahahaha!" Zhao Min’s brain made up the picture and it was falling apart.

......

Wang Hai and Black Hawk are practicing armor battles over Africa.

It is hoped that the African continent will be unified, but everyone in the world knows that it is not a secret behind Hitto’s marching ant group. It is the back garden of the marching ant group, and all resources are supporting the construction and development of the marching ant group.

Now the entire marching ant group is armed with armor, and it is almost invincible in the outside world.

But they don't think so.

They know that the boss is caught, and their armor is not worth mentioning in front of the aliens. They need to be strong, so when they have time, he will explore the use of armor.

"Wang Hai, Black Hawk."

The two men in the battle, with the voice of the ink girl in the ear, immediately stopped.

"The unparalleled second-generation virtual reality device has been successfully developed, and some of the equipment will be sent to your base. She has an idea of training armor, can use the second generation of virtual reality equipment to assist training, the virtual world has the new armor I am making. I will plan your thoughts for you. You will set up a team of armor training programs and warfare teams to study how to improve the combat strength and skills of the armor.

There is not much time for you. At the latest, within one year, we will enter the sea of stars to find Mercedes. During this time, you should try to improve the combat effectiveness of the armor. ”

"Understand." Wang Hai and the Black Hawk agreed in unison, and the voice was very excited.

......

A vigorous and historic event is taking place on Earth.

The first thing is the breakthrough of virtual reality technology and neural consciousness connection technology. The Marching Ant Group announced that it has successfully built a quantum virtual world and successfully developed a second-generation virtual reality technology.

When the news came out, the world was shocked.

Numerous game enthusiasts have become the reality of the virtual reality world, and the unparalleled age has become the top player of virtual reality and neural consciousness connection technology, causing a sensation. Although Wu Mu does not have the versatility of Chen Mo in various fields, but in terms of virtual reality technology and neural consciousness connection technology, it is a proud woman.

The tiger father has no dog girl to become a hot word. After Chen Mo, Chen Wushuang became a symbol of another genius.

The second thing is the promotion of the first real virtual reality game "Super Warrior".

The promotion of the Battlegear virtual reality competitive game "Super Warrior" has triggered the carnival of countless armored enthusiasts and game fans. The dream of the armor that cannot be realized in the real world can be realized in the game. The virtual world that was previously dreamed of has already appeared.

"Super Warrior" has SoLo battle mode, custom mode, team battle mode and multi-team 'eat chicken' mode, as well as large-scale alien invasion mode and doomsday landing mode, accompanied by the armored division. Segment ranking: God of War list

The maps are air combat, ground warfare, forest, mountain, ocean, space, etc., as well as different weather modes. In addition to the official armor model, you can also use the parts provided by the game to design your own match armor. The intelligent system automatically adapts parameters and optimizes the shape.

The game maximizes the reduction of real-world data and conditions.

Under the influence of "Super Warrior", all colleges with e-sports courses have begun to study the skills and armor of the game, and the design of the armor, the super game of e-sports. The league kept up with the first time.

The marching ant group sent the armed men armed with armor to the training in the virtual reality world. The military of various countries have ordered virtual reality devices, allowing soldiers to enter the virtual reality world and follow up on the methods and techniques of learning armor.

The first truly virtual reality game became an explosion.

Armor is the best way for mankind to improve his strength, and the overall performance of the armor is much higher than other weapons.

The participation of all mankind has made the armor's tactics and techniques develop madly. This is the purpose of the marching ant group and the unparalleled effect.

The idea of unparalleled, providing unlimited benefits for the functional development and design ideas of the later armor, also formed the Earth's own armor culture. At the same time, the emergence of virtual reality technology accelerates the arrival of human beings in the era of super technology.

chapters.title: Chapter 794: : Microcosm?
chapters.body:
Chapter 794: : Microcosm?

In the unknown space, Chen Mo does not know the changes that have taken place on Earth.

Muxi and Tuoshan have limitations in cognition and knowledge, and cannot completely interpret the information left by the Manshan civilization. Chen Mo had to learn the words of the Manshan people to interpret the information left by the Manshan civilization.

Strong learning ability and memory make it easy for Chen Mo to master any language and text.

Beginning with the basic books to understand the text of the Manshan people, Chen Mo gradually mastered the words and symbols of the Manshan people. Now an action of data interpretation is underway.

"Navigation log: Manshan Ephemeris 435276 at 45 o'clock on the 45th, the spaceship team number 5267. I am the Manshan Olympus, the next year will be me, Nongsha, Houhou, Liang and Siwu five duty. Today It was 427 days from the 517th year of the Wild Mountain Star. The migration continued. The speed of the spacecraft was one-third of the speed of light, and other tribes were in the dormant compartment.

Before 5 o'clock, another spaceship was hit by a cosmic streamstone. The spacecraft had 100,000 people and 2 million frozen fertilized eggs. We only saved 200,000 frozen fertilized eggs and 3,275 ethnic groups. Our mood is very heavy, the migration team is getting smaller and smaller, the spaceship has only 1.38 million people and 10.58 million frozen fertilized eggs. We don't know when we can find the oxygen-rich planet. ”

"..."

"Navigation log: Manshan Ephemeris 435276 at 187 on the 187th, the spacecraft number 5267. I am the Manshan Olympus, today the spacecraft has failed, Swu spent 2 hours repaired, re-started. The detector detected a A planet that is suspected of being oxygen-rich, we are heading for it."

Chen Mo looked at the video of the log.
