The Manshan civilization preserves the complete civilization technology in this square computer, similar to a cultural heritage.

Through data interpretation, Chen Mo has determined that the square machine is called the computer in the Manshan civilization. Chen Mo has successfully mastered the programming technology of the computer by learning the programming logic and rules of the Hanshan civilization and getting the programming logic and rules of the computer.

These videos are compatible algorithm programs written by Chen Mo. They are compatible with the existing artificial intelligence and are quickly filtered out. They are all navigation logs of major events.

He wants to determine where the space is now, then find the coordinates to get out of here.

The ancestors of the Manshan people are very different from the current Hanshan people. The ancestral body and human images of the Manshan people have four limbs, which are higher than humans, but the skin is yellow and the eyes are half smaller than humans. Yes, it looks very bad.

Now the barbarian is the descendant of the original ancestors of the wild mountain civilization and the indigenous combination of the planet. These descendants inherit the advantages of both sides, the body is like the indigenous people of the planet, and the wisdom is like the ancestor.

There are too many disasters in this planet, and the conditions are limited, so that they can not grow the mountain civilization.

Suddenly, Chen Mo slowed down the speed, and his eyes stopped on a video.

"Navigation log: Manshan Ephemeris 435 ... 276 years 387 days 32 o'clock, spacecraft number 5267. I am Austria ... Austrian, the spacecraft suddenly ... serious bumps, I feel ... feel the body is very painful, the reason is unknown ... around Everything is twisting, I feel the internal organs of my body are twisting... The people who sleep in the spacecraft are beginning to wake up..."

Chen Mo saw a serious bumpy video, the video was intermittent and the interference was great.

This imagination reminds him of the time when he encounters the turbulence of space.

"The spacecraft's instrument detected a strange wave of space. This strange wave is not a gravitational wave. It has never been seen before. Like a space...storm, the two spaceships behind have lost contact. The bodies of all the tribes are very uncomfortable. 9 Many ethnic groups... strange internal bleeding and tears in the body, we suspect that it is related to spatial fluctuations."

"..."

Chen Mo just stared at the picture in the video, the video can see the distortion behind the Austrian single, which is similar to what Chen Mo saw on the spacecraft, but this distortion is more serious.

"Our body is very uncomfortable... I feel so fast... There is a strange scream in the space, like a whistle, it is very harsh...not the air is spreading, like the space is shaking and screaming..."

This time, Chen Mo completely determined that Ou Dan encountered the same space turbulence as him.

"There is an aperture around the spacecraft, like a vortex entrance. The invisible gravitation pulls our spaceship. We can't escape... Do we encounter stray black holes..."

The voice of Austrian was slowly weak, and finally came to an abrupt end. The picture is fixed and it is impossible to capture the picture mentioned by Olympus. Chen Mo quickly looked at the date and immediately took the spacecraft dice record for that date.

Sure enough, a huge aperture appeared on the picture and then continued to zoom in until the spacecraft was swallowed. Chen Mo now has to suspect that he and the ancestors of the Manshan civilization have encountered the same thing and have been drawn into the aperture.

After reading the record, Chen Mo continued to return to the navigation log.

"Navigation log: atomic clock time, arrogant star calendar 435276 390 at 14:00, spacecraft number 5267. I am after the degree, it is regrettable that Odan and Siwu are dead, they failed to survive the disaster, the spaceship died There are many people. There is also an unfortunate news that our fleet has been completely dispersed. There are only two spaceships left in the fleet, only 150,000 people, and 5.34 million frozen fertilized eggs..."

"The space detector sent a very bad news, the marked pulsar was lost, we lost our way in the universe, and unfortunately, the spacecraft failed, and everyone was desperate."

"Navigation log: atomic clock time, arrogant star calendar 435276 397 at 17 o'clock, spacecraft number 5267. After I was, the people in the spacecraft were in desperate mood, the spacecraft was faulty, not repaired, the fault may be with that The unknown disaster is related, but the journey continues. The surviving astronomers on the spacecraft are awakened and are demonstrating where the spacecraft is."

"Navigation log: ... I am after the degree, Tuoba teacher made a very terrible guess based on the distribution of stars and pulsars. The space we are in is not the original universe, like the alien space. The detector detects the most. The distant galaxies have only 1 trillion light units. This space is very small, the number of stars in the morning is small, and the familiar galaxies are all gone."

"Different space?"

As if he was awakened by a dream, Chen Mo was remembered that there are too few stars in this space. The little mother said that it was in the hole, perhaps the meaning of the alien space.

The 1 trillion light units of the wild mountain civilization are equivalent to 100 million light years of the earth after conversion. This is a small space.

If you are entering an unknown space, then you are in trouble.

Chen Mo feels scalp tingling.

Entering the unknown space, and not sure when to leave. If it takes only a few hundred years to leave, the daylily is cold.

Next to the cockroach saw Chen Mo staring at the screen, a little nervous, at a loss. Although she knew Chen Mo soon, in her understanding, Chen Mo’s personality should not be like this.

As doubtful as she is, there is also the extension of the side. Since being rescued by Chen Mo, it has been like Chen Mo’s little follower, and Chen Mo’s admiration is second only to Grandpa and Muxi. So when I got out of time, I ran to the spaceship and followed Chen Mohe to understand these novelties.

For the first time, he also saw Chen Mo’s state of being confused and overwhelmed.

There are some words in the video that he understands, but there are many who don't understand. He only knows what catastrophe his ancestors encountered, and many people died.

"What?" He couldn't help but ask for an exit.

"We may be in another small, unknown space."

"Another space? Are we in the small universe?" Suddenly thought of something, he asked.

There are a lot of things going on, and there is a turbulent flow in that space. I believe that this is a small universe. There is a small universe support behind the god-level civilization, which is known to the entire universe. Even if she lives in the Qingshui star, which is kept by the three-eye civilization, some information is inevitably flowing in.

The small universe is the foundation of the god-level civilization. This is a well-known thing.

For a long time, the small universe is the dream of all the top civilizations. If it is acquired by the top civilization, the eighth god-level civilization may be born. Now Chen Mo said that they are in a different space and they have to be shocked.

He told Chen Mo all the events in the small universe that he knew.

Through this period of understanding, she found that Chen Mo is not only a warrior, but also a very horrible researcher. In just a few days, he mastered the knowledge and writings of the wild mountain civilization. It can be seen that Chen Mo’s wisdom is so terrible that he needs these. information.

After listening to the description of the small universe, Chen Mo fell into meditation.

Chen Mo knows the existence of the seven god-level civilizations. Now he is said to be so vocal, and immediately realizes the preciousness of the small universe, which is an absolutely safe base and shelter.

With the existence of a small universe, civilization can stand in an invincible position in the cosmic war, so that civilization can continue to flow. But precious is useless. Chen Mo just wants to leave here and return to Earth.

"I am going to take a break, you don't have to bother me."

In the past, Chen Mochao had to learn more about the small universe, to confirm whether it was a small universe, and to find a way to leave it.

The Science and Technology Library is his last trump card.

chapters.title: Chapter 795: : The Ancestral Celebration Of The Manshan
chapters.body:
Chapter 795: : The Ancestral Celebration Of The Manshan

In the science and technology library, Chen Mo put his hand on the technology ball. With Chen Mo’s thoughts, all the books he needed about the small universe and the different space all came to Chen Mo’s mind.

This is a book on basic theory, not specific data and technology. With the permission of Chen Mo, you can already get all these books.

"Spherical Folding Space"

The Difference between Different Spaces and Parallel Universe

The Form of the Little Universe

"Cosmic Chamber"

Space Abyss

......

Chen Mo has repeatedly acquired dozens of theories and descriptions of different spaces and small universes. Massive knowledge has entered Chen Mo’s mind. For the existence of the small universe, Chen Mo also has a clearer concept.

The cosmic chamber is a good description.

The small universe is a special deformed space caused by the collapse of the space in the super-extreme environment of the black hole explosion at the beginning and after the formation of the main universe. It belongs to the spatial content of the main universe. The physical rules are the same as the main universe, but they are not compatible with the main space, forming an independent space, like a space chamber of the universe.

The folded space has no thickness and span, and it can't be seen or touched. Its entrance can be anywhere in the universe.

Once the small universe collapses, its space will re-integrate into the main universe. Let the main universe become bigger. The expansion of the universe exceeds the speed of light, and space folding diastolic and distorted spaces are one of the reasons for integration into the main universe.

Looking at the theory of the small universe, Chen Mo basically determined that this space is the so-called 'small universe'. Starry sky, pulsars, cosmic radius, etc., all kinds of signs have shown that this space is not the original space.

Fortunately, the time of the small universe is the same as the absolute time of the main universe. Chen Mo does not need to worry about the small universe one day, the main universe one year.

Basically confirming this fact, Chen Mo did not have time to worry and began to find ways to leave the small universe in the technology library.

Looking for a long time, Chen Mo got more than a thousand books, and finally decided to leave the small universe.

"Cosmic Chamber Key"

"Space-time vibration frequency and ultra-high energy space piercing technology"

Chen Mo acquired the technique of focusing on opening the space barrier of the small universe.

The small universe and the main universe have space to fold, but the two are not completely separated, there is a spatial connection, and the connection point can be any point in the small universe.

Using the space folding vibration technology, when the vibration frequency of time and space is the same, the connection between the small universe and the main universe can be opened, and the size and position of the small universe entrance can be controlled.

In the main universe, only when coincident time, when the small universe is similar to the vibration of the main space, the space-time vibration frequency of the small universe can be detected, but the space-time vibration frequency of the small universe can be detected at any time in the small universe.

This cosmic chamber can be opened from within the small universe as long as the technology is sufficient. Need to build a door to space connection, Chen Mo had to face this reality.

Extension has long been waiting outside, see Chen Mo from the lounge, and immediately greeted him.

"What is it?" Chen Mo asked.

For the extension, he still likes it very, very clever child.

"Grandpa asked me to invite you to our ancestral celebration, and the celebration is about to begin."

"Zhu Qing?"

Chen Mo stunned and followed the extension to leave the spaceship.

I haven't adapted to the gravity of the wild mountain star, and I can't participate in the celebration. So I can only look at Chen Mo and Tuo leaving the spaceship with envy. She and her mother are kneeling in the spaceship window and watching the celebration party of the Manshan people below.

Outside the window, a festive atmosphere.

The Manshan people are carrying out sacrificial activities to worship the ancestors of the Manshan people, and more than 300,000 people of the Manzan Mountains are concentrated in the largest open space of the village.

This is the Manshan people who specially set up open space for the celebrations. Usually, it is also the main place for the activities of the ethnic people.

The ancestral celebration of the Manshan people is the commemoration day of the planet that the ancestors of the ancestors climbed. Once every year, it lasts for more than 700 years. It is the day when the Manshan people celebrate their new life.

Extension left Chen Mo to explain the origins of the celebration.

In the beginning, it was to celebrate the rebirth. This special day passed down and became the most important festival of the Manzan people.

The ceremony was over, and as night fell, the bonfire was already burning.

Ten piles of fires of more than ten meters high illuminate the entire village of Manzan, in addition to other large and small bonfires, all kinds of meat are on the grill, and there are various fruit foods next to them. Fluorescent plants spread throughout the village, and the decoration is full of dreams.

The villages of the Manshan people are not small, and there are more than 300,000 people, old and young, like the town of the earth. This is the beginning of the ruthless land of the ancestors of the ruins of the mountains. For more than 700 years, it is only such a tribe. It can be seen how harsh the living conditions of the wild mountain stars are.

"Sir, you want to dance, do you want to jump?" Tuo pointed to the large bonfire pile in the distance and looked excited.

"No, you go."

Perhaps carbon-based life has a belief in flames from genes. The mountain people here also have the habit of dancing around the campfire. There are drums next to them, not monotonous. Chen Mo asked him to leave his own past and suddenly saw a figure sitting next to a small campfire and walked over.

"Don't you dance?"

Chen Mo sat next to Jing Ge and asked.

Jing Ge gave Chen Mo a good impression. He was very vocal, and he looked very cold. He didn't enter, but he really didn't imagine it was difficult to communicate.

"Not used to it."

Jing Ge quietly looked at the crowd dancing in the distance around the campfire, and occasionally bowed his head and slammed the things in his hand. It was a small black finger-sized bone. I don't know what to engrave.

Chen Mo grabbed the fruit wine at hand and took a bite. This is a fermented fruit wine of Manshan Star. It tastes sweet and sour, not bad, but not wine.

"Do you like carving?"

"Play when you are fine."

After a while, Jing Ge handed the bone carving in his hand to Chen Mo, and the dagger was also put.

"Give it to you."

"Give me?"

Chen Mo surprised Jing Ge, this stuffy gourd, actually sent him something.

After receiving the bone carving, it looks like a pendant. Chen Mo noticed that there is a similar pendant on Jinge's neck, which is also black and the same material.

"This is the hardest bone on the black beast, the black beast you killed." Jing Ge grabbed the fruit wine next to him and took a sip: "The tribe likes to wear the strongest beast bones on the body, representing strength."

"Thank you." Chen Mo was not polite, wearing a bone pendant on his neck. The material of the black bones was a bit cold: "Is the black beast on your body?"

"Well, two years ago." Jing Ge said faintly: "Are you finding a way to leave?"

"Found, but can't leave now."

Chen Mo shook his head.

He needs to build something that can open the door to the small universe, which takes time.

"What is your world like?"

"It's better than here, but it's more cruel than here. It's hard to describe." Chen Mo drank the wine, took the barbecue that Jing Ge handed over, and looked up at the bonfire pile in front.

Another program of celebration has begun between the two.

"What is this program?"

Chen Mo curiously looked at the crowd.

A large group of people began to gather on the set up of the building, all women, and it looks like a girl in the wild mountain, not very old. Tuoshan is making flowers, two per person, and the flowers are blue and fluorescent, which looks very unique.

Under the stage, a group of young people of the Manshan people looked at each other and looked very excited.

Jing Ge took a look and did not say straight.

Extension has already run from the crowd, sitting between Chen Mo and Jing Ge, excited to watch the girl who is constantly leaving the stage with flowers: "Mr., there is a big show to start, very fun."

"What program?"

Chen Mo looked up and watched the show. Soon, when he saw the girl of the Manshan family sending the flowers in his hands to the young people of the Manshan ethnic group, he understood what was going on.

A blind date.

Chen Mo was happy.

"This is Zu Qing's program, called the husband, and is also the most popular program for men. The girls who meet the ages in the family can choose their husbands when they celebrate today. They will send the flowers in their hands to look at them. In the hands of men, then the man handed the flowers to her, the two sides admitted. If she did not look at the man, she could not send flowers."

Tie was afraid that Chen Mo did not understand and excitedly explained to Chen Mo.

"Is there two? Do you choose two husbands?" Chen Mo asked.

"No, every girl has only one husband. The girl sends two out. If two men choose her, the two men will go to Wutai to fight one, who wins, and the girl."

The extension points away from Wutai, which is not far away. The Manzan people compete with nature. The military is advocating here, and fighting is the best solution.

It is conceivable that the two men will fight **** the Wutai in order to compete for a good girl.

"Every year, men fight for girls and fight in Wutai. It is very intense and is the best-looking link." Tuo added another sentence: "Men can choose multiple girls, up to five."

“Hey? Why?” Chen Mo asked.

"Because there are fewer men." Tuo said to the crowd: "The young men in the family are warriors. They want to enter the forest to hunt and resist the beasts attacking the village. Many soldiers are killed by wild beasts. Therefore, there are more women than men, and the stronger the man, the more popular, so the warriors in the family, during the birthday, like to wear the bones of the beasts they hunted."

Chen Mo is clear, two-way choice, excellent genetic inheritance, inferior elimination.

However, there is a bad way. This method is to choose a powerful warrior, but it is not a powerful mountain. It may be because of the limitations of the living environment that they need strong ethnic groups, but in this way, fewer and fewer intellectuals have created the loss of the Hanshan civilization, and it has almost broken down.

"You wear it too, and you want people to choose?" Chen Mo pointed at the animal tooth necklace and bracelet.

"I haven't reached the age yet, I can't pick up flowers. It's just that everyone wears them, and I wear them." Said, and the extension was shy.

"How does Jing Ge not wear?" Chen Mo looked at Jing Ge.

Jing Ge did not answer, quietly watching the show.

"Jingo is the strongest warrior in the family. The girl knows him. He wears a black animal bone pendant, which is the most powerful animal bone." Tuo pointed out the bone pendant on Jinge's neck.

"Wait if there are a lot of girls coming to Jingo?" Chen Moile got up.

After hesitating, he touched Jinge’s eyes and spit out his tongue and did not dare to speak.

Just finished, Chen Mo saw that a large group of girls had asked for a while around Tuoshan, and then ran over to them, vying for the look of the future, so that Chen Mo was a little gloating.

"Hey, look, come on."

Tuo looked at the girls who ran over and looked surprised. Jingo is a bit stunned.

Soon, Chen Mo found himself wrong.

"My name is Ni."

A girl ran to Chen Mo, put the flower in his hand, and then smiled and greeted him, very bold.

Hey! !

Chen Mo’s smile stopped short and stiffened on his face.

"My name is Dina." The second girl also put a flower in his hand in his hand.

"My name is 茼姒."

......

chapters.title: Chapter 796: :Gloat
chapters.body:
Chapter 796: :Gloat

Chen Mozhen looked at the girls and ran over them, putting the flowers in his hands on his hands.

It has become the focus of the whole audience. Many people of the Manshan people have so many girls giving a man at the same time. The first time they happened to Jingge.

Soon, the Manshan people recognized Chen Mo as the protagonist.

The giant spaceship outside the village is now conspicuous. The village of the Manshan people is not big. There is usually news, and it is a household name.

Chen Mo is a visitor from a foreign country. When he came, he killed an adult black beast and rescued the grandson’s grandson.

These are not secrets in the villages of the Manshan people. They have already known the identity of Chen Mo. The Man Shan people are born to worship the strong, Chen Mo naturally let them admire, and the same as the ancestors of the extraterrestrial visitors.

During this time in the village, I have been talking about Chen Mo, a stranger from the sky. The girls naturally heard Chen Mo’s hunted a black beast and saved the story of the extension.

More than 20 girls gave flowers to Chen Mo, and Jing Ge and Tuo Di, who were next to them, just watched quietly and did not react. In their view, this is expected.

Until no girl came, Chen Mo was still awkward.

"Ah."

Jing Ge saw the appearance of Chen Mo, the cold look changed a little, and the corner of his mouth could not help but pull.

Jinge’s voice ‘Huo’ fell in Chen Mo’s ear, especially different. With a strong sense of gloating, Chen Mo’s face was green. Next to the extension, staring at the flowers in the hands of Chen Mo, a face of worship.

"Do they admit the wrong person? Is it for you?"

Chen Mo looked at Jing Ge, still unbelievable. There are only him, Jing Ge and Tuo San, and he seriously doubts whether he will be handed over to Jing Ge.

Jing Ge ignored him and took care of his barbecue.

"Sir, there is no mistake! Jingo has not been given flowers for a few years." Tie Li reminded Chen Mo, that is to him, and finally could not help but laugh.

Chen Mo heard gloating from his laughter.

"Why? Is he not the strongest fighter?" Chen Mo was puzzled.

"Because Jing Ge just got into adulthood, he received a lot of flowers from the girls. He refused all the sister's flowers for three consecutive years, and then did not like to talk, cold, and later the sisters did not dare to give him."

Tuo said that he was careful, and he still pays attention to Jinge from time to time.

It was only Jing Ge who ignored him from beginning to end.

"Why refused?" Chen Mo was surprised to see Jinge.

Tie shrugs and said that I don't know. Jing Ge also ignored his question and apparently did not want to answer.

"What do I do now?"

Chen Mo is overwhelmed with more than 20 flowers. Although it is still very lively on the court, many of the people of the Shanshan people whispered to Chen Mo and became a half-focus.

"Which sister do you like, I will send the flowers back to her." Tuan Li said: "Up to five, you see the two flowers of Sister and Dina, both tied with animal bones, indicating that they only chose You are awkward."

"I have a lover."

Chen Mo looked at the flowers in his hand and had a headache. This ‘happiness’ was too late to be caught, and Chen Mo met for the first time. If you know it, don't be gloating, and the result will happen to you.

"More than a few sisters are fine. Mr. is so strong, he can certainly take care of them."

"Uh……"

Chen Mo saw that he had lost his pure eyes and lost his battle. It was useless to say to him.

"Can you give me the flowers back to my sisters and let them re-elect?" Chen Mo whispered.

"You send the flowers back to them, just confess them. They will follow you later. Would you like to send them back?"

"It's still not."

Chen Mo looked up and saw a group of girls who were secretly watching him in the distance. The scalp was numb, and the scene is a bit awkward.

Other young people who were selected by girls began to return flowers to the girls one after another. Only Chen Mo did not move, and Chen Mo was the youngest person who received the most flowers.

Nowadays, countless young people are envious and pay attention to Chen Mo’s movements. In the event that Chen Mo chooses the girl they are watching, it will be time to fight with Chen Mo. I heard that Chen Mo can kill black beasts, they are definitely not opponents.

Tuoshan has come over, leisurely and leisurely, with a happy face: "Mr. There are so many girls in the family who are in love with you. Which one do you choose?"

Chen Mo’s mouth twitched, which felt like a matchmaker pulling a few girls to stuff him.

"I have a lover, I can't choose."

The extension of the mountain is clear.

"Sir, when can you leave us?"

"Hey? What do you mean?" Chen Moyi.

"Sir, I am not rushing you to go. I want to say that if Mr. can't leave in a short time, or even can't leave here in his life, why not leave behind the ancestors, or pass it on." Explanation.

He had to suspect that Chen Mo had fallen into the place like a ancestor and could not leave. If so, Chen Mo would have to live here.

Chen Mo can kill the black beast with one stroke, and there is such a strong mechanical technique. If Chen Mo chooses to continue here, the help of their wild mountain family will definitely be great.

"I can leave, and it won't be too long." Chen Mo cried.

"If Mr. really likes it, you can take them away. With the ability of the gentleman, raising a few girls should not be a problem. Is the girl not good enough? They are the best girls in the family. The youth in the family can be I am envious of you."

Tuoshan pointed to the envious eyes around him.

There are many men and women in the Manshan ethnic group. This is a long-term environmental choice, so the Man Shan people allow polygamy, which is conducive to reproduction. The young people in the family hope to find a few outstanding girls. Now they have chosen Chen Mo.

"Not because of this." Chen Mo can't explain now, the two sides have different ideas.

There have been many alien species I have seen. Chen Mo is no longer an aesthetic on earth. The world view is not limited to the same race, but it is impossible for him to marry an unfamiliar person. Some of the young people of the Manshan ethnic group are also because of their feelings, but more of them want to continue to inherit, and Chen Mo is a matter of affection for this kind of thing. And he has a family, although I don't know when I can go back.

"That's a pity."

Tuoshan has some regrets.

Chen Mo refused all the flowers, and the Hanshan girl who chose Chen Mo was somewhat lost, but it was only lost. This is the case every year. Unless the two have feelings, other girls, more want to marry the strong, and Chen Mo refused.

The time of selection has passed, followed by the time of the collapse. The outstanding girls in the family have become the targets of many young people. The girls send out two flowers and are selected by two young people at the same time. The two young people will fight.

At the end of the first phase, there are more than 60 girls who need to compete. Because Chen Mo has collected more than 20 flowers and gave up his choice, the number of people who need to fight this year is much less than before.

Like the people of the Manshan ethnic group, Chen Mo looked at them fighting underneath. The living environment is harsh, they have to maintain blood in this way, and increase their ability to survive. This is a helpless compromise.

I have to say that the fighting skills of the Manshan people are very good.

Here is the jungle environment, they must kill their prey in the fastest way, so the attack is against the weakness, and the shot is clean and neat, there is no extra tricks.

This is the fighting skill accumulated in the jungle life for hundreds of years. It is the simplest and most powerful skill.

However, the battle between the youths in the Manshan people, the starting hands are measured, not coming to death.

For an hour, with the end of the final battle, the election of the grand celebration ended.

chapters.title: Chapter 797: : Preparing To Transform The Planet
chapters.body:
Chapter 797: : Preparing To Transform The Planet

After the ancestors of the Manshan people, Chen Mo returned to his own business.

He is now transforming a neuro-conscious translator. He wants to transform the translator into a machine that can be entered into theoretical knowledge so that he can bring the technology in his mind to the fastest speed, otherwise he can enter it manually, even if he spends months or even half a year. Enter all.

He has no time to waste, he can only sharpen the knife first.

Now that he has confirmed that the specific location is in the small universe, the next major task is to leave the small universe.

Space connection technology is the key to the universe, but opening the space connection requires extra large machinery and ultra-high energy.

Now in this space, the industrial base is almost zero. It is almost impossible to create such a machine, so he has to re-create a new technological civilization.

However, he has a lucky point. At the time of Qing Shuixing, he made nano-robots, and now he is also on his body, and on the three-eye civilization of the speed of light spacecraft, there are nano-printing technology.

These techniques are enough for them to reinvent the planet in the shortest possible time.

A person creates a world.

It may have been a bit difficult in the past, but for Chen Mo, there won't be much problems.

The technology and knowledge stored in his mind is enough for him to do anything, provided that he can quickly take out the technology, otherwise he will not be able to leave the small universe and return to Earth until his life is exhausted.

After a long time, Chen Mo stopped and carefully checked the instruments in his hand.

The conscious translator has also done it on Earth. There are parts printers on the three-eye civilization speed ship. He can easily print the parts he needs, so it is not too difficult to make.

"Ink girl, try the translator now." Chen Mo put on the conscious translator that was just completed.

"The connection is successful." The voice of the ink girl sounded.

Chen Mo will adjust the background of the connection, check the parameters, and then close it after confirming that it is correct.

"Now began to enter the theory of extraction technology for dark matter and antimatter. After you learn it, you will digest the specific technology and then start designing the extraction mechanism for dark matter and antimatter."

"Entering."

The spacecraft's screen began to flow, and countless characters jumped on the screen.

Dark matter and antimatter are the main substances and energy sources of space mechanical materials. To leave the small universe, these two substances are necessary and are the two substances that are needed now.

About an hour, Chen Mocai stopped.

All the required technologies have been recorded into the computer, and many things can be solved by Momei No. 2.

"Mergo, what else is there to do next?" asked the ink girl in the screen.

"You design the prototype of the city of the planet, and at the same time design the required industrial basic machines and prepare for the transformation of the planet." Chen Mo told the ink woman No. 2 to do these things.

"Okay, Merle." Ink responded.

As a super artificial intelligence, it digests all the technical materials in the three-eye civilization light speed spacecraft, and has the technical information given by Chen Mo. The design of many things is not too difficult for the ink female No.2. With super-light quantum computer blessing under super artificial intelligence, the calculation of these techniques is very fast.

"Have something to eat."

Seeing Chen Mo out of the lab, he has been greeted by the boring ambiguity.

The little mother beast on her shoulder saw Chen Mo immediately jumped on him, and fell to Chen Momo's number of times, only to be satisfied, just blaming Chen Mo for research and ignore him.

There are no people talking in the spaceship. She can only speak to the little mother, and needs to adapt to the gravity of the wild mountain planet in order to go out.

The people of the Manshan ethnic group have sent food in, but she and others are not familiar with it. I don't know how to chat, so in addition to playing games, Chen Mo is waiting for the lab.

"Gravity adapts very fast." Chen Mo felt the gravity of the spacecraft, it has reached 3g, the mountain star has 5g gravity, in order to get out of the spaceship early, it is enough to fight.

Seems to be praised, nodded with a smile.

"What are you going to do next?"

"Repair the light speed engine."

Chen Mo took a piece of meat in his mouth and threw it to the little mother beast, holding it and pinching the soft butt. The little mother beast's fat little **** is very fun to play, although the little mother will lick her **** every time, but it is fun.

......

East, as usual, with a javelin, shuttled between the jungle. The jungle is full of danger, and countless soldiers in the family will die here, but he has to come in and hunt.

This is the first time they came out to hunt after Zu Qing.

Two or three people come together, is the best small combination, in case of any problems, but also care, and when encountering larger or quick-moving prey, there are more ways and means of hunting.

It’s Bruce who came with him.

Bruce is younger but the experience is not low.

Children from the family, starting from the age of twelve, can slowly enter the forest and accumulate hunting experience under the leadership of adults. Bruce is now twenty-two years old and is already a veteran.

They have been working together for a long time. Before, Bru's father was also there, and the three formed a group.

Later, Bru's father was bitten by poisonous insects in the forest. He was poisoned and died. It was Brue and he came over.

During the Qing Dynasty, Bruce chose a girl to marry, and the mother and the family were there. His burden was heavier, so he went out to hunt.

Every time I come to the jungle, there is more or less harvest.

In this area, they have come many times, and there are some beasts that are not too threatening. They can be easily hunted, and large hunting beasts rarely appear here.

The warriors in the tribe have more or less fixed hunting places. Unless they encounter a very large beast, the soldiers in the group will gather together to hunt together.

"What is the situation today? How can you not see the shofar?"

Looking at the footprints on the ground, I found no traces.

This area is the area where the horned antelope is often infested, and the traps they install are intact. The horned antelope feeds on the leaves and flowers of the forest, but it is very alert in the forest, and it is very fast. Many times it needs to be ambushed to hunt.

"East, there is a situation, come over soon."

Suddenly, the back of Bruce stopped and greeted the East.

Hearing the serious voice of Bru, the East sneaked down and quickly swept to him. The whole process was very familiar, and there was no loud sound and no broken branches.

Usually in the forest, the hornbill's hearing is very sensitive, a little moving and a little bigger, it will run away, this is their experience of hunting for so long hornbucks, so they also practiced their skills.

Looking through the grass opened by Bruce, the East Spirit was shocked.

A shofar fell in a pool of blood and was already dead.

Seeing this scene, both of them became cautious and slowly approached the body of the horned antelope. There was no trap installed in this position. This indicates that there is a hunting beast nearby. A hunting beast that can hunt a shofar must be a large hunting beast.

In the mountain forest, any kind of hunting beast is very dangerous.

Both of them are paying attention to the presence of special claw marks and footprints on the ground, and they can use this to judge what the hunting beast is.

"what……"

Bruce, who looked at the corpse, suddenly screamed. This voice shocked the east of the wind and turned to look at the body on the ground. The pupil of the east shrank and looked with fear and shock.

chapters.title: Chapter 798: : Thirty-One Years Of Spiders
chapters.body:
Chapter 798: : Thirty-One Years Of Spiders

In the village of the Manshan people, a large group of wild people surrounded the cave where the patriarch was located. Everyone looked very cautious and the atmosphere in the air was very tense.

On the ground is the body of a sable, the brain and abdomen are wide open, and the brain and internal organs are empty and look very strange.

This is the horned antelope that Donghe Bleu brought back from the mountain forest. It was sent to Tuoshan here for the first time.

"They have appeared again." Tuoshan looked the most dignified, staring at the sacred corpse on the ground: "Let the people prepare, immediately move away from here, and prepare now."

The fear in the voice of Tuoshan is lingering.

"The patriarch, why do you want to migrate?" asked an unknown young man who was unclear.

"Thirty-one years ago, the spider appeared."

Tuoshan cautiously said a name, this name is the fear and shadow of the Manshan people. The age of the field is a little longer. I have heard of this name, it is extremely shocking, and even some fear.

"Thirty-one years of spiders?" The young Manshan people heard the name, still do not understand.

"You are still young, have never heard of it. Thirty-one years of spiders are a kind of dormant hunting beasts. They sleep for thirty-one years, wake up every thirty-one years, and wake up on a large scale. They After hunting the prey, the body's acid will melt the brain and internal organs of the prey, and then suck."

Some young mountain people on the field couldn't help but retching a few times, thinking that the picture was a bit scary.

"Do you know why our barbarians have been here for seven hundred years, or is it only 300,000 people?"

Tuoshan still couldn't help but open the heavy history of the Manshan people.

“The ancestors lived on the planet and combined with the indigenous people. In the following hundred years, the size of the Manzan people once reached 4 million people. The ancestors established a large-scale mountain town. When the ethnic civilization can be passed down slowly, a terrible thing appears, that is, thirty-one years of spiders.

Six hundred years ago, thirty-one years ago, the spiders attacked our ethnic group for the first time. The disaster caused three million deaths and the ancestors chose to migrate. Losing the blessing of the original town, the population on the way to migration is getting less and less, which is the first large-scale loss of the Manshan civilization.

Later, the second habitat was found, and the population gradually increased. After 217 years, the number of habitats reached more than 8 million. Near the habitat, there was another large-scale thirty-one-year-old spider. The people were slaughtered. The population has dropped sharply to 1.5 million. After the disaster, the remaining ethnic groups were divided into five parts and migrated in different directions, which was the second large-scale loss of the Manshan civilization.

Later, our branch group encountered another 31-year-old spider, and the ancestors combined the books to record and finally found the characteristics of this species. Sleep for thirty-one years, then in a season of moderate temperature, wake up on a large scale, kill enough food, they will mate, then grow wings, disappear overnight, fly to the bottom of a river in this land Sleep.

Their offspring slowly developed in the belly of the female spider, until 31 years later, they broke out of the egg, feed on the body of the female spider, and even eat other twins to grow rapidly, and finally leave the bottom of the water to hunt for food, the beast The brain and internal organs are their food. ”

As the top of the mountain said, the voice was a little trembling.

Every 31 years, the emergence of a spider, is the arrival of a catastrophe.

He did not know how the branch communities that migrated to other places ended up, but this group of people, after suffering disasters more than three hundred years ago, later migrated several times because of other disasters.

When they left the original place and settled in this land because of a drought, the population was only tens of thousands of people. Now it has grown to a scale of 300,000. Blade spider.

"Can't you kill them all?" asked Tuan Curious.

"Difficult, they are very dangerous, the number is huge, the blade is very poisonous, it is stabbed in it, it will die if it takes too long, and it will be large, once, and life will disappear. Until they are full, they will not eat again. Something." Tuoshan sighed.

Oh...

The words of Tuoshan just fell, the horn of the tower in the village sounded, and the people of the mountain were all discolored.

The tower in the village is to prevent the tower of the large beast attack. This horn sounds, which means the village is in a state of emergency.

"The patriarch, the thirty-one-year-old spider on the left side of the village, is coming in our direction." A wild mountain rushed over and stopped in front of Tuoshan, with a voice of fear.

Tuoshan’s hands and feet were cold and coming too fast.

"Immediately let the people in the family leave behind the village and extend to inform the gentleman."

Chen Mo is commanding the robot to repair the light speed engine. The radar of the spacecraft suddenly alarms. He knows that there is an invasion. He just left the spacecraft and the extension has already arrived outside the spacecraft.

"What's the matter?" Chen Mo looked at the anxious extension.

"Grandpa said that the emergence of the blade spider in thirty-one years." Tuo said with a panting.

"Thirty-one years of spiders? What?"

"A very dangerous beast." Tuo said anxiously: "Grandpa lets you leave soon, the village is dangerous, and the tribes are fleeing."

Uh?

Chen Moyi, what danger can the planet have against him? However, it may be dangerous for the Manzan people.

"You go inside the spaceship first, I will go see it."

"Mr., it's really dangerous, can't go." Extension left anxiously pulling Chen Mo.

"Forgot I will fly? It is still very powerful." Chen Mo said.

Seeing the armor covered by Chen Mo, Tuo suddenly remembered the scene when he first saw Chen Mo, and finally released Chen Mo.

"You go to the spaceship to hide, inside is safe." Chen Mo let the extension into the spaceship, the battle armor floated up, flew to the left of the village where the radar prompted a large red dot.

Countless monsters are coming out of the forest and approaching the village.

This is the extension of the thirty-one-year-old spider, a kind of alien.

Thirty-one years ago, the spider looks like a spider, and it is a bit like an octopus, but the legs are not soft. The six long-legged limbs are more than one-meter-high. The ruler is serrated with a black luster. The claws are the origin of their names. In the head of the bucket, the four eyes are cold and bloody, and the mouth is short.

The soldiers in the village are resisting the approach of the blade spiders. Jinge is also in the escort, while the villages behind are fleeing quickly toward the back hills. The scene is a bit confusing.

The people in the village are braving the escape and resisting the blade of the 31-year-old spider, and have not noticed the arrival of Chen Mo.

Chen Mo’s height rose again.

This height can be seen, the distant spider blade is emerging from the big lake not far from the village, and extends to the forest near the village.

And not only in this direction, but also in other directions in the Great Lakes, but by the screaming of the blade spiders, many blade spiders are coming in the direction of the village, with hundreds of thousands.

"Do you have a nest?"

Chen Mo stared at the distant lake and glanced.

At this distance, an atomic bomb is thrown, and the whole village will be destroyed. But the bombs and the powerful explosives, which are too small, are not, and they may not be able to kill these aliens. They can only use other methods.

"The patriarch, let the soldiers in the family go back to the village, and give it to me." Chen Mochao shouted under the mountain.

"Do you have a way?"

Tuoshan only noticed Chen Mo in the air and looked very happy. He knew that Chen Mo’s machinery was very powerful. If Chen Mo had a way, he would definitely help them solve this problem. Maybe the Shanshan people are no longer afraid of the 31-year-old spider. Threat.

"It's a very simple matter," Chen Mo said.

During this period of contact, Chen Mo’s impression of the alien race of the Manshan ethnic group was good. Although it was militant, it was very simple and friendly. At least it was not because Chen Mo was an outsider, but he was also very enthusiastic.

"You guard the village and prevent the entry of the order into the village."

“Is there really a way?” Tuoshan was hesitant.

"Well, it's a simple matter to do as I said."

"it is good."

Tuoshan promised that Chen Mo is a stranger, with incredible spaceships and machinery, like God, he chose to believe Chen Mo.

Chen Mo took out a small thumb-sized container with a little gray powder from the armor.

"it has started."

Chen Mo opened the small container and dropped it directly, a very simple matter. Gray powder is a nano-robot. For this planet, this is a dimensional reduction blow.

Tuoshan and Jing Ge and others did not expect that Chen Mo just lost a small thing and at the same time. The small container fell to the ground, and there was no movement, so the barbarian warriors who saw this scene were all a glimpse, and did not understand what Chen Mo was doing.

Diligence, two interest... After the break, there is still no movement.

Thirty-one years ago, the spiders are climbing up the fence of their village. This is their last line of defense. If they enter the village, the massacre will begin. Not everyone in the family is so strong. Old and weak women are under these monsters. There is no possibility of surviving at all.

"Sir, this is not a joke." Tuoshan is already in a hurry.

Chen Mo used the laser to sweep the spider that climbed the fence, and said faintly: "Begin."

chapters.title: Chapter 799: : The Followers Of The Manshan
chapters.body:
Chapter 799: : The Followers Of The Manshan

A group of gray matter rises from the ground and spreads rapidly. The grass is like a piece of paper swallowed by gray flames. The bright colors are disappearing rapidly, and the area of gray is increasing.

咕唧 嘶 嘶...

Not long after, the thirty-one-year-old spider spiders who were infected with nano-robots made strange noises, lost their original speed, and struggled on the ground. For thirty-one years, a corroded wound appeared and slowly expanded.

The scale of nano-robots is rapidly expanding, wrapping the thirty-one-year-old spiders struggling on the ground. Not long after, the thirty-one-year-old spiders wrapped in nano-robots disappeared, and there were no more wills.

The picture is very impactful.

The growth of nanobots has not stopped, and it is spreading over the other 31 years.

A minute later, the nano-robot's fog group has reached hundreds of cubic meters, and the air is like a gray dust group floating in the air, which is spreading wildly elsewhere.

In the past, thirty-one years ago, the spiders were in painful struggles and finally disappeared completely.

The blade spiders who had been attacking the village of Manshan in an orderly manner, lost their sense of proportion in the moment of the agitation of the nano-robot. With the madness of the scale of nano-robots, a barrier has been formed in front of the village.

All the thirty-one-year-old spiders who want to cross this barrier near the village of Manshan are struggling wildly, then die in struggle, and finally disappeared.

Not long after, the nano-robot reached a scale of tens of thousands of cubic meters.

In the village of Manshan, Tuoshan and a group of soldiers looked at the scene of horror in front of them, and their feelings were shocked. Everything they see is completely beyond what they can recognize. Only the legendary **** has this means.

At the beginning, I was worried that Chen Mo could help them to withstand the disaster of the 31-year-old spider. The incredible scene in front of them allowed them to eliminate all their worries.

"The patriarch, Mr. Mo is the **** of heaven?" A barbarian warrior looked up at Chen Mo in the air and looked up.

"I do not know either."

It was unbelievable that Tuoshan had returned to God. He had seen the machinery. He had heard of the spacecraft, and the ancestors recorded it. But this horrible scene, he saw for the first time, is completely miraculous, he does not even know what black fog is, what is the use.

The replication growth of nano-robots is terrifying. Now it has spread all over the open space, and there is no life left.

Thirty-one years ago, the spider did not know the fear. It was like a moth that was burning fire. It was constantly rushing into the nano-robot that protected the village of Manshan, and then was swallowed up.

Oh...

Not long after, the nano-robot suddenly exploded and was divided into a number of shares, spreading in all directions toward the mountain forest. Wherever it goes, the trees are eroded away, leaving a long trajectory and a growing nano-robot.

One-sided slaughter, thirty-one years before the spider in front of the nano-robot, there is no resistance, this is the strike-down.

The escape of the Manzan people has stopped. Soon, the tribes have heard that Chen Mo has blocked the news of the 31-year-old spider. More and more people have received news, stop fleeing and return to the village, and continue to gather in the east of the village.

Everyone was shocked by the sights in front of them, the forest had disappeared, the trees were all gone, even the fallen leaves on the ground, leaving nothing, leaving them with only a bare open space, and nano-robots flying in the air like mosquitoes. .

"Mr. Mur is so powerful?"

"Mr. Mo must be the **** of the ancestors sent to save us."

"..."

The eyes of countless worships cast into the high-altitude Chen Mo, full of enthusiasm.

In the spaceship, the screen also played a scene in which the blade spider was slaughtered for thirty-one years. At this time, there was only fanaticism and worship. He knows that Mr. is very powerful, but he did not expect such a horror.

Chen Mo floated in the air, quietly watching the expansion of nano-robots.

It is not a rare thing to solve the disaster of the blade spider for thirty-one years. This is only for him to eliminate a pest, and if it is not because the Manzan is here, he only needs an atomic bomb or a hydrogen bomb. Get these monsters.

The slaughter of nano-robots continues, one thousand square meters, two thousand square meters, five thousand square meters, one square kilometer...

The dense fog is exponentially increasing, and all the places of contact become dead. The trees and grasses are all eaten by the nano-robots.

The slaughter lasted for an hour. The fog of the nano-robot was lined up on the edge of the village of Manshan. It stretched for ten kilometers in the east, and there was no life. The Great Lakes nest that thrived for thirty-one years was surrounded by nano-robots. The monsters coming out of the lake are swallowed up in an instant.

Witnessing the whole process of Tuoshan, the shock of my heart can not be dispersed for a long time.

This horrible destruction is chilling.

The process of killing the fog does not feel a trace of temperature. There is no emotion. All the lives of the forest are invisible in the face of this fog, and there is no blood even. Life is worthless at this moment.

This kind of fog is more cold and **** than the blade spider.

If this happens to them, the consequences are unimaginable.

At this moment, he realized how terrible Chen Mo was wearing a warrior and his character was peaceful. At the same time, it was fortunate that Chen Mo’s existence saved their people from the murder of the tribe.

Otherwise the monsters enter their village and their entire village will be slaughtered.

The Great Lakes, which were bred for thirty-one years, were filled up, no more spiders appeared, and a disaster, such an understatement was quelled. I thought that the Manshan people would be devastated by the genocide, but they did not expect this scene.

"Tianyou Manshan."

Recalling the ancestors and tribes who were slaughtered by the 31-year-old blade spider, Touthan couldn't help but see the red. If it weren't for the disaster of the 31-year-old spider, they wouldn't have fallen into this position.

Now thirty-one years ago, the spiders are easily slaughtered. If they can solve this problem completely, they will have the hope of living on this planet with peace of mind.

"Sir, please accept me."

Seeing that Chen Mo fell, Tuoshan put his fists on the top of his head and closed his eyes to Chen Mo.

This is the highest ritual of the Manzan people. Only the most respected people in the family have always been honored with this noble etiquette. This embarrassment represents the highest respect of the Manzan people and represents the object of the unconventional guardianship of the Manzan people.

"Mr."

Not only is Tuoshan, but other other mountain people on the field have done the same actions as Tuoshan, and they have bowed to Chen Mo.

Surviving on this planet, thirty-one years of spiders are the most threatening life, the environment here is bad, Chen Mo this time, is undoubtedly to save them and their families.

“Hands over the effort.” Chen Mochao returned to the mountain and whispered: “I just have something to discuss with the patriarch.”

"Sir, you want us to do anything, we will not refuse." Tuoshan looks serious.

"I want to transform this planet. Do you want to change the way of life? A civilized way of life, just like your ancestors." Chen Mo said.

“Is it really ok?” Tuoshan looked shocked and asked excitedly.

"It's not difficult."

"Sir, I said on behalf of all the people of the Manshan ethnic group, I am willing to follow Mr.." Tuoshan was excited and witnessed Chen Mo's means. He knew that this was an opportunity for his people.

"amount?"

Chen Mo did not expect that Tuoshan would directly choose to follow him, but he did not refuse.

"That's it now."

chapters.title: Chapter 800: : The Bad Guys Come From Me.
chapters.body:
Chapter 800: : The Bad Guys Come From Me.

"Ink girl, according to the design of the planet city, began to transform the wild mountain star." Chen Mo gave the spacecraft super artificial intelligence command: "Use an anti-material energy core as the city's energy."

As Chen Mo’s instructions went on, it stretched for dozens of kilometers of fog and began to gather toward the energy core.

The thickness of the nano-robots gathered on the ground is getting larger and larger, and the nano-robots stretching for ten kilometers are once again expanded, and the squares are dozens of kilometers long. They are quickly enveloped and eroded by nano-robots.

A mountain is under the corrosion of nano-robots. In less than twenty minutes, the entire mountain disappears.

In the last hour, I also suffered from the crisis of the genocide. The next hour was gone, and the people of the Manshan ethnic group had not recovered from the killings that had just been shocked. The incredible scenes in front of them made them completely forget to think.

In the world they know, only the tools of the sword and the arrow, as well as the machinery and spacecraft owned by the ancestors of the mountains, have never seen this kind of power beyond the cognition, only the gods in fantasy.

"Mr. is a man of God."

Extension has already come out of the spaceship, watching Chen Mo's eyes, with endless heat.

Jinge, who has been cold and cold, has a curious look at this time, and he is staring at the changes in front of him. Other ethnic groups of the Manshan people are all respectful, admired, shocked and incredible.

It has been completely convinced by Chen Mo’s means.

Where Chen Mo’s vision passes, except for the villages of the Manshan people, the others are all nano-robots, like a mobile nano-robot ocean, and the village of the Manzan is in the ocean center of nano-robots.

This kind of technology to transform the world, Chen Mo only tried on Mars, and now used again in the wild mountain star, like hundreds of millions of nano-robots stacked in Lego City.

A large building began to rise, and the foundations of all buildings were connected, roads, tracks, machinery, factories, vehicles, schools, research institutes, energy core power stations, and residential areas.

The people of Tuoshan and Manshan people stood in the same place, watching the scene of this dream happen, like a song in the ear, and tears in their eyes.

Terrible construction speed, this is the power to move mountains and reclamation.

Chen Mo himself was the first to see the power of large-scale nano-robots at close range. Previously, nano-robots were built on Mars. He could only watch them through the camera, or when they were tested in the laboratory.

This close-up shock is very real.

But Chen Mo is very clear-headed. This kind of great power is nothing to be said about high-level civilization. Compared with the terrible-scale artificial planet of Origin City, his achievements in building a city are not worth mentioning.

"Now let them expand themselves. You and the tribes can choose their own homes. They don't have to rent caves and wooden houses in the future." Chen Mo pointed to the residential area that had been built.

"Those things won't hurt us?" Tuoshan questioned.

He saw the fog growing from a little bit to a process of stretching for thousands of kilometers. The vegetation and the terrible blade spiders were all swallowed up, and there was no leaf or a drop of blood left.

He still doesn't dare to think about the things that make up the fog.

"Nothing, these nano-robots that form buildings have self-destructed, and the structure solidifies ‘death’, and this will be the case in the future, will not move, and will not increase.” Chen Mo said.

It's just the beginning now.

To leave the small universe, space technology is indispensable, and Chen Mo knows that it is impossible to leave here immediately. It is now necessary to establish space piercing techniques as the key to the universe's secret room before leaving the small universe.

Moreover, the super-light-speed space curvature spacecraft must also be built, because when leaving the small universe, Chen Mo is not sure where he will be in the universe, and then he will have a super-light-speed space curvature spacecraft to return to the earth quickly.

For some time to come, Chen Mo must develop the required technology within the small universe.

......

Earth Building No. 1, Biological Laboratory.

The biological experiments here are running at the fastest speed. In the laboratory, ten kinds of animals are contained in ten glass boxes.

Super-developed animals.

A long-winged pig, a red-lighted monkey under the skin, a body-building orangutan, a cat with an electro-optic eye, a rabbit with a hind leg, and a small shark with a bare body. a stone-like turtle...

Every kind of life is different from the original life.

If outsiders are here, they will certainly feel incredible about these lives.

However, the instrument detects that the life and vital signs in the glass box are intact, there is no obvious difference, and the life characteristics are much stronger than the previous ones.

Super power life.

The laboratory door was opened, and the ink girl led Xiao Yu and Zhao Min into the laboratory and stopped outside the laboratory-isolated glass window.

"Experimental samples that have just been harvested, their signs are intact, their cell activity is dozens of times stronger than before, and some genes are changed. The new gene synthesis of 'super-power' substances is the source of their physical strength and super power. ""

Ink women introduced Xiao Yu and Zhao Min to the progress of the experiment.

Super-power technology is one of the most important technologies left by Chen Mo. Now Xiao Yu and Zhao Min are in charge of the entire marching ant group. The ink girl will continue to experiment with the permission of the two.

After all, the experiment is very important.

"Accurately, their lives have evolved, whether they are cells, body and wisdom, better than the original, like the super-power mutants in science fiction movies," said the ink girl.

"This kind of super-capacity medicine, after drinking it, will the body produce some changes?" Xiaoyu carefully looked at the animals in the laboratory and looked at the medicine in the glass refrigerator.

"Not all meetings, in theory, only a part of the appearance of the shape of the change, is based on the ability to distinguish. For example, the pig with wings, the shape changes significantly, but this cat, it is the original form. Cat gets raw The ability of electricity, this ability has nothing to do with the shape, so it will not change. In theory, people are the same. But they are not sure whether they can control their own changes and restore their normal shape." Ink said.

"Is that success now?" Zhao Min asked urgently.

"Their vital signs are complete, and the super-capacity development technology is initially successful. But it has not been tested on the human body. This technology, the human body experiment, there are too many things to consider."

The ink girl answered truthfully.

“The next phase will continue to explore, so that the super-power development technology does not change the shape of the organism, or it can be controlled by the organism. But the second phase is used on the human body, and human trials are needed to determine the continuous improvement of the effect.”

"A little trouble."

Superpower technology is used on the human body. At present, humans on Earth cannot accept this practice. If there is a variation in the shape of the body, it will definitely lead to panic.

"This is the technology that Mu Ge asked for research and development. Now that Mo Ge is not there, how to deal with these technologies? Is it to continue research or to seal up?" asked the ink girl.

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min looked at each other and knew each other's thoughts.

"In the future, the era of the universe, aliens exist, many things are no longer important. Continue the second phase of research, volunteers I will let Wang Hai find them. He said before that the universe has no moral standards, this is his Research, the bad guys will come from me."

Zhao Min looks indifferent.

Without development, there is no need for cost. Chen Mo is absent. The nickname of this price is borne by her. Human beings must develop rapidly. Otherwise, in the cosmic era, only destruction will occur.

"What about Xiao Yujie?" The ink girl looked at Xiaoyu.

Xiao Yu sighed and pulled Zhao Min’s hand tightly. She didn’t know that Zhao Min was carrying these things for her: “Listen to Zhao Min’s sister.”

chapters.title: Chapter 801: : Soldier Ant System
chapters.body:
Chapter 801: : Soldier Ant System

Conglong's energy shield blocks laser radiation from a distance, quickly changing position and approaching the source of the laser.

Now in the personal rankings of the Ares list, his luck is not very good, matching Wu Danfeng, the first point in the God of War list, the game iD: Feng Yan.

He knows that only when he is close to the other side will he have a chance to win this game.

The marching ant group virtual reality game equipment has been out for three months, the price is not expensive, and the e-sports fans who like the game can afford it.

The emergence of "Super Warrior" has triggered a revolution in the game world.

This game, no plug-ins, no privilege, equal game conditions and environment, coupled with advanced technology, let the masters of each other appear.

At the same time, there are various armor configurations and armor style genres.

The God of War list, which represents the highest personal honor in the field of competition, has become the object of national competition.

Wu Danfeng was the first group of professional teams to stand out from the crowd. He began to be unremarkable in a small professional team. After the "Super Warrior" came out, he sang all the way and finally reached the top of the God of War, becoming the new **** of the game industry.

Wu Danfeng has created a line of close combat genre, energy shield, close combat weapons, flexible walking style, combined with the traditional traditional fighting skills.

When this genre appears, it is referenced by various players.

Wu Danfeng was also signed by hundreds of millions of contracts and was signed to the top dynasty club in China. In the first virtual reality super league, Wu Danfeng reached the top with his personal ability and led the team to win the championship in the team and eventually became the game field. The new top god.

Unlike Wu Danfeng, Conglong is not a professional player in e-sports, but a retired fighting boxer who is boring to contact the game.

It’s only a month since I contacted Super Warrior, and this month, I’m completely hooked on this game.

The blood of the battle armor is very exciting, and only this kind of game can be called a game. During this time, he has been groping from a game novice, to the top of the current rankings, and the speed is so fast that he is incredible.

I came up to the game today and just matched two personal rankings. The result matched Wu Danfeng. I have to say that the strength of the other side is really strong, giving him a lot of pressure.

However, Cong Long did not have pressure because the other party was Wu Danfeng. He lost nothing. If he won, he would become famous. He also wanted to try. How strong is the strength of the top god.

Cong Long is using the armor template provided by the marching ant group to debug the design of the armor according to his own ideas. Although he does not understand the armor, he only needs to configure the armor function. Other data, the game system will Automatically help him adapt.

He does not ask for a fight, just to experience the way he likes to fight.

The current environment is space. It is a battlefield where the game is randomly matched. This unobtrusive battlefield has high requirements for melee, and the requirements for individuals are not low. The brain will feel weightless, but Conglong is not nervous.

His style is a bit close to Wu Danfeng, so he studied the fighting style of Wu Danfeng. Many traditional fighting techniques, combined with the application of the battle armor, he learned the style of Wu Danfeng and will rise so fast.

But he does not cite Wu Danfeng's style in its entirety. He has his own unique things.

The battle between the two has reached a stage of arduousness, because Wu Danfeng is a professional e-sports god, is broadcasting live, countless fans of Wu Danfeng, and coaches of top e-sports clubs, are paying attention to this game.

The fighting styles of Cong Long and Wu Danfeng are very close to each other, and they are very ornamental, so that the people watching can feel the blood. In this kind of battle, there was a mistake, and the two sides could solve the opponent within less than one second, so the response to the divisional division was particularly demanding.

"Wu Danfeng's attack was blocked by his energy shield. Which big dragon player is this trumpet player?"

"I haven't heard of it. I am afraid that in the future, this is the enemy of Wu Danfeng."

"His armor is very special, he is equipped with the armor that suits his fighting style."

"His energy shield is very powerful, and it can easily block ultra-high-energy laser weapons and arcs. This is a classic feature of melee armor. It blocks the other's energy weapons and then closes."

“They have both learned fighting and many classic fighting techniques have been used.”

"Wu Danfeng is releasing water?"

......

Wu Danfeng is attacking wildly, always paying attention to finding the weakness of the other side. As the number one in the temporary points, if you lose to a nameless person, the impact on him is not small.

In addition to playing games, he also likes fighting and shooting. He is an amateur boxer. After the emergence of virtual reality games, he quickly finds the match between the game and reality, so he will be from the unknown e-sports player. Quickly promoted to the level of the players of the Great God, and create a route of close combat.

Later, he joined the Dynasty Club, and there were professional coaches who arranged the suits suitable for him according to his fighting style. He also trained in professional fighting training, and the strength was even higher.

So when everyone was still groping for the Battle of War, he took the lead.

Obviously, this unknown player has also found a match between the game and reality, and is also a proficient fighter. The fighting style is similar, they are quite two boxing players wearing gloves.

It’s just that there are no rules on the court.

The other party gave him a lot of pressure. He wanted to open the distance and look for a breakthrough, but he was stuck by Cong Long.

Drops!

The armor gave an alarm without warning, and Wu Danfeng’s face changed greatly.

"Warning: The armor is broken."

"Warning: The armor is broken."

How can the armor break? Obviously not attacked.

Finished! Wu Danfeng only felt that the armor lost control, and finally he was black, waking up from the seat of the virtual reality device.
